Matthew18:35 Naboigo na Tata one ore igoro arabakorere nainwe, onye timokwabera abamino ase chinkoro chiaino ime.”" 
Matthew19:1 Ekero Yeso achia gokoora amang’ana ayio, akarua Galili, agasoa ensemo ya Boyahudi ng’umbu ya Yorodan;" 
Matthew19:2 na emeganda emenene ekamotunyana, akabagwenia aroro." 
Matthew19:3 Abafarisai bakamochiera, bakamoteema ase okomoboria, “Inee! Mboronge omonto atige mokaye ase ring’ana rinde rionsi?”" 
Matthew19:4 Akabairaneria, “Timwana gosoma buna ere oyobatongete korwa omochakano, nere obatongete omosacha na omokungu," 
Matthew19:5 agateba: Ase engencho eyio omonto natige ise na ng’ina, abwatane na mokaye, na abwo babere nigo barabe omobere oyomo?" 
Matthew19:6 Ase igo tibakoba babere naende, korende omobere oyomo. Naboigo, ebi Nyasae abwatanirie, mwanyabanto tabiatanana.”" 
Matthew19:7 Bakamoboria, “Nase ki rende Musa achigete komoa omokungu rirube ri’ogotigana, nakomotiga?”" 
Matthew19:8 Akabatebia, “Nase engencho y’obokong’u bwe chinkoro chiaino Musa abaerete ribaga gotiga abakungu baino, korende korwa omochakano ayio tarenge bo." 
Matthew19:9 Korende inche nabatebirie, oyoratige mokaye, otatiga ase engencho y’obotomani, na konyuoma oyonde, oyio otomanire; naende oyoranyuome omokungu oyotigirwe, otomanire.”" 
Matthew19:10 Aborokigwa bakamotebia, “Amang’ana igoro y’omonto na mokaye karabe engencho eye, tegwenereti konyuoma.”" 
Matthew19:11 Korende akabatebia, “Tari bonsi baranyare gwancha ring’ana eri, otatiga abwo baeirwe." 
Matthew19:12 Naki mbare abagomba abaiboretwe bo, naende mbare abagomba aba abanto bagombaetie, naende mbare abagomba abekorete abanyene koba abagomba ase engencho y’oboruoti bwa igoro. Oyoranyare gwancha ring’ana eri, tiga arianche.”" 
Matthew19:13 Erio abana abake bakarentwa asare, erinde ababekere amaboko aye na kobasabera. Aborokigwa baye bagatanga abanto," 
Matthew19:14 korende Yeso agateba, “Batige abana bache asende, timobaisa kobatanga, ekiagera abare buna aba, oboruoti bwa igoro nobwabo.”" 
Matthew19:15 Akababekera amaboko aye, akaimoka korwa aroro, akagenda." 
Matthew19:16 Na rora, omonto oyomo akamochiera, akamoboria, “Omworokia ngokora ki okuya ndakore nyore obogima bwa kare na kare?”" 
Matthew19:17 Akamotebia, “Nase ki okomboria ninki kere ekiya? Oyomo nareo oyore omuya. Onye korigetie gosoa ase obogima, bwata amachiko.”" 
Matthew19:18 Akamoboria, “Ayare buna arari?” Yeso akamoiraneria, “Toita, Totomana, Toiba, Toteba oborimo," 
Matthew19:19 sika iso na nyoko; naende: Ancha omogisangio oo buna bweanchete.” 
Matthew19:20 Omomura oria akamotebia, “Ayio onsi nayabwatire; ing’ana ki rimochete?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yeso akamotebia, “Onye korigetie koba omoikeranu, gachie, oonie ebio ore nabio bionsi, oe abataka, na aye nobe nenibo igoro; erio oche ontunyane.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ekero achia koigwa ring’ana riria, omomura oria akagenda nobororo, ekiagera arenge nenibo enyinge." 
Matthew19:23 Yeso agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Nekeene nabatebirie: Nabe aakong’u ase omonto omonda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa igoro." 
Matthew19:24 Naende nabatebirie inwe, naororo engamia goeta ase ekebao gi’esindani, kobua omonto omonda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Matthew19:25 Ekero aborokigwa bachia koigwa aya, bagakumia mono, bagateba, “Ning’o rende oranyare gotooreka?”" 
Matthew19:26 Korende Yeso akabarigereria, akabatebia, “Ase mwanyabanto takonyarekana, korende ase Nyasae onsi nigo akonyarekana.”" 
Matthew19:27 Erio Petero akamoiraneria, “Rora, intwe twatigire bionsi, twagotunyanire, inki rende toranyore?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yeso akabatebia, “Nekeene nabatebirie: Ase ense enyia, ekero Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto agochi‐gocha goikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, inwe abamwantunyanire namoche goikaransera ebirogo bi’obonene ikomi na bibere, mokogambera ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli." 
Matthew19:29 Na onde bwensi otigete chinyomba, gose bamura bamwabo, gose basubati bamwabo, gose ise, gose ng’ina, gose abana, gose emegondo ase engencho y’erieta riane, namenteranigwe ara rigana, na obogima bwa kare na kare nabonyore." 
Matthew19:30 Korende abange abare abe ritang’ani inababe abanyuma, na abanyuma inababe abe ritang’ani." 
Matthew20:1 “Naki oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bogwekaine nomonto omonyene enyomba oyosogete mambia chuni kogenda korika abaremi ase omogondo oye bw’emesabibu. 
Matthew20:2 Gachia gwancherana nabaremi rituko erimo edinari eyemo, akabaira ase omogondo oye bw’emesabibu." 
Matthew20:3 Agasoka chinsa isato, akarora abande bateneine echiiro, batari nemeremo," 
Matthew20:4 akabatebia nabarabwo: Genda nainwe ase omogondo one bw’emesabibu na inche nimbae ekere kia boronge. Bakagenda. 
Matthew20:5 Agasoka naende chinsa isano nemo, ne chinsa kianda, agakora boigo." 
Matthew20:6 Goika chinsa ikomi nemo agasoka, akarora abande bateneine, akabatebia nabarabwo: Ninki mwatenenera aa bwaira, motari nemeremo?" 
Matthew20:7 Bakamotebia: Ekiagera titorikiri na monto. Akabatebia: Genda nainwe boigo ase omogondo one bw’emesabibu. 
Matthew20:8 Ekero riagorobire, omonyene omogondo agatebia omorendi oye: Rangeria abaremi, obae eng’eria yabo, ochakere korwa abanyuma goika abe ritang’ani." 
Matthew20:9 Ekero baria barigetwe chinsa ikomi nemo bachete, bakanyora kera oyomo edinari eyemo." 
Matthew20:10 Bono ekero abe ritang’ani bacha, bagakaga ng’a barabwo nabaegwe kobua abande, bakanyora nabarabwo kera oyomo edinari eyemo." 
Matthew20:11 Erio kabaeirwe, bakaba nkwemurungania bare ase omonyene enyomba," 
Matthew20:12 bakabora: Abwo ba nyuma nigo bakora emeremo y’ensa eyemo yoka, na aye kwabatoreng’aneria naintwe abatwaremereretie emechando ne riberera ri’omobaso bwonsi." 
Matthew20:13 Ere akairaneria oyomo obo: Omosani, tingokorereti bobe. Titwancheranete naye ase edinari eyemo?" 
Matthew20:14 Bwata ekere ekiao, ogende; nindigetie koa oyo o nyuma koreng’ana naye." 
Matthew20:15 Inee! Tindi neribaga gokora buna ndigetie omonyene nebinto biane? Gose naki okorigereria neriso riibe, ekiagera inche inde omuya?" 
Matthew20:16 Naboigo abanyuma inababe abe ritang’ani, na abe ritang’ani inababe abanyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Na Yeso, ekero arenge gotiira gochia Yerusalemu, akabaira ensemo aborokigwa baye ikomi na babere." 
Matthew20:18 Kobare inchera, akabatebia, “Rora, ngotiira tore gochia Yerusalemu, na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nabekwe ase amaboko ’abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko, na barabwo nabamogambie akwe," 
Matthew20:19 naende nabamobeke ase amaboko ’abanto b’Ebisaku; nakorerwe echeche, naende naakwe emecharichi na kobambwa; na ase rituko ria gatato nabokigwe.”" 
Matthew20:20 Erio ng’ina abana ba Zebedi akamochiera amo nabana baye, akamotung’amera na komosaba ring’ana." 
Matthew20:21 Yeso akamoboria, “Inki origetie?” Akamoiraneria, “Chika ng’a abana baane babere baikaranse, oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwao gw’okorio, na oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwao gw’okobee ase oboruoti bwao.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yeso akairaneria, “Inwe timomanyeti eri mogosaba. Inee! Namonyare konywera egekombe ndache konywera inche?” Bakamotebia, “Natonyare.”" 
Matthew20:23 Akabatebia, “Egekombe nkonywera inche, namokenywere, korende ribaga ri’ogoikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio na ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okobee, tindi nokobua gw’okobaa, otatiga abwo bagacheire na Tata one nabwo barariegwe.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ekero baria ikomi bachia koigwa aya, bakabea ase abamura baria babere ba ise omo." 
Matthew20:25 Korende Yeso akabarangeria bache asare, akabora, “Mwamanyire ng’a abagambi b’Ebisaku bakogambera abanto, na abanene babo nigo bare nokobua igoro asebare." 
Matthew20:26 Korende ayio takoba bo asemore inwe, korende oyorarigie koba omonene asemore goika abe omokoreri oino;" 
Matthew20:27 na oyorarigie koba omotang’ani asemore, goika abe omosomba oino," 
Matthew20:28 buna Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto atachete gokorerwa, korende gokorera, na korua obogima bwaye, erinde bobe embooria y’abange.”" 
Matthew20:29 Ekero baare korua Yeriko, omoganda omonene okamotunyana." 
Matthew20:30 Rora, abanto babere emeuko baikaransete ase enchera ensemo, na ekero bachia koigwa ng’a Yeso ogoeta, bagaaka eriogi, bakabora, “Tororere amabera, aye omwana o Daudi!”" 
Matthew20:31 Omoganda oria okabatogonyera ng’a banyare gokira, korende bakamenta kwoga eriogi, bakabora, “Omonene, tororere amabera, aye Omwana o Daudi.”" 
Matthew20:32 Yeso agatenena, akabarangeria, akababoria, “Ninki morigetie mbakorere?”" 
Matthew20:33 Bakamoiraneria, “Omonene, otoramokie amaiso aito.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yeso agasogwa namabera, agakuna amaiso abo. Erio kegima bakaba nkorora bare, bakamotunyana." 
Matthew21:1 Ekero bachia goika ang’e na Yerusalemu, bagaika Betifage, ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni. Erio Yeso agatoma aborokigwa baye babere," 
Matthew21:2 akabatebia, “Genda ase agachie karia mokoorokera, erio kegima namorore etigere esibire, na emori yaye amo nero; mochisibore mochindetere." 
Matthew21:3 Na omonto karabatebie ring’ana, momotebie: Omonene nachiganetie; erio kegima nachitome.”" 
Matthew21:4 Aya onsi agakoreka, erinde anyare goikeranigwa ayatebetwe nomobani, ogoteba," 
Matthew21:5 “Tebia abanto ba Sayoni, Rigereria, Omoruoti oino okobachera are, nomokanyeku, oriinire etigere, nase emori y’etigere, akamori g’etigere.”" 
Matthew21:6 Aborokigwa bakagenda, bagakora buna Yeso abachigete." 
Matthew21:7 Bakamorentera etigere amo nemori yaye, bakaara chianga chiabo igoro ya chirochio, na Yeso akayeriina." 
Matthew21:8 Na abange b’emeganda bakaara chianga chiabo inchera; abande bakanacha chinsagia chi’emete bagachiaara nchera. 
Matthew21:9 Emeganda eria yatang’aine, na eyare komotunyana, bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Hosana ase Omwana o Daudi! Nasesenirie oyio ogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene! Hosana, aye ore igoro!”" 
Matthew21:10 Ekero achia gosoa Yerusalemu, omochie omogima ogaseega‐seega, abanto bakaboria, “Ning’o oyio?”" 
Matthew21:11 Emeganda ekairaneria, “Oyio nere Yeso, omobani o Nazareti o Galili.”" 
Matthew21:12 Erio Yeso agasoa ase Hekalu ya Nyasae, akabasokia isiko bonsi abarenge koonia na kogora ime ase Hekalu, akaonchorana chimesa chi’abaare koonchoreria chibesa, na ebirogo bi’abaare koonia amaruma." 
Matthew21:13 Akabatebia, “Nerikire: Enyomba yane nerokwe enyomba y’ogosaba, na inwe mwayekorire koba ribwago ri’abauri.”" 
Matthew21:14 Emeuko na amagata bakamochiera aria ase Hekalu, na ere akabagwenia." 
Matthew21:15 Korende abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko bakabea, ekero bachia korora ebirage bi’ogokumia akorete, na abana bagoaka eriogi ase Hekalu ime, bakobora, “Hosana ase Omwana o Daudi!”" 
Matthew21:16 Bakamoboria, “Kwaigure abana buna bakobora?” Yeso akabatebia, “Ee; timwana gosoma: “Nase emenwa y’abana na ey’abakogonka kwarentire ogotogia ogoikeranu?”" 
Matthew21:17 Akabatiga, agasoka korwa ase omochie, akagenda Bethania, akarara aroro." 
Matthew21:18 Mambia gakoirana omochie, akaigwa enchara." 
Matthew21:19 Akarora omoko oyomo ase enchera ensemo, akayochiera, tarora gento asoro otatiga amato oka. Akayotebia, “Korwa bono tokwama amatunda nonya ndinde.” Erio kegima omoko oyio okoma." 
Matthew21:20 Ekero aborokigwa bachia korora ogokora oko, bagakumia, bakaboria, “Naki bono omoko oyo bwoma bwango iga?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yeso akabairaneria, “Nekeene nabatebirie; Komorabe nokwegena motabeti na gosiereria konde, tari erio ri’omote rioka morakore, korende nonya namotebie egetunwa eke: Tegoka, otugutwe enyancha ime, narikoreke." 
Matthew21:22 Kende gionsi moraborie ase ogosaba, komoregene namokenyore.”" 
Matthew21:23 Ekero achia gosoa Hekalu ime na kworokereria, agachierwa nabakuani abanene na abagaaka b’abanto, bakamoboria, “Nase okobua ki ogokora amang’ana aya? Ning’o okoete okobua oko?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yeso akabairaneria, “Nainche boigo nimbaborie ring’ana erimo, komorang’iranerie, nainche boigo nimbatebie nase okobua ki ngokora aya." 
Matthew21:25 Inee! Ebatiso ya Yohana, ng’ai yarwete? Igoro yarwete, gose nase mwanyabanto?” Bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, bakabora, “Toise goteba: Nigoro yarwete, igo aratoborie: Naki rende motamwegenete?" 
Matthew21:26 Naende toise goteba: Nase mwanyabanto yarwete, nkoiroka tore omoganda, ekiagera abanto bonsi banchete ng’a Yohana nomobani orenge.”" 
Matthew21:27 Bakamoiraneria, “Titomanyeti.” Ere akabatebia, “Nonya ninche tinkobatebia inwe nase okobua ki ngokorera aya." 
Matthew21:28 “Naki moroche? Omonto gete narenge nabana babere abamura. Akamochiera oria bwe ritang’ani, akamotebia: Omwana one, genda rero okore emeremo ase omogondo bw’emesabibu." 
Matthew21:29 Akamoiraneria: Tindigeti kogenda, korende nyuma yaye akaonchoka, akagenda." 
Matthew21:30 Akamochiera oyo okabere, akamotebia boigo. Nere akamoiraneria: Nkogenda inde, omonene; go tagenda." 
Matthew21:31 Inee! Norori ase baria babere okorete ogwancha gwa ise?” Bakabora, “Noria bwe ritang’ani.” Yeso akabatebia, “Nekeene nabatebirie ng’a abarusia ebango na abakungu abatayayi nkobatang’anera bare gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Matthew21:32 Naki Yohana achete asemore ase enchera y’oboronge, timwamwegena; korende abarusia ebango na abakungu abatayayi bakamwegena; na inwe nonya nekero mwaroche ayio, timwaonchoka na komwegena." 
Matthew21:33 “Tegerera omoreng’anio onde. Narenge omonto orenge nenyomba; ere akarema omogondo, agasimeka emesabibu imeo, akayoetananeria orobago, agakunya ime aroro egetera akomitera amasabibu, akaagacha orwaki, akaywatananera abaremi, akagenda orogendo." 
Matthew21:34 Ekero engaki y’amatunda yachia goika ang’e, agatoma abasomba baye ase abaremi, banyore amatunda aye." 
Matthew21:35 Abaremi bakabwata abasomba baye, oyomo bakamoaka, oyonde bakamoita, na oyonde bakamoaka amagena." 
Matthew21:36 Naende agatoma abasomba bande, abange kobua baria be ritang’ani; bakabakora boigo." 
Matthew21:37 Nyuma y’ayio agatoma omwana oye asebare, ogoteba: Inabasike omwana one." 
Matthew21:38 Korende abaremi baria, ekero bachia korora omwana oria, bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo: Oyo nere omonyamwando; gaki tomoite, omwando oye toyoire." 
Matthew21:39 Bakamobwata, bakamotuguta isiko korwa ase omogondo bw’emesabibu, bakamoita." 
Matthew21:40 Inee! Karache omonyene omogondo, naki arakore abaremi baria?”" 
Matthew21:41 Bakamotebia, “Igo araite ababe baria ogoita okobe, na aatananere abaremi bande omogondo oria bw’emesabibu, abarache komoa amatunda ekero amire.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yeso akabatebia, “Timwana gosoma ase amariko: “Rigena riria abaagachi bangete riabeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona. Ring’ana eri nigo riarure ase Omonene, na rirorio nogokumia ase amaiso aito?" 
Matthew21:43 Ase engencho eye nabatebirie, ng’a oboruoti bwa Nyasae naborusigwe asemore, boegwe egesaku egekwama amatunda aye. [" 
Matthew21:44 Oyoragwe igoro ase rigena eri nabunanekane, na ere oyo rigena riria riragwere inarimosenyente.]”" 
Matthew21:45 Ekero bachia koigwa emereng’anio yaye, abakuani abanene na Abafarisai bakamanya ng’a nabwo agoteba." 
Matthew21:46 Korende ekero bachia korigia komobwata, bakairoka emeganda, ekiagera abanto konya banchire ng’a nomobani are." 
Matthew22:1 Naende Yeso agakwana nabarabwo ase emereng’anio akabora," 
Matthew22:2 “Oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bogwekaine nomoruoti okorete omoyega bw’enyangi y’omwana oye. 
Matthew22:3 Agatoma abasomba baye batebie baria konya barangerigwe ase enyangi, korende barabwo bakaanga gocha." 
Matthew22:4 Naende agatoma abasomba bande, agateba: Motebie abarangerigwe: Rigereria, endagera yane naroisirie, chiombe chiane na ebinoru biane bianyenyirwe, na bionsi biabeire ang’e; inchuo ase omoyega bw’enyangi." 
Matthew22:5 Korende bagachaya amang’ana aya, bakagenda, oyomo ase omogondo oye, na oyonde ase oboonchoreria bwaye;" 
Matthew22:6 na abatigarete bakabwata abasomba baye, bakabakora bobe bakabaita." 
Matthew22:7 Omoruoti oria akaba nendamwamu, agatoma emeganda y’abarwani, agasiria abaiti baria, na omochie obo akayosamba nomorero." 
Matthew22:8 Erio agatebia abasomba baye: Enyangi yabeire ang’e, korende abarangeretigwe tibagwenereti." 
Matthew22:9 Gaki, genda ase amatabekania e chinchera, bonsi aba moranyore mobarangerie gocha ase omoyega bw’enyangi." 
Matthew22:10 Abasomba baria bagasoka, bagaika ase chinchera, bagasangereria bonsi aba banyorete, ababe na abaya; igo enyomba y’enyangi egaichorwa nabageni." 
Matthew22:11 “Korende ekero omoruoti achia gosoa korigereria abageni, akarora omonto oyomo aroro otabegete eanga y’enyangi." 
Matthew22:12 Akamotebia: Mosani, naki gwakorete ogasoa aiga, na aye otari neanga y’enyangi? Agakira‐kiri." 
Matthew22:13 Erio omoruoti agatebia abakoreri: Moboe amaboko na amagoro, momotugute ase omosunte isiko; aroro abanto inababe nekerero na okoriania amaino." 
Matthew22:14 Naki abarangerigwe nabange, korende abachorirwe nabake.”" 
Matthew22:15 Erio Abafarisai bakagenda, bagakora ekina buna bagochia komotega ase amang’ana aye." 
Matthew22:16 Bagatoma aborokigwa babo asare, amo n’Abaherodiani, bakabora, “Omworokia, twamanyire ng’a nigo ore omonto bw’ekeene, na enchera ya Nyasae nigo okoyiorokereria ase ekeene, gose tori koyiera monto; ekiagera torengerereti obonene bw’abanto." 
Matthew22:17 Gaki totebie naki oroche aye? Mboronge komoa Kaisari ebango, gose taibo.”" 
Matthew22:18 Korende Yeso, konya omanyire obong’ainereria bwabo, akabora, “Naki mogonteema, inwe abang’ainereria?" 
Matthew22:19 Inyorokia ebesa y’ebango.” Bakamorentera ebesa. 
Matthew22:20 Yeso akababoria, “Ekieni eke na amariko aya nebia ng’o?”" 
Matthew22:21 Bakamoiraneria, “Nebia Kaisari.” Erio akabatebia, “Nabo, ebire bia Kaisari moe Kaisari, na ebia Nyasae moe Nyasae.”" 
Matthew22:22 Ekero bachia koigwa ring’ana riria, bagakumia; bakamotiga, bakagenda." 
Matthew22:23 Rituko riria Abasadukai bakamochiera, baria bakobora ng’a okobokigwa tikori, bakamoboria," 
Matthew22:24 bakobora, “Omworokia, Musa natebete: Omonto karakwe, na ere tari nabana, momura omwabo atware omoboraka oria, atenenerie momura omwabo egesaku." 
Matthew22:25 Bono mbarenge abamura ba ise omo batano na babere egati yaito. Oyo bwe ritang’ani akanyuoma, erio agakwa, na ekiagera atarenge nabana, agatigera momura omwabo mokaye." 
Matthew22:26 Naboigo noyo o kabere akamotwara, na oyo o gatato, goika bonsi batano na babere bakaera." 
Matthew22:27 Omoerio o bonsi omokungu oria nere agakwa. 
Matthew22:28 Inee! Ase okobokigwa, mokang’o arabe ase baria batano na babere? Naki bonsi mbamenyanete nere.”" 
Matthew22:29 Korende Yeso akabairaneria, “Mwasirire inwe, ekiagera timomanyeti amariko, nonya nokobua kwa Nyasae." 
Matthew22:30 Naki ase okobokigwa tibakonyuoma gose tibakonyuomwa, korende nigo barabe buna abamalaika ba Nyasae bare igoro." 
Matthew22:31 Na ase okobokigwa kw’abakure timwana gosoma eri mwatebetigwe na Nyasae: 
Matthew22:32 Inche ninche Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na Nyasae o Isaka, na Nyasae o Yakobo? Ere tari Nyasae bw’abakure, korende Nyasae bw’abare moyo.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ekero omoganda ochia koigwa aya, ogakumia ase okworokereria kwaye." 
Matthew22:34 Korende Abafarisai, ekero bachia koigwa ng’a Yeso obakiririe Abasadukai, bagasangererekana amo." 
Matthew22:35 Oyomo ase barabwo, omonto bw’amachiko, akamoboria ase okomoteema," 
Matthew22:36 “Omworokia, ngochika ki kore okonene ase amachiko onsi?”" 
Matthew22:37 Akamotebia, “Mwanche Omonene Nyasae oo nenkoro yao yonsi, na omoyo oo bwonsi, na obong’aini bwao bwonsi." 
Matthew22:38 Oko nakwo ogochika okonene, naende nakwo kwe ritang’ani." 
Matthew22:39 Nogwa kabere kogwekaine nokwo: Mwanche omogisangio oo buna bweanchete. 
Matthew22:40 Ase amachiko aya abere amachiko onsi na ababani naro atenenerete.” 
Matthew22:41 Abafarisai kobasangererekanire amo, Yeso akababoria," 
Matthew22:42 “Naki inwe mokorengereria ase Kristo? Nomwana o ng’o are?” Bakamoiraneria, “Nomwana o Daudi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Akababoria, “Inki rende gekogera Daudi, akoraagwa n’Omoika, akamoroka Omonene, okobora:" 
Matthew22:44 “Omonene agatebia Omonene one: Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio, goika mbeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao?" 
Matthew22:45 Gaki, onye Daudi okomoroka Omonene, naki rende aba omwana oye?”" 
Matthew22:46 Onde tarenge ore konyara komoiraneria ing’ana; nonya nkorwa rituko riria monto onde tarenge na boremu komoboria maborio ande. 
Matthew23:1 Naende Yeso agatebia emeganda na aborokigwa baye," 
Matthew23:2 “Aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai baikaransire ase ekerogo kia Musa. 
Matthew23:3 Gaki, amang’ana onsi bakobatebia, moyanare na koyabwata; korende buna barabwo bagokora, timokora." 
Matthew23:4 Naki igo bakoboa chigurube chindito, bachitweka abanto ase amareko abo, korende barabwo abanyene tibari gwancha gochitigeria nekiara kiabo." 
Matthew23:5 Na ogokora kwabo gwonsi nigo bagokora ng’a barorwe nabanto; nigo bakogareyia ebitinti biabo birikire amariko, naende batambeyia emebarero y’ogochabera chianga chiabo." 
Matthew23:6 Naende nigo banchete aase e ritang’ani ase emeyega, na goikaransa aase e ritang’ani ase chisinagogi," 
Matthew23:7 na gokwanigwa ase chichiiro, na korokwa omworokia nabanto." 
Matthew23:8 Korende inwe timobaisa korokwa omworokia, ekiagera Omworokia oino noyomo, na inwe mwensi nabamo." 
Matthew23:9 Naende timobaisa koroka monto ase ense tata, ekiagera Iso oino noyomo, oyore igoro." 
Matthew23:10 Gose timobaisa korokwa abanene, ekiagera Omonene oino noyomo, nere Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Nere oyore omonene mono kobua asemore, nigo arabe omokoreri oino," 
Matthew23:12 na oyo okweimokereria igoro nairanigwe inse, na ere oyokweirania inse naimokererigwe igoro." 
Matthew23:13 “Korende obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera mwasiekeire abanto oboruoti bwa igoro; naki inwe abanyene timwasoa, nonya nabaare gosoa, timware kobaa ribaga basoe. [" 
Matthew23:14 Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera mokourereria chinyomba chi’ababoraka, na ase obong’ainereria mwasaba ogosaba ogotambe. Ase ayio, inamonyore ekina ekere ekenene kobua.]" 
Matthew23:15 Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera nigo mogosiongorokana enyancha na ense enyomo konyora omotunyani oyomo, na ekero abeire omotunyani, mwagera oba omwana bw’omorero o kare na kare ara kabere kobua inwe abanyene." 
Matthew23:16 “Obobe nobwaino, abaraai emeuko, inwe abamogoteba: Onde bwensi kararie emuma ase Hekalu, tari gento, korende onde bwensi kararie emuma ase etahabu ye Hekalu, bwesibire nemuma yaye." 
Matthew23:17 Inwe abariri emeuko! Nkere ki kere ekenene kobua: netahabu, gose ne Hekalu egokora etahabu ebe enchenu?" 
Matthew23:18 Inwe nigo mogoteba: Onde bwensi kararie emuma ase egesasimero tari gento; korende onde bwensi kararie emuma ase ekeng’wanso kere igoro ase egesasimero bwesibire nemuma yaye. 
Matthew23:19 Inwe emeuko! Nkere ki kere ekenene kobua: nesadaka, gose negesasimero kegokora esadaka ebe enchenu?" 
Matthew23:20 Gaki, oyorarie emuma ase egesasimero nigo ararie ase ekio, na ase ebinto bionsi ebire igoro yaye." 
Matthew23:21 Na oyo orarie emuma ase Hekalu, nigo ararie ase eyio na ase oyo omenyete imeo." 
Matthew23:22 Na oyo orarie emuma ase igoro, nigo ararie ase ekerogo ki’obonene kia Nyasae na ase oyo ogeikaranserete." 
Matthew23:23 “Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera nigo mokorua ensemo ya ikomi ye chiarare, na ebinsari, ne chinyeni chinde, na mwatiga amang’ana ayare amanene ay’ogochika na oboronge, na amabera, na okwegena. Naro ayio nabagwenerete moyakore, amo na gotatiga ayande." 
Matthew23:24 Inwe abaraai emeuko, mwakenonora egechuni, mwamera engamia!" 
Matthew23:25 “Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera nigo mogosibia egekombe na esani korwa isiko, korende ime biaichoire nobouri na okogania gotari nekerengo." 
Matthew23:26 Aye Omofarisai omouko! Sibia ritang’ani egekombe na esani ime, erio nonya nisiko binyare koba ebirabu." 
Matthew23:27 “Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera nigo mogwekaine nechimbeera chiakire echooka; na chirochio isiko chirorekana ng’a nechingiya, korende ime nigo chiichire namauga ’ebitondo, na euramba yonsi." 
Matthew23:28 Nainwe nabo more, isiko mwarorekana ase abanto ng’a nabaronge more, korende ime yaino mwaichoirwe nobong’ainereria na ebibe ebinge." 
Matthew23:29 “Obobe nobwaino, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai, abang’ainereria! Ekiagera nigo mokoagacha chimbeera chi’ababani, na koroisia chimbeera chi’abaronge," 
Matthew23:30 mogoteba: Onye ntwarengeo kare ase amatuko e chisokoro chiaito, anga titwabwatanete nabarabwo ase ogoitera amanyinga ’ababani." 
Matthew23:31 Igo mwetebire inwe abanyene, ng’a inwe nabana babo more, baria baitete ababani." 
Matthew23:32 Gaki bono, ichoria ekerengo gie chisokoro chiaino." 
Matthew23:33 Inwe ching’iti, oroiboro rw’amarubi, naki morakore motame ekina ki’omorero o kare na kare." 
Matthew23:34 Ase ayio natomire ababani asemore, na abanto abang’aini, na aborokia b’amariko; abande babo inamobaite na kobabamba, na abande babo inamobang’wanie emecharichi ase chisinagogi chiaino, na kobachanda omochie ase omochie." 
Matthew23:35 Erio nario arabachere amanyinga onsi ayaboronge ayaitegete ase ense, korwa amanyinga ’Abeli, oria omonyene oboronge, goika amanyinga a Zakaria, omwana o Barakia, oria mwaiterete gati ye Hekalu na egesasimero." 
Matthew23:36 Ekeene nabatebirie ng’a amang’ana aya onsi nache igoro ase ekegori eke. 
Matthew23:37 “Aye Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, aye ogoita ababani na kobaaka amagena abatomirwe asore! Ng’ara karenga narigirie gosangereria abana bao, buna engoko egosangereria ebionuchu biaye ase chimbaba chiaye ime, korende timwancha!" 
Matthew23:38 Rora, enyomba yaino mwatigeirwe ritombe." 
Matthew23:39 Na inche nabatebirie, timokondora naende nonya ng’ake goika ekero keria morache goteba: Nasesenirie oyogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene.”" 
Matthew24:1 Yeso agatiga Hekalu, akaba nkogenda are, na aborokigwa baye bakamochiera komworokia amaagacho e Hekalu." 
Matthew24:2 Korende akabairaneria, “Inee! Mwarorire aya onsi? Nekeene nabatebirie: Aiga tirigotigara rigena erimo igoro ase erinde, eritatagorwe.”" 
Matthew24:3 Gaikaransire ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, aborokigwa baye bakamochiera bobisi, bakamoboria, “Totebie, aya indi arabe? Naende ninki ekemanyererio ki’ogocha kwao, na ay’omoerio bw’ense?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yeso akabairaneria, “Mwerende, monto onde tabang’aina." 
Matthew24:5 Naki abange nabache ase erieta riane, babore: Inche ninche Kristo; baraae abange na kobasiria." 
Matthew24:6 Na inwe inamoigwe esegi, na ebirage, bi’esegi; rigereria timoichanigwa, ekiagera bori, aya onsi nabe; korende omoerio toracha." 
Matthew24:7 Naki egesaku nakeimoke korwana negesaku kende, na oboruoti naborwane noboruoti bonde; enchara na emetengecho y’ense nabibe ase chinsemo ne chinsemo." 
Matthew24:8 Ayio onsi naro omochakano bw’obororo. 
Matthew24:9 “Erio inababarue monyare gochandwa na goitwa, na inwe inamogechwe nebisaku bionsi ase engencho y’erieta riane." 
Matthew24:10 Na ekero ekio abanto abange inabagwe korwa ase okwegena kwabo, inabasigaanane na kobekana ase ababisa babo, naende nabagechane," 
Matthew24:11 na ababani b’oborimo abange mbaimoke, baraae abange na kobasiria." 
Matthew24:12 Nase engencho y’okomenteka kw’ebibe, obwanchani bw’abange nabokende." 
Matthew24:13 Korende oyoraremererie goika omoerio, oyio natooreke." 
Matthew24:14 Naende, amang’ana aya amaya ay’oboruoti narandigwe ase ense yonsi koba kirori ase ebisaku bionsi; erio omoerio ochiche." 
Matthew24:15 “Gaki, naboigo kamogocha korora okogechia kw’ogosaria gwatebetwe nomobani Danieli, kogotenena aase aachenu (oyogosoma amanye)," 
Matthew24:16 erio abare Boyahudi batame gochia ase ebitunwa. 
Matthew24:17 Ere oyore kerama igoro taika kogenda kobogoria gento ekere nyomba mwaye," 
Matthew24:18 na ere oyore mogondo tairana nyomba kobogoria eanga yaye. 
Matthew24:19 Korende nabe aakong’u ase abare barito na abakogonkia ase amatuko aria. 
Matthew24:20 Korende saba ng’a ogotama kwaino tikoba ekero ki’obokendu, gose ase rituko ri’Esabato," 
Matthew24:21 ekiagera agwo nebe emechando emenene, etana koba korwa omochakano bw’ense goika bono, gose tekoba bo naende nonya ng’ake." 
Matthew24:22 Naende onye amatuko ayio atanachetwe, anga monto onde bwensi tatooregete; korende ase engencho y’abachore amatuko ayio nanachwe." 
Matthew24:23 Na ekero ekio omonto karabatebie: Rora, Kristo naa are! Gose: Naaria! Timwancha." 
Matthew24:24 Naki nabaoroke amakristo ’oborimo, na ababani b’oborimo, nabaorokie ebikone ebinene na amakumia, goika keranyarekane, nabang’aine nonya nabachore." 
Matthew24:25 Rora, nabatebirie aya ritang’ani." 
Matthew24:26 Gaki, kobarabatebie: Rora, oyo ore ase erooro, timosoka isiko; kobarabatebie: Oyo ore ebinunchi bia bobisi, timwancha." 
Matthew24:27 Naki buna okomesa gokorwa moocha kwabara gochia bosongo, naboigo ogocha kw’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto korache koba." 
Matthew24:28 Naki aase ribego rire, nao chinsoti chigosangererekana." 
Matthew24:29 “Korende bwango nyuma y’emechando y’amatuko aria, erioba narionchoke ribe omosunte, na omotienyi tokobara, ne ching’enang’eni nachigwe korwa igoro, ne chinguru chia igoro nachitengechigwe." 
Matthew24:30 Erio nario ekemanyererio ki’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto kerache kororekana igoro, na ebisaku bionsi bi’ense nario birarere; naende nabarore mwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogocha ase amare a igoro ne chinguru, na obonene obonge." 
Matthew24:31 Erio natome abamalaika baye na egeturi ekenene ki’egetureri, na barabwo mbasangererie abachore baye korwa ase chinsinyo inye, korwa ensinyo eyemo ya igoro goika eyende." 
Matthew24:32 “Korwa ase omoko eorokererie omoreng’anio oyo: Orosagia rwaye korwachakire koorokia amato aye, mwamanyire ng’a nekero ki’ogoseboka, etoigo ng’ang’e ere." 
Matthew24:33 Naboigo nainwe komokorora aya aorokire, momanye ng’a omoerio obeire ang’e na gesieri." 
Matthew24:34 Nekeene nabatebirie: Ekegori eke tikegoeta nonya ng’ake goika aya onsi anyare koba. 
Matthew24:35 Igoro na ense nabiete, korende amang’ana aane takonyara goeta nonya ng’ake." 
Matthew24:36 “Korende amang’ana e rituko riria, na ensa eria onde tari omanyete, nonya nabamalaika ba igoro, nonya n’Omwana, otatiga Tata bweka." 
Matthew24:37 Korende buna amatuko aria a Nuhu abete, naboigo ogocha kw’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto korache koba." 
Matthew24:38 Naki buna barenge ase amatuko aria etoigo etaracha, baare koria, bakonywa, bakonyuoma, bakonyuomerigwa, goika rituko riria Nuhu asoete ase obwato," 
Matthew24:39 na barabwo tibamanya goika etoigo egacha, egasiria bonsi; naboigo ogocha kw’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto korache koba." 
Matthew24:40 Engaki eyio abanto babere nababe mogondo; oyomo nairwe, na oyomo natigwe." 
Matthew24:41 Abakungu babere nababe bagosera orogena oromo; oyomo nairwe, na oyomo natigwe." 
Matthew24:42 Ase ayio, renda, ekiagera timomanyeti ituko ki Omonene oino agocha." 
Matthew24:43 Korende manya aya, onye omonyene enyomba namanyete nkero ki ase obotuko omoibi agocha, anga narendete taiberwa." 
Matthew24:44 Ase ayio nainwe, kabe ang’e; naki nase ensa motakagereti nero Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto arache." 
Matthew24:45 “Ning’o rende ore omosomba omwegenwa, naende ore omong’aini, obegetwe nomonene oye igoro ase enyomba yaye, ae abanto endagera ase ekero ekeronge?" 
Matthew24:46 Nasesenirie omosomba oria, ekero omonene oye arache amonyore ogokora bo." 
Matthew24:47 Nekeene nabatebirie ng’a namobeke igoro ase ebi abwate bionsi. 
Matthew24:48 Korende omosomba oria omobe, karatebe ase omoyo oye ime: Omonene one otebanire gocha," 
Matthew24:49 achake goaka abasomba b’omonene oye, na koria na konywa amo nabagotinda," 
Matthew24:50 omonene bw’omosomba oria nigo arache rituko atakagereti, na ensa atamanyeti;" 
Matthew24:51 ere namonachane abe ebing’ese namobeke amo nabang’ainereria. Aroro abanto mbabe nekerero na okoriania amaino. 
Matthew25:1 “Oboruoti bwa igoro nigo bogwekanirie nabaiseke ikomi ababogoretie chitaya chiabo, bagasoka gochia korotota omonyuomi." 
Matthew25:2 Batano ase barabwo nigo barenge abariri, na batano abang’aini." 
Matthew25:3 Na ekero baria abariri baimogetie chitaya chiabo, tibachiimokia namaguta;" 
Matthew25:4 korende baria abang’aini bakaimokia amaguta ase ebinto biabo amo ne chitaya chiabo. 
Matthew25:5 Ekero omonyuomi atebana gocha, bagasundoka bonsi, bakarara." 
Matthew25:6 Korende botuko gati gekaba egeturi: Rigereria, omonyuomi oyo! Soka momorotote!" 
Matthew25:7 Erio abaiseke baria bonsi bakaimoka koroisia chitaya chiabo. 
Matthew25:8 Baria abariri bagatebia baria abang’aini: Twatanere amaguta aino, ekiagera chitaya chiaito chiarimire." 
Matthew25:9 Korende baria abang’aini bakabairaneria: Taibo. Takonyara gotoisana intwe nainwe twensi, mbuya mogende mwegorere ase abakoonia." 
Matthew25:10 Na ekero bachia kogenda kogora, omonyuomi agacha, na baria bebegete ang’e bagasoa amo nere ase omoyega bw’enyangi; na egesieri kegasiekwa." 
Matthew25:11 Naende nyuma yaye abaiseke baria bande bagacha, bakabora: Omonene, Omonene, toigorere!" 
Matthew25:12 Korende akabairaneria: Nekeene nabatebirie: Timbamanyeti inwe. 
Matthew25:13 Ase igo renda, ekiagera timomanyeti rituko, nonya nensa." 
Matthew25:14 “Igo enga buna omonto ore kogenda orogendo, akarangeria abasomba baye, akabeka enibo yaye asebare." 
Matthew25:15 Akaa oyomo chitalanta isano, na oyonde ibere, na oyonde eyemo, kera omonto koreng’ana nokonyara kwaye. Erio akagenda." 
Matthew25:16 Oria oetwe chitalanta isano akagenda ara rimo, agachionchoreria, akanyora ebitoki, chitalanta chinde isano." 
Matthew25:17 Naboigo noria oetwe chitalanta ibere akanyora ebitoki, chitalanta chinde ibere." 
Matthew25:18 Korende oria oetwe etalanta eyemo akagenda, agakunya inse, akabisa ebesa y’omonene oye." 
Matthew25:19 Nyuma y’amatuko amange omonene bw’abasomba baria agacha, akarigia gokora omobaro nabarabwo." 
Matthew25:20 Oria oetwe chitalanta isano agacha ne chitalanta chinde isano, akabora: Omonene, nkwang’ete chitalanta isano, rora nanyorire ebitoki, chitalanta chinde isano." 
Matthew25:21 Omonene oye akamotebia: Gwakorire buya aye, omosomba omuya naende omwegenwa; kwabeire omwegenwa ase ebire ebike, ninkobeke igoro ase ebire ebinge. Soa ase omogoko bw’omonene oo." 
Matthew25:22 Naende oria oetwe chitalanta ibere agacha, akabora: Omonene, nkwang’ete chitalanta ibere, rora, nanyorire ebitoki, chitalanta chinde ibere." 
Matthew25:23 Omonene oye akamotebia: Gwakorire buya aye, omosomba omuya naende omwegenwa; kwabeire omwegenwa ase ebire ebike, ninkobeke igoro ase ebire ebinge. Soa ase omogoko bw’omonene oo." 
Matthew25:24 Na oria oetwe etalanta eyemo agacha, akabora: Omonene, nakomanyete ng’a nigo ore omonto omokong’u, okogesa aase otasimegete, na gosangereria aase otabusurete;" 
Matthew25:25 erio nkoboa, nkagenda nkabisa etalanta yao inse. Nero eye." 
Matthew25:26 Korende omonene oye akamoiraneria: Aye omosomba omobe naende omworo! Nkwamanyete ng’a nigo nkogesa aase ntasimegete, naende nigo ngosangereria aase ntabusurete?" 
Matthew25:27 Gaki nkwagwenerete kobeka chibesa chiane ase abakorua ebitoki, na inche ngocha, anga nanyora echiane amo nebitoki biane." 
Matthew25:28 Gaki, moure etalanta yaye, moe oria obwate chitalanta ikomi." 
Matthew25:29 Naki kera oyore negento naegwe, naende amenteranigwe; korende ere oyotari negento, nonya nkeria abwate naurwe." 
Matthew25:30 Na omosomba oria otagwenereti, motugute isiko ase omosunte. Aroro abanto inababe nekerero na okoriania amaino." 
Matthew25:31 “Ekero Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto agochi‐gocha ase obonene bwaye, na abamalaika bonsi amo nere, erio naikaranse ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene." 
Matthew25:32 Ebisaku bionsi nabisangererie ase obosio bwaye; ere naatanane abaiga na aba buna omorisia agwatanana ching’ondi ne chimbori. 
Matthew25:33 Ching’ondi nachibeke ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, korende chimbori ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee." 
Matthew25:34 Erio Omoruoti natebie abare ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio: Inchuo inwe abamwasesenetigwe na Tata one, soa ase omwando bw’oboruoti mwaroiseretigwe korwa ogotongwa gw’ense," 
Matthew25:35 ekiagera inarenge nenchara, mokang’a endagera; inarenge nerang’o, mokang’a nkanywa; inarenge omogeni, mokandoisia;" 
Matthew25:36 inarenge getirianda, mokamboyia; inarwarete, mogacha kondora; inasibetwe echela, moanchichera." 
Matthew25:37 Erio abanyene oboronge nabamoiranerie: A! Omonene, indi twakoroche kore nenchara, togakorageria? Gose indi twakoroche kore nerang’o, togakoa okanywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Indi twakoroche kore omogeni, togakoroisia, gose getirianda, togakoboyia?" 
Matthew25:39 Naende indi twakoroche kore omorwaire, gose gosibire echela, togacha gokorora?" 
Matthew25:40 Na Omoruoti nabairanerie: Nekeene nabatebirie: Koreng’ana buna mware gokorera oyomo bw’aba abaminto abare abake, ninche mwakorerete." 
Matthew25:41 Erio natebie abare ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee: Karue asende inwe abamwaragereretigwe, mogende ase omorero o kare na kare, oyoroiseretigwe Saitani na abamalaika baye," 
Matthew25:42 ekiagera inarenge nenchara, timwang’a endagera; inarenge nerang’o, timwang’a inywe." 
Matthew25:43 Inarenge omogeni, timwandoisia; inarenge getirianda, timwamboyia; inarwarete, narenge echela ime, timwacha kondora." 
Matthew25:44 Erio barabwo nabamoiranerie: Omonene, indi twakoroche aye kore nenchara, gose kore nerang’o, gose kore omogeni, gose kore getirianda, gose kore omorwaire, gose kore echela ime, na titwagokorera?" 
Matthew25:45 Erio nabairanerie: Nekeene nabatebirie: Koreng’ana buna motare gokorera oyomo bw’aba abare abake, timwankorerete inche." 
Matthew25:46 Na abanto aba nabagende ase egesusuro gia kare na kare, korende abanyene oboronge nabagende ase obogima bwa kare na kare.”" 
Matthew26:1 Ekero Yeso akoorire gokwana amang’ana aya onsi, agatebia aborokigwa baye," 
Matthew26:2 “Mwamanyire ng’a nyuma y’amatuko abere nebe Epasaka, na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto naruegwe kobambwa.”" 
Matthew26:3 Erio abakuani abanene na abagaaka b’abanto bagasangererekana ase egoora y’omokuani omonene oyore korokwa Kayafa; 
Matthew26:4 bagakora ekina barabwo ase barabwo, banyare komobwata Yeso nobong’ainereria, na komoita." 
Matthew26:5 Korende bakabora, “Taba ase rituko rinene, tiribaisa gocha koba riroroche ase abanto.”" 
Matthew26:6 Na Yeso, ekero arenge Bethania ase enyomba ya Simion, oyorenge noborwaire bwa ukoma," 
Matthew26:7 agacherwa nomokungu orenge nechuba ye rigena rirabu ere namaguta e rimisu rigiya aye rigori rinene; gaikaransete ase endagera, akamonyororokeria ase omotwe oye." 
Matthew26:8 Korende ekero aborokigwa baye bachia korora aya, bakagechigwa, bakabora, “Nobwa ki obosiru obo?" 
Matthew26:9 Naki amaguta aya anga naoonigwa ase chisiringi chinyinge na chiegwe abataka.” 
Matthew26:10 Yeso, konya omanyire aya, akabatebia, “Nase ki mokorosia omokungu oyo? Ere onkoreire emeremo emiya," 
Matthew26:11 ekiagera amatuko onsi nigo more nabataka amo nainwe, korende timori nainche amatuko onsi." 
Matthew26:12 Buna anyororokeria amaguta aya ase omobere one, onkoreire aya ase okombeka ang’e ase ogotindekwa kwane." 
Matthew26:13 Nekeene nabatebirie: Kera aase enchili eye erarandigwe ase ense yonsi, neri akora oyo nariatorwe ase okomoinyora.”" 
Matthew26:14 Na ekero ekio oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, nere, oyokorokwa Yudas Iskariota, agachiera abakuani abanene," 
Matthew26:15 akababoria, “Inki morang’e onye nkomorua asemore?” Bakamoa chibesa chie chifeta emerongo etato." 
Matthew26:16 Korwa ekero ekio akaba nkorigia are ribaga ri’okomorua. 
Matthew26:17 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’Emegati etabekiri memera aborokigwa bagachiera Yeso, bakamoboria, “Ng’ai origetie tokoroiserie oriere Epasaka?”" 
Matthew26:18 Akabairaneria, “Genda ase omochie ase omonto gete, momotebie: Omworokia otebire: Engaki yane yaikire ang’e; nyomba mwao nao ndariere Epasaka amo naborokigwa baane.”" 
Matthew26:19 Aborokigwa bagakora buna bachigetwe na Yeso, bakaarigania Epasaka." 
Matthew26:20 Riachia koba mogoroba, agaikaransa ase endagera, amo naborokigwa baria ikomi na babere." 
Matthew26:21 Kobaikaransire koragera, akabora, “Nekeene nabatebirie: oyomo oino nandue.”" 
Matthew26:22 Bagaichana mono, bagachaka kera oyomo komoboria, “Inee! Omonene, ninche?”" 
Matthew26:23 Akairaneria, “Oyo ogotobeka okoboko kwaye amo nainche ase esani, oyio nere orandue." 
Matthew26:24 Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nkogenda are buna arikeretwe, korende obobe nobwaye omonto oria, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto arurwe nere! Nanga mbuya kobua asare omonto oria, nonya ataiboretwe.”" 
Matthew26:25 Yudas, nere oyokomorua, akamoboria, “Inee! Omonene, ninche? Akamoiraneria: Naboigo. Aye gwatebire.”" 
Matthew26:26 Kobakoragera, Yeso akabogoria omogati, akayosesenia, akayosamunyora, akaa aborokigwa, akabora, “Bogoria, morie; oyo noro omobere one.”" 
Matthew26:27 Akabogoria na egekombe, na ekero airaneirie ng’a mbuya mono, akabaa, akabora, “Kanywe aya inwe mwensi," 
Matthew26:28 naki aya naro amanyinga aane ay’okobwatana okoyia, aitekire ase engencho y’abange ase okwaberwa kw’ebibe." 
Matthew26:29 Nabatebirie, tinkonywa naende okwama oko kw’emesabibu goika rituko riria ndache gokonywa okoyia amo nainwe ase oboruoti bwa Tata.”" 
Matthew26:30 Kobakoorire gotera Ogotera, bagasoka kogenda egetunwa ki’Emezeituni." 
Matthew26:31 Erio Yeso akabatebia, “Ase obotuko bwa rero inwe mwensi inamogochwe na gontiga ase engencho yane; naki narikire: Ning’ake omorisia, ne ching’ondi chie riicho inachiserebekane." 
Matthew26:32 Korende nyuma y’okoboka kwane nimbatang’anere kogenda Galili.” 
Matthew26:33 Petero akamotebia, “Neba inabagochwe bonsi na bagotige ase engencho yao, inche tinkogochwa na kogotiga nonya ng’ake.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yeso akamotebia, “Ekeene nagotebirie: Ase obotuko obo, ekero etuoni etarabuga, nonkane ara gatato.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petero akamotebia, “Nimba ngokwa amo naye, tinkogokana nonya ng’ake.” Na aborokigwa bonsi bagateba boigo." 
Matthew26:36 Naende Yeso akagenda nabarabwo goika aase akorokwa Gethisemane, agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Ikaransa aa ekero nkogenda aria gosaba.”" 
Matthew26:37 Akaira Petero na abana baria ba Zebedi babere, agachaka goichana na gwechanda mono." 
Matthew26:38 Erio akabatebia, “Omoyo one nore nobororo obonge, nonya ngoika ogokwa; ikaransa aa, morende amo nainche.”" 
Matthew26:39 Akagenderera ake, akagwa maumama, agasaba, “Tata one, onye ekonyarekana, tiga egekombe eke kerusigwe asende; korende taba buna nyanchete inche, korende buna bwanchete aye.”" 
Matthew26:40 Agachiera aborokigwa baria, akabanyora bararire, agatebia Petero, “Inee! Iga timokonyara korenda amo nainche nonya nensa eyemo?" 
Matthew26:41 Renda, mosabe, timobaisa gosoa ase ogoteemwa; omoika oro nore nogwancha, korende omobere tori ne chinguru.”" 
Matthew26:42 Naende akagenda eria kabere, agasaba, “Tata one, onye tekonyarekana egekombe eke keng’etere ntakenywereti, abe buna bwanchete aye.”" 
Matthew26:43 Agacha naende, akabanyora bararire; ekiagera amaiso abo abeire amarito." 
Matthew26:44 Akabatiga naende, akagenda, agasaba eria gatato agakwana amang’ana aria amatang’ani." 
Matthew26:45 Erio agachiera aborokigwa baria, akabatebia, “Nonya mbono moraire na gotimoka? Rora ensa yaikire, na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto obekirwe ase amaboko ’abanyene ebibe." 
Matthew26:46 Imoka, togende, rora, ere oyokondua oikire ang’e.”" 
Matthew26:47 Ekero arenge gokwana, Yudas, oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, agacha, na omoganda omonene amo nere bare nemioro ne chinungu, bakorwa ase abakuani abanene na abagaaka b’abanto." 
Matthew26:48 Ere oyokomorua, konya obaeire ekemanyererio, agateba, “Oyo ndanyunyunte, oyio nere, momobwate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Erio kegima agachiera Yeso, agateba, “Masoge, Omonene!” Akamonyunyunta." 
Matthew26:50 Yeso akamotebia, “Mosani, nase ki gwacha aa?” Erio bagacha, bakamobwata Yeso, bakamoira." 
Matthew26:51 Na rora, oyomo obo bw’abarenge amo na Yeso akarambora okoboko kwaye, akang’usa omoyio oye o birende, agaaka omosomba bw’omokuani omonene, akamobutora ogoto." 
Matthew26:52 Erio Yeso akamotebia, “Irania omoyio oo o birende aase aye, ekiagera bonsi abakoimokia omoyio o birende inabasire ase omoyio o birende." 
Matthew26:53 Gose tomanyeti ng’a ninyare gosaba Tata, na ere nantomere abamalaika kobua emeganda ikomi na ebere?" 
Matthew26:54 Korende naki rende nanga amariko aikeranigwa, ng’a nabo egwenerete koba?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ensa eria Yeso agatebia emeganda y’abanto, “Inee! Igo mwachire buna mokoimokera omouri nemioro ne chinungu gocha kong’ira? Kera rituko nigo narenge amo nainwe ase Hekalu ime kworokereria, ko timwambwata." 
Matthew26:56 Korende aya onsi abeire, erinde amariko ’ababani aikeranigwe.” Erio aborokigwa bonsi bakamotiga, bagatama." 
Matthew26:57 Baria babwatete Yeso bakamoira ase Kayafa omokuani omonene, aase aborokia b’amariko na abagaaka basangererekanete." 
Matthew26:58 Na Petero akamotunyana korwa nyuma ore egeka, goika ase egoora y’omokuani omonene, agasoa ime, agaikaransa amo nabasomba, erinde arore omoerio." 
Matthew26:59 Erio abakuani abanene na ab’ekegambero bonsi bakarigia amang’ana ’oborimo ay’ogosoera Yeso, banyare komoita;" 
Matthew26:60 korende nonya abarori abange b’oborimo bachete, tibayanyora. Omoerio abarori babere bagacha," 
Matthew26:61 bakabora, “Oyo nigo atebete: Ninyare gotagora Hekalu ya Nyasae, na koyeagacha ase amatuko atato.”" 
Matthew26:62 Erio omokuani omonene agatenena akamoboria, “Tokoiraneria ing’ana? Inki aba bakogosoera?”" 
Matthew26:63 Korende Yeso agakira. Na omokuani omonene akamotebia, “Nagotianirie ase Nyasae ore moyo, ototebie gose naye Kristo, Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yeso akamotebia, “Naboigo. Aye gwatebire, korende nabatebirie inwe, korwa bono inamorore Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto oikaransete ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’Oyore nokobua, ogocha ase amare a igoro.”" 
Matthew26:65 Erio omokuani omonene agatandora chianga chiaye, akabora, “Oramire Nyasae; abarori naba ki tokorigia? Mwaigure emerumi yaye akorama." 
Matthew26:66 Naki moroche?” Bakairaneria, “Omonto oyo nigo agwenerete akwe.”" 
Matthew26:67 Erio agwo bakamotwera amate obosio, bakamoaka chinkundi; abande bakamoaka chindoe," 
Matthew26:68 bakobora, “Kristo, tobanere! Ning’o ogoaka?”" 
Matthew26:69 Bono Petero nigo aikaransete egoora isiko. Omoiseke oyomo akamochiera, akabora, “Aye naye kwarenge amo na Yeso Omogalili.”" 
Matthew26:70 Korende ere agakana ase amasio abo bonsi, akabora “Timanyeti ayio ogokwana.”" 
Matthew26:71 Ekero achia gosoka gesieri, omoiseke onde akamorora, agatebia abarengeo, “Omonto oyo nigo arenge amo na Yeso, Omonazareti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Agakana naende, na gotiana, “Inche timomanyeti omonto oyio.”" 
Matthew26:73 Nyuma ase egeka egeke abateneine aroro bagacha, bagatebia Petero, “Ekeene bori, naye noyomo obo ore, ekiagera ogokwana kwao gwakoorokirie.”" 
Matthew26:74 Erio agachaka kweragereria na gotiana, okobora, “Inche timomanyeti omonto oyio.” Erio kegima etuoni ekabuga." 
Matthew26:75 Erio Petero akainyora ring’ana riria Yeso atebete, “Ritang’ani etuoni etarabuga, nonkane ara gatato.” Agasoka isiko, akarera nobororo." 
Matthew27:1 Bogachia gokia mambia, abakuani abanene bonsi na abagaaka b’abanto bagakora ekina ase Yeso, bamoite." 
Matthew27:2 Bakamosiba, bakamoira, bakamomoa Pilato, oyorenge gavuna." 
Matthew27:3 Ekero Yudas, oria omoruete achia korora ng’a onacheirwe ekina, ageitia, akairania chibesa chiria chie chifeta emerongo etato ase abakuani abanene na abagaaka," 
Matthew27:4 okobora, “Namochire ase okorua amanyinga atari na bobe bonde.” Barabwo bakabora, “Ninki aya are asetore? Mbwerorere aye!”" 
Matthew27:5 Agatuguta chibesa chiria chie chifeta ase Hekalu ime, akaimoka, akagenda akeng’enta." 
Matthew27:6 Korende abakuani abanene bakaimokia chibesa chiria chie chifeta bakabora, “Tari boronge gochibeka ase ekungo y’esadaka ya Nyasae, ekiagera chirochio nechie rigori ri’amanyinga.”" 
Matthew27:7 Bagakora ekina, bakagora oboremo bw’omokori chinyongo, bobe aase bagotindeka abageni." 
Matthew27:8 Ase ayio oboremo obo nigo bokorokwa Oboremo bw’Amanyinga goika rero. 
Matthew27:9 Erio rigaikeranigwa eriatebetwe nomobani Yeremia, ogoteba, “Bakaimokia chibesa chiria chie chifeta emerongo etato, rigori riaye oria obegetwe rigori nabanto bande b’Abaisraeli," 
Matthew27:10 bagachiira ase okogora oboremo bw’omokori chinyongo, buna Omonene anchigete.”" 
Matthew27:11 Nere Yeso agatenena ase gavuna; na gavuna akamoboria, “Naye Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?” Yeso akamotebia, “Naboigo. Aye gwatebire.”" 
Matthew27:12 Korende ochia gosoerwa nabakuaani abanene na abagaaka, tairaneria ing’ana rinde." 
Matthew27:13 Erio Pilato akamotebia, “Toigweti amang’ana aya amange bakona‐goteba igoro yao?”" 
Matthew27:14 Korende ere tairaneria rinde, nonya nase ring’ana erimo, na gavuna agakumia mono." 
Matthew27:15 Bono ekero kie rituko rinene nigo yarenge engencho ya gavuna kobasiborera omosibwa oyomo oyo barigetie. 
Matthew27:16 Mbabwate omosibwa oyomo omanyekanete, okorokwa Baraba." 
Matthew27:17 Erio kobasangererekanire, Pilato akababoria, “Norori morigetie mbasiborere, Baraba gose Yeso, oyo okorokwa Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Ekiagera konya omanyire ng’a nigo bamorure ase obogechi. 
Matthew27:19 Ekero Pilato aikaransire ase ekerogo gi’ekina, akarenterwa amang’ana na mokaye, ogoteba, “Oyio nomonto omonyene oboronge, tobaisa kwebwatia asare, ekiagera rero inachandetwe namange ase okorota ase engencho yaye.”" 
Matthew27:20 Bono abakuani abanene na abagaaka bakagenka emeganda ng’a baborie baegwe Baraba, na Yeso bamoite." 
Matthew27:21 Gavuna akababoria naende, “Ase abanto aba babere, norori morigetie mbasiborere?” Bakamotebia, “Baraba.”" 
Matthew27:22 Pilato akababoria, “Imokore naki Yeso, oyo okorokwa Kristo?” Bakamotebia bonsi, “Tiga abambwe!”" 
Matthew27:23 Akababoria, “Nase ki? Mbobe ki akorete?” Barabwo bakamenta goaka egeturi, bakobora, “Tiga abambwe!”" 
Matthew27:24 Ekero Pilato achia korora ng’a gento tikenyarekaneti asare, ne riroroche rioka rikona‐kobucha, akaimokia amache, agaisaba amaboko aye ase obosio bw’omoganda, ogoteba, “Inche tindi na komocha ase amanyinga ’omonto oyo omonyene oboronge. Nigoro yaino abanyene.”" 
Matthew27:25 Abanto bonsi bakairaneria, “Amanyinga aye, tiga abe igoro asetore, na ase abana baito!”" 
Matthew27:26 Erio akabasiborera Baraba, na nyuma gaakire Yeso emecharichi, akabamotigera anyare kobambwa." 
Matthew27:27 Erio abarwani ba gavuna bakaira Yeso ime ase enyomba y’ekegambero, bakamosangererekera omoganda omogima bw’abarwani." 
Matthew27:28 Bakamorusia chianga chiaye, bakamobekera eanga embariri." 
Matthew27:29 Bagatwang’a egutwa y’amagwa, bakamobekera motwe, na egetonto bakamobekera ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio; bagatung’ama asare, bakamochecheria na kobora, “Masoge, Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi!”" 
Matthew27:30 Erio bakamotwera amate, bakaimokia egetonto keria, bakamoaka ase omotwe." 
Matthew27:31 Kobamochecheirie, bakamorusia eanga eria embariri, bakamobekera chianga chiaye omonyene, bakamoira isiko abambwe." 
Matthew27:32 Kobagosoka korwa ase omochie, bakarora omonto oyomo, Omokurene, okorokwa Simion; bakabetereria omonto oyio abogorerie Yeso omosalaba." 
Matthew27:33 Bagachia goika aase akorokwa Gologotha (engencho yaye: Aase Ekeore)," 
Matthew27:34 bakamoa edivai esang’anirie nendorwe, anywe. Agachia koyeigwa, tancha konywa." 
Matthew27:35 Kobamobambire bagaatanana chianga chiaye, bagakora obomera." 
Matthew27:36 Erio bagaikaransa komorigereria aria. 
Matthew27:37 Igoro ase omotwe oye bakabeka ogosoerwa kwaye, korikire, “OYO NERE YESO, OMORUOTI BW’ABAYAHUDI”." 
Matthew27:38 Erio abauri babere bakabambwa amo nere, oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, na oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee." 
Matthew27:39 Na barabwo abaare goeta, bakamorama, bagosinga‐singisia emetwe yabo, bakobora," 
Matthew27:40 “Aye oyogotagora Hekalu na koyeagacha ase amatuko atato, etoorie! Onye naye Omwana o Nyasae, ika korwa ase omosalaba.”" 
Matthew27:41 Na baria abakuani abanene bagakora boigo, bakamokorera echeche amo naborokia b’amariko na abagaaka, bakobora," 
Matthew27:42 “Natooretie abande, ere omonyene takonyara gwetooria. Ere n’Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, tiga aike bono korwa ase omosalaba, na intwe rirorio ntomwegene." 
Matthew27:43 Nigo asemeretie Nyasae, tiga Nyasae amotoorie bono, onye omoganetie, ekiagera natebete: Inche n’Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
Matthew27:44 Na baria abauri, ababambetwe amo nere, bakamorama boigo." 
Matthew27:45 Bono korwa chinsa isano nemo omosunte okaba igoro ase ense yonsi goika chinsa kianda. 
Matthew27:46 Chiachia koba ang’e chinsa kianda, Yeso, akarera neriogi rinene, okobora, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani?” Okoonchorwa kwaye, “Nyasae one, Nyasae one, naki gwantigire?”" 
Matthew27:47 Na abande b’abwo bateneine aroro, bakayaigwa, bakabora, “Omonto oyo n’Elija akorangeria.”" 
Matthew27:48 Erio kegima oyomo obo akaimokia esifunchi, akayeichoria chinkama, akayebeka ase egetonto, akamoa anywe." 
Matthew27:49 Korende baria abande bakabora, “Tiga torore gose Elija ngocha are komotooria.”" 
Matthew27:50 Yeso akarera naende neriogi rinene, erio agatweka mo." 
Matthew27:51 Na rora, egetambaa gi’okonacha Hekalu kegatandoka korwa igoro goika inse, gekaba bibere, ense egatengecha, ebitare bigatandoka." 
Matthew27:52 Chimbeera chikamaanoka chigaasama, na emebere emenge y’abanto abachenu konya bakure ekabokigwa." 
Matthew27:53 Kabarure ase chimbeera, nyuma y’okoboka kwa Yeso bagasoa ase omochie omochenu bakaorokera abange." 
Matthew27:54 Na ekero omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana, na abwo barenge amo nere korenda Yeso, bachia korora omotengecho bw’ense na ebiakorekire, bakairoka mono, bakabora, “Ekeene, oyo nigo arenge Omwana o Nyasae!”" 
Matthew27:55 Mbarengeo boigo abakungu abange, barigereretie korwa are, abatunyanete Yeso korwa Galili, bakomokorera." 
Matthew27:56 Ase abwo nigo barenge Mariamu Magidalena, na Mariamu ng’ina Yakobo na Yusufu, na ng’ina ’abana ba Zebedi." 
Matthew27:57 Riachia koba mogoroba, omonto omonda bw’Arimathaya, okorokwa Yusufu, agacha; ere nomworokigwa o Yeso orenge." 
Matthew27:58 Oyio akagenda ase Pilato, akarigia omobere o Yeso. Erio Pilato agachika ayoegwe." 
Matthew27:59 Yusufu akaimokia omobere, akayoboyia egetambaa ekiya ki’egatani," 
Matthew27:60 akayobeka ase oboina bwaye oboyia, obwabachete ase egetare; naende agaturunkania rigena rinene gochia ase egesieri ki’oboina, akagenda." 
Matthew27:61 Mbarengeo Mariamu Magidalena na Mariamu onde, baikaransete bosio bw’oboina." 
Matthew27:62 Rituko ria kabere, nario riare rigotunya rituko ri’Okwearigania, abakuani abanene na Abafarisai bagasangererekana ase Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 bakabora, “Omonene, twainyoire ng’a omonyaborimo oria natebete ekero arenge moyo: Nyuma ase amatuko atato nimboke." 
Matthew27:64 Gaki, chika oboina borendwe buya goika rituko ria gatato, aborokigwa baye tibabaisa gocha komoiba, batebie abanto ng’a obokire korwa ase abakure; okong’aina kw’omoerio nakobue koria kwe ritang’ani.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato akabatebia, “More nabarendi; genda morende mono oboina buna moranyare.” Bakagenda bakaborenda mono, bakabeka rigena riria ekemanyererio, naende bakabeka abarendi." 
Matthew28:1 Esabato egachia koera, kobogokiamoka rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, Mariamu Magidalena na oria Mariamu onde bakagenda korora oboina." 
Matthew28:2 Na rora, norengeo omotengecho omonene, ekiagera omomalaika bw’Omonene aigete korwa igoro, agachia agatigeria rigena riria, akariikaransera." 
Matthew28:3 Ekieni kiaye nigo kiarenge buna okomesa kw’embura, na eanga yaye nendabu buna amagena ’embura." 
Matthew28:4 Ase okomoiroka ere abarendi bakaiguswa, bakaba buna abanto bakure." 
Matthew28:5 Korende omomalaika agatebia abakungu baria, “Timoiroka inwe, ekiagera namanyire ng’a Yeso mokorigia, oria obambetwe." 
Matthew28:6 Tari aiga, ekiagera obokire, buna atebete. Inchuo, morigererie aase Omonene araire." 
Matthew28:7 Na genda bwango, motebie aborokigwa baye ng’a obokire korwa ase abakure; na rora, obatang’aneire kogenda Galili; agwo nao moramorore. Rora, inche nabatebirie ayio.”" 
Matthew28:8 Bakaimoka korwa ase oboina bwango, bare nokoiroka na omogoko omonene, bakaminyoka, bakairera aborokigwa baye amang’ana." 
Matthew28:9 Na rora, Yeso akaumerana nabarabwo, akabakwania, “Masoge!” Na barabwo bagacha, bakamobwata amagoro, bakamosasima." 
Matthew28:10 Erio Yeso akabatebia, “Timoiroka! Genda motebie abaminto bagende Galili, nao barandore.”" 
Matthew28:11 Kobakogenda, rora, abande b’abarendi baria bagasoa ase omochie, bagatebia abakuani abanene amang’ana onsi ayakoregete." 
Matthew28:12 Na ekero basangererekanire amo nabagaaka, na kobaroisirie amang’ana, bakaa abarendi baria chibesa chinyinge," 
Matthew28:13 bakabora, “Motebie abanto: Aborokigwa baye bachete botuko, bakamoiba ekero twararire." 
Matthew28:14 Ring’ana eri koriraigweke ase gavuna, intwe natoche tokwane nere, tomoebererie, na korusia inwe ase emechando.”" 
Matthew28:15 Bakabogoria chibesa chiria, bagakora buna batebetigwe, na omogano oyo okumire ase Abayahudi goika rero iga." 
Matthew28:16 Aborokigwa baria ikomi nomo bakagenda Galili, bagaika egetunwa keria Yeso abachigete." 
Matthew28:17 Ekero bachia komorora, bakamosasima; korende abande mbabete nogosiereria." 
Matthew28:18 Yeso agacha, akabatebia, “Naeirwe okobua gwonsi igoro na ense." 
Matthew28:19 Gaki genda mokore ebisaku bionsi koba aborokigwa, mokobabatisa ase erieta ria Tata, neri’Omwana, neri’Omoika Omochenu," 
Matthew28:20 mokoborokereria kobwata aya onsi nabachigete; na rora, inche nigo inde amo nainwe amatuko onsi goika omoerio bw’ense.”" 
Mark1:1 Oyo noro omochakano bw’enchili ya Yesu Kristo, Omwana o Nyasae," 
Mark1:2 buna erikire ase ebuku y’omobani Isaya. “Rora, natomire omotomwa one agotang’anere, oyo oraroisie enchera yao;" 
Mark1:3 eriogi ri’oyogoaka egeturi ase erooro: Roisia enchera y’Omonene, rongeyia oboeto bwaye!”" 
Mark1:4 Erio Yohana Omobatisi akaoroka ase erooro, okorandia, okobatebia, “Onchoka, mobatiswe, monyore okwaberwa kw’ebibe.”" 
Mark1:5 Abanto b’ense yonsi ya Boyahudi, na bonsi aba Yerusalemu bakamochiera, bakabatiswa nere ase orooche rwa Yorodan, bakoorokia ebibe biabo." 
Mark1:6 Na Yohana nigo arenge kobeka chianga chi’amarionya ’engamia, na kweboeria orokini rwe riiyo kenema kiaye. Nigo arenge koria chingige na obooke bw’orosana." 
Mark1:7 Akarandia, okobora, “Nache korwa nyuma yane oyore ne chinguru kombua, omonto inche ntaisaini gotung’ama na gosibora chinuga chi’ebikoroto biaye." 
Mark1:8 Inche nigo nkobabatisa ase amache, korende ere nababatise ase Omoika Omochenu.”" 
Mark1:9 Ase amatuko aria Yeso agacha korwa Nazareti ya Galili, akabatiswa na Yohana ase orooche rwa Yorodan." 
Mark1:10 Erio kegima, kagotiira korwa ase amache, akarora igoro amaanokire, na Omoika buna riruma ogoika igoro asare," 
Mark1:11 na eriogi rikarwa igoro, rigateba, “Aye naye Omwana one omwanchwa, ngokirie naye.”" 
Mark1:12 Erio kegima Omoika okamoira ase erooro. 
Mark1:13 Akaba ase erooro amatuko emerongo ene, ogoteemwa na Saitani; ere nigo arenge amo ne ching’iti chi’orosana; na abamalaika bakaba nkomokorera bare." 
Mark1:14 Goika nyuma Yohana kabekirwe echela ime, Yeso akagenda Galili, akarandia enchili ya Nyasae," 
Mark1:15 okobora, “Engaki yaikeranire, na oboruoti bwa Nyasae bwaikire ang’e; onchoka na mwegene enchili.”" 
Mark1:16 Ere ekero are goeta ensemo y’enyancha ya Galili, akarora Simion na Anderea, momura omwabo Simion, bakoruta ekeonga enyancha ime, ekiagera nabarubi barenge." 
Mark1:17 Yeso akabatebia, “Inchuo montunyane, na inche nimbakore mobe abarubi b’abanto.”" 
Mark1:18 Erio kegima bagatiga ebionga biabo, bakamotunyana." 
Mark1:19 Akagenderera bosio ake, akarora Yakobo, omwana o Zebedi, na Yohana momura omwabo; barabwo nigo barenge obwato ime bakoroisia ebionga biabo." 
Mark1:20 Erio kegima akabarangeria; barabwo bagatiga Zebedi ise ime ase obwato amo nabanto b’eng’eria, bakamotunyana." 
Mark1:21 Bakabwatia enchera goika Kapernaumu, na erio kegima ase rituko ri’Esabato Yeso agasoa ase esinagogi akorokereria." 
Mark1:22 Bagakumia ase okworokereria kwaye, ekiagera arenge koborokereria buna oyore nokobua, gose tari buna aborokia b’amariko." 
Mark1:23 Erio kegima narengeo ase esinagogi yabo omonto obwatire nekerecha ki’eubi. Ere agaaka eriogi," 
Mark1:24 akabora, “Inki tore naye, Yeso o Nazareti? Inee! Nigo gwachire gotosiria? Nakomanyire aye, Omochenu o Nyasae.”" 
Mark1:25 Yeso akagetogonyera, akabora, “Kira, omorwe!”" 
Mark1:26 Ekerecha keria ki’eubi gekamogaragaria, gekarera ase eriogi rinene, gekamorwa." 
Mark1:27 Bagaichana bonsi, goika bakaborania, bakobora, “Inki eke? Nokworokereria okoyia! Omonto oyo nigo abwate okobua kw’ogochika nonya nebirecha bi’eubi, na birobio bikomoigwera.”" 
Mark1:28 Erio chinkuma chiaye chigasarera ase ense yonsi ensemo ya Galili. 
Mark1:29 Erio agwo kobasokire korwa ase esinagogi, bagasoa nyomba mwa Simion na Anderea, amo na Yakobo na Yohana." 
Mark1:30 Ng’ina biara Simion oraire, orwarete esosera. Erio kegima bakamotebia amang’ana igoro yaye." 
Mark1:31 Akamoika ang’e, akamoimokia ase okomobwata okoboko. Erio esosera ekamotiga na ere akabakorera." 
Mark1:32 Riachia koba mogoroba, erioba korikogwa, bakamorentera bonsi abarenge abarwaire, na ababwatetwe nebirecha." 
Mark1:33 Na omochie bwonsi okaba ngosangererekana ore gesieri. 
Mark1:34 Akagwenia abange abarenge namarwaire ao ao, agaseria ebirecha ebinge; tatiga ebirecha bikwane, ekiagera biamomanyete." 
Mark1:35 Mambia, botarakiamoka, akaimoka, agasoka, akagenda aase atari nabanto, agasabera aroro." 
Mark1:36 Simion na abarenge amo nere bakamotunyana," 
Mark1:37 bakamonyora, bakamotebia, “Abanto bonsi ngokorigia bare.”" 
Mark1:38 Akabatebia, “Togende aase aande goika ebichie bire ang’e, ninyare korandia na aroro boigo, ekiagera ase ayio naro nachicheire.”" 
Mark1:39 Agasoa ase chisinagogi chiabo ase ense yonsi ya Galili, okorandia na goseria ebirecha." 
Mark1:40 Omonto oyomo orenge noborwaire bwa ukoma agacha asare, akamosorora na komotung’amera, akamotebia, “Onye ngwancha, nonyare gonsibia.”" 
Mark1:41 Yeso akamororera amabera, akarambora okoboko kwaye, akamokuna, akamotebia, “Nanchire; sibeka.”" 
Mark1:42 Erio agwo oborwaire bwaye bwa ukoma bokamotiga, agasibeka." 
Mark1:43 Akamokania bokong’u, akamosokia agende," 
Mark1:44 akamotebia, “Rigereria, totebia monto onde bwensi amang’ana aya; korende genda bweorokie ase omokuani, orue ekeng’wanso egiachigetwe na Musa ase ogosibeka kwao, erinde kebe kirori ase abanto.”" 
Mark1:45 Korende agasoka, agachaka korandia amang’ana aya na gosareria ring’ana riria, goika Yeso tanyara naende gosoa ase omochie ime maiso marore, korende akabeera isiko aase atari nabanto; na abanto bakamochiera korwa kera aase." 
Mark2:1 Agasoa Kapernaumu naende nyuma y’amatuko amake; ekaigugwa ng’a nao are nyomba. 
Mark2:2 Erio abanto abange bagasangererekana amo, tiriatigara ribaga asebare, nonya ngoika gesieri; na Yeso akaba ogokwana ring’ana asebare." 
Mark2:3 Abanto bagacha; bakamorentera omonto orenge rigata obogoirie nabanto bane. 
Mark2:4 Ekiagera batanyarete komoika ang’e ase engencho y’omoganda, bakabochora ekerama aase aaria arenge. Kobakoorire kogetagora, bagaikia oborere boria oria orenge rigata araire." 
Mark2:5 Yeso agachia korora okwegena kwabo agatebia oria orenge rigata, “Omwana one, ebibe biao biabeirwe.”" 
Mark2:6 Abande ase aborokia b’amariko baikaransete aroro, bakeboria ase chinkoro chiabo," 
Mark2:7 “Naki oyo agoteba iga? Nkorama are! Ning’o oranyare kwabera ebibe, otatiga oyomo, nere Nyasae?”" 
Mark2:8 Erio Yeso namanyete ase omoika oye ime buna baare korengereria ase chinkoro chiabo, akabatebia, “Naki mokorengereria iga ase chinkoro chiaino?" 
Mark2:9 Ndiriri rire eriango, gotebia oyore rigata: Ebibe biao biabeirwe, gose goteba: Imoka, bwetweke oborere bwao, ogende?" 
Mark2:10 Korende monyare komanya ng’a Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nare nokobua ase ense gw’okwabera ebibe.” Erio agwo agatebia oria orenge rigata," 
Mark2:11 “Nagotebirie, imoka, bwetweke oborere bwao, ogende bwoo.”" 
Mark2:12 Erio kegima akaimoka, agetweka oborere bwaye, akarua ase amasio abo bonsi; goika bagakumia bonsi, bagatogia Nyasae, bakobora, “Ayare buna aya, titwana koyarora rinde nonya ng’ake!”" 
Mark2:13 Agasoka naende, akagenda ensemo y’enyancha. Omoganda bwonsi okamochiera, ere akaborokereria." 
Mark2:14 Ekero achia goeta, akarora Lawi, omwana bw’Alufayo, oikaransete aase bakobangerwa ebango, akamotebia, “Ntunyana!” Akaimoka, akamotunyana." 
Mark2:15 Ekaba ekero Yeso aikaransete nyomba mw’omonto oria, okoria endagera, abarusia ebango abange na abanyene ebibe bagaikaransa amo na Yeso na aborokigwa baye; naki barenge abange bamotunyanete." 
Mark2:16 Aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai bagachia komorora okoria amo nabanyene ebibe na abarusia ebango, bagatebia aborokigwa baye, “Nase ki akoria na konywa amo nabarusia ebango na abanyene ebibe?”" 
Mark2:17 Yeso agachia koigwa aya, akabatebia, “Abare buya tibari korigia omorwaria, otatiga abarwarete; tincheti korangeria ababoronge, korende abanyene ebibe.”" 
Mark2:18 Aborokigwa ba Yohana na Abafarisai nigo barenge kweng’ata. Abanto bande bagacha, bakamoboria, “Nase ki aborokigwa ba Yohana na aborokigwa b’Abafarisai bakweng’ata, ko aborokigwa bao tibari kweng’ata?”" 
Mark2:19 Yeso akabatebia, “Inee! Abarangerigwa b’enyangi inabanyare kweng’ata ekero omonyuomi are amo nabarabwo? Ekero omonyuomi are amo na barabwo, tibakonyara kweng’ata." 
Mark2:20 Korende amatuko nache barache kourwa omonyuomi, erio nario barache kweng’ata ase rituko riria." 
Mark2:21 Gose tari monto onde okobareera ekeraka ki’egetambaa ekeyia ase eanga engotu ekiagera keria kiabekwa nigo kegotandora eanga eria, keria ekeyia giachierereria eanga eria engotu etandoke kobua." 
Mark2:22 Gose onde tari okobeka edivai enyia ase ebirandi ebigotu biroisirie korwa ase amasankwa, gose edivai eria nebiate ebirandi, edivai eiteke, na ebirandi bitandoke; korende edivai enyia nigo ekobekwa ase ebirandi ebiyia.”" 
Mark2:23 Yeso agachia koba ngoeta arenge ase emegondo y’engano ase rituko ri’Esabato; aborokigwa baye bagachaka kobutora ebigara kobakogenda. 
Mark2:24 Abafarisai bakamobcria, “Rora, naki bagokora eritari boronge gokorwa ase rituko ri’Esabato?”" 
Mark2:25 Akabairaneria, “Timwana gosoma aya Daudi akorete ekero aremeretwe endagera, akaba nenchara, ere na abwo barenge amo nere," 
Mark2:26 buna asoete ase enyomba ya Nyasae, ekero Abiatari arenge omokuani omonene, akaria emegati yarenge korugwa ase Nyasae, etare boronge koriegwa nonde otatiga nabakuani, naende akaa abarenge amo nere?”" 
Mark2:27 Akabatebia, “Esabato nigo yakoretwe ase engencho ya mwanyabanto, tari mwanyabanto ase engencho y’Esabato;" 
Mark2:28 naki Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nere omonene bw’Esabato.” 
Mark3:1 Agasoa naende ase esinagogi. Narengeo omonto agwo, okoboko kwaye kwagataete." 
Mark3:2 Bakamotega Yeso, barore gose nagwenie omonto oria ase rituko ri’Esabato, banyare komosoera." 
Mark3:3 Agatebia omonto oria okoboko kwaye kwagataete, “Tenena gati aa!”" 
Mark3:4 Akababoria, “Mboronge ase rituko ri’Esabato gokora amaya, gose gokora amabe, gotooria obogima, gose koboita?” Bagakira." 
Mark3:5 Akabamogoreria amaiso chinsemo chionsi ase okobea, akaigwa obororo ase engencho y’obokong’u bwe chinkoro chiabo, agatebia omonto oria, “Rambora okoboko kwao!” Agakorambora, na okoboko kwaye gokagwena." 
Mark3:6 Erio kegima Abafarisai baria bagasoka, bakagamba amo n’Abaherodiani buna barakore baite Yeso." 
Mark3:7 Erio Yeso ageatanana amo naborokigwa baye, bakagenda nyancha. Omoganda omonene korwa Galili okabatunyana, naboigo korwa ase Boyahudi," 
Mark3:8 na Yerusalemu, na Idumea, na ng’umbu ya Yorodan, ne chinsemo chia Turo na Sidoni. Omoganda oyo omonene, ochia koigwa ebirage bi’amang’ana onsi arenge gokora, okamochiera." 
Mark3:9 Agatebia aborokigwa baye bamobekere obwato ang’e ase engencho y’abanto; erio omoganda tomomiga. 
Mark3:10 Ekiagera agwenetie abanto, bonsi abarenge nemechando bakamosongerera, banyare komokuna." 
Mark3:11 Na ebirecha bi’eubi bigachia komorora, bikagwa ase obosio bwaye, bikarera bigateba, “Aye naye Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
Mark3:12 Akabikania mono tibimoorokia. 
Mark3:13 Agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro, akarangeria abwo arigetie ere omonyene; na barabwo bakamochiera." 
Mark3:14 Agachora ikomi na babere, banyare, koba amo nere, erinde anyare kobatoma bagende korandia," 
Mark3:15 na babe nokobua kw’ogoseria ebirecha. 
Mark3:16 Baria ikomi na babere achorete nabwo aba: Simion nere arogete erieta rinde Petero," 
Mark3:17 na Yakobo, omwana o Zebedi, na Yohana, momura omwabo Yakobo, akabaroka erieta Boanergi, engencho yaye: Abana b’enkoba;" 
Mark3:18 Anderea na Filipo, na Baritholomayo, na Matayo, na Tomas, na Yakobo bw’Alufayo, na Tadayo, na Simion, oyomo bw’Abazelote," 
Mark3:19 na Yudas Iskariota, nere oyomoruete. Erio agasoa nyomba." 
Mark3:20 Na omoganda ogasangerereka naende; barabwo abanyene tibanyara nonya nokoria. 
Mark3:21 Abaamate baye bagachia koigwa amang’ana aya, bagasoka kogenda komobwata, ekiagera batebete, “Obakirwe neosi.”" 
Mark3:22 Na aborokia b’amariko, abarwete Yerusalemu, bakabora, “Nabwatire na Beelizebuli, na ase okobua kw’omonene bw’ebirecha agoseria ebirecha.”" 
Mark3:23 Akabarangeria bache asare, akabatebia ase emereng’anio, “Naki Saitani aranyare goseria Saitani?" 
Mark3:24 Na oboruoti kaboraatananeke ase borobwo obonyene, oboruoti boria tibokonyara gotenena." 
Mark3:25 Na enyomba keraatananeke enyene, enyomba eria tekonyara gotenena." 
Mark3:26 Na onye Saitani bweimokeire ere omonyene, na gweatanana, takonyara gotenena, korende nabe nomoerio." 
Mark3:27 Omonto takonyara gosoa ase enyomba y’omonto omonyene chinguru na gosakora ebinto biaye, atamosibeti ritang’ani oria omonyene chinguru; nario aranyare gosakora enyomba yaye." 
Mark3:28 “Ekeene nabatebirie: Ebibe bionsi mwanyabanto nabaaberwe, na okorama gwonsi bararame," 
Mark3:29 korende monto onde bwensi orarame Omoika Omochenu takwaberwa nonya ng’ake, korende nigo arabe nebibe goika kare na kare.”" 
Mark3:30 Nigo abatebetie ayio ekiagera batebete, “Nabwatire nekerecha ki’eubi.”" 
Mark3:31 Ng’ina na bamura bamwabo Yeso bagacha, bagatenena isiko, bagatoma omonto komorangeria." 
Mark3:32 Na omoganda nigo orenge oikaransete omoetanaine, okamotebia, “Rora nyoko na bamura bamino isiko bare, mbakorigetie.”" 
Mark3:33 Akabairaneria, “Baba na bamura baminto mbarabi?”" 
Mark3:34 Akarigereria abwo baikaransete bamoetanaine, akabora, “Rora baba na bamura baminto!" 
Mark3:35 Naki oyorakore ogwancha kwa Nyasae, oyio nere momura ominto, na mosubati ominto, na baba.”" 
Mark4:1 Agachaka kworokereria naende ase enyancha mbarabare, na omoganda omonene okamosangererekanera, goika ere akariina obwato, agaikaransa imeo igoro y’enyancha. Omoganda bwonsi nao orenge ase ense enyomo enyancha mbarabare." 
Mark4:2 Akaborokereria amang’ana amange ase emereng’anio, akabatebia ase okworokereria kwaye," 
Mark4:3 “Tegerera! Omobusuri akamanora kogenda kobusura. 
Mark4:4 Agachia koba nkobusura are, chimbusuro chinde chikagwa ase enchera ensemo, chinyoni chigacha chigachiria." 
Mark4:5 Na echinde chikagwa aase egetare kere, aase amaroba are amake; chikamera bwango, ekiagera amaroba arenge amake." 
Mark4:6 Omobaso ogachia kobara, chigasusana, na ekiagera chitarenge nemeri, chikoma." 
Mark4:7 Na echinde chikagwa ase amagwa ime, na amagwa aria agakina, agachimiga, tichiama amatunda." 
Mark4:8 Na echinde chikagwa ase amaroba amaya, chikama endagera, chikamera na gokina, na kwama; echinde emerongo etato, na echinde emerongo etano nomo, naende echinde rigana.”" 
Mark4:9 Akabora, “Oyore namato akoigwera tiga aigwe.”" 
Mark4:10 Ekero arenge bweka, abanto baria bamoetanaine amo nabaria ikomi na babere bakamoboria amang’ana ’emereng’anio eria." 
Mark4:11 Akabatebia, “Inwe mwaeirwe komanya obobisi bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae, korende ase abanto bare isiko, amang’ana onsi nigo are emereng’anio asebare," 
Mark4:12 erio okorigereria nabarigererie, ko tibakorora, na okoigwa nabaigwe, ko tibakomanya; tibacha koonchoka, baaberwe ebibe biabo.”" 
Mark4:13 Akabatebia, “Timomanyeti omoreng’anio oyo? Gaki emereng’anio yonsi naki morayemanye?" 
Mark4:14 Omobusuri nering’ana akobusura. 
Mark4:15 Abwo nabwo bare enchera ensemo; aase ring’ana rikobusurwa, na barabwo kobaikire koriigwa, bwango Saitani ocha orusia ring’ana riria riabusuirwe ase emioyo yabo ime." 
Mark4:16 Naboigo koreng’ana nabwo babusuirwe ase egetare, ekiagera kobaigure ring’ana riria, erio kegima baribwata nomogoko;" 
Mark4:17 na abwo tibari nemeri ime yabo abanyene, korende bagenderera ekero egeke, na ekero emechando gose okorosigwa bikooroka ase engencho ye ring’ana riria, bwango bagwa." 
Mark4:18 Naende abande nabwo baria babusuirwe ase amagwa, aba nabwo bakoigwa ring’ana," 
Mark4:19 naende okorengereria gw’ense na obong’ainereria bw’enibo, na okogania kw’amang’ana ande kogosoa, biamiga ring’ana riria, riaba tirikwama." 
Mark4:20 Naende aba nabwo babusuirwe ase amaroba amaya, abwo nabanto baria bakoigwa ring’ana riria, na koribwata, na kwama okwama, oyomo emerongo etato, oyomo emerongo etano nomo, na oyonde rigana.”" 
Mark4:21 Yeso akabatebia, “Inee! Etaya nigo ekorentwa erinde yamumekwa negetonga gose yabekwa nyaro y’oborere? Teri kobekwa igoro ase ekebekerero?" 
Mark4:22 Naki ring’ana tiriri ribisegete ritache koorokigwa, gose eria bobisi ritache koorokigwa maiso marore." 
Mark4:23 Omonto kare namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe.”" 
Mark4:24 Akabatebia, “Rigereria aya mokoigwa; na ekerengo keria mokorengera nakio morache korengerwa inwe, naende namomenterwe." 
Mark4:25 Naki oyobwate naegwe; korende oyotabwati naurwe nonya neyio abwate.” 
Mark4:26 Erio akabora, “Oboruoti bwa Nyasae nigo bogwekaine nomonto obusurete embusuro ase riroba." 
Mark4:27 Akaba okorara na koboka, botuko na mobaso, na embusuro eyio ekamera na gokina, ere atamanyeti buna egokoreka." 
Mark4:28 Naki ense nigo ekwama enyene, ritang’ani rinyansi, naende ekegara, erio enyeke ase ekegara." 
Mark4:29 Na endagera koyamire, bwango nigo akoira omoyio okogesa, ekiagera rigesa riaikire ang’e.”" 
Mark4:30 Akagenderera kobora, “Ninki torabogwekanie oboruoti bwa Nyasae? Gose tobobeke ase moreng’anio ki?" 
Mark4:31 Nigo bonga entetere y’omote onga buna omosabisabi, ekero egosimekwa ase amaroba nenke kobua chimbusuro chionsi ase ense," 
Mark4:32 korende koyasimekirwe, ekiina, eba enene kobua emete yonsi ye chinyeni, ekoba ne chinsagia chinene; goika chinyoni chia igoro chinyare gokenderera ase ekiriri kiaye.”" 
Mark4:33 Ase emereng’anio emenge ere buna eye nigo arenge gokwana ring’ana asebare, koreng’ana buna baare konyara koigwa," 
Mark4:34 gose tare kobatebia ring’ana otatiga ase omoreng’anio, korende agatebereria aborokigwa baye amang’ana onsi bobisi." 
Mark4:35 Ase rituko riria, rigachia koba mogoroba, akabatebia, “Twamboke gochia ng’umbu.”" 
Mark4:36 Bagatiga omoganda, bakamoira amo nabarabwo, buna arenge, ase obwato boria. Na amaato ande narenge amo nere" 
Mark4:37 Ekembugu‐mbugu ekenene ki’omwaga gekaoroka, emerindo egaaka‐aka obwato goika amache agachaka goichora obwato ime." 
Mark4:38 Ere omonyene nigo arenge ase obwato ime magega oraire igoro ase omoito. Bakamotura, bakamotebia, “Omworokia, tari gento asore gatogosira?”" 
Mark4:39 Akaboka, agatogonyera omwaga, agatebia enyancha, “Kira, otoerere!” Omwaga okaera; gokaba ogotoerera okonene." 
Mark4:40 Akabatebia, “Naki mokwoboa inwe? Timori nokwegena?”" 
Mark4:41 Bagasogwa nomoondoko omonene, bagatebania, “Ning’o oyo rende, goika nonya nomwaga na enyancha bikomoigwera?”" 
Mark5:1 Bagaika ng’umbu y’enyancha, goika ense y’Abageraseni." 
Mark5:2 Yeso agachia goika korwa obwato; agwo akaumerana nomonto okorwa ase chimbeera obwatire nekerecha ki’eubi. 
Mark5:3 Obomenyo bwaye nigo bwarenge aria ase chimbeera. Monto onde tarenge ore konyara komosiba nonya nase ebinyuri," 
Mark5:4 ekiagera nigo arenge konya osibirwe ara aange ne chingataare na ebinyuri, abutora ebinyuri biria, na kobuna‐buna chingataare chiria, na onde tarenge ore ne chinguru chi’okomobua." 
Mark5:5 Na botambe, botuko na mobaso, nao arenge ase chimbeera na ebitunwa, okona‐korera na gwekeba‐keba namagena." 
Mark5:6 Agachia korora Yeso korwa are, akaminyoka chimbero, akamosasima;" 
Mark5:7 agaaka eriogi, okobora, “Inaki inde naye Yeso, Omwana o Nyasae ore Igoro Mono? Nagotianirie ase Nyasae ng’a tonchanda”," 
Mark5:8 ekiagera Yeso konya ogetebirie, “Aye ekerecha ki’eubi, karwe ase omonto oyo!”" 
Mark5:9 Yeso akamoboria, “Erieta riao naki okorokwa?” Akairaneria, “Erieta riane n’Elegioni, ekiagera nabange tore.”" 
Mark5:10 Akamosorora mono tabiira isiko y’ense eria. 
Mark5:11 Aria ase egetunwa ndiarengeo riicho rinene rie chimbeche riare korisia. 
Mark5:12 Ebirecha bionsi bikamosorora, bikabora, “Toire ase chimbeche, tonyare gosoa chirochio.”" 
Mark5:13 Akabia ribaga. Ebirecha biria bi’eubi bigasoka, bigasoa ase chimbeche chiria; riicho riria rigatirimboka bwango gochia ase egeturunkano, goika chikagwa enyancha ime. Igo chiarenge koreng’ana chilifu ibere, chikarimera nyancha ime." 
Mark5:14 Abarisia bagatama, bakararia amang’ana aya ase omochie na ebichie. Abanto bagasoka barore amang’ana aorokire." 
Mark5:15 Bagachiera Yeso, bakarora omonto oria obwatire nomoganda bw’ebirecha oikaransete, bweboyetie chianga, ore nebirengererio ebironge bakairoka." 
Mark5:16 Na baria abayaroche bakaorokia amang’ana amonyorire oria obwatire nebirecha, na amang’ana e chimbeche." 
Mark5:17 Bagachaka gosorora Yeso arue ase chimbebe chiabo. 
Mark5:18 Agachia koriina obwato ime, oria obwatire nebirecha akamosorora ng’a abe amo nere." 
Mark5:19 Yeso tamwanchera, korende akamotebia, “Genda nka bwoo ase abamino, obatebie amang’ana amanene aya Omonene agokoreire, naende buna akororeire amabera.”" 
Mark5:20 Akagenda bwoye, agachaka koraria ase Dekapoli amang’ana aya Yeso amokoreire. Abanto bonsi bagakumia." 
Mark5:21 Yeso kambokire naende koirana ng’umbu nobwato boria, omoganda omonene okamosangererekanera; ere nigo arenge ensemo y’enyancha." 
Mark5:22 Omonto oyomo bw’abanene b’esinagogi agacha, erieta riaye Yairo. Agachia komorora, akagwa ase amagoro aye," 
Mark5:23 akamosorora mono, akabora, “Omonene, omoiseke one omoke oisire gokwa. Nagosabire, oche obeke okoboko kwao igoro yaye, anyare kogwena, abe moyo.”" 
Mark5:24 Akagenda amo nere. Omoganda omonene okamotunyana, okamomiga‐miga." 
Mark5:25 Narengeo omokungu oyomo orenge noborwaire bw’okorua amanyinga ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi na ebere. 
Mark5:26 Ere nigo achandegete mono ase amaboko ’abarwaria abange. Ere konya osiareire ebinto bionsi arenge nabio, tagwenigwa nonya ng’ake, korende obogima bwaye bokamentekana koba obobe kobua." 
Mark5:27 Erio agachia koigwa amang’ana igoro ya Yeso, agaeta ase omoganda korwa nyuma, agakuna eanga yaye," 
Mark5:28 ekiagera nigo atebete, “Kondakune chianga chiaye chioka, ningwene.”" 
Mark5:29 Erio kegima ensoko y’amanyinga aye egakama: akaigwa omobere oye ng’a ogwenire korwa ase oborwaire bwaye. 
Mark5:30 Erio agwo Yeso akamanya ase omoyo oye ng’a chinguru chiarure asare, akeonchora gati ase omoganda, akabora, “Ning’o okuna chianga chiane?”" 
Mark5:31 Aborokigwa baye bakamotebia, “Kwarorire omoganda buna okomigete, na aye gokoboria: Ning’o onkuna?”" 
Mark5:32 Akarigereria chinsemo chionsi, erinde arore oria okora ring’ana erio." 
Mark5:33 Na omokungu oria agasogwa nomoondoko na okoiguswa, akamanya eriamonyorire, agacha akamogwera, akamoorokeria ekeene gionsi." 
Mark5:34 Yeso akamotebia, “Omoiseke one, okwegena kwao gwakogwenirie, genda nomorembe, ogwene korwa ase oborwaire bwao.”" 
Mark5:35 Ekero arenge gokwana, abanto korwa ase enyomba y’omotang’ani bw’esinagogi bagacha, bakabora, “Enyaroka yao yakure. Inki okona‐koroseria Omworokia rende?”" 
Mark5:36 Korende Yeso tancha gotegerera ring’ana riria rigotebwa, agatebia omotang’ani oria bw’esinagogi, “Toiroka, egene rioka.”" 
Mark5:37 Gose tanchete monto onde amotunyane, otatiga Petero, na Yakobo, na Yohana momura omwabo Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Bagaika enyomba y’omonene oria bw’esinagogi; akarora riroroche, na abanto bakorera nokweumia okonge." 
Mark5:39 Agachia gosoa, akabatebia, “Naki mogokora riroroche na korera? Omwana takweti, korende nigo araire.”" 
Mark5:40 Bakamosekerera. Korende gaikire kobasokia isiko bonsi, akaira ise omwana, na ng’ina, na baria barenge amo nere, agasoa ime ase omwana oria arenge." 
Mark5:41 Akamobwata okoboko omoiseke oria omoke, akamotebia, “Talitha kumi”, okoonchorwa kwaye, “Omoiseke, nagotebirie, imoka.”" 
Mark5:42 Erio agwo omoiseke oria omoke agatenena akagenda, ere konya okoorire emiaka ikomi na ebere. Erio bagakumia ogokumia okonene." 
Mark5:43 Yeso akabakurera ng’a monto onde tamanya amang’ana ayio, akabachika bae omoiseke oria endagera arie."
