Mark6:1 Akarua agwo, agaika ase ense yaye omonyene; aborokigwa baye bakamotunyana." 
Mark6:2 Na ekero gi’Esabato agachaka kworokereria ase esinagogi; abange abamoigwete bagakumia, bagatebania, “Oyo ng’ai anyorire aya? Mbong’aini ki obo aeirwe oyo? Ogokora gwe chinguru ki oko okonene kogokoreka ase amaboko aye?" 
Mark6:3 Oyo tari oria omobaachi, omwana o Mariamu, momura omwabo Yakobo, na Yose, na Yuda, na Simion, na basubati bamwabo tibari aiga seito?” Bakagechigwa nere." 
Mark6:4 Yeso akabatebia, “Omobani takomocha gosikwa, otatiga ase ense yaye, na ase eamate yaye, na ase enyomba yaye.”" 
Mark6:5 Gose tanyara gokora ogokora gwe chinguru aroro, otatiga abegete amaboko aye igoro ase abarwaire bake, akabagwenia." 
Mark6:6 Agakumia ase engencho y’ogotegena kwabo. Agaetanana ase ebichie biaetanaineo okworokereria. 
Mark6:7 Akarangeria baria ikomi na babere, agachaka kobatoma babere babere, akabaa okobua igoro ase ebirecha bi’eubi;" 
Mark6:8 akabakania tibaira gento ase orogendo rwabo, otatiga cnyimbo yoka. Tibaira nonya nomogati, nonya nesaro, nonya nechibesa ase ebimoya biabo." 
Mark6:9 Korende babeke ebikoroto, go tibeboyia chianga ibere." 
Mark6:10 Akabatebia, “Enyomba ende yonsi ase morasoe, mobeere aroro goika ekero moraimoke korwa aase aria." 
Mark6:11 Na kera aase abanto batabaroiseti inwe, gose kobaigwa, komokorua aroro, mokong’onte orotu rore inse ase amagoro aino, robe kirori asebare.”" 
Mark6:12 Bagasoka, bakarandia ng’a abanto baonchoke." 
Mark6:13 Bagaseria ebirecha ebinge, bagaaka abanto abange amaguta, abwo barenge abarwaire, bakabagwenia." 
Mark6:14 Omoruoti Herode akaigwa amang’ana, ekiagera erieta ria Yeso konya riakumire, akabora, “Yohana Omobatisi obokire korwa ase abakure, nakio gekogera chinguru echi chigokora emeremo ime asare.”" 
Mark6:15 Korende abande bakabora, “N’Elija.” Na abande bakabora, “Oyo nomobani, gose nigo anga buna oyomo bw’ababani.”" 
Mark6:16 Korende Herode agachia koyaigwa, akabora, “Oyo nere Yohana oria nanachete omotwe, obokire.”" 
Mark6:17 Naki Herode omonyene nigo atomete abanto kobwata Yohana, akamosiba echela ase engencho ya Herodia moka Filipo momura omwabo, oria Herode amotwarete," 
Mark6:18 ekiagera Yohana amokanetie Herode, “Tai boronge asore komenyana na moka momura omino.”" 
Mark6:19 Nabo oria Herodia akaba nokogecha asare, akarigia komoita, korende tanyara," 
Mark6:20 ekiagera Herode nairogete Yohana, konya omanyire ng’a nomonto omoronge, omochenu, akamorenda. Gachia komoigwa, agaichana mono; nonya nabo nigo arenge komoigwa nomogoko." 
Mark6:21 Rituko rigwenerete rigachia goika ekero Herode ase rituko ri’okoinyora okoiborwa kwaye agachia gokora omoyega ase abatang’ani bare inse yaye, na abatang’ani b’esegi, na abanto abanene ba Galili." 
Mark6:22 Ekero omoiseke bwe Herodia asoa gotenga, akagokia Herode amo nabwo baikaransete nere ase omoyega. Omoruoti agatebia omoiseke oria, “Nsabe kende gionsi ekio origetie, na inche ninkoe.”" 
Mark6:23 Akamoriera eira, “Kende gionsi ekiorarigie korwa asende ninkoe, nonya nekeng’ese ki’oboruoti bwane.”" 
Mark6:24 Omoiseke oria agasoka, akaboria ng’ina, “Inki ndasabe?” Ng’ina akamoiraneria, “Omotwe o Yohana Omobatisi.”" 
Mark6:25 Erio kegima agasoa nomoayerero ase obosio bw’omoruoti, agasaba, akabora, “Nindigetie ong’e omotwe o Yohana Omobatisi bono iga ase esani.”" 
Mark6:26 Omoruoti akaba nomoichano mono, korende ase engencho ye chiira chiaye, na ase engencho y’abwo baikaransete ase omoyega, tarigetie kwanga." 
Mark6:27 Erio kegima omoruoti agatoma omorwani oyomo, agachika ng’a omotwe o Yohana orentwe. Omorwani oria akagenda akamonacha omotwe aria echela ime," 
Mark6:28 akayorenta ore ase esani, akayoa omoiseke oria, na omoiseke oria akayoa ng’ina." 
Mark6:29 Aborokigwa baye bagachia koigwa amang’ana aya, bakagenda bakabogoria egetondo, bakagetindeka." 
Mark6:30 Abatomwa bakairana ase Yeso, bakamotebia onsi ayabakorete, na amang’ana onsi ayaborokereretie." 
Mark6:31 Akabatebia, “Inchuo inwe mweka, togende aase abanto batari, motimoke ake.” Naki abanto abange mbarengeo, bagocha na bakogenda; nonya neribaga tiriarenge ri’okoria." 
Mark6:32 Bakagenda ase obwato, aase abobisi, atari nabanto." 
Mark6:33 Abanto bakabarora bakogenda, abange ase abwo bakabamanya, bakaminyoka bwango korwa ase emechie yonsi, batang’ane goika asare." 
Mark6:34 Yeso agachia goika korwa ase obwato, akarora omoganda omonene, akabarorera amabera, ekiagera barenge buna ching’ondi chitari nomorisia: agachaka koborokereria amang’ana amange." 
Mark6:35 Goika chinsa chinyinge chi’omobaso chigaeta, aborokigwa baye bakamochiera, bakabora, “Aase aa negesomo, na bono riagorobire." 
Mark6:36 Kae abanto aba ribaga, erinde bagende emechie na ebichie, aria na aaria, begorere endagera.”" 
Mark6:37 Akabairaneria, “Inwe bae endagera.” Bakamoboria “Inee! Togende togore emegati ye chidinari amagana abere, tobae barie?”" 
Mark6:38 Akababoria, “Emegati nerenga mobwate? Genda morore!” Bagachia komanya bakabora, “Netano, ne chinswe ibere.”" 
Mark6:39 Akabachika babaikaransie bonsi, ebiombe, ebiombe, ase obonyansi obobese." 
Mark6:40 Bagaikaransa ase chindwaro, echinde rigana erimo na echinde emerongo etano." 
Mark6:41 Akabogoria emegati eria etano ne chinswe chiria ibere, akarigereria igoro, akabisesenia, agasamunyora emegati eria, akaa aborokigwa baye babiterekere abanto, ne chinswe chiria ibere, akabagabera bonsi." 
Mark6:42 Bonsi bakaria, bakaigota." 
Mark6:43 Bagasangereria ebisamunye biasamunyogete, na ebio bigaichoria ebitonga ikomi na bibere, naboigo nebisamunye bie chinswe." 
Mark6:44 Na abasacha abariete emegati eria nigo barenge chilifu isano. 
Mark6:45 Erio Yeso akabetereria aborokigwa baye bariine obwato, bamotang’anere kogenda ng’umbu goika Bethisaida ekero are koa omoganda ribaga ogende." 
Mark6:46 Goika agachia gokoora gokwana nabarabwo, akagenda egetunwa gosaba." 
Mark6:47 Riachia koba mogoroba, obwato bokaba enyancha gati, na ere bweka ase ense enyomo." 
Mark6:48 Akabarora bagwechanda bagoata amache nemegango, ekiagera omwaga nigo obatangete. Koreng’ana ekero ki’oborendi bwa kane bwa botuko agacha asebare, ogotaara igoro ase enyancha, akarigia kobaetania." 
Mark6:49 Barabwo bagachia komorora ogotaara ase enyancha igoro, bagakaga ng’a nerirengari, bagaaka eriogi," 
Mark6:50 ekiagera bonsi abamoroche mbaondogete. Bwango agakwana nabarabwo, akabatebia, “Remia chinkoro! Ninche. Timoiroka!”" 
Mark6:51 Akariina ime ase obwato asebare; omwaga ogakira. Bagaichana mono," 
Mark6:52 ekiagera tibamanyete amang’ana ’emegati eria, korende chinkoro chiabo nigo chiarenge chinkong’u." 
Mark6:53 Ekero bambokire bagaika ense ya Genesareti, bakabeka ekerochi." 
Mark6:54 Bagachia gosoka korwa ase obwato, abanto bakamomanya bwango," 
Mark6:55 bakaminyoka, bagaetanana ense eria yonsi, bagachaka kobogoria abarwaire bare ase amarere abo, bakagenda kera aase baigwete ng’a nao are." 
Mark6:56 Kera aase are kogenda ase ebichie, gose emechie, gose emegondo, bakabeka abarwaire ase chichiiro, bakamosorora ng’a abae ribaga bakune nonya nomokoba bw’eanga yaye; na abwo bonsi abamokunete bakagwena." 
Mark7:1 Erio Abafarisai na abande ase aborokia b’amariko barwete Yerusalemu, bagasangerereka asare." 
Mark7:2 Bakarora abande b’aborokigwa baye bakoragera namaboko are neriko, engencho yaye ataisabiri." 
Mark7:3 (Naki Abafarisai na Abayahudi bonsi tibakoragera ritang’ani bataraisaba amaboko. Igo babwatetie engencho y’abagaaka babo. 
Mark7:4 Naende kobakorwa echiiro, tibakoria batesibeti. Naende nchire chingencho chinde babwate buna ogosibia ebikombe ne chinyongo, na ebinto bie chitaai.)" 
Mark7:5 Nabo Abafarisai baria na aborokia b’amariko bakamoboria, “Nase ki aborokigwa bao batari kobwata chingencho chi’abagaaka, korende bakoragera namaboko are neriko?”" 
Mark7:6 Yeso akabatebia “Isaya nigo abanete buya igoro yaino, inwe abang’ainereria, buna erikire; “Abanto aba nigo bansigete ase ebikoba biabo igoro, korende chinkoro chiabo nigo chire aare korwa asende." 
Mark7:7 Abwo nigo bagonsasima ogosasima kwa bosa, bakworokereria amorokererio ayare amachiko a mwanyabanto oka." 
Mark7:8 “Igo mogotiga richiko ria Nyasae, mwabwata chingencho chia mwanyabanto.”" 
Mark7:9 Akabatebia, “Mwangire richiko ria Nyasae ng’a monyare kobwata chingencho chiaino." 
Mark7:10 Naki Musa nigo atebete: Sika iso na nyoko, na: Oyorakwane bobe ase ise, gose ase ng’ina, ogokwa nakwe." 
Mark7:11 Korende inwe moteba: Omonto karatebie ise gose ng’ina: Bionsi ebi anga kwanyora korwa asende nakio Korbani (engencho yaye: Ebiarurwe ase Nyasae) — 
Mark7:12 timori komotiga naende amokorere ise gose ng’ina ring’ana rinde. 
Mark7:13 Igo mogosaria ring’ana ria Nyasae ase chingencho chiaino chia kare. Naende amange mwakorire mware koenana omogwekano bw’ayio.” 
Mark7:14 Akarangeria omoganda naende, akayotebia, “Nyigwe mwensi, naende manya:" 
Mark7:15 Tari egento kere isiko y’omonto, na gekomosoa, keranyare komobekera ogotacheneka, korende ebikorwa ase omonto nabio bikomobekera ogotacheneka. [" 
Mark7:16 Omonto kare namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe.]”" 
Mark7:17 Goika agachia gosoa nyomba, gatigire omoganda, aborokigwa baye bakamoboria amang’ana ’omoreng’anio oria." 
Mark7:18 Akabatebia, “Nonya ninwe timori nobong’aini? Timomanyeti ng’a kera egento kere isiko y’omonto gokeramosoe, tigekonyara komobekera ogotacheneka," 
Mark7:19 ekiagera tigekomosoa enkoro, otatiga ase enda yoka, erio kiagwa kebaara?” (Ase ogoteba igo, osibirie chindagera chionsi.)" 
Mark7:20 Akabora “Ekegosoka korwa ase omonto nakio gekomobekera ogotacheneka. 
Mark7:21 Ekiagera ime ase chinkoro chi’abanto nigo bikorwao ebirengererio ebibe, obonyaka, oboibi, oboiti, obotomani," 
Mark7:22 okogania okobe, obobe, obong’ainereria, oboenenu, ribero, oborami, obwerori, oboriri." 
Mark7:23 Aya onsi amabe nigo akorwa ime, naro akobekera omonto ogotacheneka.”" 
Mark7:24 Akaimoka korwa aria, akagenda goika chimbebe chia Turo na Sidoni. Agasoa ase enyomba, akarigia tamanyekana na monto, korende tanyara kobiseka." 
Mark7:25 Erio agwo omokungu oyomo, omwana oye enyaroka obwatire nekerecha ki’eubi, akaigwa amang’ana aye, agacha akamogwera ase amagoro aye." 
Mark7:26 Omokungu oria n’Omogiriki orenge, egesaku kiaye n’Omosurofenisa. Akamosaba amosererie ekerecha korwa ase enyaroka yaye." 
Mark7:27 Akamotebia, “Tiga abana baigote ritang’ani, ekiagera tari buya kobogoria obokima bw’abana, gotugutera chisese.”" 
Mark7:28 Korende ere akamoiraneria, “Nabo Omonene, nonya nechisese nyaro ye chimesa nigo chikoria amatori ’abana.”" 
Mark7:29 Akamotebia, “Ase engencho ye ring’ana eri, genda bwoo, ekerecha kiarure ase enyaroka yao.”" 
Mark7:30 Akagenda mwaye, akanyora omwana oria bwareirie borere, na ekerecha keria kiamorure." 
Mark7:31 Akarua naende ensemo ya Turo, agaeta gati‐gati ya Sidoni, akagenda goika enyancha ya Galili, egati y’ensemo ya Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Bakamorentera omonto ore omotino, naende nigo are gotutura kagokwana; bagasorora Yeso abeke okoboko kwaye igoro asare." 
Mark7:33 Yeso akamwatanana korwa ase omoganda bobisi, akabeka ebiara biaye ase amato aye, agatwa amate, akamokuna oromeme." 
Mark7:34 Erio akarigereria gochia igoro, agaita egekoe, akamotebia, “Efatha,” engencho yaye, “Igoreka.”" 
Mark7:35 Bwango amato aye agatinoka, egesibo ki’oromeme rwaye gekororoba, agakwana buya." 
Mark7:36 Yeso akabachika tibatebia monto, korende buna amentete kobakania, naboigo bamentete koraria amang’ana aya." 
Mark7:37 Bagakumia mono kobua, bakabora, “Okorire onsi buya. Abarenge emetino obatinoire, na abarenge amamama bakwane.”" 
Mark8:1 Ase amatuko aria ekero omoganda omonene osangererekanete, na barabwo tibarenge na gento bakoria, Yeso akarangeria aborokigwa baye, akabatebia," 
Mark8:2 “Naroreire omoganda amabera, ekiagera abwo babeire amatuko atato baikaransete amo nainche batari na gento bakoria;" 
Mark8:3 ninsa koa abanto aba ribaga bagende chinsobo nenchara, nabagoye inchera, na abande ase egati yabo ng’are barwete.”" 
Mark8:4 Aborokigwa baye bakamoiraneria, “Naki omonto aranyare koigotia abanto aba, na aiga nerooro?”" 
Mark8:5 Akababoria, “Emegati nerenga mobwate?” Bakamoiraneria, “Netano na ebere.”" 
Mark8:6 Agachika omoganda oikaranse inse, akabogoria emegati eria etano na ebere. Kayesesenirie, akayesamunyora, akaa aborokigwa baye bayetereke, na barabwo bakayeterekera omoganda." 
Mark8:7 Igo barenge ne chinswe chinsinini nke igo. Gachisesenirie, akabora, “Nechi baterekere”!" 
Mark8:8 Bakaria, bakaigota; bagasangereria ebisamunye ebiatigarete, ebitonga bitano na bibere." 
Mark8:9 Na barabwo nigo barenge ang’e chilifu inye. 
Mark8:10 Akabaa ribaga bagende, na erio bwango akariina obwato amo naborokigwa baye, akagenda chinsemo chia Dalumanuta." 
Mark8:11 Abafarisai bakaoroka, bagachaka koamererania na Yeso, bakarigia aborokie egekone buna ekemanyererio korwa igoro, bakomoteema." 
Mark8:12 Agaichana ase omoika oye, akabora, “Naki ekegori eke gekorigia egekone? Ekeene nabatebirie: Ekegori eke tigekoegwa egekone buna eke.”" 
Mark8:13 Akabatiga, akariina obwato naende, akamboka ng’umbu." 
Mark8:14 Aborokigwa bakeeba koirana emegati; nonya nase obwato tibarenge na gento, otatiga omogati oyomo bwoka." 
Mark8:15 Yeso akabachika, akabora, “Rigereria, mwerende nememera y’Abafarisai na ememera ya Herode.”" 
Mark8:16 Bakaamererania barabwo ase barabwo, bakobora, “Titori nemegati.”" 
Mark8:17 Yeso akamanya aya, akabatebia, “Naki mokoborania, ekiagera motari nemegati? Timokoinyora gose timekomanya? Chinkoro chiaino nigo chire chinkong’u goika bono?" 
Mark8:18 More namaiso, ko timori korora? More namato, ko timori koigwa? Gose timoinyoreti?" 
Mark8:19 Ekero nasamunyorete emegati eria etano nkaa baria chilifu isano, ebitonga mbirenga mwasangererete biichire ebisamunye?” Bakamotebia, “Ikomi na bibere.”" 
Mark8:20 “Na eria etano na ebere nkaa baria chilifu inye, ebitonga mbirenga mwasangereretie biichire ebisamunye?” Bakamotebia, “Mbitano na bibere.”" 
Mark8:21 Akabatebia, “Naki motaramanya?”" 
Mark8:22 Bagaika Bethisaida. Bakamorentera omonto omouko, bakamosorora amokune." 
Mark8:23 Akabwata omouko oria okoboko, akamoira isiko y’agachie, Kamotwereire amate ase amaiso, akabeka amaboko aye igoro asare, akamoboria, “Kwarorire gento?”" 
Mark8:24 Akarigereria igoro, akabora, “Narorire abanto, ko nigo banga buna emete bakogenda.”" 
Mark8:25 Erio naende akabeka amaboko aye igoro ase amaiso aye. Omouko oria akarigereria mono, akagwena, akarora ebinto bionsi buya." 
Mark8:26 Yeso akamotebia, “Genda bwoo, tosoa nonya nagachie!”" 
Mark8:27 Yeso agasoka amo naborokigwa baye, bakagenda ebichie bia Kaisaria Filipi. Ekero baare nchera akaboria aborokigwa baye, “Abanto nigo bakobora ng’a ninche ng’o?”" 
Mark8:28 Bakamoiraneria, “Yohana Omobatisi; na abande: Elija; na abande: Oyomo ase ababani.”" 
Mark8:29 Akababoria, “Nainwe nigo mokobora ng’a ninche ng’o?” Petero akamoiraneria, “Aye naye Kristo.”" 
Mark8:30 Akabakania tibatebia monto amang’ana aye. 
Mark8:31 Agachaka koborokereria, ng’a negwenerete Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto anyore ogochandeka ase chinchera chinyinge, na kwangwa nabagaaka na abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko, na goitwa, na nyuma y’amatuko atato naboke." 
Mark8:32 Agakwana amang’ana aya maiso marore. Petero akamoira ensemo, agachaka komokania." 
Mark8:33 Yeso akeonchora, akarigereria aborokigwa baye, agatogonyera Petero, akabora, “Irana nyuma yane, Saitani, ekiagera tori ase ensemo ya Nyasae, korende nase mwanyabanto.”" 
Mark8:34 Akarangeria omoganda na aborokigwa baye, akabatebia, “Oyorigetie gontunyana, tiga ekaane ere omonyene, etweke omosalaba oye, antunyane." 
Mark8:35 Naki onde bwensi orarigie koegera obogima bwaye, oyio nabosirie; na oyorasirie obogima bwaye ase engencho yane, na ase engencho y’enchili, oyio naboegere." 
Mark8:36 Ninki eragwenere omonto konyora ense yonsi, ko asirie omoyo oye?" 
Mark8:37 Gose inki omonto ararue ribaga ri’omoyo oye? 
Mark8:38 Naki oyio oranyare kondorera obosooku inche, na amang’ana aane, ase ekegori eke ki’obotomani na ebibe, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto namororere obosooku ere, ekero agocha nobonene bwa Ise amo nabamalaika abachenu.”" 
Mark9:1 Akabatebia, “Ekeene nabatebirie: Mbare abanto bande ase aba bateneine aiga, abataigwe amakweri goika barore oboruoti bwa Nyasae bogocha ne chinguru.”" 
Mark9:2 Na nyuma ase amatuko atano na rimo Yeso akaira Petero, na Yakobo, na Yohana, ase egetunwa egetambe barabwo boka, akaonchoka ekieni kiaye asebare." 
Mark9:3 Chianga chiaye chikameka‐meka, chikaba chindabu mono, buna omoroisia bw’ense atanyare gochikora chibe chindabu." 
Mark9:4 Bakaorokerwa na Elija amo na Musa; na barabwo nigo barenge gokwana na Yeso. 
Mark9:5 Petero agatebia Yesu, “Omonene, mbuya intwe koba aiga, tiga tokore ebigutu bitato: ekemo ekiao, ekemo ekia Musa, na ekemo eki’Elija.”" 
Mark9:6 Naki tamanyete eki agokwana, ekiagera babete nomoondoko omonene." 
Mark9:7 Korende riire rigacha rikababisia; eriogi rikarwa ase riire riria, rigateba, “Oyo n’Omwana one, omwanchwa, moigwere ere!”" 
Mark9:8 Erio bwango kobarigereirie aria na aaria, tibarora monto onde, otatiga Yeso bweka amo nabarabwo." 
Mark9:9 Kabagotirimboka korwa ase egetunwa akabakania tibatebia monto ayabaroche, goika Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto kabokire korwa ase abakure." 
Mark9:10 Bakabwata ring’ana riria, bakaborania barabwo ase barabwo, ng’a okoboka korwa ase abakure, engencho yaye ninki." 
Mark9:11 Bakamoboria, “Nase ki aborokia b’amariko bagoteba ng’a negwenerete Elija ache ritang’ani?”" 
Mark9:12 Akabatebia, “Nekeene n’Elija ore gocha ritang’ani, na koroisia onsi; korende amo naya, ekiagera arikire ng’a Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nachandwe namange na gochaywa?" 
Mark9:13 Korende nabatebirie: Elija oikire gocha, na barabwo bakamokorera onsi aya barigetie, buna arikeretwe.”" 
Mark9:14 Kobaikire ase aborokigwa bande, bakarora omoganda omonene obaetanaine; aborokia b’amariko bakaengererania nabarabwo." 
Mark9:15 Erio omoganda bwonsi, ogachia komorora, ogakumia mono; abwo bakamochiera bwango, bakamokwania." 
Mark9:16 Akababoria, “Ninki mokoengererania nabarabwo?”" 
Mark9:17 Omonto oyomo ase omoganda akamoiraneria, “Omworokia, namorenta omomura one asore, obwatire nekerecha kemokorete rimama;" 
Mark9:18 ekero kiamobokire nigo gekomogaragaria inse, asokia risombogoku, na koriania amaino; ase ayio chinguru chiaye chisira. Ngakwana naborokigwa bao bageserie, tibanyara.”" 
Mark9:19 Akabairaneria, “Inwe ekegori getari nokwegena, nimbe nainwe goika ririri? Nindemererie nainwe goika ririri? Mondetere aa!”" 
Mark9:20 Bakamorenta asare. Ekero kiarora Yeso, bwango ekerecha keria gekaigusia omomura oria, na ere akagwa inse akegaragaria, agasokia risombogoku." 
Mark9:21 Yeso akaboria ise, “Nkorwa kero ki anyoretwe naya?” Agateba, “Nkorwa obwana bwaye." 
Mark9:22 Ara aange kemoruta ase omorero na ase amache, erinde kemosirie, korende koranyare gokora ring’ana, tororere amabera, otokonye.”" 
Mark9:23 Yeso akamotebia, “Koranyare! Onsi nigo akonyarekana asare ere oyobwegenire.”" 
Mark9:24 Bwango ise omwana oria agaaka eriogi, akarera, akabora, “Negenire, nkonya ase ogotegena kwane!”" 
Mark9:25 Yeso agachia korora ng’a omoganda ngosangererekana ore bwango, agakania ekerecha keria ki’eubi, akagetebia, “Aye ekerecha rimama na egetino, inche nagochikire, morwe, tomoiranera naende!”" 
Mark9:26 Erio gekarera, gekamogaragaria mono gekamorwa. Omwana oria akaba buna oyokure, goika abange bakabora, “Okure.”" 
Mark9:27 Korende Yeso akamobwata okoboko, akamoimokia, na ere agatenena." 
Mark9:28 Gasoire ase enyomba, aborokigwa baye bakamoboria bobisi, “Naki intwe totanyara kogeseria?”" 
Mark9:29 Akabatebia, “Ekerecha kenga buna eke tigekonyara korwa ase ring’ana rinde rionsi, otatiga ase ogosaba na okweng’ata.”" 
Mark9:30 Bakarua aria, bagaeta gati‐gati ya Galili; Yeso tancha omonto amanye," 
Mark9:31 ekiagera arenge kworokereria aborokigwa baye, akabatebia ng’a, “Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nkogenda are kobekwa ase amaboko ’abanto, na barabwo nabamoite, na ekero aitirwe naboke nyuma y’amatuko atato.”" 
Mark9:32 Korende tibamanya ring’ana riria, bakairoka komoboria." 
Mark9:33 Bagaika Kapernaumu. Ekero arenge nyomba ime, akababoria, “Ninki mware koamererania inchera?”" 
Mark9:34 Bagakira, ekiagera ekero barenge inchera baare koamererania barabwo ase barabwo ning’o ore omonene kobua abande." 
Mark9:35 Agaikaransa inse, akarangeria baria ikomi na babere, akabatebia, “Omonto origetie koba oyo bwe ritang’ani nabe oyo bw’omoerio kobua bonsi, omosomba o bonsi.”" 
Mark9:36 Akabogoria omwana, akamobeka gati‐gati yabo, akamoagata, akabatebia," 
Mark9:37 “Onde bwensi oramwanche omwana oyomo buna oyo ase erieta riane, oyio onyanchire inche; na oyoranyanche inche, tanyancheti inche, korende ere oyontomete.”" 
Mark9:38 Yohana akamotebia, “Omworokia, ntwarora omonto ogoseria ebirecha ase erieta riao; tokamokania, ekiagera tare gototunyana intwe.”" 
Mark9:39 Yeso agateba, “Timomokania, ekiagera monto onde tari oranyare gokora ebikone ase erieta riane, anyare erio bwango gonteba bobe," 
Mark9:40 ekiagera oyo otari mamincha yaito, oyio nensemo yaito are." 
Mark9:41 Naki onde bwensi orabae inwe amache negekombe ase erieta riane, ekiagera inwe more abanto ba Kristo, nekeene nabatebirie: Tagosiria eng’eria yaye nonya ng’ake." 
Mark9:42 “Onde bwensi oragere oyomo bw’aba abake abanyegenete akore ebibe, anga mbuya kobua ase omonto oria asungerwe orogena rogosia ase rigoti riaye, na gotugutwa nyancha ime." 
Mark9:43 Na onye okoboko kwao gokogera okore ebibe, bonache; mbuya gosoa ase obogima kore ekerema, kobua koba namaboko abere, na kogenda ase omorero o kare na kare oyotakorimeka, [" 
Mark9:44 aase amakonde abo atagokwa, na omorero otakorimeka]." 
Mark9:45 Na onye okogoro kwao gokogera okore ebibe, konache; mbuya gosoa ase obogima kore egesegora, kobua koba namagoro abere, na gotugutwa ase omorero o kare na kare [" 
Mark9:46 aase amakonde abo atagokwa, na omorero otakorimeka]." 
Mark9:47 Na onye neriso riao rikogera okore ebibe, orirusie oritugute; mbuya gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae kore egetong’o, kobua koba namaiso abere, na gotugutwa ase omorero o kare na kare," 
Mark9:48 aase amakonde abo atagokwa na omorero otakorimeka. 
Mark9:49 “Naki kera omonto nabekwe omonyo ase omorero. 
Mark9:50 Omonyo nomuya, korende omonyo korasirie obwansu bwaye, ninki morayobeke bwanse? Mobe nomonyo ime asemore, momenye ase omorembe inwe ase inwe.”" 
Mark10:1 Akaimoka korwa agwo, agaika chimbebe chia Boyahudi, ng’umbu ya Yorodan. Abanto abange bakamosangererekera naende; akaborokereria aroro, buna anarete botambe." 
Mark10:2 Abafarisai bakamochiera, bakamoboria, “Inee! Mboronge omonto gotiga mokaye?” Bakamoteema." 
Mark10:3 Ere akabairaneria, “Inki Musa abachigete?”" 
Mark10:4 Bagateba, “Musa nigo aruete ribaga korika rirube ri’ogotigana, na komotiga.”" 
Mark10:5 Yeso akabatebia, “Ase engencho y’obokong’u bwe chinkoro chiaino nakio kiagerete abarikerete ogochika oko." 
Mark10:6 Korende korwa omochakano bw’ogotongwa gw’ense Nyasae nigo atongete omosacha na omokungu. 
Mark10:7 Ase engencho eyio omonto natige ise na ng’ina, abwatane na mokaye," 
Mark10:8 na abwo babere nigo barabe omobere oyomo. Ase igo tibakoba babere naende, korende omobere oyomo." 
Mark10:9 Naboigo ebi Nyasae abwatanirie, mwanyabanto tabiatanana.”" 
Mark10:10 Naende nyomba ime aborokigwa bakamoboria engencho ye ring’ana erio. 
Mark10:11 Akabatebia, “Kera omonto oratige mokaye, na kunyuoma oyonde, otomanire igoro asare:" 
Mark10:12 na omokungu karatige omosacha oye, na konyuomwa nomonto onde, nere otomanire.”" 
Mark10:13 Bakamorentera abana abake, erinde anyare kobakuna; aborokigwa baye bakabatanga." 
Mark10:14 Korende Yeso agachia korora, akabea mono, akabatebia, “Batige abana abake bache asende, timobaisa kobatanga, ekiagera abare buna aba, oboruoti bwa Nyasae nobwabo" 
Mark10:15 Ekeene nabatebirie: Onde bwensi otancheti oboruoti bwa Nyasae buna omwana omoke, takobosoa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Mark10:16 Akabaimokia, akabaagata ase amaboko aye, akabasesenia, okobeka amaboko aye igoro asebare." 
Mark10:17 Goika agachia koba ogosoka kogenda enchera, omonto oyomo agacha bwango, akamotung’amera, akamoboria, “Omworokia omuya, inki ndakore inyare koba nomwando bw’obogima bwa kare na kare?”" 
Mark10:18 Yeso akamotebia, “Naki okondoka omuya? Onde tari omuya otatiga Nyasae bweka." 
Mark10:19 Kwamanyire amachiko: Toita, Totomana, Toiba, Toteba oborimo, Tong’aina, Sika iso na nyoko.”" 
Mark10:20 Akamotebia, “Omworokia, ayio onsi ninyabwatete korwa obwana bwane.”" 
Mark10:21 Yeso akamobeta amaiso, akamwancha, akamotebia, “Egento ekemo ngekoremerete; genda, oonie ebio ore nabio bionsi, oe abataka, na aye nobe nenibo igoro; erio oche ontunyane.”" 
Mark10:22 Korende ere abanyiria obosio ase ring’ana riria, akagenda nobororo, ekiagera arenge nenibo enyinge." 
Mark10:23 Yeso akarigereria chinsemo chionsi, agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Nabe aakong’u ase abare abanda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Mark10:24 Aborokigwa bagaichana ase amang’ana aya. Yeso akairaneria naende, akabatebia, “Abana, nabe aakong’u ase abasemeretie enibo gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae!" 
Mark10:25 Naororo engamia goeta ase ekebao gi’esindani kobua omonda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.” 
Mark10:26 Barabwo bagaichana mono, bakaborania, “Ning’o rende oranyare gotooreka?”" 
Mark10:27 Yeso akabarigereria, akabora, “Ase mwanyabanto takonyarekana, korende ase Nyasae taibo, ekiagera onsi nigo akonyarekana ase Nyasae.”" 
Mark10:28 Petero agachaka komotebia, “Rora, intwe twatigire bionsi, twagotunyanire.”" 
Mark10:29 Yeso akabora, “Ekeene nabatebirie: Monto onde tari otigire enyomba, gose bamura bamwabo, gose basubati bamwabo, gose ng’ina, gose ise, gose abana, gose emegondo ase engencho yane, gose ase engencho y’enchili," 
Mark10:30 otatiga aegwe ara rigana ase ekero kia bono, chinyomba, na bamura bamwabo, na basubati bamwabo, na abang’ina, na abana, na emegondo, ase emechando, na ase ense egochigocha obogima bwa kare na kare." 
Mark10:31 Korende abange abare abe ritang’ani, nababe abanyuma; na abanyuma babe abe ritang’ani.”" 
Mark10:32 Bakaba inchera, bagotiira kogenda Yerusalemu. Yeso nigo arenge obatang’aine, na barabwo bagaichana, na abamotunyanete bakairoka. Akaira naende baria ikomi na babere, agachaka kobatebia ebirage bi’amang’ana agochia komonyora," 
Mark10:33 akabora, “Rigereria, ngotiira tore kogenda Yerusalemu, na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nabekwe ase amaboko ’abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko. Abwo nabamogambie akwe, na bamobeke ase amaboko abanto b’Ebisaku," 
Mark10:34 na barabwo nabamochecherie, na komo aka chinkini, na komotwera amate, na komoita; nyuma y’amatuko atato naboke.”" 
Mark10:35 Yakobo na Yohana, abana ba Zebedi, bakamochiera, bakamotebia, “Omworokia, ntorigetie otokorere rinde rionsi toragosabe.”" 
Mark10:36 Akababoria, “Inki morigetie mbakorere?”" 
Mark10:37 Bakamoiraneria, “Otwanchere intwe toikaranse, oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwao gw’okorio, na oyonde ensemo y’okoboko kwao gw’okobee, ase obonene bwao.”" 
Mark10:38 Yeso akabatebia, “Timomanyeti eki mogosaba. Inee! Namonyare konywera egekombe nkonywera inche, na kobatiswa ebatiso mbatisire inche?”" 
Mark10:39 Bakamoiraneria, “Natonyare.” Yeso akabatebia, “Egekombe nkonywera inche namokenywere, na ebatiso mbatisire inche namobatiswe," 
Mark10:40 korende ribaga ri’ogoikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio na okoboko kwane gw’okobee tinkonyara kobaa, otatiga abwo bagacheire barariegwe.”" 
Mark10:41 Ekero baria ikomi bachia koigwa aya, bagachaka kobea Yakobo na Yohana." 
Mark10:42 Yeso akabarangeria, akabatebia, “Mwamanyire ng’a baria babarirwe koba abagambi b’abanto b’Ebisaku nigo bakobagambera ne chinguru, na abanene babo nigo bakobachika." 
Mark10:43 Korende takoba bo asemore. Omonto origetie koba omonene asemore, nabe omokoreri oino." 
Mark10:44 Na omonto orarigie koba oyo bwe ritang’ani asemore, nabe omosomba o bonsi." 
Mark10:45 Naki Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto tachete gokorerwa, korende gokorera, na korua obogima bwaye, erinde bobe embooria y’abange.”" 
Mark10:46 Bagaika Yeriko. Goika agachia koba okobwatia enchera korwa Yeriko amo naborokigwa baye na omoganda omonene, omwana o Timayo, Baritimayo, oria orenge omouko, nigo arenge oikaransete enchera ensemo, ogosaba ebiegwa." 
Mark10:47 Agachia koigwa ng’a nere Yeso Omonazareti, agachaka goaka eriogi, na goteba, “Yeso, omwana o Daudi, indorera amabera!”" 
Mark10:48 Abanto abange bakamotogonyera, bakamotebia ng’a anyare gokira, korende akamenta goaka eriogi kobua, ogoteba “Omwana o Daudi, indorera amabera!”" 
Mark10:49 Yeso agatenena, akabora, “Morangerie!” Bakarangeria omouko oria, bakamotebia, “Remia enkoro yao, imoka, okorangeirie.”" 
Mark10:50 Ere agatuguta eanga yaye, agacharoka, agachiera Yeso." 
Mark10:51 Yeso akamoboria, “Ninki origetie ngokorere?” Omonto oria orenge omouko akamoiraneria, “Omworokia, inyare korora.”" 
Mark10:52 Yeso akamotebia, “Genda! Okwegena kwao gwakogwenirie.” Erio kegima akaba nkorora are, agatunyana Yeso gochia inchera." 
Mark11:1 Ekero bachia goika ang’e na Yerusalemu, bagaika Betifage na Bethania, ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, agatoma babere b’aborokigwa baye," 
Mark11:2 akabatebia, “Genda ase agachie karia mokoorokera, erio kamogosoa aroro, namorore emori y’etigere esibire, etana koriinwa na monto; moyendetere." 
Mark11:3 Na omonto karababorie: Naki mogokora iga? Momotebie: Omonene nayeganetie, na bwango nayeiranie naende aa.”" 
Mark11:4 Bakagenda, bakarora emori y’etigere esibire geita isiko ase enchera enene; bakayesibora." 
Mark11:5 Abanto bande bateneine aroro, bakababoria, “Inki ekio mogokora, mogosibora emori y’etigere?”" 
Mark11:6 Bakabatebia buna Yeso abachigete; na abwo bakabatiga bagende. 
Mark11:7 Bakarentera Yeso emori eria y’etigere, bakaara chianga igoro asero, na Yeso akayeriina." 
Mark11:8 Abanto abange bakaara chianga chiabo inchera; abande bakanacha chinsagia chi’emete na gochiaara inchera. 
Mark11:9 Abanto abatang’aine na baria baare komotunyana bagaaka eriogi, bakabora, “Hosana! Nasesenirie oyogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene!" 
Mark11:10 Mbosesenirie oboruoti bogocha, oboruoti bwa sokoro yaito Daudi! Hosana aye ore igoro!”" 
Mark11:11 Yeso agasoa Yerusalemu agaika ase Hekalu ime; gachia korigereria chinsemo chionsi, ekiagera nigo kiarenge ekero kia mogoroba, agasoka, akagenda Bethania amo na baria ikomi na babere." 
Mark11:12 Goika mambia yaye kobakorwa Bethania Yeso akaigwa enchara. 
Mark11:13 Akarora korwa are omoko ore namato, akagenda arore gose amako nareo. Agachia goika aroro tarora gento otatiga amato, ekiagera tikiarenge ekero ki’amako." 
Mark11:14 Yeso akayotebia, “Korwa bono monto taria amatunda ao nonya ndinde.” Aborokigwa baye bakaigwa aya." 
Mark11:15 Bagaika Yerusalemu. Yeso agasoa ase Hekalu ime, agachaka goseria abanto abarenge koonia na kogora aroro, akaonchorana chimesa chi’abaare koonchoreria chibesa, na ebirogo bi’abaare koonia amaruma;" 
Mark11:16 tatiga monto abogorie gento ase egati ye Hekalu. 
Mark11:17 Akorokereria, okobatebia, “Inee! Terikiri iga: Enyomba yane nerokwe enyomba y’ogosaba ase ebisaku bionsi? Korende inwe mwayekorire koba ribwago ri’abauri.”" 
Mark11:18 Abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko bakanyora amang’ana, bakarigia enchera y’okomosiria, ekiagera bamoirogete; naki emeganda yonsi egakumia ase okworokereria kwaye." 
Mark11:19 Koriaba mogoroba akarua ase omochie. 
Mark11:20 Na mambia kobagoeta, bakarora omoko oria bwomire bwonsi korwa ase emeri yaye." 
Mark11:21 Petero akainyora amang’ana aria, akamotebia, “Rabii, rora, omoko oria kwaragereretie bwomire.”" 
Mark11:22 Yeso akabairaneria, “Mobe nokwegena ase Nyasae." 
Mark11:23 Ekeene nabatebirie: Onde bwensi oratebie egetunwa eke: Tegoka, otugutwe enyancha ime; oyo atabeti nogosiereria ase enkoro yaye, korende egene ng’a ayio ateba nabe, ayio nakoreke." 
Mark11:24 Ase ayio nabatebirie, ebinto bionsi morasabe, egene ng’a mwabinyorire, na‐birobio nabibe ebiaino." 
Mark11:25 Na inwe, ekero mogotenena na gosaba, onye more ne ring’ana ase omonto, mwabere, erinde na Iso oino ore igoro abaabere nainwe amamocho aino. [" 
Mark11:26 Onye inwe timokwabera, nonya n’Iso oino ore igoro takobaabera inwe amamocho aino.]”" 
Mark11:27 Bagaika Yerusalemu naende. Ekero are gotaara Hekalu ime, abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko, na abagaaka bakamochiera," 
Mark11:28 bakamoboria, “Nase okobua ki ogokorera aya?”" 
Mark11:29 Yeso akabatebia, “Nainche nimbaborie ring’ana erimo, nainwe mong’iranerie, erio nimbatebie ase okobua ki ngokorera aya." 
Mark11:30 Ebatiso ya Yohana, nigoro yarwete, gose nase mwanyabanto? Ng’iranerie.”" 
Mark11:31 Bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, bakabora, “Toise goteba: Nigoro yarwete, nigo aratoborie: Naki rende motamwegenete?" 
Mark11:32 Gose toise goteba: Nase mwanyabanto yarwete?” — Bakairoka abanto, ekiagera abanto bonsi mbaroche ng’a Yohana nomobani bw’ekeene." 
Mark11:33 Ase ayio bakairaneria Yeso, “Titomanyeti.” Na Yeso akabatebia “Nonya ninche tinkobatebia inwe nase okobua ki ngokorera aya.”" 
Mark12:1 Agachaka gokwana nabarabwo ase emereng’anio. “Omonto naremete omogondo, agasimeka emesabibu imeo, agaetanania orobago, agakunya egetera akomitera amasabibu, akaagacha orwaki, akaywatananera abaremi, akamanora akagenda orogendo." 
Mark12:2 Ekero kie rigesa agatoma omosomba ase abaremi baria, erinde anyore korwa ase abaremi ensemo y’amatunda ’emesabibu." 
Mark12:3 Barabwo bakamobwata, bakamoaka, bakamoseria atari na gento." 
Mark12:4 Agatoma naende asebare omosomba onde, na oyio bakamoaka chingoma ase omotwe, bakamosokia bakamokora bobe." 
Mark12:5 Naende agatoma oyonde, na oyio bakamoita. Naboigo babakorerete abande abange; bagaaka abande, na abande bakabaita." 
Mark12:6 Narenge nomwana oyomo konya ataratoma, omwanchwa oye; oyo nere akamotoma asebare nyuma, akabora: Nabasike omwana one." 
Mark12:7 Abaremi baria bagatebania: Oyo nomonyamwando; gaki tomoite, omwando oye obe oyoito." 
Mark12:8 Bakamobwata, bakamoita, bakamotuguta isiko korwa ase omogondo bw’emesabibu." 
Mark12:9 Bono inki rende omonene oria bw’omogondo bw’emesabibu arakore? Nachiche asirie abaremi baria, na omogondo oria bw’emesabibu nayoe abande." 
Mark12:10 Nonya neririko eri timorarisoma: “Rigena riria abaagachi bangete riabeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona. 
Mark12:11 Ring’ana eri nigo riarure ase Omonene, na rirorio nogokumia ase amaiso aito?”" 
Mark12:12 Bakarigia komobwata, korende bakairoka omoganda, ekiagera bamanyete ng’a omoreng’anio oria nabwo ogoteba; bakamotiga, bakagenda." 
Mark12:13 Bagatoma asare abande b’Abafarisai na Abaherodiani, erinde bamotege a se amang’ana." 
Mark12:14 Bagachia goika bakamotebia, “Omworokia, twamanyire ng’a aye nigo ore omonto bw’ekeene, gose tori koyiera monto, naki torengerereti obonene bw’abanto, korende ase ekeene nigo okworokereria enchera ya Nyasae. Inee! Mboronge koa Kaisari ebango, gose taibo?" 
Mark12:15 Tomoe, gose titomoa?” Ere konya omanyire obong’ainereria bwabo, akabatebia: “Nase ki mogonteema? Yendetere ebesa inyerore!”" 
Mark12:16 Bakayerenta. Ere akababoria, “Ekieni eke na amariko aya nebiang’o?” Bakamoiraneria, “Nebia Kaisari.”" 
Mark12:17 Yeso akabatebia, “Ebire bia Kaisari, moe Kaisari, na ebia Nyasae, moe Nyasae.” Bakamokumia mono." 
Mark12:18 Na Abasadukai bakamochiera, baria bakobora ng’a okobokigwa tikori, bakamoboria," 
Mark12:19 “Omworokia, Musa natorikerete ng’a momura omwabo omonto karakwe atige omokungu oye; onye tari nomwana, momura omwabo atware omokungu oria, atenenerie momura omwabo egesaku." 
Mark12:20 Bono mbarenge abamura ba ise omo batano na babere. Oyo bwe ritang’ani akanyuoma omokungu, agakwa, tatiga abana." 
Mark12:21 Na oyo o kabere akamotwara, agakwa; nonya nere tatiga abana; nonya noyo o gatato boigo." 
Mark12:22 Bonsi batano na babere bakamotwara, tibatiga abana. Omoerio o bonsi omokungu oria nere agakwa." 
Mark12:23 Inee! Ase okobokigwa mokang’o arabe ase aba? Ekiagera bonsi batano na babere mbamotwarete.” 
Mark12:24 Yeso akabatebia, “Inee! Timori gosira ase aya, ekiagera timomanyeti amariko, nonya nokobua kwa Nyasae?" 
Mark12:25 Naki kobaraboke korwa ase abakure, tibakonyuoma, korende nigo barabe buna abamalaika bare igoro." 
Mark12:26 Nase amang’ana ’abakure, buna bakobokigwa, timwana gosoma ase ebuku ya Musa, ase ring’ana ri’egetutu, buna Nyasae amotebetie, akabora: Inche ninche Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na Nyasae o Isaka, na Nyasae o Yakobo?" 
Mark12:27 Ere tari Nyasae bw’abakure, korende bw’abare moyo; ase ayio nigo mogosira mono.”" 
Mark12:28 Oyomo ase aborokia b’amariko agacha akabaigwa bakoamererania nere, akamanya ng’a obairaneirie buya, akamoboria, “Ase amachiko onsi ndiriri rire rie ritang’ani?”" 
Mark12:29 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Erie ritang’ani nario eri: Igwa, Abaisraeli, Omonene Nyasae oito, Omonene noyomo;" 
Mark12:30 naye mwanche Omonene Nyasae oo nenkoro yao yonsi, na omoyo oo bwonsi, na obong’aini bwao bwonsi, ne chinguru chiao chionsi." 
Mark12:31 Na ogwa kabere nakwo oko: Mwanche omogisangio oo buna bweanchete. Amachiko ande tari amanene kobua aya.” 
Mark12:32 Omworokia oria bw’amariko akamotebia, “Ekeene, Omworokia, gwatebire buya ng’a Nyasae noyomo, na onde tari otatiga ere;" 
Mark12:33 na komwancha nenkoro yonsi, na okomanya gwonsi, ne chinguru chionsi, na gwancha omogisangio oo buna bweanchete, nkogwenerete kobua omosango bw’ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa na ebing’wanso binde.”" 
Mark12:34 Yeso agachia korora ng’a nigo airaneria ase obong’aini, akamotebia, “Aye tori are korwa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.” Korwa erio monto onde tanyara komoboria ring’ana naende." 
Mark12:35 Yeso akabora gakworokereria ime ase Hekalu, “Naki aborokia b’amariko bakobora ng’a Kristo nomwana o Daudi?" 
Mark12:36 Daudi omonyene nigo atebete, buna arenge koraagwa n’Omoika Omochenu: “Omonene agatebia Omonene one: Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio, goika mbeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao." 
Mark12:37 Daudi omonyene nigo akomoroka Omonene; naki rende aba omwana oye?” Na omoganda oria omonene nigo orenge komoigwa ase omogoko. 
Mark12:38 Akabatebia ase okworokereria kwaye, “Mwerende korwa ase aborokia b’amariko, abwo banchete gotaara beboyetie chianga chintambe, na gokwanigwa ase chichiiro," 
Mark12:39 na goikaransa aase e ritang’ani ase chisinagogi, na aase e ritang’ani ase emeyega." 
Mark12:40 Abwo bakourereria chinyomba chi’ababoraka, na ase obong’ainereria basaba ogosaba ogotambe; aba nabanyore ekina ekere ekenene kobua.”" 
Mark12:41 Yeso agaikaransa korigereria ekebekerero gi’esadaka, akarigereria buna omoganda okobeka chibesa ase ekebekerero. Abande abarenge abanda bakabeka chinyinge." 
Mark12:42 Omokungu oyomo agacha, oyorenge omoboraka na omotaka, akabeka ebisabwa bibere bie chitaai, rigori ri’ekeng’ese ki’ebesa eyemo." 
Mark12:43 Akarangeria aborokigwa baye, akabatebia, “Ekeene nabatebirie: Oyo omoboraka omotaka obekire chinyinge kobua bonsi ababeka ase ekebekerero gi’esadaka," 
Mark12:44 ekiagera aba bonsi nigo babeka korwa ase obonge bw’enibo yabo; korende oyo ase obotaka bwaye obekire bionsi ebiarenge nabio, nonya nenibo y’obogima bwaye bwonsi.”" 
Mark13:1 Goika agachia gosoka korwa Hekalu, oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye akamotebia, “Omworokia, rora buna amagena na amaagacho aya are amaya!”" 
Mark13:2 Yeso akamotebia, “Noroche amaagacho aya amanene? Gee, aiga tirigotigara rigena erimo igoro ase erinde, eritanyare gotagorwa.”" 
Mark13:3 Erio gaikaransire ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni korigereria Hekalu, Petero, na Yakobo, na Yohana, na Anderea, bakamoboria bobisi," 
Mark13:4 “Totebie, aya indi arabe? Ninki ekemanyererio kiaye ekero aya onsi arabe ang’e goikerana?”" 
Mark13:5 Yeso agachaka kobatebia, “Mwerende, monto onde tabang’aina na kobasiria," 
Mark13:6 ekiagera abange nabache ase erieta riane, babore: Inche ninche ere; naraae abange na kobasiria." 
Mark13:7 Naende komoraigwe esegi, na ebirage bi’esegi, timoichanigwa, ekiagera bori, aya onsi nabe, ko moerio toracha." 
Mark13:8 Naki egesaku nakeimoke korwana negesaku kende, na oboruoti naborwane noboruoti bonde. Emetengecho y’ense nebe chinsemo ne chinsemo, na enchara. Noyio noro omochakano bw’obororo." 
Mark13:9 “Mwerende inwe abanyene, ekiagera nababaire ase amatongo, na ase chisinagogi, namoakwe. Naende namoirwe gotenena ase amasio ’abagavuna na ase abaruoti ase engencho yane, koba kirori asebare." 
Mark13:10 Naende negwenerete enchili erandigwe ritang’ani ase ebisaku bionsi. 
Mark13:11 Ekero bakobaira ase ekina, na kobabeka ase amaboko ’abanto, timochaka gwechanda korengereria ayamorigetie gokwana; korende rinde rionsi moraegwe ase ensa eria, morikwane, ekiagera tari inwe morakwane, korende n’Omoika Omochenu." 
Mark13:12 Na momura omwabo omonto narue oyomwabo, erinde aitwe, na ise narue omwana oye; na abana nabaimokere abaibori babo kobaita." 
Mark13:13 Nainwe namogechwe nabanto bonsi ase engencho y’erieta riane, korende oyoraremererie goika omoerio, oyio natooreke." 
Mark13:14 “Korende komorakorore okogechia kw’ogosaria kogotenena aase atagwenereti, (oyogosoma amanye), erio abare Boyahudi batame gochia ase ebitunwa;" 
Mark13:15 na ere oyore kerama igoro taika gosoa nyomba ime, gose tasoa kobogoria egento korwa mwaye;" 
Mark13:16 na ere oyore mogondo tairana nyomba kobogoria eanga yaye. 
Mark13:17 Nabe aakong’u ase abare barito na barabwo abakogonkia ase amatuko aria. 
Mark13:18 Saba ng’a ogotama kwaino tikoba ekero ki’obokendu," 
Mark13:19 ekiagera amatuko aria nebe emechando, buna etana koba korwa omochakano bw’ogotonga oko Nyasae atongete, goika bono, gose tekoba bo naende nonya ng’ake." 
Mark13:20 Naende onye Omonene atanachete amatuko aria, anga monto onde bwensi tatooregete, korende ase engencho y’abachore, abachorete, onachire amatuko aria." 
Mark13:21 Ekero ekio omonto karabatebie: Rora, oyo nere Kristo, gose: Oria aaria, timwegena," 
Mark13:22 ekiagera amakristo ’oborimo, na ababani b’oborimo nabaorokie ebikone na amakumia, banyare gosiria nonya nabachore." 
Mark13:23 Korende inwe mwerende! Rora, nakoorire koborokia onsi ritang’ani." 
Mark13:24 “Korende amatuko aria, nyuma y’emechando eria, erioba naribekwe omosunte, na omotienyi tokobara," 
Mark13:25 ne ching’enang’eni nachigwe korwa igoro, ne chinguru chire igoro nachitengechigwe." 
Mark13:26 Erio nario bararore Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogocha ase amare ime amo ne chinguru chinyinge na obonene. 
Mark13:27 Erio natome abamalaika baye basangererie abachore baye korwa chinsemo chie chinsinyo inye, na korwa chinsinyo chi’ense goika chinsinyo chia igoro." 
Mark13:28 “Korwa ase omoko eorokererie omoreng’anio oye. Orosagia rwaye korwachakire koorokia amato aye, mwamanyire ng’a nekero ki’ogoseboka, etoigo ng’ang’e ere." 
Mark13:29 Naboigo nainwe, komorarore aya aorokire, momanye ng’a obeire ang’e na gesieri." 
Mark13:30 Nekeene nabatebirie: Ekegori eke tikegoeta nonya ng’ake goika aya onsi anyare koba. 
Mark13:31 Igoro na ense nabiete, korende amang’ana aane takonyara goeta nonya ng’ake." 
Mark13:32 “Korende amang’ana e rituko riria na ensa eria onde tari omanyete, nonya nabamalaika bare igoro, nonya n’Omwana, otatiga Tata." 
Mark13:33 Rigereria, renda, saba, ekiagera timomanyeti engaki eria indi eranyare koba." 
Mark13:34 Igo enga buna omonto ore kogenda ense eng’ao konya otigire enyomba yaye, oeire abasomba baye okobua, na kera omonto emeremo yaye; agachika omorendi bw’egesieri arende." 
Mark13:35 Renda boigo, ekiagera timomanyeti ekero omonene bw’enyomba agochi‐gocha, gose mogoroba, gose mbotuko gati, gose etuoni gekobuga, gose mambia," 
Mark13:36 tacha ababosokane, abanyore mwararire." 
Mark13:37 Na erio nabatebirie inwe, nabatebirie bonsi: Renda!”" 
Mark14:1 Konya atigaire amatuko abere ne rituko rinene ri’Epasaka ribe, na eri ’Emegati etabekiri memera. Abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko bakarigia enchera bakomobwatera nobong’ainereria, banyare komoita," 
Mark14:2 ekiagera batebete, “Tari ekero kie rituko rinene, tiribaisa gocha koba riroroche ase abanto.”" 
Mark14:3 Yeso ekero arenge Bethania ase enyomba ya Simion oyorenge noborwaire bwa ukoma, gaikaransete ase endagera, agacha omokungu orenge nechuba ye rigena rirabu ere namaguta agotioka buya, aye rigori rinene, agaata echuba eria, akamonyororokeria omotwe oye." 
Mark14:4 Mbarengeo abanto bagechetigwe ase emioyo yabo, bakabora, “Nase ki ogosiria amaguta engencho buna eye?" 
Mark14:5 Naki amaguta aya anga naoonigwa chidinari amagana atato na kobua, abataka baegwe.” Bakamwemurunganeria omokungu oria mono." 
Mark14:6 Yeso agateba, “Motige! Nase ki mokomorosia? Ere onkoreire emeremo emiya." 
Mark14:7 Naki amatuko onsi nigo more nabataka amo nainwe, na kero kende gionsi mwanchete, namonyare kobakorera amaya, korende timori nainche amatuko onsi." 
Mark14:8 Okorire eki anyarete, goaka omobere one ase ogotindekwa kwane." 
Mark14:9 Nekeene nabatebirie: Kera aase enchili erarandigwe ase ense yonsi, neri akora oyo nariatorwe ase okomoinyora.”" 
Mark14:10 Yudas Iskariota, ere noyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, akagenda ase abakuani abanene, anyare komorua asebare." 
Mark14:11 Na barabwo bagachia koyaigwa bakagoka, bakamoriera eira komoa chibesa. Akarigia enchera akomoruera ekero aranyore ribaga rigiya." 
Mark14:12 Goika rituko rie ritang’ani ri’Emegati etabekiri memera, ekero gi’okonyenya emanwa y’eng’ondi y’Epasaka, aborokigwa baye bakamoboria, “Ng’ai origetie togende tokoroiserie oriere Epasaka?”" 
Mark14:13 Agatoma babere b’aborokigwa baye akabatebia, “Genda ase omochie na moumerane nomosacha obogoretie enyongo ere namache; momotunyane," 
Mark14:14 na aande onsi arasoe motebie omonyene enyomba: Omworokia otebire: Ng’ai ere enyomba y’abageni ndiere Epasaka amo naborokigwa baane? 
Mark14:15 Na ere omonyene naborokie akanyomba akanene ka irongo igoro, karoisigwe kabeire ang’e; agwo motoroiserie.”" 
Mark14:16 Aborokigwa bagasoka, bakagenda omochie, bakarora buna abatebetie, bakaroisia Epasaka." 
Mark14:17 Riachia koba mogoroba agacha amo na baria ikomi na babere. 
Mark14:18 Na barabwo kobaikaransire ase endagera bakoria, Yeso akabora, “Nekeene, nabatebirie: Oyomo oino oyokoria amo nainche nandue.”" 
Mark14:19 Bagachaka goichana, bakamoboria oyomo oyomo “Inee! Ninche?”" 
Mark14:20 Akabatebia, “Noyomo bw’aba ikomi na babere, ere oyogotobeka amo nainche ase esani." 
Mark14:21 Naki Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nkogenda are buna arikeretwe korende obobe nobwaye omonto oria orure Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto. Nanga mbuya asare omonto oria, nonya ataiboretwe.”" 
Mark14:22 Barabwo bakaba nkoria bare, akabogoria omogati, akayosesenia, akayosamunyora, akabaa, akabora, “Bogoria! Oyo noro omobere one.”" 
Mark14:23 Akabogoria egekombe, na ekero airaneirie ng’a mbuya mono, akabaa. Bagakenywera bonsi." 
Mark14:24 Akabatebia, “Aya naro amanyinga aane, ay’okobwatana okoyia, aitekire ase engencho y’abange." 
Mark14:25 Ekeene nabatebirie: Tinkonywa naende nonya ng’ake okwama kw’emesabibu goika rituko riria ndache gokonywa okoyia ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.” 
Mark14:26 Kobakoorire gotera Ogotera, bagasoka kogenda egetunwa ki’Emezeituni." 
Mark14:27 Na Yeso akabatebia, “Inwe mwensi inamogochwe na gontiga, naki arikire: Ning’ake omorisia, ne ching’ondi nachiserebekane." 
Mark14:28 Korende nyuma y’okoboka kwane, nimbatang’anere kogenda Galili.”" 
Mark14:29 Petero akamotebia, “Neba inabagochwe bonsi na kogotiga, korende tai inche.”" 
Mark14:30 Yeso akamotebia, “Ekeene nagotebirie: Rero, ase obotuko obo, ritang’ani etuoni etarabuga ara kabere, nonkane ara gatato.”" 
Mark14:31 Na ere akamenta gokwana mono, “Nimba ngokwa amo naye, tinkogokana nonya ng’ake.” Na bonsi bagateba boigo." 
Mark14:32 Naende bagaika aase akorokwa Gethisemane: agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Ikaransa aa, ekero ngosaba.”" 
Mark14:33 Akaira Petero na Yakobo na Yohana amo nere, agachaka goichana na gwechanda mono." 
Mark14:34 Akabatebia, “Omoyo one nore nobororo obonge, goika ogokwa; ikaransa aiga, morende.”" 
Mark14:35 Akagenderera bosio ake, akagwa maumama, ogosaba ng’a onye ekonyarekana, ensa eye emoetere." 
Mark14:36 Agateba, “Abba!” Engencho yaye “Tata”, “Onsi nigo akonyarekana asore, onduserie egekombe eke, korende tari buna nyanchete inche, korende buna bwanchete aye.”" 
Mark14:37 Agacha, akabanyora bararire, agatebia Petero, “Simion, nkwararire? Tokonyara korenda nonya nensa eyemo?" 
Mark14:38 Renda, saba, timobaisa gosoa ase ogoteemwa; omoika nore nogwancha, korende omobere tori ne chinguru.”" 
Mark14:39 Akagenda naende, agasaba, ogokwana amang’ana aria amatang’ani." 
Mark14:40 Naende akagenda akabanyora bararire, ekiagera amaiso abo abeire amarito, gose tibamanya eri bakomoiraneria." 
Mark14:41 Agacha eria gatato, akabatebia, “Nonya mbono moraire, na gotimoka? Aisanire. Engaki yaikire. Rora, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto obekirwe ase amaboko ’abanyene ebibe." 
Mark14:42 Imoka, togende; rora, ere oyokondua oikire ang’e.”" 
Mark14:43 Erio kegima, kagokwana, Yudas, oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, agaika, na omoganda ore amo nere nemioro ne chinungu, bakorwa ase abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko, na abagaaka." 
Mark14:44 Ere oyokomorua konya obaeire ekemanyererio, ogoteba, “Oyo ndanyunyunte, oyio nere, momobwate, momoire buya.”" 
Mark14:45 Agachia gocha bwango, akamochiera, akabora, “Rabii!” Akamonyunyunta." 
Mark14:46 Erio bakamobwata, bakamoira." 
Mark14:47 Na oyomo ase baria bateneine ang’e akang’usa omoyio oye o birende, agaaka omosomba bw’omokuani omonene, akamobutora ogoto." 
Mark14:48 Yeso akabatebia, “Inee! Igo mwachire buna mokoimokera omouri nemioro ne chinungu, gocha kong’ira?" 
Mark14:49 Kera rituko nigo narenge amo nainwe ase Hekalu ime kworokereria, ko timwambwata. Korende aya akorirwe, erinde amariko anyare goikerana.”" 
Mark14:50 Erio aborokigwa bonsi bakamotiga, bagatama." 
Mark14:51 Omomura oyomo akamotunyana, bweboyetie egetambaa ki’egatani gioka. Bakamobwata," 
Mark14:52 korende ere agatiga egetambaa keria ki’egatani, agatama ore getirianda." 
Mark14:53 Bakaira Yeso ase omokuani omonene; bakamosangererekera bonsi, abakuani abanene na abagaaka, na aborokia b’amariko." 
Mark14:54 Na Petero akamotunyana korwa nyuma ore egeka, goika ime ase egoora y’omokuani omonene, agaikaransa amo nabasomba gwota omorero." 
Mark14:55 Abakuani abanene na ab’ekegambero bonsi bakarigia oborori igoro ase Yeso banyare komoita, korende tibabonyora," 
Mark14:56 ekiagera abange bakamotebera oborimo, na oborori bwabo tibwabwatana." 
Mark14:57 Na abande bagatenena bakamotebera oborimo, bakabora," 
Mark14:58 “Ntwamoigwete ogoteba: Inche nintagore Hekalu eye yakoregete namaboko, na ase amatuko atato ning’agache eyende etakoregeti namaboko.”" 
Mark14:59 Nonya nabo oborori bwabo tibwabwatana. 
Mark14:60 Omokuani omonene agatenena gati‐gati, akaboria Yeso, okobora, “Tokoiraneria ing’ana? Inki aba bakogosoera?”" 
Mark14:61 Korende agakira, tairaneria ing’ana. Omokuani omonene akamoboria naende, akamotebia, “Aye naye Kristo, Omwana bw’Omosesenigwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yeso agateba, “Ee, ninche ere; na inwe namorore Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogoikaransa ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’Oyore nokobua, ogocha namare a igoro.”" 
Mark14:63 Omokuani omonene agatandora chianga chiaye, akabora, “Ninki tokorigeria abarori bande?" 
Mark14:64 Mwaigure okorama kwaye. Naki moroche?” Bonsi bakamonachera ekina ng’a nagwenerete akwe. 
Mark14:65 Abande bagachaka komotwera amate, na komotuba obosio, na komoaka chinkundi, na komotebia, “Bana!” Abarendi nabarabwo bakamoaka chindoe." 
Mark14:66 Na Petero nigo arenge egoora inse, na oyomo bw’abaiseke abasomba b’omokuani omonene agacha," 
Mark14:67 akarora Petero ogwota omorero, akamorigereria, agateba, “Aye naye kwarenge amo noria Omonazareti, Yeso.”" 
Mark14:68 Agakana, akabora, “Timanyeti, gose tinyigweti eki ogokwana.” Agasoka gesieri; etuoni ekabuga." 
Mark14:69 Omoiseke oria omosomba akamorora naende, agachaka gotebia abateneine ang’e, “Oyo noyomo obo.”" 
Mark14:70 Agakana naende. Nyuma y’egeka egeke naende, baria bateneine ang’e bagatebia Petero, “Ekeene bori, naye noyomo obo ore, ekiagera nigo ore Omogalili.”" 
Mark14:71 Agachaka kweragereria na gotiana, “Timanyeti omonto oyio mogoteba.”" 
Mark14:72 Erio etuoni ekabuga eria kabere. Petero akainyora ring’ana riria atebetigwe na Yeso, “Ritang’ani etuoni etarabuga ara kabere, nonkane ara gatato.” Agachia agetugutana, akarera." 
Mark15:1 Erio kobwachia gokia mambia, abakuani abanene bagakora ekina amo nabagaaka na aborokia b’amariko, na ekegambero ekegima. Bagasiba Yeso, bakamoira, bakamomoa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato akamoboria, “Aye naye Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?” Akamoiraneria, “Naboigo, aye gwatebire.”" 
Mark15:3 Abakuani abanene bakamosoera ase amang’ana amange. 
Mark15:4 Pilato akamoboria naende, akabora, “Tokoiraneria ing’ana? Rora amang’ana aya amange bagosoeire.”" 
Mark15:5 Korende Yeso tairaneria ing’ana rinde naende, goika Pilato agakumia." 
Mark15:6 Nabo ase rituko rinene nigo anarete kobasiborera omosibwa oyomo, oyobarigetie." 
Mark15:7 Narengeo omonto ore korokwa Baraba, osibetwe amo nabanto abakorete eriomana, na gokora oboiti ase eriomana." 
Mark15:8 Omoganda ogotiira gochiao, na barabwo bagachaka gosaba Pilato abakorere buna anarete kobakorera." 
Mark15:9 Pilato akababoria, “Morigetie mbasiborere Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?”" 
Mark15:10 Ekiagera amanyete ng’a abakuani abanene nigo bamorure ase obogechi. 
Mark15:11 Abakuani abanene bakagenka abanto b’omoganda, erinde anche kobasiborera Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Pilato akairaneria naende, akabatebia, “Imokore naki oyo mogoteba ng’a n’Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?”" 
Mark15:13 Bagaaka eriogi naende, “Mobambe!”" 
Mark15:14 Pilato akababoria, “Nase ki? Mbobe ki akorete?” Bakamenta mono goaka eriogi, “Mobambe!”" 
Mark15:15 Pilato agancha gokora ayaragwenere omoganda, akabasiborera Baraba, na ekero aakire Yeso chinkini, akamorua abambwe." 
Mark15:16 Abarwani bakamoira ime ase enyomba y’ekegambero (nero Praitorio), bagasangererekana amo ekeombe ekegima." 
Mark15:17 Bakamoboyia eanga emonyinga, bagatwang’a egutwa y’amagwa, bakamobekera motwe," 
Mark15:18 bagachaka komokwania, “Masoge, Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi!”" 
Mark15:19 Bakamoaka omotwe negetonto, bakamotwera amate, bakabeka amaru inse, bakamosasima." 
Mark15:20 Kobamochecheirie, bakamorusia eanga eria emonyinga, bakamoboyia chianga chiaye omonyene. Bakamoira isiko komobamba." 
Mark15:21 Bakabetereria omonto orenge goeta, Simion Omokurene, ore korwa borabu, ise Aleksanderi na Rufo, abogorie omosalaba o Yeso." 
Mark15:22 Bakamoira aase akorokwa Gologotha (engencho yaye: Aase Ekeore). 
Mark15:23 Bakamoa edivai yochoganirie na manemane anywe, ko tancha konywa." 
Mark15:24 Bakamobamba, bagaatanana chianga chiaye, bagachiakera obomera eye kera omonto araire." 
Mark15:25 Nigo chiare chinsa isato ekero bamobambete. 
Mark15:26 Na amariko ’ogosoerwa kwaye nigo arikire igoro, “OMORUOTI BW’ABAYAHUDI.”" 
Mark15:27 Amo nere bakabamba abauri babere, oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, na oyomo ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okobee. [" 
Mark15:28 Nabo ririko rigaikerana, erigoteba, “Obareranigwe amo nabasaria.”]" 
Mark15:29 Na abanto abaare goeta bakamorama, bagosinga‐singisia emetwe yabo, bagoteba, “A! Aye oyogotagora Hekalu na koyeagacha ase amatuko atato," 
Mark15:30 etoorie, ika korwa ase omosalaba!”" 
Mark15:31 Naboigo nabakuani abanene bakamosekereria barabwo ase barabwo, amo naborokia b’amariko, bagateba, “Natooretie abande, ere omonyene takonyara gwetooria." 
Mark15:32 Tiga Kristo, Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli, aike bono korwa ase omosalaba, tonyare korora na kwegena.” Na barabwo ababambetwe amo nere bakamorama." 
Mark15:33 Ekero chinsa isano nemo chiaika omosunte okaba igoro ase ense yonsi goika chinsa kianda. 
Mark15:34 Ne chinsa kianda Yeso akarera ase eriogi rinene, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani?” Okoonchorwa kwaye: “Nyasae one, Nyasae one, naki gwantigire?”" 
Mark15:35 Na abande b’abwo bateneine ang’e koyaigwa bakabora, “Rora, nkorangeria are Elija.”" 
Mark15:36 Omonto akaminyoka bwango, akaimokia esifunchi, akayeichoria chinkama, akayebeka igoro ase egetonto, akamoa anywe, okobora, “Tiga torore gose Elija ngocha are komoikia.”" 
Mark15:37 Yeso agaaka eriogi rinene, agatweka mo." 
Mark15:38 Egetambaa gi’okonacha Hekalu kegatondoka korwa igoro goika inse, gekaba bibere." 
Mark15:39 Na ekero omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana ateneine amorigereretie, agachia korora ng’a otwekire mo, akabora, “Ekeene, omonto oyo nigo arenge Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
Mark15:40 Mbarengeo abakungu barigereretie korwa are. Ase abwo nigo barenge Mariamu Magidalena na Mariamu ng’ina Yakobo omoke na Yose, na Salome." 
Mark15:41 Aba nabwo bamotunyanete ekero arenge Galili na komokorera, amo nabande abange abakungu abatiirete amo nere goika Yerusalemu." 
Mark15:42 Riachia koba mogoroba, ekiagera nerituko ri’okwebeka ang’e, nario rituko ri’ogotang’anera eri’Esabato," 
Mark15:43 Yusufu omonto bw’Arimathaya agacha, oyorenge omosike, omonto bw’ekegambero. Ere omonyene nigo aganyete oboruoti bwa Nyasae; agasoa noboremu ase obosio bwa Pilato, agasaba aegwe omobere o Yeso." 
Mark15:44 Pilato agakumia, ekiagera aikire gokwa, akarangeria omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani rigana, akamoboria gose nkare akwete." 
Mark15:45 Goika agachia konyora ekeene ng’a okure, akaa Yusufu omobere." 
Mark15:46 Yusufu akagora egetambaa ki’egatani, akamoikia, akamoboyia egetambaa keria, akamobeka ase oboina bwabaachetwe ase egetare. Naende agaturunkania rigena gochia ase egesieri ki’oboina." 
Mark15:47 Mariamu Magidalena na Mariamu ng’ina Yose bakarigereria aase abegetwe. 
Mark16:1 Goika Esabato koyaerire, Mariamu Magidalena, na Mariamu ng’ina Yakobo, na Salome, bakagora amaguta amanukato, banyare kogenda komoaka." 
Mark16:2 Goika mambia chuni, rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, bakagenda ase oboina, erioba korikooroka." 
Mark16:3 Bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, “Ning’o oranyare gototigereria rigena riria korwa ase egesieri ki’oboina?”" 
Mark16:4 Goika bagachia korigereria bakarora ng’a rigena riria riatigerigwe, na rirorio nigo riarenge rinene mono." 
Mark16:5 Bagasoa oboina ime, bakarora omomura oikaransete ensemo y’okorio, bweboyetie eanga endabu, bagaichana." 
Mark16:6 Ere akabatebia, “Timoichana; Yeso Omonazareti mokorigia, oria obambetwe. Ere obokire, tari aiga. Rigereria aase bamobegete!" 
Mark16:7 Korende genda, motebie aborokigwa baye, na Petero, ng’a obatang’aneire kogenda Galili. Agwo nao moramorore, buna abatebetie.”" 
Mark16:8 Bakarua agwo, bagatama korwa ase oboina, ekiagera basoetwe nokoiguswa na ogokumia. Tibatebetie monto ing’ana, ekiagera bairogete." 
Mark16:9 Yeso ekero abokire, mambia rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma akaorokera ritang’ani Mariamu Magidalena, ere oria arusetie ebirecha bitano na bibere." 
Mark16:10 Oyo akagenda agatebia baria barenge amo nere korwa kare, baare kweumia na korera." 
Mark16:11 Na barabwo, bagachia koigwa ng’a moyo are, na ororirwe nere, tibegena." 
Mark16:12 Nyuma ase aya akaorokera abanto babere ase barabwo, ore nekieni kende ekeao, ekero barenge gotaara kogenda borabu." 
Mark16:13 Nabarabwo bakagenda bagatebia abande amang’ana aria, korende abwo tibabegena." 
Mark16:14 Naende akaorokera baria ikomi nomo, ekero barenge koragera; akabatogonyera ase ogotegena kwabo na obokong’u bw’emioyo yabo, ekiagera bategenete abamoroche kabokire." 
Mark16:15 Akabatebia, “Genda ase ense yonsi, morandie enchili ase kera egetongwa." 
Mark16:16 Oyoregene na kobatiswa, natooreke, ko oyotegeneti, nagambigwe." 
Mark16:17 Na ebimanyererio ebi bie chinguru nabibatunyane abwo begenire: Ase erieta riane nabaserie ebirecha, nabakwane ase emenwa emeyia," 
Mark16:18 nababwata ching’iti, gose nabanywa egento kegoita, ko tigekobaita nonya ng’ake; nababeke amaboko abo igoro ase abarwaire, na barabwo nabagwene.”" 
Mark16:19 Nabo Omonene Yeso, gakwanire nabarabwo, akabogorigwa gochia igoro, agaikaransa ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae." 
Mark16:20 Na barabwo bakaimoka, bakarandia chinsemo chionsi. Omonene akaba ogokora emeremo amo nabarabwo, na goikerania ring’ana ase ebimanyererio bie chinguru ebiatunyanete. Amina." 
Luke1:1 Abanto abange beruete korika ebirage bi’amang’ana aria aikeranetigwe egati yaito. 
Luke1:2 Nigo barigete buna abwo barenge abarori korwa omochakano na abakori emeremo be ring’ana batorenteire. 
Luke1:3 Naboigo nainche narorire buya, konaikire kwenyorera amang’ana onsi boronge korwa ritang’ani, gokorikera aye Theofilo bw’amasikani," 
Luke1:4 erinde onyare komanya oboene bw’amang’ana aria kworokereretigwe. 
Luke1:5 Ekero Herode arenge omoruoti o Boyahudi, narenge omokuani oyomo, erieta riaye Zakaria, oyo bw’ensemo y’Abiya. Mokaye nomoiseke bw’ororeria rwa Haroni orenge, erieta riaye Elisabeti." 
Luke1:6 Na bonsi babere nabanyene oboronge baare ase obosio bwa Nyasae; nigo bagendererete ase amachiko ne chinchera chionsi chi’Omonene batari na komocha. 
Luke1:7 Barabwo tibarenge nomwana, ekiagera Elisabeti nigo arenge omogomba, na barabwo bonsi babere konya bagotire mono." 
Luke1:8 Na ekero rika ria Zakaria ri’ogokora emeremo y’obokuani ase obosio bwa Nyasae riarenge," 
Luke1:9 kobwatekana nengencho y’obokuani, obomera bokamogwera asoe ase Hekalu y’Omonene asambe ubani." 
Luke1:10 Na omoganda bwonsi bw’abanto nigo orenge isiko gosaba ekero ki’ogosamba ubani. 
Luke1:11 Zakaria akaorokerwa nomomalaika bw’Omonene, oteneine ensemo ya borio y’egesasimero ki’ogosambera ubani." 
Luke1:12 Ere agaichana gachia komorora, na omoondoko okamobwata." 
Luke1:13 Korende omomalaika oria akamotebia, “Toiroka, Zakaria, ekiagera ogosaba kwao kwaigurwe, na mokao Elisabeti nakoiborere omwana omoisia, na erieta riaye nomoroke Yohana." 
Luke1:14 “Aye nobe nomogoko na ogosasoka, na abanto abange nabagokere okoiborwa kwaye," 
Luke1:15 ekiagera nabe omonene ase obosio bw’Omonene. Takonywa edivai gose ekenyugwa kegotindia; ere naichorwe n’Omoika Omochenu, nonya nkorwa enda ya ng’ina." 
Luke1:16 Naonchore abange b’Abaisraeli gocha ase Omonene, Nyasae obo." 
Luke1:17 Ere natang’ane bosio bwaye ase omoika ne chinguru chi’Elija, aonchore chinkoro chi’abaise ase abana babo, na aonchore abamochi ase obong’aini bw’abanyene oboronge, abekere ang’e Omonene abanto baroisigwe.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakaria agatebia omomalaika, “Naki ndakore imanye ayio? Ekiagera inche nomogotu, na mokane nomong’ina.”" 
Luke1:19 Omomalaika akamoiraneria, “Ninche Gabirieli, ngotenena ase obosio bwa Nyasae; ninche natomwa nkwane naye, ngotebie amang’ana aya amaya." 
Luke1:20 Rora, aye nobe rimama, tonyara gokwana goika rituko riria ayio agocha kooroka, ekiagera otegena amang’ana aane; ayio naikeranigwe ekero kiaye.”" 
Luke1:21 Na abanto baria baganyete Zakaria, bagakumia ase ogotebana kwaye aroro Hekalu ime." 
Luke1:22 Goika ekero achia gosoka, tanyara gokwana nabarabwo; bakamanya ng’a nigo arora okorora aria Hekalu ime. Ere nigo arenge kobateberia nokoboko, akagenderera koba rimama." 
Luke1:23 Naende amatuko aye ay’ogokora emeremo agachia koera, akagenda bwoye." 
Luke1:24 Nyuma y’amatuko aria mokaye Elisabeti akaba morito, akebisa emetienyi etano, ogoteba," 
Luke1:25 “Igo nabo Omonene ankoreire ase amatuko aya andigereretie, na konduseria obosooku bwane ase amasio ’abanto.”" 
Luke1:26 Omotienyi bw’etano nomo omomalaika Gabirieli agatomwa na Nyasae kogenda omochie o Galili, okorokwa Nazareti," 
Luke1:27 ase omoiseke omwekungi oriereire boko nomosacha, erieta riaye Yusufu, bw’eamate ya Daudi, na erieta ri’omoiseke oria Mariamu." 
Luke1:28 Agacha asare, akabora, “Mbuya ore aye, oyokwaeirwe obuya. Omonene nigo are amo naye.”" 
Luke1:29 Mariamu agaichana mono ase ring’ana eri, akarota‐rotia omoyo oye ime, “Ngokwania ki oko?”" 
Luke1:30 Omomalaika akamotebia, “Toiroka Mariamu, ekiagera kwanyorire obuya ase Nyasae." 
Luke1:31 Rora, nobe morito, noibore omwana omoisia, nomoroke erieta riaye Yeso." 
Luke1:32 “Oyio nabe omonene, narokwe Omwana bw’Oyore Igoro Mono; na Omonene Nyasae namoe ekerogo ki’obonene gia Daudi sokoro yaye;" 
Luke1:33 nagambere enyomba ya Yakobo goika kare na kare; nonya noboruoti bwaye tibokoba nomoerio.” 
Luke1:34 Mariamu akaboria omomalaika oria, “Naki rirabe ring’ana eri, ekiagera tindaba nomosacha?”" 
Luke1:35 Omomalaika akamotebia, “Omoika Omochenu nogochere, ne chinguru chiaye Oyore Igoro Mono nachikobekere ekiriri. Ase ayio, oyoraiborwe narokwe Omochenu, Omwana o Nyasae." 
Luke1:36 Rora, Elisabeti omoamate oo, nere boigo nare noborito bw’omwana omoisia ase obogotu bwaye; na omotienyi oyo noyo bw’etano nomo asare ere oyorogetwe omogomba." 
Luke1:37 Naki ing’ana tiriri ritanyarekane ase Nyasae.” 
Luke1:38 Mariamu akabora, “Rora, inche nomoiseke omosomba bw’Omonene; abe asende buna ring’ana riao.” Omomalaika akaimoka akarua asare." 
Luke1:39 Mariamu akaimoka ase amatuko ayio, akagenda bwango ase ebitunwa goika omochie oyomo o Yuda," 
Luke1:40 agasoa nyomba mwa Zakaria, agakwania Elisabeti." 
Luke1:41 Ekaba Elisabeti agachia koigwa ogokwania kwa Mariamu, omwana omoke agatuma ase enda yaye ime; Elisabeti agaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu," 
Luke1:42 agaaka eriogi ase chinguru, agakwana, “Gwasesenigwe aye ase abakungu, na oroiboro rw’enda yao rwasesenigwe." 
Luke1:43 Ng’ai ring’ana eri riarure, ng’ina Omonene one anchicheire inche?" 
Luke1:44 Ekiagera rora, eriogi ri’ogokwania kwao riachia gosoa ase amato aane, omwana omoke otuma ase omosasoko ase enda yane ime." 
Luke1:45 Nasesenirie oyobwegenete ng’a amang’ana ayio atebigwe n’Omonene naikeranigwe.” 
Luke1:46 Mariamu agateba, “Omoyo one otogirie Omonene," 
Luke1:47 omoika one ogokeire Nyasae, Omotooria one," 
Luke1:48 ekiagera origereirie obwororo bw’omoiseke omosomba oye. Naki ekeene, korwa rero ebigori bionsi nabindoke omosesenigwa," 
Luke1:49 ekiagera ere oyore ne chinguru onkoreire amanene, na erieta riaye nerichenu." 
Luke1:50 Amabera aye nigo are ase abwo bamoirogete korwa ebigori goika ebigori. 
Luke1:51 Okorire ogokora gwe chinguru, oserebanirie abaenenu ase ebirengererio bie chinkoro chiabo." 
Luke1:52 Okeeirie abanene korwa ase ebirogo biabo bi’obonene, oimokereirie igoro abaitongo." 
Luke1:53 Abare nenchara obaigotirie amaya; abanyene enibo obaseririe bare namaboko amasa. 
Luke1:54 Okonyire Israeli, omosomba oye, ase okoinyora amabera aye," 
Luke1:55 buna atebetie chisokoro chiaito, Ibrahimu na oroiboro rwaye, goika kare na kare.”" 
Luke1:56 Mariamu akamenya nere emetienyi etato, akairana sobo." 
Luke1:57 Kegaika ekero gi’okoibora kwa Elisabeti, akaibora omwana omoisia." 
Luke1:58 Abatureti baye na eamate yaye bakaigwa ng’a Omonene omororeire amabera amange, bakagoka amo nere." 
Luke1:59 Rituko ria gatano na gatato bakaira omwana komosara, bakarigia bamoroke erieta ria ise, Zakaria," 
Luke1:60 korende ng’ina akairaneria, akabora, “Taibo; nigo ararokwe Yohana.”" 
Luke1:61 Bakamotebia, “Tari nonya noyomo ase eamate yao okorokwa erieta erio.”" 
Luke1:62 Bakorokia ise ase ogokwana kw’ebimanyererio bi’amaboko, komoboria buna arigetie arokwe." 
Luke1:63 Agasaba ebao y’okorika, akarika “Yohana, nario erieta riaye.” Bagakumia bonsi." 
Luke1:64 Erio kegima agasiborwa omonwa na oromeme rwaye, agakwana, ogotogia Nyasae." 
Luke1:65 Obwoba bogasoa ase abatureti babo bonsi. Amang’ana aya onsi agasarera ase ense yonsi y’ebitunwa bia Boyahudi. 
Luke1:66 Na bonsi abayaigwete bakayabeka ase chinkoro chiabo ime, bakabora, “Mwana ki rende arabe oyo?” Naki okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kwarenge amo nere." 
Luke1:67 Zakaria ise agaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu, akabana, okobora," 
Luke1:68 “Omonene, Nyasae o Israeli, atogigwe, ekiagera obacheire abanto baye na kobabooria." 
Luke1:69 Naende ototeneneirie Omotooria bw’okobua ase eamate ya Daudi, omosomba oye." 
Luke1:70 Buna atebete korwa omochakano goetera ase emenwa y’ababani baye abachenu," 
Luke1:71 ng’a natotoorigwe korwa ase ababisa baito, na korwa ase amaboko abo bonsi abatogechete," 
Luke1:72 erinde abakorere amabera chisokoro chiaito, na koinyora okobwatana kwaye ogochenu." 
Luke1:73 Emuma eria arierete sokoro yaito Ibrahimu," 
Luke1:74 ng’a natoe ribaga ri’okomosasima totari nobwoba, gatoratoorigwe korwa ase amaboko ’ababisa baito," 
Luke1:75 ase obochenu na ase oboronge ase obosio bwaye amatuko aito onsi. 
Luke1:76 Naye, Omwana, norokwe omobani bw’Oyore Igoro Mono, ekiagera notang’ane ase obosio bw’Omonene. Oroisie chinchera chiaye," 
Luke1:77 omanyie abanto baye ogotooreka ase okwaberwa kw’ebibe biabo. 
Luke1:78 Ase amabera aye Nyasae oito, ekero amasase a igoro aratochere," 
Luke1:79 abarere abamenyete ase omosunte na ase ekiriri ki’amakweri, na koraa amagoro aito ase enchera y’omorembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana oria agakina, akamenteka chinguru ase omoika, akaba ase erooro goika rituko riria aorogete ase Abaisraeli." 
Luke2:1 Ase amatuko aria, ogochika gokarua ase Kaisari Augusto, ng’a omobaro bw’abanto orikwe ase ense yonsi." 
Luke2:2 Oyo noro orenge omobaro bwe ritang’ani origetwe ekero Kurenio arenge gavuna o Siiria. 
Luke2:3 Abanto bonsi bakagenda korikwa, kera omonto ase omochie oye." 
Luke2:4 Na Yusufu nere akaimoka korwa Galili korwa ase omochie o Nazareti, agatiira kogenda Boyahudi, goika omochie o Daudi, okorokwa Bethlehemu, ekiagera nigo arenge oyo bw’enyomba na eamate ya Daudi," 
Luke2:5 erinde arikwe amo na Mariamu, ekiagera omoriereire boko, na Mariamu nigo arenge morito." 
Luke2:6 Ekero barenge aroro engaki yaye y’okoibora egaika. 
Luke2:7 Akaibora omwana oye omoisia omotangi, akamobekera chianga chi’obwana, akamwareria ase orotuba chiombe chiare koriera, ekiagera batanyorete ribaga ase enyomba y’abageni." 
Luke2:8 Ase ense eyio mbarengeo abarisia baikaransete ase ebitii, bakorenda amaicho abo botuko." 
Luke2:9 Omomalaika bw’Omonene akabaorokera, obonene bw’Omonene bokababarera; bagasogwa nomoondoko omonge." 
Luke2:10 Omomalaika akabatebia, “Timoiroka, ekiagera nabarenteire amang’ana amaya ay’omogoko omonene, orabe ase abanto bonsi," 
Luke2:11 naki rero ase omochie o Daudi oiboirwe Omotooria ase engencho yaino, nere Kristo Omonene." 
Luke2:12 Na eke nekemanyererio asemore: Namonyore omwana ekeng’werere obekeire chianga chi’obwana, bwareirie ase orotuba.”" 
Luke2:13 Bwango igo mbarengeo amo nomomalaika oria omoganda o igoro, bagotogia Nyasae, bakobora," 
Luke2:14 “Obonene ase Nyasae ore Igoro Mono, na ase ense omorembe, ase abanto bagweneirwe nere.”" 
Luke2:15 Ekero abamalaika abwo bachia koimoka kogenda igoro, abarisia baria bagatebania, “Gaki togende goika Bethlehemu, torore ring’ana eri riakorekire, eri Omonene atomanyirie.”" 
Luke2:16 Bakagenda nomoayerero, bakanyora Mariamu na Yusufu, na omwana oria ekeng’werere bwareirie ase orotuba." 
Luke2:17 Bagachia komorora, bakaorokia ring’ana batebetigwe igoro y’omwana oyio." 
Luke2:18 Bonsi abaigwete bagakumia ase aria batebetigwe nabarisia. 
Luke2:19 Korende Mariamu akagacha amang’ana aya onsi, okoyarengereria ase enkoro yaye." 
Luke2:20 Abarisia bakairana, bagotogia Nyasae na komobaka ase amang’ana onsi baigwete, na ayabaroche, buna batebetigwe." 
Luke2:21 Rigachia goika rituko ria gatano na gatato, rituko ri’okomosara, akarokwa erieta riaye Yeso, riria riatoretwe nomomalaika ritang’ani atarabogorigwa oborito." 
Luke2:22 Na ekero amatuko ’ogwesibia kwabo achia goika, ayachikire ase amachiko a Musa, bakamoira Yerusalemu, bamobeke ase Omonene" 
Luke2:23 (buna arikire ase amachiko ’Omonene, “Kera omoisia omotangi okoigora enda ya ng’ina narokwe omochenu ase Omonene”)," 
Luke2:24 barue ekeng’wanso buna yaboretwe ase amachiko ’Omonene, “Amaruma abere, gose amage ’amaruma abere.”" 
Luke2:25 Rora narengeo omonto Yerusalemu, erieta riaye Simeoni. Oyio nomonto omoronge orenge, osigete Nyasae, oganyete ogosemeria kw’Abaisraeli; na Omoika Omochenu nigo orenge igoro asare." 
Luke2:26 Ere nigo aorokereretigwe n’Omoika Omochenu, ng’a takorora amakweri atararora Kristo bw’Omonene." 
Luke2:27 Nabo akaraagwa n’Omoika gocha ase Hekalu ime; na ekero abaibori bachia korenta omwana Yeso, bamokorere buna yarenge engencho y’amachiko," 
Luke2:28 Simeoni akamonyora, akamoagata ase amaboko aye, agatogia Nyasae, akabora," 
Luke2:29 “Omonene, bono otige omosomba oo agende nomorembe, koreng’ana nering’ana riao." 
Luke2:30 Ekiagera amaiso aane arorire ogotooreka kwao," 
Luke2:31 oko kwabekire ase amaiso ’abanto bonsi," 
Luke2:32 omobaso okomorekera abanto b’Ebisaku, na obonene bw’abanto bao Abaisraeli.”" 
Luke2:33 Ise na ng’ina bagakumia ase aria akwanwa igoro asare. 
Luke2:34 Simeoni akabasesenia, agatebia Mariamu ng’ina, “Rora, Omwana oyo obekirwe ase okogwa na ogotenena ase abange b’Abaisraeli, abe ekiorokererio kerabe kegokwanwa mamincha," 
Luke2:35 erinde ebirengererio bie chinkoro chinyinge biorokigwe. Boigo omoro nokobete omoyo oo.” 
Luke2:36 Narengeo omokungu omobani, Anna, omoiseke o Fanueli, bw’egesaku ki’Asheri. Ere nomong’ina bw’amatuko amange, obete nomosacha oye emiaka etano na ebere nyuma y’okoera kw’oboiseke bwaye." 
Luke2:37 Ere nigo arenge omoboraka bw’emiaka emerongo etano na etato na ene, atana korua ase Hekalu ime, korende akaba okweng’ata, na ogosaba, na ogosasima obotuko na omobaso." 
Luke2:38 Ase ekero keria ere akaoroka, agatogia Nyasae, agatebia abanto bonsi abarenge baganyete okoboorigwa kwa Yerusalemu amang’ana igoro y’Omwana oria." 
Luke2:39 Barabwo bagachia gokoora goikerania onsi koreng’ana namachiko ’Omonene, bakairana Galili goika omochie obo Nazareti." 
Luke2:40 Omwana oria agakina, akamenteka chinguru, agaichorwa nobong’aini ne chisemi; na obuya bwa Nyasae bokaba amo nere." 
Luke2:41 Nabo abaibori baye barenge kogenda Yerusalemu kera omwaka ase rituko rinene ri’Epasaka. 
Luke2:42 Goika agachia koba nemiaka ikomi na ebere, bagatiira kogenda aroro, buna yarenge engencho ye Rituko Rinene." 
Luke2:43 Ekero Epasaka yaera, ekero barenge koirana, omwana Yeso agatigara nyuma agwo Yerusalemu, na abaibori baye tibamanya." 
Luke2:44 Barabwo bagakaga ng’a nigo are ase omoganda obo, bakagenda orogendo rw’omobaso oyomo, bakamorigia ase eamate yabo na ase abairi." 
Luke2:45 Ekero batamonyorete, bakairana Yerusalemu, bakamorigia." 
Luke2:46 Nyuma y’amatuko atato bakamonyora Hekalu ime, oikaransete gati ase aborokia, okobaigwa na kobaboria amaborio." 
Luke2:47 Na bonsi abamoigwete bagakumia ase okomanya kwaye na okoiraneria kwaye. 
Luke2:48 Abaibori baye bagachia komorora bagaichana mono. Ng’ina akamotebia, “Omwana one, naki gwatokorire iga? Rora, iso na inche twarenge gokorigia nomoichano.”" 
Luke2:49 Akabatebia, “Naki mokondigia? Timomanyeti ng’a nengwenerete koba ase enyomba ya Tata one?”" 
Luke2:50 Tibamanya ring’ana riria abatebia. 
Luke2:51 Agatirimboka amo nabarabwo, agaika Nazareti, akaba nkobaigwera are. Ng’ina akagacha amang’ana aya onsi ase enkoro yaye ime." 
Luke2:52 Yeso akamenteka gokina ase obong’aini ne chisemi, na ase omobere, akagwenera Nyasae na mwanyabanto." 
Luke3:1 Ase omwaka o ikomi na gatano bw’okogamba gwa Kaisari Tiberio, Pontio Pilato orenge gavuna o Boyahudi, na Herode omoruoti o Galili, na Filipo momura omwabo omoruoti o Iturea na ense ya Tarakoniti, na Lusania omoruoti o Abileni," 
Luke3:2 ekero ki’obokuani obonene bw’Anasi na Kayafa, ring’ana ria Nyasae rigaikera Yohana, omwana o Zakaria, ase erooro." 
Luke3:3 Akagenda chinse chionsi chi’ensemo ya Yorodan, okorandia ebatiso y’okoonchoka ekorenta okwaberwa kw’ebibe." 
Luke3:4 Buna erikire ase ebuku y’amang’ana ’omobani Isaya, “Eriogi ri’oyogoaka egeturi ase erooro, Roisia enchera y’Omonene, rongeyia oboeto bwaye." 
Luke3:5 Kera rigooko nariichorigwe, na kera ekegoro na egetunwa nabikeeigwe; aare bogeka inarongeigwe, na enchera ere ebitunwa‐tunwa nereng’anigwe;" 
Luke3:6 na abanto bonsi nabarore ogotooreka gokorwa ase Nyasae.” 
Luke3:7 Nabo agatebia emeganda eyachete, erinde ebatiswe nere, “Inwe oroiboro rwe ching’iti, ning’o obakureire ng’a motame korwa ase endamwamu egochi‐gocha?" 
Luke3:8 Gaki, ama okwama kogwenerete okoonchoka, gose timochaka kobora emioyo yaino ime: Ntore na sokoro yaito, nere Ibrahimu. Naki nabatebirie ng’a Nyasae nare nokobua ase amagena aya gokorera Ibrahimu abana." 
Luke3:9 Nonya mbono egesire kiabekirwe ase emeri y’emete; nabo kera omote otameti okwama okuya nonachwe, otugutwe ase omorero.”" 
Luke3:10 Emeganda eria ekamoboria, “Ninki rende torakore?”" 
Luke3:11 Akabairaneria, “Oyore ne chianga ibere ae ere oyotari nero; na oyore nendagera akore boigo.”" 
Luke3:12 Abarusia ebango bagacha erinde babatiswe, bakamoboria, “Omworokia, inki rende naintwe torakore?”" 
Luke3:13 Akabairaneria, “Timorusia kobua ebi mwachigetwe.”" 
Luke3:14 Abarwani nabarabwo bakamoboria, “Naintwe inki torakore?” Akabairaneria, “Timourereria monto onde ase chinguru gose ase obosoeri bw’oborimo; naende moisaneke neng’eria yaino.”" 
Luke3:15 Ekero abanto baganyete na konakorengereria, bonsi bakeboria igoro ya Yohana ng’a, gose nere Kristo." 
Luke3:16 Yohana akairaneria abwo bonsi, “Inche nigo nkobabatisa ase amache, korende oyore ne chinguru kombua ngocha are, tinyisaini gosibora chinuga chi’ebikoroto biaye; oyio nere orababatise ase Omoika Omochenu na ase omorero." 
Luke3:17 Oroteru rwaye nigo rore koboko kwaye, ere naabuse ekeooreri kiaye, nasangererie engano ase ekiage kiaye, korende omoiriro nayosambe ase omorero otakorimeka.”" 
Luke3:18 Nabo ase ogokurera okonge Yohana akaranderia abanto amang’ana amaya. 
Luke3:19 Korende Herode omoruoti, oyo okanetigwe nere ase engencho ya Herodia, moka momura omwabo, na ase engencho y’amabe onsi Herode akorire," 
Luke3:20 akamenta neri igoro ase onsi, agasiba Yohana echela." 
Luke3:21 Egachia koba abanto bonsi kobabatisirwe, na Yeso boigo kabatisirwe, na ekero agosaba, igoro akamaanoka." 
Luke3:22 Omoika Omochenu ogaika igoro asare ase omogwekano bwe riruma, eriogi rikarwa igoro, rigoteba, “Aye naye Omwana one omwanchwa, ngokirie naye.”" 
Luke3:23 Yeso nere ekero achagete kworokereria, emiaka yaye iga yarenge ang’e emerongo etato, agakagwa ng’a mosinto o Yusufu, o Eli," 
Luke3:24 o Mathati, o Lawi, o Meliki, o Yana, o Yusufu," 
Luke3:25 o Matathia, o Amos, o Nahum, o Esili, o Nagai," 
Luke3:26 o Maathi, o Matathia, o Semei, o Yoseki, o Yuda," 
Luke3:27 o Yohana, o Resa, o Serubabeli, o Salatieli, o Neri," 
Luke3:28 o Meliki, o Adi, o Kosamu, o Elimadamu, o Eri," 
Luke3:29 o Yoshua, o Eliezeri, o Yorimu, o Mathati, o Lawi," 
Luke3:30 o Simeoni, o Yuda, o Yusufu, o Yonam, o Eliakimu," 
Luke3:31 o Melea, o Mainani, o Mattatha, o Nathani, o Daudi," 
Luke3:32 o Yese, o Obedi, o Boazi, o Salimoni, o Nashoni," 
Luke3:33 o Aminadabu, o Admin, o Aramu, o Hezironi, o Peresu, o Yuda," 
Luke3:34 o Yakobo, o Isaka, o Ibrahimu, o Tera, o Nahori," 
Luke3:35 o Serugi, o Ragau, o Pelegi, o Eberi, o Sala," 
Luke3:36 o Kainani, o Arifaksadi, o Shemu, o Nuhu, o Lameki," 
Luke3:37 o Metusela, o Enoku, o Yaredi, o Malaleeli, o Kainani," 
Luke3:38 o Enosu, o Seti, o Adamu, o Nyasae." 
Luke4:1 Na Yeso oichire n’Omoika Omochenu, akairana korwa Yorodan, agatang’anwa n’Omoika kogenda ase erooro," 
Luke4:2 agateemwa na Saitani ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene. Na amatuko aria tariete gento. Goika agachia koera, akaigwa enchara." 
Luke4:3 Saitani akamotebia, “Onye kore Omwana o Nyasae, tebia rigena eri ribe omogati.”" 
Luke4:4 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Nerikire. Omonto takoba moyo ase omogati bwoka.”" 
Luke4:5 Saitani akamoira aase aimokererete igoro, akamworokia amaruoti onsi ay’ense ase egeka ekemo," 
Luke4:6 akamotebia, “Ninkoe okobua oko gwonsi, na obonene bwaye, ekiagera nabieirwe, na inche iga nkoa oyo ngwancha." 
Luke4:7 Nabo koransasime, bionsi nabibe ebiao.”" 
Luke4:8 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Nerikire: Mosasime Omonene Nyasae oo, omokorere ere bweka.”" 
Luke4:9 Saitani akamoira goika Yerusalemu, akamotenenia igoro ase egechuria gie Hekalu egetambe mono, akamotebia, “Onye kore Omwana o Nyasae, etugute gochia inse korwa aa," 
Luke4:10 ekiagera nerikire, “Ere nagochikere abamalaika baye bakorende,”" 
Luke4:11 naende, “Nabakoimokie ase amaboko abo, erinde tobaisa kogochwa okogoro kwao ne rigena.”" 
Luke4:12 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Netebire, Toteema Omonene Nyasae oo.”" 
Luke4:13 Saitani agachia gokoora ogoteema kwaye gwonsi, akaimoka korwa asare, akamotiga ase egeka." 
Luke4:14 Yeso akairana gochia Galili ne chinguru chi’Omoika, chinkuma chigasarera ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense eria." 
Luke4:15 Ere akorokereria ase chisinagogi chiabo, ogotogigwa nabanto bonsi." 
Luke4:16 Akagenda Nazareti, aria ase arereretwe; na ase rituko ri’Esabato agasoa ase esinagogi yabo, buna engencho yaye yarenge, agatenena gosoma." 
Luke4:17 Akaegwa ebuku y’omobani Isaya. Nabo akaigora ebuku eyio, akanyora aase arikire," 
Luke4:18 “Omoika bw’Omonene nigo ore igoro yane, ekiagera ong’akire amaguta koranderia abataka amang’ana amaya. Ontomire koranderia abasibwa ogosiborwa, na koa abare emeuko banyare korora naende, na gosibora abasionoirwe," 
Luke4:19 “na korandia omwaka bw’Omonene bwancheretwe.”
