Luke4:20 Akamumekeria ebuku eria akayea omokori emeremo bw’esinagogi, agaikaransa. Abanto bonsi abarenge ase esinagogi bakamobeta amaiso." 
Luke4:21 Agachaka kobatebia, “Rero ririko eri riaikeranigwe ase amato aino.”" 
Luke4:22 Bonsi bakamokwana buya bagakumia amang’ana ’obuya aruete ase omonwa oye, bagatebania, “Oyo tari ere omwana o Yusufu?”" 
Luke4:23 Akabatebia, “Ekeene, namontebie omoreng’anio oyo: Omogwenia, egwenie aye omonyene; amang’ana onsi twaigure akorekire Kapernaumu, yakore aiga ase ense yao.”" 
Luke4:24 Akabatebia, “Ekeene nabatebirie: Omobani tari oranyare gwanchwa ase ense yaye omonyene." 
Luke4:25 Korende ekeene nabatebirie ng’a mbarenge ababoraka abange ase Israeli ase amatuko ’Elija, ekero igoro yasiegetwe emiaka etato na emetienyi etano nomo, ekero enchara enene yasoete ase ense yonsi;" 
Luke4:26 na Elija tatometwe ase oyomo obo, otatiga ase omokungu oyorenge omoboraka agwo Sarepata, ase ense ya Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Naende mbarenge ase Abaisraeli abanto abange abaare noborwaire bwa ukoma ase ekero ki’omobani Elisha; onde tari osibegete otatiga Naamani, omonto o Siiria.”" 
Luke4:28 Bagachia koigwa aya, bonsi ase esinagogi bagaichorwa nendamwamu." 
Luke4:29 Bakaimoka bakamosokia isiko y’omochie, bakamoira goika egemi y’egetunwa keria omochie obo oagachire igoro yaye, banyare komoturunkania." 
Luke4:30 Korende ere agaeta egati‐gati yabo, akagenda." 
Luke4:31 Agatirimboka goika Kapernaumu, omochie o Galili. Akaba nkoborokereria are rituko ri’Esabato." 
Luke4:32 Bagakumia mono ase okworokereria kwaye, ekiagera ring’ana riaye riarenge nokobua." 
Luke4:33 Naende ase esinagogi narengeo omonto obwatire nomoika bw’ekerecha ki’eubi. Ere agaaka eriogi ase chinguru, akabora," 
Luke4:34 “A! Inki tore naye, Yeso o Nazareti? Ngwachire gotosiria? Nakomanyire aye, Omochenu o Nyasae.”" 
Luke4:35 Yeso akagetogonyera, akabora, “Kira, omorwe!” Ekerecha keria gekamoiyeria agwo gati‐gati, gekamorwa, tikiamokorera gento." 
Luke4:36 Bagakumia bonsi, bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, “Ing’ana ki eri? Naki ase chinguru na okobua agochika ebirecha bi’eubi, na birobio biasoka.”" 
Luke4:37 Chinkuma chiaye chigasarera ase chinsemo chionsi chi’ense eria. 
Luke4:38 Akaimoka korwa ase esinagogi, agasoa ase enyomba ya Simion. Nabo ng’ina biara Simion konya orwarire esosera; bakamosaba ase engencho yaye." 
Luke4:39 Agatenena ang’e nere, agatogonyera esosera eria; ekamotiga. Bwango ere akaimoka akabakorera." 
Luke4:40 Goika erioba rigachia kogwa bakarenta asare abanto bonsi abarenge nabarwaire bare namarwaire ao ao, na ere akabeka amaboko aye igoro ase kera oyomo, akabagwenia." 
Luke4:41 Ebirecha bigasoka korwa ase abange, bigaaka eriogi, bikabora, “Aye naye Omwana o Nyasae.” Akabitogonyera, tabitiga bikwane, ekiagera biamanyete ng’a nere Kristo." 
Luke4:42 Goika ekaba mobaso, agasoka, akagenda aase atari nabanto. Na abanto bakamoriga‐rigia, bakamoikera, bakarigia komotanga taimoka korwa asebare." 
Luke4:43 Akabatebia, “Nengwenerete korandia amang’ana amaya ay’oboruoti bwa Nyasae ase emechie ende boigo, ekiagera natometwe ase engencho eyio.”" 
Luke4:44 Akaba nkorandia are ase chisinagogi chia Galili. 
Luke5:1 Ekaba abanto nkomomiga baare, erinde baigwe ring’ana ria Nyasae, agatenena ase engegu y’enyancha ya Genesareti," 
Luke5:2 Akarora amaato abere ateneine engegu y’enyancha, na abarubi basokire korwa aroro, ngosibia bare ebionga biabo." 
Luke5:3 Akariina obwato obomo obwarenge bwa Simion akamoboria abotigerie are ake korwa ase engegu. Agaikaransa, akorokereria omoganda korwa ase obwato." 
Luke5:4 Goika agachia gokoora ogokwana kwaye, agatebia Simion, “Sukia obwato goika endiba, moikie ebionga biaino ase okoruba.”" 
Luke5:5 Simion akamoiraneria, “Omonene, nabo twakorire emeremo obotuko obogima, titonyoreti gento, korende ase ring’ana riao natoikie ebionga.”" 
Luke5:6 Kobakorire iga, bakanyora chinswe chinyinge mono, na ekero ebionga biabo biachaka gotandoka," 
Luke5:7 bagasima abagisangio babo, abarenge ase obwato bwa kabere, bache kobakonya. Bagacha, bagaichoria amaato onsi abere, goika agachaka korimera." 
Luke5:8 Korende Simion Petero, agachia korora aya, akagwa ase amaru a Yeso, akabora, “Omonene, karue asende, ekiagera inche nomonto omonyene ebibe!”" 
Luke5:9 Naki igo akumetie, ere na bonsi abarenge amo nere, ase oborubi bwe chinswe barubete;" 
Luke5:10 naboigo Yakobo na Yohana, abana ba Zebedi, abarenge ababwatani ba Simion. Yeso agatebia Simion, “Toiroka; korwa bono nobe omorubi bw’abanto.”" 
Luke5:11 Naende kobarentire amaato abo gochia engegu, bagatiga bionsi, bakamotunyana." 
Luke5:12 Ekero arenge ase omochie oyomo, rora, narengeo omonto omosacha oichire noborwaire bwa ukoma. Ere agachia korora Yeso, akagwa maumama, akamosorora, okomotebia, “Omonene, onye ngwancha, nonyare gonsibia.”" 
Luke5:13 Yeso akarambora okoboko kwaye, akamokuna, akamotebia, “Nanchire; sibeka.” Erio agwo oborwaire bwaye bwa ukoma bokamorua." 
Luke5:14 Akamotebia, “Totebia monto onde ing’ana, korende genda, bweorokie ase omokuani, orue ekeng’wanso ase ogosibeka kwao buna Musa achigete, kebe kirori ase abanto.”" 
Luke5:15 Korende chinkuma chiaye chikamenteka gokuma. Emeganda emenge egasangererekana gocha komoigwa, na kogwenigwa amarwaire abo." 
Luke5:16 Korende ere akerusanania, akagenda aase atari nabanto, agasaba." 
Luke5:17 Rituko erimo ri’amatuko aria ekero arenge kworokereria, Abafarisai na aborokia b’amachiko barenge aroro baikaransete. Abwo baruete ase kera omochie o Galili na Boyahudi, na korwa Yerusalemu. Na okobua kw’Omonene nigo kwarenge amo nere anyare kogwenia." 
Luke5:18 Na rigereria, abanto mbabogoretie noborere omonto orenge rigata, bakarigia komoira nyomba ime na komobeka ase obosio bwaye." 
Luke5:19 Ekiagera batanyorete ribaga ri’okomoira ime ase engencho y’omoganda oria bw’abanto, bakariina kerama igoro, bakamoikia korwa kerama noborere bwaye goika gati‐gati ase obosio bwa Yeso." 
Luke5:20 Agachia korora okwegena kwabo, akamotebia, “Omonto oyo, ebibe biao biabeirwe.”" 
Luke5:21 Aborokia baria b’amariko na Abafarisai bagachaka korengereria, bakobora, “Ning’o oyo ogokwana okorama? Ning’o oranyare kwabera ebibe, otatiga oyomo, nere Nyasae?”" 
Luke5:22 Yeso namanyete ebirengererio biabo, akairaneria, “Naki mokorengereria ase chinkoro chiaino?" 
Luke5:23 Ndiriri rire eriango, goteba: Ebibe biao biabeirwe, gose goteba: Imoka, ogende?" 
Luke5:24 Korende monyare komanya ng’a Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nare nokobua ase ense gw’okwabera ebibe.” Erio agwo agatebia oria rigata, “Nagotebirie: Imoka, bwetweke oborere bwao, ogende bwoo.”" 
Luke5:25 Erio kegima agatenena ase obosio bwabo, akabogoria ekerarero kiaye arenge korarera, akagenda bwoye, ogotogia Nyasae." 
Luke5:26 Ogokumia gokabwata bonsi, bagatogia Nyasae; bagaichorwa nokoiroka, bakabora, “Twarorire amakumia rero.”" 
Luke5:27 Nyuma ase aya akaimoka, akarora omobangi ebango, erieta riaye Lawi, oikaransete aase bakobangerwa ebango, akamotebia, “Ntunyana!”" 
Luke5:28 Agatiga bionsi, akaimoka, akamotunyana." 
Luke5:29 Nere Lawi akamokorera omoyega omonene nyomba mwaye, naende mbarengeo omoganda bw’abarusia ebango na abanto bande baikaransete amo nabarabwo ase endagera." 
Luke5:30 Abafarisai na aborokia b’amariko babo bakemurunganeria aborokigwa baye, bakabora, “Nase ki mokoria na konywa amo nabarusia ebango na abanyene ebibe?”" 
Luke5:31 Yeso akabairaneria, “Abare buya tibari korigia omorwaria, otatiga abarwarete." 
Luke5:32 Tincheti korangeria ababoronge korende abanyene ebibe baonchoke.” 
Luke5:33 Bakamotebia, “Aborokigwa ba Yohana nigo bakweng’ata ebiro ebinge na gosaba, na aborokigwa b’Abafarisai nabo bagokora, korende abao nigo bakoria na konywa.”" 
Luke5:34 Yeso akabatebia, “Inee! Inamonyare gotiga abarangerigwa b’enyangi beng’ate ekero omonyuomi are amo nabarabwo?" 
Luke5:35 Korende amatuko nache, barache kourwa omonyuomi, erio nario barache kweng’ata ase amatuko aria.”" 
Luke5:36 Akabatebia omoreng’anio: “Onde tari ogotandora ekeraka ki’eanga enyia na gokebeka ase eanga engotu; aise gokora bo, natandore eria enyia, na ekeraka keria ki’eanga enyia tigekobwatana neanga eria engotu." 
Luke5:37 Gose onde tari okobeka edivai enyia ase ebirandi ebigotu biroisirie korwa ase amasankwa, gose edivai eria enyia nayaate ebirandi biria; edivai enyene eiteke, na ebirandi bitandoke." 
Luke5:38 Korende edivai enyia negwenerete ebekwe ase ebirandi ebiya. 
Luke5:39 Gose omonto tari onyure edivai yaroisetigwe kare, naende arigie edivai enyia, ekiagera nigo agoteba: Eria ya kare nengiya kobua.”" 
Luke6:1 Rituko ri’Esabato Yeso ngoeta arenge ase emegondo y’engano; aborokigwa baye bakabutora ebigara, bakabibunga namaboko abo, bakabiria." 
Luke6:2 Korende abande ase Abafarisai bakababoria, “Naki mogokora eritari borongo gokorwa ase rituko ri’Esabato?”" 
Luke6:3 Yeso akairaneria, “Timwana gosoma aya Daudi akorete, ekero arenge nenchara, ere na abarenge amo nere," 
Luke6:4 buna asoete ase enyomba ya Nyasae, akabogoria na koria emegati yarenge koruegwa ase Nyasae, etare boronge koriegwa nonde otatiga nabakuani boka, naende akaa abwo barenge amo nere?”" 
Luke6:5 Akabatebia, “Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nere Omonene bw’Esabato.”" 
Luke6:6 Esabato ende agasoa ase esinagogi, akorokereria. Narengeo omonto agwo, okoboko kwaye gw’okorio kwagataete." 
Luke6:7 Aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai bakamotega korora gose namogwenie ase rituko ri’Esabato, banyare komosoera." 
Luke6:8 Korende akamanya ebirengererio biabo, agatebia omonto oria okoboko kwaye kwagataete, “Imoka, otenene gati aa!” Akaimoka agatenena." 
Luke6:9 Yeso akabatebia, “Nkobaboria nde ring’ana erimo: Mboronge rituko ri’Esabato gokora amaya gose amabe, gotooria obogima gose kobosiria?”" 
Luke6:10 Akabarigereria bonsi, agatebia omonto oria, “Rambora okoboko kwao!” Agakora bo; okoboko kwaye gokagwenigwa." 
Luke6:11 Na barabwo bagaichorwa nokobea, bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, buna baramokore Yeso." 
Luke6:12 Ase amatuko aria akaimoka akagenda ase egetunwa gosaba; akabao obotuko bwonsi ase ogosaba Nyasae. 
Luke6:13 Bogachia gokia mambia akarangeria aborokigwa baye, agachora korwa asebare ikomi na babere, na abwo arogete abatomwa." 
Luke6:14 Simion nere arogete Petero, na Anderea momura omwabo; Yakobo na Yohana, Filipo na Baritholomayo," 
Luke6:15 na Matayo na Tomas, Yakobo bw’Alufayo, na Simion oyomo bw’Abazelote," 
Luke6:16 na Yuda o Yakobo, na Yudas Iskariota, nere oyo omoruete." 
Luke6:17 Agatirimboka amo nabarabwo, agatenena aase aateremu, amo nomoganda bw’aborokigwa baye; na omoganda bw’abanto abaruete Boyahudi yonsi, na Yerusalemu, na engegu ya Turo na Sidoni, bagacha komoigwa na kogwenigwa amarwaire abo." 
Luke6:18 Na abwo bachandire nebirecha bi’eubi bakagwenigwa. 
Luke6:19 Omoganda bwonsi okarigia komokuna, ekiagera chinguru chiare korua asare, chikabagwenia bonsi." 
Luke6:20 Yeso akaimokia amaiso aye ase aborokigwa baye, akabora, “Imosesenirie inwe abamore abataka, ekiagera oboruoti bwa Nyasae nobwaino.”" 
Luke6:21 “Imosesenirie inwe abamore nenchara bono, ekiagera namoigotigwe.” “Imosesenirie inwe abamokorera bono, ekiagera namoseke.”" 
Luke6:22 “Imosesenirie inwe ekero mwanyabanto bakobagecha, na kobarusanania, na kobachaya, na gosaria amarieta aino buna nababe more, ase engencho y’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto." 
Luke6:23 Goka ase rituko riria, na gochenga, ekiagera ekeene eng’eria yaino nenene igoro; naki chisokoro chiabo nabo chiakorerete ababani engencho eyio eyio." 
Luke6:24 “Korende obobe nobwaino inwe abanda, ekiagera mwanyorire omogoko oino." 
Luke6:25 “Obobe nobwaino inwe abamoigotete bono, ekiagera namoche koba nenchara. “Obobe nobwaino inwe abamogoseka bono, ekiagera namoche goichana na korera." 
Luke6:26 “Obobe nobwaino inwe, ekero abanto bakobatogia, ekiagera chisokoro chiabo nabo chiakorerete ababani b’oborimo engencho eyio eyio." 
Luke6:27 “Korende nabatebirie inwe abamokoigwa: Ancha ababisa baino, bakorere amaya abwo babagechete," 
Luke6:28 basesenie abwo bakobaragereria, basabere abwo bakobakorera bobe." 
Luke6:29 Oyo okogoaka orosea oromo, moonchorere noronde, na ere oyogokoura eanga ya isiko, tomorina neya ime." 
Luke6:30 Moe kera oyokogosaba; na oyogokoura ebinto biao tomoboria naende. 
Luke6:31 Naende buna morigetie abanto babakorere inwe, nainwe mobakorere bo." 
Luke6:32 “Komoranche ababanchete inwe, imbuya ki moranyore? Ekiagera nonya nabanyene ebibe nigo banchete abwo babanchete." 
Luke6:33 Komorabakorere amaya abwo abakobakorera inwe amaya, imbuya ki moranyore? Ekiagera nonya nabanyene ebibe nabo bagokora." 
Luke6:34 Naende komorarue singo ase abanto mosemeretie konyora egento korwa asebare naende, imbuya ki moranyore? Ekiagera nonya nabanyene ebibe nigo bakorua singo ase abanyene ebibe, erinde banyore koreng’ana." 
Luke6:35 Korende mwanche ababisa baino, bakorere amaya, na korua singo, motari korengereria konyora egento gi’okoiranerigwa, eng’eria yaino nebe enene, na inwe namobe abana b’Oyore Igoro Mono, ekiagera ere nomuya ase abanto batari nokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, nonya nase abang’iti." 
Luke6:36 Mobe namabera, buna Iso oino are namabera." 
Luke6:37 “Timogambia, nainwe timokogambigwa; timonachera, nainwe timokonacherwa; abera, nainwe namwaberwe;" 
Luke6:38 karue, nainwe namoegwe. Ekerengo ekiya keigateire, keinyageire, geichire, nakio abanto barabae inwe ase amaboko aino, ekiagera ekerengo keria mokorengera, nakio morache korengerwa nainwe.”" 
Luke6:39 Akabatebia omoreng’anio, “Inee! Omouko nonyare koraa omouko onde? Tibakogwa bonsi babere ase engoro?" 
Luke6:40 Omworokigwa tari omonene kobua omworokia oye, korende kera oyomo gakoorire kworokererigwa nabe buna omworokia oye." 
Luke6:41 Inaki okorigereria ekeogoto kere ase eriso ri’oyomino, na omoribo ore ase eriso riao ime toyorochi?" 
Luke6:42 Gose naki oratebie oyomino: Oyominto, ntige nkorusie ekeogoto kere ase eriso riao ime, na aye omonyene torochi omoribo ore ase eriso riao? Aye omong’ainereria, rusia ritang’ani omoribo ore ase eriso riao, nario orarore buya omanye korusia ekeogoto kere ase eriso ri’oyomino." 
Luke6:43 “Naki tori omote omuya okwama amatunda amabe, gose omote omobe okwama amatunda amaya." 
Luke6:44 Kera omote nigo okomanyekana ase amatunda aye. Naki ase emetobo abanto tibari gotwa amako, gose ase emenyenya tibari gotwa amasabibu." 
Luke6:45 Omonto omuya ase emonga engiya y’enkoro yaye nigo akorua ayare amaya; na omonto omobe ase emonga yaye embe nigo akorua ayare amabe, ekiagera ebiichire ase enkoro, nabio omonwa ogokwana." 
Luke6:46 “Nase ki mokondoka Omonene, Omonene, na inwe timori gokora aya ngoteba?" 
Luke6:47 Kera omonto ogocha asende, na koigwa amang’ana aane, na koyakora, nimborokie buna are:" 
Luke6:48 Nigo agwekaine nomonto oagachete enyomba, agakunya gochia inse mono, akabeka oboroso bwaye igoro ase egetare. Ekero etoigo yachia gocha, eooro egaaka enyomba eria ne chinguru, tiyanyara koyenyegeria, ekiagera oboroso bwaye bwaagachetwe igoro ase egetare." 
Luke6:49 Nere oyokoigwa otari gokora iga, nigo agwekaine nomonto oagachete enyomba igoro ase amaroba, etabegetwe oboroso. Nabo eooro ekayeaka ne chinguru, ekagwa bwango, na okogwa kw’enyomba eria gokaba okonene.”" 
Luke7:1 Agachia gokoora amang’ana aye onsi ekero abanto bamoigwete, agasoa Kapernaumu." 
Luke7:2 Omosomba oyomo bw’omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana konya onyarekire ang’e nogokwa; ere nomonto anchete mono. 
Luke7:3 Agachia koigwa amang’ana igoro ya Yeso, agatoma asare abagaaka b’Abayahudi komoboria ache agwenie omosomba oye." 
Luke7:4 Na barabwo bagachia goika ase Yeso, bakamosorora, bakabora, “Nagwenerete omokorere ring’ana eri," 
Luke7:5 ekiagera nanchete egesaku giaito, naende natoagacherete esinagogi yaito.”" 
Luke7:6 Yeso akagenda amo nabarabwo. Goika agachia koba tari are ase enyomba yaye, oria omotang’ani bw’abarwani agatoma abasani asare, okomotebia, “Omonene, tibwerosia, ekiagera inche tinyisaini aye orasoe inse y’ekerama kiane." 
Luke7:7 Ase ayio nigo neroche ng’a tinyisaini gocha asore; korende kwana ring’ana rioka, na omosomba one nagwene." 
Luke7:8 Naki inche nomonto mbekire inse ase okobua, naende ninde nabarwani inse yane. Kondatebie oyo: Genda, ogenda, na oyonde: Inchuo, ocha; na omosomba one: Kora iga, okora.”" 
Luke7:9 Yeso agachia koigwa aya, agakumia asare, akeonchorera omoganda orenge komotunyana, akabora, “Nabatebirie: Nonya nase Abaisraeli tindanyora okwegena okore buna oko.”" 
Luke7:10 Nabo baria batometwe bagachia koirana nyomba mwaye, bakanyora omosomba oria otimokire." 
Luke7:11 Nyuma ase aya akagenda omochie okorokwa Naini; aborokigwa baye bakagenda amo nere, na abanto abange." 
Luke7:12 Nabo, agachia goika ang’e ase egeita ki’omochie, rora, agwo nkiarengeo egetondo kebogoirie gocha isiko, omwana omomoima ase ng’ina, na ng’ina nomoboraka orenge, na abanto abange b’omochie mbarenge amo nere." 
Luke7:13 Na ekero Omonene achia komorora akamororera amabera, akamotebia, “Torera!”" 
Luke7:14 Akagenda ang’e, agakuna ekige; ababogoria ekige bagatenena. Erio agakwana, “Omomura, nagotebirie, imoka!”" 
Luke7:15 Omonto oria egetondo akaboka, agaikaransa, agachaka gokwana. Yeso akamomoa ng’ina." 
Luke7:16 Omoondoko okabwata bonsi, bagatogia, Nyasae, bakabora, “Omobani omonene oorokire ase egati yaito!” Na “Nyasae ocheire abanto baye!”" 
Luke7:17 Chinkuma chiaye chigasarera ase ense yonsi ya Boyahudi, na ense yonsi yaetanaine." 
Luke7:18 Aborokigwa ba Yohana bakamotebia aya onsi. 
Luke7:19 Yohana akarangeria babere ase aborokigwa baye, akabatoma ase Omonene komoboria, “Aye naye oria ogocha, gose toganye omoao?”" 
Luke7:20 Ekero abanto abwo baikire asare, bakamotebia, “Yohana Omobatisi ototomire asore, okobora: Aye naye oria ogocha, gose toganye omoao?”" 
Luke7:21 Ase engaki eria akagwenia abanto abange abarenge namarwaire, na emechando, na babwatire nebirecha ebibe; na abange abarenge emeuko akabaramokia amaiso abo, bakarora." 
Luke7:22 Akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Genda motebie Yohana ayamwarora na ayamwaigwa: Abarenge emeuko nkorora bare, abarenge amagata ngotaara bare, abarenge noborwaire bwa ukoma basibekire, abarenge emetino nkoigwa bare, abare ebitondo nkobokigwa bare, na abataka nkoranderigwa bare amang’ana amaya." 
Luke7:23 Nasesenirie onde bwensi otagochiri nainche.” 
Luke7:24 Na abatomwa baria ba Yohana bachia kogenda, agachaka gotebia omoganda igoro ya Yohana, “Inki mwachiete korora aria ase erooro? Egetonto gekonyegerigwa nembeo?" 
Luke7:25 Ninki mwachiete korora? Nomonto oboyirie chianga chinterere? Rigereria, abakweboyia chianga chingiya mono, na koria obwansu bw’omogoko, nigo bare ase chinyomba chi’abaruoti." 
Luke7:26 Ninki mwachiete korora? Omobani? Ee, nabatebirie: Oyore omonene kobua omobani," 
Luke7:27 ekiagera oyio nere amang’ana aya arikire igoro yaye,” “Rigereria, inche natomire omotomwa one ase obosio bwao, oyo oratang’ane koroisia enchera yao." 
Luke7:28 Nigo nkobatebia: Ase baria baiboire nabakungu, mobani onde taratoka ore omonene kobua Yohana, korende oyore omoke ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae nomonene komobua.”" 
Luke7:29 (Abanto bonsi na abarusia ebango bagachia koigwa aya, bakaorokia oboronge bwa Nyasae, ekiagera babatisetwe ase ebatiso ya Yohana;" 
Luke7:30 korende Abafarisai na abanto b’amachiko bagakana omoroberio o Nyasae asebare abanyene, ekiagera tibabatisetwe na Yohana.)" 
Luke7:31 Omonene akabora, “Ninki ndagwekanie abanto b’ekegori eke? Barabwo ninki bagwekaine?" 
Luke7:32 Nigo bagwekaine nabana baikaransete ase echiiro, bakorangerania, bakobora,” “Twababugeirie ebiroria, na inwe timotengeti; tweumirie, na inwe timorereti." 
Luke7:33 Naki Yohana Omobatisi nigo achete, tare koria omogati, gose tare konywa edivai; na inwe mogoteba: Nabwatire nekerecha." 
Luke7:34 Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ochire, okoria na konywa, na inwe mogoteba: Rora, nomonto omoribobe, ogotinda edivai, omosani bw’ababangi ebango na abanyene ebibe!" 
Luke7:35 Korende obong’aini bwa Nyasae bwamanyekanire koba oboronge ase abana baye bonsi.” 
Luke7:36 Omonto oyomo bw’Abafarisai akamogania ache koria endagera amo nere. Agasoa ase enyomba y’Omofarisai oria, agaikaransa ase endagera." 
Luke7:37 Na rora, omokungu oyomo ase omochie oria, oyorenge omonyene ebibe, agachia konyora amang’ana ng’a oikaransire ase enyomba y’Omofarisai oria, akarenta echuba ye rigena rirabu ere namaguta e rimisu rigiya," 
Luke7:38 agatenena korwa nyuma, ang’e namagoro aye, okorera. Agachaka komoiyereria amariga aye ase amagoro aye, na koyatinyia netukia y’omotwe oye, okonyunyunta amagoro aye, na koyaaka amaguta aria." 
Luke7:39 Omofarisai, oria omorangeretie, agachia koyarora akeboria ase omoyo oye ime, ogoteba, “Omonto oyo, onye nomobani orenge, anga namomanya oyo ng’a nere ng’o, gose mokungu ki oyo okomokuna, ng’a nomonyene ebibe.”" 
Luke7:40 Yeso akamotebia, “Simion, ninde ne ring’ana nkogotebia.” Akabora, “Omworokia, kwana.”" 
Luke7:41 “Omonto oyomo omorua singo orenge nabasira babere; oyomo omoriete esira ye chidinari amagana atano, na oyo o kabere emerongo etano." 
Luke7:42 Barabwo tibarenge na gento bagoakana. Akabaabera bonsi babere. Gaki, ase abwo, ning’o oramwanche kobua?”" 
Luke7:43 Simion akairaneria, “Igo ndabore ng’a, noria bwaberetwe ebinge.” Yeso akamotebia, “Kwanachire boronge.”" 
Luke7:44 Akeonchorera omokungu oria, agatebia Simion, “Kwarorire omokungu oyo? Inasoa mwao, tikwang’a amache ay’ogwesibia amagoro, korende oyo osibirie amagoro aane namariga aye, na koyatinyia netukia y’omotwe oye." 
Luke7:45 Tonyunyunteti, korende ere korwa ekero nasoete aa tatigete konyunyunta amagoro aane." 
Luke7:46 Tong’ageti omotwe one amaguta, korende ere ong’akire amagoro aane amaguta agotioka buya." 
Luke7:47 Ase engencho eyio nagotebirie, obwanchani bwaye bworokirie ng’a ebibe biaye ebinge biabeirwe; ere oyokwaberwa ebike nigo anchete ake.”" 
Luke7:48 Agatebia omokungu oria, “Kwabeirwe ebibe biao.”" 
Luke7:49 Na baria baikaransete amo nere bagachaka goteba ase emioyo yabo ime, “Nere ng’o oyo oranyare kwabera ebibe?”" 
Luke7:50 Agatebia omokungu oria, “Okwegena kwao kwagotooririe; genda nomorembe.”" 
Luke8:1 Nyuma ase aya, akaba ngoetanana are ase emechie na ebichie, okorandia na kobatebia amang’ana amaya ay’oboruoti bwa Nyasae. Na baria ikomi na babere nigo barenge amo nere," 
Luke8:2 na abakungu bande ababwatire nebirecha ebibe bakagwenigwa nere: Mariamu ore korokwa Magidalena, oria orusetigwe ebirecha bitano na bibere," 
Luke8:3 na Yoana moka Kusa, omorendi bwe Herode, na Susana, na abande abange. Abwo nigo barenge kobakorera ne chinibo chiabo." 
Luke8:4 Ekero omoganda omonene osangererekanete, na abanto ba kera omochie bakamochiera, agakwana ase omoreng’anio:" 
Luke8:5 “Omobusuri akamanora kogenda kobusura embusuro yaye: Ekero akobusura, echinde chikagwa enchera ensemo, chigatiringwa namagoro, chinyoni chia igoro chigachiria." 
Luke8:6 Na echinde chikagwa ase egetare, chikamera, chikoma ase okomocha amache." 
Luke8:7 Na echinde chikagwa ase amagwa ime, na amagwa aria agakina amo na chirochio, agachimiga." 
Luke8:8 Na echinde chikagwa ase amaroba amaya, chikamera, chikama rigana.” Ekero are kobatebia aya, agaaka eriogi, akabora, “Oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe.”" 
Luke8:9 Aborokigwa baye bakamoboria, “Omoreng’anio oyio ninki ogoteba?”" 
Luke8:10 Agateba, “Inwe mwaeirwe komanya obobisi bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae; korende abande nabatebigwe ase emereng’anio, erinde okorora barore, korende tibarora, naende okoigwa baigwe, korende tibamanya." 
Luke8:11 Omoreng’anio noro oyo: Embusuro nering’ana ria Nyasae. 
Luke8:12 Baria b’enchera ensemo, nabwo baikire koriigwa; erio Saitani ochicha, na korusia ring’ana riria ase chinkoro chiabo, erinde tibacha kwegena batooreke." 
Luke8:13 Na baria bare ase egetare nabwo baria bakoigwa ring’ana, baribwata nomogoko, korende barabwo tibari nemeri, begena ase ekero egeke, na ekero ki’ogoteemwa beatanana." 
Luke8:14 Na echio chiagwete ase amagwa, aba nabwo bakoriigwa, na barabwo kobakogenderera bamigwa nokorengereria kw’enibo, na omogoko bw’ense eye, tibakwama ase ogoikerania." 
Luke8:15 Na echinde chire ase amaroba amaya; aba nabwo bare ne chinkoro chingiya naende echi’ekeene, bakoigwa ring’ana, baribwata, bama okwama noboremereria." 
Luke8:16 “Omonto onde tari ogotongia etaya na koyemumeka negento, gose koyebeka nyaro y’oborere; korende nigo akoyebeka igoro ase ekebekerero kiaye, erinde abagosoa barore oborabu." 
Luke8:17 Ekiagera ring’ana tiriri ribisegete, ritache koorokigwa, gose eria bobisi ritache komanyekana maiso marore." 
Luke8:18 Mwerende gaki inwe buna mokoigwa, ekiagera ere oyobwate naegwe, korende oyotabwati, naurwe nonya nkeria arengereretie abwate.”" 
Luke8:19 Ng’ina na bamura bamwabo bakamochiera, korende tibanyara komoika ang’e ase engencho y’omoganda." 
Luke8:20 Akairerwa amang’ana agatebigwa, “Nyoko na bamura bamino mbateneine isiko, baganetie kororana naye.”" 
Luke8:21 Korende akabatebia, “Baba na bamura baminto nabwo aba abakoigwa ring’ana ria Nyasae na korikora.”" 
Luke8:22 Rituko erimo akariina obwato, ere na aborokigwa baye, akabatebia, “Twamboke gochia ng’umbu y’enyancha.” Bakamanora." 
Luke8:23 Kobachia kogenda, akarara chitoro; omwaga ogacha, na emerindo ase enyancha, obwato bogachaka goichorwa namache, bakaba ase emechando." 
Luke8:24 Bakamochiera, bakamotura, bakabora, “Omonene, Omonene, ngosira tore.” Akaboka, agatogonyera omwaga na emerindo y’amache, na birobio bigakira, gokaba ogotoerera." 
Luke8:25 Akabatebia, “Okwegena kwaino, ng’ai kore?” Bakairoka, bagakumia bagatebania, “Oyo nere ng’o, ogochika nonya nomwaga na enyancha, bikomoigwera?”" 
Luke8:26 Bagaika engegu y’ense y’Abageraseni, erigereretie Galili." 
Luke8:27 Agachia goika engegu, akaumerana nomonto oyomo bw’omochie oria, obwatire nebirecha; na ase amatuko amange tarenge kweboyia chianga, tarenge komenya nyomba, otatiga ase chimbeera." 
Luke8:28 Agachia korora Yeso, agaaka egeturi, akagwa ase obosio bwaye, agakwana neriogi rinene, okobora, “Inaki inde naye, Yeso, Omwana o Nyasae ore Igoro Mono? Nagosabire, tonchanda.”" 
Luke8:29 Naki konya ochikire ekerecha keria ki’eubi gesoke korwa ase omonto oria. (Ekiagera ebiro ebinge nigo kiare komobwata; nonya orenge gosibwa nebinyuri ne chingataare na korendwa, nigo arenge kobutora ebisibo biria oirwa nekerecha keria goika ase erooro.)" 
Luke8:30 Yeso akamoboria, “Naki okorokwa?” Akairaneria, “Elegioni”, ekiagera ebirecha ebinge biamosoete." 
Luke8:31 Bikamosorora tabichika bigende goika ase eora entambe. 
Luke8:32 Ndiarengeo riicho rinene rie chimbeche, chiare korisia ase egetunwa, bikamosorora abie ribaga bichisoe. Akabia ribaga." 
Luke8:33 Ebirecha biria bigasoka korwa ase omonto oria, bigasoa chimbeche. Riicho riria rigatirimboka bwango gochia ase egeturunkano goika chikagwa enyancha ime, chikarimera." 
Luke8:34 Abarisia bagachia korora ayio, bagatama, bakararia amang’ana ase omochie na ebichie." 
Luke8:35 Abanto bagasoka barore amang’ana aorokire; bagachiera Yeso, bakarora omonto oria orusetigwe ebirecha biria oikaransete ase amagoro a Yeso obegete chianga, ore nebirengererio ebironge, bakairoka." 
Luke8:36 Na baria bayaroche bakabatebia buna oria obwatire nebirecha agwenetigwe. 
Luke8:37 Naboigo abanto bonsi b’ense y’Abageraseni bakamoboria arue asebare, ekiagera basoetwe nokoiroka okonene. Erio akariina obwato, akairana." 
Luke8:38 Na omonto oria orusetigwe ebirecha akamosorora abe amo nere, korende Yeso akamokania, akabora," 
Luke8:39 “Irana nka bwoo orarie amang’ana amanene aya Nyasae agokoreire.” Akagenda bwoye, akararia ase omochie omogima amang’ana amanene aya Yeso amokoreire." 
Luke8:40 Yeso agachia koirana, omosangererekano okamogokera, ekiagera abanto bonsi bamoganyete." 
Luke8:41 Omonto oyomo, erieta riaye Yairo, omotang’ani bw’esinagogi, agacha, akagwa ase amagoro a Yeso, akamosorora asoe nyomba mwaye," 
Luke8:42 ekiagera narenge nomoiseke, omwana omomoima, konya okoorire emiaka ikomi na ebere, na ere nigo arenge ang’e nogokwa. Ekero Yeso arenge kogenda abanto bakaba bakomomiga‐miga." 
Luke8:43 Naende omokungu oyomo oyorenge noborwaire bw’okorua amanyinga ase engaki y’emiaka ikomi na ebere, osiareire ebinto bionsi ebiarenge nabio ase abarwaria, tanyara kogwenigwa nonde." 
Luke8:44 Ere agatunyana Yeso korwa nyuma, agakuna omokoba bw’eanga yaye; erio kegima amanyinga aye agakama." 
Luke8:45 Yeso akaboria, “Ning’o onkuna?” Ekero abanto bonsi bagakana, Petero na baria barenge amo nere bakamotebia, “Omonene, omoganda nigo ogoetanaine na gokomiga.”" 
Luke8:46 Yeso agateba, “Omonto onkunire, ekiagera naigure ng’a chinguru chiandure.”" 
Luke8:47 Omokungu oria ekero achia korora ng’a tabisekaneti, agacha okoiguswa, akamogwera, na ase amasio ’abanto bonsi akamworokia engencho yagera omokuna, naende buna agwenetigwe ara rimo." 
Luke8:48 Akamotebia, “Omoiseke one, okwegena kwao gwakogwenirie; genda nomorembe.”" 
Luke8:49 Erio kagokwana, omonto agacha korwa ase enyomba y’oria omotang’ani bw’esinagogi, akamotebia, “Enyaroka yao yakure, torosia omworokia naende.”" 
Luke8:50 Yeso agachia koigwa aya, erio akamoiraneria, “Toiroka; egene rioka, ere nagwenigwe.”" 
Luke8:51 Agachia goika nyomba, tancha monto onde asoe amo nere otatiga Petero, na Yohana, na Yakobo, na ise na ng’ina b’omwana oria." 
Luke8:52 Na abanto bonsi nigo barenge komoreera, bakweng’ereria, korende Yeso akabora, “Timoreera, ekiagera takweti, korende nigo araire.”" 
Luke8:53 Bakamosekerera, bamanyete ng’a okure." 
Luke8:54 Ere agasokia bonsi gochia isiko, akamobwata okoboko kwaye, agateba, “Omwana, imoka!”" 
Luke8:55 Omoika oye okairana, agatenena erio kegima. Yeso akabachika bamoe endagera arie." 
Luke8:56 Abaibori baye bagakumia, mono, korende akabachika tibatebia monto ayakoreka." 
Luke9:1 Akarangeria baria ikomi na babere akabaa chinguru na okobua igoro ase ebirecha bionsi na ase okogwenia amarwaire. 
Luke9:2 Akabatoma korandia oboruoti bwa Nyasae na kogwenia abarwaire. 
Luke9:3 Akabatebia, “Timobogoria gento ase orogendo rwaino, nonya nenyimbo, gose esaro, gose omogati, gose chibesa; naende timoba ne chianga ibere." 
Luke9:4 Naende enyomba ende yonsi morasoe, mobeere aroro goika moruo." 
Luke9:5 Naende abatabaroiseti, komogosoka korwa omochie oria, mokong’onte orotu rw’amagoro aino, erinde robe kirori asebare.”" 
Luke9:6 Bakagenda, bagaetanana ase emechie, bakorandia enchili, na kogwenia abanto chinsemo chionsi." 
Luke9:7 Bono Herode omoruoti akaigwa onsi ayakorekire, agaichanigwa mono, ekiagera abande baare goteba ng’a Yohana obokigwe korwa ase abakure," 
Luke9:8 na abande ng’a n’Elija oorokire, na abande ng’a noyomo bw’ababani abakoro obokire." 
Luke9:9 Herode agateba, “Yohana inamonachete omotwe, korende ning’o oyo rende naigure amang’ana are buna aya?” Akarigia komorora." 
Luke9:10 Abatomwa baria ekero bachia koirana bagatebia Yeso amang’ana onsi ayabakorire. Erio akabaira, akagenda amo nabarabwo bobisi gochia ase omochie okorokwa Bethisaida." 
Luke9:11 Emeganda egachia korora, ekamotunyana, na ere akabaroisia, agakwana nabarabwo amang’ana ’oboruoti bwa Nyasae, akagwenia abarenge nokogania gw’okogwenigwa." 
Luke9:12 Rigachaka kogoroba, na baria ikomi na babere bakamochiera, bakamotebia, “Tiga omoganda ogende goika ase ebichie ne chinsemo chietanaine, banyore aase bakorara amo nendagera, ekiagera aiga nigo tore aase egesomo.”" 
Luke9:13 Akabatebia, “Inwe bae endagera!” Bakabora, “Titobwati kende kobua emegati etano ne chinswe ibere. Gose togende kogorera abanto aba bonsi endagera?”" 
Luke9:14 Naki mbarengeo abasacha chilifu isano iga. Agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Baikaransie abanto aba ase ebiombe, na kera ekeombe koreng’ana emerongo etano.”" 
Luke9:15 Bagakora boigo, bakabaikaransia bonsi." 
Luke9:16 Akabogoria emegati eria etano ne chinswe chiria ibere, akarigereria igoro, akabisesenia, akabisamunyora, akaa aborokigwa babiterekere abanto." 
Luke9:17 Bonsi bakaria, bakaigota. Na ebisamunye biria biatigarete bigasangererigwa, bigaichora ebitonga ikomi na bibere." 
Luke9:18 Agachia koba ngosaba are ere bweka, aborokigwa baye nigo barenge amo nere, akababoria, “Abanto nigo bakobora ng’a ninche ng’o?”" 
Luke9:19 Bakairaneria, “Yohana Omobatisi; abande Elija, na abande ng’a oyomo ase ababani abakoro obokire.”" 
Luke9:20 Akababoria, “Nainwe nigo mokobora ng’a ninche ng’o?” Petero akairaneria, “Kristo o Nyasae.”" 
Luke9:21 Akabachika na kobakania tibatebia monto ring’ana eri," 
Luke9:22 ogoteba, “Negwenerete Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto anyore ogochandeka ase chinchera chinyinge, na kwangwa nabagaaka, na abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko, naende aitwe, na ase rituko ria gatato naboke.”" 
Luke9:23 Agatebia bonsi, “Oyorigetie gontunyana, tiga ekaane ere omonyene, etweke omosalaba oye kera rituko antunyane." 
Luke9:24 Naki onde bwensi orarigie koegera obogima bwaye oyio nabosirie; na oyorasirie obogima bwaye ase engencho yane, oyio naboegere." 
Luke9:25 Ekiagera inki keragwenere omonto karanyore ense yonsi, ko esirie gose gwesaria ere omonyene?" 
Luke9:26 Naki kera omonto orandorere obosooku inche na amang’ana aane, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto kagocha ase obonene bwaye, namororere obosooku ase Ise na ase abamalaika abachenu." 
Luke9:27 Korende nabatebirie ekeene, mbare abanto ase aba bateneine aa, abataigwe amakweri nonya ng’ake, goika barore oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Luke9:28 Agachia koba amatuko ang’e atano na atato nyuma ase amang’ana aya, akaira Petero, na Yohana, na Yakobo, agatiira gochia egetunwa igoro gosaba." 
Luke9:29 Ekaba kagosaba, ekieni ki’obosio bwaye gekaonchoka, ne chianga chiaye chikaba chindabu, chikameka‐meka." 
Luke9:30 Naende rora, abanto babere bagakwana nere, nabwo Musa na Elija." 
Luke9:31 Abwo barorekanete ase obonene, na gokwana amang’ana ay’ogokwa kwaye, aya agwenerete goikerania Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:32 Petero na baria barenge amo nere, konya babwatirwe ne chitoro, korende nigo batagesetie, bakarora obonene bwaye, na abanto baria babere bateneine amo nere." 
Luke9:33 Ekero abanto aba baare korua asare, Petero agatebia Yeso, “Omonene, imbuya intwe koba aiga; tokore ebigutu bitato, ekemo ekiao, na ekemo ekia Musa, na ekemo eki’Elija”; tamanyete aya agokwana." 
Luke9:34 Ekero agokwana amang’ana aya riire rigacha rikababisia, bakairoka kobachia gosoa ase riire." 
Luke9:35 Eriogi rigasoka korwa ase riire riria rigoteba, “Oyo n’Omwana one, Omochorwa one; moigwere ere!”" 
Luke9:36 Ekero eriogi riakwanire, Yeso akarorekana ore bweka. Na barabwo bagakira, tibatebia monto ase amatuko aria ring’ana rinde rionsi ri’ayio baroche." 
Luke9:37 Rituko ria kabere ekero baare gotirimboka korwa ase egetunwa, omoganda omonene okaumerana nere." 
Luke9:38 Naende rora, omonto oyomo ase omoganda oria agaaka egeturi, okobora, “Omworokia, nagosabire, origererie omomura one, ekiagera ere nomwana one omomoima." 
Luke9:39 Na rora ekerecha nigo gekomobwata, na ere bwango nigo akorera, naende kemogaragaria, erinde asokia amasombogoku, korende tikeri komorua otatiga ase okomosionora mono." 
Luke9:40 Nasaba aborokigwa bao bageserie, korende tibanyara.”" 
Luke9:41 Yeso akairaneria, “Inwe ekegori getari nokwegena, naende ekebe, nimbe amo nainwe goika ririri, na koremereria nainwe? Renta omwana oo aiga.”" 
Luke9:42 Agachia koba nkomochiera are ekerecha keria gekamoigusia na komoiyeria. Yeso agakania ekerecha keria, akagwenia omwana oria, akamoirania ase ise." 
Luke9:43 Abanto bonsi bagakumia ase okobua kwa Nyasae. Korende ekero bonsi babete nogokumia ase amang’ana onsi akorete, agatebia aborokigwa baye," 
Luke9:44 “Tiga amang’ana aya asoe ase amato aino, ekiagera Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ngochia are kobekwa ase amaboko ’abanto.”" 
Luke9:45 Korende tibamanya ring’ana riria, rikaba ndiabiseka asebare, erinde tibarimanya. Bakaba nobwoba komoboria engencho ye ring’ana riria." 
Luke9:46 Okoengererania kogatuboka ase egati yabo ng’a ning’o asebare ore omonene kobua abande. 
Luke9:47 Korende ekero Yeso achia komanya ebirengererio bie chinkoro chiabo, akabogoria omwana, akamobeka ang’e asare," 
Luke9:48 akabatebia, “Onde bwensi oramwanche omwana oyo ase erieta riane, onyanchire inche; na oyoranyanche inche, omwanchire ere oyontomete. Ekiagera ere oyore omoke ase egati yaino, oyio nere omonene.”" 
Luke9:49 Yohana akairaneria, “Omworokia, ntwarora omonto ogoseria ebirecha ase erieta riao, tokamokania, ekiagera tabwataini naintwe.”" 
Luke9:50 Korende Yeso akamotebia, “Timomokania, ekiagera oyo otari mamincha yaino nigo are ensemo yaino.”" 
Luke9:51 Ekero amatuko aye aika ang’e kogenda igoro, akamanora kogenda Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:52 Agatoma abatomwa komotang’anera, bagende na gosoa ase agachie k’Abasamaria, bamoroiserie aase." 
Luke9:53 Abanto b’omochie oria tibamoroisia, ekiagera arenge kogenda Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:54 Aborokigwa baye Yakobo na Yohana bagachia korora, aya, bakabora, “Omonene, norigetie toborie omorero oike korwa igoro obasirie [buna Elija akorete]?”" 
Luke9:55 Akeonchora, akabakania. [Akabora, “Timomanyeti nomoika ore naki more noro." 
Luke9:56 Ekiagera Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto tachete gosiria obogima bw’abana ba mwanyabanto, korende kobotooria.”] Bakagenda ase agachie kande." 
Luke9:57 Ekero baare kogenda nchera omonto oyomo akamotebia, “Ningotunyane aande onsi ase okogenda.”" 
Luke9:58 Yeso akamotebia, “Ebibwe mbire namakuruma, ne chinyoni chia igoro nchire nebiswa, korende Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto tari naase akobeka omotwe oye.”" 
Luke9:59 Agatebia oyonde, “Ntunyana!” Ere akabora, “Omonene, ritang’ani ing’a ribaga ngende gotindeka tata.”" 
Luke9:60 Akamotebia, “Tiga abakure batindeke abakure babo, korende aye genda orandie oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Luke9:61 Naende oyonde nere akabora, “Omonene, ningotunyane, korende ritang’ani ing’a ribaga mbaakere ng’a batigare buya abanto b’enyomba yane.”" 
Luke9:62 Yeso akamotebia, “Omonto tari orabeke okoboko kwaye ase obokombe bwe chieri, naende arigererie nyuma, oragwenere ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Luke10:1 Nyuma ase aya Omonene agachora abande emerongo etano na ebere, akabatoma babere babere bamotang’anere kogenda kera omochie na kera aase arengereretie kogenda ere omonyene." 
Luke10:2 Akabatebia, “Rigesa nerinene, korende abakori emeremo nabake; gaki mosabe Omonene bwe rigesa atome abakori emeremo ase rigesa riaye." 
Luke10:3 Bwatia enchera; rigereria, nabatomire inwe buna chimanwa chie ching’ondi gati‐gati ye chisese chi’orosana." 
Luke10:4 Timobogoria ekemoya, gose esaro, gose ebikoroto; gose timokwania monto nchera." 
Luke10:5 Na enyomba ende yonsi morasoe, ritang’ani mobore: Omorembe obe ase enyomba eye." 
Luke10:6 Onye omonto bw’omorembe oreo, omorembe oino noikaranse asare; korende onye taibo, nobairanere inwe." 
Luke10:7 Mobeere ase enyomba eyio, morie na konywa ebi bakobaa, ekiagera omokori emeremo nagwenerete aegwe eng’eria yaye. Timoetanana enyomba ase enyomba." 
Luke10:8 Na omochie onde bwonsi morasoe, kobarabaroisie, karie eki barabae." 
Luke10:9 Mogwenie abarwaire abareo, batebie: Oboruoti bwa Nyasae bwabaikeire ang’e." 
Luke10:10 Kero kende gionsi mogosoa omochie, na barabwo batabaroiseti, soka korwa aroro, eta ase chinchera chiaye, motebe:" 
Luke10:11 Nonya norotu rw’omochie oino rwabwatereire amagoro aito twarwabusire asemore, korende manya aya, ng’a oboruoti bwa Nyasae bwaikire ang’e." 
Luke10:12 Nabatebirie, nabe aororo ase Sodomu ase rituko riria kobua omochie oria.”" 
Luke10:13 “Obobe nobwao, Korasin! Obobe nobwao, Bethisaida! Ekiagera onye mbiakoregete ase Turo na Sidoni ebikone bie chinguru ebiakoregete asemore, abanto b’aroro anga mbaonchogete kare na goikaransa babegete chianga chie chigunia na beagete ribu." 
Luke10:14 Korende nebe aororo ase Turo na Sidoni ase rituko riria ri’ekina kobua asemore. 
Luke10:15 Naye Kapernaumu, noimokererigwe igoro? Noche goikigwa goika Eora y’amakweri." 
Luke10:16 “Oyorabaigwere inwe, nanyigwere nainche, na ere oyorabaange inwe, onyangire nainche, na ere oyoranyange inche, omwangire ere oyontomete.”" 
Luke10:17 Baria emerongo etano na ebere bakairana nomogoko, bagateba, “Omonene, nonya nebirecha biatoigwereire ase erieta riao.”" 
Luke10:18 Akabatebia, “Naroche Saitani okogwa korwa igoro buna okomesa." 
Luke10:19 Rora, nabaeire okobua gotindacha ching’iti chionsi, na ebiuge, ne chinguru chionsi chi’oria omobisa; gose gento kende tikeri kerabaite." 
Luke10:20 Nonya nabo timogoka ase aya, ng’a ebirecha biabaigwereire, korende goka ekiagera amarieta aino arikirwe igoro.”" 
Luke10:21 Ase ekero keria Yeso agasasoka ase Omoika Omochenu, akabora, “Nakobakire aye Tata, Omonene o igoro na ense, ng’a kwabisire amang’ana aya ase abare nobong’aini ne chisemi, na koyamaanora ase abana abake. Ee, Tata, oko nakwo kwarenge ogwancha kwao okuya." 
Luke10:22 Naeirwe ebinto bionsi na Tata one; monto onde tari omomanyete Omwana gose nere ng’o, otatiga Tata, gose Tata nere ng’o, otatiga Omwana, na onde bwensi Omwana anchire komoorokeria.”" 
Luke10:23 Akeonchorera aborokigwa baye, akabatebia bobisi, “Nasesenirie amaiso aya arorire aya mwarorire inwe!" 
Luke10:24 Naki nabatebirie, ababani abange na abaruoti bakarigia korora aya mwarorire inwe, tibayarora, na koigwa aya mwaigure, tibayaigwa.”" 
Luke10:25 Na rora, omworokia bw’amachiko agatenena okomoteema, okobora, “Omworokia, inki ndakore nyore obogima bwa kare na kare?”" 
Luke10:26 Ere akamoboria, “Ase amachiko inki kerikire? Naki ogosoma?”" 
Luke10:27 Akairaneria, “Mwanche Omonene Nyasae oo nenkoro yao yonsi, na omoyo oo bwonsi, ne chinguru chiao chionsi, na obong’aini bwao bwonsi, na omogisangio oo buna bweanchete.”" 
Luke10:28 Akamotebia, “Kwairaneirie buya. Kora iga, nario orachie kare.”" 
Luke10:29 Omonto oria akarigia gwekora omonyene oboronge, akaboria Yeso, “Omogisangio one nere ng’o?”" 
Luke10:30 Yeso akairaneria, “Narenge omonto ore gotirimboka korwa Yerusalemu kogenda Yeriko. Ere akaumera abauri, na barabwo bakamoumokera, bakamorusia chianga, bakamoaka chingoma, bakagenda, bakamotiga oisire gokwa." 
Luke10:31 Ekaba agwo omokuani oyomo akaoroka, ogoeta ase enchera eria, akamorora, agaeta ensemo." 
Luke10:32 Na Omolawi boigo agachia goika aase aria, akamorora; nere agaeta ensemo." 
Luke10:33 Korende Omosamaria oyomo, kagoeta, agacha aase arenge; ere agachia komorora, akamororera amabera." 
Luke10:34 Nabo akamoika ang’e, akamoboa chingoma chiaye, akamoaka amaguta na edivai; akamoriinia ase etigere yaye igoro, akamoira ase enyomba y’abageni, akamorwaria." 
Luke10:35 Goika mambia yaye akarua chisiringi ibere, akaa omonyene enyomba, akamotebia: Morende buya; na kende gionsi orarue kobua, kondairane naende, ningoakane." 
Luke10:36 Naki rende oroche ase abaiga batato, norori orenge omogisangio oye ere oyogwete ase amaboko ’abauri?”" 
Luke10:37 Akabora, “Noria omororerete amabera.” Yeso akamotebia, “Genda naye okore boigo.”" 
Luke10:38 Bagachia koba nkogenda bare, agasoa ase agachie akamo, na omokungu oyomo, erieta riaye Martha, akamoroisia nyomba mwaye." 
Luke10:39 Ere narenge nomosubati omwabo ore korokwa Mariamu. Mariamu nigo aikaransete ase amagoro a Yeso, okoigwa amang’ana aye." 
Luke10:40 Korende Martha nigo arenge gochandeka ase ogokora okonge, akamochiera, akabora, “Omonene, torochi aye buna oyominto antigire ngokora kera egento inche bweka? Motebie ankonye.”" 
Luke10:41 Omonene akamoiraneria, “Martha, Martha, nigo okwerosia na gweichania ase engencho y’ebinto ebinge," 
Luke10:42 korende egento ekemo gioka keganeirie. Mariamu ochorire ensemo ere engiya, eye ataurwe nonde.”" 
Luke11:1 Ngosaba arenge aase gete. Gakoorire, oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye akamotebia, “Omonene, tworokie ogosaba buna Yohana orokereretie aborokigwa baye.”" 
Luke11:2 Akabatebia, “Komogosaba, teba iga:” “Tata [oito ore igoro], Erieta riao risikwe, Oboruoti bwao boche," 
Luke11:3 Otoe kera rituko endagera yaito. 
Luke11:4 Otwabere ebibe biaito, ekiagera intwe tokwabera kera oyomo otokorire bobe. Totoira ase ogoteemwa, [Korende ototoorie korwa ase oria omobe.”]" 
Luke11:5 Akabatebia, “Ning’o asemore ore nomosani oramochiere botuko gati amotebie: Mosani, ing’a singo emegati etato," 
Luke11:6 ekiagera omosani one ochire asende korwa orogendo, na inche tindi na gento nkomoa;" 
Luke11:7 na oria ore ime namoiranerie, na goteba: Tondosia, egesieri giasiekirwe, na inche amo nabana baane twararire borere, tinkonyara koimoka nkoe?" 
Luke11:8 Nabatebirie, nataimoka amoe ekiagera nomosani oye, korende ekiagera oria tari gotiga ogosaba, naimoke na komoa ebio bionsi arigetie." 
Luke11:9 Na inche nkobatebia nde inwe: Saba, namoegwe; rigia, namonyore; tura, namoigorerwe." 
Luke11:10 Ekiagera kera oyogosaba, nigo akoegwa, na ere oyokorigia, nigo akonyora, na ere oyogotura, nigo akoigorerwa." 
Luke11:11 Naki monto onde nare asemore oyore ise, na omwana oye amosabe omogati, Inee, namoe rigena? Gose karamosabe enswe, ase ribaga ri’enswe namoe eng’iti?" 
Luke11:12 Gose karamosabe rigena ri’engoko namoe ekeuge? 
Luke11:13 Onye inwe, abamore ababe, momanyete koa abana baino ebiegwa ebiya, Inee, Iso oino ore igoro takomenta mono kobaa bonsi, abakomosaba, Omoika Omochenu?”" 
Luke11:14 Bono ngoseria arenge ekerecha rimama. Ekero ekerecha keria giasokire, omonto oria rimama agakwana; abanto bagakumia." 
Luke11:15 Abande babo bagateba, “Nase Beelizebuli, omonene bw’ebirecha, akorusia ebirecha.”" 
Luke11:16 Abande ase okomoteema bakarigia aborokie egekone buna ekemanyererio korwa igoro. 
Luke11:17 Ere konya omanyire ebirengererio biabo, akabatebia, “Kera oboruoti kobwatananekanire borobwo obonyene nigo bogosareka, na enyomba yaatananekire ero enyene nigo ekogwa." 
Luke11:18 Naboigo Saitani karaatananeke ere omonyene, oboruoti bwaye naki boratenene? Naki inwe iga mogoteba ng’a nigo ngoseria ebirecha ase Beelizebuli." 
Luke11:19 Na inche onye ngoseria ebirecha ase Beelizebuli, Inee, abana baino nase ng’o bakobiseria? Ase engencho eyio, barabwo nababe abagambi baino." 
Luke11:20 Korende kondaserie ebirecha ase ekiara kia Nyasae, nabo oboruoti bwa Nyasae bwabacheire." 
Luke11:21 Omonto bwe chinguru ore nebinto bi’esegi, gakorenda enyomba yaye, enibo yaye nigo ekoba ase omorembe," 
Luke11:22 korende oyore ne chinguru kobua, ere karamochiere na komobua, nigo akomoura ebinto biaye bi’esegi bionsi ebiegenerete, na ebisakorwa biaye obiatanana." 
Luke11:23 Omonto otari amo nainche nigo are mamincha asende, na ere oyotari gosangereria amo nainche nigo agoserebania." 
Luke11:24 “Ekero ekerecha ki’eubi kiarure ase omonto, nigo kegoeta gati aase atari namache, gekorigia aase kegotimokera; getanyoreti kiabora: Ning’irane ase enyomba yane ase narwete." 
Luke11:25 Gakegocha, kiayenyora yaabusirwe, yaroisigwe." 
Luke11:26 Erio kiagenda, kiarentana ebirecha bitano na bibere binde ebire ebibe gokebua kerokio ekenyene. Birobio bigosoa na komenya aroro; okoba kw’omoerio kw’omonto oyio kwaba okobe kobua okwe ritang’ani.”" 
Luke11:27 Ekero agokwana aya, omokungu oyomo ase omoganda agaaka eriogi, akamotebia, “Nesesenirie enda yakobogoretie, ne chimbeere kwagongete!”" 
Luke11:28 Korende Yeso akabora, “Mbuya kobua, basesenirie abakoigwa ring’ana ria Nyasae na koribwata!”" 
Luke11:29 Ekero emeganda yamentekanete, agachaka gokwana, “Ekegori eke nekegori ekebe, gekorigia egekone buna ekemanyererio, korende tigekoegwa egekone otatiga eki’omobani Yona." 
Luke11:30 Naki buna Yona abete ekemanyererio ase abanto ba Nineva, naboigo Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto arache koba ase ekegori eke." 
Luke11:31 Eting’ana ya Irianyi netenene ase rituko ri’ekina amo nabanto b’ekegori eke; ere nabanachere ekina, ekiagera nigo arwete ase chinsinyo chi’ense anyare koigwa obong’aini bwa Sulemani; na rora, oyobuete Sulemani naiga are." 
Luke11:32 Abanto ba Nineva nabatenene ase rituko ri’ekina amo nabanto b’ekegori eke, na barabwo nabakenachere ekina, ekiagera baonchogete ase okorandia kwa Yona; na rora, oyobuete Yona naiga are." 
Luke11:33 “Omonto gatongirie etaya tari koyebeka ase ekenunchi gose ayemumeke negetonga, korende nigo akoyebeka igoro ase ekebekerero, erinde abagosoa barore oborabu." 
Luke11:34 Etaya y’omobere oo neriso riao; ekero eriso riao rire rigiya, omobere oo bwonsi nigo oichire noborabu; korende ekero eriso riao rire riibe, omobere oo bwonsi nigo oichire nomosunte." 
Luke11:35 Gaki renda, oborabu obwo bore ime yao tibocha koba omosunte." 
Luke11:36 Nabo omobere oo bwonsi korabe noborabu, ensemo ende teba omosunte, omobere oo noichore noborabu kegima, buna etaya ase amasase aye egwoka oborabu.”" 
Luke11:37 Ekero arenge gokwana, Omofarisai oyomo akamorangeria aragere amo nere. Agasoa, agaikaransa koragera." 
Luke11:38 Omofarisai oria agachia korora, agakumia ekiagera ataisabete ritang’ani atararagera." 
Luke11:39 Omonene akamotebia, “Bono inwe Abafarisai iga mogosibia egekombe na esani korwa isiko, korende ime yaino nigo moichire obouri na obobe." 
Luke11:40 Inwe abariri, ere oyokorete egia isiko, tari ere okorete nekia ime nakerokio?" 
Luke11:41 Korende karue esadaka y’ebire ime; naende rora, ebinto bionsi nebichenu asemore." 
Luke11:42 “Korende obobe nobwaino Abafarisai, ekiagera mokorua ensemo ya ikomi ye chiarare, na kera egesaku gie chinyeni, mogotiga oboronge na obwanchani bwa Nyasae. Naro aya nabagwenerete moyakore, motari gotiga ayande." 
Luke11:43 Obobe nobwaino, Abafarisai! Ekiagera mwanchete goikaransa aase e ritang’ani ase chisinagogi, na gokwanigwa ase chichiiro." 
Luke11:44 Obobe nobwaino! Ekiagera mogwekaine chimbeera chitari kororekana, na abanto baeta igoro yaye batamanyeti.”" 
Luke11:45 Omonto oyomo bw’amachiko akairaneria, akamotebia, “Omworokia, kogoteba aya, nigo ogotochaya naintwe.”" 
Luke11:46 Agateba, “Nainwe abanto b’amachiko, obobe nobwaino! Ekiagera mogotweka abanto chigurube chindito, na inwe abanyene timori gokuna chigurube echio nonya nase ekemo ki’ebiara biaino." 
Luke11:47 Obobe nobwaino! Ekiagera mokoagacha chimbeera chi’ababani, abwo chisokoro chiaino chiaitete." 
Luke11:48 Naboigo inwe mwabeire abarori na gwanchera ogokora gwe chisokoro chiaino, ekiagera nabwo babaitete, na inwe mokoagacha chimbeera chiabo." 
Luke11:49 Nase ayio Obong’aini bwa Nyasae nigo bwatebete: Nintome asebare ababani na abatomwa; baite abande babo na kobachanda," 
Luke11:50 erinde amanyinga ’ababani bonsi, ayaitegete korwa omochakano bw’ense naganigwe ase ekegori eke," 
Luke11:51 korwa amanyinga ’Abeli goika amanyinga a Zakaria; oria oiteretwe gati y’egesasimero ne Hekalu. Ee, nabatebirie, narigigwe ase ekegori eke." 
Luke11:52 Obobe nobwaino, inwe abanto b’amachiko! Ekiagera mwarusirie ekeigorero gie chisemi; inwe abanyene timwasoa, na baria abaare gosoa mwabatangire.”" 
Luke11:53 Agachia gosoka korwa aroro, aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai bagachaka komomiga namaborio amakong’u, na komochegia akwane igoro y’ebinto ebinge;" 
Luke11:54 bakomotega, banyore ring’ana korwa ase omonwa oye, erinde banyare komosoera." 
Luke12:1 Ekero ekio omosangererekano bw’abanto chilifu chinyinge bagachia gosangerereka goika bagatachana. Yeso agachaka gotebia aborokigwa baye ritang’ani, “Mwerende nememera y’Abafarisai, engencho yaye nobong’ainereria." 
Luke12:2 Korende ing’ana rinde tiriri rimumekeirie, ritache koorokigwa, gose eribisekanete ritache komanyekana." 
Luke12:3 Nabo onsi aya mogokwana ase omosunte, naigugwe ase omobaso; naro aya mokomonyererana ase ebinyomba ime nararigwe igoro ase ebirama." 
Luke12:4 “Nabatebirie inwe abasani baane, timoiroka abwo bagoita omobere, na nyuma ase ayio tibari negento baranyare gokora kobua." 
Luke12:5 Korende nimbakurere oyo morairoke: Moiroke oria ore nokobua, nyuma ase ogoita omonto omoruta ase omorero o kare na kare. Ee, nabatebirie, moiroke oria!" 
Luke12:6 Inee! Chinchiro isano tichiri koonigwa ase chibesa ibere? Naende nonya nakamo kabo tikari kwebwa ase obosio bwa Nyasae. 
Luke12:7 Nonya nechitukia chi’emetwe yaino chiabarirwe chionsi. Timoiroka; inwe imobuete rigori rie chinchiro chinyinge. 
Luke12:8 “Inche nigo nkobatebia, kera oyomo oranyatore ase mwanyabanto, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nere namwatore ase abamalaika ba Nyasae;" 
Luke12:9 korende oyorankane ase mwanyabanto, nere nakanwe ase abamalaika ba Nyasae." 
Luke12:10 Na kera oyomo orakwane ring’ana riibe igoro ase Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto, naaberwe; korende ere oyorarame Omoika Omochenu takwaberwa." 
Luke12:11 Naende kobakobaira ase chisinagogi, na ase abagambi, na ase abare nokobua, timochandeka buna morachie koiraneria gose buna morakwane," 
Luke12:12 ekiagera Omoika Omochenu noborokererie ensa eyio eyio ayamogwenerete gokwana.” 
Luke12:13 Omonto oyomo ase omoganda akamotebia, “Omworokia, tebia momura ominto anyatanere omwando oito.”" 
Luke12:14 Akamoboria, “Omonto oyo, ning’o ombekire koba omogambi gose omwatanani igoro asemore?”" 
Luke12:15 Akabatebia, “Rigereria, erende korwa ase okogania okobe, ekiagera obogima bw’omonto tibori ase obonge bw’enibo yaye abwate.”" 
Luke12:16 Akabatebia omoreng’anio, akabora, “Omogondo bw’omonto omonda okama mono." 
Luke12:17 Agachaka korengereria ase omoyo oye ime: Inki ngokora, ekiagera tindi naase nkobeka okwama kwane?" 
Luke12:18 Akabora: Ninkore iga: Nintagore ebiage biane, mbiaagache ebinene kobua, na aroro ningache endagera yane yonsi, na ebinto biane." 
Luke12:19 Erio nintebie omoyo one: Aye omoyo, nore nenibo enyinge kwegacheire emonga y’emiaka emenge; timoka, orie, onywe, ogoke." 
Luke12:20 Korende Nyasae akamotebia: Omoriri oyo, obotuko obo omoyo oo oraganigwa, na enibo kwegacheire ang’e, neya ng’o erabe?" 
Luke12:21 Naboigo are ere oyokwegachera emonga omonyene, na ere tari omonda ase Nyasae.”" 
Luke12:22 Agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Ase aya nabatebirie, timochandeka igoro y’obogima bwaino, eki morarie; gose ase emebere yaino, eki morabeke." 
Luke12:23 Ekiagera obogima nobonene kobua endagera, na omobere nomonene kobua chianga." 
Luke12:24 Rigereria ebigonkoru, tibiri gosimeka, tibiri kogesa, tibiri nemonga gose ekiage, korende Nyasae nigo akobirageria. Na inwe imobuete rigori rie chinyoni!" 
Luke12:25 Ning’o ore asemore oranyare gwechanda komenta ekerengo gi’okoboko okomo ase obotambe bwaye? 
Luke12:26 Ase ayio, onye timori konyara gokora nonya ne ring’ana erire rike buna eri, nase ki mogwechandera amang’ana ande?" 
Luke12:27 Rigereria ebisicha buna bigokina; tibiri gokora emeremo gose gwesisa, korende nabatebirie, nonya n’Sulemani ase obonene bwaye bwonsi tabegete chianga buna ekemo ki’ebi." 
Luke12:28 Onye Nyasae okoboyia obonyansi bw’egetii oboreo rero, na ankio botugutwe ase omorero, Inee, takomenta kobaboyia inwe abamore nokwegena ogoke?" 
Luke12:29 Inwe, timorigia eki morarie, gose eki moranywe; gose timoba nomoyo bw’ogwechanda." 
Luke12:30 Naki abanto b’ebisaku bi’ense nigo bakorigia ebinto ebio bionsi, korende Iso oino omanyire ng’a moganetie ebio bionsi," 
Luke12:31 Korende rigia oboruoti bwa Nyasae, na ebinto ebio namomenterwe inwe." 
Luke12:32 “Timoiroka inwe abamore omoganda omoke, ekiagera Iso oino ororire buya kobaa oboruoti." 
Luke12:33 Oonia ebio more nabio, morue ebiegwa; mwekorere ebimoya bitari kogota amo nenibo etari gokea igoro, aase omoibi atagoika, gose ebigwankwa gosaria." 
Luke12:34 Ekiagera aase chinibo chiaino chire nao chinkoro chiaino chikoba. 
Luke12:35 “Tiga ebinema biaino biboyigwe, ne chitaya chiaino chioke;" 
Luke12:36 na inwe mobe buna abanto baganyete omonene obo, gakoirana korwa ase omoyega bw’enyangi, erinde kagocha na gotura, erio kegima bamoigorere." 
Luke12:37 Mbasesenirie abasomba baria ekero omonene obo agocha abanyore barendete. Ekeene nabatebirie: Neboyie, abaikaransie ase endagera, ache abakorere." 
Luke12:38 Naende karache ase oborendi bwa kabere gose oborendi bwa gatato, abanyore barendete, mbasesenirie abasomba baria." 
Luke12:39 Korende manya aya, onye omonyene enyomba namanyete ensa omoibi agocha, anga narendete, taiberwa." 
Luke12:40 Nainwe nabo, mobe ang’e, ekiagera ensa motakagereti, nero Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto arache.”" 
Luke12:41 Petero akamoboria, “Omonene, nintwe ogotebia omoreng’anio oyo, gose nase abanto bonsi?”" 
Luke12:42 Omonene akabora, “Ning’o rende ore omosomba omwegenwa, naende ore omong’aini, omonene oye arabeke igoro ase enyomba yaye yonsi, ae abanto endagera ekerengo kiabo ase ekero kegwenerete?" 
Luke12:43 Nasesenirie omosomba oria ekero omonene oye arache amonyore ogokora bo. 
Luke12:44 Ekeene nabatebirie, namobeke igoro ase ebi abwate bionsi." 
Luke12:45 Korende omosomba oria karatebe ase omoyo oye ime: Omonene one otebanire gocha, naende achake goaka abasomba bande, abasacha na abakungu, na koria, na konywa, na gotinda," 
Luke12:46 omonene bw’omosomba oria nachiche rituko atakagereti, na ensa atamanyeti, nigo aramonachane abe ebing’ese, namoe ensemo yaye amo nabategeneti." 
Luke12:47 Naende omosomba oria omanyete ogwancha kw’omonene oye, na tebeka ang’e, gose gokora ogwancha kwaye, naakwe ebiranya ebiroro," 
Luke12:48 korende oria otamanyeti, ko ere okorire ayagwenerete ogoakwa, naakwe ebiranya ebiororo. Kera oyoeirwe ebinge, korwa asare ere nabiganigwe ebinge; na ere oyoeirwe ebinge kobua, korwa asare nabiganigwe ebinge kobua." 
Luke12:49 “Nigo nachire gotongia omorero ase ense; onye ngwoka ore, anga ninki ndigetie naende?" 
Luke12:50 Ninde nebatiso nkobatiswa, naende ninchandeke mono goika eikeranigwe!" 
Luke12:51 Inee! Mokagete ng’a nigo nachire ng’ee ense omorembe? Nabatebirie, taibo, korende nogwatanana." 
Luke12:52 Naki korwa bono ase enyomba nababe abanto batano baatananeke, batato ase babere, naende babere ase batato." 
Luke12:53 Mbaatananeke, ise na omwana omomura, na omwana omomura na ise, ng’ina na omwana omoiseke, na omwana omoiseke na ng’ina; ng’ina biara, na moka momura oye, moka momura oye na ng’ina biara.”" 
Luke12:54 Naende agatebia emeganda, “Ekero mokorora riire rikoimoka bosongo, erio mwateba bwango: Embura netwe; yaba bo." 
Luke12:55 Naende ekero mokorora embeo ekorwa irianyi mwabora. Nebe eguru‐gura; yaba bo. 
Luke12:56 Inwe abang’ainereria! Imomanyete ense na erioba, buna bikororekana, korende naki rende, motamanyeti ekero eke?" 
Luke12:57 “Naende naki ase emioyo yaino motari gwatanana ayare boronge? 
Luke12:58 Nabo ekero okogenda nomogosoeri oo ase omogambi, kora omokia kobwatana nere komore inchera, tachicha kogokurura ase omogambi, na omogambi oria akobeke ase amaboko ’omorendi bw’echela, na omorendi oria akorute echela." 
Luke12:59 Nagotebirie, tokorwa agwo nonya ng’ake goika oakane kegima ebesa y’omoerio.”" 
Luke13:1 Ekero ekio mbachete aroro abanto bamotebetie amang’ana igoro y’Abagalili, baria Pilato asang’ananetie amanyinga abo nebing’wanso biabo." 
Luke13:2 Akabairaneria, akabatebia, “Mokagete ng’a Abagalili abwo nigo barenge abanyene ebibe kobua Abagalili bande bonsi, ekiagera banyorete emechando buna eyio?" 
Luke13:3 Nabatebirie, taibo; korende motaonchogeti mwensi namosire boigo." 
Luke13:4 Gose baria ikomi na batano na batato bagweretwe norwaki orotambe ase Siloam, rokabaita, mokagete ng’a nigo barenge abasaria kobua abanto bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Nabatebirie, taibo; korende motaonchogeti mwensi, namosire boigo.”" 
Luke13:6 Agakwana omoreng’anio oyo, “Omonto oyomo narenge nomoko osimekire ase omogondo oye bw’emesabibu; akagenda korigia amatunda ase omoko oria, korende tanyora gento." 
Luke13:7 Agatebia omoroiseria bw’omogondo bw’emesabibu: Rora, emiaka eye etato nachire korigia amatunda ase omoko oyo, na tindanyora gento. Yonache! Nase ki ogosaria riroba?" 
Luke13:8 Akamoiraneria: Omonene, yotige omwaka oyo naende, goika nyoburugere na koyobekera obwoyo." 
Luke13:9 Noro korame amatunda, mbuya; onye taibo, erio oyonache.”" 
Luke13:10 Akaba okworokereria ase esinagogi eyemo ase rituko ri’Esabato. 
Luke13:11 Naende rora, narengeo omokungu obwatire nekerecha ki’oboreu ase emiaka ikomi na etano na etato, na ere konya okogotaire, tare konyara kwerambora nonya ng’ake." 
Luke13:12 Ekero Yeso achia komorora, akamorangeria, akamotebia, “Aye omokungu, gwasiboirwe korwa ase oboreu bwao.”" 
Luke13:13 Akabeka amaboko aye igoro asare, na ere akaramboka erio kegima, akamotogia Nyasae." 
Luke13:14 Korende omotang’ani bw’esinagogi eria akabea, ekiagera Yeso agwenia omonto ase rituko ri’Esabato, agatebia abanto, “Nare amatuko atano na rimo agwenerete mwanyabanto bakore emeremo; ase ayio, inchuo ase amatuko ayio mogwenigwe, korende tari ase rituko ri’Esabato.”" 
Luke13:15 Korende Omonene akamoiraneria, “Inwe abang’ainereria, Inee, kera oyomo oino tari gosibora eng’ombe yaye gose etigere yaye korwa bweri ase rituko ri’Esabato, ogenda nero koyenyoisia?" 
Luke13:16 Oyo nenyaroka ya Ibrahimu; ekiagera Saitani omosibire emiaka eye ikomi na etano na etato, temogwenereti asiborwe korwa ase egesibo eke ase rituko ri’Esabato?”" 
Luke13:17 Naende ekero are gokwana aya, abanto bonsi abare koamererania nere bagasookigwa. Abanto bonsi bakagoka ase engencho y’amang’ana onsi amanene akorire." 
Luke13:18 Naende akabora, “Oboruoti bwa Nyasae nigo boreng’anirie naki? Ninki nkoboreng’ania?" 
Luke13:19 Mboreng’anie nentetere y’omote onga buna omosabisabi omonto abogoretie, akayesimeka ase omogondo oye; egakina, ekaba omote. Chinyoni chia igoro chikaroisia ebiswa ase chinsagia chiaye.”" 
Luke13:20 Agakwana eria kabere, “Ninki nkoreng’ania oboruoti bwa Nyasae?" 
Luke13:21 Igo boreng’anirie nememera omokungu abogoretie, akayebeka ase ebirengo bitato bi’obosie, goika bionsi bikabota.”" 
Luke13:22 Ekero arenge kogenda Yerusalemu, agaeta ase emechie na ebichie okworokereria." 
Luke13:23 Omonto oyomo akamoboria, “Omonene, barabwo abaratoorigwe nabake?” Akabatebia," 
Luke13:24 “Teema mono gosoa ase egesieri kere ekegote, ekiagera nabatebirie: Abanto abange nabarigie gosoa, na barabwo tibakonyara." 
Luke13:25 Ekero omonyene enyomba araimoke na gosieka egesieri, inwe namochake gotenena isiko na gotura gesieri, mokobora, Omonene, toigorere, na ere nabairanerie: Timbamanyeti aase mokorwa." 
Luke13:26 Erio namochake goteba: Nigo tware koria na konywa ase obosio bwao, naye nkworokereria kwarenge ase chinchera chiaito." 
Luke13:27 Korende ere natebe: Nabatebirie, timbamanyeti aase mokorwa; karue asende, inwe mwensi abakori amabe." 
Luke13:28 Erio namobe nokorera na okoriania amaino, ekero morarore Ibrahimu, na Isaka, na Yakobo, na ababani bonsi ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae, na inwe abanyene namotugutwe isiko." 
Luke13:29 Naende mbache abanto korwa moocha na bosongo, na korwa sugusu na irianyi, na barabwo mbaikaranse ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Luke13:30 Na rora, mbare ab’omoerio barache koba abe ritang’ani, naende mbare abe ritang’ani barache koba ab’omoerio.”" 
Luke13:31 Ekero keria abande b’Abafarisai bakamochiera, bakamotebia, “Imoka korwa aa, ogende, ekiagera Herode narigetie kogoita.”" 
Luke13:32 Akabatebia, “Genda motebie ekebwe ekio: Rora ngoseria nde ebirecha, ngokora nde emeremo y’okogwenia abanto rero na ankio, ne rituko ria gatato ninkoore emeremo yane." 
Luke13:33 Korende ningwenerete kobwatia enchera yane rero, na ankio, na ankio ende, naki temogwenereti omobani asirere isiko ya Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:34 “Aye Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, ogoita ababani na kobaaka amagena abatomirwe asore! Ng’ara karenga narigirie gosangereria abana bao buna engoko egosangereria ebichuchu biaye aase chimbaba chiaye ime, korende timwancha!" 
Luke13:35 Rora, enyomba yaino mwatigeirwe ere ritombe; na inche nabatebirie ng’a timokondora nonya ng’ake, goika ekero keria morache goteba: Nasesenirie oyogocha ase erieta ri ’Omonene.”" 
Luke14:1 Rituko erimo ri’Esabato, ekero asoete ase enyomba y’omonto oyomo, omonene bw’Abafarisai, arie endagera, nigo barenge bamorigereretie." 
Luke14:2 Na rora, ase obosio bwaye narengeo omonto oyomo orenge noborwaire bw’okobimbia omobere." 
Luke14:3 Yeso agatebia abanto b’amachiko na Abafarisai, akababoria, “Inee! Mboronge kogwenia ase rituko ri’Esabato, gose taibo?”" 
Luke14:4 Bagakira. Akamobwata, akamogwenia, akamoa ribaga agende." 
Luke14:5 Akababoria, “Ning’o asemore ore netigere gose eng’ombe yagure ase engoro, otari koyerusia erio kegima ase rituko ri’Esabato?”" 
Luke14:6 Barabwo tibanyara komoiraneria ase amang’ana aria. 
Luke14:7 Agatebia baria barangeretigwe omoreng’anio, gachia korora buna bachorire ebirogo bie ritang’ani, akabatebia," 
Luke14:8 “Gokorangerigwa nomonto ase omoyega bw’enyangi, toikaransa ase ekerogo kie ritang’ani; onye omonto bw’amasikani kobua aye orangeretigwe nere," 
Luke14:9 oria obarangeretie inwe babere nache kogotebia aye: Motigerere oyo ekerogo eke; erio nochake koba nobosooku gokoiranigwa goikaransa nyuma. 
Luke14:10 Korende gokorangerigwa, genda oikaranse nyuma, erinde kagocha oyokorangeretie, agotebie: Mosani, tigera gocha aa aase e ritang’ani. Erio nobe nogosikwa ase amasio abo bonsi abaikaransete amo naye." 
Luke14:11 Ekiagera kera oyokweimokereria igoro nairanigwe inse, na ere oyokweirania inse naimokererigwe igoro.”" 
Luke14:12 Agatebia oria omorangeretie, “Kogokora endagera ya mambia gose eya mogoroba, torangeria abasani bao, gose abamino, gose eamate yao, gose abagisangio bao abanda; babaise gokorangeria banyare gokoakana." 
Luke14:13 Korende kogokora omoyega, barangerie abataka, na ebirema, na amagata, na emeuko;" 
Luke14:14 aye nosesenigwe, ekiagera tibari na gento bagokoakana. Naki aye noche goakanwa ase okobokigwa kw’abanyene oboronge.”" 
Luke14:15 Ekero oyomo ase abwo baikaransete ase endagera amo nere achia koyaigwa akamotebia, “Nasesenirie oyoranyare koria omogati ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae!”" 
Luke14:16 Yeso akamotebia, “Omonto oyomo okorete omoyega omonene; akarangeria abanto abange." 
Luke14:17 Ekero ki’omoyega agatoma omosomba oye kogenda gotebia baria konya barangerigwe: Inchuo, ekiagera ebinto bionsi biabeire ang’e." 
Luke14:18 Bagachaka bonsi korigia chintamero. Oyo bwe ritang’ani akamotebia: Nagorire omogondo, nindigetie kogenda koyorora; nagosabire, onyabere." 
Luke14:19 Oyonde akabora: Nagorire chintang’ana amachoki atano, nkogenda nde gochiteema; nagosabire, onyabere." 
Luke14:20 Oyonde akabora: Nanyuomire omokungu, na ase engencho eye tinkonyara gocha." 
Luke14:21 Omosomba oria agacha, akorokia omonene oye amang’ana aya. Erio oria omonyene enyomba akabea, agatebia omosomba oye: Soka bwango, ogende ase chinchera na ebinchera bi’emechie, orente abataka, na ebirema, na emeuko, na amagata." 
Luke14:22 Na omosomba oria akabora: Omonene, ayio gwachika aikire gokoreka, ko nonya mbono ribaga ndireo." 
Luke14:23 Omonene oria agatebia omosomba oye: Genda ase chinchera ne chimbebe, obabetererie basoe, erinde enyomba yane enyare goichora." 
Luke14:24 Ekiagera nagotebirie ng’a ase abanto baria barangeretigwe onde tari nonya noyomo oranyare koigwa omoyega one.” 
Luke14:25 Emeganda emenge nigo yarenge amo na Yeso; ere akeonchora, akabatebia," 
Luke14:26 “Omonto kagocha asende, nere atagecheti ise na ng’ina, na mokaye, na abana baye, na abamura bamwabo, na abasubati bamwabo, ee, nonya nobogima bwaye, takonyara koba omworokigwa one." 
Luke14:27 Naende monto onde bwensi otabogoreti omosalaba oye na gontunyana, takonyara koba omworokigwa one." 
Luke14:28 Naki ning’o asemore, onye origetie koagacha oboagacho, otaikaranse ritang’ani kobara rigori ri’oboagacho obo, gose nabwate ebinto biisaine kobokoora?" 
Luke14:29 Aise gosinywa gokoora oboagacho boria kabekire oboroso, abanto bonsi bachake komosekerera," 
Luke14:30 bagokwana: Omonto oyo nigo achagete oboagacho, korende tabokoora." 
Luke14:31 Gose moruoti ki, gakogenda korwana nomoruoti onde, otaikaranse ritang’ani na korengereria onye ere amo nabanto chilifu ikomi nanyare koumerana nere oyokomochera nabanto chilifu emerongo ebere?" 
Luke14:32 Onye taibo, nigo agotoma abanto korigia enchera y’omorembe, omonto oria gakare aare." 
Luke14:33 Nabo kera oyomo oino otatigeti ebinto bionsi are nabio, takonyara koba omworokigwa one." 
Luke14:34 “Omonyo nomuya, korende omonyo korasirie obwansu bwaye, ninki orabekwe bwanse?" 
Luke14:35 Togwenereti riroba gose etui; abanto nigo bakoyotuguta isiko. Oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe.”" 
Luke15:1 Nabo abarusia ebango na abanyene ebibe bonsi nigo baare komoika Yeso ang’e komotegerera. 
Luke15:2 Abafarisai na aborokia b’amariko bakemurungania, bakabora, “Oyo nigo akoroisia abanyene ebibe, na koria amo nabarabwo.”" 
Luke15:3 Erio akabatebia omoreng’anio oyo: 
Luke15:4 “Monto ki oino oyore ne ching’ondi rigana erimo, na eyemo esire, tagotiga chiria emerongo kianda na kianda ase erooro, na gochia korigia eria yasirire, goika ayenyore?" 
Luke15:5 Nabo kayenyorire ayebeka amareko aye nomogoko. 
Luke15:6 Na ekero akoirana inka, narangerie abasani baye na abagisangio baye, abatebie: Goka amo nainche, ekiagera nanyorire eng’ondi yane eria yasirete." 
Luke15:7 Naboigo nabatebirie, nobe omogoko igoro ase omonyene ebibe oyomo oonchokire, kobua ase abanyene oboronge emerongo kianda na kianda, abatarigeti okoonchoka." 
Luke15:8 “Gose mokungu ki ore ne chisiringi ikomi, na eyemo esire, tagotongia etaya na kwabusa enyomba, arigie nomokia goika ayenyore?" 
Luke15:9 Kayenyorire, narangerie abasani baye na abagisangio baye, abatebie: Goka amo nainche, ekiagera nanyorire esiringi eria nasiria." 
Luke15:10 Naboigo, nabatebirie, nore omogoko ase abamalaika ba Nyasae ase omonyene ebibe oyomo oonchokire.”" 
Luke15:11 Naende agateba, “Omonto oyomo narenge nabamura babere." 
Luke15:12 Oria omoke agatebia ise: Tata, ing’a ensemo y’enibo entungetie. Ise akabaatanera ebinto biaye." 
Luke15:13 Nyuma y’amatuko atai mange oria omoke agasangereria ebinto biaye bionsi, akaimoka akagenda orogendo gochia ense y’aare; agasiarera agwo enibo yaye ase ogokora kw’obokayayu." 
Luke15:14 Gakoorire bionsi, enchara enene egasoa ase ense eria, ere akaremerwa." 
Luke15:15 Akagenda akabwatana nomonto oyomo bw’abanyene ense eria; ere akamoira ebitii biaye korageria chimbeche. 
Luke15:16 Akaba nkogania are koigotia enda yaye ase amasabo aria chimbeche chiarenge koria; monto onde tarenge komoa gento. 
Luke15:17 Goika agachia kweirana kweboria ere omonyene, akabora: Abasomba b’eng’eria ba tata mbarenga bakare koria endagera na gotigaria, na inche aiga ngokwa nenchara!" 
Luke15:18 Ninyimoke, ngende ase tata, imotebie: Tata, namochire ase oyore igoro na ase obosio bwao," 
Luke15:19 tingwenereti naende ndokwe omwana oo, tiga imbe buna oyomo bw’abasomba bao b’eng’eria." 
Luke15:20 Akaimoka, akagenda ase ise. Agachia koba okare are, ise akamorora, akamororera amabera, akaminyoka, akamoboania rigoti, akamonyunyunta mono." 
Luke15:21 Omwana oria akamotebia: Tata, namochire ase oyore igoro na ase obosio bwao, tingwenereti naende ndokwe omwana oo." 
Luke15:22 Korende ise agatebia abasomba baye: Renta bwango eganchwa ere engiya, momobekere; mobekere nebonyi ase ekiara kiaye, na ebikoroto ase amagoro aye." 
Luke15:23 Nyerente emori eria ere enoru, moyenyenye, torie na kogoka," 
Luke15:24 ekiagera oyo omwana one konya okure, naende moyo are; konya osirire, korende bono ororekanire. Bagachaka gochenga." 
Luke15:25 “Nabo oria omomura oye omonene nigo arenge mogondo; agachia goika ang’e nenyomba, akaigwa egeturi ki’ogotera na ogotenga." 
Luke15:26 Akarangeria oyomo bw’abasomba, akamoboria amang’ana ayio, engencho yaye inki." 
Luke15:27 Ere akamoiraneria: Momura omino ochire, na iso omonyenyeire emori enoru, ekiagera amonyora ore omogima." 
Luke15:28 Korende akabea, tarigia gosoa. Erio ise agasoka, akamosorora," 
Luke15:29 korende ere akamoiraneria: Rora, inche nagokoreire emiaka eye emenge, tinsareti ogochika kwao kero kende gionsi; korende tikwana kong’a emanwa y’embori, erinde ingoke amo nabasani baane." 
Luke15:30 Korende ochia gocha omwana oo oyo, orire ebinto biao nabakungu abatayayi, kwamonyenyeire emori enoru." 
Luke15:31 Ise akamotebia: Omwana one, aye amatuko onsi nigo ore amo nainche, na ebinto bionsi inde nabirobio nebiao." 
Luke15:32 Mboronge gokora omogoko na gochenga, ekiagera oyo momura omino konya okure, na bono moyo are; konya osirire, na bono ororekanire.”" 
Luke16:1 Naende agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Narenge omonto omonda, orenge nomorendi. Oyio agasoerwa asare ng’a osiareire enibo yaye." 
Luke16:2 Akamorangeria, akamotebia: Ninki eke naigure asore? Orokia amang’ana ay’oborendi bwao, ekiagera tokonyara kogenderera koba omorendi." 
Luke16:3 Omorendi oria akabora ase omoyo oye: Ninki ndakore, ekiagera omonene one ondusirie ase oborendi bwane? Tindi ne chinguru chi’okorema; ogosaba nobosooku asende." 
Luke16:4 Namanyire eke ndakore, erinde abanto bandoisie ase chinyomba chiabo, ekero nkorusigwa ase oborendi." 
Luke16:5 Erio akarangeria abasira b’omonene oye, oyomo ase oyomo, akaboria oyo bwe ritang’ani: Ninki oriete ki’omonene one?" 
Luke16:6 Akairaneria: Ebirengo rigana erimo bi’amaguta. Akamotebia: Bogoria ekaratasi yao, ikaransa bwango, orike emerongo etano." 
Luke16:7 Naende akaboria oyonde: Naye ninki oriete? Akairaneria: Ebirengo rigana erimo bi’engano. Akamotebia: Bogoria ekaratasi yao, orike emerongo etano na etato." 
Luke16:8 Omonene oria agatogia omorendi otarenge omoronge, ekiagera akorete ase obong’aini. Naki abana b’ense eye nabang’aini kobua abana b’omobaso, ase ekegori kiabo abanyene." 
Luke16:9 “Nkobatebia nde inwe: Ekorere abasani nenibo y’ense eye etari boronge, erinde ekero egochia gokea, babaroisie inwe ase obomenyo bwa kare na kare." 
Luke16:10 “Oyore omwegenwa ase ekere egeke, nabo are omwegenwa ase ekere ekenene; na oyotari omoronge ase ekere egeke, naboigo tari omoronge ase ekere ekenene." 
Luke16:11 Onye timobeti abegenwa ase enibo y’ense eye etari boronge, ning’o oranyare kobegena koba nenibo y’ekeene?" 
Luke16:12 Onye timobeti abegenwa ase ekio ki’omonto onde, ning’o oranyare kobaa ekio ekere kiaino abanyene?" 
Luke16:13 Mosomba onde tari oranyare gokorera abanene babere, ekiagera nageche oyomo, na anche oyonde, gose nabwatane noyomo, na achaye oyonde. Timokonyara gokorera Nyasae na enibo.”" 
Luke16:14 Abafarisai abarenge abanchi enibo bakaigwa amang’ana aya onsi, bakamosekereria." 
Luke16:15 Akabatebia, “Inwe nabanto mogwetogia ng’a nigo more abanyene oboronge ase obosio bwa mwanyabanto, korende Nyasae omanyire chinkoro chiaino, ekiagera ekeimokererete igoro ase mwanyabanto, Nyasae nigo akegechete." 
Luke16:16 “Amachiko narengeo, na ababani boigo, goika ekero kia Yohana. Korwa ekero keria amang’ana amaya ay’oboruoti bwa Nyasae nkorandigwa are, na kera omonto nigo akobosoa ne chinguru." 
Luke16:17 Korende naango kobua igoro na ense goeta, kobua enuguta eyemo y’amachiko korua aroro." 
Luke16:18 “Kera oyogotiga mokaye na konyuoma oyonde otomanire, nere oyokonyuoma oyotigirwe nomosacha oye, noyio otomanire." 
Luke16:19 “Narenge omonto gete omonda, orenge kweboyia chianga chimonyinga na echi’egatani engiya, na kwegokia kera rituko ase okoria." 
Luke16:20 Na ase egesieri kiaye narengeo omonto oyomo omotaka, erieta riaye Lazaro, orenge namaote amange." 
Luke16:21 Ere nigo arenge kogania kweigotia namatori are kogwa korwa ase emesa y’omonda oria, ne chisese nachirochio chicha chiamomena amaote aye." 
Luke16:22 Omotaka oria agakwa, akabogorigwa nabamalaika, akabekwa ase egekuba kia Ibrahimu. Na oria omonda agakwa boigo, agatindekwa," 
Luke16:23 na ekero aare agwo aase abakure akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora Ibrahimu okare aare, na Lazaro ore ase egekuba kiaye." 
Luke16:24 Akarera, akabora: Tata Ibrahimu, indorera amabera, toma Lazaro atobeke ekiara kiaye mesia ase amache, akendie oromeme rwane, ekiagera nachandekire ase omorero oyo." 
Luke16:25 Ibrahimu akabora: Omwana one, inyora buna kwanyorete amaya ao ase obogima bwao, na Lazaro boigo akanyora amabe, korende ere bono aiga oremigwe, na aye ngochandeka ore." 
Luke16:26 Na kobua aya onsi, egati yaito na inwe eoromomo nereo yabekirwe, erinde abanto abarigetie korua aiga bamboke gocha asore tibanyara, gose baria bare agwo tibanyara kwamboka gocha asetore." 
Luke16:27 Akabora: Nagosabire tata, omotome ase enyomba ya tata," 
Luke16:28 ekiagera ninkare nabamura baminto batano; tiga agende abakurere, erinde barabwo tibacha aa ase emechando." 
Luke16:29 Ibrahimu akabora: Mbare na Musa na ababani; tiga baigwere barabwo. 
Luke16:30 Akabora: Yaya, tata Ibrahimu, korende oyomo korwa ase abakure aise kobachiera, inabaonchoke." 
Luke16:31 Akamotebia: Bataigwereti Musa na ababani, naisa koboka omonto korwa ase abakure, tibakoebererigwa banche.”" 
Luke17:1 Yeso agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Amang’ana ’okogocha takomocha kooroka, korende obobe nobwaye omonto oria okoyarenta!" 
Luke17:2 Anga mbuya kobua ase omonto oria asungerwe orogena rogosia ase rigoti riaye, arutwe enyancha ime, kobua aragere oyomo bw’aba abake akore ebibe." 
Luke17:3 Erende; oyomino karakore ebibe, mokanie; karaonchoke, mwabere." 
Luke17:4 Naende karakore ebibe asore ara gatano na kabere ase rituko erimo, karakoiranere ara gatano na kabere na goteba: Naonchokire, mwabere.”" 
Luke17:5 Abatomwa bakamotebia, “Omonene, tomentere okwegena gwaito.”" 
Luke17:6 Omonene akabora, “Onye mwarenge nokwegena koreng’aine buna entetere y’omote onga buna omosabisabi, anga mwatebia omokenene oyo: Simoka, bwesimeke nyancha, noro anga nobaigwera." 
Luke17:7 “Korende ning’o asemore oyore nomosomba okorema, gose okorisia ching’ondi, oramotebie ekero akorwa mogondo agosoa nyomba: Inchuo bwango oikaranse, orie endagera?" 
Luke17:8 Inee! Takomotebia: Ebeke ang’e, ondoiserie endagera goika indie inywe, na nyuma yaye, naye orie na konywa?" 
Luke17:9 Gose nkomotebia are omosomba oria ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera akora eki achikwa?" 
Luke17:10 Naboigo nainwe, komorakore onsi aya mwachikirwe, teba: Intwe nabasomba bataisaneti; twakorire aya atogwenerete gokora.”" 
Luke17:11 Ase enchera ekogenda Yerusalemu Yeso ngoeta arenge egati ya Samaria na Galili. 
Luke17:12 Ekero are gosoa omochie oyomo, akaumerana nabanto ikomi abarenge noborwaire bwa ukoma, bateneine are;" 
Luke17:13 na barabwo bagaaka eriogi bakabora, “Yeso, Omonene, tororere amabera!”" 
Luke17:14 Agachia kobarora, akabatebia, “Genda mweorokie ase abakuani.” Kobakogenda bagasibeka." 
Luke17:15 Oyomo obo agachia korora ng’a osibekire, akairana okomobaka Nyasae ase eriogi rinene," 
Luke17:16 akagwa ase amagoro a Yeso, okomoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, na ere n’Omosamaria orenge." 
Luke17:17 Yeso akabora, “Tari bonsi ikomi basibeka? Baria kianda, ng’ai bare?" 
Luke17:18 Onde tanyorekanete oiranete komotogia Nyasae, otatiga omogeni oyo?”" 
Luke17:19 Akamotebia, “Tenena, ogende; okwegena kwao gwakogwenirie.”" 
Luke17:20 Yeso agachia koborigwa n’Abafarisai, “Oboruoti bwa Nyasae indi borache?” Akabairaneria, “Oboruoti bwa Nyasae tibori gocha ase ebimanyererio bikororekana," 
Luke17:21 gose tibakobora: Rora naiga bore, gose: Naaria! Rora, oboruoti bwa Nyasae nigo bore ime asemore.”" 
Luke17:22 Agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Amatuko nache morarigie korora rituko erimo ri’amatuko ’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto, korende timokorirora." 
Luke17:23 Naende nababatebie: Rora aaria, gose: Rora aiga! Timogenda, gose timobatunyana." 
Luke17:24 Naki buna okomesa gokomesa korwa ensemo eyemo goika ensemo ende, nabo Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto arache koba ase rituko riaye." 
Luke17:25 Korende ritang’ani nagwenerete konyora ogochandwa okonge, na kwangwa nekegori eke." 
Luke17:26 Naende buna yabete ase amatuko a Nuhu, naboigo erabe nase amatuko ’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto." 
Luke17:27 Barenge koria, bakonywa, bakonyuoma, bakonyuomerigwa, goika rituko riria Nuhu asoete ase obwato; etoigo egacha, egasiria bonsi." 
Luke17:28 Naboigo buna yabete ase amatuko a Loti: Barenge koria na konywa, bakogora, bakoonia, bagosimeka, bakoagacha." 
Luke17:29 Korende ase rituko riria Loti aruete Sodomu omorero na ekebiriti bigatwa korwa igoro, bigasiria bonsi." 
Luke17:30 Naboigo erache koba ase rituko riria Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto araoroke. 
Luke17:31 Ase rituko riria oyore kerama igoro, na ebinto biaye bire nyomba ime, taika abibogorie; nere oyore mogondo naboigo tairana inka." 
Luke17:32 Moinyore moka Loti. 
Luke17:33 Oyorarigie koegera obogima bwaye nabosirie, korende oyorasirie obogima bwaye nabonyore." 
Luke17:34 Nabatebirie, obotuko boria abanto babere nababe ase oborere obomo, oyomo nairwe, na oyonde natigwe." 
Luke17:35 Abakungu babere nababe bagosera ase orogena oromo; oyomo nairwe, na oyonde natigwe. [" 
Luke17:36 Abanto babere nababe mogondo, oyomo nairwe, na oyonde natigwe.]”" 
Luke17:37 Bakamoboria, “Ng’ai Omonene?” Akabairaneria, “Ase ribego rire nao chinsoti chigosangererekana.”" 
Luke18:1 Yeso akabatebia omoreng’anio ng’a nebagwenerete komosaba Nyasae botambe, tibakwa emioyo," 
Luke18:2 akabora, “Narenge omogambi ase omochie gete, otasigete Nyasae, gose taare koyiera monto." 
Luke18:3 Na ase omochie oyio narengeo omoboraka orenge komochiera botambe, ogoteba: Ngambera boronge ase omosira one." 
Luke18:4 Omogambi oria ase ekero egeke tancha; nyuma agateba ase omoyo oye: Nonya inche tinsigeti Nyasae, gose tindi koyiera monto," 
Luke18:5 korende ekiagera omoboraka oyo andosirie, nimogambere boronge, tacha kondosia ase ogonchichera botambe.”"
