Luke18:6 Omonene akabora, “Igwa aya omogambi otari omoronge agoteba." 
Luke18:7 Inee! Nyasae takobanyorera oboronge abachore baye, abakomorera omobaso na obotuko? Na ere takoba omoremereria asebare?" 
Luke18:8 Nabatebirie nabanyorere oboronge ase obwango. Korende Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto kagocha, Inee, nanyore okwegena ase ense?”" 
Luke18:9 Akabatebia omoreng’anio oyo ase abanto baare gwekaga ng’a nabanyene oboronge, bagochaya abande bonsi," 
Luke18:10 “Abanto babere bagatiira gochia Hekalu gosaba; oyomo n’Omofarisai na oyonde omorusia ebango. 
Luke18:11 Oria Omofarisai agatenena, agasaba iga ase omoyo oye: Nyasae, nakoiraneirie ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera inche tindi buna abanto bande, abauri, abatari boronge, abatomani, gose buna oyo omorusia ebango." 
Luke18:12 Igo nkweng’ata ara kabere ase echuma; ndua ensemo ya ikomi y’okonyora kwane gwonsi. 
Luke18:13 Na oria omorusia ebango agatenena are, tarigia nonya nkoimokia amaiso aye igoro, korende ageaka‐aka egekuba kiaye, okobora: Nyasae, indorera amabera inche omonyene ebibe!" 
Luke18:14 Nabatebirie inwe: Omonto oria nigo aigete bwoye konya obareirwe oboronge kobua oria onde, ekiagera oyokweimokereria igoro nairanigwe inse, na ere oyokweirania inse naimokererigwe igoro.”" 
Luke18:15 Bakamorentera abana ebing’werere, erinde abakune; korende aborokigwa baye bagachia kobarora, bakabatanga." 
Luke18:16 Korende Yeso akabarangeria bache asare, ogoteba, “Batige abana bache asende, timobaisa kobatanga, ekiagera abare buna aba, oboruotibwa Nyasae nobwabo." 
Luke18:17 Ekeene nabatebirie: Onde bwensi otancheti oboruoti bwa Nyasae buna omwana omoke, takobosoa nonya ng’ake.”" 
Luke18:18 Na omogambi gete akamoboria, “Omworokia omuya, ninki ndakore inyare koba nomwando bw’obogima bwa kare na kare?”" 
Luke18:19 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Naki okondoka omuya? Onde tari omuya otatiga Nyasae bweka." 
Luke18:20 Kwamanyire amachiko; Totomana, Toita, Toiba, Toteba oborimo, sika iso na nyoko.”" 
Luke18:21 Akabora, “Ayio onsi ninyabwatete korwa obwana bwane.”" 
Luke18:22 Ekero Yeso achia koigwa aya, akamotebia, “Egento ekemo ngekoremete; oonie ebio ore nabio bionsi ogabere abataka, na aye nobe nenibo igoro. Erio ochiche ontunyane.”" 
Luke18:23 Korende ekero achia koigwa aya akaba nomoichano, ekiagera arenge omonda mono." 
Luke18:24 Nabo Yeso akamorigereria, akabora, “Nabe aakong’u ase abare abanda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae!" 
Luke18:25 Naki naororo engamia goeta ase ekebao gi’esindani, kobua omonda gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Luke18:26 Na abwo abayaigwete bakabora, “Ning’o rende oranyare gotooreka?”" 
Luke18:27 Akabora, “Aya takonyarekana ase mwanyabanto, nigo akonyarekana ase Nyasae.”" 
Luke18:28 Petero akabora, “Rora, intwe twatigire chinka chiaito, twagotunyanire aye.”" 
Luke18:29 Akabatebia, “Ekeene nabatebirie: Monto onde tari otigire enyomba, gose mokaye, gose abamwabo, gose abaibori, gose abana, ase engencho y’oboruoti bwa Nyasae," 
Luke18:30 otanyore kobua ara aange bono, naende ase ense egochi‐gocha obogima bwa kare na kare.”" 
Luke18:31 Erio Yeso akaira baria ikomi na babere, akabatebia, “Rora, ngotiira tore kogenda Yerusalemu, naende amang’ana onsi ayarikeretwe Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nababani naikeranigwe." 
Luke18:32 Naki nabekwe ase amaboko ’abanto b’Ebisaku, nakorerwe echeche, na gokorerwa bobe, na gotwerwa amate;" 
Luke18:33 naende inabamoake emecharichi na komoita, na ase rituko ria gatato naboke.”" 
Luke18:34 Korende tibamanya nonya nering’ana erimo ase aya. Ring’ana eri rikabiseka asebare, na tibamanya ayatebetwe." 
Luke18:35 Ekero achia goika ang’e na Yeriko omonto oyomo omouko naikaransete enchera ensemo ogosaba ebiegwa. 
Luke18:36 Agachia koigwa omoganda ogoeta, akaboria, “Inki ekio?”" 
Luke18:37 Bakamoiraneria, “Yeso o Nazareti ogoeta.”" 
Luke18:38 Agaaka eriogi, akabora, “Yeso, omwana o Daudi, indorera amabera!”" 
Luke18:39 Nabwo batang’aine bakamokania, bakamotebia akire, korende ere akamenta mono goaka eriogi, “Omwana o Daudi, indorera amabera!”" 
Luke18:40 Yeso agatenena, agachika arentwe asare. Agachia komoika ang’e, akamoboria," 
Luke18:41 “Ninki origetie ngokorere?” Akamoiraneria, “Omonene, inyare korora.”" 
Luke18:42 Yeso akamotebia, “Oegwe okorora; okwegena kwao gwakogwenirie.”" 
Luke18:43 Erio kegima akaba nkorora are, akamotunyana, okomotogia Nyasae; na abanto bonsi bagachia korora aya, bakamotogia Nyasae." 
Luke19:1 Yeso agasoa Yeriko, akaba ngoeta are egati‐gati yaye." 
Luke19:2 Narenge aroro omonto oyomo ore korokwa Zakayo, omonene bw’abarusia ebango; ere nomonda orenge." 
Luke19:3 Akarigia korora Yeso, gose monto ki; ko tanyara ase engencho y’omoganda, ekiagera arenge omweng’e." 
Luke19:4 Agatang’ana bwango, akariina igoro ase omoko anyare komorora, ekiagera ngoetera arenge ase enchera eria." 
Luke19:5 Ekero Yeso achia goika aase aria, akarigereria igoro, akamotebia, “Zakayo, ika bwango, ekiagera rero ningwenerete goikaransa nyomba mwao.”" 
Luke19:6 Agaika bwango, akamoroisia nomogoko." 
Luke19:7 Ekero abanto bachia korora aya, bakemurungania bonsi, bakobora, “Osoire koba omogeni bw’omonyene ebibe.”" 
Luke19:8 Zakayo agatenena, agatebia Omonene, “Rora, Omonene, ekeng’ese ki’enibo yane ning’ee abataka; naende onye naureretie omonto egento nimoiranerie ara kane.”" 
Luke19:9 Yeso akamotebia, “Rero ogotooreka gwaikire enyomba eye, ekiagera oyo boigo nomwana o Ibrahimu." 
Luke19:10 Naki Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nigo achete korigia egiasirete na kogetooria.” 
Luke19:11 Abanto baria bagachia koigwa aya, Yeso akamenta kobatebia omoreng’anio, ekiagera konya oikire ang’e na Yerusalemu, na barabwo bagakaga ng’a oboruoti bwa Nyasae nigo borarorekane ekero ekio kegima." 
Luke19:12 Nabo akabora, “Omonto oyomo omosike akagenda ense y’aare, erinde anyare kwenyorera oboruoti, naende airane." 
Luke19:13 Akarangeria abanto ikomi korwa ase abasomba baye, akabaa ebirengo ikomi bie chiropia, akabatebia: Biire mobionchorerie goika ekero nkoirana." 
Luke19:14 Abanto b’ense yaye bakamogecha, bagatoma abatomwa komotunyana na komotebia, Titorigeti omonto oyo atogambere." 
Luke19:15 “Ekero achia koirana, kanyorire oboruoti, agachika abasomba baria aete chiropia barangerigwe, erinde anyare komanya ebitoki banyorire ase okoonchoreria kwabo." 
Luke19:16 Oyo bwe ritang’ani agacha, okobora: Omonene, ekerengo kiao kiarentire ebirengo ikomi binde." 
Luke19:17 Akamotebia: Gwakorire buya, aye omosomba omuya! Ekiagera kwabeire omwegenwa ase egento kere egeke, nabo nobe nokobua igoro ase emechie ikomi." 
Luke19:18 Na oyo o kabere agacha, akabora: Omonene, ekerengo kiao kiarentire ebirengo bitano." 
Luke19:19 Akamotebia nere boigo: Aye nobe igoro ase emechie etano. 
Luke19:20 Naende oyonde agacha, akabora: Omonene, eke nakio ekerengo kiao nagachete ase egetambaa;" 
Luke19:21 nigo nakoirogete, ekiagera aye nigo ore omonto omokong’u. Nigo okobogoria eki otagachete, na kogesa eki otasimegete." 
Luke19:22 Akamotebia: Ase enkwana y’omonwa oo ninkogambie, aye omosomba omobe. Nkwamanyete ng’a inche nomonto omokong’u, nkobogoria eki ntagachete, na kogesa eki ntasimegete." 
Luke19:23 Naki rende otabegete chibesa chiane ase aba bakorua ebitoki, ninche ngocha anga nachinyora amo nebitoki?" 
Luke19:24 Agatebia abarengeo: Moure ekerengo kiaye, moe oria oyore nebirengo ikomi." 
Luke19:25 (Bakamotebia: Omonene, oyo nare nebirengo ikomi)." 
Luke19:26 Nabatebirie: Kera oyore negento naegwe, korende ere oyotari negento, nonya nkeria abwate naurwe." 
Luke19:27 Korende baria ababisa baane batarigeti mbagambere, barente aiga, mobaite ase obosio bwane.”" 
Luke19:28 Gakoorire gokwana amang’ana aya, agatang’ana gotiira kogenda Yerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Agachia goika Betifage na Bethania, ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, agatoma babere b’aborokigwa baye," 
Luke19:30 akabatebia, “Genda goika agachie karia mokoorokera; kamwasoire ime, inamorore emori y’etigere esibire, etana koriinwa na monto; moyesibore moyendetere." 
Luke19:31 Naende omonto karababorie: Naki, mokoyesibora? Momotebie iga, Omonene nayeganetie.”" 
Luke19:32 Nabo baria batometwe bakagenda, bakayenyora buna abatebetie." 
Luke19:33 Ekero baare gosibora emori eria y’etigere, abanyene bakababoria, “Nase ki mogosibora emori?”" 
Luke19:34 Bakabora, “Omonene nayeganetie.”" 
Luke19:35 Bakayerenta ase Yeso; bakaara chianga chiabo igoro ase emori eria, bakariinia Yeso igoro asero." 
Luke19:36 Ere gakogenda, bakaara chianga chiabo inchera." 
Luke19:37 Agachia goika egetirimboko ki’egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, omoganda bwonsi bw’aborokigwa baye bagachaka kogoka na komobaka Nyasae ase eriogi rinene ase ebikone bie chinguru bionsi barorire," 
Luke19:38 bakobora, “Nasesenirie Omoruoti oyogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene! Omorembe igoro, na obonene bore igoro mono!”" 
Luke19:39 Abande ase Abafarisai abarenge ase omosangererekano bakamotebia, “Omworokia, togonyera aborokigwa bao!”" 
Luke19:40 Akairaneria, “Nabatebirie: Aba nabaisa gokira, amagena aya naake eriogi.”" 
Luke19:41 Ere agachia goika ang’e akarora omochie, akayoiyereria amariga," 
Luke19:42 okobora, “Onye nkwamanya rero ayare korenta omorembe! Korende bono abisekire ase amaiso ao!" 
Luke19:43 Naki amatuko nagochere, ababisa bao barakoagachere orwaki bagoetanane, bagotange ase chinsemo chionsi," 
Luke19:44 na bakoiyerie inse, na abana bao ime asore. Tibagotiga ime asore rigena erimo igoro ase erinde, ekiagera otamanyeti engaki y’ogocherwa kwao.”" 
Luke19:45 Agasoa Hekalu ime, agachaka gosokia baria barenge koonia aroro," 
Luke19:46 akabatebia, “Nerikire: Enyomba yane nebe enyomba y’ogosaba, korende inwe mwayekorire koba ribwago ri’abauri.”" 
Luke19:47 Akaba okworokereria kera rituko ase Hekalu. Abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko, na abanene b’abanto bakarigia komoita;" 
Luke19:48 na barabwo tibanyora eki bagokora, ekiagera abanto bonsi bamotegererete." 
Luke20:1 Rituko erimo ekero Yeso arenge kworokereria abanto Hekalu ime, na korandia enchili, abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko amo nabagaaka bakamoorokera," 
Luke20:2 bakamotebia, “Totebie nase okobua ki ogokora aya? Ning’o okoete okobua oko?”" 
Luke20:3 Akabatebia, “Nainche nkobaboria nde inwe ring’ana erimo, montebie:" 
Luke20:4 Ebatiso ya Yohana, nigoro yarwete, gose nase mwanyabanto?”" 
Luke20:5 Bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, bakobora, “Toise goteba: Nigoro yarwete, nigo aratoborie: Naki motamwegenete rende?" 
Luke20:6 Korende toise goteba: Nase mwanyabanto yarwete, abanto bonsi nabatoake amagena; ekiagera banchire ng’a Yohana nomobani orenge.”" 
Luke20:7 Bakairaneria, “Titomanyeti aase yarwete.”" 
Luke20:8 Yeso akabatebia, “Nonya ninche tinkobatebia inwe nase okobua ki ngokorera aya.”" 
Luke20:9 Agachaka gotebia abanto omoreng’anio oyo: “Omonto akarema omogondo, agasimeka emesabibu imeo, akaywatananera abaremi, akagenda orogendo ase engaki entambe." 
Luke20:10 Ekero kie rigesa agatoma omosomba ase abaremi baria, erinde bamoe ensemo yaye y’amatunda ’emesabibu. Abaremi bakamoaka, bakamoseria atari na gento." 
Luke20:11 Naende agatoma omosomba onde; bakamoaka oyio boigo, bakamokora bobe, bakamoseria atari na gento." 
Luke20:12 Agatoma naende oyo o gatato, bakamoaka chingoma, bakamotuguta isiko." 
Luke20:13 Oria omonyene omogondo bw’emesabibu akabora: Inki ndakore? Nintome omwana one, omwanchwa one, aande ere inabamosike." 
Luke20:14 Korende abaremi baria bagachia komorora, bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo: Oyo nere omonyamwando, tomoite gaki, omwando onyare koba oyoito." 
Luke20:15 Bakamotuguta isiko korwa ase omogondo bw’emesabibu, bakamoita. Naki rende oria omonyene omogondo bw’emesabibu arabakore?" 
Luke20:16 Nachiche asirie abaremi baria, na omogondo oria bw’emesabibu nayoe abande.” Bagachia koigwa aya, bakabora, “Taba bo.”" 
Luke20:17 Akabarigereria, akabora, “Engencho yaye ninki, ring’ana eri ririkeire: “Rigena abaagachi bangete riabeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona?”" 
Luke20:18 “Kera omonto oragwe igoro ase rigena erio nabunanekane, na ere oyo riragwere narimosenyente.”" 
Luke20:19 Aborokia b’amariko na abakuani abanene bakarigia komobwata ensa eyio eyio, ekiagera bamanyete ng’a omoreng’anio oria nabwo agoteba, korende bakairoka abanto." 
Luke20:20 Erio bakamoboera Yeso, bagatoma chirooti, na barabwo bagekora buna nabanyene oboronge, erinde bamobwate ase ogokwana kwaye, bamobeke ase okobua kwa gavuna na obogambi bwaye." 
Luke20:21 Bakamoboria, “Omworokia, twamanyire ng’a nigo ogokwana na kworokereria ayare boronge, gose tori koyiera monto, korende ase ekeene nigo okworokereria enchera ya Nyasae." 
Luke20:22 Inee! Mboronge koa Kaisari ebango, gose taibo?”" 
Luke20:23 Korende akamanya obong’ainereria bwabo, akabatebia," 
Luke20:24 “Inyorokia ebesa! Ekieni eke na amariko aya nebiang’o?” Bakabora, “Nebia Kaisari.”" 
Luke20:25 Akabatebia, “Nabo, ebia Kaisari moe Kaisari, na ebia Nyasae moe Nyasae.”" 
Luke20:26 Tibanyara komobwata ase ring’ana riaye ase obosio bw’abanto; bagakumia ase okoiraneria kwaye, bagakira." 
Luke20:27 Erio abande ase Abasadukai bakamochiera, baria bakobora ng’a okobokigwa tikori," 
Luke20:28 bakamoboria, “Omworokia, Musa natorikerete ng’a momura omwabo omonto karakwe, na ere nare nomokungu, korende tari nabana, nagwenerete momura omwabo atware omokungu oria, atenenerie momura omwabo egesaku." 
Luke20:29 Bono mbarenge abamura ba ise omo batano na babere. Oyo bwe ritang’ani akanyuoma omokungu, agakwa, tatiga abana;" 
Luke20:30 na oyio o kabere akamotwara, na ere agakwa, tatiga bana;" 
Luke20:31 nonya noyo o gatato akamotwara. Naboigo bonsi batano na babere bagakwa, tibatiga abana." 
Luke20:32 Nyuma y’ayio omokungu oria nere agakwa. 
Luke20:33 Inee! Ase okobokigwa mokang’o arabe? Ekiagera bonsi batano na babere mbamotwarete.” 
Luke20:34 Yeso akabatebia, “Abana b’ense eye nigo bakonyuoma na konyuomwa;" 
Luke20:35 korende barabwo ababarirwe bagwenerete konyora ense eria, na kobokigwa korwa ase abakure, tibakonyuoma, gose tibakonyuomwa." 
Luke20:36 Naende tibagokwa, ekiagera nigo barabe koreng’ana buna abamalaika, na abana ba Nyasae bare, ekiagera nabana b’okobokigwa." 
Luke20:37 Nonya Musa norokereretie ng’a abakure nkobokigwa bare. Ayio nabo atebete agwo ase ring’ana ri’egetutu, ekero agwatora Omonene ng’a nere Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na Nyasae o Isaka, na Nyasae o Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Nabo ere tari Nyasae bw’abakure, korende Nyasae bw’abare moyo, ekiagera bonsi nigo bare moyo asare.”" 
Luke20:39 Abande ase aborokia b’amariko bakairaneria, “Omworokia, gwakwanire buya.”" 
Luke20:40 Naki monto onde taba okomoboria ring’ana nyuma ase aya. 
Luke20:41 Akabatebia, “Naki abanto bagoteba ng’a Kristo nomwana o Daudi?" 
Luke20:42 Naki Daudi nigo agoteba ase ebuku ya Zaburi, “Omonene agatebia Omonene one, Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio," 
Luke20:43 goika mbeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao. 
Luke20:44 “Daudi nigo akomoroka Omonene, naki rende aba omwana oye?”" 
Luke20:45 Ekero abanto bonsi bamotegererete agatebia aborokigwa baye," 
Luke20:46 “Mwerende korwa ase aborokia b’amariko, abanchete gotaara beboyetie chianga chintambe, na gokwanigwa ase chichiiro, na goikaransa aase e ritang’ani ase chisinagogi, na aase e ritang’ani ase emeyega," 
Luke20:47 abakourereria chinyomba chi’ababoraka, na ase obong’ainereria basaba ogosaba ogotambe. Abwo nabanyore ekina kere ekenene kobua.”" 
Luke21:1 Yeso akaimokia amaiso aye, akarora abanto abanda bakobeka ebiegwa biabo ase ekebekerero gi’esadaka." 
Luke21:2 Akarora omoboraka oyomo omotaka, okobeka ebisabwa bibere bie chitaai." 
Luke21:3 Erio akabora, “Ekeene nabatebirie, Omoboraka oyo omotaka obekire ebinge kobua bonsi," 
Luke21:4 ekiagera aba bonsi babekire korwa ase obonge bwe chinibo chiabo, korende oyo ase obotaka bwaye obekire ebinto bionsi ebiarenge nabio.”" 
Luke21:5 Ekero abanto bande barenge gokwana amang’ana igoro ye Hekalu, buna echabeire namagena amaya na ebiegwa, agateba." 
Luke21:6 “Aya moroche; amatuko nache ritatigare rigena erimo igoro ase erinde eritatagorwe.” 
Luke21:7 Erio bakamoboria, “Omworokia, aya indi arabe rende? Naende ninki ekemanyererio kiaye ekero aya onsi arabe ang’e goikerana?”" 
Luke21:8 Akabora, “Mwerende, timong’ainwa, ekiagera abange nabache ase erieta riane babore: Ninche ere! Nengaki yaikire! Nabo, timobabwatia abwo." 
Luke21:9 Na inwe ekero moraigwe amang’ana ’esegi na eburu‐buru, timogoswa, ekiagera aya bori nache kooroka ritang’ani, korende omoerio toraba ang’e.”" 
Luke21:10 Erio akabatebia, “Egesaku nakeimoke korwana negesaku kende, na oboruoti naborwane noboruoti bonde;" 
Luke21:11 emetengecho emenene y’ense nebe chinsemo ne chinsemo, na enchara, na emechando emenene; nabe namang’ana ’ogoichania, na ebimanyererio ebinene bikorwa igoro." 
Luke21:12 Korende ritang’ani ase aya onsi nabababwate na kobachanda, nababaire ase chisinagogi, na ase chichela, namoirwe ase abaruoti na ase abagavuna ase engencho y’erieta riane." 
Luke21:13 Eke nekero kiaino koba kirori. 
Luke21:14 Manya gaki ase emioyo yaino, ng’a timorengereria ritang’ani eki morairanerie," 
Luke21:15 ekiagera inche nimbae chinkwana na obong’aini, abachandi baino batanyare gokana gose koamererania nabio." 
Luke21:16 Na inwe namoruegwe nabaibori baino, na bamura bamino, na eamate yaino, na abasani baino, na barabwo nababeke abande baino ase ogoitwa." 
Luke21:17 Inamogechwe nabanto bonsi ase engencho y’erieta riane. 
Luke21:18 Korende nonya nagatukia akamo k’emetwe yaino tikagosira. 
Luke21:19 Na ase okoremereria kwaino namonyore obogima bwaino. 
Luke21:20 “Korende, komorarore Yerusalemu oetananirwe nemeganda y’abarwani b’esegi, erio momanye ng’a ogosareka kwaye gwaikire ang’e." 
Luke21:21 Erio abare Boyahudi tiga batame gochia ase ebitunwa, na abare ime ase omochie basoke isiko, na abare isiko tibasoa aroro," 
Luke21:22 ekiagera aya namatuko ’egesiomba, onsi ayarigetwe anyare goikerana." 
Luke21:23 Nabe aakong’u ase abare barito na abakogonkia ase amatuko aria, ekiagera nebe emechando emenene igoro ase ense, na endamwamu ase egesaku eke." 
Luke21:24 Barabwo nabagwe ase chinsonga chi’emioro, nabooswe bairwe ase ebisaku bionsi, na Yerusalemu notachwe nabanto b’Ebisaku, goika ebiro biabo biikeranigwe." 
Luke21:25 “Naende nabibe ebimanyererio ase erioba, na omotienyi, ne ching’enang’eni, na ase ense emechando ase ebisaku, nabatang’ang’e ase okoeera kw’enyancha na emerindo yaye." 
Luke21:26 Abanto mbakwe ekeondogo na okoiroka kobaganyete ayagochera ense, ekiagera chinguru chia igoro nachitengechigwe." 
Luke21:27 Erio nabanyare korora Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ogocha‐ase riire ase chinguru na obonene obonge. 
Luke21:28 Nabo karachake koba ayio, rigereria igoro, ekiagera okoboorigwa kwaino gwaikire ang’e.”" 
Luke21:29 Akabatebia omoreng’anio, “Rigereria omoko na emete ende yonsi;" 
Luke21:30 ekero egochaka goseboka mwarora na komanya ase emioyo yaino ng’a embura yaisire gotwa. 
Luke21:31 Nainwe boigo komorarore ayio agokoreka, momanye ng’a oboruoti bwa Nyasae ng’ang’e bore." 
Luke21:32 Ekeene nabatebirie: Ekegori eke tikegoeta nonya ng’ake goika aya onsi aikeranire. 
Luke21:33 Igoro na ense nabiete, korende amang’ana aane takonyara goeta nonya ng’ake." 
Luke21:34 “Nabo mwerende chinkoro chiaino tichicha koengerwa nokoria bobe na ogotinda, na okwerosia kw’obogima obo, rituko riria ribachere mobosokano, buna omoeto okobwata." 
Luke21:35 Naki naboigo eranyare gochera abanto bonsi abamenyete igoro ase ense yonsi. 
Luke21:36 Ase ayio, renda kera ekero na gosaba, monyore chinguru chi’ogoeta ase aya onsi arache koba, naende gotenena ase obosio bw’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto.”" 
Luke21:37 Na kera rituko nigo arenge kworokereria Hekalu ime, korende botuko ogenda isiko obeera ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni." 
Luke21:38 Abanto bonsi bakamochiera mambia chuni aria Hekalu ime, erinde banyare komoigwa." 
Luke22:1 Rituko Rinene ri’Emegati etabekiri memera, rikorokwa Epasaka, rigaika." 
Luke22:2 Abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko bakarigia enchera y’okomoita, ekiagera nigo bairogete abanto." 
Luke22:3 Saitani agasoa Yudas okorokwa Iskariota. Yudas nigo arenge oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere. 
Luke22:4 Akagenda agakwana nabakuani abanene na abatang’ani b’abarendi buna aranyare komobeka ase amaboko abo. 
Luke22:5 Bakagoka bakabwatana nere komoa chiropia. 
Luke22:6 Agancha, akarigia ribaga akomoruera asebare emeganda etaiyo." 
Luke22:7 Rituko ri’Emegati etabekiri memera rigaika, eri’emanwa y’eng’ondi y’Epasaka egwenerete konyenywa." 
Luke22:8 Erio Yeso agatoma Petero na Yohana, akabora, “Genda motoroiserie Epasaka, erinde toyerie.”" 
Luke22:9 Bakamoboria, “Ng’ai origetie toyeroiserie?”" 
Luke22:10 Akabatebia, “Rora, ekero mwasoire omochie, namoumerane nomosacha obogoretie enyongo ere namache; momotunyane goika enyomba agosoa," 
Luke22:11 motebie omonyene enyomba: Omworokia nkoboria are: Ng’ai enyomba y’abageni ere, inyare koriera Epasaka amo naborokigwa baane?" 
Luke22:12 Omonto oria naborokie akanyomba akanene ka irongo karoisirie; agwo mwariganie.” 
Luke22:13 Bakagenda, bakanyora buna abatebetie, bakaarigania Epasaka." 
Luke22:14 Erio ensa egachia goika ang’e, agaikaransa amo nabatomwa." 
Luke22:15 Akabatebia, “Ninganetie mono mono koria Epasaka eye amo nainwe ritang’ani ntarachandwa," 
Luke22:16 ekiagera nabatebirie, tinkoyeria naende goika yaikeranigwe ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
Luke22:17 Akabogoria egekombe, na ekero airaneirie ng’a mbuya mono, akabora, “Bogoria eke, mwatanane inwe ase inwe;" 
Luke22:18 naki nabatebirie, korwa bono tinkonywa okwama kw’omosabibu goika oboruoti bwa Nyasae boche.”" 
Luke22:19 Akabogoria omogati, na ekero airaneirie ng’a mbuya mono, akayosamunyora, akabaa, akabora, “Oyo nomobere one orurwe ase engencho yaino. [Kora iga ase okong’inyora.”" 
Luke22:20 Naboigo akabogoria egekombe nyuma ase okoria, akabora, “Egekombe eke nokobwatana okoyia ase amanyinga aane, aitekire ase engencho yaino.]" 
Luke22:21 Korende rigereria, okoboko kwaye ere oyokondua nigo kore amo nainche ase emesa." 
Luke22:22 Ekiagera Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nkogenda are buna yachigetwe; korende obobe nobwaye omonto oria okomorua!” 
Luke22:23 Na barabwo bagachaka koborania barabwo ase barabwo, gose ning’o asebare orakore ring’ana eri." 
Luke22:24 Gokaba okoamererania ase egati yabo, gose ning’o asebare obarirwe koba omonene kobua abande." 
Luke22:25 Yeso akabatebia, “Abaruoti b’abanto b’ebisaku nigo bakogambera abanto; naende abare nokobua igoro asebare barokwa Abakori Abaya." 
Luke22:26 Korende asemore inwe taibo, otatiga oyore omonene oino nabe buna oyore omoke; na ere oyokobatang’ana nabe buna omokoreri abande." 
Luke22:27 Inee! Ning’o ore omonene, noyoikaransete ase endagera, gose noyogokorera? Tari ere oyogoikaransa ase endagera? Korende inche nigo inde ase egati yaino buna omobakoreri." 
Luke22:28 “Inwe ninwe mwabeire mogendererete amo nainche ase ogoteemwa kwane," 
Luke22:29 na inche nabaeire inwe oboruoti buna Tata ang’ete," 
Luke22:30 monyare koria na konywa ase emesa yane ase oboruoti bwane, na goikaransa ase ebirogo bi’obonene, na kogambia abanto b’ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli.”" 
Luke22:31 Akabora, “Simion, Simion, rora Saitani nabarigetie abaire anyare kobasoonga buna engano," 
Luke22:32 korende nagosabeire, erinde okwegena kwao tikoera, na aye gokwaonchokire, obeke abamino chinguru.”" 
Luke22:33 Akamotebia, “Omonene nigo inde ang’e kogenda amo naye echela, nonya nase ogokwa.”" 
Luke22:34 Akabora, “Nagotebirie Petero, rero etuoni etarabuga nonkane ara gatato ng’a tomanyeti.”" 
Luke22:35 Akababoria, “Inee! Ekero nabatomete motari nebimoya, ne chisaro, na ebikoroto, imwaremeretwe na gento?” Bakamoiraneria, “Yaya”." 
Luke22:36 Akabatebia, “Korende bono oyore nekemoya akebogorie, na esaro boigo, na ere oyotari nomoyio o birende aoonie eganchwa yaye, agore oyomo." 
Luke22:37 Naki nabatebirie, eriarigetwe ndigwenerete goikeranigwa asende. Ere nigo abareranetigwe amo nabasaria, ekiagera ayarigetwe igoro asende aikeranigwe.”" 
Luke22:38 Bagateba, “Omonene, rora ntore nemeyio ya birende ebere aa.” Akabatebia, “Nabo aisanire.”" 
Luke22:39 Agasoka, akagenda goika egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, buna engencho yaye yarenge, na aborokigwa baye bakamotunyana." 
Luke22:40 Agachia goika aase aria akabatebia, “Saba, erinde timosoa ase ogoteemwa.”" 
Luke22:41 Ageatanana korwa asebare, ekerengo gi’okoruta rigena, akabeka amaru inse, agasaba," 
Luke22:42 ogoteba, “Tata, koranche, onduserie egekombe eke, korende tari buna ndigetie inche, korende buna origetie aye, bikoreke.”" 
Luke22:43 Omomalaika akamoorokera korwa, igoro, akamobeka chinguru." 
Luke22:44 Na ere ekiagera arenge nomoichano mono, akamenta ogosaba nomokia; ebigeri biaye bikaba buna amatoima ’amanyinga agoiteka inse." 
Luke22:45 Agachia koimoka korwa ase ogosaba agachiera aborokigwa baye, akabanyora bararire ase ogoichana." 
Luke22:46 Akabatebia, “Inaki mwararire? Boka, mosabe, erinde timosoa ase ogoteemwa.”" 
Luke22:47 Ekero arenge gokwana, rora, omoganda ogacha, na oria okorokwa Yudas, oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, obatang’aine. Ere akamoika Yeso ang’e komonyunyunta." 
Luke22:48 Yeso akamotebia, “Yudas, nkomorua ore Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto ase okomonyunyunta?”" 
Luke22:49 Na abwo barenge amo nere bagachia korora ayakorigia koba, bakabora, “Omonene, inatorwane nomoyio o birende?”" 
Luke22:50 Oyomo obo agaaka omosomba bw’omokuani omonene, akamobutora ogoto gw’okorio." 
Luke22:51 Yeso akabora, “Tiga tokora igo.” Akamokuna ogoto, akamogwenia." 
Luke22:52 Yeso agatebia abakuani abanene, na abanene b’abarendi, na abagaaka, baria bamocherete, “Iga mwachire nemeyio ya birende ne chinungu buna mogochiera omouri." 
Luke22:53 Ekero narenge amo nainwe ase Hekalu kera rituko timwaramborete amaboko mombwate, korende bono ensa eye neyaino, ekero omosunte okogamba.”" 
Luke22:54 Bakamobwata, bakamoira, bakagenda nere nyomba ime ase omokuani omonene. Na Petero akamotunyana korwa nyuma ore egeka." 
Luke22:55 Bagachia gouta omorero egati y’egoora, bagaikaransa amo, na Petero agaikaransa ase egati yabo." 
Luke22:56 Erio omoiseke oyomo akamorora oikaransete ang’e nomorero, akamobeta amaiso akabora, “Oyo nere igo arenge amo nere.”" 
Luke22:57 Agakana, akabora, “Omokungu, timomanyeti.”" 
Luke22:58 Naende ake omonto onde akamorora, akabora, “Aye noyomo obo ore.” Petero akabora, “Omonto oyo, tai inche.”" 
Luke22:59 Na nyuma y’ensa eyemo, omonto onde akabetereria mono, akabora, “Ekeene, oyo nigo arenge amo nere, ekiagera nere n’Omogalili.”" 
Luke22:60 Petero akabora, “Omonto oyo, timanyeti eri ogokwana.” Erio kegima kagokwana, etuoni ekabuga." 
Luke22:61 Omonene akeonchora, akarigereria Petero. Petero akainyora ring’ana ri’Omonene, buna amotebetie, “Rero, ritang’ani etuoni etarabuga nonkane ara gatato.”" 
Luke22:62 Agasoka isiko, akarera nobororo." 
Luke22:63 Abanto baria babwatete Yeso, bakamosekereria, na komoaka." 
Luke22:64 Bakamotuba amaiso, bakamoboria, “Bana! Ning’o ogoaka?”" 
Luke22:65 Bakamokwana bobe amang’ana ande amange ay’okomorama. 
Luke22:66 Ekero bwachia gokia, abagaaka b’abanto, na abakuani abanene, na aborokia b’amariko bagasangererekana amo, bakamorenta ase ekegambero kiabo, bakobora," 
Luke22:67 “Onye aye naye Kristo, totebie.” Korende akabatebia, “Ninsa kobatebia, timokonyara gwancha;" 
Luke22:68 naende nimbaboria, timokong’iraneria." 
Luke22:69 Korende korwa bono Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto naikaranse ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’obonene bwa Nyasae.” 
Luke22:70 Bakabora bonsi, “Aye naye Omwana o Nyasae.” Akabatebia, “Inwe mwatebire ng’a ninche ere.”" 
Luke22:71 Bakabora, “Mborori ki torigetie goetania obo? Naki intwe abanyene twaigure amang’ana korwa ase omonwa oye.”" 
Luke23:1 Bakaimoka bonsi, bakaira Yeso ase Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Bagachaka komosoera, bakobora, “Twanyorire omonto oyo oonchoire egesaku giaito, otokanirie titoa Kaisari ebango, okobora ng’a ere omonyene nere Kristo omoruoti.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato akamoboria, “Naye Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?” Akairaneria, “Naboigo. Aye gwatebire.”" 
Luke23:4 Pilato agatebia abakuani abanene na emeganda, “Inche tindochi bobe bonde ase omonto oyo.”" 
Luke23:5 Barabwo bakamobetereria, bakabora, “Oburukanirie abanto, okoborokereria ase Boyahudi yonsi, gochakera Galili goika aiga.”" 
Luke23:6 Pilato agachia koigwa ring’ana eri, akaboria, “Omonto oyo n’Omogalili?”" 
Luke23:7 Agachia komanya ng’a nigo are inse ase obogambi bwa Herode, akamotoma gochia ase Herode. Na Herode omonyene nigo arenge Yerusalemu ase amatuko aria." 
Luke23:8 Ekero Herode achia korora Yeso akagokigwa mono, ekiagera korwa kare nigo arigetie komorora, ekiagera aigwete chinkuma chiaye, naende nigo asemeretie korora egekone kegokorwa nere." 
Luke23:9 Akamoboria amang’ana amange, korende ere tamoiraneria rinde rionsi." 
Luke23:10 Abakuani abanene na aborokia b’amariko bagatenena, bakomosoera ne chinguru." 
Luke23:11 Herode na abarwani baye bakamochaya, bakamosekereria, bakamobekera chianga chingiya mono, akamoirania ase Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Erio Herode na Pilato bakabwatana obwanchi ase rituko riria; naki ritang’ani nigo barenge nobobisa barabwo ase barabwo. 
Luke23:13 Pilato akarangeria amo abakuani abanene, na abagambi, na abanto," 
Luke23:14 akabatebia, “Mwandeterete omonto oyo, buna oyobaonchoire abanto; naunirie amang’ana aye ase amasio aino, na tindochi bobe ase omonto oyo ase aria mwamosoerete," 
Luke23:15 nonya n’Herode tarochi, ekiagera omoiranirie gocha asetore. Rora, ere takorete gento kemogwenerete akwe." 
Luke23:16 Erio konamoakire, nimosibore.”" 
Luke23:17 Bono igo yamogwenerete kobasiborera omonto oyomo ekero kie rituko rinene. 
Luke23:18 Bagaaka eriogi bonsi amo, bakabora, “Morusie oyo, tosiborere Baraba!”" 
Luke23:19 (Ere nomonto obegetwe ase echela ase engencho y’eriomana riakoregete ase omochie ime, na ase oboiti.)" 
Luke23:20 Nabo eria kabere Pilato agakwana nabarabwo, akarigia gosibora Yeso." 
Luke23:21 Korende barabwo bagaaka eriogi, bakabora, “Mobambe, mobambe!”" 
Luke23:22 Ere akabatebia eria gatato, “Nase ki? Mbobe ki akorete oyo? Tindochi nonya ne ring’ana erimo asare rigwenerete akwe. Ase igo, nanchire komoaka na komosibora.”" 
Luke23:23 Korende bakagenderera kobora ase eriogi rinene ng’a goika abambwe. Eriogi riabo rikabua. 
Luke23:24 Pilato akanacha amang’ana akoreke buna barigetie. 
Luke23:25 Agasibora ere oyobegetwe echela ase eriomana na oboiti, oyobarigetie; akarua Yeso asebare buna ogwancha kwabo kwarenge." 
Luke23:26 Bagachia komoira, bakabwata Simion Omokurene, oyorenge korwa borabu, bakamotweka omosalaba, ayobogorie nyuma ya Yeso." 
Luke23:27 Omoganda bw’abanto okamotunyana, na abakungu baare kweaka‐aka, na komweng’erereria." 
Luke23:28 Yeso akabeonchorera, akabora, “Abaiseke ba Yerusalemu, timondeera inche, korende ereere inwe abanyene, na abana baino." 
Luke23:29 Naki amatuko nache ekero abanto baratebe: Mbasesenirie abare abagomba, ne chinda chitaiboreti, ne chimbeere chitana kogonkwa!" 
Luke23:30 Erio nabachake gotebia ebitunwa: Togwere, na ebigoro: Totube." 
Luke23:31 Onye bagokora aya ekero omote ore omobese, naki erabe ekero bwomire?”" 
Luke23:32 Abande babere abasaria bakairwa, baitwe amo nere." 
Luke23:33 Bagachia goika aase akorokwa Ekeore, bakamobamba aroro, na baria abasaria, oyomo ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio, na oyonde ensemo y’okoboko gw’okobee." 
Luke23:34 Yeso akabora, “Tata, baabere, ekiagera tibamanyeti eke bagokora.” Bakagabana chianga chiaye, bagachiakera obomera." 
Luke23:35 Abanto bagatenena, bakarigereria. Na barabwo abanyene bakamokorera echeche, bakabora, “Natooretie abande, tiga etoorie ere omonyene, onye oyo nere Kristo o Nyasae, Omochore oye.”" 
Luke23:36 Abarwani boigo bakamosekereria, bakamochiera, bakamoa chinkama," 
Luke23:37 bakabora, “Onye aye naye Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi, etoorie.”" 
Luke23:38 Igoro asare nkiarengeo ekemanyererio kerikire ase omonwa bw’Ekegiriki, na Ekerumi, na Ekeibirania “OYO NERE OMORUOTI BW’ABAYAHUDI.”" 
Luke23:39 Oyomo bwa baria abasaria babambetwe akamorama, akabora, “Inee! Tari aye Kristo? Etoorie aye omonyene, naintwe ototoorie.”" 
Luke23:40 Oyo o kabere akamokania, akabora, “Aye tori komoiroka nonya Nyasae, aye kore ase ekina keria keria?" 
Luke23:41 Intwe ekeene mboronge; ekiagera twaeirwe eng’eria ya boronge y’ogokora gwaito, korende oyo takoreti gento kende kebe.”" 
Luke23:42 Erio agatebia Yeso, “Yeso, ong’inyore ekero ogocha ase oboruoti bwao!”" 
Luke23:43 Yeso akamotebia, “Ekeene nagotebirie: Rero nobe amo nainche Paradiso.”" 
Luke23:44 Bono nigo chiarenge ang’e chinsa isano nemo, omosunte okaba igoro ase ense yonsi goika chinsa kianda," 
Luke23:45 ekero omobaso orimire. Na egetambaa gi’okonacha Hekalu kegatandoka gati‐gati. 
Luke23:46 Yeso akarera ase eriogi rinene, akabora, “Tata, ase amaboko ao nabekire omoika one!” Nyuma gakwanire aya agatweka mo." 
Luke23:47 Omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana agachia korora aya, agatogia Nyasae, akabora, “Ekeene, omonto oyo nigo arenge omonyene oboronge.”" 
Luke23:48 Naende emeganda yonsi, abasangererekanete korora aya, kobachia korora ayakoreka, bakairana chinka chiabo, bakweaka ebikuba." 
Luke23:49 Abasani baye bonsi na abakungu abamotunyanete korwa Galili, bagatenenera are, bakarora ayio." 
Luke23:50 Rora, narengeo omonto oyomo, erieta riaye Yusufu, omonto bw’Arimathaya, omochie o Boyahudi, ere nomonto bw’ekegambero kiabo, omonto omuya, naende omoronge." 
Luke23:51 Ere tanchete amang’ana abo, nonya nogokora kwabo, nigo aganyete oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Luke23:52 Omonto oyo agachiera Pilato, akamosaba aegwe omobere o Yeso." 
Luke23:53 Akayoikia, akayoboyia egetambaa ki’egatani, akayobeka ase oboina bwabaachetwe ase egetare, aase monto onde atana kobekwa." 
Luke23:54 Nigo riarenge rituko ri’Okwearigania, na Esabato egachaka gosoa." 
Luke23:55 Abakungu abachete amo nere korwa Galili, nigo batunyanete korwa nyuma, bakarigereria oboina na buna omobere oye bwareretigwe." 
Luke23:56 Bakairana, bakaroisia amanukato na amaguta e rimisu rigiya. Ne rituko ri’Esabato bagatimoka buna yachigetwe." 
Luke24:1 Korende rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, kobogokiamoka, abakungu baria bakagenda ase oboina, bakaira amanukato aria, ayababegete ang’e." 
Luke24:2 Bakanyora rigena riria riatigerigwe korwa ase oboina," 
Luke24:3 korende ekero basoa, tibanyora omobere bw’Omonene Yeso." 
Luke24:4 Ekero baichanete ase aya, rora, abanto babere bagatenena ang’e asebare, beboyetie chianga chikomeka‐meka." 
Luke24:5 Abakungu baria bagasogwa nomoondoko, bagatung’ama inse. Abanto baria bakabatebia, “Nase ki mokorigia oyore moyo ase ebitondo? [Tari aa, korende obokire.]" 
Luke24:6 Inyora buna abatebetie ekero arenge Galili," 
Luke24:7 ng’a nemogwenerete Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto abekwe ase amaboko ’abanto abanyene ebibe, na kobambwa, na ase rituko ria gatato naboke.”" 
Luke24:8 Bakainyora amang’ana aye. 
Luke24:9 Bakairana korwa ase oboina, bagatebia baria ikomi nomo na baria abande bonsi amang’ana ayio onsi." 
Luke24:10 Na baria batebetie abatomwa amang’ana aya nabwo aba: Mariamu Magidalena, na Yoana, na Mariamu ng’ina Yakobo na abakungu bande abarenge amo nabarabwo." 
Luke24:11 Amang’ana abo akarorekana koba ng’a naya bosa asebare, gose tibayancha. [" 
Luke24:12 Korende Petero akaimoka, akagenda bwango ase oboina, agatung’ama, akarigereria ime, akarora ebitambaa biria bireo bioka, akairana bwoye, okumetie ase aya akorekire.]" 
Luke24:13 Rituko riria babere asebare nkogenda baare ase omochie okorokwa Emau, orenge oboare korwa Yerusalemu ang’e chimaeli isano na isato." 
Luke24:14 Na barabwo ngokwana baare barabwo ase barabwo igoro ase aya onsi akorekire. 
Luke24:15 Kabagokwana na koborania, Yeso omonyene agaika ang’e, akagenda amo nabarabwo." 
Luke24:16 Amaiso abo agatubwa, tibanyara komomanya." 
Luke24:17 Akababoria, “Mang’ana ki aya mokoborania ase orogendo rwaino?” Bagatenena, baichanete." 
Luke24:18 Oyomo obo, erieta riaye Kiliopa, akamoiraneria, “Inee! Naye bweka ore omogeni ase Yerusalemu, otamanyeti ayare ime yaye amatuko aya?”" 
Luke24:19 Akababoria, “Mang’ana ki?” Bakamotebia, “Amang’ana a Yeso Omonazareti, oyorenge omobani, omonyene chinguru ase ogokora na ase ring’ana, ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na ase abanto bonsi;" 
Luke24:20 na buna abakuani na abanene baito bamoruete ase ekina ki’ogokwa, bakamobamba." 
Luke24:21 Korende intwe iga twasemeretie ng’a nere oraboorie Abaisraeli. Kobua aya onsi, rero nerituko ria gatato korwa ekero ayio akorekanete." 
Luke24:22 Naende abakungu bande ba seito nigo batoichanetie. Abwo barenge ase oboina mambia," 
Luke24:23 na ekero batanyorete omobere oye, bakairana, bakabora ng’a baorokeirwe nabamalaika ababatebetie ng’a moyo are." 
Luke24:24 Naende abande abarenge amo naintwe bakagenda ase oboina, bakarora buna abakungu batebete, korende ere tibamorora.”" 
Luke24:25 Ere akabatebia, “Inwe abanto abariri, nabanyene chinkoro chinyoro ase okwegena onsi aya ababani batebete." 
Luke24:26 Inee! Tiyamogwenerete Kristo konyora emechando eye ritang’ani atarasoa ase obonene bwaye?” 
Luke24:27 Agachakera korwa Musa na ababani bonsi akabatebereria korwa ase amariko onsi amang’ana arikire igoro yaye. 
Luke24:28 Bagaika omochie oria ase baare kogenda, na ere agekora buna nigo arigetie kobaetania." 
Luke24:29 Bakamosorora, bakabora, “Kabe amo naintwe, ekiagera bwairire, na omobaso oerire bono.” Agasoa koba amo nabarabwo." 
Luke24:30 Ekero aikaransire amo nabarabwo koragera, akabogoria omogati, akayosesenia, akayosamunyora, akabaa." 
Luke24:31 Erio amaiso abo akaramokigwa, bakamomanya; na agwo kegima agasira, tarorekana asebare." 
Luke24:32 Bakaborania, “Inee! Emioyo yaito tiyarenge gwoka ekero aba ngokwana are naintwe inchera na gotworokereria amariko?”" 
Luke24:33 Bakaimoka ensa eria eria, bakairana Yerusalemu, bakanyora baria ikomi nomo basangererekanete, na baria abarenge amo nabarabwo," 
Luke24:34 bakabora, “Ekeene, Omonene obokire, oorokeire Simion.”" 
Luke24:35 Na barabwo bakabatebia aya akoreka inchera, buna emanyekania asebare ase ogosamunyora omogati." 
Luke24:36 Ekero baare gokwana iga, Yeso omonyene agatenena egati yabo, akabatebia, “Omorembe obe asemore!”" 
Luke24:37 Bakegosa, bagasogwa nomoondoko, bagakaga ng’a nerirengari barorire." 
Luke24:38 Akabatebia, “Inaki mogoichana? Naende inaki ogosiereria kwaimokire ase chinkoro chiaino?" 
Luke24:39 Rora amaboko aane na amagoro aane, ng’a ninche omonyene; mbwata‐bwate, morore, ekiagera rirengari tiriri nomobere na amauga buna mondoche inche inde naro.” [" 
Luke24:40 Ekero akoorire gokwana aya akaborokia amaboko aye na amagoro aye.] 
Luke24:41 Ekero bataregena ase engencho y’omogoko, na ogokumia, akababoria, “More na gento mokoria aa?”" 
Luke24:42 Bakamoa egesamunye gi’enswe gesambire na obooke boke. 
Luke24:43 Akabibogoria, akabiria ase amaiso abo." 
Luke24:44 Akabatebia, “Aya naro amang’ana aane nare kona‐kobatebia ekero narenge amo nainwe, buna onsi agwenerete goikeranigwa, ayarigetwe igoro yane ase amachiko a Musa, na ase ababani, na ase Zaburi.”" 
Luke24:45 Erio akaigora chinkoro chiabo, banyare komanya amariko." 
Luke24:46 Akabatebia, “Naboigo yarigetwe ng’a nemogwenerete Kristo gochandwa, na koboka korwa ase abakure ase rituko ria gatato;" 
Luke24:47 na ebisaku bionsi mbiranderigwe ase erieta riaye okoonchoka na okorusigwa kw’ebibe, gochakera Yerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 Inwe mbirori b’amang’ana aya. 
Luke24:49 Rigereria, nintome asemore aya Tata abarierete eira, korende ikaransa ase omochie oyo Yerusalemu goika mobekwe chinguru chikorwa igoro.”" 
Luke24:50 Akabatang’ana gochia isiko goika Bethania; akaimokia amaboko aye, akabasesenia." 
Luke24:51 Kabasesenirie ageatanana korwa asebare akabogorigwa gochia igoro. 
Luke24:52 Na barabwo bakamosasima, bakairana Yerusalemu nomogoko omonene;" 
Luke24:53 bakaba botambe ime ase Hekalu, bakomotogia Nyasae." 
John1:1 Agwo omochakano ndiarengeo Ring’ana, ne Ring’ana nigo riarenge amo na Nyasae, na rirorio Ring’ana nigo riarenge Nyasae." 
John1:2 Oyio agwo omochakano nigo arenge amo na Nyasae. 
John1:3 Bionsi bigakoreka ase oyio; gose onye tari ere, anga tigiakoregete kende gionsi egiakoregete." 
John1:4 Ime yaye nao bwarenge obogima; na obogima obwo nigo bwarenge omobaso ase abanto. 
John1:5 Noro omobaso obarire ase omosunte, erio omosunte toyorimia." 
John1:6 Akaoroka omonto, otometwe korwa ase Nyasae, erieta riaye Yohana." 
John1:7 Oyo nigo achete abe kirori, erinde aorokie omobaso, bonsi banyare kwegena goetera asere." 
John1:8 Oyio tarenge omobaso oria, korende nigo achete aorokie omobaso." 
John1:9 Omobaso bw’ekeene, oria okobarera kera omonto, ngocha orenge ase ense." 
John1:10 Nao arenge ase ense ime, ense egatongwa goetera asere, na abanto b’ense tibamomanya." 
John1:11 Agacha ase abaye, na barabwo abare abaye tibamwancha." 
John1:12 Korende bonsi abamwanchete, akabaa okobua babe abana ba Nyasae, nabwo bariegenire erieta riaye." 
John1:13 Abwo baiboirwe, tari korwa ase amanyinga a mwanyabanto, gose tari ase ogwancha kw’omobere, gose tari ase ogwancha kw’omonto, korende nigo baiboirwe na Nyasae." 
John1:14 Na rirorio Ring’ana rigakoreka koba omobere, akamenya ase egati yaito. Tokarora obonene bwaye, obonene buna obw’Omwana omomoima orure ase Tata, oichire nobuya na ekeene." 
John1:15 Yohana akamwatora, agaaka egeturi, akabora, “Oyo nere natebete igoro yaye ng’a: Oyorache nyuma yane nigo are omonene kombua, ekiagera nao arenge ritang’ani asende.”" 
John1:16 Na ase oboikeranu bwaye intwe twensi twanyorire obuya igoro ase obuya. 
John1:17 Naki amachiko arwerete ase amaboko a Musa, obuya na ekeene nigo biachete goetera ase Yeso Kristo." 
John1:18 Monto onde tari ororire Nyasae kero kende gionsi; Omwana omomoima ore ase egekuba gia Tata, nere omoorokirie." 
John1:19 Naende obo nabwo oborori bwa Yohana, ekero Abayahudi batomete abakuani na Abalawi korwa Yerusalemu bamoborie, “Aye naye ng’o?”" 
John1:20 Ere akaorokia, takana, agateba, “Inche tari Kristo.”" 
John1:21 Bakamoboria, “Naki rende? Naye Elija?” Akabora, “Inche tindi ere.” “Aye naye omobani oria?” Akairaneria, “Yaya.”" 
John1:22 Nabo bakamoboria, “Naye ng’o rende? Toe abatotomete okoiraneria. Naki ogweteba?”" 
John1:23 Akabora, “Inche neriogi ri’oyo ogoaka eriogi ase erooro: Rongeyia enchera y’Omonene, buna omobani Isaya atebete.”" 
John1:24 Na barabwo abatometwe nigo barwete ase Abafarisai. 
John1:25 Bakaboria Yohana, “Naki rende okobatisa, onye aye tori Kristo, gose Elija, gose omobani oria?”" 
John1:26 Yohana akabairaneria, “Inche nigo nkobatisa ase amache, korende egati yaino nateneineo oyomotamanyeti inwe." 
John1:27 Nere oyorache nyuma yane, inche tinyisaini nyesibore enuga y’egekoroto kiaye.”" 
John1:28 Aya nigo akoregete Bethania ng’umbu ya Yorodan, aase Yohana arenge kobatisera." 
John1:29 Rituko ria kabere Yohana akarora Yeso ogocha asare, akabora, “Rora, Emanwa y’Eng’ondi ya Nyasae, oyokorusia ebibe bi’ense!" 
John1:30 Oyo nere naare goteba igoro yaye: Ngocha are omonto nyuma yane oyore omonene kombua, ekiagera nao arenge ritang’ani asende." 
John1:31 Inche tinamomanyete; korende aorokigwe ase Abaisraeli, nabo ase ayio ngacha na kobatisa ase amache.”" 
John1:32 Naende Yohana akaorokia, “Narorire Omoika ogoika korwa igoro buna riruma, okobeera igoro asare." 
John1:33 Na inche tinamomanya, korende ere oyontomete kobatisa ase amache, oyio nere ontebetie: Ere oyo oranyare korora Omoika ogoika na goikaransa igoro yaye, oyio nere okobatisa n’Omoika Omochenu." 
John1:34 Na inche narorire, naende naorokirie ng’a oyo nere Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
John1:35 Naende rituko ria kabere Yohana nigo arenge oteneine amo na babere b’aborokigwa baye. 
John1:36 Akarigereria Yesu ogotaara, akabora, “Rora, Emanwa y’Eng’ondi ya Nyasae!”" 
John1:37 Aborokigwa baria babere bakamoigwa ogoteba aya, bagatunyana Yeso." 
John1:38 Yeso akeonchora, akabarora bakomotunyana, akababoria, “Ninki mokorigia?” Bakamotebia, “Rabii” (okoonchorwa kwaye Omworokia), “nga’i omenyete?”" 
John1:39 Akabatebia, “Inchuo morore.” Bagacha, bakarora aase amenyete, bakaba nere rituko riria; nigo chiarenge ang’e chinsa ikomi." 
John1:40 Anderea, momura omwabo Simion Petero, nigo arenge oyomo bwa baria babere baigwete Yohana, na gotunyana Yeso." 
John1:41 Oyo akanyora ritang’ani Simion momura omwabo omonyene, akamotebia, “Twanyorire Masihi” (okoonchorwa kwaye Kristo)." 
John1:42 Akamoira ase Yeso. Yeso akamorigereria, akabora, “Aye Simion, omwana o Yohana, norokwe Kefa” (okoonchorwa kwaye Petero, gose egetare)." 
John1:43 Rituko ria kabere Yeso akarigia koimoka kogenda Galili. Akanyora Filipo, akamotebia, “Ntunyana.”" 
John1:44 Nere Filipo nigo arenge omonto o Bethisaida, omochie bw’Anderea na Petero." 
John1:45 Filipo akanyora Natanaeli, akamotebia, “Twanyorire ere oyo amang’ana aye arigetwe na Musa ase amachiko, naende nababani, Yeso omwana o Yusufu, omonto o Nazareti.”" 
John1:46 Natanaeli akamoboria, “Egento ekiya nakenyare korwa Nazareti?” Filipo akamotebia, “Inchuo orore.”" 
John1:47 Yeso akarora Natanaeli ogocha asare, agakwana igoro yaye, “Rora oyo n’Omoisraeli ekeene, otari nobong’ainereria ime yaye!”" 
John1:48 Natanaeli akamoboria, “Ing’ai kwamanyera?” Yeso akamoiraneria, “Ritang’ani Filipo atarakorangeria, ekero kwarenge inse ase omoko, konya nakororire.”" 
John1:49 Natanaeli akamoiraneria, “Omworokia, aye n’Omwana o Nyasae, naye Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
John1:50 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Inee! Kwegenire ekiagera nagotebia ng’a nakoroche inse ase omoko? Norore amang’ana amanene kobua aya.”" 
John1:51 Abamotebia, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Inamorore igoro akoigoka, na abamalaika ba Nyasae bakoriina na goika igoro ase Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto.”" 
John2:1 Naende rituko ria gatato yarenge enyangi agwo Kana ya Galili, na ng’ina Yeso nao arenge." 
John2:2 Yeso nere konya orangerigwe amo naborokigwa baye ase enyangi. 
John2:3 Goika edivai egachia kobaremera, ng’ina Yeso akamotebia, “Tibari nedivai.”" 
John2:4 Yeso akamotebia, “Omong’ina, inki inche nde naye? Ensa yane teraika.”" 
John2:5 Ng’ina agatebia abasomba, “Rinde rionsi arabatebie, morikore.”" 
John2:6 Nchiarenge aroro chinsiongo isano nemo chi’amagena, chiabekire aroro ase engencho y’ogwesiberia kw’Abayahudi; kera eyemo nigo yarenge ekerengo gie chigalani emerongo ebere gose etato." 
John2:7 Yeso akabatebia, “Ichoria chinsiongo echi amache.” Bagachiichoria goika igoro." 
John2:8 Akabatebia, Bono taa, “moirere omonene bw’omoyega.” Bakamoirera." 
John2:9 Omonene bw’omoyega agachia koigwa amache aria aonchoretwe koba edivai, tamanya aase yarwa, (korende abasomba ababuuchete amache mbamanyete). Omonene oria bw’omoyega akarangeria omonyuomi," 
John2:10 akamotebia, “Kera omonto ritang’ani nigo agochaka nedivai ere engiya, goika abanto kobanyure mono, erio orenta eyetari engiya; aye gese nigo ogachete edivai engiya goika bono.”" 
John2:11 Oyio noro omochakano bw’ebikone Yeso akorete, agwo Kana ya Galili, akaorokia obonene bwaye; aborokigwa baye bakamwegena." 
John2:12 Nyuma ase aya akagenda goika Kapernaumu, ere, na ng’ina, na abamwabo, na aborokigwa baye; bakamenya aroro amatuko amake." 
John2:13 Naende Epasaka y’Abayahudi nigo yarenge ang’e, na Yeso agatiira goika Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Akarora ase Hekalu ime abanto barenge koonia chiombe, ne ching’ondi, na amaruma, na abaare koonchora chifeta, baikaransete." 
John2:15 Agakora omocharichi bwe chingori, agasokia bonsi korwa ase Hekalu, ne ching’ondi, ne chiombe; agaitera chibesa chiabo abaare koonchora chibesa, akaonchorana chimesa chiabo." 
John2:16 Naende akabatebia baria barenge koonia amaruma, “Rusia ebinto ebi aa timokora enyomba ya Tata one koba enyomba y’okoonchoreria.”" 
John2:17 Aborokigwa baye bakainyora ng’a nerikire, “Risemi ri’enyomba yao riandire.”" 
John2:18 Nabo Abayahudi bakamoboria, “Ngekone ki ogotworokia, ng’a nore noboronge bw’ogokora aya?”" 
John2:19 Yeso akabairaneria, “Tagora Hekalu eye, na inche ase amatuko atato ninyetenenie.”" 
John2:20 Abayahudi bakabora, “Hekalu eye yaagachetwe ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene na etano nomo, na aye oyetenenie ase amatuko atato?”" 
John2:21 Korende ere nigo akwanete igoro ye Hekalu y’omobere oye. 
John2:22 Nabo ekero abogetigwe korwa ase abakure aborokigwa baye bakainyora ng’a nigo atebete ring’ana eri, bakegena ririko riria, ne ring’ana riria Yeso atebete." 
John2:23 Goika agachia kobao Yerusalemu ekero ki’Epasaka ase Rituko Rinene, abanto abange bakariegena erieta riaye, kobarorire ebikone arenge gokora." 
John2:24 Korende Yeso tegenete asebare, ekiagera nabamanyete bonsi," 
John2:25 naende ekiagera tarigetie onde amobere kirori igoro ya mwanyabanto; naki ere omonyene amanyete ayare ime ya mwanyabanto. 
John3:1 Narengeo omonto oyomo bw’Abafarisai, erieta riaye Nikodemo, omonene bw’Abayahudi." 
John3:2 Oyo igo achete ase Yeso botuko, akamotebia, “Rabii twamanyire ng’a nomworokia ore, kwarure ase Nyasae, ekiagera omonto onde tari oranyare gokora ebikone ebi ogokora aye, otatiga Nyasae abe amo nere.”" 
John3:3 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, ekeene, nagotebirie: Omonto ataiboiri eria kabere, takonyara korora oboruoti bwa Nyasae.”" 
John3:4 Nikodemo akamoboria, “Naki omonto aranyare koiborwa kabeire omogaaka? Nanyare gosoa enda ya ng’ina eria kabere aiborwe?”" 
John3:5 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Ekeene, ekeene, nagotebirie: Omonto ataiboiri ase amache na Omoika, takonyara gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
John3:6 Ekeiboire ase omobere nomobere; na ekeiboire ase Omoika nomoika. 
John3:7 Tokumia ekiagera nagotebia: Goika oiborwe naende. 
John3:8 Embeo nigo ekogusa aase erigetie, na egeturi kiaye nigo ogokeigwa, korende tomanyeti aase ekorwa gose aase ekogenda; naboigo na kera omonto oiboirwe ase Omoika.”" 
John3:9 Nikodemo akamoboria, “Naki aranyare koba aya?”" 
John3:10 Yeso akamoiraneria, akamotebia, “Inee! Aye nomworokia bw’Abaisraeli, na aya toyamanyeti?" 
John3:11 Ekeene, nagotebirie: Eri tomanyete nario togokwana, na eri toroche twariorokia; na oborori bwaito timori kobwancha." 
John3:12 Onye nkobatebia amang’ana ’ense, na inwe timokoyegena, naki moregene kondabatebie amang’ana a igoro?" 
John3:13 Naende monto onde tari ogendete igoro, otatiga ere oyoigete korwa igoro, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto." 
John3:14 Naende buna Musa aimokereretie eng’iti ase erooro, naboigo na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto goika aimokererigwe igoro;" 
John3:15 erinde monto onde bwensi oyomwegenire tasira, korende abe nobogima bwa kare na kare.”" 
John3:16 “Naki Nyasae ayianchete ense, goika akarua Omwana oye omomoima, erinde monto onde bwensi oyomwegenire tasira, korende abe nobogima bwa kare na kare." 
John3:17 Naki Nyasae tatomete Omwana oye ase ense agambie ense, korende ense etoorigwe nere." 
John3:18 Oyomwegenire takogambigwa oyotegeneti oikire kogambigwa, ekiagera atariegeneti erieta ri’Omwana omomoima o Nyasae." 
John3:19 Na eke nakio ekina ng’a omobaso ochire ase ense, korende abanto bagancha omosunte kobua omobaso, ekiagera ogokora kwabo kwarenge okobe." 
John3:20 Naki kera oyogokora amabe nigo agechete omobaso, gose tagocha ase omobaso, ogokora kwaye tikobaisa koorokigwa." 
John3:21 Korende oyogokora ekeene nigo agocha ase omobaso, ogokora kwaye kororekane ng’a nigo gwakorirwe ase Nyasae.”" 
John3:22 Nyuma ase aya Yeso na aborokigwa baye bakagenda goika ense ya Boyahudi. Akabeera aroro amo nabarabwo, akabatisa." 
John3:23 Yohana nere nigo arenge kobatisera aria Ainon, ang’e na Salimu, ekiagera amache amange narengeo. Abanto bakamochiera bakabatiswa." 
John3:24 Naki Yohana konya tarabekwa echela. 
John3:25 Nabo okoamererania gokaoroka ase egati y’aborokigwa ba Yohana na Omoyahudi oyomo ase amang’ana ogwesibia. 
John3:26 Bagachiera Yohana, bakamotebia, “Omworokia, ere oyorenge amo naye ng’umbu ya Yorodan, oyio kwaorogetie aye, oyio nao are akobatisa, na abanto bonsi nkomochiera bare.”" 
John3:27 Yohana akairaneria, “Omonto takonyara konyora ring’ana rinde rionsi otatiga aegwe korwa igoro." 
John3:28 Inwe abanyene mwambereire kirori ng’a natebete: Inche tari Kristo, korende natomirwe imotang’anere." 
John3:29 Oyore nomoriakari nere omonyuomi, korende omong’wansi oye nigo agotenena na komoigwa, ogokera eriogi ri’omonyuomi; naboigo omogoko one oikeranire bono.”" 
John3:30 Ere goika amenteke, korende inche nkee." 
John3:31 “Oyochire korwa igoro, oyio nigo are igoro ase onsi; oyore bw’ense noyo bw’ense, nigo agokwana amang’ana ’ense; ere oyochire korwa igoro nigo are igoro ase onsi." 
John3:32 Nigo akoba kirori ase aya arorire na koyaigwa; gose onde tari oyobwanchire oborori bwaye. 
John3:33 Oyobwanchire oborori bwaye oorokirie Nyasae maiso marore, ng’a noyo bw’ekeene." 
John3:34 Naki ere oyotometwe na Nyasae nigo agokwana amang’ana a Nyasae; naki Nyasae tari komoa Omoika ase ekerengo. 
John3:35 Tata omwanchire Omwana, omoeire bionsi ase amaboko aye." 
John3:36 Oyoramwegene Omwana nare nobogima bwa kare na kare; oyotaigwereti Omwana takorora obogima, korende endamwamu ya Nyasae nigo emoikaranserete.”" 
John4:1 Nabo Omonene agachia komanya ng’a Abafarisai baigure ng’a Yeso okorire aborokigwa abange kobua Yohana, na kobatisa," 
John4:2 (nonya Yeso omonyene tare kobatisa, otatiga aborokigwa baye)," 
John4:3 akarua Boyahudi, akagenda Galili naende." 
John4:4 Naende yamogwenerete goika aete Samaria. 
John4:5 Igo agaika omochie o Samaria, okorokwa Sikari, ang’e nomogondo oria Yakobo aete Yusufu omwana oye;" 
John4:6 agwo yarengeo ensoko ya Yakobo. Nabo Yeso, konya orosire ase orogendo rwaye, agaikaransa iga ase ensoko. Konya chiabeire ang’e chinsa isano nemo." 
John4:7 Omokungu o Samaria agacha kobuucha amache. Yeso akamotebia, “Ing’a amache inywe.”" 
John4:8 Naki aborokigwa baye konya bachiire omochie kogora endagera. 
John4:9 Nabo omokungu oria bw’Abasamaria akamoboria, “Naki yaba aye Omoyahudi ogonsaba amache, na inche nomokungu bw’Abasamaria?” (Abayahudi tibari gosanga n’Abasamaria)." 
John4:10 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Onye nkwamanya ekeegwa kia Nyasae, naende nere ng’o okogosaba amache anywe, anga nkwamosaba ere, na ere anga nakoa amache are moyo.”" 
John4:11 Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Omonene, tori negento gi’okobuuchera, na ensoko yachiire inse mono; ng’ai kwanyorire amache aya are moyo?" 
John4:12 Inee! Aye nomonene ore kobua sokoro yaito Yakobo, oyotoete ensoko eye, nere omonyene akanywa amache aya, na abana baye bonsi, na etugo yaye?”" 
John4:13 Yeso akamotebia, “Kera oyokonywa amache aya naigwe erang’o naende;" 
John4:14 korende onde bwensi oyoranywe amache aria ndamoe inche, takorang’a nonya ng’ake; korende amache aria ndanyare komoa, nabe ime yaye ensoko y’amache agosoka na komoa obogima bwa kare na kare.”" 
John4:15 Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Omonene, ing’a amache ayio tindang’a, gose timbaisa gocha aiga kobuucha.”" 
John4:16 Yeso akamotebia, “Genda, orangerie omosacha oo, oche nere aiga.”" 
John4:17 Omokungu oria akamoiraneria, “Tindi nomosacha.” Yeso akamotebia, “Gwakwanire boronge ng’a tori nomosacha," 
John4:18 ekiagera kwabeire nabasacha batano, na ere oyore nere bono tari omosacha oo, ase ayio gwakwanire ekeene.”" 
John4:19 Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Omonene, narorire ng’a nomobani ore." 
John4:20 Chisokoro chiaito nigo chiarenge gosasima ase egetunwa eke, na inwe nigo mogoteba ng’a Yerusalemu nao aase atogwenerete togosasimera.”" 
John4:21 Yeso akamotebia, “Aye omokungu, inyegene, ensa neche, motamosasime Tata ase egetunwa eke, nonya nase Yerusalemu." 
John4:22 Inwe nigo mogosasima eki motamanyeti; intwe nigo togosasima eki tomanyete, ekiagera ogotooreka nigo gokorwa ase Abayahudi." 
John4:23 Korende ensa neche, na bono nere, ekero abasasimi b’ekeene barasasime Tata ase omoika na ekeene, ekiagera Tata nigo akorigia abanto buna abwo bamosasime." 
John4:24 Nyasae n’Omoika, na abwo bakomosasima nebagwenerete komosasima ase omoika na ekeene.”" 
John4:25 Omokungu oria akamotebia, “Namanyire ng’a ngocha are Masihi (oyokorokwa Kristo); karache ere, natoorokerie onsi.”" 
John4:26 Yeso akamotebia, “Inche, oyo ngokwana naye, nere.”" 
John4:27 Erio kegima aborokigwa baye bagacha. Bagakumia ekiagera arenge gokwana nomokungu; korende onde tamoboretie, “Inki okorigia?” Gose, “Naki ogokwana nere?”" 
John4:28 Nabo omokungu oria agatiga enyongo yaye, akagenda omochie, agatebia abanto," 
John4:29 “Inchuo, morore omonto ontebirie amang’ana onsi aya nakorire! Inee! Oyio tari ere Kristo?”" 
John4:30 Bakaimoka korwa omochie, bakamochiera." 
John4:31 Agwo ekero bataracha, aborokigwa bakamosorora bakabora, “Rabii, ragera?”" 
John4:32 Akabatebia, “Inche ninde nendagera nkoria, eye motamanyeti inwe.”" 
John4:33 Aborokigwa baye bakaborania, “Inee! Nomonto omorentera endagera?”" 
John4:34 Yeso akabatebia, “Endagera yane neye: ogokora ogwancha kwaye oyontomete na goikerania emeremo yaye." 
John4:35 Inwe timori goteba: Yatigaire emetienyi ene, erio rigesa riche? Rora nabatebirie: Imokia amaiso aino, morigererie emegondo, ng’a yaikire koba emerabu ang’e ase rigesa." 
John4:36 Oyo okogesa nkonyora are eng’eria na gosangereria amatunda ase obogima bwa kare na kare, erinde oyo okobusura na ere oyokogesa bagoke amo." 
John4:37 Naki ring’ana riria: Oyomo obusura, na oyonde okogesa, nigo rire ekeene." 
John4:38 Inche nabatomete mogese aya motakorerete emeremo; abande bakorire emeremo, na inwe mwasoire ase emeremo yabo.”" 
John4:39 Naende ase omochie oria Abasamaria abange bakamwegena ase engencho y’oborori bw’omokungu oria ekero abatebetie ng’a, “Ontebirie amang’ana onsi aya nakorire.”" 
John4:40 Nabo ekero Abasamaria baria bachia komochiera, bakamosorora aikaranse amo nabarabwo; akabeera aroro amatuko abere." 
John4:41 Abanto abange kobua bakeegena ase engencho ye ring’ana riaye; 
John4:42 bagatebia omokungu oria, “Bono twegenire, tari ase engencho y’amang’ana ao, korende ekiagera tweigwereire intwe abanyene, naende twamanyire ekeene ng’a oyo n’Omotooria bw’ense.”" 
John4:43 Nyuma y’amatuko abere akaimoka akagenda Galili. 
John4:44 Naki Yeso omonyene aorogetie ng’a omobani tari gosikwa ase ense yaye omonyene. 
John4:45 Nabo ekero achia goika Galili, Abagalili bakamoroisia, ekiagera baroche amang’ana onsi ayakorete Yerusalemu ekero kie rituko rinene; naki nabarabwo boigo mbagendete ase rituko rinene." 
John4:46 Agaika naende Kana ya Galili, agwo ase aonchorete amache koba edivai. Narengeo omonto omosike ase Kapernaumu, oyorenge nomwana omorwaire." 
John4:47 Oyio agachia koigwa ng’a Yeso ochire korwa Boyahundi goika Galili, akamochiera, akamosorora achiche agwenie omwana oye, ekiagera konya oisire gokwa." 
John4:48 Nabo Yeso akamotebia, “Motarochi ebikone na amakumia, timori kwegena nonya ng’ake.”" 
John4:49 Omosike oria akamotebia, “Omonene, tirimboka ritang’ani omwana one atarakwa.”" 
John4:50 Yeso akamotebia, “Genda, omwana oo nabe moyo.” Omonto oria akegena ring’ana riria atebetigwe na Yeso, akabwatia enchera yaye." 
John4:51 Ekero arenge gotirimboka abasomba baye bagacha komorotota, bakamotebia, “Omwana oo moyo are.”" 
John4:52 Erio akababoria amang’ana ensa achagete koba buya. Bakamotebia, “Nigoro, chinsa isano na ibere esosera yamotigete.”" 
John4:53 Erio ise akamanya ng’a nensa eria eria atebetigwe na Yeso, “Omwana oo nabe moyo!” Akeegena ere, na enyomba yaye yonsi." 
John4:54 Eke nakio egekone gia kabere Yeso akorete korwa ekero arwete Boyahudi kogenda Galili. 
John5:1 Nyuma ase aya ndiarenge Rituko Rinene ri’Abayahudi; Yeso agatiira kogenda Yerusalemu. 
John5:2 Naende aaria Yerusalemu ase Egeita gie Ching’ondi ndiarengeo ritibo rikorokwa ase Ekeibirania Betiseda, na rirorio ndiabwate ebisoero bitano." 
John5:3 Ime ase ebio mbarenge abanto abange abarwaire baare korara, emeuko, ebirema, na amagata, [baganyete amache aturubanigwe." 
John5:4 Naki ekero gete omomalaika ngoika arenge asoa ase ritibo riria, oturubania amache. Nabo ere oyorenge gosoa ritang’ani nyuma ase amache gaturubanigwe, nigo arenge kogwena oborwaire bonde bwonsi obwamonyorete.]" 
John5:5 Narenge aroro omonto gete oyorenge noborwaire bw’emiaka emerongo etato, na etano na etato." 
John5:6 Yeso agachia komorora oraire, konya omanyire ng’a obeire engencho eye amatuko amange, akamoboria, “Norigetie koba omogima?”" 
John5:7 Omorwaire oria akamoiraneria, “Omonene, tindi nomonto okombeka ase ritibo, ekero amache agoturubanigwa; korende ekero ngochicha inche, omonto onde asoa ritang’ani asende.”" 
John5:8 Yeso akamotebia, “Tenena, etweke egesero kiao, ogende.”" 
John5:9 Erio kegima omonto oria akaba omogima, agetweka egesero kiaye, akagenda. Nabo yarenge Esabato rituko riria." 
John5:10 Abayahudi bagatebia omonto oria ogwenetigwe, “Rero n’Esabato, tari boronge asore gwetweka egesero kiao.”" 
John5:11 Akabairaneria, “Ere oyonkora koba omogima nere ontebia: Etweke egesero kiao, ogende.”" 
John5:12 Bakamoboria, “Oria ogotebia: Etweke egesero kiao ogende, nere ng’o?”" 
John5:13 Korende oria ogwenetigwe tamomanyete gose ning’o. Yeso nigo erusananetie, ekiagera abanto abange barenge aase aria." 
John5:14 Nyuma ase aya Yeso akamonyora ore Hekalu ime, akamotebia. “Rora, kwabeire omogima; tokora ebibe naende, ring’ana rire riibe kobua tiricha gokonyora.”" 
John5:15 Omonto oria akagenda, agatebia Abayahudi amang’ana, ng’a Yeso nere omokorete koba omogima." 
John5:16 Ase ayio Abayahudi bagachaka gochanda Yeso, bakarigia komoita, ekiagera akora aya ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
John5:17 Yeso akabairaneria, “Tata ngokora are emeremo nonya ngoika bono, na inche ngokora nde emeremo.”" 
John5:18 Nabo ekiagera ase aya Abayahudi bakamenta korigia komoita, ekiagera tasaretie Esabato yoka, korende amo naya narogete Nyasae ng’a n’Ise, ogwekora koreng’ana buna Nyasae." 
John5:19 Yeso akabatebia, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Omwana takonyara gokora ring’ana ere bweka, otatiga riria aroche Ise agokora; naki onsi aya agokora ere, ayio naro n’Omwana agokora." 
John5:20 Tata nigo amwanchete Omwana, na komworokia onsi ayagokora omonyene; na emeremo emenene kobua eye iga namworokie, erinde inwe monyare gokumia." 
John5:21 Na buna Tata akobokia ebitondo obia obogima, naboigo n’Omwana akobaa obogima aba arigetie." 
John5:22 Naki Tata tari kogambia monto onde bwensi, korende oeire Omwana obogambi bwonsi," 
John5:23 erinde bonsi basike Omwana buna basigete Tata. Oyotasigeti Omwana tasigeti Tata oyo omotomete. 
John5:24 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Oyokoigwa ring’ana riane, na komwegena ere oyontomete nare nobogima bwa kare na kare, gose tagoika ase ekina, korende oetire korwa ase amakweri, oikire ase obogima." 
John5:25 “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Ensa ngocha ere, na bono nereo, ebitondo biraigwe eriogi ri’Omwana o Nyasae, na baria barariigwe nababe moyo." 
John5:26 Naki buna Tata are nobogima ime yaye omonyene; naboigo oeire na Omwana koba nobogima ime yaye omonyene. 
John5:27 Omoeire okobua kw’ogokora ekina, ekiagera ere n’Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto." 
John5:28 Timokumia ase aya! Naki ensa ngocha ere, ekero abanto bonsi bare ase chimbeera ime baraigwe eriogi riaye," 
John5:29 na barabwo nabasoke, baria abaare gokora amaya ase okobokigwa kw’obogima, na baria abaare gokora amabe ase okobokigwa gw’ekina." 
John5:30 “Inche omonyene tinkonyara gokora kende gionsi. Buna nkoigwa nabo nkogamba, na ekina kiane nigo kere boronge, ekiagera tindi korigia ogwancha kwane, korende nogwancha gwa Tata oyontomete." 
John5:31 Inche kondeorokie omonyene, oborori bwane tibori obw’ekeene." 
John5:32 Nare oyonde oyokombera kirori; na inche namanyire ng’a oborori bwaye agonteba nobw’ekeene. 
John5:33 Inwe mwatomete abanto ase Yohana, na oborori bwaye nobw’ekeene." 
John5:34 Korende inche tindi konyora oborori korwa ase abanto; korende nigo ngokwana aya, erinde inwe motooreke." 
John5:35 Ere nigo arenge etaya egwoka na komoreka, na inwe mwanchire gosasokera omobaso oye ase ekero egeke." 
John5:36 Korende oborori inde nabwo nobonene kobua boria bwa Yohana, naki emeremo eria naetwe na Tata inyekoore. Emeremo eyio ngokora, yambereire kirori, ng’a Tata nere ontomete." 
John5:37 Nere Tata oyontomete obeire kirori asende. Eriogi riaye timwana koriigwa kero kende gionsi, gose ekieni kiaye timwana gokerora" 
John5:38 naende ring’ana riaye timori narirorio ime yaino, ekiagera timomwegeneti ere oyotomirwe nere." 
John5:39 Igo mokorigarigia mono amariko, ekiagera mokagete ng’a nigo more nobogima bwa kare na kare ime y’aro; na ayio naro are kirori asende," 
John5:40 ko mwangire gocha asende monyare koba nobogima. 
John5:41 Tindi konyora obonene korwa ase abanto. 
John5:42 Korende nabamanyire inwe ng’a timori nobwanchani bwa Nyasae ime yaino. 
John5:43 Inche nachire ase erieta ria Tata one, na inwe timori konyancha; oyonde karache ase erieta riaye omonyene, oyio namomwanche." 
John5:44 Naki moranyare kwegena, inwe abamokoenana obonene inwe ase inwe, na obonene boria bokorwa ase Nyasae ore bweka, timori koborigia?" 
John5:45 Timokaga ng’a inche nimbasoere ase Tata; nare oyo okobasoera, nere Musa, oyomosemeretie inwe." 
John5:46 Naki onye mwamwegenete Musa anga mwanyegena nainche, ekiagera nere origete amang’ana igoro yane." 
John5:47 Korende onye timwegeneti amariko aye, naki moregene amang’ana aane?”" 
John6:1 Nyuma ase aya Yeso akagenda ng’umbu y’enyancha ya Galili, nero enyancha ya Tiberia." 
John6:2 Omoganda omonene okamotunyana, ekiagera baroche ebikone abakorerete abarwaire." 
John6:3 Yeso agatiira gochia egetuawa, agaikaransa aroro amo naborokigwa baye." 
John6:4 Na Epasaka, rituko rinene ri’Abayahudi, nigo yarenge ang’e." 
John6:5 Nabo Yeso agachia koimokia amaiso aye, akarora omoganda omonene ogocha asare, akaboria Filipo, “Ng’ai togochia kogora emegati, aba banyare koria?”" 
John6:6 Igo amoboretie aya, erinde amoteeme, ekiagera namanyete ere omonyene eki arakore." 
John6:7 Filipo akamoiraneria, “Emegati ye chidinari amagana abere tekobaisana, kera oyomo anyore moke igo.”" 
John6:8 Oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye, Anderea, momura omwabo Simion Petero, akamotebia," 
John6:9 “Nare aa omosae, obwate emegati etano y’engano ne chinswe ibere, korende ebi inki biraisane ase abanto abange buna aba?”" 
John6:10 Yeso akabora, “Ikaransia abanto.” Mbwarenge aroro obonyansi obonge aase aria. Igo abasacha bagaikaransa, barabwo nigo barenge chilifu isano." 
John6:11 Yeso akabogoria emegati; kayesesenirie, akagabera abaikaransete; naboigo ne chinswe chiria, koreng’ana buna barigetie." 
John6:12 Kobachia koigota, agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Sangereria ebisamunye biatigaire, gento tigesira.”" 
John6:13 Nabo bakabisangereria, bagaichoria ebitonga ikomi na bibere ase ebisamunye bi’emegati etano y’engano, ebiatigaretigwe na baria bariete." 
John6:14 Ekero abanto baria bachia korora egekone keria Yeso akorete, bakabora, “Oyo ekeene nomobani oria orenge gocha ase ense!”" 
John6:15 Nabo Yeso namanyete ng’a mbarigetie gocha komoira, erinde bamobeke abe omoruoti. Ase ayio akerusanania, akagenda naende egetunwa ere bweka." 
John6:16 Rigachia koba mogoroba, aborokigwa baye bagatirimboka gochia nyancha," 
John6:17 bakariina obwato ime, bagachaka kwamboka enyancha kogenda Kapernaumu. Naende omosunte konya obeire, na Yeso konya taracha asebare." 
John6:18 Enyancha egachaka koimoka ase engencho y’omwaga omonge orenge kogusa. 
John6:19 Nabo kabang’usire obwato chimaeli isato gose inye bakarora Yeso ogotaara ase enyancha igoro, ogoika ang’e ase obwato. Erio bakairoka," 
John6:20 korende Yeso akabatebia, “Ninche. Timoiroka!”" 
John6:21 Bagancha komosoyia obwato ime, erio kegima obwato bogaika ase barenge kogenda." 
John6:22 Inkio yaye omoganda oteneine ng’umbu y’enyancha bakarora ng’a obwato bonde tibwarenge aroro, otatiga boria obomo bwoka, naende ng’a Yeso tasoete ase obwato boria amo naborokigwa baye, korende naborokigwa baye bagendete boka." 
John6:23 Korende amaato ande agacha korwa Tiberia ang’e naase aria bariete emegati ekero Omonene ayesesenetie. 
John6:24 Ekero omoganda ochia korora ng’a Yeso tari aroro, nonya naborokigwa baye, barabwo abanyene bagasoa amaato ime, bakagenda Kapernaumu, bakorigia Yeso." 
John6:25 Goika bagachia komorora ng’umbu y’enyancha bakamoboria, “Omworokia, indi gwachete aa?”" 
John6:26 Yeso akabairaneria, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Iga mokondigia, tari ekiagera mwaroche ebikone, korende nekiagera mwariete emegati eria, mokaigota." 
John6:27 Timokorera endagera egosareka korende, endagera ekobao goika obogima bwa kare na kare, eye Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto aranyare kobaa, ekiagera Nyasae Tata obekire ekemanyererio kiaye asare.”" 
John6:28 Nabo bakamoboria, “Ninki togokora tonyare gokora emeremo ya Nyasae?”" 
John6:29 Yeso akabairaneria, “Eye nero emeremo ya Nyasae, ng’a momwegene ere oyotomirwe nere.”" 
John6:30 Bakamotebia, “Mbikone ki ogokora, erinde torore tokwegene? Meremo ki ogokora?" 
John6:31 Chisokoro chiaito nchiariete mana ase erooro, buna yarigetwe: Nabaete omogati korwa igoro bakaria.”" 
John6:32 Yeso akabatebia, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Tari Musa obaete omogati oria orwete igoro, korende n’Tata one ore kobaa omogati bw’ekeene okorwa igoro." 
John6:33 Naki omogati o Nyasae noria ogoika korwa igoro na koa ense obogima.” 
John6:34 Nabo bakamotebia, “Omonene, amatuko onsi otoe omogati oyio.”" 
John6:35 Yeso akabatebia, “Inche nomogati bw’obogima; ere oyogocha asende takoigwa enchara nonya ng’ake, na ere oyoranyegene takorang’a nonya ng’ake." 
John6:36 Korende nabatebirie ng’a mwandorire, ko timonyegeneti." 
John6:37 Bonsi aba Tata akong’a nabache asende, na ere oyogocha asende tinkomotuguta isiko nonya ng’ake." 
John6:38 Naki naikire korwa igoro, tari ase ogokora ogwancha kwane omonyene, korende ogwancha kwaye oyontomete." 
John6:39 Naende ogwancha kwaye Tata oyontomete nakwo oko, ng’a ase bonsi ang’eire tinsiria nonya noyomo, korende mbabokie ase rituko ri’omoerio." 
John6:40 Nogwancha kwaye oyontomete nakwo oko, ng’a kera oyokorigereria Omwana na komwegena, nabe nobogima bwa kare na kare, na inche nimobokie ase rituko ri’omoerio.”" 
John6:41 Abayahudi bakamwemurunganeria, ekiagera atebete, “Inche nomogati oigete korwa igoro.”" 
John6:42 Bakabora, “Oyo tari Yeso, omwana o Yusufu? Ntomanyete ise na ng’ina. Naki rende akobora: Naikire korwa igoro?”" 
John6:43 Yeso akabairaneria, “Timwemurunganerania inwe ase inwe." 
John6:44 Omonto onde tari oranyare gocha asende, atang’usiri na Tata oyontomete, na inche nimobokie ase rituko ri’omoerio." 
John6:45 Nerikire nababani: Bonsi naborokererigwe na Nyasae. Kera oyoigure na kworokererigwa na Tata, nigo agocha asende." 
John6:46 Tari ng’a monto ororire Tata, otatiga ere oyorure ase Nyasae, oyio nere ororire Tata." 
John6:47 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Ere oyonyegenete inche nare nobogima bwa kare na kare." 
John6:48 Inche nomogati bw’obogima. 
John6:49 Chisokoro chiaino nchiariete mana ase erooro, na barabwo bagakwa." 
John6:50 Oyo noro omogati oikire korwa igoro ng’a monto onde bwensi orayorie, tagokwa." 
John6:51 Inche nomogati bw’obogima oyoigete korwa igoro; omonto kararie omogati oyio, nabe moyo goika kare na kare; na omogati ndarue inche, ase engencho y’obogima bw’ense, nomobere one.”" 
John6:52 Erio Abayahudi bakaamererania barabwo ase barabwo, bakabora, “Naki omonto oyo aranyare gotoa omobere oye toyorie?”" 
John6:53 Yeso akabatebia, “Ekeene, ekeene nabatebirie: Motarieti omobere oye Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto na konywa amanyinga aye, timori nobogima ime yaino." 
John6:54 Oyokoria omobere one na konywa amanyinga aane nare nobogima bwa kare na kare, na inche nimobokie ase rituko ri’omoerio," 
John6:55 ekiagera omobere one nendagera y’ekeene, na amanyinga aane nekenyugwa gi’ekeene." 
John6:56 Oyokoria omobere one na konywa amanyinga aane nigo akomenya ime yane, na inche ime yaye." 
John6:57 Buna Tata are moyo antomete, na inche inde moyo ase engencho ya Tata, naboigo oyokondia, nabe moyo ase engencho yane." 
John6:58 Oyio nomogati oigete korwa igoro, tari buna chisokoro chiaino chiariete mana, bagakwa; oyorarie omogati oyio nabe moyo goika kare na kare.”" 
John6:59 Amang’ana aya nigo ayakwanete ase esinagogi, kaare kworokereria aria Kapernaumu." 
John6:60 Abange ase aborokigwa baye ekero bariigwa, bakabora, “Ring’ana eri nerikong’u, ning’o oranyare koritegerera?”" 
John6:61 Ko Yeso akamanya ase omoyo oye ng’a aborokigwa baye bemurunganeirie ring’ana eri, akababoria, “Ring’ana eri ndiabagochire?" 
John6:62 Naki erabe rende, komorarore Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto okogenda aaria aase arenge ritang’ani?" 
John6:63 Omoika noro okobeka obogima, omobere togwenereti gento; amang’ana nabatebirie nomoika, naende nobogima." 
John6:64 Korende mbare abande ase egati yaino bategeneti.” Naki Yeso amanyete korwa omochakano mbarabi abategeneti, naende ning’o orache komorua." 
John6:65 Akabora, “Eke nakio gekogera nabatebia, ng’a omonto onde tari oranyare gocha asende, otatiga oeirwe na Tata one.”" 
John6:66 Nyuma y’ayio abange ase aborokigwa baye bakairana nyuma, tibamotunyana naende." 
John6:67 Erio Yeso akaboria baria ikomi na babere, “Nainwe boigo morigetie kogenda?”" 
John6:68 Simion Petero akamoiraneria, “Omonene! Togende ase ng’o? Aye nore namang’ana ’obogima bwa kare na kare." 
John6:69 Na intwe twegenire na komanya ng’a aye naye Omochenu o Nyasae.” 
John6:70 Yeso akabairaneria, “Inee! Tinabachorete inwe ikomi na babere, na oyomo oino nekerecha?”" 
John6:71 Nigo akwanete igoro ya Yudas, omwana o Simion Iskariota, ekiagera oyo nere orache komorua; na ere noyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere." 
John7:1 Nyuma ase aya Yeso akaba ogotaara ase Galili; naki tarigetie gotaara ase Boyahudi, ekiagera Abayahudi nigo barenge korigia komoita." 
John7:2 Naende rituko rinene ri’Ebigutu ri’Abayahudi nigo riarenge ang’e. 
John7:3 Bamura bamwabo bakamotebia, “Imoka korwa aiga, ogende Boyahudi, erinde aborokigwa bao banyare korora emeremo yao ogokora." 
John7:4 Naki monto onde tari ogokora ring’ana bobisi onye ere omonyene origetie komanyekana. Kogokora aya eorokie ase ense.” 
John7:5 Naki nonya mbamura bamwabo tibamwegenete. 
John7:6 Yeso akabatebia, “Ekero kiane tikeraika, korende ekero kiaino botambe nkereo." 
John7:7 Ense tekonyara kobagecha inwe, korende nigo engechete inche, ekiagera inche nkoyeorokia ng’a emeremo yaye nemebe." 
John7:8 Genda inwe abanyene ase rituko rinene; tindi gotiira gochia ase Rituko Rinene, ekiagera ekero kiane tikeraika.”" 
John7:9 Agachia gokoora kobatebia aya, agatigara Galili." 
John7:10 Goika ekero abamwabo bachia gotiira, nere boigo agatiira gochia ase Rituko Rinene, tari maiso marore, korende ase bobisi." 
John7:11 Nabo Abayahudi bakamorigia ase rituko erio bakobora, “Ng’ai are oyio?”" 
John7:12 Okwemurungania okonene gokaba ase egati y’omoganda ase engencho yaye. Abande bakabora, “Nigo are omonto omuya,” na abande bakabora, “Taibo, korende nigo agotantania omoganda.”" 
John7:13 Korende omonto tari omwatorete maiso marore ase engencho y’okoiroka Abayahudi. 
John7:14 Goika egachia koba gati‐gati ye Rituko Rinene Yeso agatiira, agasoa Hekalu ime akorokereria." 
John7:15 Abayahudi bagakumia ase aya, bakabora, “Naki amanyete chisemi, na ere tasometigwe?”" 
John7:16 Yeso akabairaneria, “Okworokereria kwane tari okwane, korende nokwaye ere oyontomete." 
John7:17 Omonto karanche gokora ogwancha kwaye, namanye gose okworokereria oko nigo gokorwa ase Nyasae, gose nigo ngokwana ase okobua kwane omonyene." 
John7:18 Ere oyogokwana ase okobua kwaye omonyene nigo akorigia obonene bwaye omonyene; korende ere oyokorigia obonene bw’oria omotomete, nigo are oyo bw’ekeene, na asare obong’ainereria tiboiyo." 
John7:19 Inee! Musa tabaete amachiko? Korende onde oino tari oyobwatete amachiko. Nase ki mokorigia kong’ita?” 
John7:20 Omoganda okairaneria, “Nore nekerecha! Ning’o okorigia kogoita?”" 
John7:21 Yeso akabairaneria, “Nakorete ogokora okomo, na inwe mwensi nigo mogokumetie." 
John7:22 Musa akabaa okwaroka (tari ng’a nigo korwete ase Musa, korende ase chisokoro chiaino), na inwe nigo mogosara omonto ase rituko ri’Esabato." 
John7:23 Gaki onye omonto ogosarwa rituko ri’Esabato, erinde amachiko a Musa tasareka; naki mokombea ekiagera nakora omobere bwonsi bw’omonto koba omogima kegima rituko ri’Esabato?" 
John7:24 Timogamba ekina ase engencho y’ekieni, korende nacha ekina ase oboronge.”" 
John7:25 Abande ase abanto ba Yerusalemu bakabora, “Oyo tari ere omonto oria bakorigia goita?" 
John7:26 Nao are aa gokwana maiso marore gose tibari komotebia ing’ana? Aande gose abanene bamanyire bori ng’a nere Kristo? 
John7:27 Na oyo twamomanyire aase arure, korende Kristo karache, onde tari oramanye aase akorwa.”" 
John7:28 Erio Yeso agaaka eriogi riaye ase Hekalu ime, okworokereria, okobora, “Inche momanyete, na aase narure mwaamanyire, naende tinyerenteti inche omonyene, korende ere oyontomete noyo bw’ekeene, oyio motamanyeti inwe." 
John7:29 Korende inche nimomanyete, ekiagera naruete asare, nere ontomire.”" 
John7:30 Igo bakarigia komobwata, korende onde tari oramborete okoboko kwaye, erinde amobwate, ekiagera ensa yaye konya teraika." 
John7:31 Abanto abange ase omoganda bakamwegena, bakabora, “Inee! Kristo ekero arachiche nakore ebikone ebinge mono kobua ebi iga oyo akorire?”" 
John7:32 Abafarisai bakaigwa omoganda okwemurungania igoro yaye. Erio abakuani abanene na Abafarisai bagatoma abarendi erinde bamobwate. 
John7:33 Erio Yeso akabora, “Nkere ekero egeke inde amo nainwe, erio ningende asare ere oyontomete." 
John7:34 Namondigie, korende timokoonyara; na aase ndabe inche, timokonyara gochao.”" 
John7:35 Nabo Abayahudi bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, “Oyo ng’ai aragende goika intwe titomonyora? Nigo aragende ase Abagiriki abwo abaatananekire na kworokereria Abagiriki abwo?" 
John7:36 Ing’ana ki erio akwana: Namondigie, korende timokoonyora, na aase ndabe inche, timokonyara gochao?”" 
John7:37 Nase rituko ri’omoerio, Rituko riria Rinene, Yeso agatenena, agakwana neriogi rinene akabora, “Onye omonto ore nerang’o, tiga ache asende anywe!" 
John7:38 Oyonyegenire inche, buna amariko agoteba, chindooche chi’amache are moyo nachirue ase enkoro yaye.”" 
John7:39 Ring’ana eri nigo arikwanete igoro y’Omoika, ekiagera baria bamwegenire nabayonyore nyuma, ekiagera Omoika Omochenu konya toraruegwa, ekiagera Yeso konya taraegwa obonene." 
John7:40 Nabo abanto bande ase omoganda bagachia koigwa amang’ana ayio, bakabora, “Oyo ase ekeene nomobani oria.”" 
John7:41 Abande bakabora, “Oyo nere Kristo.” Korende abande bakabora, “Inee! Kristo nigo ararwe Galili?" 
John7:42 Ririko tiriri goteba ng’a Kristo nigo ararwe ase oroiboro rwa Daudi, naende ase Bethlehemu, agachie karia Daudi amenyete?”" 
John7:43 Erio ogwatananekana kogasoa ase omoganda ase engencho yaye. 
John7:44 Abande ase barabwo bakarigia komobwata; korende monto onde taramborete okoboko kwaye erinde amobwate. 
John7:45 Abarendi baria bakairana ase abakuani abanene na Abafarisai, na barabwo bakababoria, “Naki motamorenta?”" 
John7:46 Abarendi baria bakairaneria, “Tana gokwana monto onde bwensi buna oyo agokwana!”" 
John7:47 Erio Abafarisai bakabairaneria, “Inee! Nainwe boigo mwatantanigwe?" 
John7:48 “Ning’o ase abanene baito omwegenire, gose ase Abafarisai?" 
John7:49 Korende omoganda oyio, otamanyeti amachiko, oragererigwe.”" 
John7:50 Nikodemo, oria omochierete botuko, oyorenge oyomo asebare, akababoria," 
John7:51 “Inee! Ogochika gwaito nkonachera kore omonto ekina ritang’ani totaramoigwa na komanya egiakora?” 
John7:52 Bakairaneria, “Inee! Naye boigo n’Galili kwarwa? Rigia, orore ng’a mobani takorwa Galili.” [Bakagenda kera omonto bwoye." 
John8:1 Korende Yeso akagenda ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni. 
John8:2 Mambia chuni agasoa naende Hekalu ime. Abanto bonsi bakamochiera, na ere agaikaransa, akaborokereria." 
John8:3 Aborokia b’amariko na Abafarisai bakarenta omokungu obwatetwe ase obotomani. Kabamobekire gati‐gati," 
John8:4 bakamotebia, “Omworokia, omokungu oyo nigo abwatwa kagokora obotomani." 
John8:5 Nabo ase amachiko Musa atochigete kobaaka amagena abakungu banga buna oyo, naki aye ogoteba igoro asare?”" 
John8:6 Bagateba ring’ana eri ase okomoteema, banyore enchera bakomosoera. Korende Yeso agekumba, akarika nekiara kiaye inse." 
John8:7 Barabwo kobamentire komoboria, akagororoka, akabatebia, “Ere oyotari nebibe ase egati yaino abe oyo bwe ritang’ani komoruta rigena.”" 
John8:8 Agekumba naende, akarika nekiara kiaye inse." 
John8:9 Barabwo bagachia koyaigwa, bagasoka oyomo oyomo, abagaaka nabwo bachagete. Yeso bweka agatigara, na omokungu oria oteneine gati‐gati." 
John8:10 Yeso akagororoka tarora monto onde otatiga omokungu oria, akamoboria, “Omokungu, ng’ai abagosoeri bao bare? Onde tari ogokogambia?”" 
John8:11 Akamoiraneria, “Onde tari, Omonene.” Yeso akamotebia, “Na inche tingokogambia. Genda, korende tokora ebibe naende.”]" 
John8:12 Yeso agakwana nabarabwo naende, akabora, “Inche nomobaso bw’ense; oyogontunyana takogenda ase omosunte, korende nabe nomobaso bw’obogima.”" 
John8:13 Erio Abafarisai bakamotebia, “Aye nigo okwebera kirori omonyene, na oborori bwao tibori obw’ekeene.”"
