John8:14 Yeso akairaneria, “Nonya ngwekwana inche omonyene, oborori bwane nobw’ekeene, ekiagera namanyire aase narure, na aase nkogenda; korende inwe timomanyeti aase narure, gose aase ngochia." 
John8:15 Inwe nigo mokogambia ase okobwatia amang’ana a mwanyabanto; inche tindi kogambia omonto. 
John8:16 Naende ninsa kogamba, okogamba kwane nogw’ekeene, ekiagera tari inche bweka nkogamba, korende ninche na Tata oyontomete." 
John8:17 Naende ase amachiko aino nigo arikire ng’a oborori bw’abanto babere nobw’ekeene," 
John8:18 Inche ninche nkweorokia omonyene, nere Tata oyontomete nigo akong’orokia.”" 
John8:19 Erio bakamoboria, “Ng’ai Iso are?” Yeso akairaneria, “Timokomanya inche, nonya n’Tata timokomomanya, onye momanyete inche, anga mwamomanyire na Tata one.”" 
John8:20 Amang’ana aya Yeso nigo ayakwanete, gakworokereria ase Hekalu, ase enyomba y’ekebekerero gi’esadaka; omonto tari omobwatete, ekiagera ensa yaye konya teraika." 
John8:21 Yeso akabatebia naende, “Inche nkogenda nde, na inwe namondigie, namokwe ase ebibe biaino; aase nkogenda inche, timokonyara gochao.”" 
John8:22 Abayahudi bakabora, “Inee! Nigo areite, ekiagera akobora: Aase nkogenda inche, timokonyara gochao?”" 
John8:23 Akabatebia, “Inwe naba inse; inche noyo o igoro; inwe nab’ense eye; inche tindi oyo bw’ense eye." 
John8:24 Ase ayio nabatebia ng’a namokwe ase ebibe biaino. Onye timokwegena ng’a inche nere, namokwe ase ebibe biaino.”" 
John8:25 Nabo bakamoboria, “Naye ng’o?” Yeso akabairaneria, “Nonya nayio nabatebirie inwe korwa omochakano." 
John8:26 Ninde namange ngokwana na kogamba ase engencho yaino, korende ere oyontomete noyo bw’ekeene; na inche aya naigwete korwa asare, naro nkoorokia ase ense.”" 
John8:27 Tibamanya ng’a nigo are gokwana asebare aya Ise. 
John8:28 Erio Yeso akabatebia, “Ekero mwakoorire koimokereria igoro Omwana‐o‐mwanya‐banto, erio namomanye ng’a ninche ere, naende tindi gokora kende ase okobua kwane omonyene, korende buna Tata anyorokereretie, nabo ngokwana." 
John8:29 Ere oyontomete nigo are amo nainche, tantigeti inche bweka, ekiagera botambe nigo ngokora ayakomogwenera.”" 
John8:30 Gakwanire aya, abange bakamwegena." 
John8:31 Nabo Yeso agatebia Abayahudi baria bamwegenete, “Komoramenye ase ring’ana riane, nigo more aborokigwa baane b’ekeene," 
John8:32 naende namomanye ekeene, na kerokio nakebasibore.”" 
John8:33 Bakamoiraneria, “Igo tore oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu, na titoraba abasomba b’omonto kero kende gionsi, naki rende ogoteba: Namokorwe abasibore?”" 
John8:34 Yeso akabairaneria, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Onde bwensi ogokora ebibe, oyio nomosomba bw’ebibe," 
John8:35 naende omosomba tari komenya nyomba botambe, korende omobiare nigo akomenya botambe." 
John8:36 Gaki Omwana karabasibore, namobe abasibore kegima." 
John8:37 Namanyire ng’a nigo more oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu; korerende nigo mokorigia kong’ita, ekiagera ring’ana riane tirinyoreti ibaga ime yaino." 
John8:38 Aya narorire ase Tata naro ngokwana; nainwe naboigo ayamwarorire ase iso oino, naro mogokora.”" 
John8:39 Bakamoiraneria, “Tata oito nere Ibrahimu.” Yeso akabatebia, “Onye nabana ba Ibrahimu mware, anga mwakora emeremo ya Ibrahimu." 
John8:40 Korende bono morigetie kong’ita, ninche oyo nabatebirie ekeene keria naigure korwa ase Nyasae. Ibrahimu takorete igo." 
John8:41 Inwe nigo mogokora emeremo ya iso oino.” Bakamotebia, “Intwe titoiboiri ase obonyaka; nigo tore na Tata oyomo, nere Nyasae.”" 
John8:42 Yeso akabatebia, “Onye Nyasae n’Iso oino are, anga monyanchete inche; naki narure ase Nyasae, na igo nachire; gose tinyerenteti inche omonyene, korende nere ontomire." 
John8:43 Naki motamanyeti amang’ana aane aya ngokwana? Nekiagera motancheti koigwa ring’ana riane. 
John8:44 Inwe naba iso oino Saitani, na ogwancha kwaino nogokora okogania gwa iso. Ere nigo arenge omoiti korwa omochakano, gose tatenenete ase ekeene, ekiagera ekeene tikeri ime yaye. Kagokwana oborimo, nigo agokwana ayare ayaye omonyene, ekiagera nomonyaborimo, na ise bw’oborimo." 
John8:45 Ekiagera inche ngokwana ekeene, timori konyegena." 
John8:46 Ning’o ase egati yaino okong’orokia ng’a ninde nebibe? Kongokwana ekeene, naki inwe motakonyegena?" 
John8:47 Oyore o Nyasae nigo akoigwa amang’ana a Nyasae; nakio gekogera inwe motari koyaigwa: nekiagera motari aba Nyasae.” 
John8:48 Abayahudi bakamoiraneria, “Titori gokwana boronge ng’a aye nigo ore Omosamaria, naende nigo obwatire nekerecha?”" 
John8:49 Yeso akairaneria, “Inche timbwatiri nekerecha, korende nigo nsigete Tata one, na inwe timonsigeti." 
John8:50 Inche tindi korigia obonene bwane; nare oyomo oyokoborigia, nere orabe omogambi." 
John8:51 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Omonto karabwate ring’ana riane, takorora amakweri nonya ng’ake.”" 
John8:52 Nabo Abayahudi bakamotebia, “Bono twamanyire ng’a nigo obwatire nekerecha, Ibrahimu okure, na ababani, na aye nigo ogoteba: Omonto karabwate ring’ana riane, takoigwa amakweri nonya ng’ake." 
John8:53 Aye nomonene kobua sokoro yaito Ibrahimu, oyokure? Naende nababani bakure. Naye kogwekora obe ng’o?”" 
John8:54 Yeso akairaneria, “Kondetogie inche omonyene, obonene bwane tibori gento; oyogontogia n’Tata one, oyo mogoteba ng’a nere Nyasae oino." 
John8:55 Na inwe timomomanyeti, korende inche nimomanyete. Kondatebe ng’a timomanyeti nimbe omonyaborimo buna inwe, korende nimomanyete, naende ring’ana riaye nindibwatete." 
John8:56 Ibrahimu sokoro yaino nigo agogete ng’a nanyare korora rituko riane; akarirora, akagoka.”" 
John8:57 Erio Abayahudi bakamotebia, “Torakoora emiaka emerongo etano, na Ibrahimu kwamororire?”" 
John8:58 Yeso akabatebia, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Ritang’ani Ibrahimu atarabao, inche nao naare.”" 
John8:59 Erio bakaimokia amagena bamorute, korende Yeso akebisa, agasoka korwa ase Hekalu." 
John9:1 Yeso agachia goeta akarora omonto orenge omouko korwa okoiborwa kwaye. 
John9:2 Aborokigwa baye bakamoboria, “Rabii, ning’o okorete ebibe, nomonto oyo, gose nabaibori baye, goika akaiborwa ore omouko?”" 
John9:3 Yeso akairaneria, “Oyo takorete ebibe, nonya nabaibori baye, korende aya akorekire, erinde emeremo ya Nyasae eorokigwe asare." 
John9:4 Netogwenerete tokore emeremo yaye oyontomete ekero rire mobaso; obotuko ngocha bore, omonto atanyare gokora emeremo." 
John9:5 Ekero inde ase ense, inche nomobaso bw’ense.”" 
John9:6 Agachia gokoora gokwana aya, agatwera amate inse, agakora etintira ase amate aria, agaaka omouko oria amaiso netintira eria," 
John9:7 akamotebia, “Genda bwesibie ase ritibo ria Siloamu” (okoonchorwa kwaye, oyotomirwe). Erio akagenda agesibia, akairana okorora." 
John9:8 Nabo abagisangio baye, na baria bamoroche ekero arenge omosabereri bakabora, “Inee! Oyo tari ere oria orenge oikaransete gosaba?”" 
John9:9 Abande bakabora, “Nere”; abande bakabora, “Yaya, nigo agwekaine nere.” Ere omonyene akabora, “Ninche ere.”" 
John9:10 Nabo bakamoboria, “Amaiso ao naki rende aramogetigwe?”" 
John9:11 Ere akairaneria, “Omonto okorokwa Yeso okorete etintira, akang’aka amaiso aane, agantebia: Genda ase ritibo ria Siloamu, bwesibie; nabo nkagenda ngesibia, nkanyara korora.”" 
John9:12 Bakamoboria, “Ng’ai are oyio?” Akabora, “Timanyeti.”" 
John9:13 Bakamoira oria orenge omouko ritang’ani ase Abafarisai. 
John9:14 Nigo riarenge rituko ri’Esabato ekero Yeso akorete etintira na komoramokia amaiso. 
John9:15 Erio Abafarisai nabarabwo bakamoboria naende buna anyorete okorora. Akabatebia, “Nigo abegete etintira igoro ase amaiso aane, ngesibia, na bono nkorora nde.”" 
John9:16 Erio abande b’Abafarisai bakabora, “Omonto oyo tarwete ase Nyasae, ekiagera tabwateti Esabato.” Abande bakabora, “Naki omonto omonyene ebibe aranyare gokora ebikone buna ebi?” Ogwatananekana gokaba ase egati yabo." 
John9:17 Bakaboria omouko oria eria kabere, “Aye naki okobora asare, ekiagera akoramokia amaiso?” Akabora, “Nigo are omobani.”" 
John9:18 Erio Abayahudi tibeegena amang’ana aye, ng’a nigo arenge omouko, naende anyarete korora, goika bakarangeria abaibori baye oria onyorete okorora," 
John9:19 bakababoria, “Oyo nere omwana oino mogoteba ng’a nigo aiboretwe ore omouko? Naki akora orora bono?”" 
John9:20 Abaibori baye bakairaneria, “Twamanyire ng’a oyo nomwana oito, naende ng’a nigo aiboretwe ore omouko;" 
John9:21 korende buna anyara korora bono, titomanyeti, gose ning’o omoramokia amaiso, titomanyeti. Ere nomonto omogima, moborie omonyene, nekwanere.”" 
John9:22 Abaibori baye nigo bakwanete aya ase okoiroka Abayahudi, ekiagera Abayahudi konya babwatanire, ng’a monto onde bwensi oramoorokie ng’a nere Kristo aserigwe korwa ase esinagogi." 
John9:23 Nero engencho yagerete abaibori baye bakabora, “Ere nomonto omogima, moborie.”" 
John9:24 Erio eria kabere bakarangeria omonto oria orenge omouko, bakamotebia, “Moe Nyasae ogotogia; intwe twamanyire ng’a omonto oyio nomonyene ebibe.”" 
John9:25 Erio omonto oria akairaneria, “Onye ere nomonyene ebibe, timanyeti; ring’ana erimo namanyire, inche nigo narenge omouko, korende bono nkorora nde.”" 
John9:26 Bakamoboria, “Naki agokorerete? Naki akoramogetie amaiso?”" 
John9:27 Akabairaneria, “Naikire kobatebia, ko timontegerereti. Naki morigetie koyaigwa eria kabere? Inwe boigo morigetie koba aborokigwa baye?”" 
John9:28 Erio bakamorama, bakabora, “Naye ore omworokigwa oye, korerende intwe nigo tore aborokigwa ba Musa." 
John9:29 Intwe twamanyire ng’a Nyasae nigo arenge gokwana na Musa, korende oyo titomanyeti aase arure.”" 
John9:30 Omonto oria akairaneria, “Ring’ana eri neri’ogokumia, ng’a inwe timomanyeti aase arure, na ere ondamokirie amaiso." 
John9:31 Twamanyire ng’a Nyasae tari koigwa abanyene ebibe; korende omonto karabe omosasimi Nyasae, na gokora ogwancha kwaye, oyio nere Nyasae akoigwa." 
John9:32 Korwa omochakano teraigugwa ng’a omonto oramokirie amaiso ’omouko oiboretwe engencho eye. 
John9:33 Onye oyo tarwete ase Nyasae, anga takonyara gokora gento.”" 
John9:34 Bakamoiraneria, “Aye nigo kwaiboretwe ase ebibe ebinene, na intwe ngotworokereria ore?” Bakamosokia isiko." 
John9:35 Yeso akaigwa ng’a bamosokirie isiko, akamorora, akamoboria, “Aye kwamwegenire Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto?”" 
John9:36 Ere akairaneria, “Ning’o oyio, Omonene, nyare komwegena?”" 
John9:37 Yeso akamotebia, “Kwamororire, naende nere oyogokwana naye nere oyio.”" 
John9:38 Akabora, “Omonene, negenire”; akamosasima." 
John9:39 Yeso akabora, “Inche nigo nachire ase ense eye ase ekina, erinde abatari korora barore, na barabwo abakorora babe emeuko.”" 
John9:40 Abande ase Abafarisai abarenge amo nere bakaigwa aya, bakamoboria, “Inee! Naintwe nigo tore emeuko?”" 
John9:41 Yeso akabairaneria, “Onye mwarenge emeuko, anga timori nebibe; korende bono nigo mogoteba: Nkorora tore; gaki ebibe biaino biagendereire kobao." 
John10:1 “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Oyotasoereti egesieri ki’eero ye ching’ondi, korende aetere aao, oyio nomoibi naende nomokurumi." 
John10:2 Korende oyogosoera gesieri oyio nomorisia bwe ching’ondi. 
John10:3 Omorendi bw’egesieri nigo akomoigorera, ne ching’ondi nigo chikoigwa eriogi riaye; ere nigo akorangeria ching’ondi chiaye ase amarieta abo na gochiira isiko." 
John10:4 Gakorusia isiko ching’ondi echire echiaye, nigo agochitang’ana, ne ching’ondi nigo chikomotunyana, ekiagera nchimanyete eriogi riaye." 
John10:5 Omonto omoao tichikomotunyana nonya ng’ake, korende nigo chiramotame, ekiagera tichimanyeti eriogi ri’abanto abaao.”" 
John10:6 Omoreng’anio oyo Yeso akabatebia, korende barabwo tibamanyete amang’ana ayio abatebetie." 
John10:7 Erio Yeso akabatebia naende, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Ninche inde egesieri gie ching’ondi." 
John10:8 Bonsi abantang’anerete nabaibi na abakurumi, korende ching’ondi tichiabaigwete." 
John10:9 Ninche inde egesieri; omonto karasoe goetera asende, natooreke, nasoe na gosoka, na konyora oborisia." 
John10:10 Omoibi tagocha, otatiga aibe, na konyenya, na gosaria; inche nigo nachete erio babe nobogima, naende babe naborobwo obonge." 
John10:11 Inche ninche Omorisia omuya; omorisia omuya nigo akorua obogima bwaye ase engencho ye ching’ondi. 
John10:12 Omonto orikire, tari ere omorisia, gose ching’ondi tichiri echiaye; gakorora esese y’orosana egocha, nigo agotiga ching’ondi, otama, na esese y’orosana yachisakora, na gochiserebania." 
John10:13 Ere nigo agotama ekiagera nomorikwa, gose tarengerereti amang’ana e ching’ondi." 
John10:14 Inche ninche omorisia omuya, na echire echiane ninchimanyete, na echire echiane nchimanyete," 
John10:15 buna Tata amanyete inche, na inche nimomanyete Tata, na obogima bwane naborure ase engencho ye ching’ondi." 
John10:16 Naende ching’ondi chinde mbwate, chitari chie riicho eri, na chirochio nabo engwenerete gochirenta, na eriogi riane nachiriigwe. Igo nachibe riicho erimo na omorisia oyomo." 
John10:17 Ase ayio Tata nanyanchete, ekiagera narure obogima bwane, erinde inyare koboirania naende." 
John10:18 Tari omonto okobonduera, korende ninche omonyene naborure. Ninde nokobua koborua; naende ninde nokobua koboirania. Ogochika oko nigo nakonyorire ase Tata one.”" 
John10:19 Erio gokaba naende ogwatananekana ase Abayahudi ase engencho y’amang’ana aya. 
John10:20 Abange babo bakabora, “Nigo abwatire nekerecha, naende nigo are ebarimo; nase ki mokomotegerera?”" 
John10:21 Abande bakabora “Amang’ana aya tari ay’omonto obwatire nekerecha. Inee! Ekerecha nkenyare koramokia amaiso ’emeuko?” 
John10:22 Ndiarenge Rituko Rinene ri’okoinyora okoigorwa na ogosaberwa gwe Hekalu aria Yerusalemu. 
John10:23 Nigo kiarenge ekero ki’obokendu, na Yeso nigo arenge gotaara ase Hekalu ime, ase egoora ya Sulemani." 
John10:24 Erio Abayahudi bakamoetanana, bakamoboria, “Ngoika ririri oratoichanie emioyo yaito? Onye naye Kristo, totebia maiso marore.”" 
John10:25 Yeso akabairaneria, “Nabatebirie, na inwe timori kwegena; emeremo eye ngokora ase erieta ria Tata one, nero ekombera kirori." 
John10:26 Korende inwe timori kwegena, ekiagera timori abamo ase ching’ondi chiane." 
John10:27 Ching’ondi chiane nigo chikoigwa eriogi riane, na inche ninchimanyete, na chirochio nigo chigontunyana;" 
John10:28 inche nachieire obogima bwa kare na kare, na chirochio tichigosira nonya ng’ake, nonya nomonto tagochitaboria korwa ase okoboko kwane." 
John10:29 Tata one oching’eire nomonene kobua bonsi, na onde takonyara gochitaboria korwa ase okoboko gwa Tata." 
John10:30 Inche na Tata nigo tore oyomo.” 
John10:31 Erio Abayahudi bakaimokia amagena naende, erinde bamoake." 
John10:32 Yeso akabairaneria, “Naborokirie emeremo emiya emenge erwete ase Tata; nereri ase emeremo eyio mokong’akera amagena?”" 
John10:33 Abayahudi bakamoiraneria, “Titogokoaka amagena ase emeremo emiya, korende nase okorama, ekiagera aye nomonto ogwekora omonyene ng’a naye Nyasae.”" 
John10:34 Yeso akabairaneria, “Tarikiri ase amachiko aino ng’a: Inche natebete ng’a inwe nigo more chinyasae?" 
John10:35 Onye orogete baria chinyasae, abacheretwe ne ring’ana ria Nyasae (na amariko takonyara gosareka)," 
John10:36 inee, nigo mogoteba igoro yaye, ere oyo Tata aatananete akamotoma ase ense: Nkorama are, ekiagera nateba: Inche n’Omwana o Nyasae?" 
John10:37 Onye tindi gokora emeremo ya Tata one, timonyegena." 
John10:38 Korende konda yekore, nonya timonyegeneti inche, egene emeremo eria, monyare komanya na kwegena ng’a Tata nigo are ime yane, na inche ime ase Tata.”" 
John10:39 Bakarigia eria kabere komobwata, korende akarua ase amaboko abo." 
John10:40 Akagenda naende ng’umbu ya Yorodan goika aase aria Yohana arenge kobatisera ritang’ani, akabeera aroro." 
John10:41 Abanto abange bakamochiera, bakabora, “Yohana takorete egekone kende gionsi, korende onsi aya Yohana atebete igoro y’omonto oyo nigo are ay’ekeene.”" 
John10:42 Abange bakamwegena aroro. 
John11:1 Nabo omonto gete narenge omorwaire, erieta riaye Lazaro o Bethania, omonto bw’omochie o Mariamu na Martha mosubati omwabo." 
John11:2 Mariamu nere oyo oagete Omonene amaguta na komotinyia amagoro aye netukia yaye. Bono Lazaro momura omwabo nigo arenge omorwaire. 
John11:3 Nabo baria basubati bamwabo bagatoma amang’ana asare, bakabora, “Omonene, ere oyobwanchete orwarire.”" 
John11:4 Yeso agachia koyaigwa, akabora, “Oborwaire obwo tari obw’amakweri, korende ase okoorokia obonene bwa Nyasae, erinde Omwana o Nyasae abakwe ase obwo.”" 
John11:5 Na Yeso nigo anchete Martha, na mosubati omwabo, na Lazaro." 
John11:6 Ekero achia koigwa ng’a nomorwaire, agatebana amatuko abere aase aria arenge." 
John11:7 Erio nyuma ase aya agatebia aborokigwa baye, “Togende Boyahudi naende.”" 
John11:8 Aborokigwa bakamotebia, “Rabii, moisonde Abayahudi nigo barenge gokorigia gokoaka amagena, na aye gokogenda aroro naende?”" 
John11:9 Yeso akairaneria, “Chinsa chi’omobaso tichiri ikomi na ibere? Omonto karagende mobaso takogochwa, ekiagera aroche omobaso bw’ense eye." 
John11:10 Korende omonto karagende botuko, igo akogochwa, ekiagera omobaso tori ime yaye.”" 
John11:11 Agakwana aya; erio nyuma ase aya akabatebia, “Lazaro omosani oito orarire, korende nkogenda nde inyare komotura.”" 
John11:12 Aborokigwa baye bakamotebia, “Omonene, onye orarire, nagwene.”" 
John11:13 Korende Yeso nigo akwanete amang’ana ’amakweri aye; na barabwo bagakaga ng’a nigo agokwana amang’ana ’okorara chitoro. 
John11:14 Erio agwo Yeso akabatebia maiso marore, “Lazaro okure." 
John11:15 Na inche nagokire ase engencho yaino, ekiagera ntarenge aroro, erinde monyare kwegena. Korende bono togende asare.”" 
John11:16 Nabo Tomas, ore korokwa Barongo, agatebia aborokigwa bamwabo, “Togende naintwe, tokwe amo nere.”" 
John11:17 Erio Yeso agachia goika aroro akanyora Lazaro ng’a oikire koba ase embeera amatuko ane. 
John11:18 Bethania nigo orenge ang’e na Yerusalemu, koreng’ana chimaeli ibere." 
John11:19 Na abanto abange ase Abayahudi bagacha ase Martha na Mariamu, erinde babaremie ase engencho y’ogokwa kw’oyomwabo." 
John11:20 Nabo Martha agachia koigwa ng’a Yeso ngocha are, akagenda komorotota, korende Mariamu nigo aikaransete nyomba ime." 
John11:21 Erio Martha agatebia Yeso, “Omonene, onye naa kwarenge, momura ominto anga takwete." 
John11:22 Korende nonya mbono namanyire ng’a kende gionsi orasabe Nyasae, Nyasae nakoe.”" 
John11:23 Yeso akamotebia, “Momura omino naboke.”" 
John11:24 Martha akamotebia, “Namanyire ng’a nache kobokigwa ase okobokigwa rituko ri’omoerio.”" 
John11:25 Yeso akamotebia, “Inche ninche okobokigwa na obogima; oyonyegenire inche, naisa gokwa, nabe moyo." 
John11:26 Na onde bwensi ore moyo na onyegenire, tagokwa nonya ng’ake. Inee! Kwegenire aya?”" 
John11:27 Akamotebia, “Ee, Omonene; inche negenire ng’a aye naye Kristo, Omwana o Nyasae, oria ogocha ase ense.”" 
John11:28 Naende gakwanire aya, akagenda, akarangeria Mariamu mosubati omwabo, agakwana ng’ora igo, “Omworokia ochire, ngokorangeria are.”" 
John11:29 Mariamu agachia koigwa, akaimoka bwango, akamochiera." 
John11:30 Na Yeso konya taraika omochie ime, korende nigo arenge aase aria arototeretwe na Martha." 
John11:31 Erio Abayahudi baria barenge amo nere nyomba ime bakomoremia, bagachia korora Mariamu buna aimoka bwango na gosoka, bakamotunyana, bakagete ng’a nigo akogenda embeera erinde arere aroro." 
John11:32 Erio Mariamu agachia goika aase aria Yeso arenge, akamorora, akagwa ase amagoro aye, akamotebia, “Omonene, onye naa kwarenge, momura ominto anga takwete.”" 
John11:33 Erio Yeso agachia komorora okorera, na Abayahudi baria bachete amo nere bakorera; agasogwa nobororo ase omoyo oye, agaichana." 
John11:34 Akababoria, “Ng’ai mwamobeka?” Bakamotebia, “Omonene, inchuo orore!”" 
John11:35 Yeso akaiyeria amariga. 
John11:36 Erio Abayahudi bakabora, “Rora buna amwanchete.”" 
John11:37 Korende abande bakabora, “Inee! Oyo oramogetie amaiso ’omouko oria, tare konyara kogwenia oyo takwa?”" 
John11:38 Nabo Yeso oichanete naende ase omoyo oye, agaika ase embeera. Ero nigo yarenge rikuruma, naende rigena ndiabegetwe igoro yaye." 
John11:39 Yeso akabora, “Tigeria rigena.” Martha, mosubati omwabo bw’oria okwete, akamotebia, “Omonene, otiokire bono, ekiagera obeire egetondo ase amatuko ane.”" 
John11:40 Yeso akamotebia, “Tinagotebia ng’a koregene norore obonene bwa Nyasae?”" 
John11:41 Nabo bakarusia rigena riria. Yeso akaimokia amaiso aye igoro, akabora, “Tata, nakoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera okonyigwa." 
John11:42 Na inche nimanyete ng’a nigo okonyigwa amatuko onsi; korende ase engencho y’omoganda oyo ong’etanaine konya nakwanire aya, banyare gwancha ng’a naye gwantomete.”" 
John11:43 Ekero akwanire igo, agaaka eriogi rinene, “Lazaro, soka isiko!”" 
John11:44 Oria okwete agasoka, oboyirie egetambaa amagoro na amaboko; obosio bwaye boboyirie egetambaa. Yeso akabatebia, “Mosansore, momotige agende.”" 
John11:45 Nabo abange ase Abayahudi abachete amo na Mariamu na korora aya Yeso akorete, bakamwegena." 
John11:46 Korende abande babo bakagenda ase Abafarisai, bakabatebia aya Yeso akorete." 
John11:47 Abakuani abanene na Abafarisai bagasangererekana ase ekegambero, bakabora, “Ninki togokora? Ekiagera omonto oyo nigo agokora ebikone ebinge." 
John11:48 Toise komotiga iga, abanto bonsi mbamwegene; na Abarumi mbache, batoure aase aito aachenu na egesaku giaito.”" 
John11:49 Omonto oyomo asebare, Kayafa, oyorenge omokuani omonene ase omwaka oria, akabatebia, “Inwe timomanyeti kende gionsi." 
John11:50 Gose timorengerereti ng’a mbuya omonto oyomo akwe ase engencho y’abanto, erinde egesaku ekegima tigesira.”" 
John11:51 Naende eri takwanete ase omoyo oye omonyene, korende ekiagera arenge omokuani omonene ase omwaka oria, akabana ng’a Yeso nakwe ase engencho y’egesaku keria;" 
John11:52 gose tari ase engencho y’egesaku keria gioka, korende amo naya asangererie abana ba Nyasae baria baatananekire, babe abamo." 
John11:53 Nabo korwa rituko riria bakarengereria buna baranyare komoita. 
John11:54 Yeso tataarete naende maiso marore ase egati y’Abayahudi, korende akarua aria akagenda aase ang’e nerooro, goika omochie okorokwa Efraimu; akamenya aroro amo naborokigwa baye." 
John11:55 Naende Epasaka y’Abayahudi nigo yarenge ang’e; abange bagatiira korwa chinka chiabo kogenda Yerusalemu gotang’anera Epasaka, erinde besibie." 
John11:56 Nabo bakarigia Yeso, bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, bagotenena ase Hekalu, “Naki moroche? Tagocha‐gocha ase rituko rinene nonya ng’ake?”" 
John11:57 Bono abakuani abanene na Abafarisai bakarua ogochika ng’a onye monto onde omanyete aase are, arente amang’ana, banyare komobwata." 
John12:1 Nabo amatuko atano na rimo ritang’ani ri’Epasaka Yeso agaika Bethania, agwo aase Lazaro arenge, oria okwete, akabokigwa na Yeso." 
John12:2 Bakamoroiseria endagera aria. Martha ere agakora emeremo eyio, korende Lazaro nigo arenge oyomo bwa baria baikaransete ase endagera amo nere." 
John12:3 Erio Mariamu akabogoria ekerengo ki’eratili eyemo y’amanukato e rigori rinene, agaaka Yeso amagoro, akayatinyia netukia yaye; enyomba egaichora rimisu ri’amaguta aria." 
John12:4 Korende Yudas Iskariota mosinto o Simion, oyomo bw’aborokigwa ba Yeso oyoramorue, akabora," 
John12:5 “Nase ki amaguta aya ataoonigwa chidinari amagana atato, na echio chiegwe abataka?”" 
John12:6 Aya igo akwanete, tari ng’a arorerete abataka amabera, korende nekiagera arenge omoibi, naende abwate esanduku ye chisiringi, na igo anarete korusia echiabekire aroro." 
John12:7 Erio Yeso agateba, “Motige, agache aya goika rituko ri’ogotindekwa kwane." 
John12:8 Naki igo more nabataka amo nainwe amatuko onsi, korende timori nainche amatuko onsi.”" 
John12:9 Nabo omoganda omonene bw’Abayahudi bakamanya ng’a ere nao are aria; bagacha, tari ase engencho ya Yeso yoka, korende barore Lazaro, oyio Yeso abogetie korwa ase abakure." 
John12:10 Abakuani abanene bagakora ekina baite Lazaro boigo," 
John12:11 ekiagera ase engencho yaye abange b’Abayahudi bakagenda bakamwegena Yeso. 
John12:12 Rituko ria kabere abanto abange abachete ase Rituko Rinene, kobachie koigwa ng’a Yeso ngocha are Yerusalemu," 
John12:13 bakabogoria chinsagia chi’emekendo, bagasoka isiko kogenda komorotota, bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Hosana! Nasesenirie oyogocha ase erieta ri’Omonene, Omoruoti bw’Abaisraeli.”" 
John12:14 Yeso akanyora emori y’etigere, akayeriina, buna yarigetwe," 
John12:15 “Inwe abanto ba Sayoni, timoiroka! Rigereria, Omoruoti oino ngocha are, igo ariinete emori y’etigere.”" 
John12:16 Amang’ana aya aborokigwa baye tibayamanyete agwo ritang’ani, korende nyuma Yeso gatogigwe, erio bakainyora ng’a narikeire aya, naende ng’a mbamokorete aya." 
John12:17 Nabo omoganda bw’abanto abwo barenge amo nere ekero arangeretie Lazaro korwa ase embeera ime, na komobokia, bakaba bakomoorokia." 
John12:18 Ekio nakio kiagerete omoganda okagenda komorotota, ekiagera baigwete ng’a okorire egekone eke." 
John12:19 Erio Abafarisai bagatebania barabwo ase barabwo, “Mwarorire ng’a timokonyara gokora gento; ense yagendire komotunyana.”" 
John12:20 Naende mbarenge Abagiriki bande ase abanto abwo batiirete kogenda gosasima ase ekero kie Rituko Rinene. 
John12:21 Barabwo bagachiera Filipo o Bethisaida bw’ensemo ya Galili, bakamosaba, bakobora, “Omosike, ntorigetie korora Yeso.”" 
John12:22 Filipo akagenda, agatebia Anderea; erio Anderea na Filipo bagatebia Yeso." 
John12:23 Yeso akabairaneria, akabora, “Ensa yaikire, Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto abakwe." 
John12:24 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie; Enyeke y’engano etagweti esoe inse ase riroba ekwe, nigo ekobao yoka; korende kerakwe, nigo ekwama okwama okonge." 
John12:25 Oyoranche obogima bwaye, nabosirie; oyorageche obogima bwaye ase ense eye, nabogache goika obogima bwa kare na kare." 
John12:26 Omonto karankorere, antunyane; na aase inde inche, nomosomba one nao arabe; naende omonto karankorere, Tata namosike." 
John12:27 “Bono omoyo one oichanire; ninki ngokwana? Tata, ontoorie korwa ase ense eye! Yaya, korende ase engencho y’ayio naikeire ensa eye." 
John12:28 Tata, obake erieta riao!” Erio eriogi rigacha korwa igoro, rigateba, “Naribakire, na inche nindibake naende.”" 
John12:29 Nabo abanto abateneine ang’e bakaigwa, bakabora ng’a kwabeire okogukura; abande bakabora, “Nomomalaika ogokwana nere.”" 
John12:30 Yeso akairaneria, akabora, “Eriogi eri tiricheti ase engencho yane, korende nase engencho yaino." 
John12:31 Bono ekina gi’ense eye nkere; bono omogambi bw’ense eye natugutwe isiko. 
John12:32 Na inche kondaimokererigwe igoro korwa ase ense, nimbang’use bonsi asende.”" 
John12:33 Agakwana aya, erinde aorokie imakweri ki aranyare gokwa." 
John12:34 Erio omoganda okamoiraneria, “Nigo tokoigwa ase amachiko ng’a Kristo nigo arabeo goika kare na kare, na aye naki okobora ng’a nemogwenerete Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto aimokererigwe igoro? Oyo Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto nere ng’o?”" 
John12:35 Yeso akabatebia, “Omobaso nigo ore amo nainwe egeka egeke bosio. Genda ekero more nomobaso oria, omosunte tocha kobabua; ere oyokogenda ase omosunte ime tamanyeti aase akogenda." 
John12:36 Ekero more nomobaso yuegene, erinde monyare koba abana b’omobaso.” Ekero Yeso akwanete ayio akagenda akebisa korwa asebare." 
John12:37 Nonya okorete ebikone ebinge ase amasio abo, tibamwegenete," 
John12:38 erinde riikeranigwe ring’ana riria omobani Isaya atebete, “Omonene, ning’o bwegenire amang’ana aito? Naende ning’o okoboko kw’Omonene kwamaanoreirwe?”" 
John12:39 Nakio kiagerete tibanyara kwegena. Naki Isaya nigo atebete naende," 
John12:40 “Obaukoirie amaiso, okorire chinkoro chiabo chiakong’ire, tibacha korora namaiso abo, na komanya ne chinkoro chiabo, baonchoke na inche mbagwenie.”" 
John12:41 Amang’ana ayio Isaya nigo ayakwanete, ekiagera aroche obonene bwaye; agaatora amang’ana aye." 
John12:42 Korende abange nonya nabanene bakamwegena, korende ase engencho y’Abafarisai tibamoorogetie, tibacha korusigwa ase esinagogi," 
John12:43 ekiagera mbanchete ogotogia kw’abanto kobua ogotogia kwa Nyasae. 
John12:44 Yeso agaaka eriogi akabora, “Oyonyegenire inche, tanyegeneti inche, korende ere oyontomete." 
John12:45 Na ere oyondoche inche nigo aroche ere oyontomete. 
John12:46 Inche nachire imbe omobaso ase ense, erinde kera oyonyegenire, tamenya ase omosunte ime." 
John12:47 Naende omonto karaigwe amang’ana aane, ko tayabwata, inche tinkomogambia, ekiagera tincheti kogambia ense, korende nyetoorie." 
John12:48 Oyo oranyange na otancheti amang’ana aane, nare noyo oramogambie. Ring’ana riria nakwanete, nario riranyare komogambia ase rituko ri’omoerio." 
John12:49 Naki tinakwanete ase okobua kwane omonyene, korende Tata oyontomete onchikire aya ngokwana." 
John12:50 Na inche namanyire ng’a ogochika kwaye nobogima bwa kare na kare. Ase ayio nigo ngokwana buna Tata antebetie.” 
John13:1 Ekero rituko rinene ri’Epasaka ritaraba, Yeso akamanya ng’a ensa yaye yaikire akorua ase ense eye na kogenda ase Ise, akaba nanchete abanto baye abarenge ase ense, naboigo akabancha goika omoerio." 
John13:2 Ekero ki’endagera ya mogoroba, Saitani gaikire kobeka Yudas omwana o Simion Iskariota enkoro y’okomorua," 
John13:3 Yeso omanyete ng’a Ise omoeire bionsi ase amaboko aye, naende ng’a nigo arwete ase Nyasae, naende nkoirana are ase Nyasae." 
John13:4 Akaimoka korwa ase endagera, akabeka chianga chiaye ensemo, akabogoria egetambaa, akeboyia." 
John13:5 Erio akabeka amache ase esani, agachaka gosibia aborokigwa baye amagoro abo, na koyatinyia negetambaa keria eboyetie." 
John13:6 Nabo agaika ase Simion Petero, Oyo akamotebia, “Omonene! Aye ngosibia ore amagoro aane?”" 
John13:7 Yeso akairaneria, akamotebia, “Aya ngokora inche, tokoyamanya bono, korende noyamanye nyuma.”" 
John13:8 Petero akamokania, “Togonsibia amagoro aane nonya ng’ake.” Yeso akamotebia, “Ntagosibeti, tori nobomo amo nainche.”" 
John13:9 Erio Simion Petero akamotebia, “Omonene, tari amagoro aane oka, korende nonya namaboko na omotwe one.”" 
John13:10 Yeso akamotebia, “Oyoikire gwesibia tagwenereti gwesibia naende, otatiga amagoro oka, korende obeire omochenu omobere bwonsi; na inwe mwabeire abachenu, korende tai mwensi.”" 
John13:11 Naki amomanyete oyogocha komorua; ase ayio agateba, “Timori abachenu mwensi.”" 
John13:12 Nabo agachia gokoora kobasibia amagoro abo na kobogoria chianga chiaye, agaikaransa naende, akabatebia, “Mwamanyire eki nabakorera?" 
John13:13 Inwe iga mokondoka Omworokia, naende Omonene; na igo mbuya mokobora, naki naboigo inde." 
John13:14 Nabo onye inche, inde Omonene naende Omworokia, nabasibirie amagoro aino, nebagwenerete gosibania amagoro inwe ase inwe." 
John13:15 Naki nabaeire ekiorokererio ekiya, erinde ayio nabakorera inwe, nainwe moyakore." 
John13:16 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Omosomba tari omonene kobua omonene oye, gose omotomwa tari omonene kobua ere oyomotomete." 
John13:17 Komoramanye ayio, mosesenirie komorayakore." 
John13:18 Tindi gokwana asemore mwensi; nabamanyire aba nachorire, erinde amariko anyare goikeranigwa, ayagoteba: Oyokoria omogati amo nainche oimokereirie egotingiro kiaye igoro asende." 
John13:19 Nabatebirie aya korwa bono ritang’ani ataraba, erio ekero arache koba monyare kwegena ng’a ninche ere." 
John13:20 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Ere oyoramwanche onde bwensi oyo ndatome, onyanchire inche; nere oyoranyanche inche omwanchire ere oyontomete.”" 
John13:21 Agachia gokoora gokwana aya, Yeso agaichana ase omoika oye, akaorokia, agakwana, “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Oyomo oino nandue.”" 
John13:22 Aborokigwa baye bakarigererania, bagasinywa komanya gose ning’o atora." 
John13:23 Narenge aroro oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye, oyobweegegete Yeso egekuba kiaye, oyo Yeso anchete." 
John13:24 Nabo Simion Petero akamosima, akamoboria, “Moborie ning’o atora?”" 
John13:25 Ere oria akamweegeka buna arenge ase egekuba kia Yeso, akamoboria, “Omonene, ning’o?”" 
John13:26 Erio Yeso akairaneria, “Nomonto oria ngotongereria egesamunye ki’omogati na komoa.” Agatongereria Yudas, mosinto o Simion Iskariota, egesamunye, agakemoa." 
John13:27 Naende nyuma kanyorire egesamunye keria, Saitani akamosoa. Erio Yeso akamotebia, “Aya ogokora, yakore bwango.”" 
John13:28 Onde tarenge ase baria baikaransete ase emesa omanyete engencho yagerete amotebetie iga. 
John13:29 Ekiagera Yudas arenge kobogoria esanduku ye chibesa, baria bande bagakaga ng’a Yeso nigo are komotebia, “Gora ebitorigetie ase Rituko Rinene”, gose ng’a abae abataka egento." 
John13:30 Nabo oyo, kanyorire egesamunye keria agasoka bwango; na igo bwarenge botuko." 
John13:31 Erio oyio gasokire, Yeso akabora, “Bono Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto obakirwe, na Nyasae obakirwe ime yaye." 
John13:32 Onye Nyasae okobakwa ime yaye, Nyasae boigo namobake ime yaye omonyene, na komobaka erio kegima." 
John13:33 Abana abake, nkere ekero egeke inde amo nainwe. Namondigie; korende buna natebetie Abayahudi, ng’a aase ngochia inche, inwe timokonyara gochao, bono nabatebirie nainwe." 
John13:34 Ogochika okoyia nabaeire nakwo oko, mwanchane. Buna nabanchete inwe, nainwe mwanchane boigo." 
John13:35 Igo abanto bonsi nabamanye ng’a naborokigwa baane more, komorabe nobwanchani inwe ase inwe.”" 
John13:36 Simion Petero akamoboria, “Omonene, ng’ai okogenda?” Yeso akamoiraneria, “Aase ngochia tokonyara gontunyana bono, korende nontunyane nyuma.”" 
John13:37 Petero akamotebia, “Omonene, nase ki ntanyare kogotunyana bono? Nindue obogima bwane ase engencho yao.”" 
John13:38 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Inee! Obogima bwao noborue ase engencho yane? Ekeene, ekeene, nagotebirie: Etuoni tekobuga goika gwankanire ara gatato." 
John14:1 “Timoichana ase chinkoro chiaino; momwegene Nyasae, nainche monyegene." 
John14:2 Ase enyomba ya Tata nere nobomenyo obonge; onye taibo, anga nabatebia. Nkogenda nde kobaroiseria aase." 
John14:3 Kondagende kobaroiseria aase, ninchiche naende, nimbaroisie asende, erinde asende inche, nainwe mobeo." 
John14:4 Naase nkogenda inche, mwamanyire enchera.”" 
John14:5 Tomas akamoboria, “Omonene, titomanyeti aase ogochia, naki toramanye enchera?”" 
John14:6 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Inche ninche enchera, na ekeene, na obogima; monto onde tagocha ase Tata otatiga goetera asende." 
John14:7 Onye imwamanyete inche, anga imwamomanyete Tata boigo; korwa bono mwamomanyire, naende mwamororire.”" 
John14:8 Filipo akamotebia, “Omonene, tworokie Tata, toisaneke.”" 
John14:9 Yeso akamotebia, “Nabeire amo nainwe amatuko aya onsi, na aye tomanyeti, Filipo? Oyondorire inche, ororire na Tata; naki aye ogoteba: Tworokie Tata?" 
John14:10 Tibwegeneti ng’a inche nigo inde ime ya Tata, na Tata ime yane? Amang’ana aya inche nkobatebia, tindi gokwana ase okobua kwane, korende n’Tata ore ime yane nigo agokora emeremo yaye." 
John14:11 Inyegene ng’a inche nigo inde ime ya Tata, na Tata ime yane; gose inyegene ase engencho y’emeremo emenyene." 
John14:12 “Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Oyoranyegene inche, emeremo ngokora inche, nere nayekore; nakore naende emenene kobua eye, ekiagera nkogenda nde ase Tata." 
John14:13 Kende gionsi morasabe ase erieta riane, ekio nangekore, erinde Tata abakwe ime ase Omwana." 
John14:14 Komorasabe kende gionsi ase erieta riane, ekio ningekore." 
John14:15 “Komoranyanche namobwate amachiko aane. 
John14:16 Naende inche ninsabe Tata, na ere nabae Omokonyi onde oyoramenye amo nainwe goika kare na kare," 
John14:17 Omoika bw’ekeene. Ense etanyare komwancha, ekiagera temorochi, nonya nkomomanya. Korende inwe mwamomanyire, ekiagera namenyete amo nainwe, naende nabe ime yaino." 
John14:18 “Tinkobatiga inwe buna chintakana; ninchiche asemore. 
John14:19 Nkere ekero egeke, ense etandore naende; korende inwe namondore, ekiagera inche moyo inde, na inwe namobe moyo." 
John14:20 Ase rituko riria namomanye ng’a inche nigo inde ime ase Tata, na inwe ime yane, na inche ime yaino." 
John14:21 Oyore namachiko aane, na koyabwata, oyio nere onyanchete; ere oyonyanchete nanchwe na Tata one, na inche nimwanche na kweorokia asare.”" 
John14:22 Yudas (tari oria o Iskariota) akamoboria, “Omonene, naki yaba ng’a norigetie kweorokia asetore, gose tari ase ense?”" 
John14:23 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Omonto karanyanche, abwate ring’ana riane, naende Tata one namwanche, na intwe natoche asare, tokore obomenyo bwaito amo nere." 
John14:24 Oyotanyancheti, tabwateti amang’ana aane; naende ring’ana mwaigure tari eriane, korende neria Tata oyontomete." 
John14:25 “Aya nabatebirie ekero inde asemore. 
John14:26 Korende Omokonyi, Omoika Omochenu, oyo Tata aratome ase erieta riane, ere naborokererie onsi, na kobainyoria onsi aya nabatebirie." 
John14:27 Omorembe nabatigeire; omorembe one nabaeire; tinkoyobaa buna ense ekoyobaa. Timoichana ase chinkoro chiaino, gose timoba nobwoba." 
John14:28 Mwaigwete inche nkobatebia: Nkogenda nde, na ninchiche naende asemore. Onye mwanyanchete, anga mwagogete, ekiagera nkogenda nde ase Tata, ekiagera Tata nomonene kombua." 
John14:29 Na bono nabatebirie ritang’ani ataraba, erinde ekero akoba, mwegene." 
John14:30 Tingokwana nainwe amana’ana amange naende, ekiagera omonene bw’ense ngocha are. Tari nokobua asende;" 
John14:31 korende nigo ngokora buna Tata anchigete, erinde ense emanye ng’a nimwanchete Tata. Imoka, torue aa!" 
John15:1 “Inche ninche omosabibu bw’ekeene, na Tata one nomoroiseria." 
John15:2 Kera orosagia ime asende orotameti, nigo akoronacha, na kera orokwama nigo akorososa, erinde romente kwama." 
John15:3 Inwe mwaikire koba abachenu ase engencho ye ring’ana nabatebirie. 
John15:4 Menya ime yane, na inche ime yaino. Buna orosagia rotanyare kwama rwoka oronyene, rotabeti ime ase omosabibu, naboigo nainwe motamenyeti ime yane." 
John15:5 Inche nomosabibu, na inwe nechinsagia. Oyo omenyete ime yane, na inche ime yaye, oyio name mono, ekiagera ntaiyo inche, timokonyara gokora kende gionsi." 
John15:6 Omonto otamenyeti ime yane, nigo aratugutwe isiko buna orosagia rwomete. Chinsagia chiomete nigo chigosangererigwa, na korutwa ase omorero, na koyia." 
John15:7 Komoramenye ime yane, na amang’ana aane karabe ime yaino, saba kera ekemoganetie na inwe namokorerwe." 
John15:8 Ase ayio Tata abakwe ekero mwamire mono; na inwe namobe aborokigwa baane. 
John15:9 Buna Tata anyanchete inche, na inche nabanchire inwe, menya ase obwanchani bwane." 
John15:10 Komorabwate amachiko aane, namomenye ase obwanchani bwane, buna inche nabwatete amachiko a Tata one na komenya ase obwanchani bwaye." 
John15:11 Aya nabatebirie, erinde omogoko one obe ime yaino, naende ng’a omogoko oino oikeranigwe." 
John15:12 “Richiko riane nario eri: Mwanchane buna nabanchete inwe. 
John15:13 Onde tari ore nobwanchani obonene kobua obo, obw’omonto akorua obogima bwaye ase engencho y’abasani baye." 
John15:14 Inwe nigo more abasani baane, komorakore aya nabachikire." 
John15:15 Tinkobaroka naende abasomba, ekiagera omosomba tamanyeti eki omonene oye agokora; korende inwe nabarokire abasani, ekiagera onsi aya naigwete korwa ase Tata nabaorokeirie." 
John15:16 Tari inwe mwanchorire inche, korende ninche nabachorire inwe, nababekire mogende kwama, okwama kwaino goikaranse; erio rinde rionsi mogosaba Tata ase erieta riane, nigo arabae." 
John15:17 “Aya nabachikire naro aya: mwanchane. 
John15:18 Ense kerabageche, momanyete ng’a yangechire inche etarabagecha inwe." 
John15:19 Onye nab’ense mware, anga ense iyancha abare abaye, korende ekiagera inwe timori ab’ense, otatiga inche nabachorire korwa ase ense, ase ayio ense yabagechire." 
John15:20 Inyora ring’ana riria nabatebetie: Omosomba tari omonene kobua omonene oye. Onye banchandete inche, nababachande nainwe; onye babwatete ring’ana riane nabwate neriaino." 
John15:21 Korende aya onsi nababakorere ase engencho y’erieta riane, ekiagera tibamomanyeti oyontomete." 
John15:22 Onye ntachete gokwana nabarabwo, anga tibarenge nebibe, korende bono tibari nogwekengera ase ebibe biabo." 
John15:23 Oyongechete inche, nigo amogechete na Tata one." 
John15:24 Onye ntakorete emeremo asebare eye monto onde atakoreti, anga tibabete nebibe, korende bono barorire, naende batogechire inche na Tata." 
John15:25 Korende igo riikerane ring’ana eriarigetwe ase amachiko abo: Nigo bangechete bosa. 
John15:26 Korende karache Omokonyi, oyo ndabatomere korwa ase Tata, Omoika bw’Ekeene okorwa ase Tata, ere nambere kirori." 
John15:27 Na inwe boigo mwambereire birori, ekiagera korwa omochakano mwarenge amo nainche." 
John16:1 “Amang’ana aya nabatebirie timocha kogochwa. 
John16:2 Nababaserie korwa ase chisinagogi; nabo engaki neche ekero onde bwensi arabaite akage ng’a okoreire Nyasae emeremo. 
John16:3 Naende ayio nababakorere, ekiagera tibamomanyeti Tata, nonya ninche." 
John16:4 Korende nabatebirie aya, erio engaki eria egocha, moyainyore ng’a inche nabatebetie. “Tinabatebetie aya korwa omochakano, ekiagera narenge amo nainwe." 
John16:5 Korende bono nkogenda nde asare ere oyontomete; gose onde tari asemore okomboria: Ing’ai ogochia? 
John16:6 Korende ekiagera nabatebirie aya, omoichano oichoire chinkoro chiaino." 
John16:7 Korende inche nabatebirie erire ri’ekeene: Nebe buya asemore inche ngende, ekiagera ntagendeti, Omokonyi oria tagocha asemore; korende kondagende, nimotome asemore." 
John16:8 Naende ekero arache ere, naenekerie ense ase amang’ana ’ebibe, naende oboronge, naende ekina;" 
John16:9 ase amang’ana ’ebibe, ekiagera tibanyegeneti inche;" 
John16:10 ase amang’ana ’oboronge, ekiagera nkogenda nde ase Tata, gose timokondora naende;" 
John16:11 ase amang’ana ’ekina, ekiagera omonene bw’ense eye okoorire kogambigwa." 
John16:12 “Ninde nayande amange atigarete nkobatebia, korende timokonyara koyaremereria bono." 
John16:13 Korende ekero arache ere, Omoika bw’Ekeene, nobaraae ase onsi ayare ay’ekeene, ere tagokwana ayare ayaye, korende onsi ayaranyare koigwa nayakwane, naende amang’ana agochi‐gocha nabatebie engencho yaye." 
John16:14 Ere nambake inche, ekiagera nabogorie ayare ayane, nabayaorokerie." 
John16:15 Onsi ayare aya Tata nayane; ase ayio ngateba ng’a nabogorie ayare ayane, nabayaorokerie." 
John16:16 “Nkere ekero egeke, inwe motandore; naende nkere ekero egeke morandore, ekiagera nkogenda nde ase Tata.”" 
John16:17 Nabo abande b’aborokigwa baye bagatebania, “Ing’ana ki eri agoteba: Nkere ekero egeke, inwe motandore; naende nkere ekero egeke morandore; na: Nkogenda nde ase Tata?”" 
John16:18 Nabo bagateba, “Ing’ana ki eri agoteba, ng’a nkere ekero egeke? Titomanyeti eri agokwana.”" 
John16:19 Yeso akamanya ng’a mbarigetie komoboria, akabatebia, “Inee! Nigo mokoborania inwe ase inwe ase erio natebire: Nkere ekero egeke, inwe motandore, naende nkere ekero egeke morandore?" 
John16:20 Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Inwe namorere na kweng’ereria, korende ense negoke; inwe namoichanigwe, korende ogoichana kwaino nakoonchoke koba omogoko." 
John16:21 Omokungu gakobina ase okoibora, nigo are nomoichano, ekiagera ensa yaye yaikire; korende gaikire koibora omwana, tari koinyora obororo bwaye naende, ase engencho y’omogoko bw’okoiborwa kw’omonto ase ense." 
John16:22 Nabo nainwe bono nigo more nomoichano; korende nimbarore naende, ne chinkoro chiaino nachigoke, na omogoko oino onde tari orabaure." 
John16:23 Ase rituko riria timokomboria ring’ana. Ekeene, ekeene, nabatebirie: Komorasabe Tata kende gionsi ase erieta riane nabae." 
John16:24 Goika rero timorasaba gento ase erieta riane; saba, namonyore, erinde omogoko oino obe omoikeranu." 
John16:25 “Aya nakwanire nainwe ase emereng’anio; engaki neche ntakwane naende ase emereng’anio, korende nimborokie maiso marore amang’ana a Tata." 
John16:26 Ase rituko riria namosabe ase erieta riane; tinkobatebia ng’a nimbasabere ase Tata," 
John16:27 ekiagera Tata omonyene nigo abanchete inwe, ekiagera inwe mwanyanchire inche, na mwegenire ng’a inche nigo narwete ase Tata." 
John16:28 Narwete ase Tata, ngacha ase ense; naende ngotiga nde ense na nkoirana nde ase Tata.”" 
John16:29 Aborokigwa baye bakabora, “Rora, bono ngokwana ore maiso marore, gose tori gokwana omoreng’anio onde bwonsi." 
John16:30 Bono twamanyire ng’a kwamanyire onsi, torigeti omonto akoborie. Ase ayio twegenire ng’a nigo kwarwete ase Nyasae.”" 
John16:31 Yeso akabairaneria, “Inee! Igo bono mwegenire?" 
John16:32 Rora engaki neche, ee nabo yaikire gocha, namwatananeke, kera oyomo ase mwaye, namontige inche bweka, korende tindi inche bweka, ekiagera Tata nigo are amo nainche." 
John16:33 Aya nabatebirie, erinde monyare koba nomorembe ime yane. Ase ense namonyore emechando, korende remia emioyo; inche nabuire ense.”" 
John17:1 Ekero Yeso akwanete amang’ana ayio akaimokia amaiso aye, akarigereria igoro, akabora, “Tata, ensa yaikire. Mobake Omwana oo, erinde Omwana nere akobake aye," 
John17:2 buna kwamoete okobua igoro ase mwanyabanto bonsi, erinde bonsi aba kwamoeire, abae obogima bwa kare na kare." 
John17:3 Na obogima bwa kare na kare nabwo obo: bakomanye aye Nyasae bw’ekeene bweka, naende Yeso Kristo gwatomete." 
John17:4 Inche nakobakire ase ense, emeremo eria kwang’ete gokora nayekoorire." 
John17:5 Na bono Tata, ombake inche amo naye, ase obonene boria narenge nabwo amo naye ritang’ani ense etaratongwa." 
John17:6 “Erieta riao nariorokeirie abanto baria kwang’ete korwa ase ense. Barabwo nigo barenge abao, okabang’a inche, ne ring’ana riao baribwatire." 
John17:7 Bono bamanyire ng’a onsi aya kwang’ete nigo akorwa asore. 
John17:8 Naki amang’ana kwang’ete nabayaeire, na barabwo bayabwatire, mbamanyete ekeene ng’a nigo narure asore, bakeegena ng’a naye gwantomete." 
John17:9 Inche nabasabeire barabwo; tindi gosabera ense, korende barabwo aba kwang’eire ekiagera barabwo nabao." 
John17:10 Na bonsi abare abaane nabao, na abare abao nabaane, na inche nabakirwe ime yabo." 
John17:11 Inche tinkoba ase ense ime naende, korende aba nao bare ase ense ime, na inche ngocha nde asore. Tata Omochenu, obarende ase okobua kw’erieta riao baria kwang’ete, babe abamo buna intwe tore oyomo." 
John17:12 Ekero narenge amo nabarabwo ase ense, nigo nabarendete ase okobua kw’erieta riao baria kwang’ete. Igo nabaritete, gose tari nonya noyomo obo osirire, otatiga oria omwana bw’obosiru, erinde ririko rinyare goikeranigwa." 
John17:13 Na bono ngocha nde asore, na aya nkoyakwana, inde ase ense ime, erinde omogoko one obe oikeranigwe ime yabo." 
John17:14 Inche nabaeire ring’ana riao; ense yabagechire, ekiagera barabwo tibari abanto b’ense, buna inche ntari oyo bw’ense." 
John17:15 Tinsabeti ng’a obarusie korwa ase ense, korende obarende korwa ase oria omobe." 
John17:16 Barabwo tibari ab’ense, buna inche ntari oyo bw’ense." 
John17:17 Obachene ase ekeene; ring’ana riao nario ekeene. 
John17:18 Buna gwantomete inche ime ase ense, na inche naboigo nabatomire barabwo ase ense ime." 
John17:19 Na ase engencho yabo nechenire, erinde nabarabwo bachenwe ase ekeene." 
John17:20 “Gose tari barabwo boka nasabeire, korende na baria baranyegene ase engencho ye ring’ana riabo," 
John17:21 bonsi babe abamo, buna aye Tata ore ime asende, na inche ime yao, erinde na aba babe abamo ime yaito; ense enyare kwengena ng’a naye gwantomete." 
John17:22 Na obonene boria kwang’ete nabaeire, babe abamo, buna intwe tore oyomo;" 
John17:23 inche ime yabo, na aye ime yane, banyare goikerana babe abamo. Igo ense emanye ng’a naye gwantomete, okabancha barabwo, buna kwanyanchete inche." 
John17:24 Tata, abwo kwang’ete, ninganetie babe amo nainche aase aande onsi inde, banyare korigereria obonene bwane kwang’ete, ekiagera nigo kwanyanchete ritang’ani ense etarabekwa oboroso." 
John17:25 Tata omonyene oboronge, ense tiyakomanyete, korende inche nakomanyete; na aba bamanyire ng’a naye gwantomete." 
John17:26 Nabamanyetie erieta riao, naende nimbarimanyie, erinde obwanchani boria kwanyanchete inche bobe ime yabo, na inche imbe ime yabo.”" 
John18:1 Yeso gakwanire amang’ana aya, akaimoka amo naborokigwa baye kogenda ng’umbu y’akarooche Kedron, aase omogondo orenge. Ere na aborokigwa baye bagasoa aroro." 
John18:2 Na Yudas, oria omoruete naamanyete aase aria, ekiagera Yeso are kogenda aroro ekero ase ekero amo naborokigwa baye." 
John18:3 Nabo Yudas gaikire konyora omoganda bw’abarwani, na abarendi baruete ase abakuani abanene na Abafarisai, akagenda aroro ne chitaya na ebieri, na ebinto bi’esegi." 
John18:4 Nabo Yeso, kamanyete onsi ayagochia komonyora, akaoroka, akababoria, “Ning’o mokorigia?”" 
John18:5 Bakamoiraneria, “Yeso Omonazareti.” Yeso akabatebia, “Ninche ere.” Yudas nere oyomoruete nigo ateneine amo nabarabwo." 
John18:6 Nabo ekero Yeso achia kobatebia, “Ninche ere,” bakairana nyuma, bagaaka inse." 
John18:7 Akababoria eria kabere, “Ning’o mokorigia?” Bakabora, “Yeso Omonazareti.”" 
John18:8 Yeso akairaneria, “Naikire kobatebia ng’a ninche ere; nabo onye mokondigia inche, batige aba bagende.”" 
John18:9 Erio riikeranigwe ring’ana riria akwanete, “Aba kwang’ete tinsireti nonya noyomo obo.”" 
John18:10 Nabo Simion Petero narenge nomoyio o birende, akayong’usa, agaaka omosomba bw’omokuani omonene, akamobutora ogoto kwaye gw’okorio. Na omosomba oria erieta riaye nigo are korokwa Maliko." 
John18:11 Erio Yeso agatebia Petero, “Irania omoyio oo ase ekerende kiaye. Inee! Egekombe eke Tata ang’eire, tinkenywera?”" 
John18:12 Abarwani b’esegi amo nomotang’ani obo, na abarendi baria b’Abayahudi bakabwata Yeso, bakamosiba." 
John18:13 Erio bakamoira ritang’ani ase Anasi oyorenge ise biara Kayafa, oria orenge omokuani omonene omwaka oria." 
John18:14 Na Kayafa nere oete Abayahudi amang’ana ng’a negwenerete omonto oyomo akwe ase engencho y’abanto. 
John18:15 Simion Petero na omworokigwa onde bagatunyana Yeso. Omworokigwa oria onde nigo amanyekanete nomokuani omonene, agasoa amo na Yeso ase egoora y’omokuani omonene," 
John18:16 korende Petero agatenena gesieri isiko. Nabo omworokigwa oria onde, oyomanyekanete nomokuani omonene agasoka agakwana nomoiseke orenge korenda gesieri, akarenta Petero ime." 
John18:17 Erio omoiseke oria orenge korenda gesieri akaboria Petero, “Aye tori oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye omonto oyo?” Ere agakana, “Tari inche.”" 
John18:18 Abasomba baria na abarwani nigo barenge bateneine, bautete omorero bw’amakara, ekiagera obokendu mbwarenge, bakaba ngwota bare omorero. Petero nere nigo arenge amo nabarabwo, ogwota omorero." 
John18:19 Erio omokuani omonene akaboria Yeso amang’ana igoro y’aborokigwa baye, na amang’ana ’okworokereria kwaye." 
John18:20 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Inche nakwanire nense maiso marore. Amatuko onsi nigo narenge kworokereria ase chisinagogi na ase Hekalu, aase Abayahudi bonsi baare gosangererekana, gose tintebeti ing’ana bobisi." 
John18:21 Nase ki okomboria? Boria baria baigwete aya nakwanete nabarabwo; barabwo mbamanyete aya nabatebetie.” 
John18:22 Gachia gokwana amang’ana aya, oyomo bw’abarendi baria oteneine ang’e, agaaka Yeso oroe, akabora, “Naboigo okoiraneria omokuani omonene?”" 
John18:23 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Onye nakwana bobe, orokia obobe boria, korende onye nakwana buya, ninki okong’akera?”" 
John18:24 Nabo Anasi akamoira osibire ase Kayafa, omokuani omonene." 
John18:25 Na Simion Petero nigo arenge oteneine ogwota omorero. Bakamotebia, “Aye boigo tori oyomo bw’aborokigwa baye?” Ere agakana, akabora, “Tari inche.”" 
John18:26 Oyomo bw’abasomba b’omokuani, omoamate bw’oria onachetwe ogoto na Petero, akabora, “Inche tinakoroche ime ase omogondo amo nere?”" 
John18:27 Petero agakana naende. Erio kegima etuoni ekabuga. 
John18:28 Erio bakaira Yeso korwa ase Kayafa goika enyomba enene y’ekegambero. Bokaba bogokiamoka, na barabwo abanyene tibasoa ime ase ekegambero, tibabaisa gocha kobekwa ogotacheneka korende bararia Epasaka." 
John18:29 Erio Pilato akabachiera isiko, akababoria, “Ngosoera ki mobwate ase omonto oyo?”" 
John18:30 Bakairaneria, “Onye oyo atarenge omokori amabe, anga titwamorenta asore.”" 
John18:31 Erio Pilato akabatebia, “Moire inwe, momogambie ase ogochika kwaino.” Abayahudi bakamotebia, “Intwe titori ne ribaga goita omonto.”" 
John18:32 Erio ring’ana ria Yeso riikeranigwe, eri akwanete ase okoorokia imakweri ki aranyare gokwa." 
John18:33 Erio Pilato agasoa ekegambero naende, akarangeria Yeso, akamoboria, “Inee! Naye omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?”" 
John18:34 Yeso akairaneria, “Naye gwatebire ayio aye omonyene, gose nabanto bande bagotebirie amang’ana aya igoro yane?”" 
John18:35 Pilato akairaneria, “Inee! Inche n’Omoyahudi nde? Abanto b’egesaku kiao na abakuani abanene bakorentire asende. Inki gwakorete?”" 
John18:36 Yeso akairaneria, “Oboruoti bwane tibori obw’ense eye. Onye oboruoti bwane mbwarenge obw’ense eye, abasomba baane anga mbandwanerera, tinyara kobekwa ase amaboko ’Abayahudi, korende bono oboruoti bwane ti bori obw’aa.”" 
John18:37 Erio Pilato akamoboria, “Aye nomoruoti rende?” Yeso akairaneria, “Aye gwatebete ng’a inche nomoruoti. Inche nigo naiboretwe ase engencho y’aya, na ase engencho y’aya, ngacha ase ense, erinde imbe kirori ase ekeene. Kera oyore oyo bw’ekeene nigo akoigwa eriogi riane.”" 
John18:38 Pilato akamoboria, “Ekeene ngento ki?” Gakwanire ring’ana eri agachiera Abayahudi isiko eria kabere, akabatebia, “Inche tindochi bobe bonde asare." 
John18:39 Korende inwe more nengencho ng’a nabasiborera omonto oyomo ase ekero ki’Epasaka; nabo morigetie mbasiborere Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi?” 
John18:40 Erio bagaaka eriogi naende, bakabora, “Tari oyo, korende Baraba!” Baraba ere nigo arenge omouri." 
John19:1 Erio Pilato akaira Yeso, akamoaka emecharichi." 
John19:2 Abarwani bagatwang’a egutwa y’amagwa, bakamobekera ase omotwe, bakamobekera na eanga embariri," 
John19:3 bakamochiera, bakabora, “Masoge, Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi!” Bakamoaka chindoe." 
John19:4 Pilato akaoroka naende isiko, akabatebia, “Rora, inche namorentire asemore, monyare komanya ng’a tindochi komocha konde asare.”" 
John19:5 Erio Yeso agasoka isiko, obekeire egutwa eria y’amagwa na eanga eria y’oboruoti embariri. Pilato akabatebia, “Rora omonto oyo!”" 
John19:6 Erio abakuani abanene na abarendi bagachia komorora, bagaaka eriogi, bakobora, “Mobambe! Mobambe!” Pilato akabatebia, “Moire inwe, momobambe, ekiagera inche tindochi okomocha asare.”" 
John19:7 Abayahudi bakamoiraneria, “Intwe ntore nogochika, naende ase ogochika okwo nagwenerete akwe, ekiagera agwekora koba Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
John19:8 Erio Pilato agachia koigwa ring’ana erio, akaba nobwoba kobua." 
John19:9 Agasoa ase ekegambero, akaboria Yeso naende, “Ing’ai kwarure aye?” Korende Yeso tamoiraneria." 
John19:10 Erio Pilato akamoboria, “Togokwana nainche? Tomanyeti ng’a ninde nokobua gokobamba, naende ninde nokobua kogosibora?”" 
John19:11 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Anga tori nokobua konde gwonsi, onye otaeiri korwa igoro; ase ayio ere oyombegete ase amaboko ao nare nebibe ebinene kobua.”" 
John19:12 Korwa agwo Pilato akarigia komosibora, korende Abayahudi bagaaka eriogi, bakabora, “Koramosibore, aye tori omosani o Kaisari; kera oyogwekora koba omoruoti nigo are mamincha ase Kaisari.”" 
John19:13 Erio ekero Pilato achia koigwa amang’ana aya, akarenta Yeso isiko, agaikaransa igoro ase ekerogo gi’ekina, aase akorokwa Atichire n’Amagena, naende ase Ekeibirania, Gabata." 
John19:14 Nigo yarenge Okwearigania kw’Epasaka; naende nigo yarenge koreng’ana chinsa isano nemo. Agatebia Abayahudi, “Rora omoruoti oino!”" 
John19:15 Korende barabwo bagaaka eriogi, “Morusie, morusie, mobambe!” Pilato akababoria, “Imobambe omoruoti oino?” Abakuani abanene bakairaneria, “Titori nomoruoti otatiga Kaisari.”" 
John19:16 Erio agwo akamobeka ase amaboko abo abambwe. Barabwo bakabwata Yeso. 
John19:17 Ere agasoka bwebogoreretie omosalaba oye, goika aase akorokwa Ekeore; ase Ekeibirania akorokwa Gologotha." 
John19:18 Bakamobamba aroro amo nabanto bande babere, oyonde ensemo, na oyonde ensemo, na Yeso gati‐gati." 
John19:19 Pilato akarika ekemanyererio, agakebeka igoro ase omosalaba. Igo kiarigetwe, “YESO OMONAZARETI, OMORUOTI BW’ABAYAHUDI.”" 
John19:20 Nabo amariko ayio abange b’Abayahudi mbayasomete, ekiagera aase aria Yeso abamberetwe nigo arenge ang’e nomochie; naro nigo arigetwe ase Ekeibirania, na Ekerumi, na Ekegiriki." 
John19:21 Erio abakuani abanene na Abayahudi bagatebia Pilato, “Torika ng’a, n’Omoruoti bw’Abayahudi, korende ng’a nigo arenge kobora: Inche nomoruoti bw’Abayahudi.”" 
John19:22 Pilato akairaneria, “Aya narikire, narikire.”" 
John19:23 Erio abarwani kobabambire Yeso, bakabogoria chianga chiaye, bagachiatanana chinsemo inye, kera omorwani anyore ensemo yaye. Bakabogoria eganchwa nero. Korende eganchwa eyio tiyasonire; igo yabwatanirie korwa igoro goika inse." 
John19:24 Erio bagatebania, “Titoyetandora, korende toyeakere obomera, torore gose neya ng’o ekoba.” Erio ririko riikerane, eri rigoteba, “Mbaatananete chianga chiane, naende eganchwa yane mbayekorerete obomera.”" 
John19:25 Naboigo abarwani bakorete. Korende ase omosalaba o Yeso ng’ina, na ng’ina moke, Mariamu moga Kiliopa, na Mariamu Magidalena bagatenenao." 
John19:26 Erio ekero Yeso achia korora ng’ina na omworokigwa oria anchete bateneine ang’e agatebia ng’ina, “Omong’ina, rora omwana oo!”" 
John19:27 Nyuma y’ayio agatebia omworokigwa oria, “Rora nyoko!” Erio korwa ensa eria omworokigwa oria akamoira bwoye." 
John19:28 Nyuma ase aya Yeso, kamanyete ng’a onsi aikire gokorwa, erinde ririko riikeranigwe, akabora, “Ninde nerang’o.”" 
John19:29 Nkiarenge aroro egetaabo giaichire chinkama, erio bakabeka esifunchi eichire chinkama igoro ase egetonto, bakamobekera monwa." 
John19:30 Erio Yeso agachia konyora chinkama, agateba, “Yaikeranire!” Agatureka omotwe, agatweka mo." 
John19:31 Igo riarenge rituko ri’Okwearigania, na Abayahudi tibarigetie emebere ebe ase emesalaba igoro ase rituko ri’Esabato, ekiagera Esabato eria nigo yarenge enene. Ase ayio bagasaba Pilato ng’a amagoro ’abanto abwo babambetwe abunwe, na emebere yabo erusigweo." 
John19:32 Erio abarwani bakagenda, bakabuna amagoro abo, oyo bwe ritang’ani, na oyo o kabere, abwo babambetwe amo na Yeso." 
John19:33 Bagachia gochiera Yeso, bakarora ng’a oikire gokwa, tibamobuna amagoro aye." 
John19:34 Korende oyomo bw’abarwani akamobeta ritimo rikere riaye, akaruao bwango amanyinga na amache." 
John19:35 Nere oyoyaroche akaba kirori, na oborori bwaye nobw’ekeene, nere omanyire ng’a igo agokwana ekeene, erinde inwe monyare kwegena." 
John19:36 Naki aya nigo akoregete erinde ririko riikerane, eriatebete, “Riuga riaye tirikobunwa.”" 
John19:37 Naende rituko rinde ribora, “Nabamorigererie oyobabetete.”" 
John19:38 Nyuma ase aya Yusufu bw’Arimathaya agasaba Pilato ribaga arusie omobere o Yeso. Ere nigo arenge omworokigwa o Yeso, korende bobisi, ekiagera airogete Abayahudi. Pilato akamoa ribaga. Igo agacha, akarusia omobere oye." 
John19:39 Na Nikodemo oria omochierete botuko agwo ritang’ani, nere akagenda boigo, akarenta ebinto bisang’ananirie manemane na uudi, oborito bwaye chiratili rigana erimo." 
John19:40 Erio bakabogoria omobere o Yeso, bakayoboyia egetambaa ki’egatani, bakayoaka amaguta aria amanukato, buna yarenge engencho y’Abayahudi ase ogotindeka." 
John19:41 Naende aase aria abamberetwe norengeo omogondo, na ime ase omogondo oboina oboyia, aase monto onde konya atarabekwa." 
John19:42 Na ase engencho y’Okwearigania kw’Abayahudi bakabeka Yeso aroro, ekiagera oboina boria bwarenge ang’e." 
John20:1 Bono ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma Mariamu; Magidalena akagenda ase oboina kobogokia moka, ekero botarakiamoka buya, akarora ng’a rigena riarusigwe korwa ase oboina." 
John20:2 Erio akagenda bwango goika ase Simion Petero, na ase omworokigwa oria onde, oria Yeso anchete, akabatebia, “Barusirie Omonene korwa ase oboina, korende titomanyeti aase bamobeka.”" 
John20:3 Petero agasoka, akagenda amo nomworokigwa oria onde, bakabwatia enchera kogenda oboina." 
John20:4 Bakaminyoka chimbero bonsi babere amo. Omworokigwa oria onde akaminyoka bwango kobua Petero, akaba oyo bwe ritang’ani goika ase oboina," 
John20:5 agatung’ama, akarora ebitambaa bireo, korende tasoa ime." 
John20:6 Erio Simion Petero agacha, akamotunyana, agasoa oboina ime, akarora ebitambaa bireo," 
John20:7 na egetambaa keria ki’omotwe oye tikiabekire amo nebitambaa binde, korende nigo kiaringire, kebekire ao gioka." 
John20:8 Erio agwo omworokigwa oria onde orenge bwe ritang’ani goika ase oboina agasoa, akarora, akeegena." 
John20:9 Naki konya tibaramanya ririko, ng’a nemogwenerete koboka korwa ase abakure." 
John20:10 Erio aborokigwa baria bakagenda chinsobo. 
John20:11 Korende Mariamu nigo ateneine isiko ang’e noboina, okorera; nabo gakorera, agatung’ama, akarigereria ime ase oboina." 
John20:12 Erio akarora abamalaika babere, barenge ne chianga chindabu, baikaransete, oyomo ase omotwe, naende oyomo ase amagoro, agwo aase omobere o Yeso obegetwe." 
John20:13 Barabwo bakamoboria, “Omokungu, inki okorera?” Akabairaneria, “Nekiagera barusirie Omonene one, na timanyeti aase bamobeka.”" 
John20:14 Kagokwana aya akeonchora gochia nyuma, akarora Yeso oteneine, tamanya ng’a n’Yeso." 
John20:15 Yeso akamotebia, “Omong’ina, ninki okorera? Ning’o okorigia?” Ere agakaga ng’a nomorendi bw’omogondo, akamotebia, “Omonene, onye naye kwamoira, ntebia aase kwamobeka, na inche nimorusie.”" 
John20:16 Yeso akamotebia, “Mariamu.” Ere akeonchora, akamotebia ase Ekeibirania, “Raboni!” (Okoonchorwa kwaye, Omworokia)." 
John20:17 Yeso akamotebia, “Tonkuna, ekiagera tindagenda ase Tata one, korende genda ase abaminto, obatebie, ng’a nkogenda nde ase Tata one oyore Iso oino, ase Nyasae one oyore Nyasae oino.”" 
John20:18 Mariamu Magidalena akagenda, agatebia aborokigwa amang’ana ng’a, “Narorire Omonene”, naende ng’a omotebirie aya." 
John20:19 Ase omogoroba bwe rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, na ebisieri kobiasiekirwe aase agwo aborokigwa barenge, ekiagera bairogete Abayahudi, Yeso agacha, agatenena gati‐gati akabatebia, “Omorembe obe asemore!”" 
John20:20 Gakwanire aya, akaborokia amaboko aye ne rikere riaye. Erio aborokigwa bakagoka kobachia korora Omonene." 
John20:21 Yeso akabatebia eria kabere, “Omorembe obe asemore! Buna Tata antomete, naboigo nainche nabatomire inwe.”" 
John20:22 Gakwanire aya, akabautera omoika, akabatebia, “Nyora Omoika Omochenu." 
John20:23 Bande bonsi moraabere ebibe, baabeirwe; naende bande bonsi morasiekere ebibe, basiekeirwe.”" 
John20:24 Ko Tomas, oyomo bwa baria ikomi na babere, oyokorokwa Barongo, tarenge amo nabarabwo ekero Yeso achete." 
John20:25 Erio aborokigwa bande bakamotebia, “Twarorire Omonene.” Korende ere akabatebia, “Ntarochi amaboko aye na ebimanyererio bi’emesumari, na kobeka ekiara kiane aase emesumari yamobetete, na kobeka okoboko kwane rikere riaye ime, tinkwegena nonya ng’ake.”" 
John20:26 Nyuma y’amatuko atano na atato aborokigwa baye nao barenge naende ase enyomba eria ime, na Tomas amo nabarabwo. Yeso agacha ekero ebisieri bisiekire, agatenena gati‐gati, akabora, “Omorembe obe asemore!”" 
John20:27 Erio agatebia Tomas, “Renta aiga ekiara kiao. Orore amaboko aane. Renta okoboko kwao, okobeke ase rikere riane; toba oyotegeneti, korende oyo bwegenete.”" 
John20:28 Tomas akamoiraneria, “Omonene one, na Nyasae one!”" 
John20:29 Yeso akamotebia, “Iga kwegena ekiagera kwandora; mbasesenirie abatarochi ko begenire.”" 
John20:30 Nabo mbire ebikone binde ebinge Yeso akorete ase amasio ’aborokigwa baye bitarikiri ase ebuku eye," 
John20:31 korende ebi biarikirwe, erinde monyare kwegena ng’a Yeso nere Kristo, Omwana o Nyasae; naende ase okwegena mobe nobogima ase erieta riaye." 
John21:1 Nyuma ase aya Yeso akeorokia naende ase aborokigwa baye ase enyancha ya Tiberia. Ayio nigo akorekanete iga: 
John21:2 Simion Petero, na Tomas oyokorokwa Barongo, na Natanaeli o Kana ya Galili, na abamura ba Zebedi, na babere bande b’aborokigwa baye barenge amo." 
John21:3 Simion Petero akabatebia, “Nkogenda nde koruba chinswe.” Bakamotebia, “Naintwe natogende amo naye.” Bagasoka, bakariina obwato ime, korende obotuko boria tibanyora gento." 
John21:4 Goika bogachia gokia mambia, Yeso agatenena ase engegu, korende aborokigwa tibamanya ng’a n’Yeso." 
John21:5 Erio Yeso akababoria, “Abana, more neki mokoria?” Bakamoiraneria, “Yaya.”" 
John21:6 Akabatebia, “Ruta ekeonga ensemo ya borio y’obwato, na inwe namonyore chinswe.” Erio bagakeruta, korende tibanyara gokeng’usa ase engencho y’obonge bwe chinswe." 
John21:7 Omworokigwa oria Yeso anchete agatebia Petero, “Nere Omonene.” Erio Simion Petero, agachia koigwa ng’a n’Omonene, akeboyia eanga yaye (ekiagera arenge getirianda), akeruta enyancha ime." 
John21:8 Korende aborokigwa bande bagacha ase obwato, bagakurura ekeonga geichire chinswe, ekiagera tibarenge are ase ense enyomo, ang’e chifuti amagana atato." 
John21:9 Erio kobachia goika engegu, bakarora omorero bw’amakara aroro, na enswe ebekire igoro yaye, na omogati." 
John21:10 Yeso akabatebia, “Renta aiga echinde chie chinswe echi mwarubire bono.”" 
John21:11 Erio Simion Petero akariina obwato ime, akang’usa ekeonga gochia engegu geichire chinswe chinene, rigana erimo, na emerongo etano, na isato; nonya chiarenge chinyinge buna iga, ekeonga tigiatandogete." 
John21:12 Yeso akabatebia, “Inchuo morie!” Gose onde tarenge ase aborokigwa baria orenge na boremu komoboria, “Aye naye ng’o?” Ekiagera mbamanyete ng’a n’Omonene." 
John21:13 Yeso akagenda akabogoria omogati, akabaa, ne chinswe boigo." 
John21:14 Eke nekero kia gatato Yeso arorekanete ase aborokigwa baye nyuma y’okobokigwa korwa ase abakure. 
John21:15 Erio kobakoorire koragera, Yeso akaboria Simion Petero, “Simion mosinto o Yohana, nonyanchete kobua aba?” Akamoiraneria, “Ee, Omonene, aye nomanyete ng’a ningwanchete.” Akamotebia, “Risia chimanwa chie ching’ondi chiane.”" 
John21:16 Akamoboria eria kabere, “Simion mosinto o Yohana, nonyanchete?” Akamoiraneria, “Ee, Omonene, aye nomanyete ng’a ningwanchete.” Akamotebia, “Risia ching’ondi chiane.”" 
John21:17 Akamoboria eria gatato, “Simion mosinto o Yohana, nonyanchete inche?” Petero agaichana ekiagera amoboretie eria gatato, “Nonyanchete?” Akamoiraneria, “Omonene, aye nomanyete onsi, nomanyete ng’a ningwanchete.” Yeso akamotebia, “Risia ching’ondi chiane." 
John21:18 Ekeene, ekeene, nagotebirie: Ekero kwarenge omosae, nigo kwarenge kweboyia, kwagenda aase origetie, korende ekero orache koba omogaaka, norambore amaboko ao, na oyonde nagosibe, akoire aase otancheti.”" 
John21:19 (Agakwana eri ase okworokia imakweri ki aramotogie Nyasae). Erio gakoorire gokwana aya, akamotebia, “Ntunyana?”" 
John21:20 Petero akeonchora, akarora omworokigwa oria Yeso anchete okobatunyana; nere oria bweegegete egekuba kiaye ekero gi’okoria endagera ya mogoroba na gokwana, “Omonene, ning’o orakorue?”" 
John21:21 Petero agachia komorora oyio, akaboria Yeso, “Omonene, noyo rende?”" 
John21:22 Yeso akamoiraneria, “Kondarigie oyo abeo goika inchiche, inki ogwechandera ayio? Aye ntunyane inche.”" 
John21:23 Erio ring’ana eri rigasarera ase abamwabo ng’a omworokigwa oria tagokwa, korende Yeso tamotebetie ng’a tagokwa, otatiga, “Kondarigie abeo goika inchiche, inki ogwechandera ayio?”" 
John21:24 Oyo nomworokigwa oria oroche aya, na koyarika, naende twamanyire ng’a oborori bwaye nobw’ekeene." 
John21:25 Nare naende ayande amange aya Yeso akorete; naro kararikwe erimo erimo, nigo ngokaga ng’a nonya nense yonsi tegoisana chibuku echiranyare korikwa chibekwe." 
Acts1:1 Aye Theofilo, ase ebuku eria ye ritang’ani narigete igoro ase onsi aya Yeso akorete na kworokereria korwa omochakano," 
Acts1:2 goika rituko riria abogoretigwe gochia igoro. Ritang’ani ri’ayio agachika goetera ase Omoika Omochenu abatomwa baria achorete. 
Acts1:3 Nyuma y’ogochandwa kwaye akeorokia asebare ase ebiorokererio ebinge ng’a moyo are. Akaba okobaorokera ase engaki y’amatuko emerongo ene, na gokwana nabarabwo igoro y’oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Acts1:4 Ekero asangererekanete amo nabarabwo, akabachika tibabaisa korua Yerusalemu, akabatebia, “Moganye eira ya Tata, eria mwaigwete korwa asende." 
Acts1:5 Yohana nigo arenge kobatisa ase amache, korende inwe inamobatiswe ase Omoika Omochenu nyuma y’amatuko amake.”" 
Acts1:6 Erio ekero basangererekanete amo, bakamoboria, “Omonene, ekero eke nakio okoiraneria Abaisraeli oboruoti bwabo?”" 
Acts1:7 Akabairaneria, “Tari igoro yaino komanya ebiro gose chingaki. Tata obibekire ase okobua kwaye omonyene." 
Acts1:8 Korende namonyore chinguru, ekero Omoika Omochenu obacheire, na inwe namobe birori baane ase Yerusalemu, na ase chinsemo chionsi chia Boyahudi na Samaria, na goika chinsinyo chi’ense.”" 
Acts1:9 Ekero akwanete aya, kobarigereretie, akabogorigwa gochia igoro, riire rikamoira korwa ase amaiso abo." 
Acts1:10 Kobarigereretie mono gochia igoro, ekero are kogenda, rora, abasacha babere, babekeire chianga chindabu, bagatenena ang’e nabarabwo," 
Acts1:11 bakabora, “Inwe abasacha ba Galili, nase ki moteneine morigereretie igoro? Oyo Yeso, obogorigwe korwa asemore kogenda igoro, naboigo arache koreng’ana buna mwamorora akogenda igoro.”" 
Acts1:12 Erio bakairana gochia Yerusalemu korwa ase egetunwa ki’Emezeituni, kiarenge ang’e na Yerusalemu, oboare bw’orogendo rwe rituko ri’Esabato." 
Acts1:13 Ekero bachia gosoa, bakariina akanyomba ka irongo aase baikaransete: Petero na Yohana, Yakobo na Anderea, Filipo na Tomas, Baritholomayo na Matayo, Yakobo bw’Alufayo na Simion, oyomo bw’Abazelote, na Yuda o Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Abaiga bonsi nigo bagendererete nogosaba ase omoyo oyomo, amo nabakungu bande, na Mariamu ng’ina Yeso, na bamura bamwabo Yeso." 
Acts1:15 Ase amatuko ayio Petero agatenena gati y’abamwabo (omobaro bw’abanto nigo orenge ang’e rigana erimo na emerongo ebere) akabora," 
Acts1:16 “Baminto, negwenerete ririko riikeranigwe, eri Omoika Omochenu okwanete kare ase omonwa o Daudi igoro ya Yudas, oyotang’anete abwo babwatete Yeso." 
Acts1:17 Naki ere konya obarirwe amo naintwe, akanyora ensemo y’oboteneneri bwabo." 
Acts1:18 (Naboigo, omonto oyo agorete omogondo ase eng’eria y’obobe bwaye. Akagwa maumama, akooreka, amara aye onsi agasoka." 
Acts1:19 Akamanyekana nabanto bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu, goika omogondo oria okarokwa ase omonwa obo Akeldama, engencho yaye: Omogondo bw’Amanyinga.)" 
Acts1:20 Naki narikire ase ebuku ya Zaburi: “Obomenyo bwaye botigare bosa, nonya monto onde tabaisa komenyao; na: Oboteneneri bwaye omoao aboire." 
Acts1:21 Naboigo ase abanto abarenge gotaara amo naintwe ase ekero gionsi eki Omonene Yeso arenge gosoa na gosoka ase egati yaito," 
Acts1:22 korwa ase okobatisa kwa Yohana goika rituko riria abogoretigwe korwa asetore, negwenerete oyomo obo abe kirori bw’okoboka kwaye amo naintwe.”" 
Acts1:23 Bagaatora babere, Yusufu ore korokwa Barsaba, naende erieta rinde Yusto, na Matia." 
Acts1:24 Bagasaba, bakabora, “Aye omonene, oyomanyete chinkoro chi’abanto bonsi, tworokie ning’o gwachorire ase abaiga babere" 
Acts1:25 abogorie ensemo y’ogokora oko na obotomwa obo Yudas atigete, akagenda aase aye.”" 
Acts1:26 Bakabakorera obomera, na obomera bokagwera Matia; ere agachorwa koba amo nabatomwa ikomi nomo." 
Acts2:1 Ekero rituko ria Pentekosti riaigete, bonsi nigo barenge aase amo." 
Acts2:2 Mobosokano okogusa kogacha korwa igoro, okogusa buna ogw’ekerambauti gekogusa ne chinguru, kogaichora enyomba yonsi aase baikaransete." 
Acts2:3 Chimeme buna echi’omorero chikabaorokera, chikabaatananekera, naende chikabaikaransera kera oyomo obo." 
Acts2:4 Bonsi bagaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu, bagachaka gokwana ase emenwa emeao, buna Omoika obaete gwatora." 
Acts2:5 Mbamenyete Yerusalemu Abayahudi abasigete Nyasae, abanto korwa ase kera egesaku inse y’erioba." 
Acts2:6 Ekero eriogi eri riaigwetwe, omoganda ogasangererekana amo, okaba nogokumia, ekiagera kera oyomo abaigwete bagokwana ase omonwa oye omonyene." 
Acts2:7 Bagakumia bonsi na goichana, bagatebania, “Inee! Aba bonsi bagokwana, tibari Abagalili?" 
Acts2:8 Naki yaba iga, intwe toigwete kera oyomo ase omonwa oye aiboretwe noro?" 
Acts2:9 Abapariti, Abamedi na Abaelamiti, na abwo bamenyete Mesopotamia, Boyahudi na Kapadokia, Ponto na Asia," 
Acts2:10 Furugia na Pamfulia, Misiri ne chinsemo chia Libia ya Kurene, amo nabageni korwa Rumi," 
Acts2:11 Abayahudi na abanto b’ebisaku binde abaonchogete, Abakirete na Abaarabu, intwe twensi twaigure abaiga bagokwana ase emenwa yaito igoro y’ogokora gwe chinguru kwa Nyasae.”" 
Acts2:12 Bagakumia bonsi, bagaichana na koborania, “Amang’ana aya, engencho yaye ninki?”" 
Acts2:13 Abande bagasekereria, bagoteba, “Nigo batindire nedivai enyia.”" 
Acts2:14 Korende Petero agatenena amo na baria ikomi nomo, agaaka eriogi riaye, akabatebia, “Inwe abasacha ba Boyahudi, na inwe mwensi abamomenyete Yerusalemu, tiga ring’ana eri rimanyekane asemore, tegerera amang’ana aane." 
Acts2:15 Taibo buna mokagete; abanto aba tibatindeti, ekiagera bono nechinsa isato chioka chia mobaso," 
Acts2:16 korende ring’ana eri ndiria riakwanetwe nomobani Yoeli: 
Acts2:17 “Nebe ase amatuko ’omoerio, Nyasae otebire, nimbaiterere abanto bonsi Omoika one, na abana baino, abamura na abaiseke, inababane. Abamura baino nabarore amaroro, na abagaaka baino nabarote chindoto." 
Acts2:18 Naboigo, ase amatuko ayio nimbaiterere abasomba baane, abasacha na abakungu, Omoika one, na barabwo inababane." 
Acts2:19 Ning’orokie amakumia ase igoro, na ebikone ase ense inse, amanyinga na omorero, ne rikundesi ri’erioki." 
Acts2:20 Erioba narionchoke ribe omosunte, na omotienyi nobe amanyinga, ekero rituko riria ri’Omonene ritaracha, rituko erire rinene, na erire maiso marore." 
Acts2:21 Naende nebe ng’a kera oyorarangerie erieta ri’Omonene natoorigwe. 
Acts2:22 “Inwe abasacha ba Israeli, igwa amang’ana aya, Yeso o Nazareti, omonto o orogetigwe asemore na Nyasae ase ogokora gwe chinguru, na amakumia, na ebikone ebi Nyasae akorete nere egati yaino, buna inwe abanyene momanyete," 
Acts2:23 Yeso oyio nigo aruetwe ase amang’ana aroberetigwe na Nyasae, oyo oyamanyete korwa kare, na inwe mokamobamba na komoita ase amaboko ’abanto batari namachiko." 
Acts2:24 Korende Nyasae akamobokia ekero ororobirie obororo bw’amakweri, ekiagera tare konyarekana abwatwe naro." 
Acts2:25 Naki igo Daudi agokwana igoro yaye: “Naroche Omonene ase obosio bwane botambe, ekiagera nigo are ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio, erinde tinyoboa." 
Acts2:26 Ase ayio enkoro yane nigo ere nomosasoko, oromeme rwane narogoke; na kobua, omobere one noro notimoke ase ogosemeria," 
Acts2:27 ekiagera aye togotiga omoyo one agwo aase abakure, gose togotiga Omochenu oo arore ogosareka." 
Acts2:28 Kwanyorokereirie chinchera chi’obogima; nong’ichorie omogoko ase obosio bwao. 
Acts2:29 “Abaminto, ninyare gokwana nainwe maiso marore igoro y’omogaaka oito o kare, Daudi, ng’a nigo akwete, naende agatindekwa, na embeera yaye nao ere aiga goika rero." 
Acts2:30 Ekiagera Daudi arenge omobani, naende amanyete ng’a Nyasae namotianetie ase emuma ng’a ase oroiboro rwaye nabeke oyomo ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene," 
Acts2:31 agatang’ana korora aya, agakwana igoro y’okoboka kwaye Kristo, ng’a tagotigwa agwo aase abakure, nonya nomobere oye tokorora ogosareka." 
Acts2:32 Oyo Yeso Nyasae akamobokia na ase aya intwe twensi nigo tore abarori. 
Acts2:33 Ase ayio, kaimokererigwe igoro ase ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae, naende kanyorire korwa ase Tata Omoika Omochenu oria arieretwe eira oiteire ayamwarorire na koyaigwa." 
Acts2:34 Ekiagera Daudi tagendete igoro, korende ere omonyenye nigo agoteba: “Omonene agatebia Omonene one, Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio," 
Acts2:35 goika mbeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao. 
Acts2:36 “Naboigo, tiga enyomba yonsi ya Israeli emanye ekeene ng’a Nyasae obekire Yeso, oyio mwabambete, obeire Omonene naende Kristo.”" 
Acts2:37 Ekero bachia koigwa aya, bagasambwa ase chinkoro chiabo, bakaboria Petero na abatomwa bande, “Abaminto, inki torakore?”" 
Acts2:38 Petero akabairaneria, “Onchoka, mobatiswe kera oyomo ase erieta ria Yeso Kristo, monyore okwaberwa kw’ebibe biaino, na inwe inamoegwe ekeegwa ki’Omoika Omochenu." 
Acts2:39 Naki eira eye nigo ere asemore na ase abana baino, na ase abanto bonsi abare aare, na bonsi abarangerigwe n’Omonene Nyasae oito.”" 
Acts2:40 Petero akabaorokeria ase amang’ana ande amange na kobakurera, ogoteba, “Etoorie korwa ase ekegori eke getari ekeronge.”" 
Acts2:41 Na barabwo abanchete ring’ana riaye bakabatiswa, ne rituko riria bakamentekana abanto koreng’ana chilifu isato." 
Acts2:42 Barabwo bakagenderera ase okworokereria kw’abatomwa na ase obomo, ase ogosamunyora omogati na ase ogosaba." 
Acts2:43 Kera omonto agasogwa nomoondoko, na amakumia amange na ebikone bigakorwa nabatomwa." 
Acts2:44 Na bonsi abegenete nigo barenge aase amo, naende bakaba nebinto bionsi ase obomo;" 
Acts2:45 bakaoonia chinibo chiabo na ebinto ebibarenge nabio, na kobigabera abanto bonsi koreng’ana buna kera oyomo aremeire." 
Acts2:46 Kera rituko bakagenderera gosangererekana amo ase Hekalu ime, bagosamunyora emegati enyomba ase enyomba na koragerera amo ase omogoko na ase chinkoro chi’oboitongo," 
Acts2:47 bakomotogia Nyasae na kogwenera abanto bonsi. Omonene akabamentera kera rituko ase okorenta baria barenge gotoorigwa. 
Acts3:1 Petero na Yohana nigo barenge gotiira gochia ase Hekalu chinsa chi’ogosaba, chinsa kianda." 
Acts3:2 Na omonto oyomo, orenge rigata korwa okoiborwa kwaye, ore kobogorigwa nabanto na kobekwa kera rituko ase egesieri gie Hekalu kiare korokwa Egesieri Ekiya, erinde asabe ebiegwa ase abwo baare gosoa ase Hekalu." 
Acts3:3 Agachia korora Petero na Yohana kobagosoa Hekalu ime, agasaba bamoe ebiegwa." 
Acts3:4 Petero akamobeta amaiso, amo na Yohana, akabora, “Torigererie intwe!”" 
Acts3:5 Akabarigereria, osemeretie ng’a naegwe egento korwa asebare." 
Acts3:6 Korende Petero akamotebia, “Efeta timbwati, nonya netahabu, korende eki mbwate nakio ngokoa: Ase erieta ria Yeso Kristo o Nazareti, tenena ogende!”" 
Acts3:7 Akamobwata okoboko gw’okorio, akamoimokia igoro. Erio kegima amagoro aye ne chinengo chi’amagoro aye bikanyora chinguru." 
Acts3:8 Akaimoka bwango, agatenena, agachaka kogenda, agasoa Hekalu ime amo nabarabwo, ogotaara na gotuma‐tuma, na komotogia Nyasae." 
Acts3:9 Abanto bonsi bakamorora ogotaara na komotogia Nyasae. 
Acts3:10 Bakamomanya ng’a nere oria orenge goikaransa na gosaba ebiegwa aria ase Egesieri Ekiya gie Hekalu. Erio bagaichorwa nogokumia na ogoichana ase amang’ana aria akoregete asare. 
Acts3:11 Ekero are kobwata‐bwata Petero na Yohana, abanto bonsi ase ogokumia bakaminyoka na gosangererekana amo asebare ase egesona kiare korokwa Egesona gia Sulemani." 
Acts3:12 Ekero Petero arora aya akaboria abanto, “Inwe abasacha ba Israeli, inki mogokumeria aya gose nase ki mogotobeta amaiso, ng’a buna intwe ase chinguru chiaito abanyene, gose ase obuya bwaito, twamokora oyo ogenda?" 
Acts3:13 Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo, Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito, oeire Omosomba oye Yeso obonene, ere inwe mokamorua na komwanga ase obosio bwa Pilato, ekero agambete ekina kiaye ng’a amosibore." 
Acts3:14 Korende mokamwanga oria Omochenu, Omonyene Oboronge, na mokaboria moegwe omoiti." 
Acts3:15 Mogaita Omorua bw’obogima. Korende Nyasae akamobokia korwa ase abakure, na ase ayio intwe nigo tore abarori." 
Acts3:16 Na ase okwegena kw’erieta riaye, erieta riaye riamobekire chinguru omonto oyo mwarorire aiga na komomanya; na okwegena koria kore ase enchera ya Yeso kwamonyoreire obogima oboikeranu, buna mwarorire mwensi." 
Acts3:17 “Na bono baminto, namanyire ng’a nigo mwakorete aya ase ogotamanya kwaino, buna abanene baino bakorete." 
Acts3:18 Korende aya Nyasae akwanete ase emenwa y’ababani bonsi, ng’a Kristo oye nachandwe, oyaikeranirie ase enchera eye." 
Acts3:19 Ase ayio onchoka, moirane, erinde ebibe biaino bitinyigwe, erio chingaki chi’ogotimokigwa chinyare gocha korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene," 
Acts3:20 anyare gotoma Kristo, oria mwarageretwe korwa kare, nere Yeso." 
Acts3:21 Ere igoro yagwenerete komonyora, goika chichiche chingaki chi’ebinto bionsi bigokorwa ebiyia, ebiakwanetwe na Nyasae ase emenwa y’ababani baye abachenu korwa kare." 
Acts3:22 Musa natebete: Omonene Nyasae nabaimokerie omobani onga buna inche korwa ase egati y’abamino. Momoigwere ase amang’ana onsi arabatebie. 
Acts3:23 Naende nebe ng’a kera omonto otaigwereti omobani oyio nigo arasirigwe na gwatananwa korwa ase egati y’abanto. 
Acts3:24 Na ababani bonsi abakwanete korwa Samweli, na baria bachete korwa nyuma yaye, bakararia igoro y’amatuko aya." 
Acts3:25 Inwe nigo more abana b’ababani na ab’okobwatana koria Nyasae abwatanete ne chisokoro chiaino, ekero atebetie Ibrahimu: Ase oroiboro rwao ebisaku bionsi bi’ense inabisesenigwe." 
Acts3:26 Nyasae ekero abogetie Omosomba oye, akamotoma asemore ritang’ani, erinde abasesenie ase ogwatanana kera oyomo oino korwa ase obobe bwaye.”" 
Acts4:1 Ekero barenge gokwana nabanto, abakuani abanene, na omonene bw’abarendi be Hekalu, na Abasadukai bakabaorokera,"
