Acts4:2 bagechirie, ekiagera abatomwa barenge kworokereria abanto na koraria okobokigwa korwa ase abakure gokonyorekana ase Yeso." 
Acts4:3 Bakababwata, bakababeka echela ime goika mambia, ekiagera konya riabeire mogoroba." 
Acts4:4 Korende abange ase abwo abaigwete amang’ana aya bakeegena; na omobaro bw’abasacha nigo obete koreng’ana chilifu isano. 
Acts4:5 Mambia kobwakia, abanene babo, na abagaaka, na aborokia b’amariko bagasangererekana Yerusalemu," 
Acts4:6 amo na Anasi, omokuani omonene, na Kayafa, na Yohana, na Aleksanderi, na bonsi abarenge b’eamate y’omokuani omonene." 
Acts4:7 Ekero babegete abatomwa gati‐gati, bakababoria, “Inwe nase nguru ki, naende nase erieta ria ng’o mogokora aya?”" 
Acts4:8 Erio Petero agaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu, akabatebia, “Abanene b’abanto, na abagaaka," 
Acts4:9 onye tokoborigwa rero igoro y’ogokora okuya akoreirwe omonto oria omorwaire, na ase enchera ki agwenigwa," 
Acts4:10 manya inwe mwensi na Abaisraeli bonsi ng’a erieta ria Yeso Kristo o Nazareti, ere inwe mwabambete, na Nyasae akamobokia korwa ase abakure, erieta erio riagwenirie omonto oyo kegima, oteneine bosio bwaino." 
Acts4:11 Yeso nere rigena riangetwe na inwe abaagachi, korende obeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona." 
Acts4:12 Gose gotooreka tikori ase onde bwensi, ekiagera erieta rinde tiriri inse ase erioba intwe mwanyabanto twaetwe eriranyare gototooria.”" 
Acts4:13 Bono ekero abanene baria bachia korora oboremu bwa Petero na Yohana, na bakamanya ng’a nigo bare buna banto bande bonsi, batari ne chisemi, bagakumia. Erio bakamanya ng’a Petero na Yohana nigo konya babeire amo na Yeso." 
Acts4:14 Ekero bachia korora omonto oria ogwenetigwe, oteneine amo nabarabwo, tibaba na ing’ana rinde bagokwana." 
Acts4:15 Bakabachika basoke korwa ase ekegambero, bagakora ekina barabwo ase barabwo," 
Acts4:16 bagoteba, “Inki torakorere abanto aba? Ekiagera egekone eke giakorirwe nabarabwo kere maiso marore ase abanto bonsi abamenyete Yerusalemu, titokonyara kogekana." 
Acts4:17 Korende ring’ana eri tiricha gosiarerwa egati y’abanto; tiga tobagose, tibakwana na monto onde bwensi ase erieta eri.”" 
Acts4:18 Bakabarangeria, bakabatianera tibabaisa gokwana gose kworokereria ase erieta ria Yeso." 
Acts4:19 Korende Petero na Yohana bakabairaneria, “Onye mboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae kobaigwera inwe kobua Nyasae, monache inwe abanyene," 
Acts4:20 ekiagera titokonyara gotiga gokwana ayatwaroche na koyaigwa.” 
Acts4:21 Na ekero abanene baria babagosire naende, bakabasibora. Tibanyora enchera y’okobaa egesusuro ase engencho y’abanto, ekiagera abanto bonsi barenge komobaka Nyasae ase ayio akoregete." 
Acts4:22 Emiaka y’omonto oria egekone gi’okogwenigwa giakoregete asare nigo yarenge goetania emerongo ene. 
Acts4:23 Ekero basiboirwe bakagenda ase abasani babo, bakabatebia aya onsi abakuani abanene na abagaaka babatebetie." 
Acts4:24 Ekero bachia koyaigwa, bagaakera Nyasae amariogi abo amo, bakobora, “Omogambi omonene, aye naye gwakorete igoro na ense, na enyancha, na ebinto bionsi ebire imeo." 
Acts4:25 Naye gwakwanete n’Omoika Omochenu goetera ase omonwa o sokoro yaito Daudi, omosomba oo, “Nase ki abanto b’ebisaku bagokora riroroche, na abanto bagokora emeroberio ere bosa?" 
Acts4:26 Abaruoti b’ense bebekire ang’e, na abagambi nigo bakogamba amo ase okwanga Omonene na Kristo oye." 
Acts4:27 Naki ekeene, ase omochie oyo Herode na Pontio Pilato amo nabanto b’Ebisaku, na Abaisraeli, bagasangererekana igoro y’Omosomba oo omochenu, Yeso, oyokwaagete amaguta koba Masihi," 
Acts4:28 erinde bakore aya okoboko kwao na omoroberio oo biare goteba korwa kare akoreke. 
Acts4:29 Na bono Omonene, rigereria okogosa kwabo, okonye abasomba bao bakwane ring’ana riao noboremu bwonsi," 
Acts4:30 orambore okoboko kwao ase okogwenia, na ebikone na amakumia bikoreke ase erieta ri’Omosomba oo omochenu, Yeso.”" 
Acts4:31 Kobakoorire ogosaba, aase aria basangererekanete agatengechigwa, bonsi bagaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu, bakagenderera gokwana ring’ana ria Nyasae noboremu." 
Acts4:32 Omoganda bw’abanto abegenete nigo orenge nenkoro eyemo na omoyo oyomo, na onde bwensi tarenge ore goteba ng’a gento kende gionsi eki arenge nakio nekia ye omonyene, korende bakaba nebinto bionsi ase obomo." 
Acts4:33 Abatomwa bakagenderera koba birori ne chinguru chinene igoro y’okoboka kw’Omonene Yeso; na obuya obonge nigo bwarenge igoro asebare bonsi. 
Acts4:34 Na monto onde tarenge ase egati yabo oyorenge nokoremerwa, ekiagera abanto bonsi abarenge nemegondo ne chinyomba nigo babioonetie, bakarenta chibesa chi’ebinto biria biaoonetigwe," 
Acts4:35 bagachibeka ase amagoro ’abatomwa; na kera omonto akagaberwa koreng’ana buna aremeire. 
Acts4:36 Na Yusufu ore korokwa nabatomwa Barnaba (engencho yaye, “Omwana bw’Oboremia”), Omolawi, omonto o Kuporo," 
Acts4:37 narenge nomogondo, akayoonia, akarenta chibesa, agachibeka ase amagoro ’abatomwa." 
Acts5:1 Korende narenge omonto oyomo ore korokwa Anania. Amo na Safira mokaye akaoonia omogondo oye," 
Acts5:2 korende akabisa ensemo ye rigori riaye, na mokaye nere namanyete aya. Akarenta ensemo eyemo, akayebeka ase amagoro ’abatomwa." 
Acts5:3 Erio Petero akamoboria, “Anania, nase ki Saitani aichoire enkoro yao, okong’aina Omoika Omochenu na kobisa ensemo ye rigori ri’omogondo?" 
Acts5:4 Inee! Ekero otaraoonigwa, torenge oyoo? Naende ekero oonigwe, chibesa tichiarenge ase okobua kwao? Nase ki kwarengereretie ring’ana eri ase enkoro yao ime? Totebeti mwanyabanto oborimo, korende Nyasae.”" 
Acts5:5 Ekero Anania achia koigwa amang’ana aya, agaaka inse, agakwa. Omoondoko omonene okanyora abanto bonsi abaigwete aya." 
Acts5:6 Abamura bakaimoka, bakamotuba egetambaa, bakamobogoria gochia isiko, bakamotindeka." 
Acts5:7 Nyuma ye chinsa isato gachiaetire mokaye agasoa, ere tamanyete aya akoregete." 
Acts5:8 Petero akamoboria, “Ntebia, igo mwaoonetie omogondo ase rigori erio?” Akairaneria, “Ee, ase rigori erio.”" 
Acts5:9 Petero akamoboria, “Naki abete mogancherana goteema Omoika bw’Omonene? Rora, amagoro abo abatindeka omosacha oo nao are agwo gesieri, na barabwo nabakobogorie aye gochia isiko.”" 
Acts5:10 Erio kegima akagwa ase amagoro aye, agakwa. Abamura baria bagasoa, bakamonyora okure. Erio bakamobogoria gochia isiko, bakamotindeka ase omosacha oye ensemo." 
Acts5:11 Omoondoko omonene okabwata ab’ekanisa yonsi na abanto bonsi abaigwete aya. 
Acts5:12 Ase amaboko ’abatomwa ebikone ebinge na amakumia amange bigakoreka ase abanto. Na barabwo bonsi nigo barenge amo ase omoyo oyomo ase Egesona gia Sulemani. 
Acts5:13 Onde tarenge korwa isiko obete noboremu kobwatana nabarabwo, korende abanto bakabasika ogosika okonene." 
Acts5:14 Abamwegenete Omonene bakagenderera komenteka koba abange, abasacha na abakungu;" 
Acts5:15 nonya nase chinchera chinene bagasokia abarwaire isiko, bakabareria igoro ase amarere na emeito, erinde, ekero Petero agoeta, omorengari oye okune abande b’abwo." 
Acts5:16 Nonya nabanto korwa ase emechie eria yaetanaine Yerusalemu bagesangereria, bakarenta abarwaire amo nabwo babwatire nebirecha bi’eubi, na bonsi bakagwenigwa." 
Acts5:17 Omokuani omonene akaimoka, na bonsi abarenge amo nere; abwo nabwo barenge b’Abasadukai. Bagaichorwa ne ribero," 
Acts5:18 bakabwata abatomwa, bakababeka ase echela ime." 
Acts5:19 Korende omomalaika bw’Omonene akaigora ebisieri bi’echela botuko, akabasokia, agateba," 
Acts5:20 “Genda, motenene ase Hekalu ime, motebie abanto amang’ana onsi igoro y’Obogima obo.”" 
Acts5:21 Na ekero bachia koigwa aya, bagasoa Hekalu ime ekero kia mambia, bakorokereria. Ekero omokuani omonene na abwo barenge komo bacha, bagasangereria abanto b’ekegambero na abagaaka bonsi b’Abaisraeli, bagatoma abanto ase echela, erinde barente abatomwa baria." 
Acts5:22 Korende ekero abarendi bachia goika, tibabanyora echela ime. Bakairana, bagateba," 
Acts5:23 “Echela nigo twayenyora esiekire buya kegima, na abarendi bateneine bisieri, korende twachia koigora titwanyora monto onde ime.”" 
Acts5:24 Na ekero omonene bw’abarendi be Hekalu na abakuani abanene bachia koigwa amang’ana aya, bagasogwa nomoichano omonene ase engencho yabo, naki arabe amang’ana aya." 
Acts5:25 Omonto oyomo agacha, akabatebia, “Rora, abanto baria mwabegete echela ime nigo bateneine ase Hekalu ime kworokereria abanto.”" 
Acts5:26 Erio omonene bw’abarendi akagenda amo nabanto baye, bakabarenta, korende tari ase chinguru, ekiagera barenge nobwoba ng’a mbaakwe amagena nabanto." 
Acts5:27 Ekero babarentire bakababeka ase ekegambero. Omokuani omonene akababoria," 
Acts5:28 “Inee! Titwabakanetie bokong’u ng’a timworokereria ase erieta eri? Na rora, mwaichoirie Yerusalemu nokworokereria kwaino, naende morigetie korenta amanyinga ’omonto oria igoro asetore.”" 
Acts5:29 Korende Petero na abatomwa bande bakairaneria, “Netogwenerete koigwera Nyasae kobua mwanyabanto." 
Acts5:30 Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito obogetie Yeso, ere inwe mwaitete, mokamosunga ase omote." 
Acts5:31 Nyasae akamoimokereria igoro ase ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio abe Omoraai na Omotooria, erinde aonchore Abaisraeli, abae okwaberwa kw’ebibe." 
Acts5:32 Intwe na Omoika Omochenu, oyio Nyasae aeire bonsi abamoigwerete, nigo tore birori ase amang’ana aya.”" 
Acts5:33 Ekero bachia koigwa aya bakagechigwa, bakarigia kobaita." 
Acts5:34 Korende Omofarisai oyomo ore korokwa Gamalieli, oyomo bw’ekegambero, omworokia bw’amachiko, omonto osikire nabanto bonsi, agachika ng’a abanto aba babekwe isiko ake." 
Acts5:35 Akabatebia, “Inwe abasacha b’Abaisraeli, erende buna morakorere abanto aba." 
Acts5:36 Naki ase amatuko aetire Theuda naimoka, agetogia ng’a ere nomonto omonene; abanto koreng’ana amagana ane bakabwatana nere, korende ere agaitwa, na abatunyani baye bonsi bagaserebekana, bagasira." 
Acts5:37 Nyuma yaye Yudas Omogalili nere akaimoka ase amatuko aria ekero abanto baare korikwa, akang’usa abanto abange bamotunyane. Nere boigo agasira, na bonsi abamotunyanete bagaserebekana." 
Acts5:38 Na bono nabatebirie, eatanane korwa ase abanto aba, batige, ekiagera onye ring’ana eri, gose emeremo eye, neya mwanyabanto, nesarigwe," 
Acts5:39 korende onye neya Nyasae, timokonyara koyesaria nonya ng’ake; mobaise kororekana ng’a Nyasae mokorwania!”" 
Acts5:40 Bagancha amang’ana aye, na ekero barangeretie abatomwa, bakabaaka, bakabachika tibakwana ase erieta ria Yeso. Erio bakabatiga bagende." 
Acts5:41 Na barabwo bakarua ase ekegambero keria, bagogete ekiagera konya babarirwe ng’a bagweneire korenterwa obosooku ase engencho y’Erieta eri." 
Acts5:42 Na kera rituko, ase Hekalu ime na ase chinyomba chiabo tibatigete kworokereria na korandia amang’ana amaya igoro ya Yeso, ng’a nere Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Bono ase amatuko aria, ekero aborokigwa barenge komentekana omobaro obo, nkwabete okwemurungania kw’Abayahudi abarenge gokwana Ekegiriki igoro ase Abayahudi baria barenge gokwana Ekearamaiki, ekiagera ababoraka babo bebetwe ase okogaberwa gwa kera rituko." 
Acts6:2 Baria ikomi na babere bakarangeria omoganda bw’aborokigwa, bagateba, “Tetogwenereti intwe gotiga ring’ana ria Nyasae na gokora emeremo ye chimesa." 
Acts6:3 Gaki baminto, chora abanto batano na babere korwa ase egati yaino, abamanyekanete ng’a nabaya, baichire n’Omoika na obong’aini, erinde tobabeke ase emeremo eye." 
Acts6:4 Korende intwe inatogenderere ase ogosaba na gokorera ring’ana ria Nyasae.” 
Acts6:5 Ring’ana eri rikagwenera omosangererekano bwonsi. Bagachora Stefano, omonto oichire nokwegena na Omoika Omochenu, na Filipo, na Prokoro, na Nikanora, na Timoni, na Parmena, na Nikolao bw’Antiokia, omonto oonchogete." 
Acts6:6 Bakababeka bosio bw’abatomwa, na barabwo bakabasabera na kobabekera amaboko." 
Acts6:7 Ring’ana ria Nyasae rikaranda, na omobaro bw’aborokigwa okamentekana mono ase Yerusalemu, na abakuani abange bakaigwera okwegena." 
Acts6:8 Na Stefano, oichire obuya na okobua, nigo arenge gokora amakumia amanene na ebikone egati y’abanto." 
Acts6:9 Korende abanto bande b’esinagogi yare korokwa Esinagogi y’Abasibore, aba nigo barenge Abakurene na Abaaleksanderia, na baria korwa ase Kilikia na Asia, bakaimoka bakaamererania na Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Korende tibanyara kobua obong’aini na Omoika oyo are gokwana noro. 
Acts6:11 Goika bakagenka abanto batebe, “Ntwaigwa omonto oyo ogokwana amang’ana ’oborami igoro ya Musa na Nyasae.”" 
Acts6:12 Bagaseega abanto na abagaaka na aborokia b’amariko, bagachiera Stefano bakamobwata, bakamoira bosio bw’ekegambero." 
Acts6:13 Bagatenenia birori b’oborimo abaare goteba, “Omonto oyo tatigeti gokwana bobe igoro y’aase aa aachenu na igoro y’amachiko." 
Acts6:14 Naki ntwamoigwa ogoteba ng’a Yeso oyio o Nazareti inasarie aase aa, na koonchora chingencho echi twaetwe na Musa.”" 
Acts6:15 Abanto bonsi, abaikaransete ase ekegambero eke, bakamobeta amaiso, bakarora obosio bwaye ng’a nigo bwabeire buna obosio bw’omomalaika." 
Acts7:1 Omokuani omonene akaboria Stefano, “Inee! Amang’ana ayio naboigo are?”" 
Acts7:2 Stefano akairaneria, “Abaminto na abatata, ntegerere. Nyasae bw’obonene naorokerete sokoro yaito Ibrahimu, ekero arenge ase Mesopotamia, ritang’ani ataramenya Harani," 
Acts7:3 akamotebia: Karue ase ense yao, na ase eamate yao, ogende goika ase ense ndakworokie." 
Acts7:4 Erio akarua ase ense y’Abakalidayo, akamenya Harani. Nyuma ise gakure, Nyasae akamong’anyia korwa aroro goika ense eye inwe momenyete bono." 
Acts7:5 Tamoete omwando ime aa, nonya koreng’ana ase akobeka okogoro, korende akamoriera eira ng’a namoe ense eria ebe obomenyo bwaye, na obw’oroiboro rwaye nyuma yaye, nonya tarenge nomwana." 
Acts7:6 Nyasae agakwana iga: Oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu inababe abamenyi ase ense y’abanto bande, na barabwo inababakore babe abasomba babo, na kobakorera bobe, ase engaki y’emiaka amagana ane." 
Acts7:7 Nyasae agateba: Ninkegambie ekina egesaku keria kerabakore babe abasomba babo, na nyuma y’ayio nabaruo, na barabwo nabansasimere aase aiga." 
Acts7:8 Akamoa okwaroka buna ekemanyererio gi’okobwatana. Erio Ibrahimu akaibora Isaka, akamosara rituko ria gatano na gatato. Isaka akaibora Yakobo, na Yakobo akaibora baria ikomi na babere, abagaaka baito ba kare." 
Acts7:9 “Baria abagaaka baito ba kare bakarorera Yusufu ribero, bakamoonia gochia Misiri. Korende Nyasae akaba amo nere," 
Acts7:10 akamorusia ase emechando yaye yonsi, akamoa ogwancherwa na obong’aini ase obosio bwa Farao, omoruoti o Misiri; ere akamobeka akaba gavuna igoro ya Misiri na enyomba yaye yonsi." 
Acts7:11 Erio enchara ekaba igoro ase ense yonsi ya Misiri na Kanani, na emechando emenge, ne chisokoro chiaito tichianyora endagera echiisanete." 
Acts7:12 Korende Yakobo gachia koigwa ng’a endagera nekare Misiri, agatoma chisokoro chiaito aroro ase orogendo rwe ritang’ani." 
Acts7:13 Ase orogendo rwa kabere Yusufu akemanyekania ase bamura bamwabo, na eamate ya Yusufu egacha, ekamanyekana ase Farao." 
Acts7:14 Erio Yusufu agatoma abanto gochia korangeria Yakobo ise, na eamate yaye yonsi, abanto emerongo etano na ebere na batano." 
Acts7:15 Yakobo agatirimboka, agaika Misiri; ere agakwera aroro, ere omonyene ne chisokoro chiaito." 
Acts7:16 Bakabogorigwa goika Sekemu, bagatindekwa ase embeera eria Ibrahimu agorete ase chifeta korwa ase abana ba Hamori, aaria Sekemu." 
Acts7:17 “Ekero eira eria Nyasae aete Ibrahimu yachia goika ang’e gokieranigwa, abanto baria bakamenteka na kobucha mono aaria Misiri," 
Acts7:18 goika omoruoti onde akabekwa Misiri, oyotamomanyete Yusufu." 
Acts7:19 Oyio agakorera egesaku giaito obong’ainereria, na agakorera chisokoro chiaito amabe, na barabwo bagachikwa ng’a batugute abana babo ebing’werere, erinde tibaba moyo." 
Acts7:20 Ekero ekio Musa akaiborwa, ere nigo arenge omuya mono, akagwenera Nyasae. Akarererwa nyomba mwa ise ase engaki y’emetienyi etato." 
Acts7:21 Ekero achia gotugutwa, omoiseke o Farao akamoira, ’akamotuga na komorera buna omwana oye." 
Acts7:22 Musa akorokererigwa chisemi chionsi chia Misiri, akaba omokong’u ase amang’ana na ase ogokora." 
Acts7:23 “Ekero akoorire emiaka emerongo ene, akarengereria ase enkoro yaye kogenda korora abamwabo, Abaisraeli." 
Acts7:24 Akarora oyomo obo ogokorerwa bobe n’Omomisiri, akamokonya; agaakanera oria orenge gochandwa egesiomba, agaaka Omomisiri oria akamoita." 
Acts7:25 Nigo akagete ng’a abamwabo mbamanye ng’a Nyasae nabae obosibore goetera ase okoboko kwaye, korende tibamanya." 
Acts7:26 Rituko ria kabere akaorokera Abaisraeli babere ekero baare korwana, akarigia kobatorania agateba: Abaminto, inwe nabamo, nase ki mokorwana?" 
Acts7:27 Korende oria orenge gokorera oyomwabo bobe, akamosukeria are, agateba: Ning’o okobegete koba omonene gose omogambi asetore?" 
Acts7:28 Inee! Norigetie kong’ita buna gwaita Omomisiri oria igoro? 
Acts7:29 Ase engencho y’amang’ana aya Musa agatama gochia ase ense ya Midiani, akamenya aroro buna omomenyi. Akaiborera abana babere abamura aroro." 
Acts7:30 “Ekero emiaka emerongo ene yachia koera, omomalaika akamoorokera ase ogwoka kw’omorero ase egetutu aaria erooro y’egetunwa gia Sinai." 
Acts7:31 Musa agakumia ase okorora koria, na ekero achia goika ang’e gokorora, eriogi ri’Omonene rikamochera, rigateba:" 
Acts7:32 Ninche Nyasaye bwe chisokoro chiao, Nyasae o Ibrahimu, na o Isaka, na o Yakobo. Musa akaiguswa, tarenge na boremu bw’okorigereria." 
Acts7:33 Omonene akamotebia: Rusia ebikoroto biao korwa ase amagoro ao, ekiagera aase agwo oteneine naase aachenu." 
Acts7:34 Ekeene, narorire ogokorerwa bobe kw’abanto baane abare Misiri, naigure okorera kwabo, naikire mbasibore. Inchuo bono, ngotome goika Misiri." 
Acts7:35 “Musa nere oyio bangete, bagateba: Ning’o okobegete koba omonene gose omogambi? Nere otometwe na Nyasae, goetera ase amaboko ’omomalaika oria omoorokerete ase egetutu keria, koba omonene na omosibori." 
Acts7:36 Omonto oyio nere obarusetie korwa aroro nyuma gakorire amakumia na ebikone ase ense ya Misiri, na ase Enyancha Embariri, naende ase erooro ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Acts7:37 Musa oyio nere otebetie Abaisraeli ng’a: Nyasae nabaimokerie omobani onga buna inche korwa ase egati y’abamino. 
Acts7:38 Naende nere orenge ase baria basangererekanete ase erooro amo nomomalaika oyokwanete nere ase egetunwa gia Sinai, naende amo ne chisokoro chiaito; nere oetwe amang’ana ’obogima atoe." 
Acts7:39 Omonto oyio chisokoro chiaito chikaanga koinoigwera, chikamosukeria are. Na ase ebirengererio biabo bakairana Misiri," 
Acts7:40 bagatebia Haroni: Tokorere chinyasae echiranyare gototang’ana. Titomanyeti eriamonyorire Musa, oyotorusetie ase ense ya Misiri." 
Acts7:41 Ase amatuko aria bagakora omogwekano bw’emori, bakarenta ekeng’wanso ase omogwekano oria basasimete, bakagokera emeremo y’amaboko abo." 
Acts7:42 Korende Nyasae akeonchora korwa asebare, akabatiga basasime erioba na omotienyi ne ching’enang’eni chia igoro, buna arikire ase ebuku y’ababani: “Inwe Abaisraeli, Inee, ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene, eyio mwarenge ase erooro, mwandeterete ebing’wanso amo nokoruegwa konde?" 
Acts7:43 Yaya, nigo mwabogoretie Moleki, enyasae yaino, na eng’enang’eni y’enyasae Refani, emegwekano eyio mwakorete, erinde moyesasime. Ase ayio nimbang’anyie goika ng’umbu ya Babeli." 
Acts7:44 “Eema y’oborori nigo yarenge amo ne chisokoro chiaito ase erooro, buna Nyasae achigete, ekero atebetie Musa ng’a ayekore buna ekiorokererio keria aroche." 
Acts7:45 Chisokoro chiaito nchiayenyorete buna omwando, chikayesoyia amo na Yoshua, ekero bairete ense y’ebisaku biria Nyasae aseretie korwa ase obosio bwe chisokoro chiaito. Nigo babete nero goika amatuko a Daudi," 
Acts7:46 oyio onyorete ogwancherwa ase obosio bwa Nyasae, agasaba ng’a anyorere Nyasae o Yakobo obomenyo." 
Acts7:47 Korende Sulemani nere omoagacherete enyomba. 
Acts7:48 Korende Ere Oyore Igoro Mono tari komenya ase chinyomba chiagachire namaboko, buna omobani agoteba:" 
Acts7:49 “Igoro nekerogo kiane ki’obonene, na ense negeteni kiane ki’amagoro. Omonene otebire: Inyomba ki moranyare kong’agachera? Gose ng’ai aase are ndanyare gotimokera?" 
Acts7:50 Inee! Tari okoboko kwane gwakorete ebinto ebi bionsi? 
Acts7:51 “Inwe abamore nebigoti ebikong’u, motarogeti ase chinkoro, nonya namato, motaonchogeti; botambe nigo mokoamereria Omoika Omochenu. Buna chisokoro chiaino chiarenge gokora, nainwe nabo mogokora." 
Acts7:52 Ning’o ase ababani chisokoro chiaino chitachandete? Na barabwo mbaitete baria babanete amang’ana igoro y’ogocha kw’oria Omonyene Oboronge. Inwe bono mwabeire abamorua na abamoiti. 
Acts7:53 Inwe abamwanyorete amachiko ayarentetwe nabamalaika, korende timwayabwata.”" 
Acts7:54 Ekero bachia koigwa amang’ana aya, bakagechigwa ase chinkoro chiabo ime, bakamoromananeria amaino." 
Acts7:55 Korende ere oichire n’Omoika Omochenu, akarigereria mono gochia igoro, akarora obonene bwa Nyasae, na Yeso oteneine ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae." 
Acts7:56 Agateba, “Rora, narorire igoro amaanokire, na Omwana‐o‐mwanyabanto oteneine ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae.”" 
Acts7:57 Korende bagaaka egeturi ase eriogi rinene, bagakuneka amato abo, bakamorindokera bonsi amo," 
Acts7:58 bakamosokia isiko y’omochie, bakamoaka amagena. Na abarori bakabeka chianga chiabo ase amagoro ’omomura oyomo, ore korokwa Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Bagaaka Stefano amagena ekero arenge gosaba, ogoteba, “Omonene Yeso, ira omoika one.”" 
Acts7:60 Akabeka amaru inse, akarera ase eriogi rinene, “Omonene, tobabarera ebibe ebi!” Ochia gokoora gokwana aya, agakwa. Na Saulo nigo aroche buya ase ogoitwa kwaye." 
Acts8:1 Ase rituko riria emechando emenene egacha igoro ase ekanisa ya Yerusalemu; bonsi bagaserebanigwa gochia chinse chia Boyahudi na Samaria, otatiga abatomwa bataserebanetigwe." 
Acts8:2 Abanto abegeni bagatindeka Stefano, bakamoreera okorera okonene." 
Acts8:3 Korende Saulo agasaria ekanisa, agasoa kera enyomba akaba ogokurura abasacha na abakungu, na kobaira ase echela." 
Acts8:4 Na baria baserebanetigwe bakagenda chinsemo ne chinsemo, bakarandia ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Acts8:5 Filipo agatirimboka, agasoa omochie o Samaria, akabaranderia Kristo." 
Acts8:6 Emeganda yonsi ase omoyo oyomo bagategerera amang’ana onsi Filipo are gokwana, ekero bamoigwete na korora ebikone ebiarenge gokora." 
Acts8:7 Ekiagera abange babwatire nebirecha bi’eubi, na ebirecha ebi bikarwa asebare, bikarera ase egeturi ekenene; abanto abarenge amagata, na baria barenge ebirema bakagwenigwa." 
Acts8:8 Ase igo omogoko omonene okaba ase omochie oria. 
Acts8:9 Omonto oyomo ore korokwa Simion, agwo ritang’ani nigo arenge gokora oborogi ase omochie oria; abanto ba Samaria bakamokumia, ekero are goteba ng’a ere omonyene nomonto omonene." 
Acts8:10 Bonsi, abake na abanene, bakamotegerera, bagateba, “Omonto oyo nigo are okobua koria kwa Nyasae gokorokwa Okobua Okonene.”" 
Acts8:11 Bakamotegerera, ekiagera ase amatuko amange nigo barenge gokumia ase oborogi bwaye." 
Acts8:12 Korende ekero bachia kwegena Filipo, gakorandia amang’ana amaya igoro y’oboruoti bwa Nyasae na erieta ria Yeso Kristo, bakabatiswa, abasacha na abakungu." 
Acts8:13 Nonya n’Simion omonyene akeegena, na nyuma kabatisirwe akagenderera koba amo na Filipo. Ekero aroche ebikone na ogokora okonene gwe chinguru biakoretwe, agakumia." 
Acts8:14 Na ekero abatomwa ba Yerusalemu bachia koigwa ng’a Abasamaria banchire ring’ana ria Nyasae, bakabatomera Petero na Yohana." 
Acts8:15 Barabwo bagatirimboka, bakabasabera, erinde banyore Omoika Omochenu," 
Acts8:16 ekiagera konya torabaikera nonya noyomo obo. Barabwo nigo babatisetwe rioka ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso. 
Acts8:17 Erio Petero na Yohana bakababekera amaboko abo, na barabwo bakanyora Omoika Omochenu." 
Acts8:18 Ekero Simion achia korora ng’a abanto nigo bakoegwa Omoika ase okobekerwa amaboko nabatomwa, akabarentera chibesa," 
Acts8:19 agateba, “Ing’a nainche okobua oko, ng’a kera omonto ndabekere amaboko aane anyore Omoika Omochenu.”" 
Acts8:20 Korende Petero akamotebia, “Chifeta chiao chisire amo naye, ekiagera okagete ng’a nonyore ekeegwa kia Nyasae ase chibesa!" 
Acts8:21 Tori negetari gose nensemo ase ring’ana eri, ekiagera enkoro yao teri boronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Acts8:22 Ase ayio onchoka korwa ase obobe bwao obo, osabe Omonene, erinde, keranyarekane, bwaberwe ebirengererio bi’enkoro yao." 
Acts8:23 Naki nakororire ng’a nore nobororo buna endorwe, naende nigo ore ase egesibo ki’ebibe.”" 
Acts8:24 Simion akairaneria, “Insabera inwe ase Omonene, ng’a amang’ana aya mwakwanire tabaisa gocha konyora nonya nerimo riabo.”" 
Acts8:25 Erio kabaorokirie oborori na korandia ring’ana ri’Omonene, bakairana Yerusalemu, bakorandia amang’ana amaya ase ebichie ebinge bi’Abasamaria." 
Acts8:26 Omomalaika bw’Omonene agatebia Filipo, “Imoka ogende ensemo ya irianyi goika enchera eria egotirimboka korwa Yerusalemu ekogenda Gasa.” Eye nenchera y’erooro." 
Acts8:27 Akaimoka, akagenda. Na rora, ekero are inchera, akarora omonto bw’Etiopia, omogomba, oyobegetwe igoro y’enibo yonsi ya Kandake, eting’ana ya Etiopia. Ere nigo agendete Yerusalemu gosasima." 
Acts8:28 Ekero arenge koirana na oikaransete ase egari yaye, nigo arenge gosoma ebuku y’omobani Isaya." 
Acts8:29 Erio Omoika ogatebia Filipo, “Genda ang’e negari eyio, ogende nero.”" 
Acts8:30 Filipo akaminyoka gochia asare, akamoigwa ogosoma ebuku y’omobani Isaya, akamoboria, “Inee! Kwamanyire buya aya ogosoma?”" 
Acts8:31 Akamoiraneria, “Naki ndanyare komanya otatiga omonto antang’ane?” Agatebia Filipo ariine, aikaranse amo nere." 
Acts8:32 Amang’ana e ririko ayarenge gosoma naro aya: “Akairwa buna eng’ondi egochia konyenywa, na buna emanwa etari kwana ase omonachi bw’amarionya, naboigo tamaanorete omonwa oye." 
Acts8:33 Ase ogwekeyia kwaye ekina kiaye gekarusigwa. Ning’o oranyare gototebia ororeria rwaye? Ekiagera obogima bwaye bwarusigwe ase ense.” 
Acts8:34 Omogomba oria akaboria Filipo, “Koranche ontebie igoro ya ng’o omobani oyo agokwana, igoro yaye omonyene gose igoro y’omonto onde?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipo agachaka gokwana; agachakera korwa ase ririko eri, akamoranderia amang’ana amaya igoro ya Yeso." 
Acts8:36 Ekero bagendererete inchera, bagaika aase amache arenge. Oria omogomba akabora, “Rora amache aya! Inki kegontanga timbatiswa?” [" 
Acts8:37 Filipo akamotebia, “Koregene nenkoro yao yonsi, nenyarekane.” Akairaneria, “Negenire ng’a Yeso Kristo nere Omwana o Nyasae.”]" 
Acts8:38 Agachika egari eria etenene, na bonsi babere, Filipo na oria omogomba, bagatirimboka gochia ase amache ime, erio Filipo akamobatisa." 
Acts8:39 Ekero bachia korwa ase amache, Omoika bw’Omonene ogataboria Filipo; omogomba oria tamorora naende, korende nigo agendete enchera yaye ore nomogoko." 
Acts8:40 Korende Filipo akarorekana ase Asoto, na ekero arenge goeta, akarandia enchili ase emechie yonsi, goika agaika Kaisaria." 
Acts9:1 Korende Saulo akamenta kobagosa na korengereria goita aborokigwa b’Omonene. Akagenda ase omokuani omonene," 
Acts9:2 akamoboria amoe amarube arikire ase chisinagogi chia Damesiki, erinde onye okonyora abanto b’Enchera eye, abasacha gose abakungu, abasibe na kobarenta Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:3 Ekero arenge kogenda, gaikire ang’e na Damesiki, erio mobosokano amasase akarwa igoro, akamomesera chinsemo chionsi." 
Acts9:4 Akagwa inse, akaigwa eriogi rikomotebia, “Saulo, Saulo, nase ki gwanchandire?”" 
Acts9:5 Akamoboria, “Naye ng’o Omonene?” Akairaneria, “Ninche Yeso, oyogwachandire aye," 
Acts9:6 korende imoka osoe omochie, notebigwe ayarakogwenere okore.”" 
Acts9:7 Abanto abagendete amo nere bagatenena, bagakira‐kiri; bakaigwa eriogi, korende tibarora monto." 
Acts9:8 Saulo akaimoka korwa inse, korende ekero achia koramokia amaiso aye tarora gento. Bakamobwata okoboko, bakamoira Damesiki." 
Acts9:9 Akaba omouko amatuko atato, atari koria, nonya nkonywa." 
Acts9:10 Ase Damesiki narengeo omworokigwa ore korokwa Anania. Omonene akamotebia ase okorora, “Anania!” Ere akairaneria, “Omonene nao inde aiga.”" 
Acts9:11 Omonene akamotebia, “Imoka ogende enchera eria ekorokwa Enchera Endonge, origie ime ase enyomba ya Yudas omonto okorokwa Saulo o Tariso; rora, nao are agosaba." 
Acts9:12 Na ere ase okorora ororire omonto okorokwa Anania ogosoa, okomobekera amaboko, anyare korora.”" 
Acts9:13 Korende Anania akairaneria, “Omonene, naigure korwa ase abanto abange igoro y’omonto oyo, buna akoreire abachenu bao Yerusalemu amabe amange." 
Acts9:14 Aiga nigo are nokobua korwa ase abakuani abanene asibe bonsi abakorangeria erieta riao.” 
Acts9:15 Korende Omonene akamotebia, “Genda aye rioka, ekiagera oyio nomokoreri one omochore, aire erieta riane gochia ase abanto b’Ebisaku, na ase abaruoti, na ase Abaisraeli." 
Acts9:16 Inche nimworokie onsi ayaramogwenere gochandwa ase engencho y’erieta riane.” 
Acts9:17 Anania akagenda, agasoa nyomba ime. Akamobekera amaboko aye, akabora, “Oyominto Saulo, Omonene Yeso, ere oyokoorokerete ase enchera kware gochera, ontomire, erinde onyare korora naende, na oichorwe n’Omoika Omochenu.”" 
Acts9:18 Erio kegima ebinto buna amasabo bikagwa korwa ase amaiso aye, akanyora okorora, agatenena, akabatiswa," 
Acts9:19 akaragera, akanyora chinguru. Akaba agwo amatuko atai make amo naborokigwa abarenge Damesiki." 
Acts9:20 Erio agwo kegima akamorandia Yeso ase chisinagogi, okobora, “Ere n’Omwana o Nyasae.”" 
Acts9:21 Na bonsi abamoigwete bagakumia, bagateba, “Tari ere oyo orenge Yerusalemu goteema goita abare korangeria erieta eri? Naende aiga, erinde abasibe, abaire ase abakuani abanene?”" 
Acts9:22 Korende Saulo akagenderera komenteka koba ne chinguru, agatantania Abayahudi abamenyete Damesiki, ase okoorokia ekeene ng’a Yeso nere Kristo." 
Acts9:23 Ekero amatuko amange aetire, Abayahudi bakamogamba, erinde banyare komoita," 
Acts9:24 korende okogamba kwabo gokamanyekana na Saulo. Bakamoboera ase ebiita omobaso na obotuko, erinde banyare komoita." 
Acts9:25 Korende aborokigwa baye bakamoira botuko na komoikeria ase orwaki, ore egetonga ime." 
Acts9:26 Ekero achia goika Yerusalemu agateema kobwatana naborokigwa; na barabwo bonsi bakamoiroka, ekiagera tibanchete ng’a ere nomworokigwa arenge." 
Acts9:27 Korende Barnaba akamobwata okoboko, akamoira ase abatomwa, akabatebereria buna Saulo aroche Omonene nchera, naende ng’a Omonene nakwanete nere, na buna arandetie noboremu ase Damesiki ase erieta ria Yeso." 
Acts9:28 Saulo akaba amo nabarabwo ase Yerusalemu, agasoa na gosoka," 
Acts9:29 akarandia noboremu ase erieta ri’Omonene. Agakwana na koamererania n’Abayahudi abarenge gokwana Ekegiriki, korende barabwo bakarigia komoita." 
Acts9:30 Ekero abamwabo bachia konyora amang’ana aya, bakamoira goika Kaisaria, bakamotoma agende Tariso." 
Acts9:31 Erio ekanisa ekanyora omorembe ase chinsemo chionsi chia Boyahudi, na Galili, na Samaria. Ekagenderera koagachwa ase okoiroka kw’Omonene, na ase okoremia kw’Omoika Omochenu ekamentekana." 
Acts9:32 Ekero Petero are goetanana ase chinsemo chionsi, agatirimboka gochia ase abachenu abamenyete Lida." 
Acts9:33 Akanyora omonto oyomo aroro ore korokwa Ainea. Omonto oyio konya obeire ekeoru borere ase engaki y’emiaka etano na etato, are rigata." 
Acts9:34 Petero akamotebia, “Ainea, Yesu Kristo okogwenirie; imoka bware oborere bwao!” Erio kegima akaimoka." 
Acts9:35 Na abanto bonsi abamenyete Lida na Saroni bakamorora, bakaonchokera Omonene." 
Acts9:36 Ase Yopa narengeo omworokigwa oyomo ore korokwa Tabitha, engencho yaye Dorika, gose Engabi. Omokungu oyio nigo arenge oichire nogokora okuya na ebiegwa ebi arenge korua." 
Acts9:37 Ase amatuko aria akarwara, agakwa. Ekero bamosibirie bakamobeka akanyomba ka irongo." 
Acts9:38 Ekiagera Lida nigo orenge ang’e na Yopa, na aborokigwa konya baigure ng’a Petero nao are aria, bagatoma abanto babere asare komosorora na komotebia, “Koranche, totebana gocha asetore.”" 
Acts9:39 Petero akaimoka, akagenda amo nabarabwo. Ekero aikire aroro, bakamoira akanyomba ka irongo. Ababoraka bonsi bagatenena ang’e nere bakorera, na komworokia chiganchwa ne chianga echi Dorika arenge koroisia ekero arenge amo nabarabwo." 
Acts9:40 Petero akabasokia bonsi isiko, agatung’ama, agasaba. Akeonchora gochia ase egetondo, agateba, “Tabitha, imoka!” Na ere akaramokia amaiso aye; ekero arora Petero, akaboka, agaikaransa." 
Acts9:41 Petero akamoa okoboko kwaye, akamoimokia. Erio akarangeria abachenu baria na ababoraka, akamorenta asebare ore moyo." 
Acts9:42 Aya akamanyekana ase Yopa, ase omochie omogima, na abanto abange bakamwegena Omonene." 
Acts9:43 Petero akamenya Yopa amatuko atai make ase enyomba y’omonto oyomo ore korokwa Simion, omoroisia bw’amao." 
Acts10:1 Ase Kaisaria narengeo omonto ore korokwa Kornelio, omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana bw’ekeombe ekemo ki’abarwani kiare korokwa eki’Abaitalia." 
Acts10:2 Ere nigo arenge omonto omuya, omoirogete Nyasae, ere amo nab’enyomba yaye bonsi. Nigo are koa abanto ebiegwa ebinge na kogenderera gosaba Nyasae botambe." 
Acts10:3 Ang’e ne chinsa kianda chia mobaso akarora ase okorora maiso marore omomalaika o Nyasae akomochera, akamotebia, “Kornelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Akamorigereria mono, akairoka, akamoboria, “Naki Omonene?” Akamoiraneria, “Ogosaba kwao na ebiegwa biao biaikire igoro, na biabeire ekeinyorio ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Acts10:5 Gaki bono toma abanto Yopa barangerie Simion, oyokorokwa Petero." 
Acts10:6 Ere nomogeni bw’omonto oyomo okorokwa Simion, omoroisia bw’amao; enyomba yaye nigo ere ang’e nengegu y’enyancha.”" 
Acts10:7 Ekero omomalaika, oria okwanete nere, aimoka korwa aroro, Kornelio akarangeria abasomba baye babere na omorwani oyomo osigete Nyasae korwa ase baria bare komokorera botambe," 
Acts10:8 akabatebereria amang’ana onsi, akabatoma Yopa." 
Acts10:9 Rituko ria kabere, ekero baare kogenda, kobaikire ang’e nomochie, Petero akariina kerama igoro gochia gosaba koreng’ana chinsa isano nemo chia mobaso." 
Acts10:10 Akaba nenchara, akagania endagera arie. Korende ekero barenge koyeroisia, akabwatwa nobogondereria," 
Acts10:11 akarora igoro amaanokire, na egento kegoika, kere buna egetambaa ekenene, kebwatire emekoba ene, kegoikigwa gocha inse." 
Acts10:12 Ime yaye nigo biarengeo ebisaku bionsi bie ching’iti chire namagoro ane, ne ching’iti chi’orosana, na echikwagura, ne chinyoni chia igoro." 
Acts10:13 Eriogi rikamochera, rikamotebia: “Petero, imoka onyenye orie!”" 
Acts10:14 Korende Petero akabora, “Yaya Omonene, ekiagera tinana koria nonya ng’ake egento getachenegeti gose ekere neubi.”" 
Acts10:15 Eriogi rikamochera eria kabere, rikamotebia, “Eki Nyasae achenire tokeroka ng’a tikeri egechenu.”" 
Acts10:16 Eri rigakoreka ara gatato, na egento keria gekabogorigwa gochia igoro naende." 
Acts10:17 Ekero Petero arenge ne chitang’u‐tang’u ase omoyo oye ime ase okorora okwo aroche, engencho yaye inki, rora, abanto baria batometwe na Kornelio, kobaboririe enyomba ya Simion, bagatenena geita." 
Acts10:18 Bakarangeria neriogi bakaboria gose Simion, oyokorokwa Petero, nao are ime." 
Acts10:19 Na Petero, karengereretie okorora koria, Omoika okamotebia, “Rora, abanto batato bagokorigia." 
Acts10:20 Imoka, oike, ogende amo nabarabwo, toba ne chitang’u‐tang’u ekiagera ninche nabatoma.”" 
Acts10:21 Petero agaika ase abanto baria, agateba, “Ninche ere oyo mokorigia. Igo mwacha ase engencho ki?”" 
Acts10:22 Bakamotebia, “Nigo twatomirwe na Kornelio, omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana, omonto omoronge, omoirogete Nyasae, oyogokwanwa buya negesaku gionsi ki’Abayahudi. Natebigwa nomomalaika omochenu ng’a atome abanto asore gokorangeria ogende bwoye, anyare koigwa amang’ana korwa asore.”" 
Acts10:23 Erio Petero akabatebia basoe nyomba, babe abageni baye. Rituko ria kabere akaimoka akagenda amo nabarabwo, na abande bamwabo korwa Yopa bakagenda amo nere." 
Acts10:24 Rituko rigotunya erio bagasoa Kaisaria. Na Kornelio nigo arenge obaganyete, konya osangereirie eamate yaye amo nabanchi baye." 
Acts10:25 Ekero Petero achia gosoa omochie, Kornelio agasoka komorotota, akagwa inse ase amagoro aye, akamosasima." 
Acts10:26 Korende Petero akamoimokia, akamotebia, “Tenena! Inche boigo mwanyabanto inde.”" 
Acts10:27 Ekero are gokwana na Kornelio, agasoa ime, akanyora abanto abange basangererekaneteo." 
Acts10:28 Akabatebia, “Mwamanyire ng’a tari boronge omonto Omoyahudi abwatane nomonto ore bw’egesaku ekeao, nonya nokomochiera, korende Nyasae onyorokirie ng’a timoroka onde bwensi ng’a tari omochenu, gose tachenegeti." 
Acts10:29 Ase engencho eyio, ekero narangeretigwe ngacha, tinaanga. Nkoboria nde: Ing’ana ki mwandangereretie?”" 
Acts10:30 Kornelio akamoiraneria, “Rero nerituko ria kane, korwa ekero narenge gosaba nyomba mwane chinsa buna echi, chinsa kianda. Ani! Omonto nateneine bosio bwane obekeire chianga chikomeka‐meka." 
Acts10:31 Agantebia: Kornelio, ogosaba kwao kwaigurwe, na ebiegwa biao biainyoirwe ase Nyasae." 
Acts10:32 Ase igo, toma abanto Yopa, orangerie Simion, oyokorokwa Petero; ere nomogeni are nyomba mwa Simion, omoroisia bw’amao, nigo amenyete ang’e nengegu y’enyancha." 
Acts10:33 Erio bwango ngatoma abanto asore, na aye gwakorire buya gwachire. Na bono twensi nao tore aiga ase obosio bwa Nyasae, tonyare koigwa aya onsi Omonene agochikire gokwana.”" 
Acts10:34 Erio Petero agachaka gokwana, akabora, “Ase ekeene naikire komanya ng’a Nyasae tari nogwanchereria," 
Acts10:35 korende ase kera egesaku omonto omoirogete na gokora oboronge nigo agwancherwa nere. 
Acts10:36 Agatoma ring’ana eri ase Abaisraeli, akarandia amang’ana amaya ay’omorembe korwa ase Yeso Kristo, oyore Omonene o bonsi." 
Acts10:37 Inwe momanyete, ng’a ring’ana eri riararetigwe ase Boyahudi yonsi, rigachakera Galili nyuma y’ebatiso eria Yohana arandetie," 
Acts10:38 igoro ya Yeso o Nazareti, buna Nyasae amoete Omoika Omochenu ne chinguru, na buna ataarete na gokora emeremo emiya, na kogwenia bonsi abaregetwe na Saitani, ekiagera Nyasae nigo arenge amo nere." 
Acts10:39 Na intwe nigo tore abarori b’amang’ana onsi aya arenge gokora ase ense y’Abayahudi na ime ya Yerusalemu. Bakamoita, bakamosunga ase omote," 
Acts10:40 korende Nyasae akamobokia ase rituko ria gatato, akamwanchera kooroka," 
Acts10:41 tari ase abanto bonsi, korende nasetore, abatwachoretwe na Nyasae tobe abarori. Intwe nigo tware koria na konywa amo nere nyuma y’okoboka kwaye." 
Acts10:42 Agatochika toranderie abanto, na tobe birori ng’a nere ochoretwe na Nyasae abe omogambi bw’abare moyo na abakure." 
Acts10:43 Oyo ababani bonsi baberete birori, ng’a onde bwensi omwegenire nigo aranyore okwaberwa kw’ebibe ase erieta riaye.”" 
Acts10:44 Ekero Petero arenge gokwana aya Omoika Omochenu ogaikera bonsi abaigwete amang’ana aya. 
Acts10:45 Abegenete korwa ase abarogete abachete amo na Petero, bagakumia, ekiagera nonya nabanto b’Ebisaku banyorire ekeegwa ki’Omoika Omochenu." 
Acts10:46 Naki babaigwete bagokwana ase emenwa, bagotogia Nyasae. Erio Petero akabora," 
Acts10:47 “Inee! Omonto nanyare gokania aba amache, tibabatiswa, abanyorire Omoika Omochenu koreng’ana buna intwe?”" 
Acts10:48 Agachika babatiswe ase erieta ria Yeso Kristo. Erio bakamoboria amente komenya amo nabarabwo amatuko atai make. 
Acts11:1 Naende abatomwa na abaminto abarenge Boyahudi bakaigwa ng’a abanto b’Ebisaku nabarabwo banyorire ring’ana ria Nyasae. 
Acts11:2 Erio ekero Petero achete ase Yerusalemu, baria abare ensemo y’okwaroka bakaamererania nere," 
Acts11:3 bakamotebia, “Aye ngwasoa ase abanto batarogeti, okaragera amo nabarabwo!”" 
Acts11:4 Korende Petero agachaka kobatebereria amang’ana onsi buna abete," 
Acts11:5 “Nigo narenge ase omochie okorokwa Yopa, ngosaba nare, nkaba buna oyobwatire nobogondereria, nkarora ase okorora egento kere buna egetambaa kiabwatire emekoba ene, kegoikigwa korwa igoro gocha asende." 
Acts11:6 Ngakerigereria mono, nkarora ching’iti chire namagoro ane, ne ching’iti chi’orosana, na echikwagura, ne chinyoni chia igoro." 
Acts11:7 Nkaigwa eriogi rigonte bia: Petero, imoka, onyenye orie!" 
Acts11:8 Korende nkabora: Yaya Omonene, ekiagera egento getachenegeti gose ekere neubi, tibiana gosoa ase omonwa one nonya ng’ake." 
Acts11:9 Eriogi rigantebia eria kabere korwa igoro: Eki Nyasae achenire tokeroka ng’a tikeri egechenu. 
Acts11:10 Ring’ana eri rigakoreka ara gatato, naende ebinto biria bionsi bikang’uswa gochia igoro." 
Acts11:11 Ani! Ekero ekio abanto batato baikire ase enyomba eria namenyete, na barabwo nigo batometwe asende korwa Kaisaria." 
Acts11:12 Omoika Omochenu ogantebia ngende amo nabarabwo, timbaisa koba ne chitang’u‐tang’u. Na abaminto aba batano nomo bakagenda amo nainche, togasoa ase enyomba y’omonto oria;" 
Acts11:13 ere agatotebia buna aroche omomalaika oteneine mwaye, na komotebia: Toma abanto bagende Yopa, barangerie Simion, oyokorokwa Petero." 
Acts11:14 Nere oragotebie amang’ana ayarakorentere ogotooreka, aye na ab’enyomba yao yonsi." 
Acts11:15 Ekero nachagete gokwana, Omoika Omochenu okabaikera buna otoikerete intwe agwo ritang’ani." 
Acts11:16 Nkainyora ring’ana riria ri’Omonene, buna atebete: Yohana nigo arenge kobatisa ase amache, korende inwe inamobatiswe ase Omoika Omochenu." 
Acts11:17 Gaki onye Nyasae obaeire barabwo ekeegwa keria keria atoete intwe, ekero twamwegenete Omonene Yeso Kristo, inche ninche ng’o, ndanyare koamereria Nyasae?”" 
Acts11:18 Ekero bachia koigwa amang’ana aya, bagakira‐kiri. Na barabwo bagatogia Nyasae, bagoteba, “Gaki, Nyasae oeire abanto b’Ebisaku boigo okoonchoka gokorenta obogima.”" 
Acts11:19 Baria baatananegete nyuma y’emechando eria yabete igoro ya Stefano bakagenda Foiniki na Kuporo, na Antiokia, bakarandia ring’ana ase Abayahudi boka, tari ase abanto bande." 
Acts11:20 Korende mbarengeo ase egati yabo abanto ba Kuporo na Kurene, barabwo ekero bachia goika Antiokia bagakwana n’Abagiriki, bakabaranderia amang’ana amaya igoro y’Omonene Yeso." 
Acts11:21 Okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kwarenge amo nabarabwo; abanto abange bakamwegena Omonene, na komoonchokera." 
Acts11:22 Abanto b’ekanisa ya Yerusalemu bakaigwa amang’ana aya, bagatoma Barnaba agende Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 Ere, ekero achia goika na korora buna obuya bwa Nyasae bwakorire, akagoka, agasorora bonsi babe abegenwa ase Omonene ase okogania gwe chinkoro." 
Acts11:24 Ere nigo arenge omonto omuya, oichire n’Omoika Omochenu na okwegena. Abanto abange bakamenteka ase Omonene." 
Acts11:25 Barnaba akarua agwo, akagenda Tariso korigia Saulo," 
Acts11:26 na ekero amonyorete akamorenta Antiokia. Ase engaki y’omwaka omogima bagasangererekana amo nekanisa na kworokereria abanto abange. Agwo Antiokia nao aborokigwa batang’anete korokwa Abakristo. 
Acts11:27 Ase amatuko aria ababani bagatirimboka korwa Yerusalemu gochia Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Oyomo obo, ore korokwa Agabo, agatenena akabana ase Omoika Omochenu, ng’a enchara enene nechiche ase ense engima; ero ekaba ekero Klaudio are kogamba." 
Acts11:29 Na aborokigwa baria, kera oyomo koreng’ana buna okonyara kwaye, bakang’ea gotoma ogokonywa ase abamwabo abamenyete Boyahudi." 
Acts11:30 Bagakora bo, bagatoma ebiegwa ase abagaaka ase amaboko a Barnaba na Saulo." 
Acts12:1 Nabo ase engaki eria, omoruoti Herode akarambora amaboko aye agachanda abanto bande b’ekanisa." 
Acts12:2 Agaita Yakobo omwabo Yohana nomoyio o birende. 
Acts12:3 Ekero aroche ng’a aya agweneire Abayahudi, akagenderera, akabwata Petero nere. Amatuko ayio naro amatuko emegati etabekiri memera." 
Acts12:4 Akamobwata akamobeka echela ime. Akamobeka ase ebiombe bine bi’abarwani; kera ekeombe nigo kiare nabarwani bane. Barabwo bakamorenda. Akarigia komosokia ase abanto nyuma y’Epasaka. 
Acts12:5 Nabo Petero arendetwe ase echela ime, abanto b’ekanisa bakamosabera ase Nyasae nomoyo bw’omokia." 
Acts12:6 Ase obotuko boria bwatang’anerete rituko riria Herode arengereretie komoira ase ekegambero, Petero nigo arenge oraire gati y’abarendi babere, osibire nebinyuri bibere, na abarwani nigo barenge gesieri barendete echela." 
Acts12:7 Na rora, omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoorokera, na amasase akamoreka akanyomba ime. Omomalaika oria agaaka Petero rikere riaye, akamotura, agateba, “Imoka bwango!” Ebinyuri bigasansoka korwa ase amaboko aye." 
Acts12:8 Omomalaika akamotebia, “Eboyie, obeke ebikoroto biao.” Agakora bo. Naende akamotebia, “Beka eganchwa yao, ontunyane!”" 
Acts12:9 Agasoka, akamotunyana, gose tamanyete ng’a ayakoretwe nomomalaika nay’ekeene, korende agakaga ng’a nokorora arorire." 
Acts12:10 Ekero bachia goetania ensemo ye ritang’ani na ensemo ya kabere ase abarendi barendete, bagaika egeita ki’ebioma kegosoerwa omochie ime. Eke gekabaigokera, na barabwo bagaeta ase enchera eyemo. Erio kegima omomalaika oria agatiga Petero." 
Acts12:11 Ekero Petero achia komanya, agateba, “Bono namanyire bori ng’a Omonene nere otoma omomalaika oye ochia kondusia ase okoboko kwa Herode, na korwa ase ogosemeria gwonsi kw’abanto b’Abayahudi.”" 
Acts12:12 Erio kararengereretie aya, agaika ase enyomba ya Mariamu ng’ina Yohana, oyokorokwa naende Mariko; na abanto abange nao basangererekanete gosaba." 
Acts12:13 Na ekero Petero achia gotura egesieri kia geita, omoiseke omosomba, okorokwa Roda, agacha koigwa." 
Acts12:14 Kamanyire eriogi ria Petero, akaba nomogoko, taigora egesieri, korende akaminyoka, agasoa nyomba, akabatebia ng’a Petero ngesieri ateneine." 
Acts12:15 Bakamotebia, “Nebarimo ore!” Korende akaamereria mono, agateba ng’a naboigo are. Bakabora, “Nomomalaika oye!”" 
Acts12:16 Petero akagenderera gokong’onta egesieri. Erio bakamoigorera, bakamorora, bagakumia." 
Acts12:17 Ere akabakania nokoboko, ng’a bakire, tibakwana, akabatebereria buna Omonene amosokia korwa ase echela. Akabora, “Genda, motebie Yakobo na abaminto amang’ana aya.” Agasoka, akagenda ensemo ende." 
Acts12:18 Ekero bwachia gokia abarendi bagasogwa nomoondoko omonge igoro ya Petero, naki abete." 
Acts12:19 Herode akamorigia, tamonyora. Akana‐kounia abarendi, agachika ng’a baitwe. Erio agatirimboka korwa Boyahudi, akagenda Kaisaria, akamenya aroro." 
Acts12:20 Herode nigo abeete mono abanto ba Turo na Sidoni. Korende barabwo bakamochiera ase obomo, na ekero baebereirie Blasto, oyorenge korenda enyomba y’omoruoti, bakarigia omorembe, ekiagera ense yabo nigo yare konyora endagera korwa ase ense y’omoruoti." 
Acts12:21 Ase rituko erimo eriabekire, Herode akeboyia chianga chi’oboruoti, agaikaransa ase ekerogo ki’oboruoti, agakwana asebare." 
Acts12:22 Abanto bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Eri neriogi ri’enyasae, tari eri’omonto!”" 
Acts12:23 Erio bwango omomalaika bw’Omonene akamoaka ekiagera atasigete Nyasae; akariegwa namakonde, agatweka mo." 
Acts12:24 Korende ring’ana ria Nyasae rikagenderera komentekana. 
Acts12:25 Barnaba na Saulo, ekero bakoorire obotomwa bwabo, bakairana korwa Yerusalemu, bakarentana Yohana ore korokwa Mariko." 
Acts13:1 Ase ekanisa y’Antiokia mbarengeo ababani na aborokia: Barnaba na Simeoni, oyo ore korokwa Nigeri, na Lukio Omokurene, na Manaeni oyo orereretwe amo nomoruoti Herode, na Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Abaiga, ekero barenge gosasima Omonene, na kweng’ata, Omoika Omochenu agateba, “Nchorere Barnaba na Saulo ase emeremo eria nabarangereretie bayekore.”" 
Acts13:3 Erio kobakoorire okweng’ata na ogosaba bakababekera amaboko, bakabatiga bagende." 
Acts13:4 Abwo babere bagatomwa n’Omoika Omochenu, bagatirimboka gochia Selukia, na korwa agwo bakaamboka nemeeri gochia Kuporo." 
Acts13:5 Bagaika Salami, bakarandia ring’ana ria Nyasae ase chisinagogi chi’Abayahudi, na barabwo nigo barenge na Yohana okobakonya." 
Acts13:6 Ekero bakoorire goeta gati‐gati y’egesinka gionsi goika Pafo, bakanyora aroro omonto oyomo Omoyahudi omorogi, omobani bw’oborimo, ore korokwa Bar Yeso." 
Acts13:7 Omonto oyio nigo arenge amo na gavuna Sergio Paulo, omonto bw’obong’aini. Ere akarangeria Barnaba na Saulo bache asare, akarigia koigwa ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Acts13:8 Korende Elima, oria omorogi (okoonchorwa kw’erieta riaye nakwo oko) akaamererania nabarabwo, akarigia koonchora gavuna oria atige okwegena." 
Acts13:9 Korende Saulo, oyokorokwa naende Paulo, agaichorwa n’Omoika Omochenu, akamotogoreria amaiso, akabora," 
Acts13:10 “Aye omwana o Nyachieni omobisa bw’oboronge bwonsi, oichire nobong’ainereria na obobe bwonsi, torigeti gotiga gokora bogeka chinchera chi’Omonene chire boronge?" 
Acts13:11 Rora bono, okoboko kw’Omonene nigo kore igoro asore, aye nobe omouko, torora erioba ase engaki.” Erio kegima akabwatwa norotutu na omosunte, agataba‐taba akarigia abanto bamobwate okoboko bamoraae." 
Acts13:12 Ekero gavuna achia korora ayakoreka, akeegena, agakumia ase okworokereria kw’Omonene." 
Acts13:13 Erio Paulo na abamwabo bakamanora nemeeri korwa Pafo, bagaika Perga ase Pamfulia. Yohana akabatiga, akairana Yerusalemu," 
Acts13:14 korende barabwo bakarua Perga, bakagenda Antiokia, omochie o Pisidia. Rituko ri’Esabato bagasoa ase esinagogi, bagaikaransa aroro." 
Acts13:15 Nyuma kabasomire amachiko na ebuku y’ababani, abatang’ani b’esinagogi bagatoma amang’ana asebare kobatebia, “Abaminto, onye more ne ring’ana ri’okoremia, rikwane!”" 
Acts13:16 Paulo agatenena, akarambora okoboko, agakwana, “Inwe abasacha b’Abaisraeli, na inwe abamoirogete Nyasae, ntegerera." 
Acts13:17 Nyasae bw’abanto aba Abaisraeli agachora chisokoro chiaito, na ekero barabwo bamenyete buna abamenyi ase ense ya Misiri, akabaimokereria igoro. Ase okobua kwaye akabarusia aroro," 
Acts13:18 na koreng’ana engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene akaremereria nabarabwo ase erooro. 
Acts13:19 Agasiria ebisaku bitano na bibere ase ense ya Kanani, na ense yabo akabaa ebe omwando obo," 
Acts13:20 koreng’ana engaki y’emiaka amagana ane, na emerongo etano. Nyuma y’ayio akabaa abagambi goika ekero ki’omobani Samweli." 
Acts13:21 Erio nyuma yaye bagasaba baegwe omoruoti. Nyasae akabaa Saulo, mosinto o Kishi, omonto bw’ororeria rwa Benjamin, ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Acts13:22 Ekero konya amorusirie oyo, akaimokereria Daudi igoro koba omoruoti obo. Akabatebia igoro yaye: Nanyorire Daudi, mosinto o Yese; nere omonto ongweneire ase enkoro yane, naende nere oranyare gokora ogwancha kwane gwonsi." 
Acts13:23 Korwa ase oroiboro rw’omonto oyio Nyasae orenteire Abaisraeli Omotooria, nere Yeso. Nabo abarierete eira." 
Acts13:24 Ritang’ani ere ataracha, Yohana konya obarandeirie abanto bonsi b’Abaisraeli ebatiso y’okoonchoka." 
Acts13:25 Ekero Yohana abeire ang’e gokoora orogendo rwaye akabora, Nigo mokagete ng’a ninche ng’o? Inche tari Kristo. Korende nyuma yane ngocha are oyomo, ere ntaisaini gosibora ebikoroto bi’amagoro aye." 
Acts13:26 “Abaminto, abanto b’ororeria rwa Ibrahimu, amo nabande asemore inwe abamoirogete Nyasae, ring’ana ri’ogotooreka riatomirwe asetore." 
Acts13:27 Naki abamenyete Yerusalemu, na abanene babo tibamomanyete, ekiagera tibamanyete nonya namang’ana ’ababani. Ase okomogambia baikeranirie ayare gosomwa ase chibuku chi’ababani kera Esabato." 
Acts13:28 Nonya tibanyorete engencho y’okomoita, bagasaba Pilato aitwe." 
Acts13:29 Ekero bachia goikerania onsi ayarikire igoro yaye, bakamoikia korwa ase omote, bakamobeka ase oboina." 
Acts13:30 Korende Nyasae akamobokia korwa ase abakure. 
Acts13:31 Ase amatuko amange akarorekana ase abwo barenge gotiira komo korwa Galili goika Yerusalemu. Bono barabwo mbirori baye bare ase abanto. 
Acts13:32 Na intwe twabarenteire amang’ana amaya aria Nyasae arierete chisokoro chiaito eira. 
Acts13:33 Aya Nyasae atoikeraneirie intwe abana babo ase okobokia Yeso. Naende buna arikire ase Zaburi ibere: “Aye naye Omwana one, rero nakoiboire." 
Acts13:34 Naende ng’a nigo amobogetie korwa ase abakure, erinde tanyara koirana naende ase ogosareka, okwanire iga, Nimbae ogosesenigwa ogochenu na ogw’ekeene, koria narierete Daudi eira." 
Acts13:35 Ase ayio okwanire naende ase Zaburi ende, Togotiga Omochenu oo arore ogosareka." 
Acts13:36 Naki Daudi, ekero akoorire gokorera ogwancha kwa Nyasae ase ekegori kiaye, agakwa, agatindekwa ase chisokoro chiaye chiatindegete, akarora ogosareka." 
Acts13:37 Korende oyo obogetigwe na Nyasae taroche ogosareka. 
Acts13:38 Ase ayio baminto, tiga amanyekane asemore ng’a goetera ase oyio nigo mokoranderigwa okwaberwa kw’ebibe," 
Acts13:39 na asere kera oyomwegenire nigo akobarerwa oboronge ase amang’ana aria atakonyarekana kobarerwa oboronge ase amachiko a Musa. 
Acts13:40 Gaki, erende, tabaisa kobaikera amang’ana aria akwanetwe nababani:" 
Acts13:41 Rigereria, inwe abachayi, mokumia, mosire, ekiagera ngochia gokora nde ring’ana ase amatuko aino, eri motegene nonya omonto naisa kobatebia.”" 
Acts13:42 Kabasokire, abanto bakabasorora bache kobatebia amang’ana aya Esabato ya kabere." 
Acts13:43 Ekero omosangererekano bw’esinagogi oera, Abayahudi abange na abegeni b’ebisaku binde abaonchogete bakabwatana na Paulo na Barnaba, abakwanete nabarabwo, na kobaremia bagenderere ase obuya bwa Nyasae." 
Acts13:44 Ase Esabato ya kabere abanto abange, ang’e omochie bwonsi, bagasangererekana baigwe ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Acts13:45 Korende ekero Abayahudi bachia korora emeganda, bagaichorwa ne ribero, bagakana amang’ana ayare gokwanwa na Paulo, bakamorama." 
Acts13:46 Paulo na Barnaba bagakwana noboremu, bagateba, “Igo yagwenerete ng’a ring’ana ria Nyasae rikwanwe asemore ritang’ani. Korende ekiagera mwarisukeirie are mwenacheire inwe abanyene ng’a timogwenereti obogima bwa kare na kare, tweonchoreire abanto b’Ebisaku." 
Acts13:47 Nabo twachigetwe n’Omonene, “Nakobekire obe omobaso ase abanto b’Ebisaku, erinde ogotooreka kwane kogende, goike ase chinsinyo chi’ense.”" 
Acts13:48 Ekero abanto b’Ebisaku bachia koigwa ayio bakagoka, bagatogia ring’ana ri’Omonene, na abwo bachikeretwe konyora obogima bwa kare na kare bakeegena." 
Acts13:49 Ring’ana ri’Omonene rikaranda ase ense eria yonsi. 
Acts13:50 Abayahudi bakaburukania abakungu abamoirogete Nyasae, abasikire nabanto, na abanene b’omochie, bakagenka abanto bachande Paulo na Barnaba, na kobaseria korwa ensemo yabo." 
Acts13:51 Korende Paulo na Barnaba bakabakong’ontera orotu rw’amagoro abo, bakagenda Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Na aborokigwa bagaichorwa nomogoko na Omoika Omochenu. 
Acts14:1 Ase Ikonio Paulo na Barnaba bagasoa esinagogi amo, bagakwana goika abanto abange b’Abayahudi na Abagiriki bakeegena." 
Acts14:2 Korende Abayahudi abategenete bakaburukania emioyo y’abanto b’Ebisaku na gosaria emioyo yabo igoro ase abaminto. 
Acts14:3 Ase engaki entambe Paulo na Barnaba bakamenya aroro, bagakwana noboremu igoro ase Omonene, oyorenge koorokia ring’ana ri’obuya bwaye na kobanchera ebikone na amakumia bikoreke ase amaboko abo." 
Acts14:4 Korende abanto b’omochie oria bagaatananekana. Abande bakabwatana n’Abayahudi na abande nabatomwa. 
Acts14:5 Ekero okong’orerwa kw’abanto b’Ebisaku na Abayahudi amo nabanene babo gwakoretwe igoro y’abatomwa ase okobakorera amabe na kobaaka amagena," 
Acts14:6 barabwo bakanyora amang’ana, bagatama gochia Listra na Deribe, emechie ya Lukania, ne chinsemo chionsi echiarenge ang’e." 
Acts14:7 Aroro bakagenderera korandia enchili. 
Acts14:8 Agwo Listra narengeo omonto oyomo ekerema. Ere nigo arenge rigata korwa ase okoiborwa kwaye, tana kogenda nonya ng’ake." 
Acts14:9 Omonto oyio akaigwa Paulo kagokwana. Paulo akamobeta amaiso, akarora ng’a nare nokwegena gw’okogwenigwa," 
Acts14:10 agakwana neriogi rinene, agateba, “Tenena boronge namagoro ao.” Agatenena bwango, agataarataara." 
Acts14:11 Ekero emeganda yachia korora aya Paulo akora, bagaaka amariogi abo, bagakwana ase Ekelukania, “Chinyasae chiatoikeire ase emegwekano ya mwanyabanto!”" 
Acts14:12 Bakaroka Barnaba Zeu, na Paulo Herme, ekiagera nere orenge omonene ase ogokwana." 
Acts14:13 Omokuani o Zeu, oyo hekalu yaye yarenge isiko y’omochie, akarenta chieri na ebisembe bi’ebisicha goika ase ebiita; ere amo nabanto bakarigia korua ekeng’wanso." 
Acts14:14 Korende abatomwa Barnaba na Paulo, ekero bachia koigwa amang’ana ayio bagatandora chianga chiabo, bakaayerera, bagasoa ase omoganda, bagaaka egeturi, bagoteba," 
Acts14:15 “Inwe abasacha! Nase ki mogokora aya? Intwe nigo tore mwanyabanto koreng’ana buna inwe. Twabarandeirie inwe amang’ana amaya, erinde motige chinyasae echi chia bosa, moonchokere Nyasae ore moyo, oyotongete igoro na ense, na enyancha, na ebinto ebire imeo." 
Acts14:16 Kare ase ebigori biaetire nigo atigete ebisaku bionsi bitaare ase chinchera chiabo abanyene," 
Acts14:17 korende ere omonyene tetigete atari na birori. Ere nigo are gokora amaya na kobaa embura korwa igoro, ne chingaki chie rigesa, agaisanekia chinkoro chiaino nendagera na omogoko.”" 
Acts14:18 Na ase amang’ana aya bagatanga abanto baria bokong’u, tibabaruseria ebing’wanso." 
Acts14:19 Erio Abayahudi korwa Antiokia na Ikonio bagacha, na ekero bagenkire abanto bagaaka Paulo amagena, bakamokurura gochia isiko y’omochie, bagakaga ng’a okure," 
Acts14:20 Korende ekero aborokigwa bamoetananire ase chinsemo chionsi, agatenena, agasoa omochie ime, ne rituko ria kabere riaye agasoka, akagenda Deribe amo na Barnaba." 
Acts14:21 Nyuma kobarandirie amang’ana amaya ase omochie oria, na kobakorire abange koba aborokigwa, bakairana goika Listra, na Ikonio, na Antiokia," 
Acts14:22 bakabeka emioyo y’aborokigwa chinguru na kobaremia bagenderere ase okwegena, bakabatebia ng’a “Netogwenerete gosoa ase oboruoti bwa Nyasae ase enchera y’emechando emenge.”" 
Acts14:23 Erio kobachorire abagaaka ase kera ekanisa ase ogosaba na okweng’ata, bakababeka ase amaboko ’Omonene, oyio begenete." 
Acts14:24 Bagaeta egati ya Pisidia, bagasoa Pamfulia." 
Acts14:25 Na nyuma kobarandirie ring’ana ase Perga, bagatirimboka gochia Atalia," 
Acts14:26 na korwa agwo bakairwa nemeeri ase enyancha, bagaika Antiokia. Agwo nao babekeretwe ase obuya bwa Nyasae ase emeremo eria banyarete goikerania." 
Acts14:27 Ekero bachia goika aroro bagasangereria ekanisa amo, bakaorokia amang’ana onsi Nyasae akorete nabarabwo, na buna aigoreire abanto b’Ebisaku egesieri gi’okwegena." 
Acts14:28 Bakaba agwo amatuko atai make amo naborokigwa. 
Acts15:1 Abanto gete batirimbogete korwa Boyahudi bakorokereria abaminto ng’a, “Motarogeti koreng’ana buna Musa atochigete, timokonyara gotooreka.”" 
Acts15:2 Amang’ana aya akarenta ogwatananekana okonene, na Paulo na Barnaba bakaamererania nabanto aba. Erio Paulo, na Barnaba, na abande korwa ase egati yabo bagachikwa batiire kogenda Yerusalemu ase abatomwa na abagaaka ase engencho y’okoamererania okwo." 
Acts15:3 Bagatomwa nekanisa, bagaeta egati ya Foiniki na Samaria, bakararia amang’ana ’okoonchoka kw’abanto b’Ebisaku, bakagokia abaminto bonsi." 
Acts15:4 Ekero baigete Yerusalemu bakaroisigwa nekanisa amo nabatomwa na abagaaka, bakaborokia amang’ana onsi aya Nyasae akorete nabarabwo." 
Acts15:5 Korende abande ase Abafarisai, abwo begenete, bagatenena, bagateba, “Negwenerete kobarokia na kobachika babwate amachiko a Musa.”" 
Acts15:6 Abatomwa na abagaaka bagasangererekana amo, erinde banyare korengereria igoro ye ring’ana erio." 
Acts15:7 Na nyuma y’okoamererania okonge Petero agatenena akabatebia, “Abaminto, inwe mwamanyire ng’a ase ekero giaetire Nyasae nakorete ogochora egati yaino, ng’a korwa ase omonwa one abanto b’Ebisaku baigwe ring’ana ri’enchili na koriegena." 
Acts15:8 Na Nyasae, oyomanyete chinkoro chi’abanto, akabanchera, akabaa Omoika Omochenu, koreng’ana buna atoete intwe," 
Acts15:9 gose takorete gwatananekana ase egati yaito na barabwo, korende agasibia chinkoro chiabo ase okwegena." 
Acts15:10 Gaki bono, inaki mogoteema Nyasae na kobeka rikorogoto igoro ase amagoti ’aborokigwa, eri chisokoro chiaito chitanyarete koribogoria, nonya nintwe totanyare." 
Acts15:11 Korende twegenire ng’a ase amabera ’Omonene Yeso intwe natotoorigwe, buna barabwo.”" 
Acts15:12 Omoganda bwonsi ogakira, ogategerera Barnaba na Paulo, ekero baare koraria amang’ana igoro y’ebikone na amakumia Nyasae akorete goetera asebare ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku." 
Acts15:13 Kobakoorire gokwana, Yakobo akairaneria, “Abaminto, ntegerera." 
Acts15:14 Simion otworokirie buna Nyasae ritang’ani acheire abanto b’Ebisaku, erinde achore abanto korwa asebare babogorie erieta riaye." 
Acts15:15 Na amang’ana ’ababani nigo abwataine nayio, buna arikire," 
Acts15:16 “Nyuma ase aya ning’irane, ning’agache naende obomenyo bwa Daudi, boria bwagwete. Ning’agache naende aase agwo atagogete, nimbotenenie," 
Acts15:17 erinde mwanyabanto abatigaire barigie Omonene amo nabanto b’Ebisaku bionsi, aba narangeirie ase erieta riane." 
Acts15:18 Naboigo Omonene agoteba, oyo oorogetie aya korwa kare." 
Acts15:19 Ase engencho eyio nanachire iga, ng’a titochanda abanto baria b’Ebisaku abaonchokeire Nyasae," 
Acts15:20 korende tobarikere rirube ng’a beatanane korwa ase ebinto bitachenegeti bi’emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, na obotomani, na enyama ende yonsi y’eng’iti eng’entire, na korwa ase amanyinga." 
Acts15:21 Naki korwa ebigori bia kare Musa narenge nabanto baare korandia amang’ana aye, na ase kera omochie nigo are gosomwa kera Esabato ase chisinagogi.”" 
Acts15:22 Erio akagwenera abatomwa na abagaaka amo nab’ekanisa yonsi gochora abanto korwa ase egati yabo na kobatoma Antiokia amo na Paulo na Barnaba. Bagatoma Yuda ore korokwa Barsaba, na Sila, abatang’ani b’abamwabo," 
Acts15:23 bakabaa baire rirube ririkire iga, “Ase abaminto b’Ebisaku abamore ase Antiokia, na Siiria, na Kilikia. Intwe abamino, abatomwa na abagaaka, twabakwanirie." 
Acts15:24 Twaigure ng’a abanto barure aa asetore ababachandire ase amang’ana abo na koonchorana emioyo yaino, na intwe titwabachigete ng’a bakore bo." 
Acts15:25 Ase ayio, intwe twarorire buya ase omosangererekano oito gochora abanto na kobatoma asemore amo nabanchwa baito Barnaba na Paulo," 
Acts15:26 abanto ababekire obogima bwabo ase engencho y’erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Ase ayio twatomire Yuda na Sila, abaranyare kobatebia amang’ana ayio ayio ase emenwa yabo." 
Acts15:28 Iga yarorekanete buya ase Omoika Omochenu amo naintwe, titobatweka egurube ende otatiga eyio egwenerete:" 
Acts15:29 Mweatanane korwa ase ebinto birure ebing’wanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, na korwa ase amanyinga, na korwa ase enyama ende yonsi y’eng’iti eng’entire, na korwa ase obotomani. Kamoretange nayio, namokore buya. Motigare buya.”" 
Acts15:30 Ekero baria baegwa ribaga, bagatirimboka gochia Antiokia, bagasangereria abanto b’ekanisa y’aroro, bakabaa rirube riria." 
Acts15:31 Na barabwo kobarisomire, bakagoka ase engencho y’okoremigwa okwo." 
Acts15:32 Yuda na Sila, ekiagera nababani barenge, bakaremia emioyo y’abaminto ase amang’ana amange, bakababeka chinguru." 
Acts15:33 Nyuma kobamenyire agwo ase engaki etai nke, bakaegwa ribaga nabaminto bagende nomorembe ase baria babatomete. [" 
Acts15:34 Korende Sila akarora buya atigare aroro.] 
Acts15:35 Paulo na Barnaba bakamenya agwo Antiokia amo nabanto bande abange, bakaba bakworokereria na korandia ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Acts15:36 Nyuma y’amatuko amake Paulo agatebia Barnaba, “Toirane, tochie korora abaminto ase kera omochie twarandirie ring’ana ri’Omonene, gose mbuya bare.”" 
Acts15:37 Barnaba agancha koirana Yohana, ore korokwa Mariko, amo nabarabwo." 
Acts15:38 Korende Paulo tarora buya bairane oyio obatigete aaria Pamfulia, na tagendete amo nabarabwo gokora emeremo eria." 
Acts15:39 Erio eriomana rigatuboka ase egati yabo goika bagaatananekana. Barnaba akaira Mariko, akagenda nemeeri gochia Kuporo," 
Acts15:40 korende Paulo agachora Sila. Na ekero baria bamwabo bamobekire ase obuya bw’Omonene, akaimoka akagenda." 
Acts15:41 Agaeta ase Siiria na Kilikia, akabeka chikanisa chinguru." 
Acts16:1 Agaika Deribe na Listra. Narengeo omworokigwa oyomo, erieta riaye Timotheo, omwana bw’omokungu Omoyahudi, korende ise n’Omogiriki orenge." 
Acts16:2 Omonto oyio nigo arenge gokwanwa buya nabaminto abamenyete Listra na Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Paulo agancha Timotheo agende nere, akamoira, akamosara ase engencho y’Abayahudi abarenge chinsemo chiria, ekiagera bonsi mbamanyete ng’a ise n’Omogiriki orenge." 
Acts16:4 Nabo ekero barenge goeta egati y’emechie eria, bakabaa amachiko aria ayachigetwe nabatomwa na abagaaka abarenge Yerusalemu, erinde bayabwate." 
Acts16:5 Nabo chikanisa chikabekwa chinguru ase okwegena; omobaro obo okamentekana kera rituko. 
Acts16:6 Bagaeta ase ense ya Furugia na Galatia, ekiagera bakanetigwe n’Omoika Omochenu, ng’a tibarandia ring’ana agwo Asia." 
Acts16:7 Ekero bachia goika kororia Misia, bagateema kogenda Bitinia, korende Omoika o Yeso tobaa ribaga." 
Acts16:8 Bagaeta Misia, bagatirimbokera Teroa." 
Acts16:9 Paulo akaorokerwa nokorora botuko, akarora omonto o Makedonia oteneine okomosorora, okomotebia, “Amboka gocha aa Makedonia otokonye.”" 
Acts16:10 Ekero arorire okorora koria, erio bwango tokarigia kogenda Makedonia, ekiagera twaroche ekeene ng’a Nyasae otorangeirie tobaranderie enchili." 
Acts16:11 Tokamanoria emeeri korwa Teroa, tokagenda boronge goika Samotraki. Rituko ria kabere togaika Neapoli," 
Acts16:12 na korwa aroro togaika Filipi, omochie ore omonene ase ensemo ya Makedonia, ense yare kogamberwa n’Abarumi. Tokamenya ase omochie oyo amatuko amake." 
Acts16:13 Ase rituko ri’Esabato togasoka isiko y’egeita ase orooche mbarabare, ase ensemo twarengereretie ng’a tonyore aase togosabera. Togaikaransa, togakwana nabakungu abasangererekanete aria." 
Acts16:14 Narengeo omokungu oyomo ore korokwa Lidia; ere nigo arenge omosasimi Nyasae. Nigo arwete omochie o Tiatira; naende nigo arenge omoonia bw’ebitambaa bimonyinga. Ere agatotegerera. Omonene akaigora enkoro yaye, erinde akaigwa amang’ana Paulo arenge gokwana." 
Acts16:15 Goika ochia kobatiswa, ere amo nab’enyomba yaye, agatosorora, ogoteba, “Onye mwandorire ng’a nomwegeni nde ase Omonene, soa nyomba mwane, moikaranse.” Agatobetereria." 
Acts16:16 Ekero tware kogenda aase aria tware gosabera, tokaumerana nomoiseke omosomba oyobwatire nekerecha ki’oboringoria. Ere nigo arenge konyorera abanene baye enibo enyinge ase oboringoria bwaye." 
Acts16:17 Agatunyana Paulo na intwe, ogoaka eriogi ogoteba, “Abanto aba nabasomba ba Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono, bakoranderia inwe enchera y’ogotooreka.”" 
Acts16:18 Akana‐gokora ayio amatuko amange. Korende Paulo agakoona, akeonchora, agatebia ekerecha keria, “Nagochikire ase erieta ria Yeso Kristo: Karue ase oyo!” Gekamorua ensa eria eria." 
Acts16:19 Korende ekero abanene baye bachia korora ng’a ogosemeria kw’enibo yabo gwasirire, bakabwata Paulo na Sila, bakabakurura goika echiiro ase obosio bw’abanene b’omochie." 
Acts16:20 Bakabaira ase abagambi, bagateba, “Abanto aba basaririe omochie oito, na barabwo n’Abayahudi." 
Acts16:21 Naende nigo bakworokereria chingencho chitari boronge ng’a tochianche gose gochienaria, ekiagera intwe n’Abarumi tore.”" 
Acts16:22 Omoganda okabwatana ase okobogerera, na abagambi bakabatandorera chianga chiabo na gochirusia, bagachika ng’a baakwe ne chinyimbo." 
Acts16:23 Kobabaakire amaakwa amange, bakabaruta echela ime, bagachika omorendi bw’echela abarende mono." 
Acts16:24 Ere ekero anyorire ogochika oko akabaruta ase akanyomba ka ime, agasoyia amagoro abo ase amakorogoto." 
Acts16:25 Korende ekero kia botuko gati Paulo na Sila nigo barenge gosaba Nyasae na komoterera amatera, na abasibwa bande nigo babategererete." 
Acts16:26 Erio mobosokano omotengecho omonene okaba aroro, goika amaroso ’echela agatengechigwa; bwango ebisieri bionsi bikaigoka, na ebisibo bia bonsi bigasansoka." 
Acts16:27 Omorendi bw’echela akaboka na akarora ebisieri bi’echela biaigokire, akang’usa omoyio o birende, akarigia gweita, ekiagera akagete ng’a abasibwa mbatamire." 
Acts16:28 Korende Paulo agaaka eriogi rinene, agateba, “Tibweita, ekiagera intwe twensi nao tore aa.”" 
Acts16:29 Akarigia chitaya chirentwe, akarindoka gochia ime, okoiguswa ase obwoba, akagwa inse ase amagoro a Paulo na Sila;" 
Acts16:30 akabarenta isiko, akababoria, “Abanene baane, inki ndakore ntooreke?”" 
Acts16:31 Bakamoiraneria, “Mwegene Omonene Yeso, na aye notooreke amo nab’enyomba yao.”" 
Acts16:32 Bagakwana ring’ana ri’Omonene asare na ase abanto bonsi abarenge mwaye. 
Acts16:33 Akabaroisia ensa eria ya botuko, akabasibia chingoma chiabo, akabatiswa ekero ekio, ere na abanto bonsi ba mwaye." 
Acts16:34 Akabaira mwaye, akabarageria, akagoka mono amo na bonsi b’enyomba yaye, ekiagera konya bamwegenire Nyasae." 
Acts16:35 Ekero bwachia gokia, abagambi bagatoma abanyanyimbo, bagoteba, “Tiga abanto abwo bagende!”" 
Acts16:36 Omorendi oria bw’echela akairera Paulo amang’ana ayio, agateba, “Abagambi batomire amang’ana ng’a mosiborwe; gaki bono, soka isiko, mogende nomorembe!”" 
Acts16:37 Korende Paulo akabatebia, “Bagatosusura maiso marore bataratogambia kina, na intwe n’Abarumi tore, naende bagatoruta echela ime. Inee! Bono barigetie gotosokia bobisi? Yaya! Tari bo; tiga bache abanyene batosokie.”" 
Acts16:38 Abanyanyimbo bakairera abagambi amang’ana aya, na bar abwo bakoboa ekero baigwa ng’a Paulo na Sila n’Abarumi bare." 
Acts16:39 Bagacha bakabasaba okwaberwa. Erio kobabasokirie isiko bakababoria barue ase omochie oria. 
Acts16:40 Na barabwo bagasoka korwa ase echela, bagasoa nyomba mwa Lidia. Aroro bakanyorana nabamwabo, bakabaremia. Erio bakaimoka, bakagenda." 
Acts17:1 Erio kobaetire egati y’Amfipoli na Apolonia, bagaika Tesaloniki aase esinagogi y’Abayahudi yarenge." 
Acts17:2 Na Paulo, buna anarete, agasoa ime aase barenge. Agwo ase Chisabato isato agakwana nabarabwo amang’ana korwa ase amariko," 
Acts17:3 akaborokereria na kobatebereria ng’a Kristo nagwenerete gochandwa na koboka korwa ase abakure, agateba, “Yeso, oyo nkobarareria inwe amang’ana igoro yaye, nere Kristo.”" 
Acts17:4 Abande bakang’useka, bakabwatana na Paulo na Sila, naboigo Abagiriki abange abasigete Nyasae amo nabakungu abasike batai bake." 
Acts17:5 Korende Abayahudi bakaba ne ribero, bakaira abanto ababe korwa ase abaomboganu, bagasangereria omoganda, na bagakora eburu‐buru ase omochie. Bagachiera abanto b’enyomba ya Yasoni, bakarigia koira Paulo na Sila isiko ase abanto." 
Acts17:6 Ekero batabanyora, bagakurura Yasoni na abande baminto gochia ase abanene b’omochie, bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Abanto aba abaonchoranire ense baikire nonya naa," 
Acts17:7 na Yasoni akabaroisia. Barabwo bonsi nigo bagokora chingencho chire mamincha ya Kaisari, bagoteba ng’a omoruoti onde nareo, okorokwa Yeso.”" 
Acts17:8 Omoganda oria na abanene b’omochie bagaichana ekero baigwete aya. 
Acts17:9 Na barabwo kobanyorire eira y’okobatenenera korwa ase Yasoni na abamwabo, bakabatiga bagende." 
Acts17:10 Erio bwango ase obotuko boria abaminto bagatoma Paulo na Sila gochia Beroya. Kobaikire aroro, bagasoa ase esinagogi y’Abayahudi." 
Acts17:11 Abayahudi aba nigo baare abaya ase ogotegerera kobua baria ba Tesaloniki; nigo babwatete Ring’ana ase obwanchani, bare kona‐koriga‐rigia amariko kera rituko, erinde barore gose amang’ana ayio nabo are." 
Acts17:12 Abanto abange korwa asebare bakeegena amo nabakungu Abagiriki abaare abasike, na abasacha batai bake." 
Acts17:13 Korende Abayahudi ba Tesaloniki, ekero baigwete ng’a ring’ana ria Nyasae riarandigwe na Paulo ase Beroya, bakagenda aroro bakaburukania abanto na kobarubania." 
Acts17:14 Erio kegima abaminto baria bagatoma Paulo agende goika nyancha, korende Sila na Timotheo bagatigara aroro." 
Acts17:15 Baria bakoobete Paulo bakamoikia Atene, na ekero banyorire ogochika koirera Sila na Timotheo ng’a bache asare bwango buna eranyarekane, bakarua aroro." 
Acts17:16 Ekero Paulo abaganyete aria Atene, akarora buna omochie oria oichire nemegwekano y’ogosasimwa, akaigwa bobe ase omoika oye." 
Acts17:17 Nabo ase esinagogi agakwana n’Abayahudi na abanto abamoirogete Nyasae, na kera rituko ase echiiro nabaria abaare gocha aroro." 
Acts17:18 Abande abanyasemi b’Abaepikurio na Abastoiki bakaamererania nere. Abande bagateba, “Omonto oyo nomonyamang’ana mange, inki arigetie goteba?” Na abande, “Ororekanire ng’a nigo are buna omorandia bw’amang’ana e chinyasae chingeni”, ekiagera nigo arenge korandia amang’ana a Yeso na okobokigwa kw’abakure." 
Acts17:19 Bakamobwata, bakamoira goika Areopago, bakamoboria, “Inee! Nonyare gototebia engencho y’okworokereria okwo okoyia ogokwana?" 
Acts17:20 Nigo okorenta amang’ana amageni ase amato aito; gaki ntorigetie komanya engencho y’amang’ana ayio.” 
Acts17:21 Abaatene bonsi na abamenyi abamenyete agwo tibarenge ne ribaga ase ing’ana rinde rionsi, otatiga ogokwana na gotegerera amang’ana amayia." 
Acts17:22 Paulo agatenena gati‐gati y’Areopago, akabora, “Inwe abasacha b’Atene! Narorire ng’a nigo more abanto abamorengereretie mono amang’ana e chinyasae," 
Acts17:23 ekiagera ekero narenge goetanana aria na aria, na korora ebisasimero biaino, nkarora egesasimero kerikire amang’ana aya: Ase Nyasae oria otamanyekaneti. Gaki inche nigo nkobarareria chingencho chiaye ere oria inwe mogosasima motamanyeti." 
Acts17:24 Nyasae, oyotongete ense na ebinto bionsi ebireo, tari komenya ase ebihekalu biagachire namaboko, ekiagera nere Omonene o igoro na ense," 
Acts17:25 gose tari gokorerwa namaboko a mwanyabanto, buna oyo oremeire gento, ekiagera nere okobaa bonsi obogima na omoika, na ebinto bionsi." 
Acts17:26 Korwa ase omonto oyomo nere otongete kera egesaku kia mwanyabanto kemenye ase ense engima, akababekera chingaki ne chimbebe chi’obomenyo bwabo," 
Acts17:27 erinde barigie Nyasae, nonya nase ogotaba‐taba bamonyore. Nonya nigo tari are korwa ase kera oyomo oito," 
Acts17:28 ekiagera: “Ime asare nigo tore moyo, na togotaara, naende nigo tore nobogima bwaito; koreng’ana buna abarenti chingero bande baino bakwanete: Naki intwe twensi nigo tore ababiare baye." 
Acts17:29 Gaki, onye tore ababiare ba Nyasae, tetogwenereti gokaga ng’a obonyasae nigo bonga buna omogwekano bw’etahabu, gose efeta, gose rigena, buna ebinto bibaachire ase chisemi na obong’aini bwa mwanyabanto." 
Acts17:30 Ebiro biria bi’ogotamanya Nyasae nigo aombetie buna tarochi, korende bono nkoranderia are abanto bonsi ba kera aase baonchoke," 
Acts17:31 ekiagera obekire rituko eri agocha konachera abanto b’ense ekina ase oboronge ase omonto oria aragete. Ase ayio oeire abanto bonsi ogosemeria ase okomobokia korwa ase abakure.” 
Acts17:32 Nabo ekero bachia koigwa amang’ana ’okobokigwa kw’abakure abande bagasekereria, na abande bagateba, “Inatogotegerere naende ase amang’ana ayio.”" 
Acts17:33 Erio Paulo akaimoka akabatiga. 
Acts17:34 Abasacha bande bakabwatana nere, bakeegena, na ase abwo narengeo Dionuso, oyomo bw’ekegambero ki’Areopago, naende omokungu oyomo ore korokwa Damari, na abande amo nabarabwo." 
Acts18:1 Nyuma ase aya Paulo akarua Atene, akagenda Korinto." 
Acts18:2 Akanyora Omoyahudi oyomo, erieta riaye Akwila, omobiare o Ponto. Ere nigo achete korwa ase ense ya Italia ase amatuko a bwango amo na Priskila mokaye, ekiagera Klaudio konya ochikire Abayahudi bonsi barue Rumi. Paulo agaika asebare," 
Acts18:3 na ekiagera emeremo yaye na emeremo yabo neyemo, akamenya nabarabwo, bagakora emeremo eye y’okoroisia chiema." 
Acts18:4 Akaborokereria ase chisinagogi kera Esabato, agateema koebereria Abayahudi na Abagiriki." 
Acts18:5 Korende ekero Sila na Timotheo bachia gotirimboka korwa Makedonia, Paulo agasukigwa mono ase okorandia ring’ana na koorokia ase Abayahudi nomokia ng’a Yeso nere Kristo." 
Acts18:6 Ekero bachia koamererania nere na komorama, agasamunsa chianga chiaye, akabatebia, “Amayinga aino nabe igoro ase emetwe yaino! Inche tindi na komocha. Korwa bono ningende ase abanto b’Ebisaku.”" 
Acts18:7 Akaimoka korwa agwo, agasoa enyomba y’omonto ore korokwa Tito Yusto, omosasimi Nyasae. Mwaye nigo yasinyaine nesinagogi." 
Acts18:8 Krispo, omotang’ani bw’esinagogi, akamwegena Omonene amo nab’enyomba yaye bonsi; na Abakorinto abange kobachia koigwa Paulo, bakeegena, bakabatiswa." 
Acts18:9 Omonene agatebia Paulo botuko ase okorora, “Toiroka, korende kwana, tokira," 
Acts18:10 ekiagera inche nigo inde amo naye, nonya monto onde tari oragochere, erinde agokore bobe. Naki inche nigo inde nabanto abange ase omochie oyo.”" 
Acts18:11 Akamenya agwo omwaka oyomo na emetienyi etano nomo, akoborokereria ring’ana ria Nyasae ase egati yabo." 
Acts18:12 Korende ekero Galio arenge gavuna bw’Akaya, Abayahudi bakarindokera Paulo ase obomo, bakamoira bosio bw’ekegambero," 
Acts18:13 bagateba, “Omonto oyo nigo akoebereria abanto ng’a basasime Nyasae mamincha y’amachiko.”" 
Acts18:14 Na ekero Paulo achia korigia komaanora omonwa oye, Galio agatebia Abayahudi, “Inwe Abayahudi, onye ring’ana ri’okorega gose okong’ainereria okobe ndiakoregete, rirorio anga naremereria nainwe," 
Acts18:15 korende onye nokoboria igoro ase amang’ana, na amarieta, na amachiko aino, yarigererie inwe abanyene. Inche tindigeti koba omotorania bw’amang’ana ayio.”" 
Acts18:16 Akabaseria korwa ase ekegambero. 
Acts18:17 Erio bonsi bakabwata Sostene, omotang’ani bw’esinagogi, bakamoaka ase obosio bw’ekegambero. Korende Galio tarora ng’a amang’ana ayio gose ngento." 
Acts18:18 Nyuma ase aya Paulo a kamenta komenya agwo amatuko amange, erio agatigana nabamwabo, akamanora agasoa emeeri, akagenda Siiria, na Priskila na Akwila bakagenda amo nere. Ase Kenkrea agakigita etukia yaye, ekiagera ariete eira gete." 
Acts18:19 Bagaika Efeso, akabatiga agwo; ere omonyene agasoa esinagogi, agakwana n’Abayahudi." 
Acts18:20 Ekero bamoboretie amente amatuko ande komenya amo nabarabwo, akaanga." 
Acts18:21 Korende ekero agotigana nabarabwo agateba, “Ning’irane asemore naende, Nyasae karanche.” Akamanora korwa Efeso, akagenda nemeeri." 
Acts18:22 Gaikire Kaisaria, agatiira gochia gokwania abanto b’ekanisa. Erio agatirimboka gochia Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Nyuma kamenyire amatuko atai make akaimoka, agaeta egati y’ense ya Galatia na Furugia, agasoa omochie ase omochie, na gokong’ia aborokigwa bonsi." 
Acts18:24 Nabo Omoyahudi oyomo, ore korokwa Apolo, omobiare bw’Aleksanderia, agaika Efeso. Ere nigo arenge omonto omanyete gokwana buya, naende nigo arenge omonto omanyete amariko buya kegima." 
Acts18:25 Omonto oyo konya bworokererigwe enchera y’Omonene. Ase ayio omoika oye nigo orenge gwoka, agakwana na kworokereria boronge amang’ana igoro ya Yeso, korende ere nigo amanyete ebatiso ya Yohana yoka." 
Acts18:26 Agachaka gokwana noboremu ase esinagogi. Korende ekero Priskila na Akwila bachia komoigwa bakamoira mwabo, bakamworokia enchera ya Nyasae boronge kegima." 
Acts18:27 Ekero arigia kwamboka enyancha gochia Akaya, abaminto bakamoremia, bakarikera aborokigwa b’aroro rirube bamoroisie. Ere gaikire aroro agakonya mono baria abegenete goetera ase obuya bwa Nyasae," 
Acts18:28 ekiagera abuete Abayahudi kegima maiso marore, okoborokia korwa ase amariko ng’a Yeso nere Kristo." 
Acts19:1 Ekaba ekero Apolo arenge Korinto, Paulo agaeta egati y’ense ya rogoro, agaika Efeso. Aroro akanyorana naborokigwa batai bake." 
Acts19:2 Akababoria, “Mwanyorete Omoika Omochenu ekero mwegenete?” Bakamoiraneria, “Yaya, titwana koigwa nonya ng’ake ng’a Omoika Omochenu noreo.”" 
Acts19:3 Akababoria, “Mbatiso ki mwabatisetwe?” Bakamoiraneria, “Ase ebatiso ya Yohana.”" 
Acts19:4 Paulo akabatebia, “Yohana nigo are kobatisa ebatiso y’okoonchoka, ogotebia abanto bamwegene ere oyorache gocha nyuma yaye, oyio nere Yeso.”" 
Acts19:5 Ekero bachia koigwa aya, bakabatiswa ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso." 
Acts19:6 Na ekero Paulo abekire amaboko aye igoro asebare, Omoika Omochenu okabaikera; bagachaka gokwana ase emenwa na kobana." 
Acts19:7 Na bonsi nigo barenge abasacha koreng’ana ikomi na babere. 
Acts19:8 Agasoa ase esinagogi ime, agakwana noboremu, akorokereria abanto engaki y’emetienyi etato, okobaebereria ase amang’ana ’oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Acts19:9 Korende ekero abande bakong’etie chinkoro chiabo, na tibegena, na bagakwana bobe igoro y’Enchera y’Omonene ase obosio bw’omosangererekano, akaimoka akabatiga, akarusanania aborokigwa, akaba nkoborokereria are kera rituko ase enyomba y’amorokererio ya Tiriano." 
Acts19:10 Amang’ana aya akagenderera ase engaki y’emiaka ebere, goika bonsi abamenyete Asia, Abayahudi na Abagiriki, bakaigwa ring’ana ri’Omonene." 
Acts19:11 Nyasae agakora ebikone ebinene mono ase amaboko a Paulo," 
Acts19:12 goika chianga na ebitambaa ebiakunete omobere oye bikairwa ase abarwaire, na igo bakagwenigwa amarwaire abo, na ebirecha ebibe bikarua asebare." 
Acts19:13 Abande b’Abayahudi, abaseria b’ebirecha, abarenge abaetanani, bagateema gwatora erieta ri’Omonene Yeso igoro y’ababwatire nebirecha ebibe, bagoteba, “Twabitianirie ase Yeso oria okorandigwa na Paulo.”" 
Acts19:14 Abakorete ayio nabamura batano na babere ba Sikewa, Omoyahudi orenge omokuani omonene." 
Acts19:15 Ekerecha keria ekebe gekabairaneria, “Yeso nimomanyete, na Paulo namomanyire, korende inwe mbarabi?”" 
Acts19:16 Na omonto oria obwatire nekerecha ekebe akabarindokera, akabanyara, akababua, goika bagatama korwa ase enyomba eria getirianda, bare ne chingoma baakirwe."
