Acts19:17 Amang’ana aya akamanyekana ase Abayahudi na Abagiriki bonsi abamenyete Efeso; obwoba bokabasoa bonsi, na erieta ri’Omonene Yeso rikabakwa." 
Acts19:18 Abange babo, abachagete kwegena, bagacha, bakaorokia chingencho chiabo chimbe baare gokora." 
Acts19:19 Abange ase baria abaare gokora chingencho chi’oboragori, bagasangereria ebitabu biabo, bakabisamba ase amasio ’abanto bonsi. Kobakorire omobaro bwe rigori ri’ebitabu ebio, bakanyora ng’a mbiisanete chiropia chie chifeta chilifu emerongo etano." 
Acts19:20 Nabo ring’ana ri’Omonene rikaranda, rikabua." 
Acts19:21 Amang’ana aya achia koera, Paulo akarengereria ase omoika oye ime goeta egati ya Makedonia na Akaya gochia Yerusalemu, ogoteba, “Nyuma konabeire agwo ningwenerete korora Rumi noro.”" 
Acts19:22 Agatoma abanto babere korwa ase baria baare komokonya bagende Makedonia, nabwo Timotheo na Erasto. Ere omonyene agatigara Asia ase engaki enke." 
Acts19:23 Ase amatuko ayio eburu‐buru etai nke ekaimoka ase amang’ana ’enchera y’Omonene. 
Acts19:24 Ekiagera omonto oyomo ore korokwa Demeterio, omoturi bwe chifeta, oyorenge gokora ebihekalu bie chifeta bi’Aritemi, nigo arenge konyorera abaroisia enibo enyinge." 
Acts19:25 Akabasangereria abwo amo nabande ab’emeremo eria, akabora, “Inwe abasacha, mwamanyire ng’a obotenenku bwaito nigo bokorwa ase emeremo eye." 
Acts19:26 Naende mwarorire na koigwa ng’a Paulo, oyio oebereirie abanto na kobaonchora, tari ase Efeso oka, korende nonya nase Asia yonsi pi, okobatebia ng’a chinyasae chigokorwa namaboko tari chirochio chinyasae." 
Acts19:27 Nabo ere aakong’u asetore, tari ng’a nemeremo yaito yoka erachaywe, korende nonya ne hekalu y’Aritemi, enyasae enkungu ere enene, nigo erabarwe ng’a teri gento. Naende enyasae eria, egosasimwa nabanto b’Asia yonsi na ab’ense yonsi nigo eraurwe obonene bwaye.”" 
Acts19:28 Ekero bachia koigwa aya bagaichorwa nendamwamu, bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Aritemi y’Abaefeso nenene!”" 
Acts19:29 Omochie bwonsi ogaichorwa neburu‐buru, bakabwata Gayo na Aristarko, abanto ba Makedonia, baare gotaara amo na Paulo, bakabakurura na bakaminyoka amo gochia aase chigosori chigokorerwa." 
Acts19:30 Na Paulo akarigia gosoa ase egati y’abanto, korende aborokigwa tibamwanchera." 
Acts19:31 Abande b’abanene b’Asia, abarenge abasani baye, bagatoma abanto asare, bakamosorora tabaisa kweorokia omonyene aase chigosori chigokorerwa." 
Acts19:32 Bono abande nigo barenge korera iga, na abande iga, ekiagera omosangererekano oria konya obeire neburu‐buru. Abange asebare tibamanyete nase ki basangererekanete amo." 
Acts19:33 Abande ase omosangererekano bagatebereria Aleksanderi, oyo Abayahudi bakamosukia ase amaiso ’abanto. Aleksanderi akaimokia okoboko kwaye, akarigia gwekengera." 
Acts19:34 Korende ekero bamomanya ng’a ere n’Omoyahudi, bagakuura bonsi amo ase egeka ki’ang’e chinsa ibere chingima, bakorera, “Aritemi y’Abaefeso nenene!”" 
Acts19:35 Omoriki bw’omochie agakiria abanto agateba, “Inwe abasacha b’Efeso, monto ki ore aa otamanyeti ng’a omochie bw’Abaefeso noro omorendi bwe hekalu y’Aritemi eria enene, na obw’omogwekano oria ogwete korwa igoro?" 
Acts19:36 Gaki, ekiagera amang’ana aya takonyara gokanwa, mogwenerete gokira, timokora ring’ana ria bwango." 
Acts19:37 Naki iga mwarenta abanto aba bataibeti ebinto bie hekalu gose korama enyasae yaito enkungu. 
Acts19:38 Ase igo, onye Demeterio na ababaachi abare amo nere bare ne ring’ana igoro ase omonto, amatuko ’okogambanwa nare, na abagambi mbareo, tiga basoerane." 
Acts19:39 Korende onye more namang’ana ande, nigo araroisigwe nabagambi ba botambe." 
Acts19:40 Ekeene obokong’u mbore asetore, aande mbarigetie gotosoera ase engencho y’eburu‐buru eye ya rero. Karabe igo, rirorio titokonyara gwekengera ase engencho y’omosangererekano oyo.”" 
Acts19:41 Ekero akoorire gokwana aya, akaa omosangererekano ribaga ogende." 
Acts20:1 Eburu‐buru eria egachia koera, Paulo akarangeria aborokigwa, akabaremia, agatigana nabarabwo, akaimoka akagenda Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Erio gaetire chinsemo chiria na gokwana amang’ana amange ase okobaremia, agaika Bogiriki." 
Acts20:3 Akamenya aroro emetienyi etato. Ekiagera Abayahudi bamoboerete, konya omanoire kogenda ase enyancha gochia Siiria, agachora koiranera goetera Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Abanto aba bakagenda nere: Sopater Omoberoya, mosinto o Piro, Aristarko na Sekundo, abanto ba Tesaloniki, na Gayo, omonto o Deribe, na Timotheo, na abanto b’Asia, Tukiko na Torofimo." 
Acts20:5 Abanto aba bagatang’ana, bagatoganyera Teroa." 
Acts20:6 Intwe tokarua Filipi nemeeri nyuma y’amatuko Emegati etabekiri memera, tokagenda orogendo rw’amatuko atano, tokabaikeera Teroa. Tokabeera aroro amatuko atano na abere." 
Acts20:7 Ase rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, ekero twasangererekanete ase ogosamunyora omogati, Paulo agakwana nabarabwo, agachiererera namang’ana aye goika botuko gati, ekiagera arengereretie komanora rituko ria kabere." 
Acts20:8 Nchiarengeo chitaya chinyinge ase enyomba ya irongo aase twasangererekanete. 
Acts20:9 Omomura oyomo, erieta riaye Eutiko, oikaransete ase ekebao, akabwatwa ne chitoro chindito ekero Paulo agendererete gokwana; akabugwa ne chitoro chinyinge akagwa korwa rirongo ria gatato, akabogorigwa konya okure." 
Acts20:10 Korende Paulo agaika, akamoumamera, akamoagata, akabora, “Timoichana, ekiagera obogima bwaye nao bore ime yaye.”" 
Acts20:11 Paulo akariina igoro naende, agasamunyora omogati akaria, agakwana nabarabwo goika bogakia mambia. Erio akaimoka, akagenda." 
Acts20:12 Bakarenta omomura oria, ore moyo, bakaba nokoremigwa okonene." 
Acts20:13 Korende intwe togatang’ana kogenda nemeeri, tokagenda goika Asosi. Tokarengereria ng’a ntonyore Paulo aria, ekiagera ere nabo achigete. Ere omonyene nigo arengereretie kogenda namagoro." 
Acts20:14 Ekero achia gotoikeera aaria Asosi, tokamosoyia ase emeeri, togaika Metilene." 
Acts20:15 Tokamanora korwa agwo, ne rituko ria kabere togaika kororia Kio. Rituko ria gatato togaika Samo, tokabeera Torogilo, ne rituko ria kane togaika Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Naki Paulo nigo arengereretie goeta Efeso mbarabare, tabaisa gotebana ase Asia, ekiagera nigo are koayerera kogenda Yerusalemu rituko ria Pentekosti, keranyarekane." 
Acts20:17 Korwa Mileto Paulo agatoma abanto kogenda Efeso barangerie abagaaka b’ekanisa. 
Acts20:18 Bagachia goika asare, akabatebia, “Inwe abanyene mwamanyire buna narenge egati yaino ekero gionsi korwa rituko rie ritang’ani nachagete gotacha aiga Asia," 
Acts20:19 buna nakorerete Omonene ase obokanyeku bwonsi, na ase amariga, na ase amateemwa nanyorete ase ogotega kw’Abayahudi." 
Acts20:20 Inche tinabisete ring’ana rinde rionsi eriranyare kobakonya, korende inaborogetie inwe maiso marore enyomba ase enyomba," 
Acts20:21 na ngakurera Abayahudi na Abagiriki baonchokere Nyasae, na komwegena Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
Acts20:22 Gaki bono rora, nkogenda nde Yerusalemu, nasibirwe n’Omoika. Timanyeti ayarachie koonyora aaria," 
Acts20:23 otatiga ng’a Omoika Omochenu nigo okoorokia omochie ase omochie ng’a ogosibwa na emechando mbinganyete. 
Acts20:24 Korende obogima bwane timbobareti ng’a negento kie rigori rinene asende, erinde nkoore orogendo rwane, na obosomba boria nanyorete ase Omonene Yeso koorokia enchili y’amabera a Nyasae." 
Acts20:25 Bono rora, namanyire ng’a timokondora obosio bwane naende, inwe mwensi aba nabeire ngotaara ase egati yaino na kobaranderia amang’ana ’oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Acts20:26 Ase ayio nabaorokeirie bonsi ase rituko ria rero, ng’a inche tindi na komocha ase amanyinga a monto onde bwensi," 
Acts20:27 ekiagera tinangete kobaranderia amang’ana ’okworokereria gwonsi kwa Nyasae. 
Acts20:28 Mwerende inwe abanyene amo ne riicho riria Omoika Omochenu obabegete mobe abarendi korisia ekanisa y’Omonene, eye enyorerete namanyinga aye omonyene." 
Acts20:29 Namanyire inche ng’a nyuma ase okoimoka kwane chisese chi’orosana chintindi nachiche asemore, tichirorera riicho amabera," 
Acts20:30 naende korwa ase egati yaino abanto mbaimoke bagokwana amang’ana ’obong’ainereria, bang’use aborokigwa babatunyane." 
Acts20:31 Ase ayio renda, moinyore ng’a ase emiaka etato, obotuko na omobaso, tinatigete gokurera kera omonto ase amariga." 
Acts20:32 Gaki bono nababekire ase amaboko a Nyasae, na ase ring’ana ri’obuya bwaye, asare ere oyoranyare kobaagacha na kobaa omwando amo nabwo bonsi abachenirwe." 
Acts20:33 Tinaganetie efeta, nonya netahabu gose chianga." 
Acts20:34 Inwe abanyene mwamanyire ng’a amaboko aya aane ankoreire okorigia kwane, na okw’abwo barenge amo nainche." 
Acts20:35 Ase amang’ana aya onsi nabaorokeirie ng’a ase ogokora emeremo iga, nebagwenerete mokonye abatari ne chinguru, na koinyora amang’ana ’Omonene Yeso, buna akwanete omonyene: Nasesenirie oyokorua kobua oyokonyora.”" 
Acts20:36 Gakoorire gokwana aya agatung’ama inse, agasaba amo nabarabwo bonsi." 
Acts20:37 Na bonsi bakaiyeria amariga, bakaboania Paulo rigoti riaye, bakamonyunyunta." 
Acts20:38 Bagaichana kobua ase engencho ye ring’ana riaye, atebete ng’a, “Timokondora obosio bwane naende.” Bakamokooba goika ase emeeri." 
Acts21:1 Ekero twatananekire nabarabwo na komanora nemeeri, tokagenda boronge goika Kosi, na ase rituko ria kabere togaika Rodo, na korwa aroro togaika Patara." 
Acts21:2 Tokanyora emeeri eyeranyare kwamboka goika Foiniki, tokariina emeeri eria, tokagenda." 
Acts21:3 Ekero twachia korora egesinka gekorokwa Kuporo, tokagetiga ensemo y’okobee; tokagenda goika Siiria, togaika Turo; na agwo chigurube chikarusigwa ase emeeri." 
Acts21:4 Gatwanyorire aborokigwa, tokabeera aroro amatuko atano na abere. Na barabwo bagatebia Paulo ase okobua kw’Omoika Omochenu tatiira gochia Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:5 Ekero amatuko aito achia koera, tokaimoka, tokagenda ase orogendo rwaito; na abwo bonsi, na abakungu babo, na abana, bagatokooba goika isiko y’omochie; togatung’ama ase engegu y’enyancha, togasaba." 
Acts21:6 Gatwatebanirie ng’a motigare buya, intwe tokariina emeeri, na barabwo bakairana gochia sobo." 
Acts21:7 Gotwachia gokoora orogendo rwaito korwa Turo, togaika Potolemai, togakwania abaminto, togaikaransa nabarabwo rituko erimo." 
Acts21:8 Mambia yaye tokaimoka tokagenda Kaisaria, togasoa enyomba ya Filipo, omorandia bw’enchili. Nere orenge oyomo bwa baria batano na babere; tokamenya bwoye." 
Acts21:9 Omonto oyo narenge nabaiseke bane abekungi, baare kobana." 
Acts21:10 Gatwamenyire aroro amatuko atai make, omobani oyomo, erieta riaye Agabo, agatirimboka korwa Boyahudi." 
Acts21:11 Agacha asetore, akabogoria orokini rwa Paulo, agesibera amagoro na amaboko, akabora, “Omoika Omochenu otebire iga: Naboigo Abayahudi ba Yerusalemu barache gosiba omonto omonyene orokini oro, na barabwo nabamobeke ase amaboko ’abanto b’Ebisaku.”" 
Acts21:12 Togachia koigwa aya, intwe na abanto baria tokamosorora tabaisa gotiira gochia Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Erio Paulo akairaneria, “Inki eke mogokora, mokorera na kong’ita omoyo? Nigo inde ang’e, tari ase ogosibwa gwoka, korende nonya nogoitwa ase Yerusalemu ase engencho y’erieta ri’Omonene Yeso.”" 
Acts21:14 Erio kangire amang’ana aito togakira togateba, “Ogwancha kw’Omonene tiga gokoreke.”" 
Acts21:15 Nyuma ase amatuko ayio tokebeka ang’e togatiira kogenda Yerusalemu. 
Acts21:16 Abande b’aborokigwa ba Kaisaria bakagenda amo naintwe, bagatoira mwa Mnasoni, omonto o Kuporo, omworokigwa o kare, tokarara bwoye." 
Acts21:17 Ekero twaigete Yerusalemu abaminto bagatoroisia ase omogoko. 
Acts21:18 Rituko ria kabere Paulo agasoa mwa Yakobo amo naintwe, na abagaaka bonsi nao barenge." 
Acts21:19 Kabakwanirie, akaborokia amang’ana onsi erimo erimo, aya Nyasae akorire ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku ase obosomba bwaye." 
Acts21:20 Barabwo, ekero bachia koigwa, bagatogia Nyasae, bakamotebia, “Oyominto, kwarorire ng’a Abayahudi chilifu chinyinge begenire; na barabwo bonsi nigo bare nomokia ng’a amachiko abwatwe." 
Acts21:21 Na barabwo mbatebetigwe ng’a kworokereirie Abayahudi bonsi abamenyete ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku ng’a batige Musa, gokobakania tibarokia abana babo, gose tibabwatia chingencho chiaito." 
Acts21:22 Inki rende kegwenerete gekorwe? Ekeene, nabo baraigwe ng’a gwachire aiga." 
Acts21:23 Gaki kora ring’ana eri toragotebie. Mbare aiga asetore abanto bane abariete eira gete. 
Acts21:24 Ira abanto aba okore buna engencho y’ogwesibia ere amo nabarabwo, obaakanere chibesa, erinde bakigite chitukia chiabo. Igo abanto bonsi banyare komanya ng’a amang’ana aria batebetigwe igoro yao tari ay’ekeene, korende aye omonyene nigo okogenderera buya na kobwata amachiko." 
Acts21:25 Korende ase abanto b’Ebisaku abegenete, twatomire rirube buna twanacha, ng’a beatanane korwa ase ebinto birure ebing’wanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, na korwa ase amanyinga, na korwa ase enyama ende yonsi y’eng’iti eng’entire, na korwa ase obotomani.”" 
Acts21:26 Erio Paulo akaira abasacha baria, ne rituko ria kabere agakora buna engencho yare y’ogwesibia amo nabarabwo. Erio agasoa Hekalu ime, ase okoraria amang’ana ’ogwesibia na engaki y’okorua esadaka ase engencho ya kera oyomo obo." 
Acts21:27 Ekero amatuko aria atano na abere achia koba ang’e goikeranigwa Abayahudi abarwete Asia bakamorora ase Hekalu ime, bagaseegeta abanto bonsi, bakamobwata," 
Acts21:28 bagaaka eriogi, bagateba, “Inwe abasacha ba Israeli, tokonye! Omonto oyo nere oria okworokereria abanto ase kera ensemo mamincha y’egesaku giaito, na amachiko, na aase aiga. Kobua ase aya orentire Abagiriki ase Hekalu ime ogindirie aase aiga aachenu riko.”" 
Acts21:29 Ekiagera baroche Torofimo Omoefeso amo nere ase omochie, bagakaga ng’a Paulo namosoirie ase Hekalu ime." 
Acts21:30 Omochie bwonsi ogatitira, na abanto bakaminyoka gocha amo, bakabwata Paulo, bakamokurura, bakamosokia korwa ase Hekalu. Erio ebisieri bigasiekwa." 
Acts21:31 Ekero bateemire komoita, amang’ana agaikera omotang’ani bw’abarwani elifu ng’a omochie omogima o Yerusalemu osarekire." 
Acts21:32 Erio bwango akaira abarwani na abatang’ani b’abarwani rigana, akaminyoka gochia asebare. Na barabwo bagachia korora omotang’ani oria omonene na abarwani, bagatiga goaka Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Erio omotang’ani oria omonene agaika aroro, akamobwata, agachika asibwe nebinyuri bibere. Akababoria, “Nere ng’o oyo, naende inki akora?”" 
Acts21:34 Abande ase omosangererekano bagaaka eriogi bagoteba iga, na abande iga. Ekero atanyarete komanya oboronge bw’amang’ana aria ase engencho y’egeturi keria, agachika arentwe ime ase enyomba y’abarwani." 
Acts21:35 Nabo agachia goika ase ebiriinero akabogorigwa nabarwani ase engencho y’obotindi bw’omoganda," 
Acts21:36 ekiagera omoganda bw’abanto omotunyanete, ogoaka egeturi, ogateba, “Morusieo oyo!”" 
Acts21:37 Na Paulo, ekero aikigwe ang’e gosoigwa ime ase enyomba y’abarwani, akaboria omotang’ani oria omonene, “Ninyore ribaga ngotebie ring’ana?” Omotang’ani oria akabora, “Inee! Nomanyete Ekegiriki?" 
Acts21:38 Aye tori Omomisiri oria, ere rero iga oseegeta abanto baria Abaiti chilifu inye, akabatang’ana gochia ase erooro?”" 
Acts21:39 Paulo akamoiraneria, “Inche n’Omoyahudi, omonto o Tariso, omochie o Kilikia, omobiare bw’omochie otari moke; nagosabire ong’e ribaga nkwane nabanto aba.”" 
Acts21:40 Erio ekero amoete ribaga, Paulo agatenena ase ebiriinero igoro, akabakiria nokoboko abanto baria. Kabakiririe kegima, agakwana nabarabwo ase omonwa bw’Ekeibirania, agateba," 
Acts22:1 “Inwe abaminto, na abatata, ntegerera aya ngwekengera omonyene asemore bono.”" 
Acts22:2 Na ekero bachia koigwa ng’a nigo agokwana nabarabwo ase omonwa bw’Ekeibirania, bakamenta gokira. Agakwana," 
Acts22:3 “Inche n’Omoyahudi, naiboreretwe Tariso, omochie o Kilikia, nkarererwa ase omochie oyo ase amagoro a Gamalieli, nkorokererigwa bokong’u amachiko e chisokoro chiaito. Nkaba omonto oyore nomokia ase Nyasae, buna inwe mwensi more rero iga." 
Acts22:4 Ngachanda abanto b’Enchera eye goika nkabaita bagakwa, ngasiba abasacha na abakungu na kobabeka echela ime," 
Acts22:5 buna omokuani omonene na abagaaka bonsi b’ekegambero bare birori asende. Naetwe amarube nabarabwo ing’ire ase abaminto abarenge Damesiki, erio mbarente abarenge agwo, mbaire Yerusalemu basibire erinde baegwe egesusuro." 
Acts22:6 “Erio ekero nare kogenda, konaikire ang’e na Damesiki, ekero kia mobaso gati mobosokano amasase akarwa igoro akambarera chinsemo chionsi." 
Acts22:7 Nkagwa inse, nkaigwa eriogi rigontebia: Saulo, Saulo, nase ki gwanchandire?" 
Acts22:8 Nkairaneria: Naye ng’o Omonene? Agantebia: Ninche Yeso o Nazareti oyogwachandire aye. 
Acts22:9 Na baria barenge amo nainche mbaroche amasase aria, korende tibaigwete eriogi ri’oria ore gokwana nainche." 
Acts22:10 Nkaboria: Ninki ndakore Omonene? Omonene agantebia: Imoka ogende goika Damesiki, agwo notebigwe onsi aya gwachikirwe oyakore." 
Acts22:11 Na ekero nasinyetwe korora ase engencho y’oborabu bw’amasase aria, nkaraagwa namaboko abo abarenge amo nainche, ngaika Damesiki." 
Acts22:12 “Erio omonto oyomo ore korokwa Anania, omoiroki Nyasae ase ogotunyana amachiko, ore gokwanwa buya n’Abayahudi bonsi abamenyete agwo," 
Acts22:13 aganchichera agatenena ang’e nainche, agantebia: Oyominto Saulo, nyora okorora. Ase ensa eria eria nkanyora okorora, nkamorora." 
Acts22:14 Agantebia: Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito ogochorire onyare komanya ogwancha kwaye, na korora Omonyene Oboronge, na koigwa eriogi rikorwa ase omonwa oye." 
Acts22:15 Naki nomobere kirori ase abanto bonsi igoro y’amang’ana ayakwarorire na koyaigwa. 
Acts22:16 Gaki bono, inki ogotebanera? Tenena obatiswe, bwesibie ebibe biao, orangerie erieta riaye." 
Acts22:17 “Ekero nairanete Yerusalemu, ngosaba narenge ase Hekalu ime, nkabwatwa nobogondereria," 
Acts22:18 nkarora Omonene aroro, ogontebia: Ayerera, karue Yerusalemu bwango, ekiagera tibagwancha oborori bwao igoro yane." 
Acts22:19 Na inche nkabora: Omonene, barabwo mbamanyete ng’a nigo narenge gosiba baria bakwegenete na kobaaka ase chisinagogi chionsi." 
Acts22:20 Ekero amanyinga a Stefano, kirori oo, agoiterwa, inche nao narenge nateneine ang’e, ngancha aitwe, nkarenda chianga chiabo baria abamoitete." 
Acts22:21 Nere agantebia: Genda, ekiagera inche ningotome aare ase abanto b’Ebisaku.”" 
Acts22:22 Bagategerera Paulo goika ring’ana riria rigakwanwa. Erio bagaaka eriogi riabo, bagateba, “Morusieo oyo ase ense, ekiagera tagwenereti abe moyo.”" 
Acts22:23 Bagachia kona‐goaka egeturi na gotandora chianga chiabo na gosiara‐siara ebuse gochia igoro. 
Acts22:24 Omotang’ani bw’abarwani elifu agachika arentwe ime ase enyomba enene y’abarwani, agachika aborigwe amang’ana aye ase okong’wanigwa emecharichi, erinde amanye engencho bakomwogerera eriogi buna eri." 
Acts22:25 Korende ekero bamosibire engori, Paulo akaboria omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana, oyo oteneine ang’e nere, “Inee! Mboronge kong’wania omonto Omorumi emecharichi, na ere ataranacherwa ekina?”" 
Acts22:26 Omotang’ani oria ochia koigwa aya, akagenda akorokia omotang’ani oria omonene, akabora, “Naki origetie gokora? Ekiagera omonto oyo n’Omorumi are.”" 
Acts22:27 Omotang’ani oria omonene agacha, akamotebia, “Ntebia, n’Omorumi ore?” Agateba, “Ee.”" 
Acts22:28 Omotang’ani oria, omonene akairaneria, “Inche nigo nagorete obobiare obo ase chibesa chinyinge.” Paulo agateba, “Inche n’Omorumi omobiare.”" 
Acts22:29 Erio baria barenge ang’e komoboria bakaimoka, bakamotiga bwango, na oria omotang’ani omonene akoboa ekero aigwa ng’a n’Omorumi are, na konya omosibire." 
Acts22:30 Rituko ria kabere akarengereria komanya boronge nase engencho ki asoeirwe n’Abayahudi, akamosibora, agachika abakuani abanene na abanto b’ekegambero bonsi bache. Agatirimbokia Paulo, akamobeka ase amasio abo." 
Acts23:1 Paulo akarigereria mono abanto b’ekegambero, akabora, “Baminto, nabeireo ase obosio bwa Nyasae goika rero iga, na enkoro yane tekongambia.”" 
Acts23:2 Anania, omokuani omonene, agachika baria bateneine ang’e nere bamoake omonwa oye." 
Acts23:3 Erio Paulo akamotebia, “Nyasae nagoake aye, enyasi eakire echooka! Aye gwaikaransire konachera inche ekina boronge koreng’ana buna ogochika, naende kogoteba mamincha y’amachiko ng’a ng’akwe?”" 
Acts23:4 Baria bateneine ang’e nere bakabora, “Inee! Naye okorama omokuani omonene o Nyasae?”" 
Acts23:5 Paulo agateba ng’a, “Tinamanyete baminto ng’a ere nomokuani omonene, naki narikire: Tokwana bobe omogambi bw’abanto bao.”" 
Acts23:6 Korende ekero Paulo achia komanya ng’a ensemo eyemo n’Abasadukai, na ensemo ya kabere n’Abafarisai, agaaka eriogi ase ekegambero keria, agateba, “Abaminto, inche n’Omofarisai, omwana bw’Abafarisai; inche nigo nkogambigwa ase engencho y’ogosemeria na ase okobokigwa kw’abakure.”" 
Acts23:7 Erio gakwanire aya, ogwatananekana gokaba egati y’Abafarisai na Abasadukai, na omosangererekano ogaatananekana." 
Acts23:8 Naki Abasadukai nigo bagokana ng’a kobokigwa tikori, nonya nabamalaika, nonya nemeika, korende Abafarisai nigo bagwancha onsi." 
Acts23:9 Bikaba ebituri ebinge; aborokia b’amariko b’ensemo y’Abafarisai bagatenena, bakamobuna, bagoteba, “Titorochi bobe bonde ase omonto oyo. Aande onye nomoika gose omomalaika okwanire nere?”" 
Acts23:10 Ekero eriomana rinene riachia kooroka, omotang’ani oria omonene akoboa ng’a Paulo nabaise kobutoranwa nabarabwo, agachika abarwani baike na komotaboria korwa ase amaboko abo, na komorenta ase enyomba enene y’abarwani." 
Acts23:11 Obotuko boria Omonene agatenena ang’e nere, akamotebia, “Remia enkoro, ekiagera buna kwamberete kirori Yerusalemu, nekogwenerete kombera boigo Rumi.”" 
Acts23:12 Bogachia gokiamoka, Abayahudi bakabwatana komoboera Paulo, bagatianania ng’a tibakoria gose tibakonywa goika bamoitire." 
Acts23:13 Abwo batiananetie nigo barenge abanto kobua emerongo ene. 
Acts23:14 Barabwo bakagenda ase abakuani abanene na abagaaka, bakabora, “Ntwatiananetie bokong’u ng’a titoria gento goika twaitire Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Gaki bono inwe amo nab’ekegambero motebie omotang’ani oria omonene amotirimbokie gocha asemore, buna inwe morigetie komanya chingencho chiaye buya kobua; na intwe nigo tore ang’e komoita ritang’ani ataraika asemore.”" 
Acts23:16 Omoigwa o Paulo akaigwa amang’ana igoro y’okoboera kwabo, akagenda, agasoa ime ase enyomba enene, akamanyia Paulo amang’ana ayio." 
Acts23:17 Paulo akarangeria oyomo bw’abatang’ani b’abarwani rigana, akamotebia, “Ira omomura oyo ase omotang’ani omonene, ekiagera nabwate ring’ana akomotebia.”" 
Acts23:18 Erio akamoimokia, akamoira ase omotang’ani oria omonene, akamotebia, “Paulo, oria omosibwa nandangeria, omboria nkorentere omomura oyo, ekiagera nare ne ring’ana akogotebia.”" 
Acts23:19 Omotang’ani oria omonene akamobwata okoboko, akagenda nere ensemo, akamoboria bobisi, “Ing’ana ki obwate origetie gontebia?”" 
Acts23:20 Akabora, “Abayahudi babwatanire kogosaba otirimbokie Paulo gochia bosio bw’ekegambero ankio, buna igo barigetie komanya chingencho chiaye buya kobua." 
Acts23:21 Gaki aye tibwancha, ekiagera abanto kobua emerongo ene bamoboeire, batiananirie ng’a tibakoria gose tibakonywa goika bamoitire; na barabwo nigo bare ang’e baganyete eira korwa asore.”" 
Acts23:22 Erio omotang’ani oria omonene agatiga omomura oria agende, akamotebia, “Totebia monto onde ng’a kwamanyirie aya.”" 
Acts23:23 Nyuma y’ayio akarangeria babere b’abatang’ani b’abarwani rigana, akabatebia, “Beka ang’e abarwani amagana abere, na abarwani abariini chibarasi emerongo etano na ebere, na abare namatimo amagana abere ase okogenda Kaisaria chinsa isato chia botuko." 
Acts23:24 Naende beka ang’e chiyombo bariinie Paulo, momoire buya ase Feliki, gavuna.”" 
Acts23:25 Akarika rirube iga: 
Acts23:26 “Ase omosike gavuna Feliki. Inche Klaudio Lisia, nagokwanirie." 
Acts23:27 Omonto oyo nigo abwatwa n’Abayahudi, na barabwo bakaba ang’e komoita. Erio ngacha nomoganda bw’abarwani, nkamotooria, konya nanyorire amang’ana ng’a n’Omorumi are." 
Acts23:28 Naende nkarigia komanya engencho yaye bakomosoera, nkamotirimbokia na komobeka bosio bw’ekegambero kiabo." 
Acts23:29 Nkanyora ng’a nigo asoeirwe ase engencho y’amaborio ’amachiko abo, korende tasoeiri ase ring’ana rigwenerete agoitwa nonya ngosibwa." 
Acts23:30 Ekero nanyora amang’ana ng’a bamoboeire omonto oyo, ngachora komotoma asore erio kegima, ngachika abamosoeri bache bakwane amang’ana igoro yaye ase obosio bwao.”" 
Acts23:31 Erio abarwani baria bakaimokia Paulo buna bachigetwe, bakamoira gochia Antipatiri ase obotuko boria." 
Acts23:32 Ekero bwakia mambia bagatiga abarwani be chibarasi bagenderere norogendo na Paulo, na barabwo abanyene bakairana ase enyomba enene y’abarwani." 
Acts23:33 Abarwani baria be chibarasi bagachia goika Kaisaria, bakaa gavuna rirube riria, bakabeka na Paulo ase obosio bwaye." 
Acts23:34 Ekero arisomire, akaboria, “Omonto oyo noyo bw’ense ki?” Ekero aigwete ng’a nomonto o Kilikia, agateba," 
Acts23:35 “Ninche nyigwe amang’ana ao ekero abagosoeri bao barache.” Agachika arendwe ase enyomba y’ekegambero kia Herode. 
Acts24:1 Nyuma y’amatuko atano, Anania, omokuani omonene, agatirimboka amo nabande b’abagaaka na omokwani oyomo, Teritulo; barabwo bagatebereria gavuna amang’ana igoro ya Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ekero Teritulo achia korangerigwa, agachaka komosoera, agateba, “Aye, omosike Feliki, ase okogamba kwao twanyorire omorembe omonge, na ase okorigereria kwao gwakoreire egesaku giaito ebinto ebinge ebiya," 
Acts24:3 gaki iga tokobinyora kera ekero na kera aase, na gokoakera ng’a mbuya mono." 
Acts24:4 Korende tinkogochanda kobua, nagosoroire ototegerere ase amang’ana amake ase ogwancha kwao." 
Acts24:5 Naki twanyorire omonto oyo ng’a nomochege are, na omochaki bw’eriomana ase Abayahudi abare ase ense yonsi, naende nomotang’ani bw’ekeombe ki’Abanazareti." 
Acts24:6 Naende nigo ateemete kogindia Hekalu riko. Ase ayio tokamobwata, [tokarigia komogambia ase amachiko aito." 
Acts24:7 Korende Lisia, omochiki omonene bw’abarwani, agaika, akamorusia ase amaboko aito ne chinguru," 
Acts24:8 agachika abamosoeri baria bache asore.] Aye omonyene nonyare komoboria, onyore engencho y’amang’ana onsi twamosoeire intwe.”" 
Acts24:9 Abayahudi nabarabwo bakamosoera, bakabora ng’a amang’ana ayio naboigo are." 
Acts24:10 Erio gavuna akorotera Paulo okoboko erinde akwane. Paulo akairaneria, “Amaene namanyire ng’a aye kwabeire omogambi ase egesaku eke ase ekero ki’emiaka emenge, igo ninyare gwekengera ase omoyo bw’omosasoko." 
Acts24:11 Naki buna oranyare komanya, amatuko taraeta kobua ikomi na abere korwa ekero natiirete kogenda Yerusalemu gosasima." 
Acts24:12 Abanto aba tibanyoreti nkoamererania na monto, gose koburukania omosangererekano ase Hekalu ime, nonya nase chisinagogi gose ase omochie ime." 
Acts24:13 Gose tibakonyara koorokia amang’ana aya bansoera bono ng’a namaene are. 
Acts24:14 Korende ring’ana eri ndaorokie asore, ng’a ase enchera eyio bakoroka ensemo y’ogweatanana, inche nigo nkomosasima Nyasae bwe chisokoro chiaito, na kwegena ayarikire ase amachiko na ase chibuku chi’ababani." 
Acts24:15 Ninde nogosemeria ase Nyasae buna barabwo bare nakorokwo, ng’a okobokigwa kw’abakure nakobe ase abanyene oboronge, na ase abatari abanyene oboronge boigo." 
Acts24:16 Inche boigo nateemire koba nenkoro etari kongambia ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na ase obosio bw’abanto." 
Acts24:17 Bono yaetire emiaka etai meke ngacha ndetere abanto b’egesaku kiane ebiegwa, naende indue chisadaka." 
Acts24:18 Ekero narenge gokora aya, bakaanyora ime ase Hekalu nesibirie, timbeti nomoganda gose riroroche. Korende Abayahudi bande, abarwete Asia mbarengeo." 
Acts24:19 Abwo mbagwenerete koba aiga ase obosio bwao na gonsoera, onye bare ne ring’ana igoro asende." 
Acts24:20 Gose abanto aba bare aa abanyene batebe nkomocha ki banyorete asende ekero natenena ase ekegambero," 
Acts24:21 otatiga ase engencho ye ring’ana erimo natebete neriogi rinene, ekero natenenete egati yabo. Ngateba: Ase engencho y’okobokigwa kw’abakure nakio nkogamberigwa ase obosio bwaino iga rero.”" 
Acts24:22 Korende Feliki, ekiagera amanyete boronge amang’ana ’Enchera eria, agatiga ekina kerare, akabora, “Lisia, omochiki omonene bw’abarwani karatirimboke, rirorio ninyigwe amang’ana aino.”" 
Acts24:23 Agachika omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani rigana arende Paulo, korende amoe ribaga rike, gose tamokania nonya noyomo bw’abasani baye komokorera, gose gocha komorora." 
Acts24:24 Nyuma y’amatuko atai make, Feliki agaika na Durusila mokaye, oyorenge Omoyahudi. Akarangeria Paulo, akamoigwa ogokwana amang’ana igoro y’okomwegena Kristo Yeso." 
Acts24:25 Ekero Paulo are gokwana amang’ana igoro y’oboronge, na okwerita, na ekina kegochi‐gocha, Feliki akaba nobwoba, akamotebia, “Ase ekero eke bono, karagenda; ekero ndanyore ribaga, ninkorangerie naende.”" 
Acts24:26 Amo nayio nigo asemeretie ng’a naegwe chifeta na Paulo. Nabo akana‐komorangeria ekero ase ekero gokwana nere. 
Acts24:27 Korende emiaka ebere koyaerire, Porikio Festo agasoa obogambi ribaga ria Feliki; na Feliki akarigia gwekora omuya ase Abayahudi, agatiga Paulo osibire." 
Acts25:1 Bono Festo gasoire ase obogambi bwaye, nyuma y’amatuko atato agatiira gochia Yerusalemu korwa Kaisaria." 
Acts25:2 Abakuani abanene na abanene b’Abayahudi bakamomanyia amang’ana igoro ya Paulo. Bagasorora Festo," 
Acts25:3 na bakamosaba abanchere, arue ogochika ng’a Paulo arentwe Yerusalemu, konya barobeirie komoboera na komoitera nchera." 
Acts25:4 Festo akairaneria ng’a Paulo narendire aria Kaisaria; ere omonyene nigo arengereretie kogenda aroro bwango. 
Acts25:5 Agakwana, “Baria bare nokobua ase egati yaino, tiga batirimboke amo nainche, onye ring’ana rire riibe ase omonto oria, bamosoere.”" 
Acts25:6 Ekero abeire amo nabarabwo tari kobua amatuko atano na atato gose ikomi, agatirimboka gochia Kaisaria; ne rituko ria kabere agaikaransa ase ekerogo kiaye gi’ekegambero, agachika Paulo arentwe." 
Acts25:7 Ekero Paulo achire, Abayahudi abarwete Yerusalemu bagatenena, bakamoetanana, bakarenta amasoero amange amarito igoro yaye, ayabatanyare koorokia oboene ng’a mboronge are." 
Acts25:8 Paulo agekengera iga, “Inche timocheti ring’ana igoro ase amachiko ’Abayahudi, gose ase Hekalu, nonya nase Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:9 Korende Festo akarigia gwekora omuya ase Abayahudi, akaboria Paulo, “Norigetie kogenda Yerusalemu ogamberigwe aroro ase obosio bwane?”" 
Acts25:10 Korende Paulo agateba, “Inche nigo nteneine aiga bosio bw’ekegambero gia Kaisari, ase ngwenerete kogamberigwa; timochereti Abayahudi ring’ana buna aye omanyete buya." 
Acts25:11 Onye namochire, gose nakorire ring’ana ringwenerete ogokwa, tinyangeti ogokwa, korende onye tari ekeene ring’ana eri bansoeire, onde tari oranyare kombeka ase amaboko abo. Nindigetie ekina kiane keirwe ase Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:12 Erio Festo agachia gokoora gokwana nabanto b’ekegambero, akairaneria, “Norigetie ekina kiao keirwe ase Kaisari, nabo oragende ase Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:13 Amatuko atai make gaetire, Agripa omoruoti na Bereniki bagaika Kaisaria gokwania Festo." 
Acts25:14 Na ekero baikaransire aroro amatuko amange, Festo agatebia omoruoti amang’ana igoro ya Paulo, agateba, “Nare aa omonto oyomo omosibwa, otigetwe na Feliki." 
Acts25:15 Ekero narenge Yerusalemu, abakuani abanene na abagaaka b’Abayahudi bagantebia amang’ana igoro yaye, bakarigia agambigwe." 
Acts25:16 Nkabairaneria ng’a tari engencho y’Abarumi korua omonto onde bwensi aitwe ritang’ani omonto oria omosoerwa atararorana nabamosoeri baye obosio ase obosio, na koegwa ribaga gwekengera ase ogosoerwa kwaye." 
Acts25:17 Ase igo ekero basangererekanete aiga, tintebaneti, korende rituko ria kabere ngaikaransa ase ekerogo kiane gi’ekegambero, ngachika omonto oyo arentwe." 
Acts25:18 Na baria abamosoeri ekero batenenete, tibamosoera ase ing’ana riibe, buna nakagete," 
Acts25:19 korende iga barenge namaborio gete, okoamererania igoro asare ase edini yabo abanyene, na ase amang’ana igoro y’omonto oyomo, Yeso, oyoikire gokwa, korende oyo Paulo akona‐goteba ng’a moyo are." 
Acts25:20 Inche ngasinywa komanya buna nkorigia ekeene ki’amang’ana aya, nkamoboria gose narigetie kogenda Yerusalemu agamberigwe aroro ase amang’ana aya." 
Acts25:21 Korende ekero Paulo arigia ng’a arendwe goika agamberigwe ase Omoruoti omonene, ngachika arendwe goika inyare komoira ase Kaisari.”" 
Acts25:22 Agripa agatebia Festo, “Nainche omonyene nindigetie koigwa omonto oyio.” Akabora, “Noche omoigwe ankio.”" 
Acts25:23 Rituko ria kabere Agripa agacha amo na Bereniki ase obonene obonge, bagasoa ase ekegambero amo nabatang’ani b’abarwani elifu na abanto abanene b’omochie. Festo akarua ogochika ng’a Paulo arentwe ime." 
Acts25:24 Festo agateba, “Omoruoti Agripa, na inwe mwensi abamore aa amo naintwe, mwarorire omonto oyo! Ase engencho yaye omoganda bwonsi bw’Abayahudi aaria Yerusalemu na aiga mbamboria mbakonye, bagaaka eriogi ng’a temogwenereti abe moyo." 
Acts25:25 Korende ngachia korora ng’a takoreti gento ekebe kegwenerete aitwe; na ere omonyene karigetie agamberigwe ase Omoruoti omonene, nkarengereria komotoma asare." 
Acts25:26 Na inche tindi ne ring’ana ri’ekeene nkorikera omonene one igoro asare. Ase ayio namorentire aiga ase obosio bwaino, kobua mono ase obosio bwao, aye omoruoti Agripa, erinde gotwakoorire komoboria, inyore ring’ana nkorika." 
Acts25:27 Naki narorire ng’a nering’ana ritari boronge koira omosibwa otatiga koorokia amasoerwa aria asoeire.” 
Acts26:1 Agripa agatebia Paulo, “Nore ne ribaga gokwana amang’ana ao.” Erio Paulo akarambora okoboko kwaye, agekengera," 
Acts26:2 “Omoruoti Agripa, nerorire omonyene ng’a ninde negesio, ekiagera ninyekengere ase obosio bwao rero, ase amang’ana aria onsi nasoerwa n’Abayahudi." 
Acts26:3 Nabo ekiagera aye kwamanyire mono chingencho chionsi na amaborio onsi Abayahudi bare naro, nagosabire ontegerere ase oboremereria." 
Acts26:4 “Abayahudi bonsi mbamanyete obogima bwane korwa obosae bwane buna bwarenge korwa omochakano, ase egesaku kiane na ase Yerusalemu." 
Acts26:5 Mbamanyete korwa ase ekero egetambe, na onye barigetie, banyare koorokia buna narenge oyomo bw’ekeombe keria gi’okobetererigwa bokong’u kobwata engencho yaito y’okomoiroka Nyasae, nakio ekeombe ki’Abafarisai." 
Acts26:6 Na bono ninteneine aiga ngambigwe ase engencho y’ogosemeria kw’eira eria chisokoro chiaito chiaetwe na Nyasae," 
Acts26:7 eira eyio eyio ebisaku biaito ikomi na bibere biasemeretie koyeikera, kobiragenderere komosasima Nyasae obotuko na omobaso. Aye omoruoti! Ase engencho y’ogosemeria okwo nasoeirwe n’Abayahudi." 
Acts26:8 Nase ki motari gwancha nga Nyasae nkobabokia are abakure? 
Acts26:9 “Ekeene inche omonyene naroche ng’a nengwenerete gokora amang’ana amange mamincha y’erieta ria Yeso o Nazareti. 
Acts26:10 Ngakora aya aria Yerusalemu: Ngasiba abachenu abange ase echela, ekero naeirwe okobua nabakuani abanene; tari ayio oka, korende kobagoitwa, nigo narenge gwancha abe bo asebare." 
Acts26:11 Nkabasusura ebiro ebinge ase chisinagogi chionsi, naende mbabetereria korama, nkababwaterwa endamwamu enene mono, nkabatunya na kobachanda goika emechie y’ense engeni." 
Acts26:12 “Nabo ase emeremo eyio nigo narenge kogenda Damesiki, nigo naetwe okobua na amachiko korwa ase abakuani abanene." 
Acts26:13 Aye omoruoti, ekero kia mobaso gati, kande enchera kogenda, nkarora amasase akorwa igoro abuete okobara kw’erioba, akambarera chinsemo chionsi amo nabaria barenge amo nainche." 
Acts26:14 Tokagwa inse twensi, nkaigwa eriogi rigontebia ase omonwa bw’Ekeibirania: Saulo, Saulo, nase ki gwanchandire? Naakong’u asore goaka ensonga y’esimisi chintacho." 
Acts26:15 Na inche nkabora: Naye ng’o Omonene? Omonene agantebia: Ninche Yeso, oyogwachandire aye." 
Acts26:16 Korende imoka, otenene namagoro ao, ekiagera nakoorokeire ase engencho eye: nkobeke obe omokori na kirori bw’amang’ana aya kwarora, na amang’ana ayio ndeorokerie asore." 
Acts26:17 Ningotoorie korwa ase abanto bao, na korwa ase abanto b’Ebisaku, ase abwo ndagotome." 
Acts26:18 Nigo oraramokie amaiso abo baonchoke korwa ase omosunte, bache ase omobaso, batige okobua gwa Saitani na baonchokere Nyasae, banyore okwaberwa kw’ebibe biabo, na omwando ase egati yabo abachenirwe ase okonyegena." 
Acts26:19 “Aye omoruoti Agripa! Ase ayio tinare kwanga koigwera okorora koria kwarwete igoro," 
Acts26:20 korende ritang’ani nigo naranderetie baria ba Damesiki, na Yerusalemu, na ase ense ya Boyahudi, na abanto b’Ebisaku, baonchoke, baonchokere Nyasae bakore ogokora kobwataine okoonchoka kwabo." 
Acts26:21 Naki ase engencho eyio Abayahudi bakambwatera ime ase Hekalu, bagateema kong’ita." 
Acts26:22 Goika rero iga nanyorire ogokonyeka gokorwa ase Nyasae. Ase igo ninteneine na koba kirori ase abake na abanene. Tindi gokwana amang’ana ande otatiga aria ababani na Musa bakwanete ng’a nabe," 
Acts26:23 buna Kristo agwenerete achandwe, naende ase okoba omotang’ani ase okobokigwa kw’abakure, nararie amang’ana ’omobaso ase abanto baye, na ase abanto b’Ebisaku.”" 
Acts26:24 Agachia gwekengera iga, Festo agakwana neriogi rinene, “Paulo, nebarimo ore! Ogosoma kwao okonge kwaonchoire obong’aini bwao.”" 
Acts26:25 Korende Paulo agakwana, “Omosike Festo, tindi ebarimo, korende nigo ngokwana amang’ana ’ekeene na ay’obong’aini kegima." 
Acts26:26 Naki omoruoti namanyete engencho y’amang’ana aya, naende ninyare gokwana nere ntari nokoiroka, ekiagera namanyire mono ng’a ring’ana tiriri nonya nerimo ase ayio otamanyeti, ekiagera erio tiriakoregete bobisi." 
Acts26:27 Omoruoti Agripa, Inee, mbwegenete ababani? Namanyire ng’a nobegenete.”" 
Acts26:28 Agripa agatebia Paulo, “Ase amang’ana amake norigetie gonkora imbe Omokristo.”" 
Acts26:29 Paulo akamoiraneria, “Nasabire Nyasae ng’a ase amang’ana amake, gose amange, tari aye bweka, korende naba bonsi abantegererete rero, babe buna inche otatiga ase ebinyuri ebi.”" 
Acts26:30 Erio omoruoti, na gavuna, na Bereniki, na baria baikaransete amo nabarabwo bagatenena," 
Acts26:31 bakagenda are ake, bagatebania, bakabora, “Omonto oyo takoreti ring’ana rigwenerete ogokwa gose ogosibwa.”" 
Acts26:32 Agripa agatebia Festo, “Omonto oyo nanga nasiborwa onye atarigia ekina kiaye keirwe ase Kaisari.”" 
Acts27:1 Ekero amang’ana achikwa ng’a togende nemeeri goika Italia, bakabeka Paulo na abasibwa bande ase amaboko a Yulio, omotang’ani bw’abarwani rigana ase ekeombe ki’abarwani ki’omogambi Augusto." 
Acts27:2 Togasoa ase emeeri y’Aderamiti eyarenge ang’e kogenda goika emechie ye chingegu chi’Asia, tokaimoka. Aristarko, Omomakedonia o Tesaloniki, nigo arenge amo naintwe." 
Acts27:3 Rituko ria kabere togaika Sidoni. Yulio akarenda Paulo buya, akamoa ribaga agende ase abasani baye akonywe nabarabwo." 
Acts27:4 Korwa agwo tokagenda ase enyancha, togakengana ase egesinka gekorokwa Kuporo, ekiagera chimbeo chiarenge korua bosio." 
Acts27:5 Togaeta enyancha ensemo ya Kilikia na Pamfulia, togaika Mira, omochie o Likia." 
Acts27:6 Aria omotang’ani oria akanyora emeeri y’Aleksanderia eyarenge ang’e kogenda gochia Italia, agatoriinia." 
Acts27:7 Tokagenda ng’ora ase ekero ki’amatuko amange, togaika Kinido ase obokong’u, na ekiagera embeo yatotangete, togaeta ang’e na Kirete maate, erinde tokengane embeo ang’e na Salimone." 
Acts27:8 Togaeta ase obokong’u engegu ase engegu, togaika aase akorokwa Ebiambokero Ebiya. Ang’e nagwo norengeo omochie ore korokwa Lasaya." 
Acts27:9 Naende ekero ekenge konya giaetire, na orogendo rwabeire nobokong’u, ekiagera amatuko ’okweng’ata konya aetire, Paulo akabatebia," 
Acts27:10 “Inwe abasacha, narorire ng’a orogendo oro narobe nemechando na ogosira okonge, tari ase chigurube na emeeri bioka, korende nonya nase obogima bwaito boigo.”" 
Acts27:11 Korende omotang’ani oria akaigwera omoraai na omonyene emeeri kobua aya Paulo akwanete. 
Acts27:12 Ekiagera ekiambokero eke tikiarenge ekiya ase abanto komenya aroro ekero ki’obokendu, abange babo bakarigia mono korua aroro, erinde keranyarekane, baike Foiniki na kobeera aroro ekero ki’obokendu. Na kerokio nekiambokero gia Kirete, kerigereretie gati ya irianyi ya bosongo na sugusu ya bosongo." 
Acts27:13 Naende embeo ya irianyi egachia kogusa ake, bagakaga ng’a banyorire eki barigetie konyora, bakang’usa ekerochi, bakagenda ang’e na Kirete, ang’e mono nengegu." 
Acts27:14 Nyuma ase ekero egeke omwaga bwe chinguru okorokwa Eurakilo, ore gocha buna ekembugu‐mbugu ogaaka emeeri." 
Acts27:15 Ekero emeeri yatwometwe na tiyare konyara goeta ase omwaga, tokayetiga etoire ase ekoirwa gochia." 
Acts27:16 Togaeta togakengana ase egesinka egeke gekorokwa Kilaudia, tokanyara ase obokong’u kobogoria obwato oboke." 
Acts27:17 Nyuma kobakoorire kobotiria bakabogoria chingori chi’ogokonya, bagachietanania emeeri. Bakairoka ng’a tibabaisa korateera ase omokenye okorokwa Siriti, bagasibora ebitambaa, bakairwa bosa." 
Acts27:18 Ekiagera konya twatwomirwe mono nomwaga oria, rituko ria kabere bagachaka gotuguta chigurube nyancha ime." 
Acts27:19 Rituko ria gatato bagatuguta ebinto bi’emeeri namaboko abo abanyene. 
Acts27:20 Ekero erioba ne ching’enang’eni bitarorekanete ase amatuko amange, na omwaga omonene mono ogatotuba, tokerusia moyo ase ogotooreka." 
Acts27:21 Bagachia koba ekero egetambe batari koria endagera, Paulo agatenena gati‐gati yabo, akabora, “Inwe abasacha, onye mwanyigwerete timorua Kirete, nanga titwanyora emechando na ogosira buna oko." 
Acts27:22 Bono nabatebirie, remia chinkoro chiaino, ekiagera monto tagosira, otatiga emeeri yoka." 
Acts27:23 Ekiagera obotuko obo bwa rero omomalaika o Nyasae, oria inche inde omonto oye, naende nere ngosasima," 
Acts27:24 natenenete ang’e nainche agantebia: Paulo toiroka, nogwenerete gotenena ase obosio bwa Kaisari. Naende rora, Nyasae okoeire abanto bonsi, abakogenda amo naye." 
Acts27:25 Ase ayio abasacha, remia chinkoro chiaino, ekiagera ninde nokwegena ase Nyasae, ng’a nabe buna natebetigwe." 
Acts27:26 Korende netogwenerete goikigwa ase egesinka gete.” 
Acts27:27 Goika obotuko bwa ikomi na kane bogachia goika tokairwa gochia aria na aria ase enyancha y’Adiria. Botuko gati abagendia b’emeeri bagakaga ng’a baikire ang’e ase ense enyomo. 
Acts27:28 Bakaruta ekerengo, bakanyora ebirengo bi’amaboko emerongo ebere. Bakagenderera ake, bakaruta ekerengo naende, bakanyora ebirengo bi’amaboko ikomi na bitano." 
Acts27:29 Bakoboa ng’a mbabaise gotwomerigwa ase ebitare, bakaruta ebirochi bine bia nyuma, bagasaba ng’a bokie." 
Acts27:30 Naende abagendia bagachia korigia gotama na gotiga emeeri, bagaikia obwato oboke gochia nyancha, bakang’ainereria buna mbarigetie koruta ebirochi korwa bosio bw’emeeri." 
Acts27:31 Paulo agatebia omotang’ani oria bw’abarwani rigana, na abarwani, “Aba bataikaranseti ase emeeri ime timokonyara gotooreka.”" 
Acts27:32 Erio abarwani bakanacha chingori chi’obwato, bakabotiga bogwe amache ime." 
Acts27:33 Bogachia gokiamoka Paulo agasorora bonsi barie endagera, akabora, “Rero nerituko ria ikomi na kane moganyete na mogendererete motana koria gento." 
Acts27:34 Gaki nabasoroire morie endagera, nebe ase ogotooreka kwaino; naki tikagosira nonya nagatukia akamo k’omotwe bw’oyomo oino.”" 
Acts27:35 Gakoorire gokwana aya, akabogoria omogati akairaneria ng’a mbuya mono ase Nyasae ase amasio abo bonsi, akayosamunyora, agachaka koria." 
Acts27:36 Erio bonsi bakagonkomoka, na barabwo bakaria endagera." 
Acts27:37 (Na ase emeeri ime nigo twarenge abanto amagana abere, na emerongo etano na ebere, na batano nomo.)" 
Acts27:38 Kobaigotire bakagusuyia emeeri ase ogotuguta engano ase enyancha ime. 
Acts27:39 Kobwachia gokia, tibamanya ense eria, otatiga baroche omosomo ore nengegu, bagatebania gosoyia emeeri aroro, keranyarekane." 
Acts27:40 Bakaruta ebirochi biria, bakabitiga nyancha ime, bakarorobia chingori chi’ebionchori, bagatiiria egetambaa kia bosio embeo ekeguserere, bakaonchora emeeri gochia engegu." 
Acts27:41 Bagaika aase chinsanganio chie chinyancha ibere, bakaroria emeeri aroro goika ekarateera; obosio bw’emeeri bogasensema omokenye, ekabwatwa kegima, korende korwa nyuma egatagorwa ne chinguru chi’emerindo." 
Acts27:42 Omoroberio bw’abarwani nigo orenge ng’a baite abasibwa, omonto terema abaise gotama." 
Acts27:43 Korende omotang’ani oria akarigia gotooria Paulo, akabatanga, tibakora buna barengereretie. Agachika baria baranyare kwerema berute nyancha ime, bagende ense enyomo." 
Acts27:44 Abaratigare bagende, abande ase chibao, na abande ase ebinto binde bi’emeeri. Naboigo abanto bonsi bagaika ase ense enyomo buya." 
Acts28:1 Gatwatoorekire twensi, erio tokamanya ng’a egesinka keria nigo kiare korokwa Melita." 
Acts28:2 Abanyene ense eria bagatokorera obuya boetete engencho, ekiagera bagatoutera omorero, bagatoroisia intwe twensi, ekiagera embura yatwete na obokendu mbwarenge." 
Acts28:3 Paulo nigo arenge gosangereria chinko na gochibeka ase omorero, eng’iti egasoka ase engencho y’omorero oria, ekamwenarerera okoboko kwaye." 
Acts28:4 Abanyene ense eria, ekero barora eng’iti eria esung’unaine ase okoboko kwaye, bagatebania, “Takomocha omonto oyo koba omoiti, nonya otooregete korwa ase enyancha, oboronge tibokomotiga abe moyo.”" 
Acts28:5 Korende akayesamunsera riko, taba na bobe bonde." 
Acts28:6 Bakamorigereria mono, bagakaga ng’a nabimbe, gose nagwe inse na gokwa bwango, korende ekero baganya engaki entambe, na bobe bonde tibomonyoreti, bakaonchora ebirengererio biabo, bakabora ng’a ere nenyasae." 
Acts28:7 Ang’e naase aria yarengeo emegondo y’omonene bw’egesinka keria, erieta riaye Pubilio. Omonto oyo agatoroisia ase omoyo bw’obosani, tokaba abageni baye ase ekero ki’amatuko atato." 
Acts28:8 Ekaba ng’a ise Publio narenge omonyareku ase esosera na gosaa amanyinga. Paulo agasoa asare akamosabera, akabeka amaboko aye igoro yaye, akamogwenia." 
Acts28:9 Ayio agachia gokoreka, abande ase egesinka keria, abarenge namarwaire, bagacha, bakagwenigwa." 
Acts28:10 Na barabwo bagatosika ase ogosika okonene; naende ekero twachia gosoa emeeri bagatoa ebinto biria twaremeire. 
Acts28:11 Nyuma y’emetienyi etato tokagenda nemeeri y’Aleksanderia, eyabegetwe kobeera aria ase egesinka ekero ki’obokendu, na ekemanyererio kiaye kiarenge Diosikuri (engencho yaye abamura chibarongo)." 
Acts28:12 Togaika Sirakusa, tokamenyao amatuko atato." 
Acts28:13 Korwa agwo togaetanana, togaikera Regio. Nyuma ye rituko erimo embeo ya irianyi ekagusa; rituko ria kabere togaika Puteoli." 
Acts28:14 Agwo tokanyora abaminto, bagatosorora tomenye amo nabarabwo amatuko atano, na abere; erio togaika Rumi." 
Acts28:15 Abaminto b’aroro, ekero baigwete amang’ana igoro yaito, bagacha goika Apioforo na Tiretaberne gotorototera aroro. Paulo ekero achia kobarora, akamobaka Nyasae, akaremigwa." 
Acts28:16 Ekero twasoa Rumi, Paulo akaegwa ribaga komenya ere bweka, amo nomorendi ore komorenda." 
Acts28:17 Nyuma y’amatuko atato, akarangeria abanene b’Abayahudi amo. Ekero basangererekanire akabatebia, “Baminto, nonya tinkoreti ring’ana riibe ase abanto baito, gose ring’ana riatananegete korwa ase chingencho chie chisokoro chiaito, korwa Yerusalemu nkabekwa ase amaboko ’Abarumi buna omosibwa." 
Acts28:18 Ekero bakoorire komboria bakarigia gonsibora, ekiagera tibanyorete engencho ende yonsi yangwenerete ng’itwe." 
Acts28:19 Korende ekero Abayahudi bangete aya, nkabetererigwa korigia ekina kiane keirwe ase Kaisari, tari ng’a narenge ne ring’ana ri’ogosoera abanto b’egesaku kiane." 
Acts28:20 Nabo ase engencho eyio nero nabarangereirie, erinde mbarore, na gokwana nainwe, ekiagera nasibirwe ase ekenyuri eke ase engencho y’ogosemeria kw’Abaisraeli.”" 
Acts28:21 Baria bakamotebia, “Intwe titwana konyora amarube ande agokwana amang’ana igoro yao korwa Boyahudi, gose onde ominto tari nonya noyomo oikire aiga na gototebia amang’ana, gose okwanire ring’ana riibe igoro yao." 
Acts28:22 Korende ntorigetie koigwa korwa asore buna oroche aye, ekiagera ase ekeombe keria twamanyire ng’a giakwanirwe bobe kera aase.”" 
Acts28:23 Kobachorire rituko nere, abanto abange mono bagacha asare aase amenyete. Akabatebereria korwa mambia goika mogoroba, na koorokia amang’ana igoro y’oboruoti bwa Nyasae, agateema kobatebereria amang’ana igoro ya Yeso korwa ase amang’ana ’amachiko a Musa na korwa ase ababani." 
Acts28:24 Abande bagancha ayakwanete, abande tibayaancha." 
Acts28:25 Ekiagera batabwatanete barabwo ase barabwo, bakagenda ekero Paulo akwanete ring’ana eri erimo ng’a, “Omoika Omochenu nokwanete buya ne chisokoro chiaito goetera ase omonwa bw’omobani Isaya, ogoteba," 
Acts28:26 “Genda ase abanto aba, obatebie: Okoigwa namoigwe, korende timokomanya nonya ng’ake, na okorora namorore, korende timoyarengereria nonya ng’ake." 
Acts28:27 Naki chinkoro chi’abanto aba chiabeire chinyoro, na amato abo nigo are amarito ase okoigwa, na amaiso abo bayamiamirie, tibacha korora namaiso abo, gose baigwe namato abo, gose bamanye ne chinkoro chiabo, baonchoke, na inche mbagwenie." 
Acts28:28 Naki amanyekane asemore ng’a ogotooreka oko kwa Nyasae kwairirwe ase abanto b’Ebisaku, nabarabwo nabaigwe.” [" 
Acts28:29 Ekero akoorire gokwana amang’ana aya, Abayahudi bakagenda, bakaamererania amang’ana amange barabwo ase barabwo.]" 
Acts28:30 Paulo akamenya engaki y’emiaka ebere ase enyomba amenyete, eye are goakanera, akaba okoroisia abanto bonsi abarenge komochiera," 
Acts28:31 okorandia amang’ana ’oboruoti bwa Nyasae, na kworokereria abanto amang’ana igoro y’Omonene Yeso Kristo noboremu obonge, takanigwa na monto." 
Romans1:1 Inche Paulo, omosomba o Kristo Yeso, narangeretigwe koba omotomwa, nachoretwe korandia enchili ya Nyasae," 
Romans1:2 eye Nyasae atang’anete koria eira ase emenwa y’ababani baye ase amariko amachenu. 
Romans1:3 Eye nenchili igoro y’Omwana oye Yeso Kristo, Omonene oito. Ere akaiborwa buna mwanyabanto ase ororeria rwa Daudi," 
Romans1:4 naende ase okobokigwa korwa ase abakure na ase chinguru chi’Omoika bw’Obochenu akaorokigwa koba Omwana o Nyasae. 
Romans1:5 Asare ere ntwanyorete obuya na obotomwa, erio ase engencho y’erieta riaye tworokererie abanto b’ebisaku bionsi, erinde banyare koba nokoigwera gw’okwengena" 
Romans1:6 amo nainwe abanyene, inwe abamwarangeretigwe koba aba Yeso Kristo." 
Romans1:7 Nabarikeire inwe mwensi abamomenyete Rumi, abanchwa ba Nyasae, abamwarangeretigwe koba abachenu. Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Ritang’ani naakeire Nyasae one ng’a mbuya mono ase Yeso Kristo ase engencho yaino inwe mwensi, ekiagera okwegena kwaino kwamanyekanire ase ense yonsi." 
Romans1:9 Naki Nyasae, oyo ngokorera ase omoika one korandia enchili y’Omwana oye, nere kirori one ng’a tintigeti kobaatora botambe ase ogosaba kwane." 
Romans1:10 Botambe nigo ngosaba ng’a Nyasae karanche konyigorera enchera engiya, inchiche asemore." 
Romans1:11 Nigo inde namaiga kororana nainwe na kobaa ekeegwa ase enchera y’Omoika Omochenu, erio mobekwe chinguru," 
Romans1:12 erinde toremanie inche nainwe, kera omonto ase okwegena kw’oyonde, okwaino na okwane." 
Romans1:13 Korende abaminto, nindigetie momanye ng’a ekero ase ekero nigo narengereretie gocha asemore (korende ngatangeka goika bono) erinde inyore okwama ase egati yaino, buna inde nakwo ase abanto b’Ebisaku binde." 
Romans1:14 Ase ayio ninde nesira ase Abagiriki na ase abatari Abagiriki, ase abanyasemi na ase abariri." 
Romans1:15 Ase ensemo yane nigo nganetie mono korandia enchili nonya nasemore abamomenyete Rumi. 
Romans1:16 Naki tinkororera enchili obosooku, ekiagera ero nokobua kwa Nyasae gokorenta ogotooreka ase onde bwensi oyoregene, ritang’ani ase Omoyahudi, na ase Omogiriki boigo." 
Romans1:17 Ekiagera ime yaye oboronge bokorwa ase Nyasae bwaorokigwe korwa okwegena goika okwegena, buna erikire, “Omonyene oboronge nabe moyo ase okwegena.”" 
Romans1:18 Naki endamwamu ya Nyasae yaorokigwe korwa igoro, igoro ase ogotamoiroka Nyasae gwonsi na obobe bwa mwanyabanto, abagotanga ekeene nobobe bwabo." 
Romans1:19 Bono ayaranyare komanywa igoro ya Nyasae aorokigwe asebare, ekiagera Nyasae nabaorokeretie." 
Romans1:20 Naki chingencho chiaye, echi chitari kororekana, engencho yaye okobua kwaye gwa kare na kare, na obonyasae bwaye, nchimanyekanete korwa ase ogotongwa gw’ense ase ebinto atongete. Ase igo tibari naya bagotaamera." 
Romans1:21 Naki nonya bamanyete Nyasae, tibamosigete buna Nyasae, gose komoakera ng’a mbuya mono; korende ebirengererio biabo bikaba bosa, na emioyo yabo y’oboriri ekabekwa omosunte." 
Romans1:22 Bagateba ng’a mbare nobong’aini, korende bakaririeka." 
Romans1:23 Bakaonchoreria obonene bwa Nyasae, oyotari nogosareka, ase omogwekano bw’ekieni kia mwanyabanto oyore nogosareka, na obwe chinyoni, na obwe ching’iti chire namagoro ane, na obwe ching’iti chikwagura." 
Romans1:24 Ase ayio Nyasae akabatiga ase okogania okobe gwe chinkoro chiabo, batunyane obonyaka goika bagasarerania ogosika ase emebere yabo barabwo ase barabwo," 
Romans1:25 ekiagera batigete ekeene kia Nyasae, bagachora oborimo, bagasasima na gokorera ebitongwa ribaga ri’Omotongi, oyorabakwe kare na kare! Amina." 
Romans1:26 Ase engencho eyio Nyasae akabatiga batunyane okogania kwabo kw’obosooku, goika abakungu babo bakaonchoreria okomenyana kw’omobere kwa boronge ase oko gotari kwa boronge." 
Romans1:27 Na abasacha boigo bagatiga okomenyana nabakungu kwa boronge, bagasambwa ase okorigania abasacha ase abasacha, bagakora ogokora kw’obosooku, bakanyora abanyene ogoakanwa kwa boronge kw’ogosaria kwabo." 
Romans1:28 Ekiagera batabarete ng’a ngento komomanya Nyasae, Nyasae akabatiga ase ebirengererio bie chingencho chiabo chimbe, bakore ayatagwenereti." 
Romans1:29 Bagaichorwa ne chingencho chionsi chitari boronge, na obobe, na okogania okobe, na okorengereria okobe, ne ribero, na oboiti, na eriomana, na obong’ainereria, na okogechana. Bakaba abagenkani," 
Romans1:30 abaitania, abamogechete Nyasae, abachayi, abaenenu, abetogia, abaroisia amabe, abatari koigwera abaibori babo," 
Romans1:31 abariri, abatari abegenwa, abatari nobwanchani, abatari namabera." 
Romans1:32 Barabwo abanyene mbamanyete mono ekina kia Nyasae kia boronge, ng’a abagokora ayaiga nebagwenerete amakweri; tibakorete aya oka, korende nigo bagwancherana nabwo bakoyakora." 
Romans2:1 Ase ayio, aye onde bwensi, tori naya ogotaamera, ekero okogambia oyonde ekina, ekiagera ase okomogambia oyonde ekina, naye okwegambia omonyene. Naki okomogambia, na aye nare ayio ogokora?" 
Romans2:2 Intwe twamanyire ng’a ekina kia Nyasae nigo kere boronge igoro ase abwo bagokora ayio. 
Romans2:3 Aye omonto oyokogambia baria bogokora ayio, naye omonyene naro ayio ogokora, Inee, nokagete ng’a aye notame korwa ase ekina kia Nyasae?" 
Romans2:4 Gose ngwachayire obonge bw’obuya bwaye, na oboremereria bwaye, na okoganya kwaye, na tomanyeti ng’a obuya bwa Nyasae nigo borigetie gokoraa gochia ase okoonchoka?" 
Romans2:5 Korende ase obokong’u bwao na ankoro yao etari nokoonchoka, kwegacheire endamwamu ase rituko riria ri’endamwamu, ekero ekina kia boronge kia Nyasae kerache koorokigwa," 
Romans2:6 ekiagera ere nache komoa kera omonto koreng’ana nogokora kwaye; 
Romans2:7 nabae obogima bwa kare na kare baria bakorigia obonene, na ogosika, na ogotasareka, na gokora amaya ase oboremereria." 
Romans2:8 Korende endamwamu na ekeririanda nabibe igoro ase baria beanchete abanyene, batari koigwera ekeene, korende bakoigwera ayatari boronge." 
Romans2:9 Emechando na obororo inabibe igoro ase kera oyomo bw’abana ba mwanyabanto oyogokora amabe, ritang’ani ase Omoyahudi, na ase Omogiriki boigo;" 
Romans2:10 korende obonene na ogosika, na omorembe nigo bire ase kera oyomo oyogokora amaya, ritang’ani ase Omoyahudi, na ase Omogiriki boigo." 
Romans2:11 Ekiagera gwanchereria tikori ase Nyasae. 
Romans2:12 Naki bonsi abakorire ebibe batari namachiko, nabasire batari namachiko; na bonsi abakorire ebibe bare namachiko, nabo baranacherwe ekina ase amachiko." 
Romans2:13 Naki tari abwo bakoigwa amachiko bare abanyene oboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae, korende mbaria bagoikerania amachiko, nabwo baraegwe oboronge." 
Romans2:14 Abanto b’Ebisaku batari namachiko, ekero bagokora buna engencho ya mwanyabanto ere aya amachiko are korigia, nonya abwo tibari namachiko, babeire amachiko boka abanyene." 
Romans2:15 Abwo nigo bakoorokia ng’a aya amachiko are korigia arikirwe ime ase chinkoro chiabo. Okomanya gwe chinkoro chiabo ime nigo gokobabera kirori, na ebirengererio biabo nigo bikobasoera gose kobaegera." 
Romans2:16 Nabo arache koba ase rituko riria, koreng’ana nenchili eye nkorandia, Nyasae kagochi‐gocha nanachere obobisi bwa mwanyabanto ekina, goetera ase Kristo Yeso." 
Romans2:17 Korende aya okweroka Omoyahudi, na gosemeretie amachiko, na gwetogia ase Nyasae." 
Romans2:18 Kwamanyire ogwancha kwaye, naende nomanyete buya amang’ana ayare amaya, ekiagera kworokererigwe amachiko." 
Romans2:19 Nore nobomaene ng’a aye omonyene nigo ore omoraai bw’emeuko, na omobaso bw’abare ase omosunte ime." 
Romans2:20 Omotebereria bw’abariri, na omworokia bw’abana abake, ekiagera kwanyorire okworokereria okuya gwe chisemi na ekeene bire ime ase amachiko." 
Romans2:21 Aye okworokereria abande, Inee, tokweorokereria aye omonyene? Aye okorandia ng’a omonto taiba, tori koiba aye omonyene?" 
Romans2:22 Aye ogoteba ng’a omonto tatomana, tori gotomana aye omonyene? Aye ogechete emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, aye tori koiba korwa ase chihekalu?" 
Romans2:23 Aye ogwetogeria amachiko, Inee, igo ogosareria Nyasae ogosika ase ogosaria kwao kw’amachiko?" 
Romans2:24 Naki amariko nigo agoteba, “Erieta ria Nyasae nigo rikoramwa ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku ase engencho yaino.”" 
Romans2:25 Okwaroka nigo kogwenerete onye kore omoigweri bw’amachiko, korende onye kore omosaria bw’amachiko, okwaroka kwao kwabeire ogotaroka." 
Romans2:26 Karabe ere oyotarogeti okobwata amachiko, Inee, ogotaroka kwaye tigokobarwa ng’a kwabeire okwaroka?" 
Romans2:27 Ere oyotarogeti ase omobere, onye obwatete amachiko, Inee, tagokonachera ekina aye, oyore namachiko na okwaroka, naende osaririe amachiko?" 
Romans2:28 Naki ere oyore Omoyahudi ase isiko oka, tari Omoyahudi bw’ekeene, gose okwaroka koria gokorire isiko ase omobere, tikori okwaroka gw’ekeene." 
Romans2:29 Korende ere n’Omoyahudi bw’ekeene oyore Omoyahudi o ime, na okwaroka gw’ekeene nogw’enkoro. Eye nemeremo y’Omoika, teri ey’amariko. Ogotogigwa kwaye tikorueti ase mwanyabanto, korende nase Nyasae." 
Romans3:1 Gaki rende, Omoyahudi inki abuete abande? Na okwaroka inki kogwenerete?" 
Romans3:2 Nkogwenerete mono ase kera enchera. Ritang’ani, Abayahudi mbegenetwe konyora ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Romans3:3 Inki rende onye abande tibari abegenwa? Inee! Ogotegenwa kwabo nakonyare gokora obwegenwa bwa Nyasae bobe bosa? 
Romans3:4 Yaya, taibo! Goika Nyasae amanyekane ng’a nomonyene ekeene, nonya nkera omonto ore omorimo, buna erikire, “Erinde omanyekane ng’a mboronge ore ase amang’ana ao, na obue ekero ogosoa ase ekina.”" 
Romans3:5 Korende kerabe ng’a obobe bwaito bokoorokia oboronge bwa Nyasae, inki toratebe rende? Nyasae noyotari omoronge ekero akorenta endamwamu? (Nakwanire buna mwanyabanto)." 
Romans3:6 Yaya, taibo! Onye nabo, naki rende Nyasae aranyare kogambia ense?" 
Romans3:7 Korende onye oboene obonge bwa Nyasae bwamentekire ase obonene bwaye ase engencho y’oborimo bwane, nase ki inche nonya mbono nkona‐kogambigwa buna omonyene ebibe?" 
Romans3:8 Naki rende totagokora obobe, erinde obuya boche? Buna abande bagoteba ase ogotoitania. Okogambigwa kwabo nigo kore boronge." 
Romans3:9 Ninki rende? Intwe Abayahudi nabaya tore kobua abande? Yaya, nonya ng’ake! Naki twasoeire Abayahudi amo n’Abagiriki ng’a bonsi nigo bare inse y’okobua kw’ebibe;" 
Romans3:10 buna erikire ng’a, “Onde tari omonyene oboronge, nonya noyomo;" 
Romans3:11 onde tari okomanya, onde tari okorigia Nyasae." 
Romans3:12 Bonsi bachiire bogeka, bonsi babeire bosa; onde tari oyogokora amaya, nonya noyomo." 
Romans3:13 Emioyo yabo noboina bwasie, ase emenwa yabo nigo bagokwana obong’ainereria, obosongo bwe ching’iti nigo bore ase ebikoba bi’emenwa yabo." 
Romans3:14 Emenwa yabo yaichoirwe nokoragereria na obororo," 
Romans3:15 amagoro abo nigo are amaango ase ogoitera amanyinga," 
Romans3:16 obosareku na emechando nigo bire ase chinchera chiabo. 
Romans3:17 Enchera y’omorembe tibayemanyeti. 
Romans3:18 Okomoiroka Nyasae tikori ase amaiso abo.” 
Romans3:19 Twamanyire ng’a amang’ana onsi agokwanwa namachiko nigo agokwanwa ase baria bare inse y’amachiko, erinde kera omonwa osiekwe, na ense yonsi ebekweinse ase ekina kia Nyasae." 
Romans3:20 Naki ase ogokora kw’amachiko onde tari ase mwanyabanto oranyare konyora oboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae, ekiagera amachiko naro akorenta okomanya ebibe." 
Romans3:21 Korende bono oboronge bwa Nyasae bwaorokigwe machiko ataiyo, obwaberetwe kirori namachiko na ababani," 
Romans3:22 engencho yaye oboronge bokorwa ase Nyasae obo bogocha ase enchera y’okomwegena Yeso Kristo ase bonsi abegenete. Naki gwatananekana tikori," 
Romans3:23 ekiagera bonsi bakorire ebibe, na baremeirwe nobonene bwa Nyasae;" 
Romans3:24 baeirwe oboronge buna ekeegwa ase obuya bwaye, ase enchera y’okoboorigwa kore ime ase Kristo Yeso." 
Romans3:25 Ere Nyasae omobekire koba ekeng’wanso gi’okobwatania ase amanyinga aye, erinde tomonyore ase enchera y’okwegena. Igo Nyasae aorokirie oboronge bwaye, ekiagera ase okoremereria kwaye atigete ebibe biria biatang’anete." 
Romans3:26 Ekero ekeiga oorokirie ng’a ere nomonyene oboronge, naende nere okomoa oboronge oyo okomwegena Yeso." 
Romans3:27 Ng’ai rende ogwetogia gwaito kore? Gwasiekeirwe isiko. Ase ogochika ki? Ase ogochika kw’ogokora? Yaya, korende ase ogochika gw’okwegena." 
Romans3:28 Naboigo, tokobara ng’a omonto nigo akoegwa oboronge ase okwegena kore ao nogokora kw’amachiko." 
Romans3:29 Gose Nyasae nigo are Nyasae bw’Abayahudi boka? Tari Nyasae bw’Ebisaku boigo? Ee, Nyasae bw’Ebisaku boigo." 
Romans3:30 Naki Nyasae noyomo, oranyare koa baria barogete oboronge ase okwegena, na abwo batarogeti ase enchera y’okwegena." 
Romans3:31 Inee! Ntwaonchoire amachiko abe bosa ase okwegena okwo? Yaya, taibo! Nigo togwanchera amachiko." 
Romans4:1 Inki rende toratebe? Ibrahimu sokoro yaito bw’ororeria inki anyorete? 
Romans4:2 Ekiagera onye Ibrahimu oetwe oboronge ase engencho y’ogokora kwaye, nare neki agwetogeria, korende tari ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Romans4:3 Ninki amariko agoteba? “Ibrahimu nigo amwegenete Nyasae, na ase engencho eyio akabarwa koba omonyene oboronge.”" 
Romans4:4 Korende ase omonto oyogokora emeremo, eng’eria yaye teri kobarwa buna nobuya, korende nigo ekoba ogoakanwa ase emeremo yaye." 
Romans4:5 Ase omonto otari gosemeria ogokora kw’emeremo yaye, korende nigo egenete ere oria okoa abanyabibe oboronge, okwegena kwaye omonto oyio kwamobarire ng’a nare noboronge." 
Romans4:6 Naboigo Daudi agoteba, ng’a nasesenirie omonto oria ere Nyasae abarire koba noboronge atari nogokora kw’amachiko," 
Romans4:7 “Mbasesenirie abaabeirwe ebibe biabo, abwo ebibe biabo biatubirwe." 
Romans4:8 Nasesenirie omonto oria Omonene atabarereti ebibe biaye.” 
Romans4:9 Inee! Ogosesenigwa oko nigo kore ase abwo barogete, gose nase abwo batarogeti boigo? Nigo togoteba, ng’a Ibrahimu ase okwegena kwaye akabarerwa ng’a nare noboronge." 
Romans4:10 Indi abareretwe ayio? Nekero konya arokire gose nekero konya atararoka? Tari ekero konya arokire, korende nekero konya atararoka." 
Romans4:11 Ere nigo anyorete ekiorokererio eke gi’okwaroka buna ekemanyererio ki’oboronge bw’okwegena arenge naborobwo rigoro atararoka, anyare koba ise o bonsi abegenete, nonya tibarogeti, erinde babarerwe oboronge." 
Romans4:12 Naboigo akaba ise bw’abarogete, tari ng’a barogete rioka, korende boigo abagotunyana chimbaratero chi’okwegena kwaye sokoro yaito Ibrahimu, oko arenge nakorokwo ekero konya atararoka." 
Romans4:13 Naki eira eria Ibrahimu aetwe amo noroiboro rwaye ng’a naire omwando bw’ense, tiyarwete ase amachiko korende ase oboronge obwo anyorete ase okwegena." 
Romans4:14 Naki onye baria b’amachiko mbarabwo abanyamwando, rirorio okwegena kwabeire okwa bosa, na eira yabeire teri gento." 
Romans4:15 Ekiagera ogochika nakwo gokorenta endamwamu; na aase ogochika gotari, komocha tikoiyo." 
Romans4:16 Ase engencho eyio eira eye nigo yanyoretwe ase okwegena, ebe ase enchera y’amabera, erinde enyare koba eng’ikeranu ase oroiboro rwaye rwonsi, tari ase baria b’amachiko boka korende nase baria bare nokwegena buna okwa Ibrahimu. Ere nere tata oito intwe twensi," 
Romans4:17 buna erikire ng’a, “Nakobekire obe ise bw’ebisaku ebinge”. Eira eye nigo yaikeranire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, ere oyo Ibrahimu egenete, Nyasae oyokobokia abakure, naende aatora ebinto bitaiyo buna mbireo." 
Romans4:18 Ere akeegena ase ogosemeria ase ayatanyare gosemerigwa, erinde abe ise bw’ebisaku ebinge, buna atebetigwe, “Naboigo oroiboro rwao rorabe.”" 
Romans4:19 Tabete omworo ase okwegena, ekero aroche ng’a omobere oye obeire ang’e nogokwa, ekiagera konya okoorire emiaka koreng’ana rigana erimo, na enda ya Sara egombaete;" 
Romans4:20 gose tabete na tang’u‐tang’u chinde ase eira eria ya Nyasae ase ogotegena, korende nigo abegetwe chinguru ase okwegena kwaye, akamotogia Nyasae." 
Romans4:21 Akamanya boronge ng’a Nyasae nanyare gokora aria arierete eira. 
Romans4:22 Ase ayio ase okwegena kwaye “akabarerwa ng’a nare noboronge.” 
Romans4:23 Korende amang’ana aya “akabarerwa ng’a nare noboronge” tarigetwe ase engencho yaye bweka," 
Romans4:24 korende nase engencho yaito boigo. Nonya nintwe ntoche kobarerwa boigo, intwe abatwamwegenire ere oyomobogetie Yeso, Omonene oito, korwwa ase abakure," 
Romans4:25 oyoruetwe ase ogokwa ase engencho y’ebibe biaito, na akabokigwa ekiagera otorenteire oboronge." 
Romans5:1 Ase igo ekero twaeirwe oboronge ase okwegena, ntore nomorembe na Nyasae goetera ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
Romans5:2 Goetera asare twaigoreirwe enchera ase okwegena goikera ase obuya obo toteneine ime yaye, naende nigo tokogoka ase ogosemeria kw’obonene bwa Nyasae." 
Romans5:3 Gose tari igo rioka, korende nigo tokogoka nonya nase emechando yaito, ekiagera ntomanyete ng’a emechando nigo ekorenta oboremereria;" 
Romans5:4 na oboremereria nigo bokorenta oboremu bw’omoyo, na oboremu bw’omoyo nigo bokorenta ogosemeria." 
Romans5:5 Na ogosemeria tikori gotorentera obosooku, ekiagera obwanchani bwa Nyasae bwaichorigwe ase chinkoro chiaito n’Omoika Omochenu, oyo twaetwe." 
Romans5:6 Amaene ekero totarenge ne chinguru, ekero engaki yaigete, Kristo agakwa ase engencho y’abanyabibe." 
Romans5:7 Naki naakong’u omonto gokwa ribaga ri’omonto omonyene oboronge, korende nanyarekane omonto koremereria gokwa ribaga ri’omonto omuya." 
Romans5:8 Korende Nyasae oorokirie obwanchani bwaye asetore ase ogotoma Kristo gokwa ase engencho yaito, ekero twarenge abanyene ebibe." 
Romans5:9 Naboigo kobua mono, gatwaeirwe oboronge ase amanyinga aye, ere natotoorie korwa ase endamwamu ya Nyasae." 
Romans5:10 Naki ekero twarenge ababisa ba Nyasae, tokabwatanigwa nere ase amakweri ’Omwana oye. Kobua mono, nyuma gatwabwatanigwe natotoorigwe ase obogima bwaye;" 
Romans5:11 gose tari igo rioka, korende nigo tokogoka ase Nyasae ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo ere asare twanyorire okobwatanigwa." 
Romans5:12 Ase ayio, buna ase engencho y’omonto oyomo ebibe bigasoa ase ense, na ase engencho y’ebibe amakweri, naboigo amakweri agaikera abanto bonsi, ekiagera bonsi bakorire ebibe." 
Romans5:13 Naki ebibe nao biarenge ase ense amachiko atarabekwa, korende ebibe tibikobarwa amachiko ataiyo." 
Romans5:14 Korende amakweri nigo agambete korwa Adamu goika Musa, nonya nigoro y’abwo batakorete ebibe koreng’ana nogosaria kw’Adamu, oyorenge omogwekano bw’oyio ogochi‐gocha." 
Romans5:15 Korende ekeegwa keria ki’amabera tikeri buna ogosaria koria. Naki ase ogosaria kw’omonto oyomo abange bagakwa, korende amabera a Nyasae na ekeegwa eke ki’amabera biamentekire kobua mono ase abange ase omonto oyomo Yeso Kristo." 
Romans5:16 Ekeegwa keria ki’amabera tikeri buna ogosaria kw’omonto oyomo, ekiagera ekina keria nigo giachete ase enchera y’ogosaria okomo, gekarenta okogambigwa, korende ekeegwa keria ki’amabera kegacha ase engencho y’ogosaria okonge, gekarenta oboronge." 
Romans5:17 Onye ase ogosaria kw’omonto oyomo amakweri agambete ase engencho y’omonto oria oyomo, kobua mono abwo banyorire amabera amange na ekeegwa ki’oboronge nabagambe ase obogima goetera ase omonto oyomo, Yeso Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Naboigo, buna ase ogosaria kw’omonto oyomo abanto bonsi bakanacherwa ekina, ee, naboigo ase ogokora kw’oboronge kw’omonto oyoma, abanto bonsi bakaegwa oboronge na obogima." 
Romans5:19 Naki buna ase ogotaigwera kw’omonto oyomo abange bagakorwa koba abanyene ebibe, naboigo ase okogwera kw’omonto oyomo abange nabakorwe koba abanyene oboronge." 
Romans5:20 Amachiko agasoa, erinde ogosaria kobe okonene mono. Korende aase ebibe biamentegete, amabera akamenteka akaba amange kobua," 
Romans5:21 erinde, buna ebibe biagambete ase amakweri, naboigo ase enchera y’oboronge amabera agambe goika obogima bwa kare na kare goetera ase Yeso Kristo, Omonene oito." 
Romans6:1 Ninki rende toratebe? Togenderere ase ebibe, erinde amabera amenteke abe amange kobua?" 
Romans6:2 Yaya, taibo! Intwe abatwakure korwa ase ebibe, naki toranyare komenya ase ebibe naende?" 
Romans6:3 Timomanyeti ng’a intwe twensi abatwabatisetwe ase Kristo Yeso nigo twabatisetwe ase amakweri aye? 
Romans6:4 Naboigo twatindegetwe amo nere ase enchera y’ebatiso ase amakweri, erinde buna Kristo abogetigwe korwa ase abakure ase obonene bwa Ise, naboigo naintwe, totaare ase obogima oboyia." 
Romans6:5 Naki onye twabwatanire nere ase amakweri buna ayaye, naboigo torabwatane nere ase okobokigwa buna okwaye." 
Romans6:6 Twamanyire ng’a obomwanyabanto bwaito bwa kare nigo bwabambetwe amo nere, erinde omobere bw’ebibe osirigwe, titoba abasomba b’ebibe naende." 
Romans6:7 Naki ere oyokure osiboirwe korwa ase ebibe. 
Romans6:8 Korende onye twakwete amo na Kristo, twegenire ng’a natobe moyo amo nere." 
Romans6:9 Twamanyire ng’a Kristo oyobogetigwe korwa ase abakure tagokwa naende; amakweri takomogambera naende. 
Romans6:10 Ase ogokwa koria akwete nigo akwerete ebibe ara rimo rioka, korende obogima boria are nabwo nigo are nabwo ase Nyasae." 
Romans6:11 Naboigo nainwe mwebare ng’a mwabeire abakure ase ebibe, korende mwabeire moyo ase Nyasae ime ase Kristo Yeso." 
Romans6:12 Bono timotiga ebibe bigambe ime ase emebere yaino eyekonyorekana namakweri, na timobaisa koigwera okogania kwabo okobe." 
Romans6:13 Timobaisa korua ebiimo biaino bikore ebibe buna ebikorero bi’obobe, korende mwerue abanyene ase Nyasae buna abanto barusetigwe korwa ase ogokwa na babekirwe ase obogima, na ebiimo biaino ase Nyasae bibe ebikorero bi’oboronge." 
Romans6:14 Naki ebibe tibikobagambera inwe, ekiagera timori inse y’amachiko korende inse y’amabera." 
Romans6:15 Ninki rende? Tokore ebibe ekiagera totari inse y’amachiko korende inse y’amabera? Yaya taibo! 
Romans6:16 Timomanyeti ng’a onye mwerure ase omonto onde koba abasomba baye na komoigwera, nigo more abasomba baye ere oria moigwerete, onye nobosomba bw’ebibe obokoraa gochia ase amakweri, gose obosomba bw’okoigwera obokoraa gochia ase oboronge?" 
Romans6:17 Korende Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera inwe, abamwarenge abasomba b’ebibe, mwabeire abaigweri ase chinkoro chiaino ase okworokereria koria mwaetwe," 
Romans6:18 na ekero mwasiboretwe korwa ase ebibe mogakorwa koba abasomba b’oboronge. 
Romans6:19 Nigo ngokwana buna engencho ya mwanyabanto ase engencho y’oboreu bwaino bwa mwanyabanto, Naki koreng’ana buna inwe ritang’ani mwaruete ebiimo biaino bibe ebisomba bi’obonyaka na ase ogosaria okonene mono, naboigo na bono karue ebiimo biaino bikorere oboronge, monyare gokorwa koba abachenu." 
Romans6:20 Naki ekero mwarenge abasomba b’ebibe nigo mwarenge abasibore korwa ase oboronge. 
Romans6:21 Nkwama ki rende mwanyorete korwa ase ebinto biria bikobarentera obosooku bono? Naki omoerio bw’ebinto ebi namakweri. 
Romans6:22 Korende bono ekero mwasiboirwe korwa ase ebibe na gokorwa koba abasomba ba Nyasae, okwama kwaino more nakwo noko, ng’a mokorwe koba abachenu, na omoerio oye nobogima bwa kare na kare." 
Romans6:23 Naki eng’eria y’ebibe namakweri, korende ekeegwa kia Nyasae nobogima bwa kare na kare ase Kristo Yeso, Omonene oito." 
Romans7:1 Timomanyeti, baminto (inche nigo ngokwana nabwo bamanyete amachiko) ng’a amachiko nigo akogambera omonto ekero are moyo?" 
Romans7:2 Naki omokungu onyuomire igo asibire namachiko ase omosacha oye, ekero ere are moyo, korende omosacha oye karakwe, rirorio osiboirwe korwa ase amachiko aria amosibete ase omosacha oria." 
Romans7:3 Naboigo ekero omosacha oye are moyo, aise koba nomosacha onde nigo akorokwa omotomani; korende omosacha oye karakwe, rirorio osiboirwe korwa ase amachiko ayio. Naisa konyuomwa nomosacha onde, takorokwa omotomani." 
Romans7:4 Naboigo baminto, nainwe mwakwereire amachiko ase enchera y’omobere o Kristo, erinde monyare koba ab’omoao, abaye ere oyobogetigwe korwa ase abakure, erinde tomwamere Nyasae okwama." 
Romans7:5 Naki ekero twarenge ime y’engencho yaito y’ebibe okogania gwaito kw’ebibe gokaboka ase engencho y’amachiko, kogakora emeremo ase ebiimo biaito goika tokaamera amakweri okwama." 
Romans7:6 Korende bono twasiboirwe korwa ase amachiko, twakwereire ayatosibete, erinde tonyare gokorera ase obogima oboyia bw’Omoika, tari inse y’amachiko a kare ayarikire." 
Romans7:7 Ninki rende toratebe? Amachiko nebibe? Yaya, taibo! Korende tinare komanya ebibe onye amachiko atarengeo; naki tinare komanya okogania okobe, onye ogochika gotagoteba, “Toba nokogania okobe.”" 
Romans7:8 Korende ebibe bikanyora ribaga ase ogochika koria, bikabokia ime asende chingencho chionsi chi’okogania okobe. Ase amachiko atari, rirorio ebibe mbikwete." 
Romans7:9 Inche iga narenge moyo agwo ritang’ani ekero ntarenge namachiko, korende ekero ogochika koria gwachete, ebibe bikaboka, na inche ngakwa." 
Romans7:10 Ogochika koria gw’okong’a obogima, gokarorekana gokondetera amakweri." 
Romans7:11 Naki ebibe bikanyora ribaga ase ogochika koria, bikang’aina, na ase korokwo bikang’ita." 
Romans7:12 Naboigo amachiko namachenu, na ogochika nogochenu, na okwa boronge, na okuya." 
Romans7:13 Bono inee, riria erire rigiya ndiabeire amakweri asende? Yaya, taibo! Ebibe bikang’ita ase enchera y’erire rigiya, erio ebibe birorekane ng’a nebibe, erinde ase ogochika koria ebibe bimenteke koba bitari nekerengo." 
Romans7:14 Naki twamanyire ng’a amachiko nay’Omoika, korende inche nomonto bw’engencho y’ebibe; nigo naoonetigwe inse ase obosomba bw’ebibe." 
Romans7:15 Naki timanyeti aya ngokora, ekiagera aya nyanchete, tindi koyakora, korende aya ngechete naro ngokora." 
Romans7:16 Korende onye ngokora aya ntancheti, rirorio nanchire ng’a amachiko namaya." 
Romans7:17 Ase ayio, bono tari inche nkoyakora, korende nebibe biria bimenyete ime asende." 
Romans7:18 Naki namanyire ng’a ime asende, ase engencho yane y’obobe, kende kiya tikeiyo; okorigia kw’ogokora okuya nkoreo, korende tinkonyara kogokora." 
Romans7:19 Naki keria kere ekiya nyanchete, tindi kogekora, korende keria kere ekebe ntancheti, nakio ngokora." 
Romans7:20 Onye ngokora keria ntancheti, bono tari inche nkogekora, korende nebibe biria bimenyete ime asende." 
Romans7:21 Narorire ogochika oko, ng’a kondigetie gokora ekere ekiya, ekere ekebe nigo kenyesungetie." 
Romans7:22 Naki nigo ngosasoka mono ase omoyo one ase engencho y’amachiko a Nyasae," 
Romans7:23 korende ase ebiimo biane narorire ogochika konde nkoreo, gokorwana esegi nogochika gw’okomanya kwane na kogonkora koba omosakorwa bw’ogochika koria kw’ebibe kore ase ebiimo biane." 
Romans7:24 Obobe nobwane inche mwanyabanto! Ning’o oransibore korwa ase omobere oyo bw’amakweri? 
Romans7:25 Namoakeire Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase Yeso Kristo Omonene oito! Naki inche omonyene ase okomanya kwane nigo ngokorera amachiko a Nyasae, korende ase engencho y’obobe bwane nigo ngokorera amachiko ’ebibe." 
Romans8:1 Na bono kogambigwa tikori ase abwo bare ime ase Kristo Yeso. 
Romans8:2 Naki ogochika kw’Omoika bw’obogima boria bore ime ase Kristo Yeso gwansiboire korwa ase ogochika kw’ebibe na amakweri. 
Romans8:3 Naki aya amachiko atare konyara gokora, ekiagera nigo arenge amareu ase engencho y’ebibe bi’emebere ya mwanyabanto, Nyasae agakora ase ogotoma Omwana oye omonyene ase omogwekano bw’engencho yaito y’ebibe, na ase engencho y’ebibe, akagambia ebibe ase omobere oye o mwanyabanto," 
Romans8:4 erinde ekerigirie ime ase amachiko geikeranigwe ime yaito, aba totari gotunyana chingencho chiaito chi’ebibe, korende chingencho chi’Omoika." 
Romans8:5 Baria bagotunyana chingencho chiabo chi’ebibe nigo barengereretie chingencho chi’ebibe, korende baria bagotunyana chingencho chi’Omoika nigo barengereretie chingencho chi’Omoika." 
Romans8:6 Naki okorengereria kw’engencho y’ebibe namakweri, korende okorengereria kw’engencho y’Omoika nobogima na omorembe." 
Romans8:7 Naki okorengereria koria kw’engencho y’ebibe nobobisa igoro ase Nyasae, ekiagera tikori gwancha koigwera amachiko a Nyasae, gose tikori koyaigwera nonya ng’ake." 
Romans8:8 Abagotunyana chingencho chi’ebibe tibakonyara kogwenera Nyasae. 
Romans8:9 Onye Omoika o Nyasae omenyete ime yaino, rirorio timori gotunyana chingencho chi’ebibe, korende chingencho chi’Omoika. Onde bwensi otari n’Omoika o Kristo, oyio tari omonto oye." 
Romans8:10 Na Kristo karabe ime yaino, nonya emebere yaino ekwete ase engencho y’ebibe, emeika yaino moyo ere ase engencho y’oboronge obo mwanyorete." 
Romans8:11 Korende onye Omoika oye ere oyobogetie Yeso korwa ase abakure omenyete ime yaino, ere oyobogetie Kristo Yeso korwa ase abakure nabokie na emebere yaino eranyorekane namakweri, ase engencho y’Omoika oyomenyete ime yaino." 
Romans8:12 Naboigo baminto, igo tore abasira, korende tari ase chingencho chiaito chi’ebibe, ase ogotunyana chingencho chi’ebibe," 
Romans8:13 naki komoratunyane chingencho chi’ebibe, nigo morakwe, korende komoraite ogokora kw’omobere ase chinguru chi’Omoika, namobe moyo." 
Romans8:14 Naki bonsi abakoraagwa n’Omoika o Nyasae, abwo nabwo abana ba Nyasae." 
Romans8:15 Naki timwanyorete omoika oyo obakorire koba abasomba na korenta obwoba, korende nigo mwanyorete Omoika oyo obakorire koba abana ba Nyasae. Igo torera, “Abba!” Engencho yaye “Tata!”" 
Romans8:16 Omoika omonyene obeire kirori amo nemeika yaito, ng’a intwe nabana ba Nyasae." 
Romans8:17 Onye tore abana, naboigo tore abanyamwando, abanyamwando ba Nyasae, abaraire omwando amo na Kristo, gatorachandwe amo nere, erinde tonyore obonene amo nere." 
Romans8:18 Nabarire emechando y’ekero kia bono, ng’a teri gento onye ekoreng’anigwa nobonene boria bogocha koorokigwa asetore." 
Romans8:19 Nabo ebitongwa bionsi nigo biganyete nokogania okonene mono ase rituko riria abana ba Nyasae bagocha koorokigwa. 
Romans8:20 Naki ebitongwa bionsi nigo biabegetwe inse y’engencho ya bosa, tari ase ogwancha kwabo, korende ase ogwancha kwaye ere oyobibegete ase ogosemeria," 
Romans8:21 ekiagera ebitongwa ebinyene nabisiborwe korwa ase obosibwa bwabo bw’ogosareka, bisoe ime ase ogosiborwa kw’obonene bw’abana ba Nyasae." 
Romans8:22 Naki twamanyire ng’a ebitongwa bionsi nigo bire nogwechanda, naende nigo bire nobororo nonya ngoika bono," 
Romans8:23 gose tari igo rioka, korende nonya nintwe abanyene abatore nogotongorwa kw’Omoika, nigo togwechanda ase emioyo yaito, gatoganyete gokorwa koba abana ba Nyasae, engencho yaye okoboorigwa kw’emebere yaito." 
Romans8:24 Naki nigo twatooretigwe ase ogosemeria. Korende egento keria gesemeirie gokiarorekanire, rirorio gosemeria tikori. Naki ning’o orasemerie eki aroche?" 
Romans8:25 Korende gatorasemerie egento totarakerora, nigo togokeganya ase oboremereria." 
Romans8:26 Naboigo n’Omoika noro nigo ogotokonya ase oboreu bwaito. Naki titomanyeti gosaba buna etogwenerete, korende Omoika omonyene nigo ogotosabera ase ogwechanda ogotanyare gokwanwa." 
Romans8:27 Na ere oyokoriga‐rigia chinkoro chi’abanto, namanyete okorengereria kw’Omoika, ekiagera Omoika oyo nigo ogosabera abachenu buna Nyasae anchete." 
Romans8:28 Na twamanyire ng’a Nyasae nigo agokora amang’ana onsi amo na baria bamwanchete, erio abanyorere amaya, baria barangerigwe ase omoroberio oye." 
Romans8:29 Naki baria amanyete korwa kare akabachora korwa kare, bareng’anigwe nomogwekano bw’Omwana oye, erinde ere abe omotangi bw’abamwabo abange." 
Romans8:30 Na baria achorete korwa kare, abwo akabarangeria boigo; na baria arangeretie, abwo akabaa oboronge boigo; na baria aete oboronge akabaa obonene boigo." 
Romans8:31 Ninki rende toratebe ase ayio? Onye Nyasae ore ensemo yaito, ning’o oranyare gotobua?"
