Romans8:32 Ere otarorerete Omwana oye amabera, korende akamorua ase engencho yaito intwe twensi, naki aramoche gotoa ebinto bionsi amo nere?" 
Romans8:33 Ning’o oranyare gosoera abachore ba Nyasae? Nyasae nere okobaa oboronge. 
Romans8:34 Ning’o oranyare kobanachera ekina? Kristo Yeso nere okwete, ee, na kobua ase aya obokigwe korwa ase abakure; ere nigo are ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae, naende nere ogotosabera." 
Romans8:35 Ning’o oratwatanane korwa ase obwanchani bwa Kristo? Inee! Nogochandwa, gose nobororo, gose nokorosigwa, gose nenchara, gose ngesobono, gose nobobe, gose nomoro?" 
Romans8:36 Buna erikire, “Ase engencho yao nigo togoitwa omobaso boira; twabarirwe koba buna ching’ondi chigocha konyenwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Korende ase amang’ana aya onsi twabeire ababui, na goetania ababui, goetera asare oyotwanchete." 
Romans8:38 Ninde nobomaene bw’okomanya, ng’a nonya namakweri, nonya nobogima, nonya nabamalaika, nonya nabare ne chinguru, nonya nebinto ebireo, nonya nebi gochi‐gocha, nonya nokobua," 
Romans8:39 nonya nayare igoro, nonya nayare inse, nonya negetongwa kende gionsi, tibikonyara gotwatanana korwa ase obwanchani bwa Nyasae obore ime ase Kristo Yeso Omonene oito." 
Romans9:1 Nigo ngokwana ekeene ase Kristo, tindi goteba oborimo. Okomanya gw’enkoro yane ime, gokwamorekirwe n’Omoika Omochenu, kwambereire korori," 
Romans9:2 ng’a ninde nobororo obonge na ogwechanda kogendererete ase enkoro yane. 
Romans9:3 Naki nanga naganetie ng’a ndagererigwe inche omonyene na gwatananwa korwa ase Kristo ase engencho y’abaminto abare b’eamate yane ase egesaku giaito. 
Romans9:4 Barabwo n’Abaisraeli, bakorirwe koba abana ba Nyasae, barorire, obonene, bancheirwe okobwatana, baeirwe amachiko ne ribaga ri’ogosasima Nyasae, baeirwe ne chiira chiaye." 
Romans9:5 Naki abagaaka baito ba kare nababo, na korwa asebare Kristo nao aiboretwe buna mwanyabanto; ere nigo are Nyasae igoro ase ebinto bionsi, oyorabakwe goika kare na kare. Amina." 
Romans9:6 Tari ng’a ring’ana ria Nyasae ndiasinyire goikeranigwa. Naki tari bonsi abare ab’egesaku ki’Abaisraeli bare Abaisraeli b’ekene; 
Romans9:7 gose tari bonsi bare abana ba Ibrahimu ekiagera baruete ase oroiboro rwaye, otatiga, “Ase Isaka oroiboro rwao narwatorwe.”" 
Romans9:8 Engencho yaye, tari abana b’ororeria bare abana ba Nyasae, korende nabana b’eira bakobarwa ng’a noroiboro rwaye." 
Romans9:9 Nake ring’ana ri’eira neri, “Ekero kenga buna eke ninchiche, inyore ng’a Sara onyorire omwana omoisia.”" 
Romans9:10 Gose tari igo rioka, korende Rebeka nere nabogoretie oborito ase omosacha oyomo, nere Isaka sokoro yaito." 
Romans9:11 Naki ekero abana baria konya bataraiborwa na batarakora amaya gose amabe, ng’ina nigo atebetigwe, “Oyo omonene nakorere oyo omoke.” Igo omoroberio o Nyasae bw’ogochora goika ogenderere, tari ase engencho y’ogokora kw’abanto, korende ase okorangeria kwaye." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Naki igo erikire, “Namwanchire Yakobo, korende namogechire Esau.”" 
Romans9:14 Ninki rende toratebe? Ogotaba boronge nkore ase Nyasae? Yaya, taibo!" 
Romans9:15 Naki nigo atebetie Musa, “Nimororere amabera ere oyo ndarorere amabera, na nimororere amabeebe ere oyo ndarorere amabeebe.”" 
Romans9:16 Ase igo, tari ng’a nigo ere ase ogwancha kw’omonto, gose nokw’oria ogokora omokia, korende nokw’oria okororera amabera, nere Nyasae." 
Romans9:17 Naki amariko nigo agoteba ase Farao, “Nigo nagotenenetie, erinde nyorokie okobua kwane asore, na erieta riane nario rirararigwe ase ense yonsi.”" 
Romans9:18 Ase igo, oyo arigetie kororera amabera, nigo akomororera amabera, na oyo arigetie gokora abe omokong’u ase enkoro yaye, nigo akomokora abe omokong’u." 
Romans9:19 Aande gose nontebie, “Nase ki nonya mbono Nyasae akonyora okomocha ase mwanyabanto? Naki ning’o oranyare koamereria okorigia kwaye?”" 
Romans9:20 Mwanyabanto, aye naye ng’o okoiraneria Nyasae? Inee! Egento getongire nakemotebie oyogetongete, “Ninki gwankorerete iga?”" 
Romans9:21 Gose omokori chinyongo tari nokobua igoro ase esike, ase ribomba ri’esike gokora egento ekemo eki’ogosikwa, na ekende kebe getari nogosikwa?" 
Romans9:22 Naki rende onye Nyasae okorigia koorokia endamwamu yaye, na komanyia abanto okobua kwaye, na ase oboremereria obonge akabogorerania nebinto biria bi’endamwamu biakorirwe ase ogosareka," 
Romans9:23 erinde aorokie obonda bw’obonene bwaye, ase ebinto biria bi’amabera ebiaroisetie korwa kare binyore obonene?" 
Romans9:24 Abwo nintwe, twarangeretigwe nere, tari korwa ase Abayahudi boka, korende nonya nkorwa ase abanto b’Ebisaku boigo." 
Romans9:25 Naboigo akwanete ase ebuku ya Hosea, “Abanto baria batarenge abanto baane, nimbaroke abanto baane; na oyotarenge omwanchwa one, nimoroke omwanchwa one.”" 
Romans9:26 “Nabe aase aria barabwo batebetigwe: Inwe timori abanto baane, abwo babarije ababa ba Nyasae ore moyo.”" 
Romans9:27 Isaya nere ogoaka eriogi riaye igoro y’Abaisraeli, ogoteba, “Omobaro bw’Abaisraeli nonya bare buna omokenye ore nyancha, abatigarete nabwo boka barache gotoorigwa;" 
Romans9:28 naki Omonene nache ase ense agambe ekina, akenache na kogekoora.”" 
Romans9:29 Naende buna Isaya atang’anete gokwana. “Onye Omonene bw’Emeganda atatotigerete oroiboro, nanga nigo twabete buna Sodomu, na koreng’anigwa na Gomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Ninki rende toratebe? Ng’a abanto b’Ebisaku, abatarenge korigia oboronge mbanyorete oboronge boria bw’okwegena;" 
Romans9:31 korende Abaisraeli abare korigia oboronge bokorwa ase amachiko, tibaikerete oboronge boria." 
Romans9:32 Nase ki? Ekiagera tibarenge koborigia ase enchera y’okwegena, korende nase enchera y’ogokora, Bakagochwa igoro ase rigena riria rikogocha;" 
Romans9:33 buna erikire, “Rigereria, nabekire ase Sayoni rigena riragoche abanto, na egetare kerabaiyerie inse, na onde bwensi oramwegene takorora obosooku.”" 
Romans10:1 Baminto okogania gw’enkoro yane na ogosaba kwane ase Nyasae ase engencho y’Abaisraeli nakwo oko, ng’a batoorigwe." 
Romans10:2 Naki nababereire kirori, ng’a mbare nomokia ase Nyasae, korende ase omokia obo tibari nobong’ani." 
Romans10:3 Naki kobarabe tibamanyeti oboronge bokorwa ase Nyasae, naende bakorigia goikerania oboronge bwabo abanyene, igo tibebegeti inse ase oboronge bwa Nyasae." 
Romans10:4 Naki Kristo nere ore omoerio bw’amachiko, erinde onde bwensi oyoramwegene anyore oboronge." 
Romans10:5 Naki Musa nigo arigete igoro y’oboronge obo bokorua ase amachiko, ng’a omonto oyorakore aya nabe nobogima ase aya." 
Romans10:6 Korenda oboronge boria bokonyorekana ase okwegena nigo bogoteba iga: Toteba ase enkoro yao ime, “Ning’o oragende gochia igore” (engencho yaye nokorenta Kristo inse aa);" 
Romans10:7 gose, “Ning’o oranyare kogenda aike inse ase eora y’abakure?” (Engencho yaye nokorenta Kristo igoro korwa ase abakure)." 
Romans10:8 Korende, naki bogoteba? Ring’ana riria nigo rire ang’e naye, ase omonwa oo, na ime ase enkoro yao (eri nering’ana ri’okwegena, nidiria tokorandia)." 
Romans10:9 Ekiagera koraorokie nomonwa oo, ng’a Yeso nere Omonene, na kwegena ime ase enkoro yao ng’a Nyasae namobogetie korwa ase abakure, notoorigwe." 
Romans10:10 Naki ase enkoro omonto nigo akwegena, erio onyora oboronge; na ase omonwa oorokia, erio onyora ogotooreka." 
Romans10:11 Amariko nigo agoteba, “Onde bwensi oramwegene takeorora obosooku.”" 
Romans10:12 Naki gwatananeka tikori ase Abayahudi na Abagiriki, ekiageai ase Abayahudi na Abaginiki, ekiagera Omonene nigo are Omonene o bonsi, na obonda bwaye nigo akoa abanto bonsi abakomorangeria." 
Romans10:13 Ekiagera, “Onde bwensi orarangerie erieta ri’Omonene natoorigwe.”" 
Romans10:14 Inee! Naki baramorangerie ere bataramwegena? Naende naki baramwegene oyo batana koigwa amang’ana igoro yare? Naende naki baraigwe batari nomorandia? 
Romans10:15 Naende naki bararandie batatomiri? Buna erikire, “Naki amagoro abo are amaseera, baria bakorandia amang’ana amaya!”" 
Romans10:16 Korende tari bonsi baigwerete enchili. Naki Isaya nigo agoteba, “Omonene, ning’o bwegenire aya aigure korwa asetore?”" 
Romans10:17 Ase ayio, okwegena nigo kogocha ase enchera y’okoigwa, na aya tokoigwa nigo agocha korwa ase ring’ana ria Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Korende nkoboria nde: Inee! Barabwo tibaigwete? Ee, mbaigwete, “Eriogi riabo riagendire, riesiareire ase ense engima, na amang’ana abo aikire chinsinyo chionsi chi’ense aase abanto bamenyete,”" 
Romans10:19 Naende nkoboria nde: Inee! Abaisraeli tibamanyete? Agwo ritang’ani Musa nigo agoteba, “Nimbakore mobe ne ribero ase abanto batari egesaku, ase egesaku kere ekeriri nigo ndababeyie,”" 
Romans10:20 Na Isaya nare noboremu bw’ogoteba, “Nigo nanyorekanete nabatare kondigia; nkeorokia ase abatare kong’itaa.”" 
Romans10:21 Korende ase Abaisraeli nigo agoteba, “Omobaso boira nigo nare kobaramborera amaboko aane abanto batari abaigweri korende abaamereria.”" 
Romans11:1 Ase igo nkoboria nde: Inee! Nyasae igo aangete abanto baye? Yaya, taibo! Inche omonyene n’Omoisraeli nde, oyomo bw’oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu, omonto bw’ororeria rwa Benjamin." 
Romans11:2 Nyasae tangeti abanto baye baria amanyete korwa kare. Gose timomanyeti aya amariko agoteba igoro y’Elija, buna akweng’ereria ase Nyasae igoro y’Abaisraeli?" 
Romans11:3 “Omonene, baitire ababani bao, batagoire egesasimero kiao, ninche bweka natigaire, na barabwo nkorigia bare obogima bwane babosirie.”" 
Romans11:4 Korende okoiraneria kwa Nyasae naki gokomotebia? “Ninde nabanto chilifu isano na ibere batabegete amaru inse ase Baali.” 
Romans11:5 Nabo ekero kia bono mbare abatigari abachorirwe ase obuya bwa Nyasae. 
Romans11:6 Korende onye nase obuya, rirorio tibokoba ase ogokora, onye taibo, obuya tibokoba obuya." 
Romans11:7 Naki rende abeire? Egento keria Abaisraeli baare korigia tibakenyorete, Baria bachoretwe, mbarabwo bakenyorete, korende abatigarete bagakorwa koba abakong’u ase chinkoro chiabo," 
Romans11:8 buna erikiere, “Nyasae akabaa omoika bwe chitoro, na amaiso atanyare korora, na amato atanyare koigwa, goika rero iga,”" 
Romans11:9 Na Daudi nigo agoteba, “Tiga endagera yabo ebe egesugunia na oboreba, na egento gekobagocha, na ogoakanwa kwabo." 
Romans11:10 Tiga amaiso abo abekwe omosunte tibarora. Obakumbe emegongo yabo botambe!” 
Romans11:11 Bono nkoboria nde, “Inee! Nigo bagochirwe goika bagure kegima?” Yaya, taibo! Korende ase ogosaria kwabo ogotooreka gwaikeire abanto b’Ebisaku, erinde Abaisraeli bakorwe babe ne ribero." 
Romans11:12 Bono onye ogosaria kwabo kwaeire abanto b’ense eye obonda, na onye okobugwa kwabo kwaeire abanto b’Ebisaku obonda, Inee, tari kobua mono oboikeranu bwabo?" 
Romans11:13 Bono ngokwana nde nainwe abanto b’Ebisaku. Koreng’ana buna inde omotomwa bw’abanto b’Ebisaku, nabarire ng’a obosomba bwane negento ekenene," 
Romans11:14 erinde inyare kobeka abare amanyinga ayamo nainche ribero, na gotooria abande babo." 
Romans11:15 Naki onye okwangwa kwabo gokorenta okobwatania ase ense, Inee, ogwancherwa kwabo inki korarente? Nigo gokorenta obogima ribaga ri’ogokwa." 
Romans11:16 Naende onye ensemo ye ritang’ani ye ribomba ri’obosie ere enchenu, naboigo ne ribomba rionsi rire; na onye ritina rire richenu, naboigo ne chinsagia chire." 
Romans11:17 Korende onye chinsagia chinde chiabunekire, na aye oyokwarwete ase omozeituni bw’orosana gwachomirwe ase ribaga riabo, okaba oyomo bwe ritina ri’omozeituni, na konyora obonoru bwaye." 
Romans11:18 Tibwetogia igoro ase chinsagia chiria. Onye kogwetogia, inyora ng’a tari aye oimogetie ritina, korende neritina rikoimogetie aye." 
Romans11:19 Bono notebe, “Chinsagia nigo chiabunegete, erinde nchomwe aroro.”" 
Romans11:20 Ee, ayio namaene. Barabwo mbabunegete ase ogotegena kwabo, korende aye nigo oteneine ase okwegena kwao. Ase igo toenena, korende oiroke." 
Romans11:21 Naki onye Nyasae tarorerete chinsagia chi’omote omonyene amabera, nonya naye tagokororera amabera." 
Romans11:22 Inyora obuya na obotindi bwa Nyasae, obotindi ase baria bagure; korende asore obuya bwa Nyasae, korabeere ase obuya bwaye. Onye taibo, naye boigo nonachwe korwa aroro." 
Romans11:23 Nonya nabwo bande, onye tibakogenderera ase ogotegena kwabo, rirorio nabachomwe, ekiagera Nyasae nare nokobua kobachoma naende." 
Romans11:24 Naki onye aye kwanachetwe korwa ase omozeituni bw’orosana, ogachomwa ase ogochomwa gotanaretwe bo, ase omozeituni oyosimekire, tari kobua mono chinsagia chie ritina rinyene chichomwe ase omozeituni obo omonyene." 
Romans11:25 Naki baminto, timwerora ng’a nigo more abanyene obong’aini; nindigetie momanye obobsis obo. Obokong’u bwanyorire abande b’Abaisraeli, goika ogoikerana kw’Ebisaku goike." 
Romans11:26 Na igo Abaisraeli bonsi nabatoorigwe, buna erikire, “Ere Omosibori nache korwa Sayoni. Narusie obobe bore ase Yakobo;" 
Romans11:27 na oko nakwo okobwatana kwane nabarabwo, ekero ndache kobaruseria ebibe biabo.”" 
Romans11:28 Naboigo ase amanag’ana ’enchili babeire ababisa ba Nyasae ase engencho yaino; korende ase ogochorwa babeire abanchwa ase engencho ye chisokoro chiabo. 
Romans11:29 Naki Nyasae tari gweiteria ebiegwa biaye na okorangeria kwaye. 
Romans11:30 Naki buna inwe kare motarenge koigwera Nyasae, korende bono mwanyorire amabera ase engencho y’ogotaigwera kwabo," 
Romans11:31 naboigo na barabwo bono bataigwereti, erinde ase amabera aya mwanyorire inwe, nabarabwo boigo banyore amabera." 
Romans11:32 Naki Nyasae osibire bonsi ase ogotaigwera, erinde aborokie bonsi amabera." 
Romans11:33 Aa! Obonge bw’obonda, na obong’aini, ne chisemi bire ase Nyasae! Tibikorengeka. Ebina biaye tibikomanyekana ne chinchera chiaye tichikorigeka!" 
Romans11:34 “Naki ning’o omanyete ebirengererio bi’Omonene? Gose ning’o okomotebereria buna agwenerete agambe? 
Romans11:35 Gose ning’o omoete ekeegwa ritang’ani, erinde akeiranerigwe?”" 
Romans11:36 Ekiagera ebinto bionsi nigo bikorwa asare, nigo bire ase okobua kwaye, naende nigo biteneine asare. Ogotogigwa nokwaye goika kare na kare. Amina." 
Romans12:1 Gaki baminto, nabasoroire mono ase amabera a Nyasae, morue emebere yaino ebe ekeng’wanso kere moyo, egechenu, ekeranyare gwanchwa na Nyasae, nakio ogosasima kwaino gw’ekeene." 
Romans12:2 Gose timwereng’ania ne chingencho chi’ense eye; korende moonchorwe, mokorwe koba abayia ase emioyo yaino, monyare korigia na komanya boronge ogwancha kwa Nyasae, na erire rigiya, na eriranchwe, na oboikeranu." 
Romans12:3 Naki ase obuya naetwe nigo ngotebia kera omonto oyore asemore, tabaisa kweenenia ere omonyene ase ebirengererio biaye kobua buna emogwenerete korengereria; korende abe nebirengererio ebironge koreng’ana buna Nyasae aeire kera omonto ekerengo gi’okwegena." 
Romans12:4 Naki buna ase omobere tore nebiimo ebinge, na birobio tibiri gokora omoremo oyomo;" 
Romans12:5 naboigo naintwe, nonya tore abange, nigo tore omobere oyomo ase Kristo, na intwe twensi nigo tore buna ebiimo kera oyomo ase oyomwabo." 
Romans12:6 Nigo tore nebiegwa ao ao koreng’ana ase obuya twaeirwe; onye nobobani tobane koreng’ana ase okwegena gwaito; 
Romans12:7 onye nogokorera, tobeo ase ogokorera gwaito; oyo okworokereria abe ase okworokereria kwaye;" 
Romans12:8 oyo okoremia abe ase okoremia kwaye; oyo okorua arue ase omoyo omorabu; oyo ogotenenera atenenere ase omokia; oyo okororera amabera arorere amabera nomogoko. 
Romans12:9 Obwanchani bobe botari nobong’ainereria. Gecha erire riibe, bwatana nerire rigiya." 
Romans12:10 Obwanchani bw’obomino bobe ase egati yaino; mobe abe ritang’ani kworokia abamino amasikani. 
Romans12:11 Ase omokia oino timoba aboro; mobe nomoika ogwoka, mogokorera Omonene." 
Romans12:12 Mogoke ase ogosemeria, moremererie ase emechando, mogenderere nogosaba." 
Romans12:13 Mobe ang’e gokonya abachenu ase okoremerwa kwabo, mobe abanyamokia ase okoroisia abageni." 
Romans12:14 Mosesenie abwo bakobachanda; basesenie, timobaragereria." 
Romans12:15 Goka amo nabwo bakogoka; rera amo nabwo bakorera. 
Romans12:16 Mobe nomoyo oyomo inwe ase inwe. Timorengereria ayare amanene, korende mosange nabare noboitongo. Timoba abanto bakoenenera obong’aini." 
Romans12:17 Timoakana omonto obobe ase obobe, tang’ania ayere amaya ase amasio ’abanto bonsi." 
Romans12:18 Keranyarekane ase ensemo yaino, mobe nomorembe nabanto bonsi." 
Romans12:19 Abanchwa, timorigia kweruseria egesiomba, tiga ribaga ase endamwamu ya Nyasae, ekiagera nerikire, “Omonene otebire: Egesiomba nekiane; inche ning’akane.”" 
Romans12:20 Naboigo, “Omobisa oo karabe nenchara, moragerie, karabe nerang’o, moe anywe, ekiagera korakore ayio, nomobekere amakara ’omorero ase omotwe oye.”" 
Romans12:21 Tobugwa nobobe, korende obue obobe ase obuya." 
Romans13:1 Tiga kera omonto abe inse ase okoigwera ase abare nokobua, ekiagera okobua konde tikori gotarueti ase Nyasae, na koria koreo nokobekire na Nyasae." 
Romans13:2 Naboigo oyotari koigwera oyore nokobua, nigo akoamererania naya Nyasae achikire; na barabwo abakoamererania nabenyorere ekina." 
Romans13:3 Naki abakogamba tibari kogosa abanto ase engencho y’ogokora okuya, korende nase engencho y’ogokora okobe. Inee! Torigeti komoiroka oyore nokobua? Kora ayare amaya, na aye nonyore ogotogigwa ase amaya aria." 
Romans13:4 Naki oyore nokobua, ere nomokoreri o Nyasae ase ogokonyorera amaya. Korende korakore amabe nekogwenerete oiroke; naki ere tabogoreti omoro bosa, ekiagera nomokoreri o Nyasae ase ogoakana egesiomba ase omokori amabe na komoa egesusuro." 
Romans13:5 Ase ayio negwenerete kera oyomo aigwere, tari ase engencho y ’endamwamu ya Nyasae yoka, korende aigwere boigo, erinde enkoro yaye temogambia." 
Romans13:6 Ase engencho eyio naende nakio mokoruera ebango, ekiagera abare nokobua nigo bare abakoreri ba Nyasae, ase ogokora emeremo eyio eyio." 
Romans13:7 Bae bonsi ebia boronge biabo: omonto bw’ebango, ebango; na omonto bw’ogochoga, ogochoga; oyogwenerete koirokwa, tiga airokwe; na oyogwenerete gosikwa, tiga asikwe." 
Romans13:8 Timoba nesira ase onde bwensi otatiga ogwanchana, ekiagera oyomwanchete omogisangio oye oikeranirie amachiko." 
Romans13:9 Naki amachiko aya, “Totomana, Toita, Toiba, Toba nokogania okobe”, na gakorabeo gochika konde gwonsi, kwabekeranigwe amo ase ring’ana eri, “Ancha omogisangio oo buna bweanchete.”" 
Romans13:10 Obwanchani tibogokorera omogisangio oo bobe; naboigo, obwanchani nabwo bogoikerania amachiko." 
Romans13:11 Kora ayio, ekiagera mwamanyire ng’a amatuko aikire, na engaki yaino y’okoboka korwa ase chitoro yabeire ang’e. Naki bono ogotooreka nigo kore ang’e naintwe kobua ekero keria twachagete kwegena." 
Romans13:12 Obotuko bwaisire koera, omobaso obeire ang’e. Torusie ogokora kw’omosunte; tweboyie ebirwanero bi’omobaso." 
Romans13:13 Totaare buna egwenerete ase omobaso; tari ase okoria bobe na gotinda, tari ase obotomani aa ase obonyaka, tari ase eriomana ne ribero." 
Romans13:14 Korende mweboyie Omonene Yeso Kristo, timoa omobere ribaga goikerania okogania kwaye kw’ebibe." 
Romans14:1 Moroisie ere oyotari na nguru ase okwegena, motari koamererania." 
Romans14:2 Omonto oyomo bwegenete ng’a nanyare koria bionsi, korende ere oyotari na nguru nigo akoria chinyeni." 
Romans14:3 Oyokoria tachaya oria otari koria, na oria otari koria tagambia oria okoria, ekiagera Nyasae omwancheire." 
Romans14:4 Aye naye ng’o okogambia omosomba bw’omonto onde? Ase omonene oye omonyene nigo ateneine gose nigo akogwa. Ee, natenene, ekiagera Omonene nere ore nokobua gw’okomotenenia." 
Romans14:5 Omonto oyomo narengereretie ng’a rituko erimo nerinene kobua erinde, na oyonde arora ng’a amatuko onsi nigo areng’aine. Tiga kera omonto aisaneke ase aya amanyete omonyene." 
Romans14:6 Ere oyokorenda rituko, nigo akorirenda ase Omonene, na ere oyokoria, nigo akoria ase Omonene, ekiagera nigo agoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono; ere oyotari koria, nigo agokora bo ase Omonene, na aakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono." 
Romans14:7 Ekiagera onde tari ase egati yaito ore moyo ase engencho yaye omonyene; na onde tari ogokwa ase engencho yaye omonyene. 
Romans14:8 Naki onye tore moyo, nigo tore moyo ase Omonene; gose gatorakwe, nigo torakwe ase Omonene. Naboigo, onye tore moyo, gose gatorakwe, nigo tore ab’Omonene." 
Romans14:9 Naki Kristo nigo akwete, naende akaba moyo, erinde abe Omonene ase abare moyo na ase abakure boigo." 
Romans14:10 Korende aye, nase ki okogambia oyomino? Gose aye, nase ki ogochaya oyomino? Naki intwe twensi natoche gotenena bosio bw’ekerogo gi’ekina kia Nyasae." 
Romans14:11 Naki nerikire, “Omonene otebire: Amaene buna inde moyo, kera riru naribekwe inse ase obosio bwane, na kera oromeme naromobere Nyasae kirori.”" 
Romans14:12 Ase igo, kera omonto ore ase egati yaito nache gwekwanera ere omonyene ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
Romans14:13 Ase ayio, titoba nkona‐kogambania tore, korende anga mbuya kobua togambe ng’a onde tabekera oyomwabo egento gekomogocha gose gekomotanga." 
Romans14:14 Namanyire, naende naenekirie ase Omonene Yeso, ng’a gento kende tikeri ekebe ekenyene, korende nigo kere ekebe ase oyo okeroche ng’a negento ekebe." 
Romans14:15 Onye oyomino okoba nogwechanda ase engencho y’endagera okoria aye, gwatigire gotaara ase obwanchani. Ase engencho y’endagera yao tosaria omonto oria, ere Kristo akwete ase engencho yaye." 
Romans14:16 Timotiga ayare amaya asemore atorwe ng’a namabe. 
Romans14:17 Naki oboruoti bwa Nyasae tari okoria na okonywa, korende oboronge, na omorembe, na omogoko bikorwa ase Omoika Omochenu." 
Romans14:18 Ere oyogokorera Kristo ase amang’ana aya onsi nigo akogwenera Nyasae, naende nigo agwancherwa na mwanyabanto." 
Romans14:19 Ase igo, tiga torigie chingencho chi’omorembe ne chingencho chigwenerete ase okoagachana." 
Romans14:20 Ase engencho y’endagera tosaria emeremo ya Nyasae. Bionsi nebichenu; korende mbobe omonto oragere abande bagochwe ase engencho y’ebiakoria. 
Romans14:21 Mbuya gotaria enyama, nonya nkonywa edivai, gose gokora gento kende gionsi keragoche oyomino." 
Romans14:22 Okwegena okwo ore nakwo, obe nakorokwo ase egati yao na Nyasae. Nasesenirie omonto oria otenachereti ekina ase ring’ana riria anchete." 
Romans14:23 Korende oyore ne chitang’u‐tang’u onye okoria, onacheirwe ekina, ekiagera tarieti ase okwegena; na ogokora konde gwonsi gotarueti ase okwegena nebibe." 
Romans15:1 Intwe abatore ne chinguru netogwenerete kobogoria oboreu bw’abatari ne chinguru, tetogwenereti kwegwenera intwe abanyene." 
Romans15:2 Kera omonto ore ase egati yaito tiga agwenere omogisangio oye, anyore obuya, erinde tonyare koagachana," 
Romans15:3 Naki Kristo tegwenerete ere omonyene; korende buna erikire, “Emerumi yabo bakoramete nigo yangwerete inche.”" 
Romans15:4 Naki onsi ayatang’anete korikwa korwa kare nigo arigetwe ase ogotworokereria intwe, erinde ase oboremereria na ase okoremigwa tokonyora korwa ase amariko, tonyare koba nogosemeria." 
Romans15:5 Na Nyasae bw’oboremereria na bw’okoremia abakonye mobe nomoyo oyomo inwe ase inwe ase omogwekano o Kristo Yeso; 
Romans15:6 erio ase omoyo oyomo monyare komobaka Nyasae Tata bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo. 
Romans15:7 Naboigo moroisanie buna Kristo nere abaroisetie inwe, erinde Nyasae abakwe." 
Romans15:8 Naki nabatebirie inwe, ng’a Kristo akaba omosomba bw’abarogete ase okoorokia ng’a Nyasae noyo bw’ekeene, erinde aikeranie chiira echi abagaaka baito ba kare baetwe." 
Romans15:9 Naende abanto b’Ebisaku bamobake Nyasae ase engencho y’amabera aye, buna erikire, “Ase engencho eye ningotogie ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku, ninterere erieta riao ase okoritogia.”" 
Romans15:10 Naende nigo agoteba, “Abanto b’Ebisaku, goka amo nabanto b’Omonene”;" 
Romans15:11 naende, “Abanto b’Ebisaku bionsi, motogie Omonene; abanto bonsi bamobake!”" 
Romans15:12 Naende Isaya nigo agokwana, “Ritina ria Yese nariche, ere naoroke kogambera abanto b’Ebisaku; nere abanto b’Ebisaku barasemerie.”" 
Romans15:13 Naboigo Nyasae bw’ogosemerigwa abaichorie nomogoko bwonsi na omorembe ase okwegena, monyare komenta mono ase ogosemeria ase chinguru chi’Omoika Omochenu." 
Romans15:14 Abaminto, inche omonyene naenekerigwe igoro yaino ng’a mwaichoirwe namaya, naende mwaichoirwe ne chisemi chionsi, na monyare kworokererania." 
Romans15:15 Korende nabarikeire ase oboremu kobua ase chinsemo chinde chie rirube eri, nkobainyoria ase obuya boria naetwe na Nyasae," 
Romans15:16 erinde imbe omosomba o Kristo Yeso ase ogokorera abanto b’Ebisaku, ase emeremo y’obokuani ase okorandia enchili ya Nyasae, erinde ekeng’wanso kiabo giancherwe, gechenwe n’Omoika Omochenu." 
Romans15:17 Bono ninde nengencho y’okweenenia ime ya Kristo Yeso ase emeremo yane ase obosio bwa Nyasae. 
Romans15:18 Naki tinkonyara gwatora ring’ana rinde otatiga eri Kristo akorete goetera ase emeremo yane, erinde abanto b’Ebisaku banyare koigwera ase engencho ye ring’ana na ogokora," 
Romans15:19 ase chinguru chi’ebikone na amakumia, ase chinguru chi’Omoika Omochenu. Naikire korandia enchili ya Kristo ase Yerusalemu ne chinsemo chionsi chietanaine goika Iluriko." 
Romans15:20 Naboigo nakorete omokia one korandia enchili, korende tari aase erieta ria Kristo riaikire koigugwa, erinde timbaisa koagacha ase oboroso bw’omonto onde," 
Romans15:21 korende, buna erikire, “Baria batana gotebigwa amang’ana igoro yaye, nabarore, na baria batana koyaigwa, nabamanye.”" 
Romans15:22 Eke nakio kiagerete ngatangwa ebiro ebinge tinacha asemore. 
Romans15:23 Korende bono tindi ne ribaga rinde ri’ogokora emeremo ase chinsemo echi, naende korwa emiaka emenge narenge namaiga gocha asemore." 
Romans15:24 Ekero nkogenda gochia Hispania ninganetie ng’etere seino, mbarore. Na nyuma konabeire amo nainwe ase ogokonyana ase ekero egeke, namonkoobe." 
Romans15:25 Na bono ningende Yerusalemu, imbe ngokorera abachenu." 
Romans15:26 Naki agweneire abanto ba Makedonia na Akaya gosangereria ebiegwa bi’ogokonya abachenu ba Yerusalemu, baria bare abataka." 
Romans15:27 Ee, amaene, abagweneire gokora bo, naende nabasira babo bare, ekiagera onye abanto b’Ebisaku babwatanire nabarabwo ase ogosesenigwa kwabo kw’omoika, igo nebagwenerete bakorere abachenu baria ase ebinto birabakonye ase obogima obo." 
Romans15:28 Naboigo kondaikeranie ring’ana eri na kobaa ebiegwa ebi biasangererigwe, ekero nabibekire ekemanyererio, ning’etere seino konde orogendo rwane gochia Hispania." 
Romans15:29 Na inche namanyire ng’a kondache asemore, ninchiche nogoichorwa kw’ogosesenigwa gwa Kristo." 
Romans15:30 Nabasoroire baminto ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo na ase obwanchani bw’Omoika Omochenu, mobe nomokia amo nainche ase ogosaba kwaino ase engencho yane ase obosio bwa Nyasae;" 
Romans15:31 erinde nsiborwe korwa ase baria bategeneti ase Boyahudi, naende emeremo imbwate aaria Yerusalemu yancheirwe nabachenu." 
Romans15:32 Igo ninyare gocha asemore nomogoko, Nyasae karanche, na konyora ogotimoka amo nainwe." 
Romans15:33 Nyasae bw’omorembe abe amo nainwe mwensi. Amina. 
Romans16:1 Nabekire oyominto Febe ase amaboko aino. Ere nomosubati omokoreri ore ase ekanisa ya Kenkerea. 
Romans16:2 Momoroisie ase Omonene, buna egwenerete abachenu, momokonye ase ring’ana rinde rionsi araganie asemore, ekiagera ere obeire ogokonya abanto abange, nonya ninche omonyene nankonyete." 
Romans16:3 Nkwanerie Priska na Akwila, abakori emeremo amo nainche ase Kristo Yeso," 
Romans16:4 ababete ang’e korua obogima bwabo ase engencho yane. Nabaakeire ng’a mbuya mono, gose tari inche bweka, korende nonya ne chikanisa chionsi chi’abanto b’Ebisaku." 
Romans16:5 Nkwanerie boigo ekanisa ere ase enyomba yabo. Nkwanerie Epaineto omwanchwa one, nere orenge bwe ritang’ani ase Asia koonchoka ase Kristo." 
Romans16:6 Nkwanerie Mariamu oyokorete emeremo emekong’u ase egati yaino. 
Romans16:7 Nkwanerie Androniko na Yunia, abaamate baane, abasibetwe abatomwa ng’a nabaya; barabwo nigo bantang’anerete koba ime ase Kristo." 
Romans16:8 Nkwanerie Ampiliato, omwanchwa one ase Omonene." 
Romans16:9 Nkwanerie Urubano omokori emeremo amo nainche ase Kristo, na Staku omwanchwa one." 
Romans16:10 Nkwanerie Apele oyo bwancheretwe ase Kristo. Nkwanerie abanto b’enyomba y’Aristobulu. 
Romans16:11 Nkwanerie Herodioni, omoamate one. Nkwanerie abanto b’enyomba ya Narikiso bare ase Omonene." 
Romans16:12 Nkwanerie Turufena na Turufosa, abakori emeremo ase Omonene. Nkwanerie Perisi omwanchwa, oyokorire omokia mono ase Omonene." 
Romans16:13 Nkwanerie Rufo omochorwa ase Omonene, na ng’ina ore buna baba asende." 
Romans16:14 Nkwanerie Asunkrito, Felegoni, Herme, Patiroba, Herama na abaminto abare amo nabarabwo." 
Romans16:15 Nkwanerie Fililogo, Yuli, Nereu na mosubati omwabo, Olimpa na abachenu bonsi abare amo nabarabwo." 
Romans16:16 Kwanania na konyunyuntana ase obochenu. Chikanisa chionsi chia Kristo chiabakwanirie. 
Romans16:17 Nabasoroire baminto, morigererie baria bakorenta ogwatananekana ne chingencho chikogera abanto bagwe korwa ase okwegena kwabo, chire mamincha y’okworokererigwa mworokereretigwe; mweatanane korwa asebarabwo." 
Romans16:18 Naki abanto banga buna abwo tibari gokorera Omonene oito Kristo, korende nechinda chiabo bagokorera abanyene; na ase amang’ana amororo na ay’okwegwenia bang’aina emioyo y’abanto batetenenereti ase ebirengererio biabo." 
Romans16:19 Naki okoigwera kwaino kwamanyekanire ase abanto bonsi. Naboigo nagokire ase engencho yaino, korende nindigetie mobe abang’aini ase amang’ana amaya, na abariri ase amang’ana amabe." 
Romans16:20 Nyasae bw’omorembe namionogorere Saitani inse y’amagoro aino bwango. Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nainwe. 
Romans16:21 Timotheo, omokori emeremo amo nainche, obakwanirie; naboigo Lukio, na Yasoni, na Sosipita, abaamate baane, babakwanirie." 
Romans16:22 Inche Teretio, omoriki bwe rirube eri, nabakwanirie ase Omonene." 
Romans16:23 Gayo, oyokondoisia inche na ekanisa engima, obakwanirie. Erasto, omogachi bwe chibesa, chi’omochie, na Kwarito oyominto, babakwanirie." 
Romans16:24 Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nainwe mwensi. Amina. 
Romans16:25 Bono asare ere oyoranyare kobakong’ia ase enchili yane, na ase okorandigwa kwa Yeso Kristo, na ase okomaanorerwa kw’obobisi boria bwabisegete korwa kare," 
Romans16:26 korende bono bwaorokigwe ase amariko ’ababani, bwamanyekanire ase abanto b’ebisaku bionsi buna Nyasae o kare na kare achigete, erinde baigwere na kwegena," 
Romans16:27 ase Nyasae, omonyene obong’aini bweka, ogotogigwa kare na kae ase Yeso Kristo! Amina." 
1Corinthians1:1 Inche Paulo narangeretigwe koba omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae. Inche amo noyominto Sostene 
1Corinthians1:2 nkobarikera tore inwe ab’ekanisa ya Nyasae ere ase Korinto, inwe abamwachenirwe ase Kristo Yeso, abamwarangerigwe koba abachenu amo na bonsi abakorangeria erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo kera aase, nere Omonene obo na oyoito." 
1Corinthians1:3 Obuya bobe asemore, na omorembe, bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:4 Botambe nigo nkomoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaino, ase engencho y’obuya bwa Nyasae mwaetwe ase Kristo Yeso." 
1Corinthians1:5 Ase kera enchera mogatenenkigwa ime asare ase chinkwana chionsi, ne chisemi chionsi," 
1Corinthians1:6 buna oborori bwa Kristo bwabekirwe chinguru ase egati yaino. 
1Corinthians1:7 Na bono timoremeiri keegwa kende gionsi, komoganyete okoorokigwa kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:8 Nere orabakong’ie goika omoerio, erinde timocha koba nokomocha ase rituko riria ri’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:9 Nyasae nomwegenwa, oyobarangeirie mosoe ase obomo bw’Omwana oye, Yeso Kristo Omonene oito." 
1Corinthians1:10 Nabasoroire inwe, baminto, ase erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, mokwane mwensi ayamo, erinde ogwatananekana tikoba asemore; korende mobe nokobwatana ase ebirengererio ebimo na okogamba okomo." 
1Corinthians1:11 Naki baminto, natebigwe nabanto ba nyomba mwa Kloe, ng’a eriomana ndire ase egati yaino." 
1Corinthians1:12 Engencho yagera nakwana bo neye, ng’a oyomo ore ase egati yaino nigo agoteba, “Inche noyo o Paulo,” na oyonde, “Inche noyo bw’Apolo,” na oyonde, “Inche noyo o Kefa,” na oyonde, “Inche noyo o Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Inee! Kristo naatananekire? Gose Paulo nere obambetwe ase engencho yaino? Gose igo mwabatisetwe ase erieta ria Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Namoakeire Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono, ase engencho ntabatisete monto onde, asemore otatiga Krispo na Gayo," 
1Corinthians1:15 erinde onde tacha goteba ng’a mwabatisetwe ase erieta riane. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Naende nkabatisa abanto ba nyomba mwa Stefana. Kobua ase abwo, tinkomanya gose nabatisete monto onde.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Naki Kristo tantomete ng’a mbatise, korende ndandie enchili, tari ase obong’aini bw’amang’ana, erinde omosalaba o Kristo tokorwa koba egento kia bosa." 
1Corinthians1:18 Naki ring’ana ri’omosalaba noboriri ase abwo bagosira, korende asetore intwe abatwabeire togotoorigwa nigo rire chinguru chia Nyasae." 
1Corinthians1:19 Naki nerikire, “Ninsarie obong’aini bw’abang’aini, na okomanya kw’abamanyi ninkwange.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Ng’ai are omong’aini? Ng’ai are omworokia bw’amariko? Ng’ai are oyokoamererania namang’ana ’ense eye? Inee! Nyasae takorete obong’aini bw’ense eye koba oboriri? 
1Corinthians1:21 Ekiagera ase obong’aini bwaye Nyasae akaroberia, ng’a ense tekonyara komomanya ase enchera y’obong’aini, agancha kobatooria abamwegenete ase oboriri bwe ring’ana riria rikorandigwa." 
1Corinthians1:22 Abayahudi nigo bakonakoboria barore ebikone, na Abagiriki bakorigia obong’aini," 
1Corinthians1:23 korende intwe nigo tokomorandia Kristo oyobambetwe, ase Abayahudi nekegocha, na ase abanto b’Ebisaku noboriri." 
1Corinthians1:24 Korende ase abwo barangeretigwe, Abayahudi na Abagiriki bonsi, Kristo nere chinguru chia Nyasae, na obong’aini bwa Nyasae." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ekiagera oboriri bwa Nyasae mbore nobong’aini kobua obongaini bwa mwanyabanto, na oboreu bwa Nyasae mbore ne chinguru kobua echia mwanyabanto." 
1Corinthians1:26 Naki baminto, rengereria nabanto b’engencho ki more aba Nyasae arangeirie; tari abange asemore bare nobong’aini bwa mwanyabanto, tari abange bare ne chinguru, tari abange baiboretwe nobonene." 
1Corinthians1:27 Korende Nyasae agachora ayare amariri ase ense, erinde asookie abare nobong’aini; naende Nyasae agachora ayare amareu ase ense, erinde abasookie abare ne chinguru." 
1Corinthians1:28 Nyasae agachora ayare amasinini ase ense na ayachayire, nonya nebinto bire bosa, erinde akeyie biria bire nengencho, bibe bosa." 
1Corinthians1:29 Erio ase obosio bwa Nyasae onde tari ase mwanyabanto oretogie. 
1Corinthians1:30 Korende nogokora kwa Nyasae, ng’a inwe imore ime ase Kristo Yesu, oyo Nyasae akorete koba obong’aini bwaito na oboronge bwaito, naende ogochenwa gwaito na okoboorigwa gwaito." 
1Corinthians1:31 Ase igo buna erikire, “Ere oyogwetogia, tiga etogie ase Omonene.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Inche, ekero nachete asemore, baminto, tinachete kobaranderia oborori bwa Nyasae ase enchera y’obuya bwe chinkwana, gose ase obong’aini." 
1Corinthians2:2 Naki nigo narengereretie ng’a timanya ing’ana rinde rionsi asemore otatiga Yeso Kristo, na nere obambetwe." 
1Corinthians2:3 Na inche nigo narenge amo nainwe ase oboreu na okoiroka, na okoiguswa okonge." 
1Corinthians2:4 Enkwana yane na okorandia kwane tibiarenge amang’ana ay’okoebereria obong’aini bwa mwanyabanto, korende ase ekiorokererio ki’Omoika ne chinguru," 
1Corinthians2:5 erinde okwegena kwaino tikoba ase obong’aini bwa mwanyabanto korende ase chinguru chia Nyasae. 
1Corinthians2:6 Korende obong’aini mbore togoteba ase egati y’abaikeranu, na borobwo tibori obong’aini bw’ense eye, gose obw’abagambi b’ense eye abagendererete gochia gosira," 
1Corinthians2:7 korende nigo togokwana obong’aini bw’obobisi bwa Nyasae, obwo bwabisetwe, obwo Nyasae aroberetie korwa omochakano, erinde atoeire bobe obonene bwaito." 
1Corinthians2:8 Abagambi b’ense eye tibabomanyete, nonya noyomo obo; naki onye mbabomanyete, anga tibabambete Omonene bw’obonene;" 
1Corinthians2:9 korende buna erikire, “Aya eriso ritaroche, gose ogoto gotaigwete, gose aya atarengereirie ase enkoro y’omonto, ayio Nyasae aroiseretie abamwanchete.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Korende Nyasae otoyaorokeirie ase Omoika oye, naki Omoika nigo okorigia onsi, nonya nobobisi bwa Nyasae." 
1Corinthians2:11 Naki ning’o ore ase mwanyabanto omanyete ebirengererio bi’omonto, otatiga omoika bw’omonto ore ime yaye? Naboigo nonde tari omanyete ebirengererio bia Nyasae otatiga Omoika o Nyasae." 
1Corinthians2:12 Na intwe titwanyorete omoika bw’ense eye, korende Omoika orwete ase Nyasae, erinde tonyare komanya ebiegwa ebitwaeirwe na Nyasae." 
1Corinthians2:13 Naro nigo tokoyakwana, tari ase amang’ana tworokererigwe ne chisemi chia mwanyabanto, korende aya tworokererigwe n’Omoika; igo togokwana amang’ana ’Omoika ase abare n’Omoika." 
1Corinthians2:14 Nabo mwanyabanto ore ne chingencho chia kare, takonyora ebiegwa bi’Omoika o Nyasae, naki asare ere ebi nebiriri, gose takonyara kobimanya, ekiagera nigo bikomanyekana ase chinguru chi’Omoika." 
1Corinthians2:15 Omonto ore n’Omoika nigo akomanya onsi, korende ere takomanyigwa na monto onde." 
1Corinthians2:16 “Naki ning’o omanyete ebirengererio bi’Omonene, erinde amworokererie?” Korende intwe ntore nebirengererio bia Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Na inche, baminto, tinare konyara gokwana nainwe buna nabanto bare n’Omoika, korende buna abanto b’engencho ya kare, buna abana ebing’werere ase Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabasiibirie amabeere, timbaragereti endagera; ekiagera konya timoraisana; ee, nonya mbono timoraisana," 
1Corinthians3:3 ekiagera nonya mbono nigo more abanto b’engencho y’ebibe. Naki onye more ne ribero na eriomana ase egati yaino, Inee, timori abanto b’engencho y’ebibe, naende nigo mogendererete buna banto bande bonsi?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ekiagera ekero omonto oyomo akobora, “Inche noyo o Paulo,” na oyonde, “Inche noyo bw’Apolo.” Inee, inwe timori mwanyabanto?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Gaki Apolo inki aisaine? Na Paulo inki aisaine? Intwe nabakori emeremo, ababorokereirie komwegena Omonene, kera oyomo buna Omonene amoeire." 
1Corinthians3:6 Inche ngasimeka, Apolo akabeka amache, korende Nyasae nere ogokinia." 
1Corinthians3:7 Onye nabo, oyogosimeka tai gento, nonya noyokobeka amache, korende Nyasae bweka oyogokinia." 
1Corinthians3:8 Naboigo oyogosimeka, na oyokobeka amache nigo bareng’anetie; na kera omonto nanyore eng’eria yaye koreng’ana buna emeremo yaye ere." 
1Corinthians3:9 Naki intwe nabakori emeremo amo na Nyasae; inwe nomogondo o Nyasae, na oboagacho bwa Nyasae." 
1Corinthians3:10 Koreng’ana nobuya bwa Nyasae naetwe inche, buna omonene bw’abaagachi, oyore ne chisemi, nabekire oboroso, na omonto onde nkoagacha are igoro yaye. Korende kera omonto tiga arigererie buna akoagacha igoro yaye." 
1Corinthians3:11 Naki boroso bonde tibori omonto aranyare kobeka, otatiga boria bwaikire kobekwa, nabwo Yeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Korende omonto karaagache igoro ase oboroso obwo netahabu, gose efeta, gose amagena e rigori rinene, gose emete, gose obonyansi, gose chinsiaga-" 
1Corinthians3:13 emeremo ya kera omonto ing’eorokigwe maiso marore. Naki Rituko erio inariyeorokie, ekiagera narioroke nomorero; na omorero oyio noteeme emeremo ya kera omonto ng’a naki ere." 
1Corinthians3:14 Emeremo y’omonto aagachete igoro ase oboroso kerabue, omonto oyio nanyore eng’eria." 
1Corinthians3:15 Emeremo y’omonto kerayie, takonyora eng’eria, korende ere omonyene natoorigwe, korende buna oyo ogotaborigwa korwa ase omorero." 
1Corinthians3:16 Timomanyeti ng’a inwe ne Hekalu ya Nyasae, na Omoika o Nyasae nigo omenyete ime yaino?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Onye omonto ogosaria Hekalu ya Nyasae, Nyasae nasarie omonto oyio; naki Hekalu ya Nyasae nenchenu, nero ninwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Omonto tabaisa kweng’aina ere omonyene. Onye omonto ase egati yaino bwerorire ng’a nomonyasemi are ase ense eye, tiga ekore omoriri, erinde anyare koba omonyasemi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Naki obong’aini bw’ense eye noboriri ase Nyasae, ekiagera nerikire, “Ere okobwata abare nobong’aini ase obong’ainereria bwabo”," 
1Corinthians3:20 naende, “Omonene nigo amanyete okorengereria kw’abare nobong’aini ng’a nokwa bosa.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Ase ayio omonto tetogia ase mwanyabanto. Naki bionsi nebiaino; 
1Corinthians3:22 onye Paulo, gose Apolo, gose Kefa, gose ense, gose obogima, gose amakweri, gose biria bire bono, gose ebio birache koba; bionsi nebiaino;" 
1Corinthians3:23 na inwe naba Kristo, na Kristo noyo o Nyasae." 
1Corinthians4:1 Omonto natobare iga, ng’a nabasomba ba Kristo tore, na abarendi b’obobisi bwa Nyasae." 
1Corinthians4:2 Agwo naende ayarigirie ase abarendi naro aya: banyorekane ng’a nabegenwa bare. 
1Corinthians4:3 Asende inche, tai gento ngambigwe nainwe, gose na kegambero kende gionsi kia mwanyabanto. Nonya ninche omonyene tinkwegambia." 
1Corinthians4:4 Naki timanyeti engencho y’ogwesoera inche omonyene, korende timbareiri oboronge ase engencho y’ayio. Omonene nere orangambie." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ase ayio timogamba ing’ana rinde rionsi engaki etaraika, ekero Omonene ataracha; nere orabaorokerie ayabisegete ase omosunte, na koorokia amang’ana are ase chinkoro ime. Erio nario kera omonto aranyore ogotogigwa kwaye korwa ase Nyasae." 
1Corinthians4:6 Amang’ana aya, baminto, nayakwanire igoro yane na igoro y’Apolo ase engencho yaino, erinde ase amang’ana aito monyare kweorokereria timotamboka ase amang’ana arikire. Omonto taenena ase oyomo mamincha y’oria onde." 
1Corinthians4:7 Naki ning’o ogwatananire aye noyonde? Inki ore nakio otanyoreti buna ekeegwa? Onye gwakenyorire buna ekeegwa, inki rende ogwetogeria buna tikiarenge ekeegwa?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mwaikire koigota! Mwaikire konyora obotenenku! Mwanyorire oboruoti intwe totaiyo! Anga mbuya onye mwagambete, erinde naintwe togambe amo nainwe!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Naki nigo ndoche ng’a Nyasae otobekire intwe abatomwa tobe ab’omoerio ase bonsi, buna abanto bagambetigwe ng’a baitwe, ekiagera twabeire ekiorokererio ki’ogosekererwa ase ense, na ase abamalaika, na ase mwanyabanto." 
1Corinthians4:10 Intwe nigo tore abariri ase engencho ya Kristo, korende inwe nigo more abang’aini ase Kristo. Intwe nigo tore abareu, korende inwe nigo more ne chinguru. Inwe nigo mosikire, korende intwe tochayire." 
1Corinthians4:11 Nonya ngoika egeka eke kia bono ntore nenchara na erang’o, naende nigo tore gesobono; iga togoakwa chinkundi titori nobomenyo," 
1Corinthians4:12 naende nigo togochandeka gatogokora emeremo namaboko aito abanyene. Ekero tokoramwa, twasesenia; ekero togochandwa, twaremereria;" 
1Corinthians4:13 ekero togokwanwa bobe, intwe twaebereria. Twakorirwe buna eogoto y’ense na eubi y’ebinto bionsi goika bono." 
1Corinthians4:14 Tinyarigeti aya ase okobasookia, korende nkobakurera buna abana nyanchete." 
1Corinthians4:15 Naki nonya more nabatebereria chilifu ikomi ase Kristo, timori nabaiso abange. Naki ase Kristo Yeso nabeire buna iso, obaiboire ase enchili." 
1Corinthians4:16 Gaki nabasoroire, mobe abegi baane." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ase ayio natomire Timotheo asemore, oyore omwana one omwanchwa, na omwegenwa ase Omonene. Nere orabainyorie buna chingencho chiane chire ase Kristo, buna nkoborokereria kera aase ase kera ekanisa," 
1Corinthians4:18 Abande asemore baenenire ekiagera bakagire ng’a tindi gocha asemore. 
1Corinthians4:19 Korende ninchiche asemore bwango, Omonene karanche, na inche nimanye chinguru chiabo abwo bakoenena, gose tari ogokwana kwabo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Naki oboruoti bwa Nyasae tibori ase ogokwana, korende ase chinguru." 
1Corinthians4:21 Naki morigetie? Inchiche asemore nenyimbo gose nobwanchani ase omoika bw’obwororo? 
1Corinthians5:1 Amang’ana akwanirwe kera aase ng’a obotomani mbore ase egati yaino, naende obotomani buna obwo tibwana kororekana nonya nase abanto b’Ebisaku, ng’a oyomo oino namenyaine na moga ise," 
1Corinthians5:2 Inwe mwaenenire! Inee! Timogwenereti goichana? Tiga oyo okorire ayio arusigwe korwa asemore. 
1Corinthians5:3 Korende nonya tindi agwo ase omobere, nao inde agwo ase omoika. Naikire kogambia ere oyokorire ring’ana erio, buna nao narenge." 
1Corinthians5:4 Ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso, inwe ekero morasangererekane, na omoika one nao ore amo nokobua kw’Omonene oito Yeso," 
1Corinthians5:5 mogwenerete koa Saitani omonto oyio, omobere oye osarigwe, erinde omoika oye oche gotoorigwa ase rituko ri’Omonene Yeso." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ogwetogia kwaino tikori okuya. Timomanyeti ng’a ememera emeke nigo ekobotia ribomba rigima? 
1Corinthians5:7 Rusia kegima ememera eria ya kare, erinde mobe ribomba riyia, buna more motabekiri memera. Naki Emanwa yaito y’Eng’ondi y’Epasaka yaikire koruegwa ekeng’wanso, nere Kristo." 
1Corinthians5:8 Gaki tobe nomoyega, tari ase ememera ya kare, gose ase ememera y’ogosaria na ey’obobe, korende ase omogati otabekiri memera, nabwo oborabu bw’omoyo na ekeene." 
1Corinthians5:9 Nabarikerete ase rirube riane, ng’a timosang’anana nabatomani." 
1Corinthians5:10 Tintebeti ng’a timosang’anana nabatomani b’ense eye, gose abegimeria, gose abauri, gose abagosaba emegwekano y’ogosasimwa; onye nabo anga mwarua ase ense." 
1Corinthians5:11 Korende bono nabarikeire ng’a timosang’anana nomonto okorokwa oyomino, karabe omotomani, gose oyokwegimeria, gose oyogosaba emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, gose omorami, gose oyogotinda, gose omouri, omonto onga buna oyio, timwancha nonya nkoria nere." 
1Corinthians5:12 Inee! Ninche ngwenerete kogambia abare isiko? Na inwe timogwenereti kogambia abare ime? 
1Corinthians5:13 Korende abwo bare isiko, Nyasae nabagambie, “Seria omonto oyio omobe arue asemore.”" 
1Corinthians6:1 Omonto onde oino karabe ne ring’ana ase oyomwabo, Inee, nare noboremu amosoere ase abwo batari abaronge? Inki rende atari komosoera ase obosio bw’abachenu?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Gose timomanyeti ng’a abachenu inabagambie ense? Na onye ense egocha kogambigwa nainwe, Inee, timoisaini kogamba ebina ebire ebike?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Timomanyeti ng’a ntogambie abamalaika? Tari kobua mono amang’ana ’obogima obo? 
1Corinthians6:4 Gaki komorabe mogosoerana ase amang’ana buna ayio, naki rende mokoyarenta ase abwo batabariri buna ngento ase ekanisa?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Natebire aya ase okobasookia. Inee! Onde tari ase egati yaino ore ne chisemi chiisaine oranyare konacha amang’ana are ase egati y’abamwabo? 
1Corinthians6:6 Korende oyomwabo nigo agosoera oyomwabo, na ayio nase obosio bw’abwo bategeneti." 
1Corinthians6:7 Amang’ana aya ng’a ngosoerana more inwe ase inwe nigo are ase okobugwa kwaino. Inki motanchereti gokorerwa bobe? Inki motanchereti kourwa ebi mobwate? 
1Corinthians6:8 Korende inwe abanyene mwakoreire abanto bobe, na kobaura ebi babwate, ee nonya nase abamino." 
1Corinthians6:9 Gose timomanyeti ng’a abatari noboronge tibakoira omwando bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae? Timong’aineka; abanyaka tibakoira omwando bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae, nonya nabasasimi emegwekano, gose abatomani, gose abakwerua ase okogania kw’omobere, gose abasacha abagwesaria nabasacha," 
1Corinthians6:10 gose abaibi, gose abegimeria, gose abagotinda, gose abarami, gose abauri." 
1Corinthians6:11 Abande asemore nigo mwarenge abanto buna aba, korende mogasibigwa na mogachenwa, mwanyorire oboronge ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso Kristo, na ase Omoika o Nyasae oito." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Ninde nobosibore gokora kende gionsi”, korende tari bionsi birankonye. “Ninde nobosibore gokora kende gionsi”, korende tingwancha koba omosomba o gento kende gionsi." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Endagera ney’enda na enda ney’endagera”, korende Nyasae nasarie bionsi bibere, enda na endagera. Omobere tori ase obotomani, korende nase Omonene, na Omonene ase omobere." 
1Corinthians6:14 Nyasae nabogetie Omonene, naintwe natobokie ase okobua kwaye." 
1Corinthians6:15 Timomanyeti ng’a emebere yaino nebiimo bia Kristo? Inee! Nimbogorie ebiimo bia Kirsto na kobikora bibe ebiimo bi’omokungu omotayayi? Yaya, nonya ng’ake!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Timomanyeti ng’a ere oyobwatanigwe nomokungu omotayayi obeire omobere oyomo nere? Naki buna erikire, “Baria babere nababe omobere oyomo.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Korende ere oyobwatanigwe n’Omonene igo obeire omoika oyomo nere. 
1Corinthians6:18 Tama obotomani! Kera ebibe binde bigokorwa namwanyabanto nigo bire isiko y’omobere; korende ere oyogokora obotomani igo okorire ebibe ase omobere oye omonyene. 
1Corinthians6:19 Gose timomanyeti ng’a emebere yaino ne Hekalu y’Omoika Omochenu ore ime yaino, oyo mwaeirwe na Nyasae? Na inwe timori abaino abanyene," 
1Corinthians6:20 ekiagera mwagoretwe ase rigori rinene. Ase ayio, motogie Nyasae ase emebere yaino." 
1Corinthians7:1 Gaki ase amang’ana aya mwandikerete, mbuya omosacha takuna omokungu." 
1Corinthians7:2 Korende ase engencho y’amateemwa ay’ogokora obotomani kera omosacha abe na mokaye omonyene, na kera omokungu abe nomosacha oye omonyene." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omosacha ae omokungu oye ekemogwenerete; naboigo nomokungu ae omosacha oye ekemogwenerete. 
1Corinthians7:4 Omokungu tari nokobua igoro ase omobere oye, korende nomosacha oye; naboigo nomosacha tari nokobua igoro ase omobere oye, korende nomokungu oye." 
1Corinthians7:5 Timorinana otatiga mwancheranire ase egeka egeke, erinde monyare kwerua ase ogosaba; naende mobe amo, Saitani tacha kobateema ekiagera motanyare gwetanga." 
1Corinthians7:6 Aya nigo nkobatebia buna ndoche; tindi korua ogochika. 
1Corinthians7:7 Ayanyanchete naro aya, ng’a abanto bonsi babe buna inche omonyene inde. Korende kera omonto nare nekeegwa kiaye omonyene gekorwa ase Nyasae, oyomo iga, na oyonde iga." 
1Corinthians7:8 Bono nkobatebia nde baria bataranyuoma, na ababoraka, mbuya babe buna inche inde." 
1Corinthians7:9 Korende onye tibakonyara gwetanga, tiga banyuome, ekiagera mbuya konyuoma kobua gosambwa nokogania." 
1Corinthians7:10 Korende baria baikire konyuomana nabachikire, gose tari inche, korende Omonene, ng’a omokungu tatiga omosacha oye," 
1Corinthians7:11 (korende, karabe otiganire nere, atige tanyuomwa gose abwatane nomosacha oye naende), na omosacha tatiga mokaye." 
1Corinthians7:12 Abwo bande nkobatebia inche, gose tari Omonene, ng’a onye onde ominto ore nomokungu otegeneti na omokungu oyio bwanchire komenya nere, tamotiga." 
1Corinthians7:13 Na omokungu ore nomosacha otegeneti, na omosacha oyo bwanchire komenya nere, tamotiga." 
1Corinthians7:14 Naki omosacha oria otegeneti ochenirwe ase engencho ya mokaye, na omokungu oria otegeneti ochenirwe ase engencho y’omosacha oye. Onye taibo, abana baino anga tibaba abachenu; korende buna ere bono, babeire abachenu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Korende oria otegeneti karaganie gotigana, tiga atigane. Oyominto omosacha gose oyominto omokungu tasibiri ase amang’ana buna ayio, korende Nyasae obarangeirie ase omorembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Aye omokungu, ng’ai oramanyere gose notoorie omosacha oo? Gose aye omosacha, ng’ai oramanyere gose notoorie omokungu oo?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kera omonto agenderere ase obogima obwo Omonene amogabeire na ase obwo Nyasae amorangereirie. Naboigo nachigete ase chikanisa chionsi. 
1Corinthians7:18 Monto onde bwensi orangerigwe na Nyasae ekero aikire kwaroka, tekora buna tarogeti, na monto onde bwensi orangerigwe otarogeti, taroka." 
1Corinthians7:19 Okwaroka tai gento, na ogotaroka tai gento, korende nokobwata amachiko a Nyasae." 
1Corinthians7:20 Kera omonto tiga abe buna arenge ekero arangeretigwe. 
1Corinthians7:21 Inee! Igo kwarangeretigwe kore omosomba? Torora ng’a mbobe; korende koranyare gosiborwa, mbuya obe bo." 
1Corinthians7:22 Naki oyorangeretigwe ase Omonene kare omosomba, nomosibore ase Omonene. Naboigo noyorangeretigwe osiboire, nomosomba o Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mokagorwa ase rigori, timoba abasomba b’abanto." 
1Corinthians7:24 Kera omonto, baminto, buna arenge ekero arangeretigwe, tiga aikaranse boigo ase Nyasae." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ase amang’ana ’abaiseke abekungi, tindi nogochika korwa ase Omonene, korende nabatebirie buna ndoche inche, buna oyonyorire amabera korwa ase Omonene koba omwegenwa." 
1Corinthians7:26 Narorire ng’a ring’ana eri nerigiya ase engencho y’emechando eye tore nero, ng’a mbuya omonto abe buna are." 
1Corinthians7:27 Inee! Gwasibirwe ase omokungu? Torigia gosiborwa. Nosiboire? Torigia omokungu. 
1Corinthians7:28 Korende koranyuome, tari ebibe gwakora; na omoiseke omwekungi karanyuomwe, tari ebibe akora. Korende abanto abwo nababe nemechando y’ense eye, na inche ninyanchete ng’a timosoa ase emechando eyio." 
1Corinthians7:29 Korende baminto, nigo ngoteba iga: Ekero getigarete negeke; gaki korwa bono baria bare nabakungu, tiga babe buna tibabwati;" 
1Corinthians7:30 na baria bakorera babe buna tibari korera; na baria bagogete babe buna tibagogeti: na baria bakogora babe buna tibari na gento; 
1Corinthians7:31 na baria bagokorera ense eye babe buna tibari koyekorera, ekiagera ense buna ere bono ngoeta ere." 
1Corinthians7:32 Korende nindigetie ng’a timoba nogwechanda. Oyotaranyuoma nigo arengereretie amang’ana ’Omonene, buna aragwenere Omonene:" 
1Corinthians7:33 korende oyonyuomire nigo akorengereria amang’ana ’ense eye, buna aragwenere mokaye;" 
1Corinthians7:34 igo obeire nogwatananekana. Omoiseke omwekungi nigo akorengereria amang’ana ’Omonene, buna aranyare koba omochenu ase omobere na ase omoika, korende oyonyuomirwe nigo akorengereria amang’ana ’ense, buna aragwenere omosacha oye." 
1Corinthians7:35 Natebire aya ase okobakonya; tari ng’a nkobabekera nde egetango, korende ase engencho y’ayio abagwenerete, erinde monyare gokorera Omonene motang’usiri namang’ana ande." 
1Corinthians7:36 Korende monto onde bwensi kararore ng’a takorereti omoiseke oye omwekungi ayamogwenerete, na onye omoiseke oyio oeteire obuya bw’obosae bwaye, onye negwenerete, tiga omonto oyio akore buna arigetie; tari ebibe akora, amotige anyuomwe." 
1Corinthians7:37 Korende oyotenenire noboremu ase enkoro yaye, na tari nokorigia, korende anyare kogambera okogania kwaye, naende orengereirie enkoro yaye ime amotige buna omoiseke oye omwekungi, nakore buya." 
1Corinthians7:38 Gaki oyorasokie omoiseke oye omwekungi nakore buya; na oyotamosogeti okorire buya kobua. 
1Corinthians7:39 Omokungu nigo asibire ase omosacha oye ekero omosacha oye are moyo, korende omosacha oye karakwe, rirorio osiboirwe; nanyare konyuomwa na monto onde bwensi oyo aranche, korende nase Omonene oka." 
1Corinthians7:40 Korende anga mbuya kobua karabe buna are. Nigo ndoche inche; na inche narengereirie ng’a ninde n’Omoika o Nyasae. 
1Corinthians8:1 Ase amang’ana ’ebinto bikoruegwa ebing’wanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, twamanyire ng’a “intwe twensi ntore ne chisemi.” “Chisemi” nigo chikorenta oboenenu, korende obwanchani nigo bokoagacha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Omonto karekage ng’a namanyete ring’ana rinde rionsi, oyio taramanya nonya mbono buna emogwenerete amanye." 
1Corinthians8:3 Korende omonto kamwanchete Nyasae, oyio omanyirwe nere." 
1Corinthians8:4 Gaki ase amang’ana ay’okoria ebinto bikoruegwa ebing’wanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, twamanyire ng’a “omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa tai gento ase ense”, ekiagera twamanyire ng’a “Nyasae onde tari aande, otatiga oyomo bweka.”" 
1Corinthians8:5 Gaki, nonya chire echinde chikorokwa chinyasae igoro gose ense (buna chire “chinyasae” chinyinge, na “abanene” abange)" 
1Corinthians8:6 korende asetore intwe Nyasae noyomo bweka, oyore Tata, na ebinto bionsi nigo bikorwa asare, na intwe nigo tore moyo asare. Naende nareo Omonene oyomo, nere Yeso Kristo, na ebinto bionsi nere obitongete, naboigo naintwe nere ototongete." 
1Corinthians8:7 Korende obong’aini obo tibori ime ase abanto bonsi. Abande, ekiagera bakwenaria emegwekano y’ogosasimwa goika bono, bakoria endagera buna egento kiarurwe ekeng’wanso ase omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa, na ekiagera chinkoro chiabo chikobugwa bwango, nigo chikobekwa ogotacheneka." 
1Corinthians8:8 Korende endagera tegotorenta ang’e ase Nyasae. Totarieti, titogosiria gento, na toisa koria, tegotomenta gento." 
1Corinthians8:9 Korende rigereria ng’a obosibore boria bwaino tibocha kobagocha baria bare abareu. 
1Corinthians8:10 Naki omonto karakorore aye, omonto ore nobong’aini, goikaransete ase endagera ime ase hekalu y’emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, Inee, onye enkoro yaye ekobugwa bwango, takonyora oboremu goika arie ebinto bikoruegwa ebingwanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Na oria omoreu nigo agosirigwa ase engencho y’obong’aini bwao, nere oyominto Kristo akwete ase engencho yaye." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ase ayio, komorakorere abamino ebibe na goichania chinkoro chiria chikobugwa bwango, igo mwakoreire Kristo ebibe." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ase ayio, endagera keragere oyominto agwe, rirorio tinkoria enyama nonya ng’ake, timbaisa kogera oyominto agwe." 
1Corinthians9:1 Inee! Inche tindi omosibore? Inche tindi omotomwa? Tinaroche Yeso, Omonene oito? Inwe timori okwama kw’emeremo yane ase Omonene?" 
1Corinthians9:2 Naki onye inche tindi omotomwa ase abande, korende nomotomwa inde asemore inwe. Inwe nigo more ekemanyererio ki’obotomwa bwane ase Omonene." 
1Corinthians9:3 Oko nakwo okoiraneria kwane ase baria bakomboria. 
1Corinthians9:4 Inee! Titori ne ribaga ri’okoria na konywa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Titori ne ribaga koira amo naintwe omokungu ore oyominto ase okwegena buna abatomwa bande, na abamwabo Omonene, na Kefa bakorete?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Gose ninche bweka na Barnaba totari ne ribaga ri’ogotiga emeremo ya kera rituko? 
1Corinthians9:7 Morwani ki okogenda ase esegi kero kende gionsi na kweakanera ere omonyene? Moremi ki otakoria amasabibu ’omogondo oye bw’emesabibu? Gose ning’o okorisia riicho, otakonywa amabeere aye?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Inee! Nigo ngokwana aya buna mwanyabanto? Gose amachiko tari goteba boigo? 
1Corinthians9:9 Naki ase amachiko a Musa nigo arikire, “Tobaisa kobekera entang’ana ekeokio ekero ekoora endagera.” Inee! Nyasae narengereretie amang’ana e chintang’ana?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Inee! Tatebete ayio ase engencho yaito yoka? Ee, nigo arikire ase engencho yaito; ekiagera oyokorema nagwenerete korema ase ogosemeria, na ere oyokoora nigo akoora ase ogosemeria konyora ensemo yaye y’endagera." 
1Corinthians9:11 Onye intwe twabasimekeire ebinto bi’omoika, Inee, nering’ana rinene gatoragese ebinto biaino bi’ogokonya ase obogima bw’ense eye?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Onye abande banyorire ensemo ebatungetie korwa asemore, Inee, intwe titokoyenyora kobua mono? Korende titorakorera oboronge obo; korende nigo tokoremereria amang’ana onsi, titobaisa gotanga enchili ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Timomanyeti ng’a baria bagokora emeremo ase Hekalu nigo bakoria endagera korwa ase Hekalu, na baria bagokorera ase egesasimero mbare nensemo yabo ase ebinto bikoruegwa ebing’wanso?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Na Omonene naboigo ochikire ng’a baria bakorandia enchili banyore ebibagwenerete korwa ase enchili. 
1Corinthians9:15 Korende tindakorera amang’ana aya nonya ndimo. Gose tinyarigeti aya erinde abe boigo asende; naki mbuya ninkwa kobua omonto onde bwensi kong’ura ogwetogia kwane. 
1Corinthians9:16 Naki onye nkorandia enchili, tindi neri ingwetogeria, ekiagera okobetererigwa kwabekirwe asende. Obobe nobwane ntarandeti enchili!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Naki onye ngokora emeremo eye ase ogwancha kwane, ninde neng’eria; korende onye tari ase ogwancha kwane, nonya nabo negenirwe noborendi." 
1Corinthians9:18 Gaki eng’eria yane ninki? Neye, ng’a ndandie enchili ya Kristo ntari konyora ebintungetie, na tinsaba ebiaboronge biane ase okorandia enchili." 
1Corinthians9:19 Naki nonya inde nobosibore korwa ase abanto bonsi, nekorire omosomba o bonsi, erinde ndete abanto abange kobua." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ase Abayahudi nkaba buna Omoyahudi, erinde mbarente Abayahudi; ase baria bare inse y’amachiko nkaba buna oyore inse y’amachiko (nonya inche omonyene tindi inse y’amachiko) erinde mbarente baria bare inse y’amachiko." 
1Corinthians9:21 Ase baria batari namachiko nkaba buna oyo otari namachiko (tari buna tindi namachiko ase obosio bwa Nyasae, korende nigo inde inse y’amachiko a Kristo) erinde mbarente baria batari namachiko." 
1Corinthians9:22 Ase abare abareu nkaba omoreu, erinde mbarente abareu. Igo nkaba chingencho chionsi ase abanto bonsi, erinde inyare kobatooria abanto ase chinchera chionsi." 
1Corinthians9:23 Na inche nigo ngokora aya onsi ase engencho y’enchili, erinde inyare koba oyomo obo bw’abakonyora ogosesenigwa kwaye." 
1Corinthians9:24 Timomanyeti ng’a abwo bakoamererania ase okominyoka chimbero, nigo bakominyoka bonsi, korende noyomo bweka okonyora eng’eria? Minyoka boigo, erinde moyenyore." 
1Corinthians9:25 Na kera oyokoamererania ase chigosori nigo agwetanga ase onsi. Na abwo nigo bagokora bo, erinde banyore egutwa egosareka, korende intwe tonyore eye etagosareka." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nonya ninche nkominyoka nde chimbero ntari gotiting’ara; naboigo inkorwanera chinkundi, tari buna oyokorwana nembeo." 
1Corinthians9:27 Korende nigo ngochanda omobere one na koyokoria buna omosomba, erinde konarandeirie abande, inche timba omonto ogocha kwangwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Baminto, tindigeti momoche komanya ng’a chisokoro chiaito chionsi nigo chiarenge inse ye riire. Barabwo bonsi bagaeta egati y’enyancha;" 
1Corinthians10:2 bonsi bakabatiswa ase Musa ime ase riire na ime ase enyancha. 
1Corinthians10:3 Bonsi bakaria endagera eria eria y’omoika. 
1Corinthians10:4 Bonsi bakanywa ekenyugwa keria keria ki’omoika, ekiagera banywete korwa ase egetare ki’omoika kiabatunyanete; na egetare keria nakio Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:5 Korende abange babo Nyasae tagweneretwe nabarabwo, nakio kiagerete emebere yabo ekwete yasiareretwe ase erooro." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ebi igo biarenge ebiorokererio bi’ogotokurera, erinde intwe titoba abanto bakogania amabe, buna baria baganetie." 
1Corinthians10:7 Gose timoba abasasimi emegwekano buna abande babo barenge; buna erikire, “Abanto nigo baikaransete koria na konywa, bagatenena gotenga.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Gose titokora obotomani buna abande babo bakorete, na abanto chilifu emerongo ebere na isato bagakwa ase rituko erimo." 
1Corinthians10:9 Gose titoteema Omonene, buna abande babo bakorete, bagasirigwa ne ching’iti." 
1Corinthians10:10 Gose timwemurungania buna abande babo bemurunganetie bagasirigwa noria Omosiria. 
1Corinthians10:11 Aya agakoreka asebare buna ekiorokererio, akarikwa ase ogotokurera intwe abatogocherwa nomoerio bw’ense." 
1Corinthians10:12 Ase ayio oyogwekaga ng’a nateneine erende tagwa. 
1Corinthians10:13 Ogoteemwa tikwabanyorete inwe, otatiga okore kw’engencho ya mwanyabanto. Nyasae nomwegenwa, takobatiga moteemwe goetania buna chinguru chiaino ching’ana, korende amo nogoteemwa nakore egesieri mogosokera, erinde monyare gokoremereria." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ase engencho eyio, abanchwa baane, tama, timobaisa gosasima emegwekano." 
1Corinthians10:15 Igo ngokwana asemore buna ase abanto bare nobong’aini; morenge aya ngokwana. 
1Corinthians10:16 Egekombe keria ki’ogosesenigwa togosesenia, Inee, tikeri okobwatana namanyinga a Kristo? Omogati oria togosamunyora, tori okobwatana nomobere o Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Ekiagera omogati noyomo, intwe abatore abange nigo tore omobere oyomo; naki intwe twensi nigo tokonyora ensemo yaito y’omogati oria oyomo." 
1Corinthians10:18 Rigereria chingencho chi’Abaisraeli; abwo bakoria ebing’wanso ebio, Inee, tibari kobwatana negesasimero?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Ninki ngokwana? Ng’a keria gekoruegwa ekeng’wanso ase omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa negento? Gose omogwekano oria negento? 
1Corinthians10:20 Taibo, korende ebinto biria abanto b’Ebisaku bakorua buna ebing’wanso nigo bakoruera ebirecha, gose tari Nyasae. Inche tinyancheti inwe mobwatane nebirecha." 
1Corinthians10:21 Timokonyara konywera egekombe ki’Omonene na egekombe ki’ebirecha. Timokonyara kobwatana nemesa y’Omonene na emesa y’ebirecha. 
1Corinthians10:22 Inee! Igo tokogera Omonene abe ne ribero? Gose ntore ne chinguru kobua ere? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Ninde nobosibore gokora kende gionsi”, korende tari bionsi birankonye. “Ninde nobosibore gokora kende gionsi”, korende tari bionsi bikoagacha." 
1Corinthians10:24 Omonto terigeria kwenyorera ebiya, korende arigerie omogisangio oye ebiya." 
1Corinthians10:25 Karie kera egento egekoonigwa ase echiiro, timona koboraboria. Timotiga chinkoro chiaino chichandeke." 
1Corinthians10:26 “Naki ense ney’Omonene, amo na bionsi ebireo.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Onye omonto otari nokwegena okobarangeria inwe ase endagera, na inwe morigetie kogendao; karie kera egento kerabekwe ase amasio aino, timona kobora‐boria. Timotiga chinkoro chiaino chichandeke." 
1Corinthians10:28 (Korende omonto karabatebie, “Egento ekio kiarurwe ekeng’wanso ase omogwekano bw’ogosasimwa”, timoria ase engencho yaye ere ayaborokia, na ase enkoro yaye, erinde techandeka." 
1Corinthians10:29 Natebire “enkoro techandeka”, tari eyao, korende eyaye oria onde.) Nase ki obosibore bwane bokogambigwa nenkoro y’omonto onde omoao?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Kondarie ensemo yane ase ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, nase ki nkoramwa ase egento nasabeire?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Gaki komokoria, gose mokonywa gose mogokora ing’ana rinde rionsi, kora onsi ase obonene bwa Nyasae." 
1Corinthians10:32 Timogocha Abayahudi gose Abagiriki, gose ekanisa ya Nyasae." 
1Corinthians10:33 Mobe buna inche; nkogwenera abanto bonsi ase chinchera chionsi. Tinkorigia kwegwenera inche omonyene, korende ngwenere abwo bare abange, erinde banyare gotoorigwa." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mobe abegi baane, buna inche inde omwegi o Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Nabatogirie baminto, ekiagera mwang’inyoire ase amang’ana onsi, na inwe mwabwatire chingencho echi nabaete koreng’ana buna nabachiete." 
1Corinthians11:3 Korende nindigetie momanye ng’a Kristo nere omotwe o kera omosacha; na omosacha nere omotwe bw’omokungu; na Nyasae nere omotwe o Kristo. 
1Corinthians11:4 Kera omosacha kagosaba gose gakobana, na ere nare negento atubete omotwe oye, igo tasigeti omotwe oye." 
1Corinthians11:5 Korende kera omokungu kagosaba gose kobana na taboeti omotwe oye, igo tasigeti omotwe oye, nigo areng’aine nere oyokigitete etukia yaye." 
1Corinthians11:6 Naki onye omokungu tarigeti kweboa, tiga akigite etukia yaye; korende onye nobosooku ase omokungu konachwa etukia yaye gose gokigitwa tiga eboe." 
1Corinthians11:7 Naki tegwenereti omosacha gotuba omotwe oye, ekiagera nomogwekano bw’obonene bwa Nyasae; korende omokungu nobonene bw’omosacha." 
1Corinthians11:8 (Naki omosacha tarwete ase omokungu, korende nomokungu orwete ase omosacha." 
1Corinthians11:9 Gose omosacha tatongetwe ase engencho y’omokungu, korende nomokungu ase engencho y’omosacha.)" 
1Corinthians11:10 Ase ayio negwenerete omokungu abe nekemanyererio gi’okobua ase omotwe oye ase engencho y’abamalaika. 
1Corinthians11:11 (Korende ase Omonene omokungu takoba omosacha ataiyo, gose omosacha takoba omokungu ataiyo." 
1Corinthians11:12 Naki buna omokungu arwete ase omosacha, naboigo na omosacha nere akoiborwa nomokungu, korende bionsi nigo bikorua ase Nyasae.)" 
1Corinthians11:13 Egambie inwe abanyene. Inee! Mboronge omokungu asabe Nyasae atatubeti omotwe oye? 
1Corinthians11:14 Inee! Engencho ya mwanyabanto teri kworokereria ng’a onye omosacha okoba netukia entambe nigo ere obosooku asare," 
1Corinthians11:15 korende onye omokungu okoba netukia entambe nigo ere obonene bwaye? Ekiagera oeirwe etukia eria ase ogwetuba. 
1Corinthians11:16 Korende onye monto onde bwensi origetie korenta amang’ana ’okoamererania ase engencho eyio, intwe titori nengencho buna eyio, nonya ne chikanisa chia Nyasae." 
1Corinthians11:17 Korende ase okobaa amachiko akobwatia ayio tinkobatogia, ekiagera timori gosangererekana ase amaya korende ase ogosaria." 
1Corinthians11:18 Naki ritang’ani naigure ng’a ekero mogosangerereka ase ekanisa ogwatananekana nkore asemore. Ayande aya naigure negenire ng’a namaene. 
1Corinthians11:19 Naki ogwatananekana nkogwenerete kobe ase egati yaino, erinde abwo abancheirwe bamanyekane maiso marore asemore." 
1Corinthians11:20 Ekero mogosangererekana amo, timori koria endagera y’Omonene;" 
1Corinthians11:21 naki kera oyomo nigo agotang’ana kobogoria endagera yaye ase okoria, oyomo nare nenchara, na oyonde otindete." 
1Corinthians11:22 Inee! Timori ne chinyomba aase mokoragerera na konywera? Gose mwachayire ekanisa ya Nyasae na gosookia abwo batari na gento? Naki ndabatebie? Nimbatogie ase aya? Yaya, tinkobatogia." 
1Corinthians11:23 Naki inche nkanyora korwa ase Omonene ayanabaeire inwe, ng’a Omonene Yeso obotuko boria aruetwe akabogoria omogati," 
1Corinthians11:24 gakoorire koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, akayosamunyora, akabora, “Oyo noro omobere one orurwe ase engencho yaino; kora iga ase okong’inyora inche.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Naboigo akabogoria egekombe nyuma y’okoria, akabora, “Egekombe eke nokobwatana okoyia ase amanyinga aane; kora iga kera ekero mogokenywera ase okong’inyora inche.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Naki kera ekero mokoria omogati oyo na konywera egekombe eke, nigo mokoraria amakweri ’Omonene goika achiche." 
1Corinthians11:27 Gaki kera oyokoria omogati oyo gose konywera egekombe eke ki’Omonene buna etagwenereti nabe nokomocha igoro y’omobere bw’Omonene na amanyinga aye. 
1Corinthians11:28 Tiga omonto erenge omonyene, erio arie omogati na konywera egekombe." 
1Corinthians11:29 Naki oyokoria na konywa buna etagwenereti nigo akwegambia ere omonyene ase okoria na konywa, ase ogotaatanana ng’a oria nomobere bw’Omonene." 
1Corinthians11:30 Nakio gekogera abange asemore bare abareu na abarwaire, na abanto batai bake bakure." 
1Corinthians11:31 Korende gatoregambie buya intwe abanyene, anga titwagambigwa." 
1Corinthians11:32 Gatokogambigwa iga togosusurwa n’Omonene, titobaisa konacherwa ekina amo nense." 
1Corinthians11:33 Gaki baminto, komogosangererekana amo ase okoria, moganyane." 
1Corinthians11:34 Omonto kare nenchara, tiga arie mwaye, timobaisa gosangererekana amo ase okonyora okogambigwa. Na aya atigaire ninyaroisie ekero ndache." 
1Corinthians12:1 Ase amang’ana ’ebiegwa ebikorwa ase Omoika, baminto, tindigeti momoche komanya." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mwamanyire ng’a ekero mwarenge ab’Ebisaku nigo mware koirwa ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, eyio etarenge gokwana, buna mware gotang’anwa." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ase ayio nindigetie kobamanyia, ng’a monto onde tari oyogokwana ase Omoika o Nyasae ogoteba ng’a, “Yeso oragererigwe!” Gose onde takonyara goteba, “Yeso n’Omonene”, otatiga ase Omoika Omochenu." 
1Corinthians12:4 Bono mbireo ebiegwa ao ao, korende Omoika noro oria oyomo." 
1Corinthians12:5 Naboigo nkore ogokora ao ao, korende Omonene nere oria oyomo." 
1Corinthians12:6 Naende nkore ogokora kw’emeremo ase chinchera ao ao, korende Nyasae nere oria oria ogokora emeremo yonsi ase bonsi." 
1Corinthians12:7 Korende kera oyomo oeirwe okomaanorerwa kw’Omoika, erinde bonsi bakonywe." 
1Corinthians12:8 Naki omonto oyomo ase Omoika aegwa ogokwana kw’obong’aini, na oyonde ring’ana ri’okomanya ase Omoika oria oyomo." 
1Corinthians12:9 Oyonde aegwa okwegena ase Omoika oria oria, na oyonde aegwa ekeegwa gi’okogwenia ase Omoika oria oria." 
1Corinthians12:10 Oyonde aegwa gokora emeremo y’ebikone bie chinguru, na oyonde obobani, na oyonde okomanya kw’ogwatanana emeika, na oyonde ogokwana kw’emenwa ao ao, na oyonde okoonchora emenwa." 
1Corinthians12:11 Korende ebiegwa ebi bionsi nigo bikorwa ase Omoika oyo oyomo, oria oria okogabera kera oyomo buna bwanchete." 
1Corinthians12:12 Naki buna omobere ore oyomo, oro nore nebiimo ebinge, na ebiimo bionsi bi’omobere oria, nonya bire ebinge, nigo bire omobere oyomo; naboigo na Kristo are." 
1Corinthians12:13 Naki ase Omoika oyomo intwe twensi tokabatiswa, tokaba omobere oyomo, nonya tore Abayahudi, gose tore Abagiriki, onye tore abasomba, gose tore abasibore; intwe twensi nigo twanyoisetigwe Omoika oyomo." 
1Corinthians12:14 Naki omobere tori nekiimo ekemo, korende nebinge." 
1Corinthians12:15 Onye okogoro kogoteba, “Ekiagera inche tindi okoboko, tindi oyo bw’omobere”, Inee, igo tikori okw’omobere ase engencho eyio?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Na onye ogoto kogoteba, “Ekiagera inche tindi eriso, inche tindi oyo bw’omobere”, Inee, igo tikori okw’omobere ase engencho eyio?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Onye omobere bwonsi oba eriso, anga okoigwa ng’ai kore? Onye bwonsi nogoto, anga okonyonka ng’ai kore?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Korende bono Nyasae obekire ebiimo, kera ekemo ase omobere buna arigetie." 
1Corinthians12:19 Korende onye bionsi biba ekiimo ekemo, anga omobere ng’ai ore?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Bono ebiimo nebinge bire, korende omobere noyomo." 
1Corinthians12:21 Eriso tirikonyara gotebia okoboko, “Tinkoganeti”, gose omotwe tokonyara gotebia amagoro, “Timbaganeti.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Korende kobua mono, ebiimo biria bi’omobere bigokagerwa ng’a tibiri ne chinguru, nigo biganeirie kobua." 
1Corinthians12:23 Na ebiimo biria bi’omobere bigokagerwa ng’a tibiri nogosika twabieire ogosika kobua; na ebiimo biaito bitari nobuya, nigo tokobiboyia buya kobua," 
1Corinthians12:24 naki ebiimo biaito bire nobuya tibiganeti ayio. Korende Nyasae obwatanirie omobere, na ekiimo keria keremeire ogosika okeire ogosika kobua," 
1Corinthians12:25 erinde tikoba ogwatananekana ase omobere, korende ebiimo birendane." 
1Corinthians12:26 Onye ekiimo ekemo gechandegete, ebiimo bionsi nigo bichandegete nabirobio; onye ekiimo ekemo kegotogigwa, ebiimo bionsi nigo bikogoka amo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Inwe nigo more omobere o Kristo na ebiimo bi’omobere oyio, kera ekemo aase aye." 
1Corinthians12:28 Na Nyasae obekire ase ekanisa ritang’ani abatomwa, eria kabere ababani, eria gatato aborokia. Naende akabeka abakori emeremo y’ebikone bie chinguru, abanyorire ebiegwa bi’okogwenia amarwaire, abakonyi, abagambi, naende abagokwana emenwa ao ao." 
1Corinthians12:29 Inee! Bonsi nabatomwa? Bonsi nababani? Bonsi naborokia? Bonsi ngokora bare ebikone bie chinguru? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonsi mbare nebiegwa bi’okogwenia abarwaire? Bonsi ngokwana bare emenwa ao ao? Bonsi nkoonchora bare? 
1Corinthians12:31 Rigia mono ebiegwa ebiya kobua. Naende nimborokie enchera ere engiya mono. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ninsa gokwana ase emenwa ya mwanyabanto na ey’abamalaika, onye tindi nobwanchani, nabeire buna etaai ekwoga gose endege ekobuga." 
1Corinthians13:2 Naende ninsa koba nekeegwa gi’okobana, na komanya obobisi bwonsi, ne chisemi chionsi; nimba nokwegena gwonsi oko koranyare kong’anyia ebitunwa, korende onye tindi nobwanchani, inche tindi gento." 
1Corinthians13:3 Naende ningabera abataka ebinto biane bionsi, naende nindua omobere one oyie ase omorero, onye tindi nobwanchani, ayio takongwenera gento." 
1Corinthians13:4 Obwanchani nigo bokoremereria, naende nigo bokoba nobwororo. Obwanchani tibori koba ne ribero, tibori koenena, tibori gwetogia," 
1Corinthians13:5 tibokomocha koba nogosika, tibokorigia ayare ayaye, tibori kobeeigwa, tibori kobara amabe;" 
1Corinthians13:6 tibokogokera obobe, korende bogokera ekeene." 
1Corinthians13:7 Obwanchani nigo bokoremereria onsi, bwegena onsi, bosemeria onsi, bobogoria onsi." 
1Corinthians13:8 Obwanchani tibori nomoerio; korende koborabeo obobani, nabosire; kerabe emenwa, neere; gochirabe chisemi, nachisire." 
1Corinthians13:9 Naki okomanya gwaito tikori okw’oboikeranu, na obobani bwaito tibori obw’oboikeranu;" 
1Corinthians13:10 korende ekero oboikeranu bogocha, egetaikeraneti nagesire." 
1Corinthians13:11 Ekero narenge omwana, nigo narenge gokwana buna omwana, nigo narenge korengereria buna omwana, naende nigo narenge komanya buna omwana; konabeire omonto omonene natigire amang’ana ’obwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Naki ekero kia bono nigo tokorora buna ase ekerore buna orotutu; korende ekero keria ntorore obosio ase obosio. Ekero kia bono namanyire ase ensemo; ekero keria nimanye onsi, buna inche imanyekanete kegima." 
1Corinthians13:13 Gaki bono biatigaire okwegena, na ogosemeria, na obwanchani, aya atato; erire rinene ase aya nobwanchani." 
1Corinthians14:1 Rigia obwanchani, teema mono konyora ebiegwa bi’Omoika; kobua mono ase ebi, monyare kobana." 
1Corinthians14:2 Naki oyogokwana ase omonwa otamanyekaneti, tari gokwana nabanto, korende na Nyasae, ekiagera onde tari okomoigwa, korende nigo agokwana amang’ana a bobisi ase Omoika." 
1Corinthians14:3 Korende ere oyokobana, nigo agokwana ase abanto amang’ana ay’okobaagacha, na kobaremia, na kobabeka chinguru." 
1Corinthians14:4 Oyogokwana ase omonwa otamanyekaneti nigo akweagacha ere omonyene; korende oyokobana nigo akoagacha ekanisa. 
1Corinthians14:5 Inche nigo ndigetie inwe mwensi mokwane ase emenwa, korende kobua mono ng’a monyare kobana. Ere oyokobana nomonene kobua oyogokwana ase emenwa, otatiga omonto aonchore, erinde ekanisa eagachwe." 
1Corinthians14:6 Gaki baminto, kondache asemore na gokwana ase emenwa, inki ndabagwenere, onye aya ngokwana takoba amang’ana ’okomaanorerwa gose obong’aini, gose obobani, gose okworokereria?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Nonya nebinto bitari nobogima, buna ekeroria, gose obokano, onye tibikorua eriogi rire nogwatananekana, naki eramanyekane ngotera ki gokobugigwa ase ekeroria gose obokano?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Naende onye egetureri gekobugigwa na gosokia egeturi getamanyekaneti, ning’o orabe ang’e ase esegi?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Naboigo nainwe motakwaneti ring’ana rikoigweka, ring’ana riria rigokwanwa, naki riramanyekane? Naki igo morakwane ase embeo bosa." 
1Corinthians14:10 Inyora ng’a nere emenwa ere ne chingencho chinyinge ase ense, gose onde tari nonya noyomo, otari nengencho yaye." 
1Corinthians14:11 Onye tinkomanya engencho y’omonwa oria, nimbe buna omogeni asare ere oyogokwana, na ere nabe buna omogeni asende." 
1Corinthians14:12 Naboigo nainwe, ekiagera morigetie mono koba abanto bare nebiegwa bi’Omoika, rigia mono momente koba nabio, erinde moagache ekanisa." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ase ayio, ere oyogokwana ase omonwa otamanyekaneti tiga asabe aegwe ekeegwa gi’okoonchora." 
1Corinthians14:14 Naki kondasabe ase omonwa otamanyekaneti omoika one nigo ogosaba, korende obong’aini bwane tibori kwama." 
1Corinthians14:15 Inki rende ekio? Nindigetie nsabe ase omoika, naende nindigetie nsabe ase obong’aini. Nindigetie ntere ase omoika, naende nindigetie ntere ase obong’aini." 
1Corinthians14:16 Aande onye aye ogotogia Nyasae ase omoika, nere oyoikaransete otamanyeti, naki araitabe “Amina” ase ogoaka kwao ng’a mbuya mono, na ere tamanyeti aya ogokwana?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Naki nekeene, aye gwatogirie buya, korende oria oyonde taagachiri." 
1Corinthians14:18 Namoakeire Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera ngokwana ase emenwa kobua inwe mwensi;" 
1Corinthians14:19 korende nanchire gokwana amang’ana atano ase ekanisa ase obong’aini bwane, inyare kworokereria abande, kobua gokwana amang’ana chilifu ikomi ase emenwa etamanyekaneti." 
1Corinthians14:20 Baminto, timoba buna abana abake ase ebirengererio biaino; ase obobe mobe abana ebing’werere, korende ase okomanya kwaino mobe abanto abanene." 
1Corinthians14:21 Ase amachiko nigo arikire, “Omonene otebire: Ase abanto b’emenwa etamanyekaneti, na ase ebikoba bi’emenwa y’abageni ninkwane nabanto aba. Nonya nabo tibakonyigwera.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Gaki emenwa eyio nekemanyererio, tari ase abegenete, korende ase abategeneti. Korende obobani nekemanyererio, tari ase abategeneti, korende ase abegenete." 
1Corinthians14:23 Gaki onye ekanisa yonsi, egosangererekana amo, na mwensi mogokwana ase emenwa, erio abanto ba isiko bagocha, gose abategeneti, Inee, tibagoteba ng’a nigo more chibarimo?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Korende onye bonsi bakobana, omonto otegeneti ogocha, gose omonto o isiko, orokigwe na bonsi ng’a nomomochi are, agambigwe na bonsi;" 
1Corinthians14:25 naboigo obobisi bw’enkoro yaye bobe maiso marore; na igo aragwe maumama, na gosasima Nyasae, atore ng’a ekeene Nyasae nigo are ase egati yaino." 
1Corinthians14:26 Naki rende baminto? Komogosangererekana amo, kera oyomo nare nogotera, gose okworokereria, gose okomaanorerwa, gose gokwana ase omonwa, gose koonchora, amang’ana onsi tiga akoreke ase okoagacha ekanisa." 
1Corinthians14:27 Onye omonto ogokwana ase omonwa otamanyekaneti, bakwane babere gose batato boka, korende kera omonto ase ribaga riaye, na oyomo aonchore." 
1Corinthians14:28 Korende onye oyokoonchora taiyo, tiga oyogokwana ase omonwa akire ase ekanisa, ekwanere bweka omonyene naende akwane na Nyasae." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ababani bakwane babere gose batato, na abande barenge amang’ana aya bakwana." 
1Corinthians14:30 Korende oyonde oikaransete karaigorerwe ring’ana, oria bwe ritang’anitiga akire." 
1Corinthians14:31 Naki inwe mwensi namonyare kobana oyomo ase oyomo, erinde bonsi banyare kweorokereria, na bonsi baremigwe." 
1Corinthians14:32 Emeika y’ababani nigo ekoigwera ababani. 
1Corinthians14:33 Naki Nyasae tari Nyasae bw’eburuburu, korende oyo bw’omorembe. Buna ere ase chikanisa chionsi chi’abachenu,"
