1Corinthians14:34 abakungu bakire ase chikanisa. Naki tibari ne ribaga ri’ogokwana, korende baigwere buna amachiko agoteba." 
1Corinthians14:35 Onye barigetie kweorokereria ring’ana, tiga baborie abasacha babo inka. Naki nobosooku omokungu gokwana ase ekanisa." 
1Corinthians14:36 Inee! Ring’ana ria Nyasae nasemore riarwete, gose ninwe mweka riaikerete?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Omonto karerore ng’a nomobani are, gose noyo bw’Omoika, tiga amanye ng’a aya nabarikeire namachiko ’Omonene." 
1Corinthians14:38 Onye omonto tarigeti koyamanya, tiga abe omoriri." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ase ayio baminto, rigia mono okobana, gose timokana ogokwana kw’emenwa." 
1Corinthians14:40 Amang’ana onsi akoreke ase obuya na ase omoroberio. 
1Corinthians15:1 Bono baminto, nkobainyoria nde enchili eyio nabaranderetie; nero mwanyorete, na ase eyio nao moteneine," 
1Corinthians15:2 na ase eyio mwatoorigwe, onye mwabwatire mono amang’ana nabaranderetie. Onye taibo, rirorio nigo mwegenete bosa." 
1Corinthians15:3 Naki ritang’ani nabarenterete amang’ana aya nanyorete inche omonyene, ng’a Kristo nigo akwete ase engencho y’ebibe biaito, buna amariko agoteba;" 
1Corinthians15:4 naende agatindekwa, erio akaboka rituko ria gatato, buna amariko agoteba;" 
1Corinthians15:5 naende akaorokera Kefa; naende na baria ikomi na babere. 
1Corinthians15:6 Nyuma akaorokera abaminto kobua amagana atano amo. Abange ase abwo moyo bare nonya mbono, abande bakure." 
1Corinthians15:7 Nyuma y’ayio akaorokera Yakobo, erio abatomwa bonsi." 
1Corinthians15:8 Na omoerio akang’orokera nainche. Inche nigo inde buna oyoiboretwe ase ekero getare boronge. 
1Corinthians15:9 Naki inche nomoke ase abatomwa, ntagwenereti korokwa omotomwa, ekiagera nachandete ekanisa ya Nyasae." 
1Corinthians15:10 Korende ase obuya bwa Nyasae nabeire buna inde; na obuya bwaye bore asende tibwarenge bosa. Korende kobua mono nakorire emeremo goetania bonsi, gose tari inche, korende obuya bwa Nyasae obore amo nainche." 
1Corinthians15:11 Gaki onye ninche, onye mbaria, naboigo tokorandia, naboigo mwegenete." 
1Corinthians15:12 Bono onye Kristo orandigwe asemore buna nabogetigwe korwa ase abakure, naki rende abande asemore bagoteba ng’a kobokigwa kw’abakure tikori?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Korende onye okobokigwa kw’abakure tikori, rirorio Kristo nere tabogetigwe." 
1Corinthians15:14 Naende onye Kristo tabogetigwe, rirorio okorandia gwaito nokwa bosa, na okwegena kwaino nokwa bosa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ee, naintwe rirorio twarorekanire koba birori b’oborimo ba Nyasae, ekiagera twatebete ng’a Nyasae nigo abogetie Kristo, oyo rirorio tamobogetie, onye abakure tibakobokigwa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Naki onye abakure tibakobokigwa, rirorio Kristo nere tabogetigwe." 
1Corinthians15:17 Na onye Kristo tabogetigwe, okwegena kwaino nokwa bosa; nigo more nonya mbono ase ebibe biaino." 
1Corinthians15:18 Naende nabwo bakwete ase Kristo basirire. 
1Corinthians15:19 Onye nase obogima obo bwoka tosemeretie Kristo, rirorio intwe nabataka tore kobua abanto bonsi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Korende bono nekeene ng’a Kristo obokigwe korwa ase abakure buna ogotongorwa kw’abakure. 
1Corinthians15:21 Naki buna amakweri arentetwe nomonto, naboigo nokobokigwa kw’abakure kwarentirwe nomonto." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ekiagera buna ase Adamu bonsi bagokwa, naboigo nase Kristo bonsi nababe moyo," 
1Corinthians15:23 korende kera oyomo aase aye; Kristo agatongora, naende ekero arachiche, abare abaye nababe moyo." 
1Corinthians15:24 Erio agwo omoerio ochiche, ekero arae Nyasae Tata oboruoti, nyuma gasaririe kera obogambi na kera okobua ne chinguru." 
1Corinthians15:25 Naki negwenerete ere agambe, goika abeke ababisa bonsi inse ase amagoro aye." 
1Corinthians15:26 Omobisa bw’omoerio orasirigwe namakweri. 
1Corinthians15:27 “Naki Nyasae obekire ebinto bionsi inse ase amagoro aye.” Korende ekero agoteba, “Bionsi biabekirwe inse asare”, nigo amanyekanete ng’a Nyasae, oyobegete ebinto bionsi inse asare, tabariri ase ebinto ebio." 
1Corinthians15:28 Gaki ebinto bionsi kobiabekirwe inse asare, erio agwo Omwana omonyene nere nabekwe inse ase Nyasae, oyo obegete ebinto bionsi inse asare, erinde Nyasae abe nokobua ase bionsi." 
1Corinthians15:29 Inee! Aba bakobatiswa ase engencho y’abakure, naki rende bagokora? Onye abakure tibakoboka nonya ng’ake, nase ki bakobatiswa ase engencho yabo?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Nase ki tore nemechando kera engaki? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ekeene baminto, ase ogwetogia kwane inde nakwo asemore ase Kristo Yeso Omonene oito, nigo n gokwa kera rituko." 
1Corinthians15:32 Onye, nase engencho ya mwanyabanto, nkarwana ne ching’iti chintindi aaria Efeso, inki erangwenere? Onye abakure tibakoboka, “Tiga torie na konywa, ekiagera ankio natokwe.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Timong’aineka! “Egosori embe nigo egosaria chingencho chingiya.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Boka buna egwenerete ase oboronge, timokora ebibe naende. Naki abande tibamomanyeti Nyasae. Natebire aya ase okobasookia." 
1Corinthians15:35 Korende omonto naborie, “Naki abakure baraboke? Naende mobere ki barache noro?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Omoriri oyo, eke ogosimeka aye, tikeri komera getakweti." 
1Corinthians15:37 Neke ogosimeka, tori gosimeka egento keria kegocha koba, korende embusuro yoka; onye nengano gose mbusuru ende yonsi." 
1Corinthians15:38 Korende Nyasae ayea ekieni buna anchete, na kera embusuro ayea ekieni kiaye." 
1Corinthians15:39 Chinyama chionsi tichiri echimo; korende echinde nechia mwanyabanto, echinde nechie ching’iti, echinde nechie chinyoni, na echinde nechie chinswe." 
1Corinthians15:40 Naende mbire igoro ebitongwa bitongire, na mbire ase ense ebitongwa bitongire, korende obonene bw’ebia igoro nigo bore ao, na obonene bw’ebia nse nigo bore ao." 
1Corinthians15:41 Obonene bw’erioba nigo bore ao, na obonene bw’omotienyi nigo bore ao, na obonene bwe ching’enang’eni nigo bore ao, naende ogwatananekana nkore ase egati ye ching’enang’eni chinyene ase obonene." 
1Corinthians15:42 Naboigo nokobokigwa kw’abakure. Osimekwa ase ogosareka, obokigwa ase ogotasareka." 
1Corinthians15:43 Osimekwa ase obosooku, obokigwa ase obonene; osimekwa ase oboreu, obokigwa ase chinguru." 
1Corinthians15:44 Omobere o mwanyabanto osimekwa, korende omobere bw’omoika obokigwa. Onye omobere o mwanyabanto oreo, naboigo noyo bw’omoika noreo." 
1Corinthians15:45 Naboigo erikire, “Omonto bwe ritang’ani Adamu akaba omonto ore moyo”, Adamu bw’omoerio akaba omoika bw’okoa obogima." 
1Corinthians15:46 Korende oria orenge bw’omoika, tari oro orenge bwe ritang’ani, korende noria bw’omobere o mwanyabanto orenge bwe ritang’ani; nyuma y’ayio oria bw’omoika." 
1Corinthians15:47 Omonto bwe ritang’ani akarwa inse, agatongwa korwa ase amaroba; omonto o kabere akarwa igoro." 
1Corinthians15:48 Buna omonto oyo bw’amaroba arenge, naboigo nab’amaroba bare; na buna omonto o igoro are, naboigo naba igoro bare." 
1Corinthians15:49 Na buna tobogoretie ekieni ki’oria bw’amaroba, naboigo torabogorie ekieni ki’oria o igoro." 
1Corinthians15:50 Abaminto, aya nkobatebia naya, ng’a omobere na amanyinga tibikonyora omwando bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae; gose ogosareka tigokonyora omwando bw’ogotasareka." 
1Corinthians15:51 Rigereria, aya nkobatebia nobobisi. Titogokwa intwe twensi, korende twensi natoonchorwe," 
1Corinthians15:52 ase ekero egesinini, okomiamia na okoramokia, ekero ki’egetureri ki’omoerio. Naki egetureri nakebuge, na abakure nababokigwe, tibaba nogosareka, na intwe natoonchorwe." 
1Corinthians15:53 Naki ogosareka kwagweneire koboigwe ogotasareka, na ogokwa koboigwe ogotakwa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ekero oyo bw’ogosareka oranyore ogotasareka, na oyo bw’ogokwa oranyore ogotakwa; erio naribe ring’ana riria ririkire, “Amakweri amerirwe ase okobua.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Amakweri, ng’ai okobua kwao kore? Amakweri, ng’ai obororo bwao bore?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Obororo bw’amakweri nebibe, ne chinguru chi’ebibe namachiko." 
1Corinthians15:57 Korende mbuya mono ase Nyasae, ere oyogotoa okobua goetera ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:58 Gaki baminto, abanchwa, mobe ne chinguru, motari gotengechingwa, momente mono gokora emeremo y’Omonene ase amatuko onsi, momanye ng’a emeremo yaino ase Omonene teri bosa." 
1Corinthians16:1 Bono ase amang’ana ’ogosangererigwa kw’ebiegwa ase abachenu, buna nachigete abanto be chikanisa chia Galatia, nainwe mokore boigo." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ase kera rituko rie ritang’ani ri’echuma, kera oyomo asemore abe okogacha mwaye ensemo ase eki anyorire, koreng’ana buna aranyare, erinde ebiegwa tibisangererigwa ekero nachire." 
1Corinthians16:3 Inche kondaike nimbatome ne rirube aba morachore, baire ebiegwa biaino goika Yerusalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Onye ngwenerete ngende inche, rirorio nabagende amo nainche." 
1Corinthians16:5 Korende ninchiche asemore, nyuma konaetire egati ya Makedonia, ekiagera nindengereretie goeta egati ya Makedonia." 
1Corinthians16:6 Aande gose nimenye amo nainwe, gose nimenye seino ekero ki’obokendu, monyare gonkooba ekero kende gionsi aase ndigetie kogenda." 
1Corinthians16:7 Naki tindigeti kororana nainwe ase ogoeta gwoka, ekiagera ninganetie komenya seino egeka getai geke, Omonene karanche." 
1Corinthians16:8 Bono nimenye ase Efeso goika rituko rinene ria Pentekosti; 
1Corinthians16:9 naki naigoreirwe egesieri ekegare kerarente okwama, korende abange mbareo bakong’amereria." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ekero Timotheo arache, rigereria ng’a amenye amo nainwe atari nobwoba, ekiagera nigo agokora emeremo y’Omonene buna inche." 
1Corinthians16:11 Gaki monto onde tamochaya, korende momokoobe ase omorembe, erinde airane asende, ekiagera nimoganyete amo nabaminto." 
1Corinthians16:12 Korende ase amang’ana ’Apolo oyominto, nigo namosorora mono achiche asemore amo nabwo baminto bande, korende ere tarigeti gocha bono. Nachiche karanyore ribaga." 
1Corinthians16:13 Renda, motenene bokong’u ase okwegena kwaino, mobe abasacha, mobe ne chinguru." 
1Corinthians16:14 Amang’ana aino onsi akoreke ase obwanchani. 
1Corinthians16:15 Bono baminto, mwamanyire ng’a abanto ba nyomba mwa Stefana nigo barenge abe ritang’ani koonchoka agwo Akaya; na barabwo bebekire ase emeremo y’ogokorera abachenu." 
1Corinthians16:16 Nabasoroire baigwere abanto buna aba, na kera omonto oyogokora emeremo amo nabarabwo ase ogwechanda." 
1Corinthians16:17 Inche nagokire ase ogocha gwa Stefana na Fortunato, na Akaiko, ekiagera bamentete amange aya naremeire korwa asemore." 
1Corinthians16:18 Naki mbansasogetie ase omoika one, na emeika yaino yonsi. Gaki bainyore mono abanto buna abwo." 
1Corinthians16:19 Abanto be chikanisa chi’Asia babakwanirie. Akwila na Priskila babakwanirie mono ase Omonene, amo nekanisa ere ime ase enyomba yabo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abaminto bonsi babakwanirie. Kwanania na konyunyuntana ase obochenu. 
1Corinthians16:21 Oko nogokwania kwane inche Paulo ase okoboko kwane omonyene. 
1Corinthians16:22 Monto onde bwensi otamwancheti Omonene nabe oragererigwe. Inchuo, Omonene oito!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Obuya bw’Omonene Yeso bobe amo nainwe. 
1Corinthians16:24 Obwanchani bwane bobe amo nainwe mwensi ase Kristo Yeso. 
2Corinthians1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae, amo noyominto Timotheo nkobarikera tore inwe ab’ekanisa ya Nyasae ere ase Korinto amo nabachenu bonsi abare ase ense yonsi y’Akaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:3 Nyasae, Tata bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, Tata bw’amabera, Nyasae bw’okoremia gwonsi, atogigwe." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ere nigo agotoremia ase emechando yaito yonsi, erinde naintwe tonyare koremia baria bare ase emechando ende yonsi, ase okoremia okwo twaremigwe intwe abanyene na Nyasae." 
2Corinthians1:5 Naki buna emechando ya Kristo yatobucheire, naboigo okoremigwa gwaito gwatobucheire ase enchera ya Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Korende onye intwe tore ase emechando, nigo ere ase okobanyorera inwe okoremigwa na ogotooreka, na onye intwe tokoremigwa, nigo ere ase okobanyorera inwe okoremigwa, erinde monyore chinguru na okoremereria gw’okobogoria emechando eria eria tobogoretie intwe." 
2Corinthians1:7 Na ogosemeria gwaito ase engencho yaino nigo goteneine bokong’u, ekiagera twamanyire ng’a buna more ababwatani b’emechando eria, naboigo morabe ababwatani ase okoremigwa koria." 
2Corinthians1:8 Naki baminto, nigo twanchete momanye amang’ana ’emechando eria yatonyorete Asia. Chigurube chiria nigo chiaetanetie chinguru chiaito, goika tokerusia moyo koba moyo." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ee, intwe abanyene nigo twarenge nekina ki’amakweri ase emioyo yaito, erinde titwesemeria intwe abanyene, korende tosemerie Nyasae oyokobokia abakure;" 
2Corinthians1:10 oyototooretie korwa ase amakweri amanene buna aria, naende natotoorie ase ekero kegochi‐gocha. Ere ntomosemeretie ng’a nagenderere gototooria," 
2Corinthians1:11 ekero inwe boigo mogotokonya amo ase ogotosabera. Ase igo, abanto abange baakere Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaito, ase obuya obo twaeirwe, ekiagera abange bagotosabera." 
2Corinthians1:12 Naki ogwetogia gwaito nakwo oko, ng’a chinkoro chiaito ime nigo chigotworokia, ng’a ase obogima bwaito ase ense eye na mono kobua ase egati yaino, nigo tware kogamberwa nobochenu na oborabu bw’omoyo bokorwa ase Nyasae, tari ase obong’aini bwa mwanyabanto, korende ase obuya bwa Nyasae." 
2Corinthians1:13 Naki titobarikereti inwe kende, otatiga ring’ana eri rioka moranyare gosoma na komanya. Na inche nasemeirie ng’a omoerio namonyare korimanya," 
2Corinthians1:14 buna motomanyete ensemo, ng’a intwe nigo tore ogwetogia kwaino, buna inwe more asetore ase rituko riria ri’Omonene Yeso." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ekiagera narenge nobomaene obo nkarigia gocha asemore agwo ritang’ani, erinde monyore ogosesenigwa ara kabere." 
2Corinthians1:16 Ninganetie goetera seino ekero nkogenda Makedonia, naende nkorwa Makedonia ning’iranere seino, erinde monkoobe ase orogendo rwane gochia Boyahudi." 
2Corinthians1:17 Inee! Ekero narengereretie gokora aya, inarenge ne chitang’u‐tang’u koroisia emeroberio yane? Gose nigo nayeroisetie buna omonto bw’ense ore ang’e goteba, “Ee, ee”, na, “Taibo, taibo”?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Korende buna Nyasae are omwegenwa, ring’ana riaito asemore tiriarenge “Ee” na “Taibo.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 Naki Omwana o Nyasae, Yeso Kristo, oyo inche na Silivano, na Timotheo, twarandetie ase egati yaino tabete “Ee” na “Taibo”, korende asare “Ee” nero ereo botambe." 
2Corinthians1:20 Naki chiira chionsi chia Nyasae nigo chire “Ee” ime asare; nakio gekogera togokwana “Amina” asare, ase okoa Nyasae obonene." 
2Corinthians1:21 Gaki Nyasae oyotokong’irie amo nainwe ase Kristo; nere otochorete," 
2Corinthians1:22 naende agatobeka ekemanyererio kiaye, agatoa Omoika oye ase chinkoro chiaito okaba intenenera." 
2Corinthians1:23 Korende inche nigo nkorigia Nyasae ambere kirori, ng’a ase okobarorera inwe amabera tindagenda Korinto." 
2Corinthians1:24 Tari ng’a nkogambera tore okwegena kwaino; korende nigo togokora emeremo amo nainwe ase omogoko oino, ekiagera moteneine bokong’u ase okwegena." 
2Corinthians2:1 Korende nkarengereria ase omoyo one, ng’a tingocha seino naende ase okobaichania." 
2Corinthians2:2 Naki onye inche nkobaichania, gaki ning’o orangokie, otatiga oria naichanirie?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Inche nigo nabarikerete ring’ana eri, erinde ngocha ting’ichanigwa na baria bagwenerete kongokia, naki ninsemeretie igoro yaino inwe mwensi, ng’a omogoko one noro oyoino mwensi." 
2Corinthians2:4 Naki ase emechando emenge na ase obororo bw’enkoro, naende ase amariga amange nigo nabarikerete, tari ng’a moichanigwe, korende monyare komanya obwanchani bwane obonge inde nabwo asemore." 
2Corinthians2:5 Korende onye omonto orentire ogoichania, tang’ichaneti inche bweka, korende ase ensemo obaichanirie nainwe mwensi. Ase ogokwana igo, tinkoyakong’ia mono." 
2Corinthians2:6 Egesusuro eke omonto onga buna oyio aetwe nabange, nakio kiamoisanete." 
2Corinthians2:7 Ribaga ri’aya mbuya mwabere omonto buna oyio na komoremia, tabaisa kobugwa nogoichana, erinde erusie moyo." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ase ayio nabasoroire momworokie obwanchani bwaino. 
2Corinthians2:9 Eke nakio kiagerete nkabarikera, erinde mbateeme na komanya gose mwabeire abaigweri ase amang’ana onsi." 
2Corinthians2:10 Onde bwensi moraabere inwe, nainche nimwabere. Eke naabeire omonto, onye namwabeire egento igo namwabeire ase engencho yaino ase obosio bwa Kristo," 
2Corinthians2:11 Saitani tabaisa gotobua; naki intwe titokomocha komanya obong’ainereria bwaye. 
2Corinthians2:12 Gaki ekero naigete Teroa ase engencho y’okorandia enchili ya Kristo, nkaigorerwa egesieri n’Omonene," 
2Corinthians2:13 korende tinanyora ogotimoka ase omoyo one, ekiagera ntanyorete oyominto Tito aroro. Erio nkabatebia ng’a batigare buya, nkaimoka nkagenda Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono, ere oyogotoraa ase okobua okonene botambe ase Kristo, naende oyogosokia rimisu rigiya goetera asetore, erinde bamomanye kera aase." 
2Corinthians2:15 Naki intwe nigo tore ogotioka okuya gwa Kristo ase obosio bwa Nyasae, ase abwo bagotoorigwa, na ase abwo bagosira;" 
2Corinthians2:16 ase abwo bagosira ogotioka kw’amakweri gokorenta amakweri; ase abwo bagotoorigwa ogotioka kw’obogima gokorenta obogima. Ning’o oraisane ase amang’ana aya? 
2Corinthians2:17 Naki intwe titori buna abange abagokora okoonchorana okobe ase ring’ana ria Nyasae; korende buna abanto bagokwana ase oborabu bw’omoyo, buna abanto batomirwe na Nyasae. Ase obosio bwa Nyasae, nigo togokwana, tore ime ase Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Inee! Ntwachakire naende gwetogia intwe abanyene? Gose intwe ntogwenerete, buna abande, konyora amarube are nogotogigwa gocha asemore, gose ayakorwa asemore?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Inwe abanyene nerirube riaito ririkire ase chinkoro chiaito, rimanyekanete na gosomwa nabanto bonsi." 
2Corinthians3:3 Igo momanyekanete buya ng’a mwabeire rirube ria Kristo, erire emeremo y’ogokora gwaito, ririkire tari ase ewino, korende nase Omoika o Nyasae ore moyo; tari ase chibao chi’amagena, korende ase chibao chie chinkoro chia mwanyabanto." 
2Corinthians3:4 Na ogosemeria okwo tore nakwo ase obosio bwa Nyasae ase Kristo; 
2Corinthians3:5 tari ng’a ntweisanerete intwe abanyene korengereria ring’ana rinde rionsi rikorwa asetore abanyene, korende ogoisanera gwaito nigo gokorwa ase Nyasae," 
2Corinthians3:6 oyotoisaneirie koba abasomba b’okobwatana okoyia; tari ase ririko, korende ase Omoika. Naki ririko nigo rigoita, korende Omoika orua obogima." 
2Corinthians3:7 Bono onye ogokora kw’amakweri kore ase amariko, ayarikire chinuguta na komang’erwa ase amagena, gwachete ase obonene, goika Abaisraeli tibanyara korigereria obosio bwa Musa, ase engencho y’obonene bw’obosio bwaye; na obonene obwo bogaeta," 
2Corinthians3:8 Inee, ogokora kw’Omoika tigokoba nobonene goetania boria?" 
2Corinthians3:9 Naki onye ogokora gw’ekina kwarenge nobonene, igo ogokora kw’oboronge nkore nobonene kobua mono." 
2Corinthians3:10 Naki keria kiarenge nobonene tikegwatorwa bono ng’a nkere nobonene ase engencho y’obonene boria bore obonene kobua. 
2Corinthians3:11 Ekiagera onye boria bwaetete bwarenge nobonene bwaye, boria boreo botambe mbore nobonene kobua mono." 
2Corinthians3:12 Gaki, ekiagera tore nogosemeria kore buna oko, iga tore noboremu obonge gatogokwana." 
2Corinthians3:13 Titogokora buna Musa oyotubete obosio bwaye, erinde Abaisraeli tibanyara korigereria mono omoerio bw’obonene boria bwarenge goeta." 
2Corinthians3:14 Korende ebirengererio biabo bigakong’igwa. Naki nonya ngoika rituko ria rero, ekero amariko ’okobwatana ogokoro agosomwa, egietubo ekio ekio keba tigekorusigwa, ekiagera ase Kristo bweka kiarusigwe." 
2Corinthians3:15 Nonya ndero ekero amachiko a Musa agosomwa, egietubo keria ngetubete ase chinkoro chiabo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Korende ekero omonto akoonchokera Omonene egietubo keria nigo gekorusigwa. 
2Corinthians3:17 Bono Omonene nere Omoika; na aase Omoika bw’Omonene ore, agwo nao obosibore bore." 
2Corinthians3:18 Korende intwe twensi abatokorigereria obonene bw’Omonene namaiso atatubiri, nigo tokorora buna ase ekerore obonene obwo. Nigo tokoonchorwa koba buna omogwekano oye, na kogenda korwa ase obonene goika ase obonene. Aya nigo agokorwa n’Omonene oyore Omoika." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ase ayio, ekiagera tore nobosomba obo koreng’ana namabera aya twanyorire, titokwa emioyo." 
2Corinthians4:2 Twangire amang’ana ’obosooku ayabisegete, gose titori gotaara ase obong’ainereria, gose gokorera ring’ana ria Nyasae noborimo. Korende ase okoorokia ayare ay’ekeene tweorokirie ase abanto bonsi ase okomanya gwe chinkoro chiabo ime, ng’a ntore nekeene ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
2Corinthians4:3 Korende onye enchili yaito yabisekanete, nigo yabisekanete ase abwo bagosira." 
2Corinthians4:4 Ase ayio enyasae y’ense eye yaukoirie ebirengererio bi’abwo bategeneti, erinde omobaso bw’enchili y’obonene bwa Kristo, oyore ekieni kia Nyasae, tobaikera." 
2Corinthians4:5 Naki titori kwerandia intwe abanyene, korende Kristo Yeso buna Omonene, na intwe abanyene buna abasomba baino ase engencho ya Yeso." 
2Corinthians4:6 Naki Nyasae oyotebete, “Omobaso nobare korwa ase omosunte”, nere obarire ase chinkoro chiaito ime, atoe omobaso bwe chisemi chi’obonene bwa Nyasae ase obosio bwa Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Korende ntore nobotenenku obo ime ase ebibekerero bi’amaroba, erinde aorokigwe ng’a okobua okonene gwe chinguru nigo gokorwa ase Nyasae, gose tikori korwa asetore intwe abanyene." 
2Corinthians4:8 Korwa ase chinsemo chionsi nigo tokomigwa, korende titori komigeka; iga togoichanigwa, korende titogokwa emioyo," 
2Corinthians4:9 iga togochandwa, korende titori gotigwa; iga togoakwa inse, korende titori gosirigwa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Botambe nigo tokobogoria ogoitwa kwa Yeso ase emebere yaito, erinde obogima bwa Yeso naborobwo boorokigwe ase emebere yaito." 
2Corinthians4:11 Naki intwe ekero tore moyo, amatuko onsi nigo tokoruegwa tokwe ase engencho ya Yeso, erinde obogima bwa Yeso boorokigwe ase emebere yaito eyekonyorwa namakweri." 
2Corinthians4:12 Gaki amakweri nigo agokora emeremo ime yaito, korende obogima ime yaino." 
2Corinthians4:13 Naboigo naintwe, ekiagera tore nomoika oria oria bw’okwegena buna erikire, “Negenete, na ase engencho eyio ngakwana”, igo twegenire, na ase engencho eyio nigo togokwana." 
2Corinthians4:14 Twamanyire ng’a ere oyobogetie Omonene Yeso natobokie naintwe amo na Yeso, na atorente amo nainwe ase obosio bwaye." 
2Corinthians4:15 Naki amang’ana onsi nigo agokorwa ase engencho yaino, erinde obuya obwo bomentwe ase abwo abange, ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono komentwe, na Nyasae abakwe." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ase ayio, titogokwa emioyo; korende nonya omonto oito o isiko ogosarigwa, omonto oito o ime akorwe omoyia rituko ase rituko." 
2Corinthians4:17 Naki emechando yaito eyere y’ekero egeke gioka nemegusu, egotoroiseria obonene bwa kare na kare obore obonge mono kobua." 
2Corinthians4:18 Titorigereria ebinto ebikororekana, korende ebitakororekana; naki ebikororekana nebi’ekero egeke gioka, korende ebitakororekana nebia kare na kare." 
2Corinthians5:1 Naki twamanyire ng’a enyomba yaito ere buna eema eyere ey’ense eye, ekero erasarigwe ntore noboagacho borwete ase Nyasae, enyomba etaagachiri namaboko, eyere igoro kare na kare." 
2Corinthians5:2 Naki intwe ase eye iga togwechanda, ntore namaiga koboyigwa obomenyo bwaito bokorwa igoro." 
2Corinthians5:3 Ekero twaboyigwe titokororekana tore getirianda. 
2Corinthians5:4 Naki intwe, abatore ase enyomba eye ere buna eema, nigo togwechanda, toritoerwa, tari ng’a igo torigetie korusigwa ase enyomba eye, korende ntorigetie okoboyigwa konde, erinde egekonyorekana namakweri kemerwe nobogima." 
2Corinthians5:5 Gaki ere oyotoroisetie ase amang’ana aya nere Nyasae, oyotoete Omoika buna ekebwaterero giantenenera." 
2Corinthians5:6 Gaki amatuko onsi nigo tore nomoyo bw’oboremu, naende twamanyire ng’a ekero tore aa ase omobere nigo tomenyete aare korwa ase Omonene," 
2Corinthians5:7 ekiagera nigo togotaara ase okwegena, tari ase okorora." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ntore nomoyo bw’oboremu, na twarorire buya kobua korua ase omobere na komenya amo n’Omonene." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ase ayio, onye tore aa, gose onye titori aa, nigo okogania gwaito kore ng’a tomogwenere ere." 
2Corinthians5:10 Naki netogwenerete intwe twensi koorokigwa ase obosio bw’ekerogo gi’ekina gia Kristo; erio kera omonto anyore koreng’ana buna are gokora ase omobere, onye bire ebiya gose onye bire ebibe." 
2Corinthians5:11 Nabo gatwamanyire komoiroka Omonene, twateemire kong’usa abanto; korende twamanyekanire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na inche nasemeirie ng’a twamanyekanire ase okomanya gwe chinkoro chiaino ime boigo." 
2Corinthians5:12 Titogwetogia intwe abanyene ase obosio bwaino naende, korende twabaeire ribaga ri’ogwetogia ase engencho yaito erinde monyare koba nokoiraneria ase abagwetogia ase amang’ana a isiko oka, gose tari ase amang’ana ’enkoro ime." 
2Corinthians5:13 Naki onye twasirerigwe nobong’aini bwaito, ayio nigo are ase Nyasae; gose onye tore nobong’aini bwaito, ayio nigo are ase engencho yaino." 
2Corinthians5:14 Naki obwanchani bwa Kristo nigo bogotobetereria, ekiagera twamanyire ekeene ng’a onye oyomo okure ase engencho ya bonsi, nabo bonsi bakure." 
2Corinthians5:15 Ere agakwa ase engencho ya bonsi, erio abare moyo tibaba moyo ase engencho yabo boka abanyene, korende nase engencho yaye ere oyokwete, naende akaboka ase engencho yabo." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ase ayio, korwa bono intwe titomanyeti monto onde koreng’ana buna mwanyabanto bamomanyete; nonya intwe twamomanyete Kristo ritang’ani buna mwanyabanto bamomanyete, korende bono titokomomanya buna igo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ase ayio, omonto karabe ime ya Kristo nigo are egetongwa ekeyia; ebia kare biaetire, rora bionsi biabeire ebiyia." 
2Corinthians5:18 Korende bionsi nigo bikorwa ase Nyasae, oyotobwatanirie intwe amo nere omonyene ase Kristo, nere otoeire obosomba bw’okobwatanigwa," 
2Corinthians5:19 ekiagera Nyasae nigo arenge ime ya Kristo, akabwatania ense amo nere omonyene, tababarera ogosaria kwabo; ere obekire asetore ring’ana ri’okobwatanigwa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Nabo tore abatomire na Kristo; Nyasae nigo akobasorora inwe goetera ase emenwa yaito. Twabasoroire ase engencho ya Kristo: Mobwatanigwe na Nyasae. 
2Corinthians5:21 Nyasae omokorire ere, oyotamanyeti ebibe, koba ebibe ase engencho yaito, erio asare intwe tobe noboronge ase Nyasae." 
2Corinthians6:1 Na intwe gatogokora emeremo amo nere, twabasoroire timonyora obuya bwa Nyasae bosa." 
2Corinthians6:2 Naki igo agoteba, “Ase engaki yancheire nakoiraneretie ogosaba kwao, rituko ri’ogotooreka nagokonyete.” Rora, bono nario engaki y’ogwancherwa; rora, bono nario rituko ri’ogotooreka." 
2Corinthians6:3 Titobeka ekegocha ase onde bwensi, erinde obosomba bwaito bobaise gokwanwa bobe," 
2Corinthians6:4 korende ase kera ring’ana twenyore ogotogigwa okuya buna abasomba ba Nyasae, ase okoganya okonge, ase emechando, ase obokong’u, ase ogochandwa," 
2Corinthians6:5 ase ogoakwa, ase ogosibwa, ase ogokorerwa riroroche, ase emeremo, ase okorenda, ase enchara," 
2Corinthians6:6 ase obochenu, ase okomanya, ase oboremereria, ase obwororo, ase Omoika Omochenu, ase obwanchani botari nobong’ainereria," 
2Corinthians6:7 ase amang’ana ’ekeene, ase chinguru chia Nyasae. Nigo tore nebirwanero bi’oboronge ase okoboko gw’okorio na ase okoboko gw’okobee." 
2Corinthians6:8 Twanyorire ogosikwa na ogotasikwa; togokwanwa bobe na togokwanwa buya. Twakorirwe buna abanto abang’ainereria, korende nabanto b’ekeene tore," 
2Corinthians6:9 buna abatamanyekaneti, korende nigo tomanyekanete buya; buna abagokwa, na rora moyo tore. Twasusuirwe, korende titoitiri;" 
2Corinthians6:10 twaichanigwe, korende amatuko onsi nigo tore nomogoko; tore abataka, korende twabatenenkirie abange, titori na gento, nonya nabo ntore nebinto bionsi." 
2Corinthians6:11 Twakwanire maiso marore nainwe, Abakorinto; chinkoro chiaito chiagareigwe." 
2Corinthians6:12 Titosiegeti chinkoro chiaito asemore, korende inwe nigo mosiegete echiaino asetore." 
2Corinthians6:13 Bono nigo ngokwana nainwe buna nabana baane more. Buna twabakoreire, nainwe motokorere bo, mogareyie chinkoro chiaino." 
2Corinthians6:14 Timosiberanigwa rikorogoto amo nabategeneti. Naki nkobwatana ki kore ase egati y’oboronge na ogosaria? Gose ngosanga ki kore ase egati y’omobaso na omosunte? 
2Corinthians6:15 Naende nkobwatana ki kore ase egati ya Kristo na Beliali? Gose oyobwegenete, insemo ki abwate amo noyotegeneti?" 
2Corinthians6:16 Naende ngosanga ki kore ase egati ye Hekalu ya Nyasae na emegwekano y’ogosasimwa? Naki intwe ne Hekalu ya Nyasae ore moyo, buna Nyasae atebete, “Nimenye ime yabo, na ase egati yabo nintaare, na inche nimbe Nyasae obo, na barabwo nababe abanto baane." 
2Corinthians6:17 Ase ayio, buna Omonene agoteba: Soka korwa asebare, mweatanane, gose timokuna egento getachenegeti, na inche nimbaroisie." 
2Corinthians6:18 Nimbe Iso oino, na inwe mobe abana baane, abamura na abaiseke. Nabo Omonene Omobui otebire.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Abanchani baane, ekiagera tore ne chiira echio, twesibie intwe abanyene ogotacheneka kw’omobere na omoika, erio toikeranie obochenu ase okomoiroka Nyasae." 
2Corinthians7:2 Toigorere chinkoro chiaino; titokorereti monto onde bobe, titosareti monto, titorieti monto kiaboama." 
2Corinthians7:3 Tintebeti ring’ana eri erinde mbagambie inwe, ekiagera ritang’ani konya nabatebirie ng’a inwe nigo more ne ribaga ase chinkoro chiaito, ase ogokwa na okoba moyo amo." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ninde noboremu obonge kongokwana nainwe; ogwetogia kwane igoro asemore nokonge; naichoirwe nokoremigwa. Ase ogochandwa gwaito gwonsi naichoirwe nomogoko omonge mono. 
2Corinthians7:5 Naki nonya nekero twaigete Makedonia, emebere yaito tiyanyorete ogotimoka, korende togachandwa chinsemo chionsi; isiko ekaba esegi, na ime bokaba obwoba." 
2Corinthians7:6 Korende Nyasae, oyokoremia abaichanete, agatoremia ase ogocha gwa Tito," 
2Corinthians7:7 gose tari ase ogocha kwaye gwoka, korende nonya nase okoremigwa koria aremetigwe nainwe. Agatotebia amang’ana ’amaiga aino, na okweng’ereria kwaino, na omokia oino asende, goika nkamenta kogoka." 
2Corinthians7:8 Naki nonya nabaichanetie ase rirube riria tinkweitia (nonya neitetie ritang’ani), ekiagera narorire ng’a rirube riria ndiabaichanetie, korende nase ekero egeke gioka." 
2Corinthians7:9 Bono nagokire, tari ekiagera mwaichanetigwe, korende ekiagera mwaichanetigwe goika mokaonchoka, ekiagera nigo mwaichanetigwe ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae, erinde timonyara gosira ase ogokora gwaito." 
2Corinthians7:10 Naki ogoichanigwa okore ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae nigo gokorenta okoonchoka gokoraa gochia ase ogotooreka, gotari na kweitia; korende ogoichanigwa gw’ense nigo gokorenta amakweri." 
2Corinthians7:11 Rora buna ogoichanigwa okwo kore ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae kwabarenteire omokia, na ogwekengera, na okobea, okoiroka na amaiga amange, ogwetigana na egesiomba! Ase kera enchera mweorokererie koba motari na komocha ase ring’ana erio." 
2Corinthians7:12 Nabo, nonya nabarikerete, tindigeti ase engencho yaye ere oyokorete bobe, gose tari ase engencho yaye ere oyokoreretwe bobe, korende ogwetigana kwaino asetore konyare koorokigwa asemore ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ase ayio twaremigwe. Na kobua ase okoremigwa okwo tokagokera mono omogoko o Tito, ekiagera omoyo oye otimokigwe nainwe mwensi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Naki onye ngwetogia asare ase engencho yaino, tinasoogetigwe; korende buna twabatebetie amang’ana onsi ase ekeene, naboigo nogwetogia gwaito ase obosio bwa Tito nigo kwarenge ogw’ekeene." 
2Corinthians7:15 Obwanchani bwaye bw’omoyo asemore bwamentekanire, ekero akoinyora okoigwera kwaino inwe mwensi, na buna mwamoroisetie ase okoiroka na okoiguswa." 
2Corinthians7:16 Nagokire, ekiagera ase kera ring’ana ninde nomoyo bw’oboremu ase engencho yaino." 
2Corinthians8:1 Bono nkobamanyia tore inwe abaminto amang’ana ’obuya bwa Nyasae, obo chikanisa chia Makedonia chiaetwe." 
2Corinthians8:2 Naki baria bateemetwe nemechando emenge. Nonya barenge abataka mono, omogoko obo omonge okagera bakamenta okorua kwabo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Naki nababereire kirori ng’a nigo baruete ase omoyo bw’ogwancha, ase okonyara kwabo, na goetania okonyara kwabo." 
2Corinthians8:4 Barabwo bagatosaba na gotosorora mono tobae ribaga babwatane naintwe ase ogokorera abachenu. 
2Corinthians8:5 Naende bagakora buna totasemeretie; ritang’ani bakerua abanyene ase Omonene, erio asetore ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae." 
2Corinthians8:6 Togasorora Tito aikeranie emeremo y’obuya obo buna ayechagete ase egati yaino. 
2Corinthians8:7 Korende buna more nobonge bw’ebinto bionsi: okwegena, na ogokwana, na obong’aini, na omokia bwonsi, na obwanchani bwaino asetore buna tobanchete inwe, nabo mobe nobonge bw’obuya obo bwonsi." 
2Corinthians8:8 Tinkwaneti aya ase okobachika, korende ase omokia bw’abanto bande nteeme ekeene ki’obwanchani bwaino." 
2Corinthians8:9 Naki mwamanyire obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo buna ekorete omotaka ase engencho yaino, nonya orenge omonda, erinde inwe monyare koba abanda ase obotaka bwaye." 
2Corinthians8:10 Na inche ase ring’ana eri nabaeire ay’ogosemia kwane, mbuya asemore mokoore emeremo eyio eyio mwarenge abachaki koyekora omwaka oeta. Timware koyekora rioka, korende boigo mware nokogania gw’okoyekora." 
2Corinthians8:11 Bono moikeranie ogokora okwo, erinde buna mwarenge nokogania koroisia omoroberio, naboigo mobe ang’e koyoikerania ase ebi more nabio." 
2Corinthians8:12 Naki aase ogwancha kore, iga bigwancherwa koreng’ana nebi omonto are nabio, tari ase ebi atabwati." 
2Corinthians8:13 Naki tindi goteba aya, erinde abande babatigere na inwe moritoerwe, korende amang’ana abe areng’aine." 
2Corinthians8:14 Ekero eke kia bono obonge bwaino bobakonye ase okoremerwa kwabo; ekero kende obonge bwabo bobakonye inwe ase okoremerwa kwaino; erio amang’ana abe areng’aine. 
2Corinthians8:15 Buna erikire, “Oyosangereretie ebinge tamenteiri, nere oyosangereretie ebike taremeiri.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Korende Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono, oyobekire enkoro ya Tito omokia gocha asemore." 
2Corinthians8:17 Naki igo abwatete ogosorora gwaito; kobua ayio, ere akamenta koba nomokia gocha asemore ase ogwancha kwaye omonyene." 
2Corinthians8:18 Amo nere twatomire oyominto oria omanyekanete ase chikanisa chionsi ase okorandia kwaye kw’amang’ana amaya. 
2Corinthians8:19 Gose tari ase ayio oka, korende nigo achoretwe ne chikanisa agende amo naintwe ase emeremo eye y’obuya obo togokora ase obonene bw’Omonene, na koorokia ng’a intwe nigo tore ang’e kobakorera." 
2Corinthians8:20 Twerende ne ring’ana eri, omonto tacha gotokwana bobe ase amang’ana ’ekeegwa eke tokogaba intwe." 
2Corinthians8:21 Gatoraganie korengereria ayare amaya, tari ase obosio bw’Omonene bweka, korende nonya nase obosio bwa mwanyabanto." 
2Corinthians8:22 Amo nabarabwo twatomire oyominto oyotwarorire ara aange ase amang’ana amange ng’a nare nomokia, na bono nare nomokia kobua, ekiagera ase ogosemeria are nakorokwo asemore." 
2Corinthians8:23 Nabo omonto karaganie komanya amang’ana igoro ya Tito; ere nesemba yane, naende nomokori emeremo amo nainche ase okobakorera inwe; naende karaganie komanya amang’ana igoro y’abaminto barabwo nabatomwa be chikanisa, naende obonene bwa Kristo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nabo moorokie ase obosio bwe chikanisa obwanchani bwaino, na ogwetogia gwaito ase engencho yaino asebare." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ase amang’ana ay’ogokorera abachenu, tindi nengencho y’okobarikera." 
2Corinthians9:2 Naki namanyire okwebeka ang’e kwaino, okwo netogeretie ase Abamakedonia, ngoteba ng’a abanto b’Akaya nigo bebegete ang’e korwa omwaka oeta, na omokia oino osukirie abange asebare." 
2Corinthians9:3 Korende natomire abwo baminto, erinde ogwetogia gwaito igoro yaino tikobaisa koba okwa bosa ase ring’ana eri, erinde monyare kwebeka ang’e buna natebete." 
2Corinthians9:4 Onye Abamakedonia bande bagocha amo nainche na tobanyore timorebeka ang’e, titocha gosooka, ekero tobasemeretie inwe. Titokwana igoro y’obosooku bwaino." 
2Corinthians9:5 Nabo narorire ng’a ningwenerete ntebie abaminto aba bantang’ane gocha asemore, na koroisia bwango ekeegwa kiaino keria mwarierete eira y’okorua korwa kare, erinde kenyare koba ang’e, buna ekeegwa, gose tari buna egento gekorugwa ase obong’iti." 
2Corinthians9:6 Korende inyora aya, oyogosimeka ebike nigo akogesa ebike; oyogosimeka ebinge nigo akogesa ebinge." 
2Corinthians9:7 Kera omonto tiga arue buna arengereretie ase enkoro yaye, tari ase ogoichana, gose tari ase okobetererigwa, ekiagera Nyasae bwanchire ere oyokorua nomogoko." 
2Corinthians9:8 Na Nyasae nanyare kobaichoria nobuya bwonsi ase obonge, erinde monyare koba nogoisaneka gwonsi ase ebinto bionsi, monyare komenta mono ase ogokora okuya," 
2Corinthians9:9 buna erikire, “Osiareire ebiegwa biaye, obieire abataka, oboronge bwaye nigo boikaransete goika kare na kare.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Nere oyokorua chimbusuro na koa oyo okobusura, naende arua omogati ase okoria, nabae inwe chimbusuro, naende nachibuchie, ere nabamenteranie okwama kw’oboronge bwaino." 
2Corinthians9:11 Ekiagera mwatenenkigwe ase ebinto bionsi monyare koba nokorua gwonsi gokogera Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono goetera ase emeremo yaito. 
2Corinthians9:12 Naki emeremo y’ogokora oko teri goisanera abachenu okoremerwa kwabo gwoka, korende yamentekire mono egere Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono ara aange." 
2Corinthians9:13 Ekiagera mwaorokirie ng’a namotenene ase okorua okwo, nabamotogie Nyasae ase okoigwera kwaino ase ogwatora enchili ya Kristo, na ase okorua kwaino mwakoreire barabwo na abanto bonsi." 
2Corinthians9:14 Na barabwo abanyene, kobakobasabera inwe, bare namaiga amange asemore, ekiagera ase obuya boria bwa Nyasae obwo bwamentekire mono ime asemore." 
2Corinthians9:15 Nyasae aakerwe ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho y’ekeegwa kiaye, totanyare kogiatora buna egwenerete!" 
2Corinthians10:1 Inche Paulo omonyene nabasoroire ase obwororo na oboitongo bwa Kristo, inche nigo inde omoitongo konde amo nainwe, korende ntari aroro ninde noboremu asemore." 
2Corinthians10:2 Ee, nabasabire ng’a kondeo timba omokong’u ase ogokwana noboremu, ekiagera nebarire koba noboremu igoro ase baria bakagete ng’a intwe nigo togotaara ase engencho y’okogania kw’omobere." 
2Corinthians10:3 Naki nonya tomenyete ase ense eye, titori korwana esegi y’okogania gw’ense eye." 
2Corinthians10:4 Naki ebirwanero biaito bi’esegi tibiri ebia mwanyabanto, korende mbire nokobua kwa Nyasae koiyeria chindwaki." 
2Corinthians10:5 Intwe nigo tokoiyeria ebirengererio na kera egetango kieimokereretie igoro kegotanga Nyasae tamanywa, na gosiba kera ekerengererio kenyare koigwera Kristo;" 
2Corinthians10:6 gatorabe ang’e korua egesusuro ase ogotaigwera gwonsi, ekero okoigwera kwaino gwaikeranire." 
2Corinthians10:7 Morigererie ayare ase amasio aino. Onye omonto ore nobomaene ase enkoro yaye ng’a ere nomonto o Kristo, tiga arengererie omonyene, ng’a buna ere are omonto o Kristo, naboigo naintwe tore abanto ba Kristo." 
2Corinthians10:8 Naki ninsa gwetogia kobua ake ase engencho y’okobua gwaito okwo twaeirwe n’Omonene, tonyare kobaagacha inwe, gose tari okobaiyeria, tinkobekwa ase obosooku." 
2Corinthians10:9 Tindigeti gocha kororekana buna iga ndigetie koboboyia ase amarube aane. 
2Corinthians10:10 Naki barabwo bateba, “Amarube aye namarito, naende nigo are amakong’u, korende ekero are amo naintwe ere omonyene nigo are omoreu, na amang’ana aye tari gento.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Tiga abanto banga buna abwo bamanye, ng’a buna tokorika ase amarube aito ekero totari aroro, naboigo togokora gatoreo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Gaki titori noboremu kwebara amo nabarabwo abare gwetogia abanyene, gose kwereng’ania nabarabwo. Korende barabwo, ekero bakwerenga abanyene barabwo ase barabwo, na kwereng’ania barabwo ase barabwo, tibari nobong’aini." 
2Corinthians10:13 Korende intwe titogwetogia kobua ekerengo giaito, korende ase ekerengo twagabeirwe na Nyasae, nonya nokobaikera inwe." 
2Corinthians10:14 Naki titori gwekinia intwe abanyene goetania ekerengo giaito buna ntotari kobaikera inwe. Naki intwe nabatang’ani tore b’okobarentera inwe enchili ya Kristo. 
2Corinthians10:15 Titori gwetogia kobua ekerengo ase emeremo y’abanto bande; korende ogosemeria gwaito nigo kore ng’a koreng’ana buna okwegena kwaino gokomenteka, na emeremo yaito asemore ementeke." 
2Corinthians10:16 Erio tonyare korandia enchili ase chinse chire ng’umbu yaino, titwetogia ase emeremo yakorirwe ase ensemo y’omonto onde." 
2Corinthians10:17 “Korende ere oyogwetogia tiga etogie ase Omonene.” 
2Corinthians10:18 Naki omonto bwancheirwe tari ere ogwetogia omonyene, korende noyo ogotogigwa n’Omonene." 
2Corinthians11:1 Anga yaba buya onye mwandemereria ake ase oboriri bwane. Ee, namanyire ng’a mondemererie." 
2Corinthians11:2 Naki nabaroreire ribero, na eri neribero ria Nyasae; naki nabariereire boko ase omosacha oyomo, erinde nyare kobarenta buna omoiseke omwekungi omochenu ase Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:3 Korende nairokire ng’a buna eng’iti eria, ase obong’ainereria bwaye, yang’ainete Hawa, naboigo ebirengererio biaino birasareke, na mobaise gotiga obwegenwa bwaino bw’ekeene more nabwo ase Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:4 Naki onye omonto ogocha okorandia Yeso onde omoao, otatiga oyo twarandetie intwe, gose mwanche omoika onde omoao oyomotanyorete, gose enchili ende eng’ao eyemotanchete, igo moremereretie buya nayio." 
2Corinthians11:5 Naki igo nkagete ng’a inche tindemeiri gento eki abatomwa baria abanene bare nakio. 
2Corinthians11:6 Nonya timanyeti gokwana buya, korende obong’aini nimbwate, na ase kera enchera twaorokirie amang’ana onsi asemore." 
2Corinthians11:7 Inee! Nebibe nakorire ase okweirania inse, erio mokinigwe, ekiagera nabarandeirie enchili ya Nyasae ntari neng’eria?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Naurire abanto be chikanisa chinde enibo yabo ase okorusia eng’eria yane asebare, erinde mbakorere inwe." 
2Corinthians11:9 Inche ekero narenge amo nainwe ekero naremeretwe, timoraarereti monto onde, ekiagera abaminto bagachia gocha korwa Makedonia bagankonya ase okoremerwa kwane. Ase amang’ana onsi nkerenda inche omonyene timbaraarereria nonya ng’ake, naende ningenderere gokora bo." 
2Corinthians11:10 Naende buna ekeene gia Kristo kere ime asende, omonto tari oranyare gontanga ase ogwetogia okwo ase chinsemo chi’Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Nase ki? Ekiagera ntabancheti inwe? Nyasae namanyete ng’a nimbanchete. 
2Corinthians11:12 Korende eri ngokora, ningenderere korikora, erinde mbatange abakorigia ribaga tibanyora ribaga ri’ogwetogia barorekane koba buna intwe tore." 
2Corinthians11:13 Naki abwo nabatomwa b’oborimo, bagokora emeremo ase obong’ainereria, bakweonchora babe omogwekano bw’abatomwa ba Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Nabo tari ogokumia, ekiagera Saitani omonyene nigo akweonchora bwekora buna omomalaika bw’omobaso." 
2Corinthians11:15 Ase ayio tari ring’ana rigeni ng’a abasomba baye nabarabwo bakweonchora bekora buna abasomba b’oboronge. Omoerio obo nobe koreng’ana nemeremo yabo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Nakwanire naende, omonto takaga ng’a inche nomoriri inde; korende namonkagera bo, monyanche buna omonto omoriri, erinde nainche boigo ninyare gwetogia ake." 
2Corinthians11:17 (Eri ngokwana tindi korikwana ase okobua kw’Omonene, korende buna omoriri ase oboremu obo bw’ogwetogia" 
2Corinthians11:18 ekiagera abange bagwetogia ase engencho yabo abanyene, na inche boigo ninyetogie)." 
2Corinthians11:19 Inwe, ekiagera more nobong’aini, nigo mokoremereria nabariri ase omogoko." 
2Corinthians11:20 Naki iga mokoremereria nomonto, karabakore mobe abasomba, kararie ebiaino, abasakore, kareimokererie igoro, karabaake inwe ase obosio." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ase obosooku bwane nigo ngokwana ng’a nigo twarenge abareu ase ogokora amang’ana aya. Korende onye omonto ore noboremu bw’ogwetogia ase rinde rionsi (nakwanire ase oboriri), na inche ninde noboremu boigo bw’ogwetogia." 
2Corinthians11:22 Barabwo n’Abaibirania? Nainche boigo. Barabwo n’Abaisraeli? Nainche boigo. Barabwo noroiboro rwa Ibrahimu? Nainche boigo. 
2Corinthians11:23 Inee! Barabwo nabasomba ba Kristo? (Bono nigo ngokwana buna ebarimo). Inche mbuya kobua; ase emeremo kobua mono, ase ogosibwa kobua mono, ase ogoakwa goetania ekerengo, ang’e namakweri ebiro ebinge." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ase Abayahudi ara gatano nkanyora ogoakwa emerongo ene otatiga okomo. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ara gatato ngaakwa chinyimbo, erimo ngaakwa amagena. Ara gatato ngasarekerwa nemeeri, obotuko obomo na omobaso oyomo ngaikaransa igoro y’endiba;" 
2Corinthians11:26 nkaba ase orogendo ekero ase ekero, ase emechando ye chindooche, ase ogochandwa nabauri, ase ogochandwa neamate yane, ase ogochandwa nabanto b’Ebisaku, ase emechando emechie ime, ase emechando y’erooro, ase emechando y’enyancha, ase ogochandwa nabaminto b’oborimo;" 
2Corinthians11:27 ase emeremo na obokong’u, ase okogeesa ara aange, ase enchara na erang’o, ase ogotanyora endagera ara aange, ase embeo na ase okoba getirianda." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kobua ase amang’ana onsi ayare korwa isiko naro okorigereria gwe chikanisa chionsi, ayare gonchichera kera rituko." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ning’o ore omoreu, na inche timba omoreu? Ning’o ogerire ogwe, na inche tingechigwa?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Onye ngwenerete gwetogia, ninyetogerie amang’ana ’oboreu bwane." 
2Corinthians11:31 Nyasae, Ise Omonene Yeso, oyorabakwe goika kare na kare, omanyire ng’a tindi gokwana oborimo." 
2Corinthians11:32 Aaria Damesiki gavuna, oyorenge inse y’omoruoti Areta, nigo arenge korenda omochie o Damesiki, akarigia kombwata." 
2Corinthians11:33 Korende nkabekwa ase egetonga ime, ngaikerigwa ase ekebao ase orwaki, ngatooreka korwa ase amaboko aye." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ningwenerete gwetogia, nonya tigokongwenera gento; korende bono ninkwane igoro y’amaroro na okomaanorerwa bikorwa ase Omonene." 
2Corinthians12:2 Namanyire omonto oyomo ase Kristo, yaetire emiaka ikomi na ene, omonto oyio akabogorigwa gochia igoro ya gatato, (onye orenge ase omobere tinkomanya, onye orenge isiko y’omobere tinkomanya, Nyasae nere omanyete)." 
2Corinthians12:3 Na inche namanyire omonto oyio, (onye orenge ase omobere tinkomanya, onye orenge isiko y’omobere tinkomanya, Nyasae nere omanyete);" 
2Corinthians12:4 igo abogoretigwe goika Paradiso ya Nyasae, akaigwa amang’ana atagwatoreka, ayatagwenerete mwanyabanto ayakwane." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ase engencho y’omonto oyio ninyetogie; korende ase engencho yane tingwetogia, otatiga ase oboreu bwane." 
2Corinthians12:6 Naki onye ndigetie gwetogia anga tinaba omoriri, ekiagera nintebe ekeene. Korende ninyetange, omonto tambarera kobua aya aroche asende, gose koyaigwa korwa asende." 
2Corinthians12:7 Erinde timbaisa gocha koenena goetania ekerengo, ekiagera ase obonge bw’okomaanorerwa okwo, nkaegwa riigwa rimbetete ase omobere, omotomwa o Saitani, ang’ake, timbaisa gocha koenena goetania ekerengo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ase engencho y’egento eke ngasaba Omonene ara gatato kendue. 
2Corinthians12:9 Korende agantebia, “Obuya bwane bwagoisanire, ekiagera chinguru chiane chiaikeranirie ase oboreu.” Nabo ninyetogerie amareu aane ase omogoko, erio chinguru chia Kristo chiikaranse igoro asende." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ase engencho ya Kristo nagweneirwe namareu, na ogochaywa, na obokong’u, na okorosigwa, na emechando yonsi; ekero inde omoreu, erio nario inde ne chinguru." 
2Corinthians12:11 Nabeire omoriri, korende inwe mwambetereirie koba bo. Inche ningwenerete ntogigwe nainwe, ekiagera tindemeiri gento eki abatomwa baria abanene baare nakio, nonya tindi gento." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ekeene ebimanyererio bi’omotomwa bw’ekeene nigo biaorogetigwe egati yaino ase oboremereria bwonsi ase ebikone, na amakumia, na ogokora gwe chinguru." 
2Corinthians12:13 Naki ngento ki moremeire kobua chikanisa chinde, otatiga inche timbaraarereti? Monyabere okomocha okwo!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Rora, ekero eke nekia gatato inche nabeire ang’e gocha asemore. Tinkobaraarereria, naki tindi korigia ebinto biaino, korende inwe abanyene, ekiagera abana tibagwenereti kobagachera abaibori enibo, korende abaibori bagachere abana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ase omogoko omonge ninyebeke, naende ninyerue ase engencho y’emioyo yaino. Onye nkomenta kobancha mono, Inee, ningwenerete koremerwa obwanchani?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Korende abe bo, inche timbaraarereti, korende ekiagera inde omong’aini nkabanyora ase obong’ainereria." 
2Corinthians12:17 Inee! Nabaurete gento goetera ase onde bwensi natomete asemore? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ngasorora Tito agende; ngatoma oyominto oria amo nere. Inee! Tito nabaurete gento? Titwagendete ase Omoika oria oria? Titwataarete ase chimbaratero chiria chiria? 
2Corinthians12:19 Inee! Mokagete ng’a iga togwekengera asemore naende? Ase obosio bwa Nyasae nigo togokwana ase Kristo. Na aya onsi akorirwe ase okobaagacha inwe abanchwa. 
2Corinthians12:20 Naki nairokire, ng’a inse gocha timbanyora buna ndigetie kobanyora; naende ndorekane asemore, tari buna morigetie inwe. Aande gose mbanyore more neriomana, ne ribero, na endamwamu, na okweancha, na ogoitania, na okogenkana, na oboenenu, ne riroroche." 
2Corinthians12:21 Naende nairokire, ng’a inse gocha naende, Nyasae one nankeyie inse asemore, nimbaichanere mono ase abwo bamochete kare, abataonchogete korwa ase eubi, na obotomani, na obonyaka obwo bare kwenaria." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ekero eke nekia gatato ngocha asemore. Ase emenwa y’abarori babere gose batato kera ring’ana nariikeranigwe. 
2Corinthians13:2 Natang’anete kobamanyia, ekero narenge seino eria kabere, naboigo bono ntaracha natang’anire komanyia abwo bakorete ebibe kare, na abande bonsi, ng’a tinkobaabera," 
2Corinthians13:3 ekiagera morigetie ekiorokererio gia Kristo ng’a ere nigo agokwana ime yaino. Ere tari omoreu asemore, korende nare ne chinguru ime asemore." 
2Corinthians13:4 Naki igo abambetwe ase oboreu, korende moyo are ase okobua kwa Nyasae. Naki intwe nigo tore abareu asare; korende natobe moyo amo nere ase okobua kwa Nyasae gocha asemore." 
2Corinthians13:5 Erenge inwe abanyene emioyo yaino gose more ase okwegena; eteeme inwe abanyene. Gose timwemanyeti ng’a Yeso Kristo nare ime asemore? Onye taibo, rirorio mwangirwe!" 
2Corinthians13:6 Korende nasemeirie ng’a namomanye ng’a intwe titwangiri. 
2Corinthians13:7 Korende twasabire Nyasae, timokora rinde rire riibe, tari ng’a intwe tororekane twancheirwe, korende inwe mokore erire rigiya, natoisa koba intwe buna abangirwe." 
2Corinthians13:8 Naki titokonyara gokora ring’ana mamincha y’ekeene, korende ase ekeene." 
2Corinthians13:9 Naki twagokire ekero intwe tore abareu, na inwe more ne chinguru. Eri twasabire neri, ng’a moikeranigwe." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ase engencho eyio narikire aya ekero ntari agwo, erinde nkoba agwo tinkorera obotindi ase ekerengo gi’okobua koria naetwe n’Omonene ase okobaagacha, gose tari ase okobatagora." 
2Corinthians13:11 Omoerio, abaminto, motigare buya. Mobe abaikeranu, moremigwe, mobe nomoyo oyomo, momenye ase omorembe. Na Nyasae bw’obwanchani na bw’omorembe abe amo nainwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Kwanania ase okonyunyuntana ase obochenu. 
2Corinthians13:13 Abachenu bonsi babakwanirie. 
2Corinthians13:14 Obuya bw’Omonene Yeso Kristo, na obwanchani bwa Nyasae na okobwatana kw’Omoika Omochenu bibe amo nainwe mwensi." 
Galatians1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa, tinatometwe korwa ase mwanyabanto gose goetera ase omonto, korende goetera ase Yeso Kristo, na Nyasae Tata oyomobogetie korwa ase abakure," 
Galatians1:2 amo nabaminto bonsi abare amo nainche, nkobarikera tore inwe abanto be chikanisa chia Galatia:" 
Galatians1:3 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo," 
Galatians1:4 oyobweruete ere omonyene ase engencho y’ebibe biaito, erinde atotoorie korwa ase ense eye embe ya bono, koreng’ana nogwancha kwa Nyasae Tata oito." 
Galatians1:5 Obonene nobwaye kare na kare. Amina. 
Galatians1:6 Nakumirie ekiagera mokomotiga iga bwango ere oyobarangeretie ase obuya bwa Kristo, na koonchokera enchili ende eng’ao." 
Galatians1:7 Enchili ende eng’ao teri, korende abanto bande mbare bakobachanda na korigia koonchorana enchili ya Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Korende onye nintwe, gose omomalaika korwa igoro, tokobaranderia enchili ende eng’ao, otatiga eria twabaranderetie, aragererigwe." 
Galatians1:9 Buna konya twakwanire ritangani, bono ninkwane naende: Onye omonto okobaranderia enchili ende eng’ao, otatiga eria mwanyorete, aragererigwe." 
Galatians1:10 Bono inee! Nigo nkorigia ogwancherwa korwa ase mwanyabanto, gose korwa ase Nyasae? Gose nigo nkorigia kogwenera mwanyabanto? Onye nabete nkogwenera mwanyabanto goika bono, anga tinabete omosomba o Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Naki baminto, nimbamanyie ng’a enchili eye nabaranderetie tiyarwetwe na mwanyabanto." 
Galatians1:12 Naki tinayenyorete korwa ase mwanyabanto, gose tinorokereretigwe na monto, korende nigo nayenyorete ase okomaanorerwa korwa ase Yeso Kristo." 
Galatians1:13 Naki mwaigwete amang’ana ’orogendo rwane ase amatuko aetire ase edini y’Abayahudi buna nachandete ekanisa ya Nyasae goetania ekerengo, na buna nateemete koyesaria." 
Galatians1:14 Na inche natang’anete ase edini y’Abayahudi, nkabua abange abarenge b’ekegori kiane ase egesaku kiane, ngakora omokia mono ase okobwata chingencho chie chisokoro chiane." 
Galatians1:15 Korende Nyasae oyonchorete ekero narenge ase enda ya baba na akandangeria ase obuya bwaye," 
Galatians1:16 agancha koorokia Omwana oye ime asende erinde, imorandie ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku. Erio tinarigia gosemania na mwanyabanto onde bwensi;" 
Galatians1:17 gose tinatiirete kogenda Yerusalemu ase abwo barenge abatomwa be ritang’ani asende, korende nkagenda Arabia, naende nkairana Damesiki." 
Galatians1:18 Erio nyuma y’emiaka etato ngatiira kogenda Yerusalemu gokwania Kefa, nkamenya amo nere amatuko ikomi na atano." 
Galatians1:19 Korende tinaroche motomwa onde otatiga Yakobo, momura omwabo Omonene." 
Galatians1:20 (Ayio nkobarikera, rigereria, ase obosio bwa Nyasae, tindi gokwana oborimo!)" 
Galatians1:21 Erio nyuma nkagenda chinsemo chia Siiria na Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Na inche tinamanyekanete ase chikanisa chia Kristo chiare Boyahudi. 
Galatians1:23 Korende barabwo nigo bare koigwa rioka ng’a, “Ere oyotochandete ritang’ani, bono nkorandia are okwegena koria aare gosaria agwo ritang’ani.”" 
Galatians1:24 Bagatogia Nyasae ase engencho yane. 
Galatians2:1 Korende nyuma y’emiaka ikomi na ene ngatiira naende kogenda Yerusalemu amo na Barnaba, nkairana Tito agende amo nainche." 
Galatians2:2 Na inche ngatiira ekiagera namaanoreretwe; nkabatebia enchili eria nkorandia ase abanto b’Ebisaku (korende ase obobisi ase abwo basikire). Aande teba ng’a nigo nkominyoka bosa, gose nigo naminyogete bosa." 
Galatians2:3 Korende Tito oyorenge amo nainche, nonya orenge Omogiriki, tabetereretigwe kwarokigwa." 
Galatians2:4 Aya nigo aganetigwe nabaminto b’oborimo, abasoetigwe bobisi, banyare kounia obosibore bwaito tore nabwo ase Kristo Yeso, erinde batobeke ase obosibwa." 
Galatians2:5 Korende titwebegete inse asebare nonya nensa eyemo, erinde ekeene gi’enchili kegenderere amo nainwe." 
Galatians2:6 Korende abwo babarire ng’a nabanene bare (tari gento asende nonya barenge nobonene bore naki; Nyasae tari nogwanchereria ase mwanyabanto), nakwanire ng’a abwo babarire ng’a nabanene bare tibamentereti gento asende." 
Galatians2:7 Korende bakarora ekeene, ng’a inche negenirwe koranderia abatarogeti enchili, buna Petero egenetwe koyeranderia baria barogete." 
Galatians2:8 (Naki ere oyoete Petero chinguru koba omotomwa bw’abarogete, nere ong’ete inche chinguru koba omotomwa bw’abanto b’Ebisaku.)" 
Galatians2:9 Naende ekero bachia komanya obuya boria naeirwe, Yakobo na Kefa, na Yohana, abasikire bare buna chisiiro, bagatoa inche na Barnaba okoboko gw’okorio gw’okobwatana, erinde intwe togende ase abanto b’Ebisaku, na barabwo bagende ase abanto b’okwaroka." 
Galatians2:10 Ring’ana erimo barigetie torikore nario eri, ng’a toinyore abataka, ne ring’ana erio nigo narenge nomokia korikora." 
Galatians2:11 Korende ekero Kefa achete Antiokia, nkaamererania nere obosio ase obosio, ekiagera konya oikire kogambigwa." 
Galatians2:12 Naki konya bataracha abanto baria barwete ase Yakobo, nigo arenge koragera amo nabanto b’Ebisaku; korende ekero bachete akairana nyuma, ageatanana, akairoka abarogete." 
Galatians2:13 Agwo amo nere Abayahudi bande bagakora obong’ainereria boria, erinde nonya Barnaba agasirigwa nobong’ainereria bwabo." 
Galatians2:14 Korende ekero nachia korora ng’a ogokora kwabo tikware okwa boronge ase ekeene gi’enchili, ngatebia Kefa ase amasio ’abanto bonsi, “Onye aye, oyore Omoyahudi, gokobwatia chingencho chi’abanto b’Ebisaku, gose tari echi’Abayahudi, naki rende oranyare kobetereria abanto b’Ebisaku babwatie chingencho chi’Abayahudi?”" 
Galatians2:15 Intwe n’Abayahudi ase okoiborwa gwaito, gose tari abanyene ebibe b’Ebisaku," 
Galatians2:16 korende ntomanyete ng’a omonto takonyora oboronge ase ogokora kw’amachiko, korende ase okomwegena Kristo Yeso. Nonya nintwe twamwegenire Kristo Yeso, erinde tonyore oboronge ase okomwegena Kristo, tari ase ogokora kw’amachiko, ekiagera ase ogokora kw’amachiko onde tari ase mwanyabanto oranyare konyora oboronge." 
Galatians2:17 Korende onye intwe abanyene nigo twarenge korigia konyora oboronge ase Kristo, naende twanyoretwe tore abanyene ebibe, Inee, Kristo nabeire omosomba bw’ebibe? Yaya, taibo!" 
Galatians2:18 Korende kondaagache naende aria natagorete, neorokirie inche omonyene ng’a nomomochi inde." 
Galatians2:19 Naki inche goetera ase amachiko nakwereire amachiko, erinde imbe moyo ase Nyasae." 
Galatians2:20 Nabambirwe amo na Kristo; gose bono tari inche inde moyo, korende Kristo nigo are moyo ime asende; na obogima inde naborobwo bono ase omobere, nigo inde naborobwo ase okomwegena Omwana o Nyasae, oyonyanchete, naende bweruete omonyene ase engencho yane." 
Galatians2:21 Tinkwanga obuya bwa Nyasae, ekiagera onye oboronge bokonyorekana ase amachiko, rirorio Kristo nigo akwete bosa." 
Galatians3:1 Inwe Abagalatia abariri! Ning’o obarogete inwe ase amaiso aino Yeso Kristo oorogetigwe buna abambetwe? 
Galatians3:2 Tiga mbaborie ring’ana eri rioka: Igo mwanyorete Omoika ase ogokora kw’amachiko, gose ase okwegena goetera ase okoigwa?" 
Galatians3:3 Nabo more abariri buna iga? Mogachaka ase Omoika, na bono morigetie goikeranigwa ase chingencho chiaino abanyene?" 
Galatians3:4 Inee! Igo mwanarete emechando emenge enga buna eye bosa? Aande gose tiyarenge bosa. 
Galatians3:5 Ere oyokobaa inwe Omoika na gokora ebikone bie chinguru egati yaino, Inee, igo agokora ayio ase ogokora kw’amachiko gose ase okwegena goetera ase okoigwa?" 
Galatians3:6 Nabo “Ibrahimu nigo amwegenete Nyasae, na ase engencho eyio akabarwa koba omonyene oboronge.”" 
Galatians3:7 Gaki manya iga, ng’a baria bare nokwegena, abwo nabwo bare abana ba Ibrahimu." 
Galatians3:8 Korende ayio amariko aroche korwa kare, ng’a Nyasae nae abanto b’Ebisaku oboronge ase okwegena. Ase ayio akaranderia Ibrahimu enchili kare, akabora, “Asore aye abanto b’ebisaku bionsi nabasesenigwe.”" 
Galatians3:9 Naboigo abwo bare nokwegena mbasesenirie amo na Ibrahimu oyorenge omwegeni. 
Galatians3:10 Naki baria bonsi basemeretie ogokora kw’amachiko, nigo bare inse y’okoragererigwa, ekiagera nerikire, “Kera omonto oyotari kobwata onsi ayarikire ase ebuku y’amachiko na koyakora oragererigwe.”" 
Galatians3:11 Bono nigo are maiso marore, ng’a onde tari oranyore oboronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae ase amachiko; ekiagera nigo arikire, “Omonyene oboronge nabe moyo ase okwegena.”" 
Galatians3:12 Amachiko nigo are ao ase okwegena, ekiagera nigo arikire, “Omonto oyorakore ayio nabe moyo ase aro.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristo natobooretie korwa ase okoragererigwa kw’amachiko, ekero akoretwe koba okoragererigwa ase engencho yaito, ekiagera nerikire, “Kera omonto oyobambirwe igoro ase omote oragererigwe.”" 
Galatians3:14 Igo ogosesenigwa okwo Ibrahimu anyorete goikera abanto b’Ebisaku goetera ase Kristo Yeso, erinde tonyare konyora Omoika ase enchera y’okwegena, buna twarieretwe eira." 
Galatians3:15 Abaminto, ngokwana nde buna engencho ya mwanyabanto ere. Ekero okoriera kw’omwando bw’omonto kogoikerana, onde tari oranyare gokoonchora gose komenta ring’ana." 
Galatians3:16 Chiira chiria chiarieretwe Ibrahimu na omoiborwa oye. Takwanetwe, “Ase oroiboro” buna nase abange; korende eira iga erengete ase oyomo, “Ase omoiborwa oo”, nere Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Aya ngokwana naya: Okobwatana koria gwakoretwe ritang’ani na Nyasae; na amachiko aria akarentwa nyuma y’emiaka amagana ane, na emerongo etato, tagosaria okobwatana koria, erinde eira eria ebe eya bosa." 
Galatians3:18 Naki omwando korabe ase amachiko, tokoba naende ase eira; korende Nyasae akayoa Ibrahimu ase eira." 
Galatians3:19 Amachiko rende, inki agwenete? Akamentwa ase engencho y’amamocho, goika omoiborwa oria orieretwe eira anyare gocha. Amachiko aria nigo aruetwe goetera ase abamalaika ase okoboko kw’omobwatania." 
Galatians3:20 Oyore omobwatania tari omobwatania ase oyomo, korende Nyasae noyomo." 
Galatians3:21 Inee! Amachiko nigo are mamincha e chiira chia Nyasae? Yaya, taibo! Naki onye amachiko aruetwe ayaranyare koa abanto obogima, anga oboronge nigo bwanyorekanete ase amachiko." 
Galatians3:22 Korende amariko asiekeire bonsi inse y’okobua kw’ebibe, erinde abegenire baegwe ayio ariereretwe eira ase enchera y’okomwegena Yeso Kristo." 
Galatians3:23 Korende ekero okwegena gotaracha, nigo twabwatire inse y’amachiko, twasibire goika okwegena goche koorokigwa." 
Galatians3:24 Naboigo amachiko abeire omotebereria oito agotoira goika ase Kristo, erinde tonyore oboronge ase okwegena." 
Galatians3:25 Korende bono okwegena kogwachire, titori naende inse y’omotebereria." 
Galatians3:26 Naki ime ase Kristo Yeso inwe mwensi mwabeire abana ba Nyasae ase enchera y’okwegena. 
Galatians3:27 Ekiagera inwe mwensi, abamwabatisetwe ase Kristo, mwamweboire Kristo." 
Galatians3:28 Aiga tari Omoyahudi gose Omogiriki, tari omosomba gose omosibore, tari omosacha gose omokungu, ekiagera inwe mwensi nigo more oyomo ime ase Kristo Yeso." 
Galatians3:29 Naki onye inwe naba Kristo, rirorio mwabeire oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu, na abanyamwando ase eira." 
Galatians4:1 Korende nigo ngokwana ng’a omonyamwando, ekero are omwana, tari nogwatananeka nomosomba, nonya ore omonyene enibo yonsi." 
Galatians4:2 Ere nigo are inse y’abareri na abarendi goika engaki eria yachigetwe na ise eike. 
Galatians4:3 Nabo naintwe, ekero twarenge abana, nigo twarenge abasomba inse y’amorokererio aye ritang’ani ay’ense." 
Galatians4:4 Korende ekero engaki yaigete, Nyasae agatoma Omwana oye; ere akaiborwa nomokungu, akaiborerwa inse y’amachiko," 
Galatians4:5 erinde ababoorie baria barenge inse y’amachiko, erinde tonyare gokorwa koba abana baye." 
Galatians4:6 Ekiagera inwe more abana baye, Nyasae agatoma Omoika bw’Omwana oye ase chinkoro chiaito, okorera, “Abba!” Engencho yaye “Tata!”" 
Galatians4:7 Ase igo, aye tori omosomba naende, korende Nyasae ogokorire koba omwana oye; na onye kwabeire omwana, naboigo kwabeire omonyamwando." 
Galatians4:8 Agwo ritang’ani, ekero motamomanyete Nyasae, inwe nigo mwarenge abasomba ase chinyasae chitare chinyasae bori." 
Galatians4:9 Korende bono, komwaikire komomanya Nyasae, gose kobua, mwamanyekanire na Nyasae, nase ki rende mokoiranera amorokererio aye ritang’ani, ayare amoro na amataka? Nase ki morigetie koyakorera naende?" 
Galatians4:10 Nigo mokorenda mono amatuko, na emetienyi, na ebiro, na emiaka." 
Galatians4:11 Noboire ng’a nigo nerosirie bosa ase engencho yaino. 
Galatians4:12 Abaminto, nabasoroire, mobe buna inche inde, ekiagera inche nigo nabeire buna inwe. Timwankorerete bobe bonde." 
Galatians4:13 Inwe mwamanyire ng’a inabaranderetie enchili ritang’ani ase engencho y’oboreu bw’omobere one. 
Galatians4:14 Nonya oboreu boria bwarenge ogoteemwa asemore timwanchayete gose timwanyangete, korende mokandoisia buna omomalaika o Nyasae ee, buna Kristo Yeso omonyene." 
Galatians4:15 Ng’ai rende omogoko oino ore? Naki nababereire kirori, ng’a onye yanyarekana, anga mwanduseria amaiso aino mong’e." 
Galatians4:16 Inee! Nabeire omobisa oino, ekiagera nabatebirie ayare ay’ekeene?" 
Galatians4:17 Baria bande mbare nomokia asemore, korende tari ase enchera ere engiya; mbarigetie kobasie kera isiko, erinde monyare gokora omokia kobakorera." 
Galatians4:18 Korende mbuya botambe korigia omokia ase ring’ana rire rigiya, na tari ekero inde amo nainwe rioka." 
Galatians4:19 Abana baane abake, ninde nokoromwa gw’okobina gw’okobaibora naende, goika Kristo arorekane ime yaino." 
Galatians4:20 Ee, anga nancha koba amo nainwe bono, na koonchora eriogi riane, ekiagera timanyeti inki ngokora asemore." 
Galatians4:21 Ntebia, inwe abamorigetie koba inse y’amachiko, Inee, timori koigwera amachiko?" 
Galatians4:22 Naki nerikire, ng’a Ibrahimu nigo arenge nabana babere abamura, oyomo bw’omokungu omosomba, na oyomo bw’omokungu omonyuome, oyotarenge omosomba." 
Galatians4:23 Korende omwana oria bw’omokungu omosomba akaiborwa buna monto onde bwensi; na oria bw’omokungu omonyuome, oyotarenge omosomba, akaiborwa ase eira." 
Galatians4:24 Amang’ana ayio nigo agokwanwa buna omoreng’anio. Abakungu aba nabwo amabwatano abere. Okomo nigo gokorwa egetunwa Sinai, gokoibora abana ase obosomba; nere Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Naki Hagari, engencho yaye egetunwa Sinai ekere Arabia, kegwekanirie na Yerusalemu ya bono, ekiagera nigo are ase obosomba amo nabana baye." 
Galatians4:26 Korende Yerusalemu ya igoro nomochie omosibore, noro baba oito." 
Galatians4:27 Naki nerikire, “Aye ore omogomba, otari koibora, goka! Aye otari nokobina ase okoibora, aka eriogi, orere nomogoko, ekiagera abana baye oria otigetwe nigo bare abange kobua abaye oyore nomosacha.”" 
Galatians4:28 Gaki baminto, inwe nigo more abana b’eira buna Isaka." 
Galatians4:29 Korende buna ase ekero keria oria oiboretwe koreng’ana buna onde bwensi nigo amochandete oria oiboretwe ase engencho y’Omoika, naboigo nonya ngoika bono." 
Galatians4:30 Korende amariko naki agoteba? Igo agoteba, “Seria omosomba oria amo nomwana oye, ekiagera omwana bw’omokungu omosomba takonyora omwando nonya ng’ake amo nomwana bw’omokungu omonyuome, oyotarenge omosomba.”" 
Galatians4:31 Naboigo baminto, intwe titori abana b’omokungu omosomba, korende nabana b’omokungu omonyuome, oyotarenge omosomba." 
Galatians5:1 Kristo agatosibora, erinde tomenye ase obosibore; gaki tenena bokong’u, timobwatwa naende ase obosibwa bw’obosomba." 
Galatians5:2 Igwa, inche Paulo nkobatebia nde inwe, ng’a moise kwarokigwa, rirorio Kristo takoba nengencho ende asemore." 
Galatians5:3 Naende ngotebia nde kera omonto oyokwarokigwa, ng’a rirorio osibirwe ase ogoikerania amachiko onsi." 
Galatians5:4 Mwatananirwe korwa ase Kristo, inwe abamorigetie konyora oboronge korwa ase amachiko, mwagure korwa ase obuya." 
Galatians5:5 Naki intwe ase Omoika ntoganyete oboronge boria tosemeretie ase enchera y’okwegena. 
Galatians5:6 Naki ase Kristo Yeso okwaroka tikogokonyorera kende, gose ogotaroka, korende okwegena okwo nakwo kogokora emeremo ase obwanchani." 
Galatians5:7 Nigo mwarenge kominyoka buya; ning’o obatangete timoigwera ekeene? 
Galatians5:8 Okoebereria okwo tikwarwete asare ere oyobarangeretie inwe. 
Galatians5:9 Ememera emeke nigo ekobotia ribomba rigima. 
Galatians5:10 Ase Omonene ninde nogosemeria asemore ng’a timokoba nebirengererio binde ebiao, korende ere oyokobachanda nabogorie okogambigwa kwaye, naba onde bwensi." 
Galatians5:11 Korende baminto, onye inche ngendererete nonya mbono koraria amang’ana ’okwaroka, nase ki rende nkona‐gochandwa? Igo ekegocha ki’omosalaba kiarusigwe." 
Galatians5:12 Anga nancha ng’a abwo bakobachanda begombayie abanyene. 
Galatians5:13 Inwe abaminto, nigo mwarangeretigwe monyore obosibore; korende ogosiborwa kwaino tikoba ogw’okobwatia chingencho chiaino chi’ebibe, mbuya mokorerane inwe ase inwe ase obwanchani." 
Galatians5:14 Naki amachiko onsi aikeranigwe ase ring’ana erimo, na rirorio nario eri, “Mwanche omogisangio oo buna bweanchete.”" 
Galatians5:15 Korende kerabe mokoromana na koriana, rigereria timocha gosirania inwe ase inwe." 
Galatians5:16 Gaki nigo nkobatebia, mogenderere ase Omoika na timogoikerania okogania gwe chingencho chiaino chi’ebibe." 
Galatians5:17 Naki okogania gwe chingencho chi’ebibe nigo gokoamererania n’Omoika na okogania kw’Omoika nigo gokoamererania ne chingencho chi’ebibe; naki ebi iga bikorwana goika timokonyara gokora ayamorigetie gokora. 
Galatians5:18 Korende komokoraagwa n’Omoika, rirorio timori inse y’amachiko." 
Galatians5:19 Ogokora gwe chingencho chi’ebibe nigo kore maiso marore na korokwo nobotomani, eubi, obonyaka," 
Galatians5:20 ogosasima emegwekano, oborogi, obobisa, eriomana, ribero, endamwamu, obong’iti, okwerusanania, ogweatanana," 
Galatians5:21 emoko, oboiti, ogotinda, chigosori chimbe, na amang’ana ande buna ayio. Nabakureire buna narenge kobakurera ritang’ani, ng’a abwo bagokora amang’ana anga buna ayio, tibakonyora omwando bw’oboruoti bwa Nyasae." 
Galatians5:22 Korende okwama kw’Omoika nobwanchani, omogoko, omorembe, oboremereria, obwororo, obuya, obwegenwa," 
Galatians5:23 oboitongo, okwerita ase onsi; machiko ande tari arange amang’ana buna ayio." 
Galatians5:24 Abwo bare aba Kristo Yeso babambire chingencho chiabo chi’ebibe amo nokogania okobe na okorengereria kwabo. 
Galatians5:25 Onye intwe twabeire moyo ase Omoika, togenderere boigo ase Omoika." 
Galatians5:26 Titoba nokogania kw’ogwetogia abanyene, titochegania, gose koba nemoko intwe ase intwe." 
Galatians6:1 Abaminto, onye omonto obuirwe nokomocha konde, inwe abamore ab’Omoika nebagwenerete koirania omonto oyio ase omoika bw’obwororo. Erigererie aye omonyene, tobaisa goteemwa." 
Galatians6:2 Bogorerania chigurube inwe ase inwe, nario moraikeranie amachiko a Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Naki omonto karekage ng’a ere naisaine, ere taisaini kende; igo akweng’aina ere omonyene." 
Galatians6:4 Korende kera omonto arenge emeremo yaye omonyene. Onye ore nengencho y’ogwetogia, tiga ayietogerie bweka omonyene, na tereng’ania nomogisangio oye." 
Galatians6:5 Naki kera omonto nebogorererie egurube yaye omonyene. 
Galatians6:6 Korende ere oyokworokererigwa ring’ana, abwatane nere oyokomworokereria ase ebinto ebiya bionsi." 
Galatians6:7 Timong’aineka; Nyasae tagokorerwa echeche. Naki kende gionsi omonto agosimeka, nakio arache kogesa." 
Galatians6:8 Naki ere oyogosimeka ase chingencho chiaye chi’ebibe nache kogesa ogosareka korwa ase chingencho chiaye chi’ebibe, korende ere oyogosimeka ase Omoika nache kogesa obogima bwa kare na kare korwa ase Omoika." 
Galatians6:9 Titorosa gokora amaya, ekiagera natogese ekero engaki eraike, totakweti emioyo." 
Galatians6:10 Nabo gatorabe ne ribaga tokorere abanto bonsi amaya, korende kobua mono abwo bare ab’okwegena." 
Galatians6:11 Rigereria, buna chinuguta chire chinene echi nabarikeire nokoboko kwane omonyene." 
Galatians6:12 Bonsi abwo barigetie kororekana buya ase emebere yabo, abwo nabwo bakobabetereria ng’a mwarokigwe, erinde tibachandwa ase engencho y’omosalaba o Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 Naki nonya mbarabwo abanyene abarogete tibabwateti amachiko, korende mbarigetie inwe mwarokigwe, erinde banyare gwetogeria emebere yaino." 
Galatians6:14 Ogwetogia kobe are nainche, otatiga inyetogerie omosalaba bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, ase oro ense yabambirwe asende, na inche ase ense." 
Galatians6:15 Naki okwaroka tai gento, gose ogotaroka tai gento, korende negento koba egetongwa ekeyia." 
Galatians6:16 Omorembe na amabera bibe amo na bonsi abaragenderere ase ogochika oko, na amo n’Abaisraeli ba Nyasae." 
Galatians6:17 Korwa bono monto onde tanchanda; naki nabogoirie ekemanyererio kia Yeso ase omobere one. 
Galatians6:18 Abaminto, obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nemioyo yaino. Amina." 
Ephesians1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae, nkobarikera nde inwe abachenu abamomenyete Efeso, abegeni ba Kristo Yeso:" 
Ephesians1:2 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
Ephesians1:3 Nyasae, Ise Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, atogigwe, ere oyotosesenetie ase Kristo nogosesenigwa gwonsi kw’omoika aase aaria igoro," 
Ephesians1:4 buna atochorete asere ritang’ani ense etarabekwa oboroso, erinde tobe abachenu, totari na komocha ase obosio bwaye." 
Ephesians1:5 Ase obwanchani bwaye Nyasae atochorete korwa kare, erinde tokorwe koba abana baye ase enchera ya Yeso Kristo, koreng’ana nokogania kw’ogwancha kwaye," 
Ephesians1:6 erinde obonene bw’obuya bwaye botogigwe, obo atoeire buna ekeegwa ase Omwanchwa oye." 
Ephesians1:7 Asare ere ntore nokoboorigwa ase amanyinga aye, na okwaberwa kw’ebibe biaito ase obonge bw’obuya bwaye," 
Ephesians1:8 obo ere akabomenta asetore ase chisemi na obong’aini bwonsi. 
Ephesians1:9 Nyasae agatomanyia obobisi bw’ogwancha kwaye, koreng’ana nokogania kwaye buna aroberetie ase Kristo," 
Ephesians1:10 ng’a ase ekero ki’ogoikeranigwa kw’engaki nabekeranie ebinto bionsi bibe nobomo ase Kristo, ebinto bire igoro, na ebire ase ense, asere oyio." 
Ephesians1:11 Ime yaye twanyorire omwando, koreng’ana buna twachoretwe korwa kare ase okorigia kwaye ere oyokorete onsi koreng’ana nogwancha kwaye," 
Ephesians1:12 erinde intwe abatwatang’anete komosemeria Kristo togere obonene bwaye botogigwe. 
Ephesians1:13 Asere oyio, inwe abamwaigure ring’ana ri’ekeene, enchili y’ogotooreka kwaino, na komwaikire komwegena ere, mokabekwa ekemanyererio n’Omoika Omochenu, oria mwarieretwe eira." 
Ephesians1:14 Oyo noro ore intenenera ase omwando oito, goika okoboorigwa kw’abare aba Nyasae, ase ogotogigwa kw’obonene bwaye." 
Ephesians1:15 Ase engencho eyio, ekero naigwete amang’ana ’okwegena kwaino more nakorokwo ase Omonene Yeso, na obwanchani bwaino ase abachenu bonsi," 
Ephesians1:16 tintigeti koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaino, na kobainyora ase ogosaba kwane." 
Ephesians1:17 Nasabire ng’a Nyasae bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, Tata bw’obonene, abae omoika bw’obong’aini na bw’okomaanorerwa, erinde momomanye;" 
Ephesians1:18 naende ng’a amaiso e chinkoro chiaino abekwe omobaso, erinde momanye ogosemeria koria abarangereretie monyore, na komanya obonda bw’obonene bw’omwando oye buna bore, obo abachenu baeirwe." 
Ephesians1:19 Nasabire ng’a momanye obonene bw’okobua kwaye botari nekerengo, obo bwatoikeire intwe abatwegenire koreng’ana nogokora gw’okobua kwaye okonene." 
Ephesians1:20 Ere nigo akorete emeremo eyio ase Kristo ekero amobogetie korwa ase abakure, akamoikaransia ensemo y’okoboko kwaye gw’okorio aaria igoro," 
Ephesians1:21 igoro mono kobua okogamba gwonsi, na okobua, ne chinguru, na oboruoti, na igoro ya kera erieta rigwatorwa, tari ase ense eye yoka, korende neria egochi‐gocha boigo." 
Ephesians1:22 Naende akabeka ebinto bionsi inse y’amagoro aye, akamobeka abe omotwe igoro y’ebinto bionsi ase ekanisa," 
Ephesians1:23 eyere omobere oye, ogoikerania kwaye ere oyogoikerania ebinto bionsi ase bonsi." 
Ephesians2:1 Inwe nigo mwarenge mokwete ase ogosaria kwaino, na ebibe biaino." 
Ephesians2:2 Ime ase ebio nigo mwabigenderete kare ase ogotunyana chingencho chi’ense eye, na gotunyana omogambi bw’okobua kwa igoro gati, oyore omoika oria ogokora emeremo ase abanto bataigwereti Nyasae." 
Ephesians2:3 Naboigo naintwe twensi twagendete agwo kare ase okogania gwe chingencho chiaito chimbe, togaikerania okogania kw’emebere yaito, na ebirengererio biaito, tokaba ase chingencho chiaito abanto abaragwe ase endamwamu ya Nyasae buna abwo bande." 
Ephesians2:4 Korende Nyasae, oyore nobonge bw’amabera, ase obwanchani bwaye obonene atwanchete," 
Ephesians2:5 nonya nekero keria twarenge tokwete ase ogosaria gwaito, agatoa obogima amo na Kristo; naki mwatoorigwe ase obuya." 
Ephesians2:6 Naende agatobokia amo nere, agatoikaransia amo nere aase a igoro ase Kristo Yeso," 
Ephesians2:7 erinde ase ebiro birache naorokie obonda bw’obuya bwaye, obo boetete ekerengo, ase obwororo asetore ime ase Kristo Yeso." 
Ephesians2:8 Naki mwatoorigwe ase obuya, ase enchera y’okwegena; ayio tarwete asemore abanyene, korende nekeegwa kia Nyasae;" 
Ephesians2:9 gose tari ase ogokora, monto onde tacha gwetogia." 
Ephesians2:10 Naki igo tore emeremo y’amaboko aye, togatongwa ase Kristo Yeso, erinde tokore ogokora okuya oko Nyasae aroisetie ritang’ani, erio totaare ime ase okwo." 
Ephesians2:11 Ase ayio, inyora buna mwarenge kare. Inwe abanto b’Ebisaku ase chingencho chi’omobere mware korokwa abanto batarogeti na baria bakwaroka ase okwaroka kw’omobere kogokorwa namaboko." 
Ephesians2:12 Inyora ng’a engaki eria timwarenge na Kristo, nigo mwatananekanete korwa ase obobiare bw’Abaisraeli, abageni b’okobwatana kw’eira, motarenge na gosemeria konde, na motarenge na Nyasae ase ense." 
Ephesians2:13 Korende bono, ase Kristo Yeso, inwe abamwarenge aare agwo ritang’ani, mwarentirwe ang’e namanyinga a Kristo." 
Ephesians2:14 Naki ere nomorembe oito, otokorete intwe, abatwarenge babere, koba oyomo, agatagora etoto eria yatwatananete, engencho yaye obobisa." 
Ephesians2:15 Ere ase omobere oye agasiria chinguru chi’amachiko na echi’emeroberio y’amachiko, erinde asere omonyene atonge omonto oyomo omoyia korwa ase baria babere, igo agakora omorembe," 
Ephesians2:16 na kobwatania baria babere na Nyasae ase omobere oyomo, ase omosalaba, aase aiterete obobisa boria." 
Ephesians2:17 Agacha korandia omorembe asemore abamwarenge are, na ase abwo barenge ang’e." 
Ephesians2:18 Naki goetera asare intwe twensi twanyorire enchera y’okomoika ang’e Tata, ase Omoika oyomo." 
Ephesians2:19 Gaki korwa bono inwe timori abamenyi gose abaeti, korende mwabeire ababiare amo nabachenu, abanto b’enyomba ya Nyasae," 
Ephesians2:20 mwaagachirwe igoro y’oboroso bw’abatomwa na ababani, na Kristo Yeso omonyene nere rigena rinene ri’ekoona." 
Ephesians2:21 Asare ere oboagacho bwonsi bwabwatanigwe amo, na gokina, bobe Hekalu Enchenu ase Omonene." 
Ephesians2:22 Asere inwe boigo mwaagachirwe amo, mobe obomenyo bwa Nyasae, ase Omoika." 
Ephesians3:1 Naki ase ayio inche Paulo nabeire omosibwa o Kristo Yeso ase engencho yaino, inwe abanto b’Ebisaku." 
Ephesians3:2 Negenire ng’a mwaigure amang’ana ’oborendi bw’obuya bwa Nyasae, obo naetwe ase engencho yaino." 
Ephesians3:3 Ase okomaanorerwa natebetigwe obobisi boria buna nabarikera rero iga ase amang’ana amake. 
Ephesians3:4 Ase ayio, ekero morayasome, namonyare korora okomanya kwane kw’obobisi bwa Kristo." 
Ephesians3:5 Obobisi obo Nyasae tamanyetie mwanyabanto ase ebigori binde buna bono ase Omoika abaigoreire abatomwa baye abachenu na ababani. 
Ephesians3:6 Obobisi boria nobo, ng’a abanto b’Ebisaku babeire abanyamwando amo naintwe, ebiimo bi’omobere oyomo, na ababwatani amo naintwe ase cira ere ase Kristo Yeso ase enchera y’enchili." 
Ephesians3:7 Nabo ngakorwa koba omosomba bw’enchili eye koreng’ana nekeegwa ki’obuya bwa Nyasae obo naetwe ase ogokora gw’okobua kwaye. 
Ephesians3:8 Inche inde omoke kobua abachenu bonsi; nonya nabo nkaegwa obuya bw’okoranderia abanto b’Ebisaku obonda bwa Kristo, obo botari korengeka." 
Ephesians3:9 Nkaegwa kobaorokereria abanto bonsi barore omoroberio bw’obobisi boria bwabisetwe korwa kare ase Nyasae, oyotongete ebinto bionsi;" 
Ephesians3:10 erinde bono, ase enchera y’ekanisa, obong’aini bwa Nyasae, obore ne chingencho chinyinge, bomanyekane nabagambi na abare nokobua kwa igoro." 
Ephesians3:11 Nabo kwarenge okorigia kwaye gwa kare na kare, okwo aikeranetie ase Kristo Yeso, Omonene oito." 
Ephesians3:12 Asere ntore noboremu na ogosemeria kw’ogosoa ase enchera y’okomwegena. 
Ephesians3:13 Gaki nabasabire, timokwa emioyo ase engencho y’ogochandwa kwane inde nakwo ase engencho yaino, okore obonene bwaino." 
Ephesians3:14 Ase ayio namobekeire Tata amaru aane inse," 
Ephesians3:15 ekiagera bonsi abakorwa ase Tata, abare igoro na abare ase ense, nigo bakorokwa ase erieta riaye." 
Ephesians3:16 Nasabire ng’a koreng’ana nobonda bw’obonene bwaye, abanchere momentwe chinguru ase okobua goetera ase Omoika oye ase omonto o ime;" 
Ephesians3:17 na Kristo amenye ase chinkoro chiaino komwamwegenire. Nasabire ng’a inwe komorabe nemeri na oboroso ase obwanchani," 
Ephesians3:18 monyare koba ne chinguru ase okomanya amo nabachenu bonsi obogare na obotambe, na gochia igoro, na gochia inse," 
Ephesians3:19 na komanya obwanchani bwa Kristo oboetete okomanya, erinde monyare goichorwa nogoichorwa gwonsi kwa Nyasae."
