Ephesians3:20 Gaki, asare ere oyoranyare gokora goetania mono kobua ayatogosaba gose ayatokorengereria, koreng’ana ne chinguru echigokora emeremo ime asetore," 
Ephesians3:21 asare ere obonene ase ekanisa na ase Kristo Yeso goika ebigori bionsi kare na kare. Amina. 
Ephesians4:1 Ase ayio, inche omosibwa ase engencho y’Omonene nabasoroire mogenderere buna egwenerete okorangerigwa kwaino mwarangeretigwe" 
Ephesians4:2 ase obokanyeku bwonsi na obwororo, na ase oboremereria mokobogorerania ase obwanchani." 
Ephesians4:3 Mokore omokia konyora obomo bw’Omoika ase egesibo ki’omorembe. 
Ephesians4:4 Omobere noyomo, na Omoika noyomo, buna mwarangeretigwe ase ogosemeria okomo gw’okorangerigwa kwaino." 
Ephesians4:5 Omonene oyomo, okwegena okomo, ebatiso eyemo," 
Ephesians4:6 Nyasae oyomo, nere Tata o bonsi, oyore igoro ase bonsi, goetera ase bonsi, na ime ase bonsi." 
Ephesians4:7 Korende kera oyomo oito naetwe obuya koreng’ana nekerengo gi’ekeegwa gia Kristo. 
Ephesians4:8 Ase ayio nigo agoteba. “Ekero agendete igoro, akaira abasakore, akaa mwanyabanto ebiegwa.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Gaki, ringana eri, “Agendete igoro”, engencho yaye inki otatiga naboigo aigete nonya ngoika ensemo y’ense inse?" 
Ephesians4:10 Oyoigete nere oyio ogendete boigo igoro ya igoro, erinde ebinto bionsi biichorwe nere.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Ere akarua abande babe abatomwa, na abande ababani, na abande abarandia, na abande abarisia, na abande aborokia." 
Ephesians4:12 Agakora bo ase ogoikerania abachenu ase emeremo y’obosomba, goika omobere o Kristo oagachwe." 
Ephesians4:13 Nabo goika intwe twensi tonyare goikera obomo bw’okwegena, na komanya mono Omwana o Nyasae, na koba omonto omoikeranu, goika ekerengo ki’ogokina kw’ogoichorwa gwa Kristo;" 
Ephesians4:14 erinde titoba naende abana ebing’werere, bagotugutwa aaria na aaria, na koirwa ase kera embeo y’okworokereria, ase obong’ainereria bw’abanto, ekero bakobang’aina kobwatia chinchera chi’okobasiria." 
Ephesians4:15 Korende tokwane ekeene ase obwanchani, tokine goika toikere Kristo ase chinchera chionsi; nere ore omotwe." 
Ephesians4:16 Asare ere omobere bwonsi onyare gokina ogokina kw’omobere na kweagacha omonyene ase obwanchani, korasang’ananigwe na kobwatanigwa ase ogokonywa gwa kera ekiimo koreng’ana nemeremo ya kera ensemo." 
Ephesians4:17 Bono ngokwana nde ring’ana eri, na koba kirori ase Omonene, korwa bono timogenda buna abanto b’Ebisaku bakogenda ase ebirengorerio biabo bitari nengencho." 
Ephesians4:18 Obong’aini bwabo bwabekirwe omosunte, barusananigwe korwa ase obogima bwa Nyasae ekiagera ase ogotamanya koria kore ime asebare ase engencho y’obokong’u bwe chinkoro chiabo." 
Ephesians4:19 Chinkoro chiabo chiabeire namagandi, bebekire ase chingencho chimbe chi’omobere banyare gokora kera engencho y’eubi ase obwegimeria." 
Ephesians4:20 Korende inwe timworokereretigwe komomanya Kristo buna igo. 
Ephesians4:21 Inwe mwamoigwete na kworokererigwa nere, buna ekeene kere ime ase Yeso." 
Ephesians4:22 Rusia chingencho chiaino chie ritang’ani chi’obomwanyabanto bwa kare, obwasarigwe ase okobwatia okogania kw’obong’ainereria;" 
Ephesians4:23 mokorwe abayia ase emeika na ebirengererio biaino," 
Ephesians4:24 mweboyie omonto omoyia, oyotongetwe ase omogwekano o Nyasae ase oboronge na obochenu bw’ekeene." 
Ephesians4:25 Gaki aboria oborimo, mokwane ekeene kera omonto nomogisangio oye, naki nigo tore ebiimo ebimo intwe ase intwe." 
Ephesians4:26 Mobee, korende timokora ebibe; erioba tirigwa na inwe more nendamwamu," 
Ephesians4:27 gose timoa Saitani ribaga. 
Ephesians4:28 Omoibi taiba naende; mbuya akore emeremo ase omokia namaboko aye na gokora ayare amaya, erinde abe negento akomwatanera oyoremeire." 
Ephesians4:29 Ogokwana okobe tikorua ase emenwa yaino, korende okore okuya na okoranyare kobaa obuya abwo bagokoigwa na koagacha abaganeirie koagachwa." 
Ephesians4:30 Gose timoichania Omoika Omochenu o Nyasae, asare ere oyomwabegetwe ekemanyererio goika rituko ri’okoboorigwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Obororo bwonsi, na endamwamu, na okobea, na eriomana, na emerumi birusigwe asemore, amo nobobe bwonsi." 
Ephesians4:32 Mobe nobwororo inwe ase inwe, mororerane amabeebe, na kwaberana inwe ase inwe, buna Nyasae ase Kristo abaaberete inwe." 
Ephesians5:1 Ase ayio, mobe abegi ba Nyasae, buna abana abanchwa;" 
Ephesians5:2 mogende ase obwanchani, buna Kristo atwanchete intwe, naende akerua ere omonyene ase engencho yaito, akaba esadaka na ekeng’wanso, bire ogotioka okuya ase Nyasae." 
Ephesians5:3 Korende obotomani na cubi yonsi, gose obwegimeria, tibiatorwa ase egati yaino nonya ng’ake, buna egwenerete abachenu." 
Ephesians5:4 Motige kegima amang’ana amabe, gose ay’oboriri, gose obosekereria, ayatagwenereti; korende mbuya kobua koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Ephesians5:5 Naki ring’ana eri mwarimanyire kegima, ng’a omotomani, gose oyo otachenegeti, gose omonto omwegimeria (engencho yaye omosasimi emegwekano) takonyora omwando ase oboruoti bwa Kristo na Nyasae." 
Ephesians5:6 Monto onde tabang’aina ase amang’ana atari nengencho, ekiagera ase aya endamwamu ya Nyasae nigo egochera abanto b’ogotaigwera." 
Ephesians5:7 Ase ayio, timosanga nabarabwo." 
Ephesians5:8 Naki kare nigo mwarenge omosunte, korende bono mwabeire omobaso ase Omonene. Mogenderere buna abana b’omobaso" 
Ephesians5:9 (naki okwama kw’omobaso nigo gokonyorekana ase obuya bwonsi, na ase oboronge, na ase ekeene)." 
Ephesians5:10 Teema mono komanya ekeragwenere Omonene. 
Ephesians5:11 Timosanga nogokora kw’omosunte ogotakwama, korende ribaga ri’ayio mokoorokie," 
Ephesians5:12 ekiagera nobosooku nonya nogokwana amang’ana ayio agokorwa nabarabwo bobisi. 
Ephesians5:13 Korende onsi ayaorokigwe nomobaso nigo are maiso marore, ekiagera kera egento ekere maiso marore nigo kere omobaso." 
Ephesians5:14 Ase ayio otebire, “Boka aye osundogete, boka korwa ase abakure, na Kristo nakobarerie.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Ase ayio, rigereria mono buna mogotaara, tari buna abanto batari nobong’aini, korende buna abare nobong’aini." 
Ephesians5:16 Renda engaki yaino, ekiagera amatuko aya namabe." 
Ephesians5:17 Ase engencho eyio, timoba abariri, korende mobe abanto bakomanya buna ogwancha kw’Omonene kore." 
Ephesians5:18 Naende timotinda ase edivai, ekiagera ase eyio inamoirwe ase obonyaka, korende moichorwe n’Omoika." 
Ephesians5:19 Motebereranie ase chizaburi, na amatera, ne chingero chi’omoika; motere na kobugia amariogi ase Omonene ase chinkoro chiaino," 
Ephesians5:20 mokomoakera Nyasae Tata ng’a mbuya mono amatuko onsi, ase amang’ana onsi, ase erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
Ephesians5:21 Mosikane inwe ase inwe ase okomoiroka Kristo. 
Ephesians5:22 Inwe abakungu, moigwere abasacha baino buna mokoigwera Omonene." 
Ephesians5:23 Naki omosacha nomotwe bw’omokungu, buna Kristo are omotwe bw’ekanisa; ere omonyene n’Omotooria bw’omobere oye, engencho yaye ekanisa." 
Ephesians5:24 Korende buna ekanisa eigwerete Kristo, naboigo nabakungu baigwere abasacha babo ase kera ring’ana." 
Ephesians5:25 Na inwe abasacha, mwanche abakungu baino, buna Kristo anchete ekanisa, naende akerua omonyene ase engencho yaye," 
Ephesians5:26 erio anyare koyechena ase okoyesibia ase amache na ase ring’ana," 
Ephesians5:27 erinde anyare kwenyorera ekanisa y’obonene, etari na kemoa gose omonia, gose rinde rionsi buna aya, korende ebe enchenu etari na komocha." 
Ephesians5:28 Naboigo egwenerete abasacha banche abakungu babo buna emebere yabo abanyene. Oyobwanchete mokaye bweanchire ere omonyene. 
Ephesians5:29 Naki omonto tari ogechete omobere oye omonyene, korende nigo akoyorageria na koyorenda, buna Kristo akorageria ekanisa," 
Ephesians5:30 ekiagera nigo tore ebiimo bi’omobere oye. 
Ephesians5:31 Igo arikire, “Ase engencho eyio, omonto natige ise na ng’ina abwatane na mokaye, na abwo babere nababe omobere oyomo.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Obo nobobisi obonene; korende ngokwana nde amang’ana a Kristo na ekanisa. 
Ephesians5:33 Korende kera omonto anche mokaye buna eanchete ere omonyene; na omokungu tamocha gosika omosacha oye. 
Ephesians6:1 Inwe abana, moigwere abaibori baino ase Omonene, ekiagera obo nabwo oboronge." 
Ephesians6:2 “Sika iso na nyoko” (ogochika oko nakwo ogochika kwe ritang’ani kore neira)," 
Ephesians6:3 “erinde ebe buya asore, nario oramenye amatuko amange ase ense.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Na inwe abaise, timochegia abana baino babaise kobeeigwa, korende mobarere ase amasikani na ase okworokereria kw’Omonene." 
Ephesians6:5 Inwe abasomba, moigwere abanene baino ase ense eye buna mokoigwera Kristo, ase obwoba na okoiguswa, na ase oboitongo bw’enkoro," 
Ephesians6:6 gose tari ase obosomba bw’okwegwenia ase amaiso a mwanyabanto, korende buna abasomba ba Kristo, mogokora ogwancha kwa Nyasae ase chinkoro chiaino;" 
Ephesians6:7 ase omoyo omuya mogokorera Omonene, gose tari mwanyabanto." 
Ephesians6:8 Naende momanye ng’a ring’ana rigiya omonto agokora, naegwe erio erio n’Omonene, karabe omosomba, gose omosibore." 
Ephesians6:9 Na inwe abanene, bakorere ayio ayio, motige kobairokia. Momanye ng’a ere oyore Omonene obo, nere oyoino ore igoro, na asare gwanchereria tikoiyo." 
Ephesians6:10 Omoerio, motenene bokong’u ase Omonene, na ase chinguru chi’okobua kwaye." 
Ephesians6:11 Eboyie ebirwanero bionsi bia Nyasae, erinde monyare gotenena korwania obong’ainereria bwa Saitani." 
Ephesians6:12 Naki okoamererania gwaito tikori ase abare namanyinga ne chinyama, korende igoro y’abagambi na abare nokobua, igoro y’abanene b’omosunte bw’ense eye, na igoro y’emeganda y’ebirecha ebibe bire igoro." 
Ephesians6:13 Ase ayio, bogoria ebirwanero bionsi bia Nyasae, erinde monyare koamererania ase rituko ri’obobe, na komwaikeranirie onsi, motenene." 
Ephesians6:14 Tenena gaki, mweboyie ebinema biaino nekeene, na kobeka oboronge buna engobo y’ekioma ase ebikuba biaino," 
Ephesians6:15 na gosiberwa amagoro aino engencho y’okoba ang’e eyio twanyorire ase enchili y’omorembe. 
Ephesians6:16 Kobua onsi bogoria enguba y’okwegena, ase eyio namonyare korimia emegwe yonsi y’omorero y’oria omobe." 
Ephesians6:17 Naende bogoria ekegogwa gi’ekioma ki’ogotooreka, na omoro bw’Omoika, noro ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Ephesians6:18 Mosabe botambe ase Omoika ase ogosaba gwonsi na ase okoboria kw’ogosorora, na gotagesia ase kera ring’ana. Mogenderere gosabera abachenu bonsi." 
Ephesians6:19 Monsabere nainche, ng’egwe amang’ana ase ogokwana noboremu, erinde ndandie obobisi bw’enchili." 
Ephesians6:20 Ase ayio, nigo inde oyo otometwe nsibire ebinyuri, inyore oboremu bw’ogokwana amang’ana buna ngwenerete gokwana." 
Ephesians6:21 Erinde monyare komanya buna inche inde, naende ninki ngokora, Tukiko, oyominto omwanchwa, omosomba omwegenwa ase Omonene, nabatebie amang’ana onsi." 
Ephesians6:22 Namotomire asemore ase engencho eyio eyio, erinde monyare komanya buna tore; na ere naremie chinkoro chiaino." 
Ephesians6:23 Omorembe obe ase abaminto, na obwanchani amo nokwegena bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
Ephesians6:24 Obuya bobe amo na bonsi abamwanchete Omonene oito Yeso Kristo nobwanchani botari gosareka. 
Philippians1:1 Inche Paulo na Timotheo, abasomba ba Kristo Yeso, nkobarikera tore inwe abachenu bonsi abamore ase Kristo Yeso, abamomenyete Filipi, amo nabatang’ani na abakonyi ase ekanisa." 
Philippians1:2 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
Philippians1:3 Igo nkomoakera Nyasae one ng’a mbuya mono ekero nkobainyora," 
Philippians1:4 ekiagera botambe ase ogosaba kwane nigo nkobasabera inwe mwensi nomogoko," 
Philippians1:5 ase engencho y’okobwaterana kwaino ase enchili korwa rituko rie ritang’ani goika rero iga. 
Philippians1:6 Ninde nobomaene, ng’a ere oyochagete emeremo emiya ase emioyo yaino ime nayeikeranie goika rituko riria ria Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians1:7 Igo bore boronge asende korengereria aya igoro asemore mwensi, ekiagera nababogoirie inwe ase enkoro yane ime. Naki ase ogosibwa kwane na ase emeremo y’okorwanerera enchili na koyeorokia ng’a ero nechinguru, na inwe mwensi mwabwatanire nainche ase obuya obo naeirwe." 
Philippians1:8 Naki Nyasae nere kirori one, buna inde namaiga ase inwe mwensi nobwanchani bokorwa ase Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians1:9 Oko nakwo ogosaba kwane, ng’a obwanchani bwaino bomenteke, bobe obonge mono ase okomanya kw’ogwatanana gwonsi," 
Philippians1:10 erinde monyare komanya ayare amaya, naende mobe nemioyo emerabu, motari na komocha ase rituko riria ria Kristo." 
Philippians1:11 Mwaichoirwe nokwama kw’oboronge ase enchera ya Yeso Kristo, ase obonene na ogotogigwa kwa Nyasae." 
Philippians1:12 Korende baminto, nimbamanyie ng’a amang’ana aria onsi anyorete, abeire ase okogendereria gw’enchili." 
Philippians1:13 Ase igo amanyekanire ase abarendi bonsi b’omoruoti, na ase abande bonsi ng’a nasibirwe ase engencho ya Kristo." 
Philippians1:14 Na abange ase abaminto abare ase Omonene babeire nokoremigwa ase engencho y’ogosibwa kwane, bamentekanire noboremu gokwana ring’ana ria Nyasae batari nobwoba." 
Philippians1:15 Abande nigo bakorandia Kristo bare nemoko na eriomana, korende abande ase omoyo omuya," 
Philippians1:16 abwo ase obwanchani, bamanyete ng’a nabekirwe ase okorwanerera enchili." 
Philippians1:17 Aba bakoraria Kristo ase esugu gose tari ase omoyo omorabu, bakorengereria komenta obororo bwane ase ogosibwa kwane." 
Philippians1:18 Inki rende? Nonya nabo, ase kera enchera Kristo nigo arararigwe, ase obong’ainereria gose ase ekeene, na ase ayio nagokire." 
Philippians1:19 Ee, ningoke, ekiagera namanyire ng’a aya nang’onchokere koba ase ogotooreka kwane, goetera ase ogosaba kwaino na ase ogokonya kw’Omoika o Yeso Kristo." 
Philippians1:20 Ninde nokoganya mono na ogosemeria ng’a tingosookigwa ase enchera ende yonsi, korende ase oboremu bwane bwonsi, bono buna botambe, Kristo naegwe ogosika ase omobere one, kerabe ase obogima gose ase ogokwa." 
Philippians1:21 Naki asende inche, okoba moyo n’Kristo, na ogokwa nokonyora amange." 
Philippians1:22 Korende onye nkoba moyo ase omobere, aya nigo akondetera okwama kw’emeremo yane; gaki eri ndigetie gochora, tindimanyeti." 
Philippians1:23 Nimigire mono ase egati y’amang’ana aya abere. Okogania kwane nigo kore ng’a ngende komenya amo na Kristo; ekiagera aya namaya kobua. 
Philippians1:24 Korende gotigara ase omobere nkogwenerete kobua ase engencho yaino. 
Philippians1:25 Ekiagera inde nobomaene ase aya, namanyire ng’a nintigare na kogenderera amo nainwe mwensi, na inwe momenteke na kogoka ase okwegena," 
Philippians1:26 erinde ogwetogia kwaino ase engencho yane konyare komenteka ase Kristo Yeso, ase engencho y’okoba kwane amo nainwe naende." 
Philippians1:27 Korende orogendo rwaino robe buna egwenerete enchili ya Kristo, erinde onye ngocha kobarora inwe, gose tinkobao, nyigwe amang’ana aino ng’a moteneine bokong’u ase omoika oyomo, na ase omoyo oyomo mokorwanerera okwegena more nakwo ase enchili amo." 
Philippians1:28 Timoiroka abwo bakobaengereria ase ing’ana rinde rionsi. Eke nekemanyererio ase ogosira kwabo, korende asemore inwe nekemanyererio ki’ogotooreka. Eke igo gekorwa ase Nyasae." 
Philippians1:29 Ekiagera ase engencho ya Kristo mwaeirwe, tari okomwegena gwoka korende nogochandwa boigo ase engencho yaye." 
Philippians1:30 Na inwe nabo more nokorwanerera koria koria mwaroche asende, na koigwa ng’a ninde nakwo goika bono." 
Philippians2:1 Gaki gakorabe okoremia konde gwonsi ase Kristo, gose ogochanchima kw’obwanchani gose okobwatana kw’Omoika, karabe amabera ande onsi na amabeebe," 
Philippians2:2 ikerania omogoko one ase okoba nokorengereria okwo okwo na obwanchani obomo; mobe nomoyo oyomo, na okorengereria okomo." 
Philippians2:3 Timokora ing’ana rinde rionsi ase okwegwenera na ase okweenenia, korende ase oboitongo kera omonto abare abande ng’a nabaya kobua ere omonyene." 
Philippians2:4 Kera omonto tarigereria ebinto biaye omonyene, korende arigererie ebinto bi’abande." 
Philippians2:5 Naki mobe nebirengererio ebio ebio ime yaino buna ebio biarenge ime ya Kristo Yeso. 
Philippians2:6 Ere omochakano nigo arenge oyomo na Nyasae, na tabarete ng’a okoba koreng’ana buna Nyasae negento gi’okobwaterera," 
Philippians2:7 korende agekora buna tarenge nobonene, akaimokia ekieni ki’omosomba, akaba omogwekano o mwanyabanto." 
Philippians2:8 Naende agachia kororekana ore buna mwanyabanto omonyene, agekeyia, akaba omoigweri goika ogokwa, na korokwo nogokwa igoro ase omosalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Ase ayio Nyasae akamoimokereria igoro mono, akamoa erieta riria ribuete amarieta onsi," 
Philippians2:10 erinde ase erieta ria Yeso kera riru riringwe, ri’abwo bare igoro, na ase ense, na inse y’ense," 
Philippians2:11 na kera oromeme narobe kirori ng’a Yeso Kristo n’Omonene, ase obonene bwa Nyasae Tata." 
Philippians2:12 Ase ayio, abanchwa baane, buna moigwerete botambe, tari ekero indeo rioka, korende kobua mono ekero ntaiyo, korera ogotooreka kwaino abanyene ase okwoboa na okoiguswa," 
Philippians2:13 ekiagera Nyasae nere ogokora emeremo ime yaino ase okorigia, naende ase ogokora ogwancha kwaye okuya." 
Philippians2:14 Mokore amang’ana onsi motari nokwemurungania na okoborania," 
Philippians2:15 erinde monyare koba abatari na komocha, abachenu, abana ba Nyasae, motari na bobe egati y’ekegori eke ekebe kere bogeka. Ase egati y’abwo mobare buna emebaso ase ense." 
Philippians2:16 Bwata ring’ana ri’obogima, erinde inyore engencho y’ogwetogia ase rituko riria ria Kristo, ng’a tinaminyogete bosa, gose tinakorete emeremo bosa." 
Philippians2:17 Ee, kondaumorwe igoro y’ekeng’wanso na ogokora gw’okwegena kwaino, nagokire; ee, nagokire amo nainwe mwensi." 
Philippians2:18 Nainwe boigo, goka, ee, goka amo nainche." 
Philippians2:19 Korende nasemeirie ase Omonene Yeso gotoma Timotheo achiche bwango asemore, erinde inche ndemigwe, kondamanye buna more." 
Philippians2:20 Naki tindi na monto onde ore nomoyo oyomo nainche, oyoranyare gochandekera chingencho chiaino," 
Philippians2:21 ekiagera bonsi nigo bakorigia ebinto biabo abanyene, gose tari ebia Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians2:22 Korende momanyete Timotheo na ogokora kwaye, buna akorerete enchili amo nainche. Igo are koreng’ana buna omwana okomokorera ise." 
Philippians2:23 Ase ayio ninganetie komotoma ase obwango ekero ndamanye buna amang’ana arabe asende. 
Philippians2:24 Na inche nasemeirie ase Omonene ng’a inche omonyene boigo ninchiche bwango. 
Philippians2:25 Korende nkarora ng’a ningwenerete gotoma Epafrodito oyominto, omokori emeremo amo nainche, omorwani amo nainche, oyo mwatomire gonkorera ase okoremerwa kwane." 
Philippians2:26 Ere nigo arenge namaiga asemore mwensi, naende agaichana mono, ekiagera mwaigwete ng’a nigo arenge omorwaire." 
Philippians2:27 Ere nomorwaire arenge ekeene, ang’e nogokwa, korende Nyasae akamororera amabera, gose tari ere bweka, korende nonya ninche boigo, timba nomoichano igoro ase omoichano." 
Philippians2:28 Ase ayio nakorire omokia mono komotoma, erinde ekero moramorore naende, monyare kogoka, na inche nkeeanerigwe omoichano one." 
Philippians2:29 Momoroisie gaki ase Omonene ase omogoko bwonsi. Mosike abanto banga buna oyio," 
Philippians2:30 ekiagera ase engencho y’emeremo ya Kristo akaba ang’e ase ogokwa, tarendete obogima bwaye ase ogoisanera ayaremete ase ogokora kwaino asende." 
Philippians3:1 Omoerio baminto, goka ase Omonene! Kobarikera inwe amang’ana aria aria tandoseti inche, korende asemore nigo arabe obokonyi." 
Philippians3:2 Mwerende korwa ase chisese, mwerende na korwa ase abwo bagokora amabe, mwerende nabwo bakwenachanacha!" 
Philippians3:3 Naki intwe naba twarogete, abatogosasima Nyasae ase Omoika oye, na gwetogia ase Kristo Yeso, na titosemereti ebia omobere." 
Philippians3:4 Nonya ninche ase ensemo yane ninyare gosemeria ebia omobere. Onye omonto onde okorora ng’a nare nengencho y’ogosemeria ebia omobere, inche nkobua," 
Philippians3:5 ekiagera narogete ase rituko ria gatano na gatato, naende noyomo bw’Abaisraeli inde, oyo bw’ororeria rwa Benjamin, Omoibirania oiboretwe n’Abaibirania, na ase ogotunyana amachiko n’Omofarisai inde." 
Philippians3:6 Nkaba nomokia bw’ogochanda ekanisa, na ase amang’ana ’oboronge bokonyorekana ase amachiko tinarenge na komocha." 
Philippians3:7 Korende amang’ana aria arenge okonyora asende nayabarire koba bosa ase engencho ya Kristo. 
Philippians3:8 Ee, nabarire onsi, ng’a abeire bosa ase engencho y’obuya botari nekerengo, engencho yaye okomomanya Kristo Yeso Omonene one. Ase engencho yaye natigire ebinto bionsi, na kobibara buna eubi, erinde imonyore Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 naende ndorekane ime asare. Tinkoba noboronge bwane boria bokonyorekana ase amachiko korende boria bokonyorekana ase okomwegena Kristo, oboronge boria bokorwa ase Nyasae, bokonyorekana ase okomwegena." 
Philippians3:10 Nindigetie komomanya Kristo ne chinguru chi’okobokigwa kwaye, inyare kobwatana nogochandwa kwaye, ngwekanigwe nere ase ogokwa kwaye;" 
Philippians3:11 erinde inyore ase enchera ende yonsi goikera okobokigwa korwa ase abakure. 
Philippians3:12 Tari ng’a naikire konyora aya, gose naikire koba omoikeranu, korende nakong’irie orogendo inyabwate, ekiagera nabwatirwe na Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians3:13 Abaminto, tinyekageti inche omonyene ng’a naikire koyabwata; korende ninkore egento ekemo gioka: kweba ayare nyuma, ndambaarie ayare bosio." 
Philippians3:14 Nakong’irie orogendo gochia aase ngokoorera, ng’ikere eng’eria y’okorangerigwa kwa igoro kwa Nyasae goetera ase Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians3:15 Gaki intwe abatore abaikeranu torengererie ayio. Komorabe mokorengereria ayande, ase ing’ana rinde rionsi, Nyasae nabamaanorere ayio naro." 
Philippians3:16 Korende togenderere ase ayio ayio twaigete konyora. 
Philippians3:17 Abaminto, mobe abegi baane, morigererie abwo bakogenda ase ogotunyana omogwekano oria oria twabaete." 
Philippians3:18 Naki abange nigo bakogenderera bare ababisa b’omosalaba o Kristo. Nabatebirie amang’ana abo ara aange, nonya mbono nigo nkobatebia aya ase amariga." 
Philippians3:19 Omoerio obo nogosareka, enyasae yabo nenda, obonene bwabo nigo bore ase obosooku bwabo, bakorengereria amang’ana ’ense." 
Philippians3:20 Naki obobiare bwaito igoro, bore. Korwa agwo naende ntoganyete, Omotooria, Omonene Yeso Kristo," 
Philippians3:21 oyoranyare koonchora emebere yaito y’obosareku enyare kogwekana nomobere oye bw’obonene, koreng’ana nokobua kwaye ase okwo aranyare kobeka ebinto bionsi inse asare." 
Philippians4:1 Gaki baminto, inwe abanyanchete, abwo amaiga andiereire, omogoko one na egutwa yane, tenena bokong’u ase Omonene, abanchi baane." 
Philippians4:2 Namosoroire Ewodia, namosoroire na Sintike babe nomoyo oyomo ase Omonene." 
Philippians4:3 Ee, naye bo, omosaiga bw’ekeene, nakoboririe okonye abakungu abwo bakorete emeremo y’enchili amo nainche, na Klementi nere, na baria bande bakorete emeremo amo nainche, abwo amarieta abo are ime ase ebuku y’obogima." 
Philippians4:4 Goka ase Omonene amatuko onsi; naende natebire: Goka! 
Philippians4:5 Obwororo bwaino bomanyekane ase abanto bonsi. Omonene ng’ang’e are. 
Philippians4:6 Timwechandera ing’ana rinde rionsi; korende ase kera ring’ana ase ogosaba na ogosorora amo nokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, okorigia kwaino komanyekane ase Nyasae." 
Philippians4:7 Na omorembe o Nyasae, oyobuete okomanya gwonsi, norende chinkoro chiaino na ebirengererio biaino ase Kristo Yeso." 
Philippians4:8 Omoerio baminto, onsi ayare ay’ekeene, onsi ayare ay’ogosika, onsi ayare ay’oboronge, onsi ayare ay’oborabu, onsi ayagwenerete gwanchwa, onsi ayagokwanwa buya; koborabeo obuya bonde bwonsi, gose ogotogigwa, aya onsi yarengererie." 
Philippians4:9 Amang’ana aya mweorokereretie na koyanyora, na koyaigwa, na koyarora korwa asende, moyakore, na Nyasae bw’omorembe nabe amo nainwe." 
Philippians4:10 Nagokire mono ase Omonene, ekiagera bono ase omoerio mwairanire ase ebirengererio biaino igoro y’okoremerwa kwane; nabo mwarenge kondengereria ritang’ani, korende timwanyora ribaga." 
Philippians4:11 Tari ng’a ngokwana aya ekiagera inde nokoremerwa, naki neorokereirie goisaneka ase engencho ende yonsi inde nero." 
Philippians4:12 Namanyire ogokeeigwa, naende namanyire okomenteka; ase engencho yonsi, na ase amang’ana onsi neorokereirie, okoigota na koigwa enchara, okomenteka na okoremerwa." 
Philippians4:13 Ninyare gokora amang’ana onsi asere oyokombeka chinguru. 
Philippians4:14 Korende mwakorete buya mokabwatana nainche ase emechando yane. 
Philippians4:15 Na inwe Abafilipi abanyene mwamanyire ng’a ase omochakano bw’enchili, ekero naruete Makedonia, ekanisa ende tiyarenge yabwatanete nainche ase amang’ana ’okorua na okonyora, otatiga inwe mweka." 
Philippians4:16 Naki nonya nase Tesaloniki mwandeterete ogokonywa ase okoremerwa kwane ara kabere, tari rimo rioka." 
Philippians4:17 Tari ng’a nindigetie ekeegwa keria, korende nigo ndigetie okwama koria gokomenteka koba okonge asemore." 
Philippians4:18 Korende ninde nebinto bionsi, na kobua; naende naichoirwe, ekiagera nanyorire ase okoboko kwa Epafrodito ebiegwa biaruete asemore, bire ogotioka okuya, ekeng’wanso giancheirwe, kegwenerete Nyasae." 
Philippians4:19 Na Nyasae one nabaichorerie kera ekimoganetie ase ekerengo ki’obonda bwaye ase obonene ase Kristo Yeso. 
Philippians4:20 Bono Nyasae, Tata oito, abakwe kare na kare. Amina." 
Philippians4:21 Monkwanerie kera omochenu ase Kristo Yeso. Abaminto abare amo nainche babakwanirie. 
Philippians4:22 Abachenu bonsi babakwanirie, mono kobua abwo bare b’enyomba y’omoruoti omonene." 
Philippians4:23 Obuya bw’Omonene Yesu Kristo bobe amo nemioyo yaino. 
Colossians1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae, amo noyominto Timotheo," 
Colossians1:2 nkobarikera tore inwe abachenu na abegeni baminto ba Kristo abamomenyete Kolosai: Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito. 
Colossians1:3 Botambe nigo togoakera Nyasae, Ise Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, ng’a mbuya mono, ekero tokobasabera inwe," 
Colossians1:4 ekiagera twaigure buna momwegenete Kristo Yeso, naende buna mwanchete abachenu bonsi," 
Colossians1:5 ase engencho y’ogosemeria okwo mwagacheirwe igoro. Igoro y’ogosemeria oko konya mwaigure ase ring’ana ri’ekeene ase enchili 
Colossians1:6 eye yaikire gocha asemore. Nabo yaikire ense yonsi, na kwama, na gokina, buna yakinire ase egati yaino inwe abanyene korwa rituko riria mwaigwete na komanya obuya bwa Nyasae ase ekeene." 
Colossians1:7 Naboigo mworokereretigwe n’Epafara, omosomba omogisangio oito omwanchwa, oyore omosomba omwegenwa ase Kristo ase engencho yaino." 
Colossians1:8 Ere nigo atworogetie obwanchani bwaino ase Omoika. 
Colossians1:9 Ase ayio, korwa rituko riria twaigwete amang’ana ayio, titwatigete kobasabera inwe. Igo twasabete ng’a moichorwe ne chisemi chi’ogwancha kwaye ase obong’aini bwonsi na okomanya gwonsi kw’omoika." 
Colossians1:10 Mogenderere buna ebagwenerete ase Omonene, momogwenere kegima, mwame okwama okuya ase emeremo emiya, momenteke ase okomomanya Nyasae." 
Colossians1:11 Na inwe mobekwe chinguru ase okobua gwonsi, koreng’ana ne chinguru chi’obonene bwaye ase okoganya na oboremereria bwonsi amo nomogoko," 
Colossians1:12 mokomoakera Tata ng’a mbuya mono, oyobaikeranetie mobe ababwatani b’omwando bw’abachenu ase omobaso." 
Colossians1:13 Nere otosiborete korwa ase okobua kw’omosunte na agatong’anyia na gotosoyia ase oboruoti bw’Omwana oye omwanchwa. 
Colossians1:14 Ime ase Omwana oria ntore nokoboorigwa na okwaberwa kw’ebibe. 
Colossians1:15 Ere nomogwekano o Nyasae oyotari kororekana, omoiborwa bwe ritang’ani bw’ebitongwa bionsi." 
Colossians1:16 Ime yaye ebinto bionsi bigatongwa, ebire igoro na ebire ase ense, ebikororekana na ebitakororekana, onye nebirogo bi’obogambi, gose amaruoti, gose abagambi, gose abare nokobua; ebinto, bionsi nigo biatongetwe goetera asare na ase engencho yaye." 
Colossians1:17 Ere nao arenge ritang’ani ri’ebinto bionsi, na ebinto bionsi biabwatanigwe ime asare." 
Colossians1:18 Ere nomotwe bw’omobere, engencho yaye ekanisa; naende ere nomochakano na omoiborwa bwe ritang’ani korwa ase abakure, erinde abe omotang’ani ase bonsi." 
Colossians1:19 Naki Nyasae agancha ng’a oboikeranu bwaye bwonsi bomenye ime asare. 
Colossians1:20 Goetera asare Nyasae agancha kobwatania ebinto bionsi amo nere omonyene, ebinto ebire ase ense na ebire igoro, gakorire omorembe ase amanyinga ayaitegete ase omosalaba oye." 
Colossians1:21 Na inwe agwo ritang’ani nigo mwarenge mwatananire korwa ase Nyasae, mwarenge nobobisa ase ebirengererio biaino ase ogokora kwaino okobe." 
Colossians1:22 Korende bono Nyasae obabwatanirie inwe amo nere omonyene ase ogokwa gwa Kristo kw’omobere oye bwe chinyama, erio abarente ase obosio bwaye, more abachenu, motari na komocha gose na bobe bonde," 
Colossians1:23 komoragenderere ase okwegena, mwabekirwe ase oboroso, naende mwakong’igwe, motaonchoiri na gotiga ogosemeria more nakwo ase enchili eye mwaigwete. Enchili eye konya yarandigwe ase ebitongwa bionsi ebire inse y’erioba, na inche Paulo nkabekwa nkaba omosomba oye." 
Colossians1:24 Bono nagokeire ogochandwa kwane inde nakorokwo ase engencho yaino; naende ase omobere one nkoyaikerania nde aria aremete ase ogochandwa gwa Kristo ase engencho y’omobere oye, engencho yaye ekanisa." 
Colossians1:25 Inche nabeire omosomba bw’ekanisa yaye ase oborendi obo naetwe na Nyasae ase engencho yaino ase okobaranderia inwe ring’ana rionsi ria Nyasae. 
Colossians1:26 Obobisi boria bwabisetwe korwa kare ase ebigori ebinge, korende bono bwaorokigwe ase abachenu baye." 
Colossians1:27 Nyasae agancha koorokia asebare obobisi boria bore obonene na obw’obonda ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku. Obobisi boria nabwo obo, ng’a Kristo nigo are ime yaino, ayio naro ogosemeria kw’obonene." 
Colossians1:28 Ere nere twararirie, togokurera na kworokereria kera omonto ase obong’aini bwonsi, erinde tonyare korenta kera omonto omoikeranu ime ase Kristo." 
Colossians1:29 Ase engencho eyio inche nigo ngokora emeremo na ngokora omokia ase chinguru chiaye chinene, echigokora emeremo ime asende." 
Colossians2:1 Nigo nanchire ng’a momanye omokia one inde noro ase engencho yaino, na ase baria bare Laodikia na baria bonsi batarandora obosio bwane," 
Colossians2:2 erinde baremigwe ase chinkoro chiabo, kobarabwatanigwe ase obwanchani, banyore obonda bwonsi ase okomanya gwonsi gw’ekeene, banyare komanya obobisi bwa Nyasae engencho yaye Kristo." 
Colossians2:3 Ime asare chinibo chionsi chi’obong’aini na echie chisemi nao chibisire. 
Colossians2:4 Nigo ngokwana ring’ana eri, ng’a monto onde tacha kobang’aina ase amang’ana ’okoebereria." 
Colossians2:5 Naki nonya tindi nainwe ase omobere, nigo inde amo nainwe ase omoika. Nigo nkogoka ekero nkorora omoroberio oino omuya, na ogwetenenera gw’okwegena kwaino ase Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Ase ayio, buna mwamonyorire Kristo Yeso Omonene, naboigo mogenderere asare," 
Colossians2:7 mwabeire nemeri na mwaagachirwe asare, mwakong’igwe ase okwegena buna mworokereretigwe, momenteke ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Colossians2:8 Rigereria monto onde tabaisa kobakora abasakore ase chisemi chiaye chinene, na obong’ainereria bwa bosa koreng’ana ne chingencho chia mwanyabanto, na koreng’ana namorokererio aye ritang’ani ay’ense eye, gose tari buna aya Kristo." 
Colossians2:9 Naki ime yaye nao oboikeranu bwonsi bw’obonyasae bomenyete ase ekieni ki’omobere. 
Colossians2:10 Na inwe mwaikeranigwe ime yaye, ere oyore omotwe bw’abagambi na obwa bonsi abare nokobua." 
Colossians2:11 Asare boigo mwarokigwe okwaroka gotakoriri namaboko, ase okorusia okobua kw’ebibe ase omobere, engencho yaye okwaroka gokorwa ase Kristo," 
Colossians2:12 ekiagera mwatindegetwe amo nere ase ebatiso. Ase ero boigo mokabokigwa amo nere ase okwegena chinguru chia Nyasae oyomobogetie korwa ase abakure. 
Colossians2:13 Na inwe abamwarenge mokwete ase ogosaria kwaino na ase ogotaroka kw’emebere yaino, Nyasae akabakora koba moyo amo nere, gaikire kobaabera ogosaria gwonsi." 
Colossians2:14 Ere agatinyia ririko riria riarigetwe ase amachiko, riare gotosoera, eriarenge nobobisa asetore; akaritigeria ensemo, akariakerania ase omosalaba." 
Colossians2:15 Naboigo ekero aurire abagambi na abare nokobua ebirwanero biabo, akabasookia maiso marore, agachenga igoro asebare ase omosalaba." 
Colossians2:16 Ase ayio, monto onde tabagambia inwe ase engencho y’ebimokoria gose ebimokonywa, gose ase engencho ye Rituko Rinene, gose okooroka kw’omotienyi, gose Esabato." 
Colossians2:17 Amang’ana ayio nekiriri ki’amang’ana agochi‐gocha, korende omoikerania omonyene n’Kristo." 
Colossians2:18 Timoa monto onde ribaga ri’okobaura inwe ekeegwa kiaino ase okorigia kwaye ase okweororobia na ase ogosasima abamalaika, na kwebeka ase amaroro aya arorire, na koenena bosa ase ebirengererio biaye bi’obobe," 
Colossians2:19 na tabwataini nere oyore Omotwe. Korwa asere omobere bwonsi nigo ogokina ase ogokina gokorwa ase Nyasae, ase okonyora chinguru na kobwatanigwa ase chinengo na emeki." 
Colossians2:20 Gaki, onye mwakure amo na Kristo, mwatigire amorokererio aye ritang’ani ay’ense, nase ki rende mogendererete buna nab’ense more? Nase ki naende mokoigwera amachiko buna ayio:" 
Colossians2:21 “Timokuna, Timoigwa, Timobwata”," 
Colossians2:22 koreng’ana buna mwanyabanto bakoyanyora ase amachiko na amorokererio abo? (Amang’ana ayio onsi nigo agosareka ekero agokorerwa.) 
Colossians2:23 Ayio nigo akororekana ng’a nay’obong’aini ase ogosasima na okweororobia na goaka omobere, korende taisaneti gento kende ase ogotanga okogania gwe chingencho chi’obobe." 
Colossians3:1 Gaki, onye mwabokire amo na Kristo, rigia ayare igoro aase Kristo aikaransete ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae." 
Colossians3:2 Rengereria ayare igoro, gose tari ayare ase ense." 
Colossians3:3 Naki inwe mwakure, na obogima bwaino nigo bobisire amo na Kristo ase Nyasae." 
Colossians3:4 Ekero Kristo, oyore obogima bwaito, ararorekane, erio nario nainwe morarorekane amo nere ase obonene." 
Colossians3:5 Gaki moite ebiimo biaino ebire ase ense: obotomani, eubi, okorengereria okobe, okogania okobe, na obwegimeria, engencho yaye ogosasima emegwekano." 
Colossians3:6 Ase engencho y’ayio endamwamu ya Nyasae nebachere abanto b’ogotaigwera. 
Colossians3:7 Ase ayio nainwe nabo mware gotaara kare, ekero mwamenyete ase aro." 
Colossians3:8 Korende bono mobeke aare aya onsi: endamwamu, okobea, obobe, okorama, na ogokwana okobe gokorwa ase emenwa yaino." 
Colossians3:9 Timotebania oborimo, inwe abamwarusirie obomwanyabanto bwa kare amo nogokora kwaye," 
Colossians3:10 mwamweboyirie omonto omoyia, oyo okorirwe omoyia ase okomanya gwonsi ase omogwekano oye ere oyomotongete." 
Colossians3:11 Agwo takoba Omogiriki gose Omoyahudi, oyobwarogete gose oyotarogeti, oyotari Omogiriki gose oyore Omosikuti, omosomba gose omosibore, korende Kristo nere onsi, na ase bonsi." 
Colossians3:12 Gaki, ekiagera more abachore ba Nyasae, abachenu na abanchwa, mweboyie amabeebe, obuya, obokanyeku, obwororo, oboremereria." 
Colossians3:13 Bogorerania inwe ase inwe, na onye omonto ore ne ring’ana igoro ase omonto onde, mwaberane: buna Omonene abaaberete inwe, nainwe mwaberane bo." 
Colossians3:14 Kobua aya onsi, mweboyie obwanchani, nabwo egesibo gekobwatania kera egento ase oboikeranu bw’obuya." 
Colossians3:15 Tiga omorembe o Kristo ogambere chinkoro chiaino, noro mwarangererigwe ase omobere oyomo, na mobe abakoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
Colossians3:16 Ring’ana ria Kristo rimenye ase obonge ime yaino, mobe mokworokererania na gotebererania ase obong’aini bwonsi, mogotera ase chizaburi, na amatera, ne chingero chi’omoika, ase ogoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase chinkoro chiaino ime." 
Colossians3:17 Na kera eki mogokora, ase amang’ana gose ase ogokora, mokore kera egento ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso, mokomoakera Nyasae Tata ng’a mbuya mono goetera asare." 
Colossians3:18 Inwe abakungu, moigwere abasacha baino, buna egwenerete ase Omonene." 
Colossians3:19 Na inwe abasacha, mwanche abakungu baino, timoba nobororo asebare." 
Colossians3:20 Na inwe abana, moigwere abaibori baino ase amang’ana onsi, ekiagera ring’ana eri nigo rikogwenera Omonene." 
Colossians3:21 Na inwe abaise, timochegia abana baino, babaise gokwa emioyo." 
Colossians3:22 Nainwe abasomba, moigwere abanene baino ase ense eye ase amang’ana onsi, tari obosomba bw’okwegwenia ase amaiso a mwanyabanto, gose kogwenera abanto, korende ase enkoro endonge, mokomoiroka Omonene." 
Colossians3:23 Rinde rionsi mogokora rikore ase enkoro y’omogoko, buna mogokorera Omonene, gose tari mwanyabanto," 
Colossians3:24 mokomanya ng’a namonyore omwando buna eng’eria korwa ase Omonene, ekiagera mogokorera Omonene Kristo." 
Colossians3:25 Naki oyorakore bobe, nigo araakanwe obobe bwaye obo akorire, na gwanchereria tikoiyo." 
Colossians4:1 Inwe abanene, kae abasomba baino ekere kia boronge, mokomanya ng’a nainwe more n’Omonene igoro." 
Colossians4:2 Mogenderere nogosaba, morende ase korokwo, na koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono;" 
Colossians4:3 na gotosabera intwe boigo, erinde Nyasae atoigorere egesieri ase ring’ana riaye, erio tokwane obobisi bwa Kristo, naki nase engencho y’ayio nasibirwe." 
Colossians4:4 Mosabe ng’a mboorokie buna ngwenerete koboorokia. 
Colossians4:5 Mogenderere ase obong’aini ase amasio ’abanto abare isiko, na renda engaki yaino." 
Colossians4:6 Botambe chinkwana chiaino chibe chinyororo, chinywere buna omonyo, erinde momanye buna mogwenerete koiraneria kera omonto." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko oyominto omwanchwa, omosomba omwegenwa, omosomba amo nainche ase Omonene, nabamanyie amang’ana aane onsi." 
Colossians4:8 Namotomire ere asemore ase engencho eyio eyio, erinde momanye amang’ana aito, naende ere naremie chinkoro chiaino." 
Colossians4:9 Amo nere natomire Onesimo, oyominto omwegenwa, omwanchwa, oyore oyomo oino. Barabwo nababamanyie onsi ayare aiga asetore." 
Colossians4:10 Aristariko, oyosibetwe amo nainche, obakwanirie, na Mariko, omoigwa o Barnaba (mwanyorire ogotebererigwa igoro yaye; karaike seino momoroisie)." 
Colossians4:11 Naende Yeso, oyokorokwa Yusto, obakwanirie. Abwo nabwo boka ase abarogete bare abakori emeremo amo nainche ase engencho y’oboruoti bwa Nyasae; na barabwo nigo barenge kondemia." 
Colossians4:12 Epafara oyore oyomo oino, omosomba o Kristo Yeso, obakwanirie. Ere okorire omokia ase okobainyora ase ogosaba kwaye, erinde monyare gotenena more abaikeranu, abamanyete mono ogwancha gwonsi kwa Nyasae." 
Colossians4:13 Naki namobereire kirori, ng’a nare nomokia omonge mono ase engencho yaino, na ase engencho y’abwo bare Laodikia na Hieropoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, oria omorwaria omwanchwa, na Dema babakwanirie." 
Colossians4:15 Nkwanerie abaminto abare Laodikia, na Nimfa, na ekanisa ere ase enyomba yaye." 
Colossians4:16 Rirube eri karirasomwe asemore, tiga risomwe naende ase ekanisa ya Laodikia; na riria rikorwa Laodikia risomwe asemore boigo." 
Colossians4:17 Motebie Arikipo arigererie mono obosomba boria aetwe korwa ase Omonene, erinde aboikeranie." 
Colossians4:18 Oko nogokwania kwane, inche Paulo, ase okoboko kwane omonyene. Moinyore ebisibo biane. Obuya bobe amo nainwe." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Inche Paulo amo na Silivano na Timotheo nkobarikera tore inwe ab’ekanisa y’Abatesaloniki, abamore ase Nyasae Tata na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo: Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Botambe nigo togoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaino mwensi, na kobaatora ase ogosaba gwaito." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Na intwe ase obosio bwa Nyasae Tata oito titori gotiga koinyora emeremo yaino ase okwegena, na ogwechanda kwaino ase obwanchani, na oboremereria bwaino ase okomosemeria Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Naki abaminto, abamwanchire na Nyasae, twamanyire ng’a ere obachorire." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Naki intwe titwabarenterete enchili yaito ase amang’ana oka, korende boigo nase chinguru, na ase Omoika Omochenu, na ase okobaraa gochia ase obomaene oboikeranu. Na inwe momanyete chingencho chiaito buna twarenge ase egati yaino ase engencho yaino." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Inwe mokaba abegi baito, na ab’Omonene, na nonya mwachandegete mono, mwanyorete ring’ana amo nomogoko okorwa ase Omoika Omochenu," 
1Thessalonians1:7 na igo mokaba ekiorokererio ekiya ase abegeni bonsi ba Makedonia na Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Naki korwa asemore ring’ana ri’Omonene riaigurwe, tari ase Makedonia na Akaya oka, korende amang’ana akumire kera aase, ng’a imomwegenete Nyasae. Ase igo titogwenereti gokwana ring’ana rinde rionsi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Naki barabwo abanyene baorokirie amang’ana igoro yaito, buna twasoete ase egati yaino, na buna inwe mwaonchokerete Nyasae korwa ase emegwekano y’osasimwa, erinde mokorere Nyasae ore moyo, oyo bw’ekeene," 
1Thessalonians1:10 na moganye Omwana oye korwa igoro, oyio ere abogetie korwa ase abakure, nere Yeso, oyototooretie korwa ase endamwamu egochi‐gocha." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Abaminto, inwe abanyene mwamanyire ng’a ogosoa gwaito ase egati yaino tikwabete okwa bosa." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Korende, buna momanyete, gatwaikire gochandwa na gochaywa ritang’ani ase Filipi, tokaremigwa na Nyasae oito gokwana enchili ya Nyasae asemore, ase okoumerana nokoamererania okonene mono." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Naki ogosorora gwaito tikori ogw’okobasiria, gose ogw’okobabeka ase eubi, gose ogw’okobang’aina," 
1Thessalonians2:4 korende buna twancheirwe na Nyasae koba abatwegenirwe koegwa enchili, nabo togokwana, tari ase okogwenera abanto, korende ase okogwenera Nyasae, oyokorenga chinkoro chiaito." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Naki titwarenge namang’ana ay’okogwenera abanto, buna mwamanyire, gose ay’okobiserera obwegimeria. Nyasae nere kirori." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Titwarigetie ogotogigwa korwa ase mwanyabanto, nonya nkorwa asemore, gose korwa ase abanto bande." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Buna abatomwa ba Kristo anga ntwabaritoerete, korende nigo tware abororo ase egati yaino, buna omokungu akorera abana baye." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Naboigo naintwe tware namaiga amange asemore, tokaba nomogoko kobaa inwe, tari enchili ya Nyasae yoka, korende nonya nobogima bwaito, ekiagera mwabeire abanchi baito." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Naki baminto, moinyorete emeremo yaito na obokong’u bwaito, ng’a ekero twabaranderetie enchili ya Nyasae, tware gokora emeremo obotuko na omobaso, erinde titocha komoraarereria onde oino." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Inwe mbirori, na Nyasae boigo, buna okogenderera gwaito kwarenge ase egati yaino, inwe abamwegenire, buna tware nobochenu na oboronge, na titware na komocha." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Naki mwamanyire buna tware gosemia kera oyomo oino buna ise agosemia abana baye, na tokabaremia, na kobasorora, na kobakurera," 
1Thessalonians2:12 erinde mogenderere buna ebagwenerete ase Nyasae, oyokobarangeria mosoe ase oboruoti bwaye, na ase obonene bwaye." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ase ayio, nigo togoakera Nyasae, ng’a mbuya mono, totari gotiga, ng’a ekero mwanyorete ring’ana ria Nyasae, eri mwaigwete korwa asetore, nigo mwarianchete, tari buna ring’ana ria mwanyabanto, korende buna rire ekeene ekeene, ring’ana ria Nyasae, erigokora emeremo ime yaino, inwe abamwegenire." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Naki baminto, inwe nigo mwarenge ababwatani be chikanisa chia Nyasae ase Kristo Yeso, echire ase ense ya Boyahudi, ekiagera nigo mwanyorete emechando eria eria korwa ase abanto b’egesaku kiaino, buna baria banyorete korwa ase Abayahudi," 
1Thessalonians2:15 abaitete Omonene Yeso na ababani, na intwe bagatoseria. Barabwo tibagwenera Nyasae, naende nigo bare mamincha ase abanto bonsi." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Abwo bagatotanga titokwana nabanto b’Ebisaku amang’ana ayaranyare kobarentera ogotooreka. Ase enchera eyio baikeranie botambe ekerengo ki’ebibe biabo. Korende endamwamu ya Nyasae yabaikeire omoerio. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Korende intwe, baminto, gatoraatananekane korwa asemore ase ekero egeke (ase obosio gose tari ase enkoro) tokarengereria mono kobua nokogania okonene kororana nainwe amasio ase amasio." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ase ayio, ntwaganetie gocha asemore (inche Paulo nonya ng’ara kabere) korende Saitani agatotanga." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ogosemeria gwaito ninki, gose omogoko oito, gose egutwa yaito eragere twetogie ase obosio bw’Omonene oito Yeso ekero ki’ogocha kwaye? Inee! Tari inwe?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ee, inwe nobonene bwaito, na omogoko oito." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ase ayio, ekero totanyarete koremereria kobua, togancha gotigara Atene intwe tweka." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Togatoma Timotheo oyominto, omokori emeremo amo na Nyasae ase okorandia enchili ya Kristo, erinde abakong’ie na kobaremia ase okwegena kwaino," 
1Thessalonians3:3 erio tatigerigwa nemechando eye. Naki inwe abanyene momanyete ng’a ase eyio nero torageire. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Naki ekero twarenge amo nainwe ntwatang’anete kobatebia ng’a ntonyore emechando, buna yabete agwo, na inwe moyemanyete." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Naki ase engencho eyio, ekero ntanyarete koremereria kobua, ngatoma Timotheo, erinde inyare komanya okwegena kwaino. Noboire ng’a omoteemi oria obateemire inwe na emeremo yaito ebe eya bosa." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Korende bono ekero Timotheo achete asetore korwa seino agatorentera amang’ana amaya igoro y’okwegena kwaino na obwanchani bwaino, na buna motoinyorete buya botambe. Naende agatotebia ng’a more namaiga gotorora intwe, buna naintwe tore namaiga kobarora inwe." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ase engencho eyio, baminto, ase obokong’u bwaito, na emechando yaito, tokaremigwa ase okwegena kwaino." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Naki bono nigo torabe moyo, komorabe moteneine bokong’u ase Omonene." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Nase nchera ki toranyare koiraneria Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase engencho yaino, ase omogoko bwonsi oyotokoigwa ase engencho yaino ase obosio bwa Nyasae oito?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Obotuko na omobaso nigo tokona‐gosaba ng’a tororane nainwe amasio ase amasio, na koroisia ekebaremete ase okwegena kwaino." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Bono Nyasae Tata oito omonyene, na Omonene oito Yeso atotang’ane ase enchera yaito, toike seino." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Omonene abakore momenteke na gokina ase ogwanchana inwe ase inwe, na ase ogwancha abanto bonsi, buna intwe tobanchete inwe." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Ase igo anyare gokong’ia chinkoro chiaino chibe chitari na komocha, ase obochenu ase obosio bwa Nyasae, Tata oito ekero ki’ogocha kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo amo nabachenu baye bonsi." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Omoerio, baminto, twababoririe na kobasorora ase Omonene Yeso ng’a buna mweorokereretie korwa asetore nebagwenerete mogenderere kogwenera Nyasae. Buna inwe mogendererete, kora igo na komenteka." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Naki momanyete amachiko ki twabaete korwa ase Omonene Yeso. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Naki oko nakwo ogwancha kwa Nyasae, ng’a mobe abachenu, na mweatanane korwa ase obotomani." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Kera oyomo oino amanye buna akogambera omobere oye omonyene ase obochenu na ogosika," 
1Thessalonians4:5 tari ase okogania okobe buna abanto b’Ebisaku abatamomanyeti Nyasae. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Bono onde tamochera oyomwabo na komong’aina ase ring’ana eri, ekiagera Omonene nere okorusia egesiomba ase aya onsi, buna twabamanyetie ritang’ani na kobakurera bokong’u." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Naki Nyasae tatorangereti tobe ase ogotacheneka, korende ase obochenu." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ase ayio, ere oyobwangire aya, tangeti mwanyabanto, korende Nyasae, oyokobaa inwe Omoika oye Omochenu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ase amang’ana’obwanchani bw’obomino, tari nengencho asemore ng’a mbarikere, ekiagera inwe abanyene mworokererigwe na Nyasae, ng’a mwanchane inwe ase inwe." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Naki ekeene, nigo mwanchete abamino bonsi abare Makedonia yonsi. Korende twabasoroire, baminto, momente ayio mono kobua." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Naende kora omokia komenya ase obotoereru, na kwenaria ogokora kwaino, na gokora emeremo namaboko aino, buna twabachigete." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Mogenderere buya, erinde monyore ogosika korwa ase abwo bare isiko, na timoba abamosemeretie gento korwa ase onde." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Korende baminto, titorigeti ng’a timomanya amang’ana igoro y’abwo bararire, mobaise goichanigwa buna abande abatari nogosemeria." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Naki onye twegenire ng’a Yeso nakwete, naende akaboka, naboigo nabwo bararire ase Yeso, Nyasae nabarente amo nere." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Naki aya twabatebirie ase ring’ana ri’Omonene, ng’a intwe abatore moyo, abatwatigaire goika ekero ki’ogocha kw’Omonene, titogotang’anera abwo baikire korara," 
1Thessalonians4:16 ekiagera Omonene omonyene naike korwa igoro neriogi rie ring’ana ri’ogochika amo neriogi ri’omomalaika omonene, na egeturi ki’egetureri kia Nyasae. Na abwobakwete ase Kristo nababoke ritang’ani." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Erio nyuma y’ayio intwe, abatore moyo, abatwatigaire, inatobogorigwe amo nabarabwo gochia ase amare, erio torototere Omonene igoro gati. Nabo inatobe amo n’Omonene botambe." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ase ayio, remania inwe ase inwe ase amang’ana aya." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Korende ase amang’ana ’ebiro ne chingaki, baminto, tari nengencho asemore ng’a mbarikere." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Naki inwe abanyene mwamanyire buya kegima, ng’a rituko ri’Omonene nigo rirache buna omoibi agocha botuko." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ekero abanto bagoteba, “Ntore nomorembe na obotoereru”, erio nario ogosareka gokobachera mobosokano buna obororo bw’okobina bokomochera oyore morito, na tibakonyara gwetooria." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Korende baminto, timori ase omosunte, goika rituko riria riche kobanyora mobosokano buna omoibi," 
1Thessalonians5:5 ekiagera inwe mwensi nabana b’oborabu, na abana b’omobaso. Intwe titori ab’obotuko, gose ab’omosunte." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ase ayio titorara chitoro buna abande bagokora, korende torende na kwerita." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Naki abwo bakorara chitoro nigo bakorara botuko, na abwo bagotinda nigo bagotinda botuko." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Korende intwe abatore ab’omobaso, tobe aberiti, na tweboyie okwegena na obwanchani buna engobo y’ekioma ase ebikuba biaito, na ogosemeria kw’ogotooreka buna ekegogwa giaito gi’ekioma." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Ekiagera Nyasae tatoragerete endamwamu, korende agatoragera tonyore ogotooreka goetera ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 oyokwete ase engencho yaito, erinde tobe moyo amo nere, kerabe tokorenda, gose tokorara chitoro." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ase ayio, remania inwe ase inwe, na koagachana, kera omonto noyomwabo, buna mogokora." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Korende baminto, twabasoroire inwe, mosike abwo bagokora emeremo emekong’u ase egati yaino, abwo bakobaraa ase Omonene na kobakurera." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Mobasike mono ase obwanchani, ase engencho y ’emeremo yabo. Mobe nomorembe inwe ase inwe." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Twabasoroire, baminto, mokurere abwo bare aboro, moremie abwo berusirie moyo, mokonye abwo bare abareu, remereria nabanto bonsi." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Rigereria ng’a onde taakana oyomwabo obobe ase obobe, korende botambe morigie gokorerana ayare amaya inwe ase inwe, na ase abanto bonsi." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Goka botambe! 
1Thessalonians5:17 Saba motari gotiga! 
1Thessalonians5:18 Iraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase amang’ana onsi! Naki oko nakwo ogwancha kwa Nyasae asemore ase Kristo Yeso. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Timorimia Omoika! 
1Thessalonians5:20 Timochaya obobani," 
1Thessalonians5:21 korende teema kera egento, bwata ekere ekiya," 
1Thessalonians5:22 na eatanane korwa ase obobe bwa kera engencho. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Nyasae omonyene omorembe abachene kegima, na inwe abanyene morendwe ase emeika, na emioyo, na emebere, na mobe motari na komocha ekero ki’ogocha kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ere oyobarangeirie nomwegenwa, nakore ayio." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Baminto, motosabere!" 
1Thessalonians5:26 Nkwanerie abaminto bonsi ase okobanyunyunta ase obochenu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Nabatianirie ase Omonene, ng’a rirube eri risomwe ase abaminto bonsi." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nainwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Inche Paulo amo na Silivano na Timotheo nkobarikera tore inwe ab’ekanisa y’Abatesaloniki, abamore ase Nyasae Tata oito na Omonene Yeso Kristo:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Abaminto, netogwenerete komoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono botambe ase engencho yaino, buna ere boronge, ekiagera okwegena kwaino gwakinire mono, na obwanchani bwa kera oyomo oino ase oyonde nigo bogendererete komentekana." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ase ayio, na intwe abanyene nigo togwetogia ase engencho yaino ase chikanisa chia Nyasae, ase engencho y’oboremereria bwaino, na okwegena more nakwo ase ogochandwa kwaino gwonsi, na emechando eye moremereretie." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Eke nakio ekiorokererio, ng’a ekina kia Nyasae mboronge kere. Erio mobarwe koba abamwagweneire oboruoti bwa Nyasae, ekiagera ase engencho y’obwo mwachandirwe." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Naki Nyasae ororire boronge kobaakana emechando baria bakobachanda inwe," 
2Thessalonians1:7 na kobaa inwe abamwachandirwe ogotimokigwa amo naintwe. Aya nigo arakoreke ekero Omonene Yeso agocha koorokigwa korwa igoro amo nabamalaika b’okobua kwaye ase ekebemberi ki’omorero," 
2Thessalonians1:8 na kobaakana egesiomba abwo batamomanyeti Nyasae, na bataigwereti enchili y’Omonene oito Yeso." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Barabwo nabanyore egesusuro ki’ogosareka, naende nabaatananwe korwa ase obosio bw’Omonene kare na kare, na korwa ase obonene bw’okobua kwaye," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ekero arache ase rituko riria, erinde atogigwe ase egati y’abachenu baye, na gokumigwa ase egati ya bonsi abamwegenire, ekiagera mwegenire oborori bwaito obo twabarenteire." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ase ayio, nigo tokobasabera botambe, erio Nyasae oito ababare ng’a mwagweneire okorangeria kwaye. Ere aikeranie kera okogania kw’obuya, na kera emeremo y’okwegena, ase okobua kwaye," 
2Thessalonians1:12 erinde erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso ritogigwe ime yaino, na inwe ime yaye, koreng’ana nobuya bwa Nyasae oito, na obw’Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bono baminto, ase amang’ana ’ogocha kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, na ogosangererekana gwaito ase obosio bwaye, twababoririe," 
2Thessalonians2:2 timotengechigwa bwango na gotiga ebirengererio biaino, gose timoichanigwa na moika onde, gose namang’ana, gose ne rirube rigokagwa ng’a nkorwa asetore riarure, erigoteba ng’a rituko ri’Omonene riaikire kobao." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Monto onde tabang’aina ase enchera ende yonsi, ekiagera rituko riria tirigocha ogwatananekana na ogotaigwera gotaracha, na omosaria bw’amachiko, omwana bw’obosiru, aorokigwe." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ere nomoengereria, omweimokereria igoro omonyene, igoro ya kera egekorokwa Nyasae, na ekegosasimwa. Naende nigo agoikaransa ase Hekalu ya Nyasae, okweraria omonyene ng’a nere Nyasae." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Inee! Timware koinyora ng’a ekero narenge amo nainwe inabatebetie ayio? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Na bono, erimotangete morimanyete, erio ekero engaki yaye eraike anyare koorokigwa." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Naki obobisi boria bw’ogosaria amachiko bwachakire gokora emeremo bono, na oria ore kobotanga bono goika arusigweo." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Erio agwo omosaria oria bw’amachiko aorokigwe, na Omonene Yeso namoite nomoika bw’omonwa oye, na komosiria ase amasase ’okoorokigwa kwaye." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ogocha kw’omosaria oria nigo kore ogokora gwa Saitani, naende nkobe nokobua gwonsi, na ebikone, na amakumia ’oborimo," 
2Thessalonians2:10 na ase obong’ainereria bwonsi bw’ogotaba boronge ase abwo bagosira, ekiagera bangete konyora ekeene, na kogiancha erinde banyare gotoorigwa." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ase ayio, Nyasae nabatomere obotantanu bwe chinguru, abakore begene ayare ay’oborimo," 
2Thessalonians2:12 erinde bagambigwe bonsi abwo bategenete ekeene, korende baare kwegokia ase ayatari ay’oboronge." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Korende baminto, netogwenerete koiraneria Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono botambe ase engencho yaino, inwe abamwanchire n’Omonene, ekiagera Nyasae abachorete korwa omochakano, erinde monyore ogotooreka ase ogochenwa kogokorwa n’Omoika, na kwegena ekeene." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ase aya naro abarangereretie inwe goetera ase enchili eye twabaranderetie, erinde monyore obonene bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ase igo baminto, tenena bokong’u, na mobwate chingencho echio twaborokereretie, onye nase amang’ana ’emenwa yaito, gose nase rirube riaito." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Bono Omonene oito Yeso Kristo omonyene, na Nyasae Tata oito, oyotwanchete na otoete okoremia gwa kare na kare, na ogosemeria okuya ase obuya bwaye," 
2Thessalonians2:17 aremie chinkoro chiaino, na abakong’ie mokore ayare boronge ase kera ogokora okuya, na amang’ana amaya." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Omoerio, baminto, tosabere erinde ring’ana ri’Omonene rirande na gotogigwa buna riakorire ase egati yaino," 
2Thessalonians3:2 ng’a totoorigwe korwa ase abanto batari abaronge, na abare ababe, ekiagera tai bonsi bare nokwegena." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Korende Omonene nomwegenwa, nere orababeke chinguru na kobarenda korwa ase oria omobe." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ase Omonene ntore nogosemeria igoro yaino, ng’a ngokora more ayatwabachigete, naende mogenderere koyakora." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Omonene atang’ane chinkoro chiaino, erinde momanye obwanchani bwa Nyasae, na oboremereria bwa Kristo." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bono baminto, twabachikire ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso Kristo, mweatanane korwa ase oyomino oyore omworo, oyotabwateti chingencho echio mweorokereretie korwa asetore." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Naki inwe abanyene momanyete buna ebagwenerete motwege; titwabete aboro ekero twarenge amo nainwe," 
2Thessalonians3:8 gose titwariete endagera ya monto onde bwensi bosa, totaakaneti, korende nase obokong’u amo nogwechanda togakora emeremo obotuko na omobaso, erinde titoraarereria monto onde oino." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Tari ng’a eyio tiyatotungetie, korende igo twekorete abanyene koba ekiorokererio ekiya asemore, erinde motwege." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ekiagera nonya nekero keria twarenge amo nainwe ntwabachigete ring’ana eri, ng’a onye omonto tarigeti gokora emeremo, taegwa endagera." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Naki twaigure ng’a mbare abanto asemore bare aboro, batari gokora emeremo, korende nigo bakona‐gotuka amang’ana ’abanto bande." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Nabo abanto banga buna abwo twabachikire na kobasorora ase Omonene Yeso Kristo, ng’a bakore emeremo ase obotoereru, na koria endagera yabo abanyene." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Korende baminto, timorosa gokora amaya." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Onye monto onde bwensi okwanga koigwera ring’ana eri tokwanete ase rirube eri, erusananie korwa ase omonto oyio, na timosanga nere; tiga arore obosooku." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Timomobara buna omobisa, korende momokurere buna oyomino." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Bono Omonene bw’omorembe omonyene abae omorembe ase chingaki chionsi, na ase chinchera chionsi. Omonene abe amo nainwe mwensi." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Oko nogokwania kwane inche Paulo ase okoboko kwane omonyene. Eke nakio ekemanyerio ase kera rirube riane; naboigo nkorika. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nainwe mwensi. 
1Timothy1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogochika kwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito, na Kristo Yeso, ogosemeria gwaito," 
1Timothy1:2 ngokorikera nde aye Timotheo, omwana one bori ase okwegena: Obuya na amabera, na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata, na ase Kristo Yeso, Omonene oito." 
1Timothy1:3 Buna nakoboretie ekero nare kogenda Makedonia, otigare Efeso, erinde okanie abande tiborokereria okworokereria konde okoao," 
1Timothy1:4 gose tibategerera emegano ao ao, gose chinderia chie chisokoro, chitari nomoerio. Ayio onsi nigo akorenta okobora‐boria, gose tari gokorera oboagacho bwa Nyasae ase okwegena." 
1Timothy1:5 Bono ekerenga ki’ogochika oko nakio eke, ng’a babe nobwanehani bokorwa ase chinkoro chindabu, ne chinkoro chitari kobagambia, na okwegena gotari nobong’ainereria." 
1Timothy1:6 Abande bamochete ayio, batantanire na koonchokera ogokwana kwa bosa." 
1Timothy1:7 Naende nigo banchete koba aborokia b’amachiko, korende tibamanyeti ayabagokwana, gose amang’ana aria bakomigereria ne chinguru." 
1Timothy1:8 Twamanyire ng’a amachiko namaya, onye omonto okoyakorera buna agwenerete gokorerwa," 
1Timothy1:9 na omanyete ng’a amachiko tabekiri ase omonto omoronge. Korende nigo abekire ase abasaria amachiko, na abatari koigwera, ase abatari aba Nyasae, na abanyabibe, ase abatari abachenu, baria bare ab’ense eye, ase abaiti abaise gose abang’ina, na abaiti bande," 
1Timothy1:10 ase abatomani, na abasacha abagwesaria ase abasacha, ase abakoiba abanto na kobaoonia, ase abanyaborimo, na abakoria chimuma chi’oborimo. Na korirabe ing’ana rinde rionsi ritabwataini nokworokereria kw’obogima," 
1Timothy1:11 koreng’ana nenchili y’obonene bwa Nyasae, oyore Ogosesenigwa okonene, eye inche negenirwe koyeraria." 
1Timothy1:12 Namoakeire Kristo Yeso, Omonene oito, oyombegete chinguru, ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera andoche ng’a nigo inde omwegenwa. Akambeka ase obosomba bwaye," 
1Timothy1:13 nonya ritang’ani narenge komorama na komochanda, naboigo, narenge omochege. Korende ere akandorera amabera, ekiagera nakorete bo ase ogotamanya, na ase ogotegena," 
1Timothy1:14 na obuya bw’Omonene oito bwamentekanire mono amo nokwegena na obwanchani ebire ime ase Kristo Yeso. 
1Timothy1:15 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene, rigwenerete gwancherwa kegima, ng’a Kristo Yeso nigo achete ase ense gotooria abanyene ebibe, na ase abwo inche noyo bwe ritang’ani." 
1Timothy1:16 Korende nkanyora amabera ase engencho eyio, ng’a asende inche ritang’ani Yeso Kristo aorokie oboremereria bwaye bwonsi, erio imbe ekiorokererio ase abwo barache komwegena ase okonyora obogima bwa kare na kare." 
1Timothy1:17 Ase Omoruoti o kare na kare, oyotakonyorekana nogosareka, oyotakororekana, nere Nyasae bweka, asare ere ogosika na obonene kare na kare. Amina." 
1Timothy1:18 Timotheo, omwana one, ogochika oko nakoeire, koreng’ana namang’ana ’obobani ayakwanetwe igoro yao, erinde ase ayio orwane esegi ere engiya." 
1Timothy1:19 Obe nokwegena na enkoro etari gokogambia, ebio abande babisereirie are, na ase amang’ana ’okwegena basirire." 
1Timothy1:20 Ase abwo mbareo Humenayo na Aleksanderi, abwo nabaeire Saitani, erinde borokererigwe tibarama Nyasae." 
1Timothy2:1 Gaki, ritang’ani ase amang’ana onsi nabasoroire ng’a okoboria, na ogosaba, na okogaramera amo nokoiraneria Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono, bikoreke ase engencho y’abanto bonsi," 
1Timothy2:2 ase engencho y’abaruoti, na bonsi abaeire okobua, erinde tonyare koba nobogima bw’oboitongo na obw’omorembe, na ase amang’ana onsi koba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, na echi’ogosikana." 
1Timothy2:3 Eri nerigiya, naende ndiancheire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito," 
1Timothy2:4 oyorigetie abanto bonsi batoorigwe, banyare komanya onsi ayare ay’ekeene." 
1Timothy2:5 Naki Nyasae noyomo, na omobwatania egati ya Nyasae na mwanyabanto noyomo, omonto oria Kristo Yeso" 
1Timothy2:6 ere oyobweruete omonyene koba embooria ase engencho ya bonsi. Igoro y’ayio oborori borentwe ekero engaki yaye eraike. 
1Timothy2:7 Ase engencho y’ayio nkaragwa imbe omoraria, na omotomwa, erinde inyorokie abanto b’Ebisaku amang’ana ’okwegena na ekeene; nigo ngokwana ekeene, tindi gokwana oborimo." 
1Timothy2:8 Nigo nganetie abasacha basabe kera aase, bakoimokia amaboko amachenu, batari nendamwamu, gose na tang’u‐tang’u." 
1Timothy2:9 Naboigo nabakungu beboyie chianga chi’ogosika, babe aberiti abaya na abegiti, tari abakomina chitukia, gose kobeka etahabu ne chiruru, gose chianga chie rigori rinene," 
1Timothy2:10 korende bakore ogokora okuya, buna egwenerete abakungu abakoorokia ng’a mbare ne chingeneho chi’obonyasae." 
1Timothy2:11 Tiga omokungu eorokererie ase ogokira, na ase ogosika gwonsi." 
1Timothy2:12 Ting’eti omokungu ribaga ri’okworokereria, gose kogambera omosacha, korende nemogwenerete akire," 
1Timothy2:13 ekiagera Adamu nere otongetwe ritang’ani, na nyuma yaye Hawa." 
1Timothy2:14 Na Adamu tang’ainetwe, korende nomokungu ong’ainetwe, na igo akaba omomochi." 
1Timothy2:15 Korende omokungu natoorigwe goetera ase okoibora abana—onye okogenderera ase okwegena, na obwanchani, na obochenu amo nobweriti." 
1Timothy3:1 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene, onye omonto origetie koba omotang’ani bw’ekanisa, igo aganetie emeremo emiya." 
1Timothy3:2 Omotang’ani bw’ekanisa nemogwenerete abe omonto otari gokwanwa bobe, omonto ore nomokungu oyomo, omweriti, na omwegamberi ase onsi, abe omwechiki, omoroisia abageni, na oyomanyete kworokereria buya," 
1Timothy3:3 tari omonto onarete edivai, gose omonto bwanchete goaka abanto, abe omonto omoremereria, otari gwancha eriomana, gose otari omwegimeria." 
1Timothy3:4 Naende nemogwenerete abe omonto omanyete kogambera ab’enyomba yaye omonyene buya, na kworokereria abana baye baigwere ase ogosika gwonsi," 
1Timothy3:5 ekiagera onye omonto tamanyeti gotenenera ab’enyomba yaye omonyene, nakiaranyare korenda ekanisa ya Nyasae?" 
1Timothy3:6 Ere taba omonto oonchoka rero iga, abaise gocha koenena na kogwa ase okogambigwa gwa Saitani." 
1Timothy3:7 Nagwenerete gwatorwa ng’a nomuya nabanto bare isiko, erinde tabaisa kogwa ase ogosoerwa, na ase omoeto o Saitani." 
1Timothy3:8 Naboigo nabakonyi b’ekanisa babe abanto bateneneine boronge ase ogokora okuya, batari nemenwa ebere, abanto batari konywa edivai enyinge, abanto batari gwancha okonyora kw’oborianania." 
1Timothy3:9 Mbagwenerete babwate obobisi bw’okwegena ase chinkoro chitakobagambia. 
1Timothy3:10 Barabwo boigo barengwe ritang’ani: onye bakonyorekana ng’a tibari ne chingencho chimbe, erio baegwe emeremo y’obokonyi ase ekanisa." 
1Timothy3:11 Naboigo nabakungu babo bateneine boronge ase ogokora okuya, tari abang’achi, babe aberiti na abegenwa ase amang’ana onsi." 
1Timothy3:12 Omokonyi bw’ekanisa abe omonto ore nomokungu oyomo, omanyete kogambera abana baye buya, na ab’enyomba yaye omonyene." 
1Timothy3:13 Naki abwo bagokora emeremo yabo y’obokonyi buya benyoreire amasikani na oboremu obonge ase okwegena kore ime ase Kristo Yeso. 
1Timothy3:14 Nigo nakorikeire amang’ana aya, inde nogosemeria ng’a ninchiche asore bwango." 
1Timothy3:15 Korende inse gotebana, erio omanye buna abanto bagwenerete kogenderera ase enyomba ya Nyasae, eyere ekanisa ya Nyasae ore moyo, naende ere esiiro na oboroso ebire bi’ekeene." 
1Timothy3:16 Naende ne ring’ana ritari koamereranigwa, ng’a obobisi bwe chingencho chi’obonyasae nobonene: Ere oyoorogetigwe ase omobere o mwanyabanto, akaorokigwa n’Omoika ng’a nomonyene oboronge, akarorwa nabamalaika, akarandigwa ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku, akegenwa ase ense, akabogorigwa gochia igoro ase obonene." 
1Timothy4:1 Omoika okwanire ase amang’ana akoigweka boronge, ng’a ase ekero ki’omoerio abanto bande mbeatanane korwa ase okwegena ase okoigwera emeika y’obong’ainereria na amorokererio ’ebirecha," 
1Timothy4:2 ase obong’ainereria bw’abanto abanyaborimo, abwo chinkoro chiabo chiasambirwe, chitari koigwa kende." 
1Timothy4:3 Barabwo nigo bagokania abanto ng’a tibanyuomana, naende tibaria endagera eye Nyasae atongete, erinde baria begenire, na baikire komanya ekeene, bayenyore ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono." 
1Timothy4:4 Kera egento egiatongetwe na Nyasae nekiya na tikegwenereti kwangwa, korende, nkegwenerete konyorwa amo nokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono," 
1Timothy4:5 ekiagera giachenirwe ne ring’ana ria Nyasae na ogosaba. 
1Timothy4:6 Kororokererie abaminto ayio, nobe omosomba omuya o Kristo Yeso, obe oyokwerageria namang’ana ’okwegena na okworokererigwa okuya koria gwatunyanete." 
1Timothy4:7 Korende bwange emegano etari ne chingencho chi’obonyasae eyio yanchire nabakungu abagotu. Bwenarie aye omonyene chingencho chi’obonyasae. 
1Timothy4:8 Naki okwenaria kw’omobere nokonyora ogoke, korende okwenaria gwe chingencho chi’obonyasae nokonyora ase amang’ana onsi, ekiagera nkore neira ase obogima bwa bono, na ase boria bogochi‐gocha." 
1Timothy4:9 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene, rigwenerete gwancherwa kegima." 
1Timothy4:10 Naki ase ring’ana erio nigo togokora emeremo ase ogwechanda, ekiagera tomosemeretie Nyasae ore moyo, ere oyore Omotooria bw’abanto bonsi, mono bw’abwo begenire." 
1Timothy4:11 Obachike na koborokereria amang’ana ayio. 
1Timothy4:12 Monto onde tagochaya ekiagera ore omosae, korende obe ekiorokererio ekiya ase abwo begenire, ase ogokwana, na ase orogendo, naende ase obwanchani, na okwegena, na obochenu." 
1Timothy4:13 Goika nchiche, kora omokia ase ogosomera abanto amariko, na gokurera, na kworokereria." 
1Timothy4:14 Totiga gokorera ekeegwa keria kwaetwe ase enchera y’obobani, ekero ekeombe ki’abagaaka giakobekerete amaboko." 
1Timothy4:15 Orengererie ayio, bwerue kegima ase ayio, erio okogenderera kwao kobe maiso marore ase abanto bonsi." 
1Timothy4:16 Bwerende aye omonyene na okworokereria kwao, ogenderere ase ayio, ekiagera korakore igo mbwetoorie aye omonyene amo nabwo bakogotegerera." 
1Timothy5:1 Totogonyera omogaaka, korende omosorore buna iso, abamura abake buna bamura bamino," 
1Timothy5:2 abakungu abagotu buna abanyoko, na abakungu abasubati buna basubati bamino, ase obochenu bwonsi." 
1Timothy5:3 Osike ababoraka abare ababoraka bori. 
1Timothy5:4 Korende onye omoboraka ore nabana gose abachokoro, tiga beorokererie ritang’ani ayabagwenerete bakorere abamwabo abanyene, na koiraneria abaibori babo ng’a mbuya mono ase ebibanyorire, ekiagera ring’ana eri ndiancheire ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
1Timothy5:5 Oyore omoboraka bori, na otigire bweka, oyo nigo amosemeretie Nyasae, na kogenderera ase okoboria na ogosaba obotuko na omobaso." 
1Timothy5:6 Korende ere, oyotari gwetanga ase okogania kwaye, okure nonya ore moyo." 
1Timothy5:7 Obachike ayio, erinde babe batari na komocha." 
1Timothy5:8 Onye omonto takorenda abare abamwabo, mono baria b’enyomba yaye, okanire okwegena, naende nomobe kobua oyotegeneti." 
1Timothy5:9 Omoboraka anyare korikwa onye okoorire emiaka emerongo etano nomo, naende onye orenge omokungu bw’omosacha oyomo." 
1Timothy5:10 Nemogwenerete gwatorwa ng’a nare nogokora okuya, buna oyo okinirie abana, oroisirie abageni, osibirie abachenu amagoro, okonyire abachandegete, na bweruete omonyene ase kera ogokora okuya." 
1Timothy5:11 Korende torika ababoraka batari nemiaka emenge, ekiagera ekero baranyore ebirengererio ebire ao na Kristo, nigo baraganie konyuomwa." 
1Timothy5:12 Barabwo nabagambigwe, ekiagera batigire eira yabo ye ritang’ani." 
1Timothy5:13 Amo nayio beorokereirie koba aboro, bagoetanana enyomba ase enyomba; tibari aboro rioka, korende nabatora‐toria, bakwerosia namang’ana ’abanto bande, bagokwana amang’ana atagwenereti." 
1Timothy5:14 Ase igo, nanchire ababoraka batari nemiaka emenge banyuomwe, baibore abana, barende chinka chiabo, na tibaa moengereria onde ribaga ri’ogokwana bobe igoro asetore." 
1Timothy5:15 Naki abande bairanire nyuma, na gotunyana Saitani." 
1Timothy5:16 Onye omosacha gose omokungu, oyobwegenete, ore nababoraka bamwabo, tiga abakonye, ekanisa teraarerigwa, erinde ebakonye baria bare ababoraka bori." 
1Timothy5:17 Abagaaka abakogamba buya babarerwe ng’a mbagwenerete amasikani ara kabere, kobua mono abwo bagokora emeremo y’okorandia na kworokereria." 
1Timothy5:18 Naki amariko nigo agoteba, “Tobaisa kobekera entang’ana ekeokio ekero ekoora endagera”, na “Omokori emeremo nagwenerete koegwa eng’eria yaye.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Tibwancha ogosoerwa igoro y’omogaaka otatiga, ase amang’ana ’abarori babere gose batato." 
1Timothy5:20 Abwo bagokora ebibe, obatogonyere ase amasio ’abanto bonsi, erinde abande bairoke." 
1Timothy5:21 Nagochikire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na obwa Kristo Yeso, na obw’abamalaika abachore, obwate amang’ana ayio, na tonacha ring’ana ritang’ani otaramanya buna rire; tokora ing’ana rinde rionsi ase ogwanchereria." 
1Timothy5:22 Tobekera omonto amaboko bwango, gose tosanga nebibe bi’abanto bande. Bwerende aye omonyene, obe omochenu." 
1Timothy5:23 Korwa bono tonywa amache oka, korende onywe edivai nke, ase engencho y’enda yao na amarwaire agokonyora ekero ase ekero." 
1Timothy5:24 Ebibe bi’abanto bande nigo bire maiso marore, biatang’anire gochia ase ekina, korende ebi’abande nigo bikobatunyana korwa nyuma." 
1Timothy5:25 Naboigo, ogokora okuya nigo kore maiso marore, na koria gotari maiso marore tigokogenderera kobisekana." 
1Timothy6:1 Bonsi abare inse y’obosibwa bw’obosomba babare abanene babo ng’a mbagwenerete ogosika gwonsi, erinde erieta ria Nyasae tiriramwa, gose okworokereria gwaito." 
1Timothy6:2 Na baria bare nabanene abegeni tibabachaya ekiagera nabamwabo bare, korende babakorere buya kobua, ekiagera abwo bakoreirwe emeremo emiya nigo bare abegeni na abanchwa. Bworokererie amang’ana aya, na gokurera." 
1Timothy6:3 Onye omonto okworokereria okworokereria konde okoao, na tabwataini namang’ana ’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, ayare ay’obogima, na okworokereria kobwataine ne chingencho chi’obonyasae," 
1Timothy6:4 ere oenenire, na tamanyeti ing’ana rinde rionsi. Ere nigo are omonto ore noborwaire bw’omoyo ase amaborio na okoamererania kw’amang’ana. Ase amang’ana aya nigo bikorwao emoko, na eriomana, na oborami, na ogokagera okobe," 
1Timothy6:5 na okoamererania gotari konucha ase egati y’abanto abasarekire ase ebirengererio biabo, na baurirwe ekeene. Baria bagokaga ng’a okoba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae nenchera y’okonyora." 
1Timothy6:6 Ekeene, okoba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae amo nogoisaneka nokonyora okonene," 
1Timothy6:7 inaki titwachete na gento ase ense, naende titokoira gento korwa ase ense." 
1Timothy6:8 Gaki, onye tore nendagera ne chianga, inatoisaneke nebinto ebio." 
1Timothy6:9 Korende abwo barigetie koba abanda nigo bakogwa ase ogoteemwa na omoeto, na okogania okonge gotari nengencho, kore okw’ogosaria, okwo gokorimeria mwanyabanto bachie gosira na gosareka." 
1Timothy6:10 Naki omochakano bw’amabe onsi nogwancha chibesa. Abande kobakogania ayio, nigo bakweatanana korwa ase okwegena, na kwebeka abanyene ase obororo obonge." 
1Timothy6:11 Korende aye, omonto o Nyasae, tama ayio onsi, rigia oboronge, ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, na okwegena, na obwanchani, na oboremereria na obwororo." 
1Timothy6:12 Rwana esegi ere engiya y’okwegena, bwata obogima bwa kare na kare, obo kwarangereretigwe konyora, na kwaorogetie ase okoorokia okuya ase obosio bw’abarori abange." 
1Timothy6:13 Nagochikire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, oyokoa ebinto bionsi obogima, na ase Kristo Yeso, oyoruete oborori obuya ase Pontio Pilato," 
1Timothy6:14 ng’a obwate ogochika oko, obe otari na kemoa, gose na komocha, goika Omonene oito Yeso Kristo aorokigwe." 
1Timothy6:15 Oyosesenirie, oyore nokobua ere bweka, Omoruoti bw’abaruoti, Omonene bw’abanene, orache gotwo rokia okoorokigwa okwo ase ekero kiaye." 
1Timothy6:16 Nere bweka otari konyorekana namakweri, nigo amenyete ase omobaso otanyare goikwa ang’e, na onde tari ase mwanyabanto omoroche gose oranyare komorora. Asare ere ogosika na okobua kare na kare. Amina." 
1Timothy6:17 Obachike abwo bare abanda ase ense eye ya bono tibaenena, gose gosemeria obonda boria bogosira, korende bamosemerie Nyasae, oyogotoa ebinto bionsi ase obonge, tobikorere ase omogoko." 
1Timothy6:18 Obachike naende bakore amaya, babe abanda ase ogokora okuya, babe ang’e korua chinibo chiabo, na gwatanera abande ase emioyo emiya," 
1Timothy6:19 begacheire abanyene oboroso obuya ase ekero kegochigocha erinde babwate obogima obore obogima bw’ekeene. 
1Timothy6:20 Aye Timotheo, renda aya abekirwe asore. Bweatanane korwa ase amang’ana atari ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, na korwa ase okoamererania ase aya akorokwa chisemi, korende nay’oborimo." 
1Timothy6:21 Naki abande babwatirie ayio, na basirire korwa ase okwegena. Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi." 
2Timothy1:1 Inche Paulo, omotomwa o Kristo Yeso ase ogwancha kwa Nyasae, ase engencho y’eira y’obogima bore ase Kristo Yeso," 
2Timothy1:2 ngokorikera nde aye Timotheo, omwana one omwanchwa: Obuya na amabera, na omorembe, bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata, na ase Kristo Yeso, Omonene oito." 
2Timothy1:3 Igo nkomoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono, oyo ngokorera nenkoro etari kongambia, buna chisokoro chiane chiare gokora, nigo ngokoinyora botambe ase ogosaba kwane obotuko na omobaso." 
2Timothy1:4 Ekero nkoinyora amariga ao nigo nkoba namaiga gokorora, erinde ing’ichorwe nomogoko." 
2Timothy1:5 Ning’inyorete okwegena ore nakorokwo, ogotari nobong’ainereria, okwo kwarenge ritang’ani ase nyagokoro Lois na ase nyoko Yunuke, na inche ninde nobomaene ng’a naye nokobwate boigo." 
2Timothy1:6 Ase engencho eyio ngokoinyoria, oigererie ekeegwa ekiarure ase Nyasae, ekere ime yao, ekio kwaetwe ekero nakobekerete amaboko aane," 
2Timothy1:7 ekiagera Nyasae tatoeti omoika bw’obwoba, korende oyo bwe chinguru na obwanchani, na oyo bw’okwerenga intwe abanyene." 
2Timothy1:8 Gaki, torora obosooku kobera Omonene oito kirori, gose tondorera inche, omosibwa oye, obosooku, korende nonya naye oremererie emechando ase engencho y’enchili, ase okobua kwa Nyasae," 
2Timothy1:9 oyototooretie na agatorangeria ase okorangeria ogochenu, tari ase engencho y’ogokora gwaito korende koreng’ana nokorigia kwaye omonyene, na obuya bwaye. Obuya obo twaetwe ase Kristo Yeso korwa agwo kare" 
2Timothy1:10 bwaorokigwe bono ase okoorokigwa kw’Omotooria oito Kristo Yeso. Ere agasiria chinguru chi’amakweri, na akarenta obogima na ogotasareka goetera ase enchili." 
2Timothy1:11 Naki ase enchili eye nkaragwa koba omoraria, na omotomwa, na omworokia." 
2Timothy1:12 Ase engencho eyio nanyorire emechando eye. Korende tinkorora obosooku, naki nimomanyete ere oyonyegenete, naende ninde nobomaene ng’a goika Rituko riria ere nanyare korenda keria angacherete." 
2Timothy1:13 Bwatia amang’ana ayare ay’obogima, ayakwaigwete korwa asende, abe ekiorokererio ogotunyana ase okwegena na obwanchani bire ase Kristo Yeso." 
2Timothy1:14 Renda keria ekiya kwaetwe, okegache, okerende ase chinguru chi’Omoika Omochenu, oyomenyete ime yaito." 
2Timothy1:15 Kwamanyire ng’a bonsi abare Asia bantigire, na ase abwo mbareo Figelo na Hermogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Omonene abarorere amabera abwo bare ab’enyomba y’Onesiforo, ekiagera ekero ase ekero nigo are gontimokia, gose tare korora obosooku ase engencho y’ebinyuri biane." 
2Timothy1:17 Korende ekero aigete Rumi akandigia nomokia, akaanyora." 
2Timothy1:18 Omonene namwanchere anyore amabera korwa ase Omonene Rituko riria. Aye kwamanyire buya buna are gokora emeremo emenge aaria Efeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Gaki, aye omwana one, obe ne chinguru ase obuya bore ime ase Kristo Yeso." 
2Timothy2:2 Na ayakwaigwete korwa asende ase amasio ’abarori abange oyabeke ase abanto abegenwa, abaranyare kworokereria abande boigo." 
2Timothy2:3 Nonya naye oremererie emechando buna omorwani omuya o Kristo Yeso. 
2Timothy2:4 Morwani onde tari, oyokogenda ase esegi, orebeke ase amang’ana ande onsi ay’ense eye, erinde amogwenere ere oyomorigete." 
2Timothy2:5 Omoamereria bwe chigosori takoegwa egutwa y’obobui ataamereraneti koreng’ana namachiko. 
2Timothy2:6 Omoremi oyobwechandeire emeremo, ere nemogwenerete abe oyo bwe ritang’ani konyora ensemo y’okwama." 
2Timothy2:7 Rengereria mono ayio ngokwana, ekiagera Omonene nakoe okomanya ase amang’ana onsi." 
2Timothy2:8 Moinyore Yeso Kristo, oyobogete korwa ase abakure, oyo bw’ororeria rwa Daudi, koreng’ana nenchili eye nkorandia inche." 
2Timothy2:9 Ase enchili eyio ngachandwa goika ngasibwa ne chingataare buna omokori amabe. Korende ring’ana ria Nyasae tirikobegeka chingataare. 
2Timothy2:10 Ase ayio naremereirie onsi ase engencho y’abachore, erinde nabarabwo banyore ogotooreka kore ase Kristo Yeso amo nobonene bwa kare na kare." 
2Timothy2:11 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene: Onye twakwete amo nere, natobe moyo amo nere boigo." 
2Timothy2:12 Onye tokoremereria, rirorio natogambe amo nere boigo; onye tokomokana, nere natokane boigo;" 
2Timothy2:13 onye titori abegenwa, ere nigo are omwegenwa, ekiagera takonyara gwekana ere omonyene." 
2Timothy2:14 Obainyorie ayio, na kobakurera ase obosio bwa Nyasae, tibaba nokoamererania ase amang’ana, okwo gotanyare gokonya kende, korende nigo gokobasiria abagokoigwa." 
2Timothy2:15 Kora buna oranyare kweorokia ase obosio bwa Nyasae buna oyobwancheirwe nere, buna omokori emeremo oyotagwenereti gosookigwa, ogwatanana boronge ring’ana ri’ekeene." 
2Timothy2:16 Bweatanane korwa ase amang’ana atari ay’obonyasae, na atari nengencho. Naki ase ayio abanto nigo baragenderere komenteka ase chingencho chitari chi’obonyasae." 
2Timothy2:17 Amang’ana abo nigo akoria buna rikwege ri’esiria. Ase abwo mbareo Himenayo na Fileto. 
2Timothy2:18 Abwo basirerigwe korwa ase ekeene, bagoteba ng’a okobokigwa gwaikire kobao, na igo bakoonchorana okwegena kw’abanto bande."
