2Timothy2:19 Korende oboroso obo Nyasae abegete bore ne chinguru, boteneine boronge, bore nekemanyererio eke: “Omonene namanyete abare abaye”, naende, “Kera oyogwatora erieta ri’Omonene, tiga eatanane korwa ase obobe.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Ase enyomba enene tibirio ebinto bie chitahabu na ebie chifeta bioka, korende mbireo ebinto bi’emete na ebi’amaroba boigo; ebinde nebi’ogosika, na ebinde tibiri ebi’ogosika." 
2Timothy2:21 Ase ayio, onye omonto origetie gwesibia ere omonyene ase ogweatanana korwa ase ebinto buna ebio, nabe egento ki’ogosika, giancheirwe, keragwenere Omonene, kiaroisigwe ase kera emeremo emiya." 
2Timothy2:22 Tama okogania okobe kw’obosae, rigia oboronge, na okwegena, na obwanchani, na omorembe, amo nabwo bakomorangeria Omonene ase chinkoro chindabu." 
2Timothy2:23 Korende bwange amaborio ’oboriri atari aye chisemi. Kwamanyire ng’a ayio nigo ararente eriomana. 
2Timothy2:24 Naende tegwenereti omosomba bw’Omonene koba omonyariomana, korende abe omwororo ase abanto bonsi, abe oyomanyete kworokereria buya, na abe omoremereria," 
2Timothy2:25 oyorabatebererie ase obwororo abwo bakoamererania nere. Aande Nyasae nabaonchore, erinde bamanye ekeene gionsi," 
2Timothy2:26 erio banyare gotaboboka na korua ase omoeto o Saitani kobasakoirwe nere goika bakore ogwancha kwaye. 
2Timothy3:1 Gaki, manya ring’ana eri, ng’a ase amatuko ’omoerio inachibe chingaki chi’obokong’u." 
2Timothy3:2 Naki abanto inababe bakweancha barabwo abanyene, abanchete chibesa, abetogia, abaenenu, abarami, abatari koigwera abaibori babo, abatari koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, abatari abachenu," 
2Timothy3:3 abatancheti abanto bande, abatarigeti kobwatana, abang’achi, abatari gwetanga ase rinde rionsi, abatindi, abagechete ayare amaya," 
2Timothy3:4 abarua abande, abatancheti gokanigwa, abamwenu, abanchete kwegokia kobua komwancha Nyasae," 
2Timothy3:5 abakororekana ng’a mbare ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, korende bakaana okobua gwe chingencho echio. Bweatanane korwa ase abwo." 
2Timothy3:6 Naki ase egati yabo mbareo abagwesoyia ase chinyomba chi’abanto gosakora abakungu aboro, abare ne chigurube chi’ebibe, na koraagwa nokogania okobe gwe chingencho ao ao." 
2Timothy3:7 Abwo nigo bakweorokereria botambe, korende tibakonyara goikera chisemi chi’ekeene." 
2Timothy3:8 Naboigo buna Yane na Yambare baengereranetie na Musa, na aba nabo bakoengererania nekeene. Ebirengererio biabo biasarekire, na okwegena kwabo kwangirwe," 
2Timothy3:9 korende tibakogenderera mono, ekiagera oboriri bwabo naboorokigwe maiso marore ase abanto bonsi, buna yabete ase baria babere." 
2Timothy3:10 Korende aye kwabwatire okworokereria kwane, na orogendo rwane, na okorigia kwane ase obogima obo, na okwegena kwane, na oboremereria bwane, na obwanchani bwane, na okoganya kwane," 
2Timothy3:11 na ogochandwa kwane, na ogochandeka kwane, okwo nanyorete ase Antiokia na Ikonio, na Listra. Nogochandwa kore naki naremereretie! Na korwa ase ayio onsi Omonene agantooria." 
2Timothy3:12 Ekeene, aba bonsi baganetie koba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae ase Kristo Yeso nabachandwe." 
2Timothy3:13 Korende abanto ababe na abang’ainereria mbamentekane kobua ase obobe, bakong’aina na kong’aineka." 
2Timothy3:14 Korende aye, ogenderere ase ayakworokereretigwe na koyaenekia, gokomanya ng’a nkorwa ase ng’o kweorokereretie." 
2Timothy3:15 Naki korwa obwana bwao nomanyete amariko amachenu, ayaranyare gokong’ainiyia goika onyore ogotooreka ase okwegena kore ase Kristo Yeso." 
2Timothy3:16 Kera ririko riutire nomoika o Nyasae, nario riranyare gotworokereria, na gotokurera, na gotorongeyia, na gototang’ana ase oboronge," 
2Timothy3:17 erinde omonto o Nyasae abe oikeranigwe, oisanerigwe, anyare gokora kera ogokora okuya." 
2Timothy4:1 Nagochikire ase obosio bwa Nyasae, na obwa Kristo Yeso, oyorache kogambia abare moyo na abakure, na ase okooroka kwaye, na oboruoti bwaye." 
2Timothy4:2 Randia Ring’ana ria Nyasae, kora omokia ase engaki ekogwenerete, na ase eyetakogwenereti, kurera na togonyera, na gosorora ase oboremereria bwonsi, na ase okworokereria." 
2Timothy4:3 Na engaki neche, ekero abanto baraange okworokereria kw’obogima, na ase okogania kwabo okobe benyorere aborokia abange mono, ekiagera amato abo are nebiagaso." 
2Timothy4:4 Barabwo mbeatanane korwa ase okoigwa ayare ay’ekeene, na koonchokera emegano ao ao." 
2Timothy4:5 Korende aye, bwerite ase amang’ana onsi, oremererie emechando, kora emeremo y’oborandia, ikerania ogokora kw’obosomba bwao." 
2Timothy4:6 Naki inche bono naikire koumorwa buna okoruegwa gw’ekenyugwa na engaki yane y’ogokwa yaikire. 
2Timothy4:7 Narwanire esegi ere engiya, nakoorire orogendo, narendire okwegena." 
2Timothy4:8 Nyuma ase aya nagacheirwe egutwa y’oboronge, eye Omonene, omogambi bw’oboronge, arang’e ase Rituko riria gose tari inche bweka arae, korende nabanto bonsi abanchete okoorokigwa kwaye." 
2Timothy4:9 Teema buna oranyare gocha asende bwango. 
2Timothy4:10 Naki Dema ontigire, na gwancha ense eye ya bono; ochiire Tesaloniki. Keresike ochiire Galatia na Tito Dalamatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka bweka ore aiga amo nainche. Orentane Mariko, moche komo, ekiagera ere nigo aranyare gonkonya mono." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko namotomire Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ekero orache ondentanerie egetambaa gi’okwambara, eke natigerete Karipo aria Teroa. Naboigo kogocha ondentanerie chibuku, na kobua mono chiria chi’amasankwa." 
2Timothy4:14 Aleksanderi, omoturi bwe chitaai, agankorera amabe amange. Omonene namoakane koreng’ana nogokora kwaye." 
2Timothy4:15 Aye bwerende korwa asare, ekiagera nigo aengereretie okworokereria gwaito." 
2Timothy4:16 Ase ogwekengera kwane kwe ritang’ani onde tarenge otenenete amo nainche, korende bonsi bagantiga. Nasabire ng’a tibabarerwa ebibe ase ring’ana erio." 
2Timothy4:17 Korende Omonene agatenena amo nainche, akambeka chinguru, erinde goetera asende okoraria kwe ring’ana goikeranigwe goika abanto bonsi b’Ebisaku bakoigwe. Na inche nigo natooretigwe korwa ase omonwa bw’endo." 
2Timothy4:18 Omonene nansibore korwa ase amabe onsi, na antoorie goika nsoe ase oboruoti bwa igoro. Ogotogigwa nokwaye kare na kare. Amina." 
2Timothy4:19 Nkwanerie Priska na Akwila, na abanto b’enyomba y’Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto nigo atigarete Korinto, korende Torofimo nkamotiga Mileto orwarete." 
2Timothy4:21 Teema buna oranyare gocha ritang’ani obokendu botaracha. Eubulu ogokwanirie, naboigo Pudente na Lino, na Klaudia, na abaminto bonsi." 
2Timothy4:22 Omonene abe amo nomoyo oo. Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi. 
Titus1:1 Inche Paulo nomosomba o Nyasae, na omotomwa o Yeso Kristo ase engencho y’okwegena kw’abachore ba Nyasae, erinde bamanye onsi ayare ay’ekeene, ayakorenta chingencho chi’obonyasae," 
Titus1:2 ase ogosemeria kw’obogima bwa kare na kare. Obogima obo Nyasae ariete eira korwa kare na kare; ere tagokwana oborimo. 
Titus1:3 Na ekero engaki yaye yaigete akabomaanora ase ring’ana riaye, eri inche negenirwe korandia ase ogochika kwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito." 
Titus1:4 Ngokorikera nde aye Tito, omwana one bori ase okwegena tosangete naye: Obuya na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata, na ase Kristo Yeso, Omotooria oito." 
Titus1:5 Ase engencho eye nkagotiga Kirete, erinde oroisie ayaremeteo. Ochore abagaaka ase kera omochie, buna nagochigete." 
Titus1:6 Omonto orachorwe onye okonyorekana ng’a tari ne chingencho chimbe, onye ore nomokungu oyomo, na ore nabana begenete, batari gosoerwa ng’a nabanyaka bare, gose abatari koigwera." 
Titus1:7 Naki omotang’ani bw’ekanisa nemogwenerete abe omonto otari ne chingencho chimbe, ekiagera ere nomoteneneri bw’ebire ebia Nyasae. Ere taba omonto okwegwenera ere omonyene, gose omwango bw’okobea, gose oyonarete edivai, gose omonto bwanchete goaka abanto, gose gwancha okonyora kw’oborianania," 
Titus1:8 korende abe omoroisia abageni, omwanchi amaya, oyobwerendete ase onsi, omoronge, omochenu, na oyomanyete kwerita ase onsi." 
Titus1:9 Ere nigo emogwenerete abwate ring’ana ri’ekeene buna riorokereretigwe, erinde anyare koremia abanto ase okworokereria kw’obogima, na koebereria abakoengererania nere." 
Titus1:10 Naki mbare abange batari koigwera, abagokwana amang’ana atari nengencho, abang’ainereria, mono baria b’okwaroka." 
Titus1:11 Abwo mbagwenerete bakirigwe, ekiagera nkoonchorana bare abanto be chinyomba chingima ase okworokereria ayatagwenereti, na igo bakorigia okonyora kw’oborianania." 
Titus1:12 Omonto oyomo obo, omobani obo abanyene, otebire, “Abanto ba Kirete nabanyaborimo botambe, ne ching’iti chintindi chi’orosana, abaribobe aboro.”" 
Titus1:13 Oborori obo nobw’ekeene. Ase ayio, obatogonyere bokong’u, erinde babe abagima ase okwegena" 
Titus1:14 ribaga ri’ogotegerera emegano y’Abayahudi, gose amachiko ’abanto aba bakoonchorana ekeene." 
Titus1:15 Ebinto bionsi nebichenu ase abwo bare abachenu, korende tikeri ekere egechenu ase abwo batachenegeti na abategeneti, ekiagera ebirengererio biabo na okomanya gwe chinkoro chiabo ime biabeire ebitachenegeti." 
Titus1:16 Igo bagoteba ng’a mbamomanyete Nyasae, korende ase ogokora kwabo bamokana. Nigo bare abagechigwa, abatari koigwera, na ase ayio tibakonyara gokora ogokora okuya konde gwonsi." 
Titus2:1 Korende aye, kwana amang’ana ayagwenerete okworokereria kw’obogima." 
Titus2:2 Abagaaka mbagwenerete babe aberiti, abare nogosika, aberendete ase onsi, babe abagima ase okwegena, na ase obwanchani, na ase oboremereria." 
Titus2:3 Naboigo nabakungu abagotu babe norogendo rw’obochenu, tibaba abang’achi, gose abasomba ase okonywa edivai enyinge, korende babe aborokia b’ayare amaya," 
Titus2:4 erinde borokererie abakungu abasubati banche abasacha babo, na abana babo." 
Titus2:5 Naende babe aberendete ase onsi, abachenu, abagokora emeremo ase chinka chiabo, abaya, abaigwerete abasacha babo abanyene, erinde ring’ana ria Nyasae tiriramwa." 
Titus2:6 Naboigo nabamura, obasorore babe aberendete ase onsi." 
Titus2:7 Ase amang’ana onsi bweorokie aye omonyene koba ekiorokererio ki’ogokora okuya, na ase okworokereria kwao obe oyotagosaria, korende oyosikire." 
Titus2:8 Ogokwana kwao kobe okw’obogima, okwo gotanyare gosoerwa, erinde omoengereria onde bwensi asooke, taba ne ring’ana riibe agokwana igoro yaito." 
Titus2:9 Abasomba baigwere abanene babo ase amang’ana onsi, babagwenere, na tibaba abakobairaneria bobe," 
Titus2:10 tibaba abaganga, korende baorokie obwegenwa obuya ase onsi, erinde ase amang’ana onsi ogokora kwabo kobe ekiorokererio ekiya gi’okworokereria kwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito." 
Titus2:11 Naki obuya bwa Nyasae bwaorokigwe nogotooreka ase abanto bonsi. 
Titus2:12 Obo nigo bogotworokereria okwanga amang’ana atari ay’obonyasae, na okogania okobe gw’ense eye, erinde tonyare kwerenda ase onsi, na koba noboronge amo ne chingencho chi’obonyasae ase ense eye ya bono," 
Titus2:13 gatoganyete ogoikeranigwa kw’ogosemeria gosesenirie, na okooroka kw’obonene bwa Nyasae omonene, na Omotooria oito Kristo Yeso," 
Titus2:14 oyobweruete omonyene ase engencho yaito, erinde atoboorie korwa ase ogosaria gwonsi, na gwesiberia ere omonyene abanto babe abaye, bare nomokia ase ogokora okuya." 
Titus2:15 Kwana amang’ana aya, kurera, na gotogonyera nokobua gwonsi. Monto onde bwensi tagochaya." 
Titus3:1 Oinyorie abanto bekeyie ase abagambi, na ase abare nokobua, naende babe abaigweri, bebeke ang’e gokora kera ogokora okuya." 
Titus3:2 Obatebie tibakwana bobe igoro ya monto onde bwensi, tibaba abanyariomana, korende babe abaremereria, bakoorokia obwororo ase abanto bonsi." 
Titus3:3 Naki agwo ritang’ani intwe nigo twarenge abasomba b’okogania okobe gwe chingencho ao ao ase okwegokia. Twarenge kogenderera ase obobe na emoko, tware kogechigwa na kogechana." 
Titus3:4 Korende ekero obuya bwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito, na obwanchani bwaye ase mwanyabanto bwaorogetigwe" 
Titus3:5 agatotooria, tari ase ogokora kw’oboronge twakorete intwe, korende ase amabera aye ase ogosibigwa goetera ase okoiborwa gwa kabere. Nabo agatokora abayia n’Omoika Omochenu," 
Titus3:6 oyo atoitererete ase obonge goetera ase Yeso Kristo, Omotooria oito," 
Titus3:7 erinde gatwanyorire oboronge ase amabera aye, tonyare koba abanyamwando b’obogima bwa kare na kare, obo tosemeretie." 
Titus3:8 Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene. Igoro y’amang’ana ayio nindigetie oyakwane ne chinguru, erinde abwo bamwegenete Nyasae banyare kwerua ase ogokora okuya. Amang’ana aya namaya, naende nanyare gokonya abanto." 
Titus3:9 Korende aye, bweatanane korwa ase amaborio ’oboriri, ne chinderia chie chisokoro, na eriomana, na okoamererania igoro y’amachiko, ekiagera tibigokonya kende, naende tibiri nengencho." 
Titus3:10 Omonto orarente okweatanana, ekero kwamokanirie erie ritang’ani, naende eria kabere, omwange." 
Titus3:11 Manya ng’a omonto onga buna oyio bweatananire, naende nomokori ebibe, na ere omonyene bwegambirie." 
Titus3:12 Kondatome Artema gose Tukiko gocha asore, teema buna oranyare gocha asende aria Nikopoli bwango, naki nindengereretie komenya aroro ekero ki’obokendu." 
Titus3:13 Kora omokia gokonya Zena, omomanyi bw’amachiko, na Apolo, ekero okobatoma ase orogendo rwabo, na origererie buya ng’a tibaremerwa kende gionsi." 
Titus3:14 Na abanto baito tiga beorokererie kwerua ase ogokora okuya, na gokonya aase oboremerwa bore, erinde tibaba batari nokwama." 
Titus3:15 Aba bonsi bare amo nainche bagokwanirie. Tokwanerie baria batwanchete ase okwegena. Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi. 
Philemon1:1 Inche Paulo, omosibwa o Kristo Yeso, amo noyominto Timotheo, ngokorikera tore aye Filemoni, omwanchwa oito, omokori emeremo amo naintwe." 
Philemon1:2 Nkobarikera tore boigo Apia, mosubati ominto, na Arikipo, omorwani ore amo naintwe, na abanto b’ekanisa ere ase enyomba yao." 
Philemon1:3 Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa ase Nyasae Tata oito, na ase Omonene Yeso Kristo." 
Philemon1:4 Botambe nigo ngoakera Nyasae one ng’a mbuya mono ekero ngokoinyora ase ogosaba kwane," 
Philemon1:5 ekiagera nkoigwa nde amang’ana igoro y’obwanchani bwao, na okwegena kwao obwate ase Omonene Yeso, na buna okobiorokia ase abachenu bonsi." 
Philemon1:6 Nasabire ng’a okobwatana gw’okwegena ore nakorokwo gokore emeremo, erinde omanye mono kobua kera egento ekiya kere asetore ime ase Kristo." 
Philemon1:7 Naki oyominto, nigo nabete nomogoko omonge na okoremigwa ase engencho y’obwanchani bwao, ekiagera chinkoro chi’abachenu chiatimogetigwe naye." 
Philemon1:8 Ase ayio, ninde noboremu obonge ase Kristo kogochika eri ogwenerete okore." 
Philemon1:9 Korende ase engencho y’obwanchani nanchire kobua kogosorora, buna inche Paulo inde omogaaka bono, naende inde omosibwa o Kristo Yeso." 
Philemon1:10 Nagosoroire ase engencho y’omwana one, oyo naiborete ekero nare ase ebisibo biane, nere Onesimo." 
Philemon1:11 (Ere agwo kare tarenge kogokonya kende, korende bono nigo aranyare gotokonya mono, aye nainche.)" 
Philemon1:12 Ere namotomire gocha asore, na nigo enga buna ninche omonyene netoma." 
Philemon1:13 Naki inche nigo ndigetie abeere aiga amo nainche, erinde anyare gonkorera ribaga riao, ekero nsibire ase engencho y’enchili." 
Philemon1:14 Korende tinarigetie gokora ing’ana rinde rionsi otatiga gwanchire aye, erinde obuya bwao tiboba obw’okobetererigwa, korende ase ogwancha kwao aye omonyene." 
Philemon1:15 Aande nakio kiagerete agaatananwa korwa asore ase ekero egeke, erinde obe nere kare na kare," 
Philemon1:16 korwa bono tari buna omosomba, korende goetania omosomba, buna oyominto omwanchwa, asende inche mono, na asore mono kobua, buna mwanyabanto, naende buna oyo bw’Omonene." 
Philemon1:17 Gaki, onye kondengereretie inche buna omobwatani oo, omoroisie koreng’ana buna kware kondoisia inche." 
Philemon1:18 Onye okomocheire kende, gose okoriete esira, oyeborie korwa asende." 
Philemon1:19 Inche Paulo narikire aya nokoboko kwane omonyene, ning’akane. Amaene, ninyare kogotebia, ng’a nore nesira asende, engencho yaye aye bweka omonyene." 
Philemon1:20 Ee, oyominto, ninganetie obokonyi bokorwa asore, ekiagera noyo bw’Omonene ore. Ontimokie enkoro yane ase Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Igo nakorikeire aya, ekiagera inde nobomaene ng’a nomoigweri ore, naende imanyete ng’a nokore goetania ayio nagotebirie." 
Philemon1:22 Amo nayio, ondoiserie aase ngocha komenya, naki nsemeretie ng’a goetera ase ogosaba kwaino nimbe nainwe." 
Philemon1:23 Epafara, oyosibetwe amo nainche ase engencho ya Kristo Yeso, ogokwanirie." 
Philemon1:24 Mariko na Aristariko, na Dema, na Luka, abakori emeremo amo nainche, bagokwanirie boigo." 
Philemon1:25 Obuya bw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo bobe amo nemioyo yaino. 
Hebrews1:1 Ase ebiro ebinge ne chinchera chinyinge Nyasae agwo kare nigo arenge gokwana ne chisokoro chiaito goetera ase ababani," 
Hebrews1:2 korende ase amatuko aya ay’omoerio okwanire naintwe goetera ase Omwana oye. Ere oyo Nyasae aragete koba omonyamwando bw’ebinto bionsi, na goetera asare agatonga ense." 
Hebrews1:3 Ere nigo agotobareria obonene bwa Nyasae, na buna Nyasae are, nere naboigo are, naende nigo akobogoria ebinto bionsi ne ring’ana riaye ri’okobua. Gaikire gokora ogosibigwa kw’ebibe, agaikaransa ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kw’Obonene igoro." 
Hebrews1:4 Agakoreka koba omonene kobua abamalaika, buna erieta eri anyorete ri’omwando rire rinene kobua ayabo." 
Hebrews1:5 Inee! Momalaika ki otebetigwe na Nyasae kero kende gionsi, “Aye, naye Omwana one, rero nakoiboire”? Gose naende, “Inche nimbe asare ise, nere asende nabe omwana one”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Naende ekero arentete omoiborwa oye bwe ritang’ani ase ense nigo atebete, “Abamalaika bonsi ba Nyasae bamosasime.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Igoro y’abamalaika nigo agoteba, “Ere ogokora abamalaika baye koba chimbeo, na abasomba baye koba ebibemberi b’omorero.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Korende igoro y’Omwana nigo agoteba, “Nyasae, ekerogo kiao ki’obogambi nkegenderere kobao kare na kare, na enyimbo y’okobua y’oboruoti bwao nigo ere ey’oboronge." 
Hebrews1:9 Nigo bwanchete oboronge, na kogechete ogosaria; ase ayio, Nyasae, oyore Nyasae oo, ogoakire amaguta, korenteire omogoko kobua oyo bw’abande bamino.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Naende, “Naye Omonene, kwabegete oboroso bw’ense korwa omochakano, na igoro chionsi nemeremo y’amaboko ao." 
Hebrews1:11 Ebio inabisire, korende aye nigo oragenderere kobao, birobio inabigote buna eanga," 
Hebrews1:12 nobiringe buna egetambaa gi’okwambara, na birobio nabionchoke buna eanga. Korende aye naye oria oria ore buna kwarenge, na emiaka yao tekoba nomoerio.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Inee! Momalaika ki otebetigwe nere kero kende gionsi, “Ikaransa ensemo y’okoboko kwane gw’okorio, goika mbabeke ababisa bao babe inse y’amagoro ao”?" 
Hebrews1:14 Inee! Abamalaika bonsi tibari emeika y’ogokorera, batomire gokorera baria barache konyora omwando bw’ogotooreka?" 
Hebrews2:1 Ase ayio, netogwenerete gotegerera mono kobua na kobwata ayatwaigure, titocha gosira." 
Hebrews2:2 Naki onye ring’ana riria riakwanetwe nabamalaika nigo riarenge riteneine bokong’u, na kera okomocha na ogotaigwera mbianyorete ogoakanwa kwa boronge," 
Hebrews2:3 Inee, naki intwe toranyare gwetooria onye twangire ogotooreka okonene buna oko? Ritang’ani Omonene nararetie ogotooreka oko, naende baria bamoigwete batobereire kirori." 
Hebrews2:4 Naende Nyasae akamenta oborori bwaye nebimanyererio, na amakumia, na ebikone bie chinguru ao ao amo na kogabera abanto ebiegwa bi’Omoika Omochenu koreng’ana nogwancha kwaye." 
Hebrews2:5 Naki tari inse y’abamalaika Nyasae abegete ense eria egochi‐gocha, eyio togokwana." 
Hebrews2:6 Korende aase gete omonto oyomo naorogetie oborori, agateba, “Omonto inki aisaine aye ogendererete komorengereria? Mwanyabanto inki aisaine aye okomorenda?" 
Hebrews2:7 Kwamokorire omoke kobua abamalaika ase ekero egeke, kwamobekeire egutwa y’obonene na amasikani. [Kwamobekire igoro ase emeremo y’amaboko ao.]" 
Hebrews2:8 Kwabekire ebinto bionsi inse y’amagoro aye.” Naki ase okobeka ebinto bionsi inse yaye tatigete gento kende atabegete inse yaye. Korende goika bono titorarora ebinto bionsi bibekire inse yaye. 
Hebrews2:9 Korende twarorire ere, oyokorirwe koba omoke kobua abamalaika ase ekero egeke, nere Yeso, obekeirwe egutwa y’obonene na amasikani ase engencho y’ogochandwa kwaye kw’amakweri, erio ase obuya bwa Nyasae aigwe amakweri ribaga ria kera omonto." 
Hebrews2:10 Naki ase engencho ya Nyasae, na ase okobua kwaye, ebinto bionsi mbireo. Ase ayio yamogwenerete ere goikerania Omochaki bw’ogotooreka gwaito goetera ase emechando, erio aire abana abange ase obonene." 
Hebrews2:11 Naki ere oyogochena amo nabwo bagochenwa nigo bakorwa ase oyomo. Ase ayio, takorora obosooku kobaroka abamwabo," 
Hebrews2:12 akabora, “Nindarie erieta riao ase abaminto, ase egati y’omosangererekano ningotogie ase ogotera.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Naende nigo agoteba, “Nimosemerie.” Naende, “Rora, inche nao inde aiga amo nabana baria naetwe na Nyasae.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ase ayio, ekiagera abana babwataine ase amanyinga ne chinyama, Yeso naboigo abwataine nayio ayio, erio ase enchera y’amakweri asirie ere oyore nokobua igoro y’amakweri, engencho yaye Saitani," 
Hebrews2:15 naende asibore abwo bonsi barenge abasomba ase obogima bwabo bwonsi, ekiagera bairogete amakweri." 
Hebrews2:16 Naki ayio namaene, ere tagwechandera abamalaika, korende nigo agwechandera oroiboro rwa Ibrahimu." 
Hebrews2:17 Ase ayio, yamogwenerete agwekanigwe nabamwabo ase amang’ana onsi, erinde anyare koba Omokuani omonene, Omonyene amabera, na omwegenwa ase ogokorera Nyasae, na koba ekeng’wanso gi’okobwatania ase ebibe bia mwanyabanto." 
Hebrews2:18 Ekiagera ere omonyene achandetwe na goteemwa, nanyare gokonya abwo bagoteemwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Ase ayio, abaminto abachenu, ababwatani b’okorangerigwa gokorwa igoro, morengererie mono Yeso omotomwa na Omokuani Omonene bw’okoorokia gwaito." 
Hebrews3:2 Ere nigo arenge omwegenwa asare ere oyomochorete, buna Musa boigo arenge omwegenwa ase enyomba yonsi ya Nyasae." 
Hebrews3:3 Naki Yeso nigo abarirwe ng’a nemogwenerete abe nobonene mono kobua Musa, buna omoagachi enyomba are nogosikwa kobua enyomba enyene." 
Hebrews3:4 (Kera enyomba nigo ekoagachwa nomonto, korende Nyasae nere omoagachi bw’ebinto bionsi.)" 
Hebrews3:5 Na Musa nigo arenge omwegenwa ase enyomba yonsi ya Nyasae buna omokoreri, erinde abe kirori ase amang’ana arache gokwanwa," 
Hebrews3:6 korende Kristo nigo are omwegenwa buna Omwana igoro ase enyomba ya Nyasae. Intwe nenyomba yaye gatorabwate bokong’u oboremu na ogwetogia kw’ogosemeria goika omoerio. 
Hebrews3:7 Ase ayio, buna Omoika Omochenu ogokwana, “Rero, komoraigwe eriogi riaye," 
Hebrews3:8 timokong’ia chinkoro chiaino, buna ekero keria gi’okogechia, ase rituko riria ri’ogoteemwa agwo ase erooro." 
Hebrews3:9 Agwo chisokoro chiaino nchianteemete ase okondenga, naende nchiaroche ogokora kwane ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene." 
Hebrews3:10 Ase ayio, nkagechigwa nekegori keria, ngateba: Botambe abanto aba nigo basirete ase chinkoro chiabo, ne chinchera chiane tibachimanyeti," 
Hebrews3:11 buna natianire ase endamwamu yane: Tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwane nonya ng’ake.” 
Hebrews3:12 Rigereria baminto, taba onde omo oino oyore nenkoro embe y’ogotegena, abaise kweatanana korwa ase Nyasae ore moyo." 
Hebrews3:13 Korende moremanie inwe ase inwe kera rituko, ekero gekorokwa ekia Rero, erinde ase, more onde takorwa koba omokong’u ase obong’ainereria bw’ebibe." 
Hebrews3:14 Naki twabeire ababwatani na Kristo, gatorabwate bokong’u ogosemeria gwaito kwe ritang’ani goika omoerio." 
Hebrews3:15 Agwo igo egokwanwa, “Rero, komoraigwe eriogi riaye, timokong’ia chinkoro chiaino’ buna ekero keria gi’okogechia.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Naki mbarabi baria bamogechetie ekero baigwete? Tari baria bonsi barwete Misiri, baare koraagwa na Musa?" 
Hebrews3:17 Naende mbarabi abwo are agechetigwe nabarabwo ase engaki y’emiaka emerongo ene? Tari baria bakorete ebibe, abwo emebere yabo yagwete ase erooro?" 
Hebrews3:18 Naende nase barabi atianete ng’a tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwaye? Tari ase baria bangete koigwera? 
Hebrews3:19 Na igo twarorire ng’a tibanyarete gosoa ase engencho y’ogotegena kwabo. 
Hebrews4:1 Gaki, onye eira eria y’ogosoa ase ogotimoka kwaye ereo, tiga toiroke ng’a onde omo oino tabaisa konyorekana ng’a omochire gokonyora." 
Hebrews4:2 Naki ekeene, intwe twaranderigwe amang’ana amaya buna barabwo. Korende ring’ana riria baigwete tiriabakonyete, ekiagera ekero baare koriigwa tiriasang’ananete nabarabwo ase okwegena." 
Hebrews4:3 Naki intwe, abatwegenire, nigo torasoe ase ogotimoka okwo agoteba, “Buna natianire ase endamwamu yane, Tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwane nonya ng’ake”, nonya emeremo yaye yaerete korwa omochakano, ekero oboroso bw’ense bwabegetwe." 
Hebrews4:4 Naki nigo atebete aase gete igoro ye rituko ria gatano na kabere, “Nyasae nigo atimogete rituko ria gatano na kabere, agatiga emeremo yaye yonsi.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Naende aiga nigo agoteba, “Tibagosoa ase ogotimoka kwane nonya ng’ake.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Gaki, ase ayio ring’ana ndireo, ng’a mbare abanto barache gosoa. Abwo baranderetigwe amang’ana amaya ritang’ani bakamocha gosoa ase engencho y’ogotaigwera kwabo." 
Hebrews4:7 Naende obekire rituko gete, neri nario ria Rero. Aya nigo akwanete goetera ase Daudi nyuma y’engaki entambe, buna konya aikire gokwana, “Rero, komoraigwe eriogi riaye, timokong’ia chinkoro chiaino.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Naki onye Yoshua nabaete ogotimoka, anga Nyasae nyuma yaye tare gokwana igoro ye rituko rinde." 
Hebrews4:9 Ase igo, ogotimoka gw’esabato gwatigaire ase abanto ba Nyasae." 
Hebrews4:10 Naki ere oyosoire ase ogotimoka kwa Nyasae, ere omonyene otimokire korwa ase emeremo yaye, buna Nyasae atimogete korwa ase eyaye." 
Hebrews4:11 Gaki, tokore omokia gosoa ase ogotimoka koria, erinde onde tacha kogwa ase ogotaigwera kogwekaine koria koria." 
Hebrews4:12 Naki ring’ana ria Nyasae nigo rire moyo, naende ndire ne chinguru, nigo rire nobwoge kobua omoyio o birende ore nobwoge chinsemo ibere. Nigo rikobeta ime na gwatanana omoyo na omoika, chinengo na emeseto, naende ndinyare komanya ebirengererio na okogania bire ime ase enkoro." 
Hebrews4:13 Naki getongwa kende tikeri getari maiso marore asare, korende ebinto bionsi nigo bire aarabu naende bimaanoire ase amaiso aye, ere oyo torache koa omobaro." 
Hebrews4:14 Gaki, ekiagera tore n’Omokuani Omonene mono, oyosoete igoro, Yeso, Omwana o Nyasae, tobwate mono okoorokia gwaito." 
Hebrews4:15 Naki titori n’Omokuani Omonene oyotanyare gotobogoreria oboreu bwaito, korende oyoteemetwe koreng’ana buna intwe ase amang’ana onsi, atakoreti ebibe." 
Hebrews4:16 Gaki, toike ang’e ase ekerogo ki’obonene aase obuya bore, erinde tonyore amabera na obuya bw’ogotokonya ase engaki y’okoremerwa." 
Hebrews5:1 Naki kera omokuani omonene ore gochorwa korwa ase mwanyabanto nigo are kobekwa ase engencho ya mwanyabanto, kobatenenera ase ogokorera Nyasae, arue ebiegwa na ebing’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe." 
Hebrews5:2 Na ere oranyare kobabogoreria ase obwororo abwo batamanyeti gento na batantanire, ekiagera nere omonyene nigo abuire noboreu." 
Hebrews5:3 Ase engencho eyio yamogwenerete arue ekeng’wanso ase engencho y’ebibe biaye ere omonyene, buna are korua ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abanto." 
Hebrews5:4 Monto onde tari bwenyoreire amasikani ayio ere omonyene, korende abe orangerigwe na Nyasae, buna Haroni arangeretigwe." 
Hebrews5:5 Naboigo na Kristo, ere teimokereretie igoro ere omonyene koba Omokuani Omonene, korende nigo abegetwe nere oyomotebetie, “Aye naye Omwana one, rero nakoiboire.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Naboigo akwanete aase aande, “Aye n’Omokuani o kare na kare, koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Ase amatuko ayio, ekero arenge ase omobere o mwanyabanto, Yeso agasaba na gosorora amo nokorera okonene, na amariga, asere oyorenge nokobua gw’okomotooria korwa ase amakweri, na akaigugwa ekiagera asigete Nyasae." 
Hebrews5:8 Nonya orenge Omwana akeorokereria okoigwera ase emechando eyio yamonyorete," 
Hebrews5:9 na gaikeranigwe akaba engencho y’ogotooreka gwa kare na kare ase abanto bonsi abamoigwerete," 
Hebrews5:10 bwatoirwe na Nyasae ng’a n’Omokuani Omonene, koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki." 
Hebrews5:11 Igoro yaye ntore namang’ana amange tware gokwana korende naakong’u koyorokereria, ekiagera mwabeire aboro ase okoigwa." 
Hebrews5:12 Naki ekeene, inwe anga mwabeire aborokia, ekiagera ebiro ebinge biaetire, korende nebagwenerete oyonde aborokererie amorokererio e ritang’ani ay’amang’ana a Nyasae. Inwe nebagwenerete moegwe amabeere, gose tari endagera enkong’u." 
Hebrews5:13 Naki oyokonyora amabeere oka tamanyeti mono ring’ana ri’oboronge, ekiagera nomwana omoke." 
Hebrews5:14 Korende endagera enkong’u ney’abanto abanene, ekiagera barabwo mbanaretie ebirengererio biabo, na igo mbamanye ogwatanana amaya na amabe." 
Hebrews6:1 Ase ayio, totige okworokereria kwe ritang’ani gwa Kristo, togenderere toikere oboikeranu. Titobeka naende oboroso bw’okoonchoka korwa ase ogokora gotari nobogima, na obw’okomwegena Nyasae," 
Hebrews6:2 na okworokereria gwe chibatiso, na okobekerwa kw’amaboko, na okobokigwa kw’abakure, na okogambigwa gwa kare na kare." 
Hebrews6:3 Natokore ayio, Nyasae karatwanchere." 
Hebrews6:4 Abwo baikire konyora omobaso, na koigwa ekeegwa gekorwa igoro, na babeire ababwatani b’Omoika Omochenu," 
Hebrews6:5 na koigwa obuya bwe ring’ana ria Nyasae amo nogokora gwe chinguru gw’ekero kegochi‐gocha," 
Hebrews6:6 na nyuma y’ayio kobeatananire, tekonyarekana abwo bakorwe abayia naende ase okoonchorwa, ekiagera bamobambire naende Omwana o Nyasae barabwo abanyene, na komosookia maiso marore." 
Hebrews6:7 Naki omogondo oyokonywa embura egotwa engaki ase engaki, na gokinia chinyeni, chigokonya abwo bakoyorema, nigo okonyora ogosesenigwa gokorwa ase Nyasae." 
Hebrews6:8 Korende korakinie amagwa na amageri, nigo oraangwe na koba ang’e nokorangererigwa, na omoerio oye nogosambwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Korende abanchani, nonya togokwana ayio, ntore nobomaene igoro yaino, ng’a mwanyorire amang’ana amaya kobua, ayakorenta ogotooreka." 
Hebrews6:10 Naki Nyasae tari buna oyotari omoronge, goika eebe emeremo yaino, na obwachani boria mwaorogetie ase engencho y’erieta riaye ekero mwakorerete abachenu, na nonya mbono nkobakorera more." 
Hebrews6:11 Na intwe ntoganetie mono kera oyomo oino aorokie omokia oria goika omoerio, na igo amanye obomaene oboikeranu bw’ogosemeria kwaino." 
Hebrews6:12 Timoba aboro, korende mobe abegi b’abaraire ayabarieretwe chiira, buna omwando, goetera ase okwegena na oboremereria." 
Hebrews6:13 Naki ekero Nyasae arierete Ibrahimu eira agatiana; na ekiagera atarenge nonde omonene komobua asare ere aranyare gotiana, agetiania ere omonyene," 
Hebrews6:14 agateba, “Ekeene, ogosesenia ningosesenie, na okomenta ninkomentekie.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Naboigo ase okoremereria Ibrahimu akanyora ayarieretwe eira. 
Hebrews6:16 Naki abanto nigo bagotiana ase oyore omonene kobabua, na omoerio bw’okoamererania nemuma egokoora." 
Hebrews6:17 Ase ayio, ekero Nyasae arigetie koborokia mono kegima abaraire omwando oria abarierete eira buna atanyare koonchora ayaroberetie, akabeka emuma gati." 
Hebrews6:18 Ase igo, ase ebinto bibere bitanyare koonchorwa, ime ase ebio Nyasae takonyara gokwana oborimo, intwe, abatwatameire obotamero, tonyore okoremigwa ogokong’u kobwata ogosemeria koria kwabekirwe bosio bwaito." 
Hebrews6:19 Ogosemeria okwo tore nakorokwo buna ekerochi ki’omoyo, okore ne chinguru, na gotari koonchoka, kogosoa aase are ime moino y’etoto." 
Hebrews6:20 Aase aria Yeso asoete buna omotang’ani oito, na ase engencho yaito, ekero abeire Omokuani Omonene o kare na kare, koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Naki Melkizedeki oyio nigo arenge omoruoti o Salemu, omokuani o Nyasae Ore Igoro Mono. Ekero Ibrahimu are koirana korwa ase ogoita abaruoti, Melkizedeki akaumerana nere, akamosesenia." 
Hebrews7:2 Na Ibrahimu akamwatanera ensemo ya ikomi y’ebinto bionsi. Ritang’ani engencho y’erieta ria Melkizedeki nigo ere iga: “Omoruoti bw’Oboronge”, naende nigo are omoruoti o Salemu, engencho yaye: “Omoruoti bw’Omorembe”." 
Hebrews7:3 Ere tarenge na ise, gose na ng’ina, gose ne chisokoro chiaye; tarenge nomochakano bw’amatuko aye, gose nomoerio bw’obogima bwaye, korende ogwekanigwe n’Omwana o Nyasae. Igo agendererete koba omokuani o kare na kare." 
Hebrews7:4 Gaki, rigereria buna omonto oyo arenge omonene! Ibrahimu, omogaaka oito o kare, akamoa ensemo ya ikomi y’ebinto asakorete." 
Hebrews7:5 Na ase abana b’ororeria rwa Lawi, baria baare konyora obokuani, mbaare nogochika korwa ase amachiko koira ensemo ya ikomi korwa ase abanto bamwabo, nonya barabwo barenge ab’ororeria rwa Ibrahimu." 
Hebrews7:6 Korende Melkizedeki, nonya tarenge bw’ororeria rwabo, akaira ensemo ya ikomi korwa ase Ibrahimu, na akamosesenia ere oyorenge ne chiira." 
Hebrews7:7 Okoamererania tikoiyo nonya ng’ake ng’a oria omoke osesenigwa noria omonene. 
Hebrews7:8 Na ase ororeria rwa Lawi mwanyabanto, abakonyorekana namakweri, nkonyora bare ensemo ya ikomi, korende aiga ere oyogwatorwa ng’a moyo are nkoyenyora are." 
Hebrews7:9 Igo nenyare gotebwa, ng’a goetera ase Ibrahimu nonya Lawi, oyore konyora ensemo ya ikomi, nere naruete ensemo ya ikomi," 
Hebrews7:10 ekiagera arenge ase ekebono gia sokororia yaye, ekero Melkizedeki aumeranete na Ibrahimu." 
Hebrews7:11 Gaki, onye oboikeranu bware konyorekana ase obokuani bwa Lawi, naki ase obwo abanto banyorete amachiko, inki kiagerete omokuani onde abekwe, oyore koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki, na tatoretwe koreng’ana buna Haroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Naki obokuani koboraonchorwe, goika okoonchorwa kw’amachiko boigo kobeo." 
Hebrews7:13 Naki omonene oito, amang’ana aya akwanetwe igoro yaye, nigo arenge bw’ororeria ronde oroao, na onde tarenge korwa ase ororeria orwo ore gokorera ase egesasimero." 
Hebrews7:14 Naki igo are maiso marore ng’a ere nigo arwete ase ororeria rwa Yuda. Na ekero Musa akwanete igoro y’ororeria orwo takwanete ing’ana rinde igoro y’abakuani. 
Hebrews7:15 Kerabe omokuani onde oorokire oyore koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki amang’ana ayio nigo are maiso marore mono kobua. 
Hebrews7:16 Ere igo obeire omokuani, tari ase ogochika kw’omoroberio bw’ogotunyana ororeria, korende nase chinguru chi’obogima botari nomoerio." 
Hebrews7:17 Naki obereirwe kirori ng’a. “Aye n’Omokuani o kare na kare, koreng’ana buna Melkizedeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Naki chinguru chi’ogochika koria kwe ritang’ani nigo chiasiretigwe ase engencho y’oboreu bwaye na ogotaisanera kwaye. 
Hebrews7:19 Naki rinde tiriri riaikeranetigwe namachiko. Ribaga ri’ayio ogosemeria okore okuya mono kobua gokarentwa, na ase okwo twamoikire Nyasae ang’e." 
Hebrews7:20 Kobua mono obokuani obo tibwarenge gokoreka botari nemuma. 
Hebrews7:21 Naki abwo baare kobekwa ase obokuani tibare kobekwa amo nemuma, korende Yeso akabonyora amo nemuma goetera asare oyo omotebetie, “Omonene otianire, gose takoonchora ebirengererio biaye, Aye n’Omokuani o kare na kare.”" 
Hebrews7:22 Gaki, ase ekerengo eke Yeso obeire oyo bw’obomaene bw’okobwatana kore okuya kobua." 
Hebrews7:23 Baria barenge abakuani be ritang’ani barenge abange, ekiagera batangetwe namakweri, tibagendererete," 
Hebrews7:24 korende ere, ekiagera agendererete kare na kare, nare nobokuani botari koonchoka." 
Hebrews7:25 Ase ayio, nare nokobua gw’okobatooria kegima abwo bagocha ase Nyasae goetera asare, ekiagera nigo are moyo botambe ase okobasabera." 
Hebrews7:26 Naki nigo etogwenerete intwe tobe n’Omokuani Omonene buna oyo, oyore omochenu, otari na komocha, otari na kemoa, bwatananetwe korwa ase abanyene ebibe, oimokereretigwe igoro ya igoro." 
Hebrews7:27 Ere tagwenerete korua ebing’wanso kera rituko, buna abakuani bande abanene, ritang’ani ase engencho y’ebibe biaye omonyene, naende ase engencho y’ebibe bi’abanto, ekiagera ayio nigo ayakorete ara rimo rioka ekero eruete ere omonyene." 
Hebrews7:28 Naki amachiko nigo are kobeka abanto abare noboreu babe abakuani abanene, korende ring’ana ri’emuma, eriachete nyuma y’amachiko, riabekire Omwana, oyoikeranetigwe kare na kare." 
Hebrews8:1 Gaki, ring’ana rinene ri’ayio togokwana nario eri: Ntore n’Omokuani Omonene buna iga, oikaransete ensemo ya borio y’ekerogo ki’Obonene aria igoro," 
Hebrews8:2 omokoreri bw’aase aachenu na obw’Eema y’ekeene, eye Omonene aagachete, gose tari mwanyabanto." 
Hebrews8:3 Naki kera omokuani omonene nigo are kobekwa ase okorua ebiegwa na ebing’wanso. Ase ayio yamogwenerete omokuani oyo boigo abe negento akorua. 
Hebrews8:4 Onye nabete ase ense, anga tabeti omokuani, ekiagera mbareo abare korua ebiegwa buna amachiko achigete." 
Hebrews8:5 Abwo baare gokorera ayare omogwekano bw’amang’ana are igoro, na ekiriri ki’ayio. Naki ekero Musa arenge koroisia Eema eria, Nyasae akamotebia, “Rigereria, okore ebinto bionsi ase omogwekano bw’oria kworogetigwe ase egetunwa.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Korende bono Kristo onyorire obokuani bore obuya kobua, koreng’ana buna ere are omobwatania bw’okobwatana okuya kobua, okwo kwagachetwe ase chiira chingiya kobua." 
Hebrews8:7 Naki onye okobwatana koria kwe ritang’ani kwarenge tikori na komocha, anga ribaga tiriarigetigwe ase koria gwa kabere." 
Hebrews8:8 Naki Nyasae nigo akonyora okomocha ime yabo ekero agoteba “Omonene otebire iga: Rora, amatuko ngocha are ekero ndakorere abanto b’enyomba ya Israeli na ab’enyomba ya Yuda okobwatana okoyia." 
Hebrews8:9 Okobwatana oko tigokoba buna koria nakorete ne chisokoro chiabo, ase rituko riria nababwatete amaboko abo ase okobarusia korwa ase ense ya Misiri. Ekiagera tibagendererete ase okobwatana kwane, inche tinabechanderete, Omonene otebire." 
Hebrews8:10 Naende Omonene nigo agoteba iga: Oko nakwo okobwatana ndakore n’Abaisraeli nyuma y’amatuko aria: Nimbeke amachiko aane ase ebirengererio biabo, ninyarike ase chinkoro chiabo ime; inche nimbe Nyasae obo, na barabwo mbabe abanto baane." 
Hebrews8:11 Barabwo tibakworokererania kera omonto nomogisangio oye, gose kera omonto noyomwabo, ogoteba: Momanye omonene, ekiagera bonsi pi mbamanye inche, korwa omoke mono goika omonene mono." 
Hebrews8:12 Naki nimbaabere obobe bwabo, na ebibe biabo tinkobiinyora naende.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Ase ogokwana igoro y’okobwatana okoyia nigo akorire koria kwe ritang’ani kobe ogokoro, na koria kwabeire ogokoro na kogota, ng’ang’e kore gosira." 
Hebrews9:1 Gaki, nonya okobwatana kwe ritang’ani kwarenge nemeroberio ase okomosasima Nyasae, naende kwarenge naase aachenu ase ense eye." 
Hebrews9:2 Naki eema eria ye ritang’ani yaroisetigwe. Ime ase eema eria mbiarengeo ekebekerero gie chitaya, na emesa amo nemegati yarenge koruegwa ase Nyasae. Aase aria are korokwa Aase Aachenu." 
Hebrews9:3 Na moino y’etoto eria ya kabere yarengeo eema ende yare korokwa Aase Aachenu Mono. 
Hebrews9:4 Ime aroro mbiarengeo egesasimero gi’etahabu ki’ogosambera ubani, na esanduku y’okobwatana yaoomire netahabu chinsemo chionsi. Ime ase esanduku eria mbiarengeo: Egetaabo gi’etahabu aase biabegetwe endagera yare korokwa mana, na enyimbo ya Haroni yasebogete, ne chibao chi’amagena aase amang’ana ’okobwatana kw’ogotianania arikire." 
Hebrews9:5 Igoro yaye yarengeo emegwekano y’abakerubi y’obonene yare kobekera egeikaransero ki’amabera ekiriri. Bono titokonyara goteba amang’ana ’ebinto ebi ekemo ekemo. 
Hebrews9:6 Ebinto ebi kobiaroisigwe igo, abakuani baare gosoa ase Eema ye ritang’ani ase amatuko onsi na goikerania obokoreri bwabo," 
Hebrews9:7 korende Eema ya kabere Omokuani Omonene ore gosoa bweka ara rimo kera omwaka, na tare konyara gosoa atari namanyinga, ayare korua ase engencho yaye ere omonyene na ase engencho y’amamocho ’abanto." 
Hebrews9:8 Omoika Omochenu nigo okworokereria ring’ana eri, ng’a enchera y’ogosoa Aase Aachenu konya teraorokigwa ekero Eema ye ritang’ani ereo eteneine." 
Hebrews9:9 Eyio nekiorokererio ase engaki eye ya bono, ekero ebiegwa na ebing’wanso bikorugwa, ebitanyare komoikerania oyokobirua erinde enkoro yaye temogambia." 
Hebrews9:10 Ebinto ebi nigo biare ase okoria na okonywa, na ogosibigwa ao ao, amachiko ase omobere ayabekire goika engaki y’okoroisigwa okoyia eike." 
Hebrews9:11 Korende Kristo oikire gocha, oyore Omokuani Omonene bw’amang’ana amaya agochi‐gocha. Agaeta ase eema ere enene na eng’ikeranu kobua, etakoretwe namaboko, engencho yaye etari egetongwa gi’ense eye." 
Hebrews9:12 Ere tasoete namanyinga e chimbori na eye chimori, korende namanyinga aye omonyene, agasoa ara rimo rioka Aase Aachenu, na agatonyorera okoboorigwa gwa kare na kare." 
Hebrews9:13 Naki onye amanyinga e chimbori na aye chieri, ne ribu ri’amatororo biare konyororokerigwa ase abatachenegeti mbinyare gochena ase ogosibigwa kw’omobere," 
Hebrews9:14 tari mono kobua amanyinga a Kristo, ere ase Omoika o kare na kare akerua ere omonyene ase Nyasae koba ekeng’wanso getari na komocha, anyare gochena okomanya gwe chinkoro chiaito ime korwa ase emeremo ekwete, erinde tokorere Nyasae ore moyo?" 
Hebrews9:15 Ase engencho eye ere nomobwatania bw’okobwatana okoyia, erinde abwo barangerigwe banyore omwando oria o kare na kare, oyo barieretwe eira, ekiagera amakweri aikire gokoreka ase okobabooria barabwo korwa ase ogosaria koria bakorete ase okobwatana kwe ritang’ani." 
Hebrews9:16 Naki aase okoriera kw’omwando kore, goika amakweri aye, oyoriete, abeo." 
Hebrews9:17 Naki okoriera kw’omwando nigo kogoikeranigwa ekero ki’amakweri, ekiagera onye oria oyoriete ore moyo, rirorio tikori na nguru." 
Hebrews9:18 Ase ayio, okobwatana koria kwe ritang’ani tigwachagete gotare namanyinga," 
Hebrews9:19 naki ekero kera richiko riaikire gokwanwa na Musa ase abanto bonsi, buna yachigetwe ase amachiko, akabogoria amanyinga e chimori na aye chimbori amo namache na amarionya amabariri, ne chinsagia chia hisopo, akanyororokeria ebuku enyene, na abanto bonsi," 
Hebrews9:20 ogoteba, “Aya namanyinga ’okobwatana oko Nyasae abachikerete inwe.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Eema amo nebinto bionsi biare gokorerwa ase ogosasima naboigo are kobinyororokeria amanyinga. 
Hebrews9:22 Amachiko nigo are goteba ng’a ang’e ebinto bionsi bichenwe namanyinga, na amanyinga ataiteiri, okwaberwa kw’ebibe tigokobao." 
Hebrews9:23 Gaki, yagwenerete emegwekano y’ebinto bire igoro bichenwe ase ebing’wanso buna ebio, korende ebinto bia igoro ebinyene bichenwe nebing’wanso bire ebiya kobua ebi." 
Hebrews9:24 Naki Kristo tasoete Aase Aachenu akoretwe namaboko, naro omogwekano bw’Aachenu a ekeene, korende agasoa igoro aanyene, na bono nao akororekana ase obosio bwa Nyasae ase engencho yaito intwe." 
Hebrews9:25 Ere terua omonyene ekero ase ekero, buna omokuani omonene are gosoa Aase Aachenu kera omwaka amo namanyinga atari ayaye." 
Hebrews9:26 Onye nabo, anga yamogwenerete achandwe ekero ase ekero korwa omochakano, ekero oboroso bw’ense bwabegetwe. Korende bono, ase amatuko ’omoerio bw’ense akaoroka ara rimo rioka ase okorusia ebibe ase okong’wanswa kwaye ere omonyene." 
Hebrews9:27 Buna abanto bagacheirwe ogokwa ara rimo, na nyuma y’ogokwa ekina," 
Hebrews9:28 naboigo Kristo nere, gakoorire koruegwa abe ekeng’wanso ara rimo ase okorusia ebibe bi’abanto abange, narorekane eria kabere, tari ase okobogoria ebibe, korende ase okonyorera abamoganyete ogotooreka." 
Hebrews10:1 Naki ayare ime y’amachiko nekiriri gioka ki’amang’ana agochi‐gocha, gose tari ekieni ekenyene. Ase ayio, ebing’wanso biria biria biare koruegwa kera omwaka botambe tibiarenge konyara kobaikerania abwo baare kobirua." 
Hebrews10:2 Onye mbianyarete, Inee, anga tibiatigetwe, tibikoruegwa? Naki onye abwo baare kobirua bakoorire gochenwa ara rimo, anga tibare kwerora ng’a mbare nebibe naende." 
Hebrews10:3 Korende ebing’wanso ebio nigo bikobainyoria igoro y’ebibe kera omwaka. 
Hebrews10:4 Naki amanyinga e chieeri na aye chimbori takonyara korusia ebibe. 
Hebrews10:5 Ase ayio, Kristo kagosoa ase ense nigo agoteba, “Ebing’wanso na ebiruegwa tikwabiganetie, korende omobere kwandoiseirie." 
Hebrews10:6 Ase ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso bi’ebibe, tikwagogetigwe nabirobio." 
Hebrews10:7 Erio ngakwana: Nachire gokora ogwancha kwao, Nyasae, buna erikire igoro yane ase ebuku.”" 
Hebrews10:8 Agwo ritang’ani nigo agoteba, “Ebing’wanso, na ebirugwa, na ebing’wanso bi’ogosambwa, na ebing’wanso bi’ebibe tikwabiganetie, gose tikwagogetigwe nabirobio”, nonya birobio biare korentwa buna amachiko are goteba." 
Hebrews10:9 Erio akabora, “Rora, nachire gokora ogwancha kwao.” Igo akarusia ebie ritang’ani, erinde abeke egia kabere." 
Hebrews10:10 Ase ogwancha okwo twanyorire ogochenwa ase okoruegwa kw’omobere o Yeso Kristo ara rimo rioka. 
Hebrews10:11 Kera omokuani nigo are gotenena rituko ase rituko ase obokoreri bwaye na korua ebing’wanso biria, na birobio tibiare konyara korusia ebibe nonya ng’ake." 
Hebrews10:12 Korende ekero Kristo aruete ekeng’wanso ekemo gioka ase ebibe kerabe goika kare na kare, nigo aikaransete ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae." 
Hebrews10:13 Erio oganyete goika ababisa baye babekwe inse y’amagoro aye. 
Hebrews10:14 Naki ase okoruegwa okomo obaikeranirie ase amatuko onsi abwo bachenirwe. 
Hebrews10:15 Naki Omoika Omochenu noro otobereire kirori. Naki ritang’ani nigo agoteba iga: 
Hebrews10:16 “Oko nakwo okobwatana ndache kobwatana nabarabwo nyuma y’amatuko ayio, Omonene otebire: Nimbeke amachiko aane ase chinkoro chiabo ime, ninyarike ase ebirengererio biabo.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Naende nigo agoteba, “Ebibe biabo, na ogosaria kwabo tinkobiinyora naende nonya ng’ake.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Gaki, okorusigwa kw’ebibe gokorabeo, rirorio ekerugwa ase engencho y’ebibe tigekobao naende." 
Hebrews10:19 Ase ayio, baminto, ntore noboremu bw’ogosoa Aase Aachenu goetera ase amanyinga a Yeso," 
Hebrews10:20 ase enchera enyia ere moyo, eye atoigorerete, egoetera ase etoto, engencho yaye omobere oye." 
Hebrews10:21 Naende ntore n’Omokuani Omonene igoro y’enyomba ya Nyasae. 
Hebrews10:22 Ase ayio, toike ang’e ne chinkoro chire nekeene, tobe nobomaene oboikeranu ase okwegena, ne chinkoro chiaito chianyororokerigwe oborabu, tichigotogambia, twasibigwe ase emebere yaito namache amaya." 
Hebrews10:23 Tiga tobwate mono okoorokia kw’ogosemeria gwaito, totari konyegerigwa; ekiagera ere oyoriete eira nomwegenwa." 
Hebrews10:24 Naende twechanderane intwe ase intwe, na kobekana chinguru ase obwanchani, na ase ogokora okuya." 
Hebrews10:25 Titotiga gosangererekana amo, buna engencho y’abande ere, korende toremanie intwe ase intwe, kobua mono ekiagera moroche ng’a Rituko riria riaikire ang’e." 
Hebrews10:26 Naki onye togokora ebibe moeneno nyuma gotwaikire komanya ekeene, keng’wanso kende tikeri ase engencho y’ebibe." 
Hebrews10:27 Korende eke totigaretie nobwoba bw’okoganya ekina, na omorero omotindi ogwoka, ogocha gosiria abwo bakoengereria." 
Hebrews10:28 Omonto oyorenge gochaya amachiko a Musa nigo arenge goitwa okwa, atari konyora amabera, ase okoberwa kirori nabanto babere gose batato." 
Hebrews10:29 Inee! Naki moroche? Omonto oria otachete Omwana o Nyasae, na kobara amanyinga ’okobwatana, achenetwe naro, koba egento kia bosa, oria okoreire Omoika bw’amabera obogechi, tiyamogwenerete ere anyore egesusuro ekenene kobua?" 
Hebrews10:30 Naki ntomanyete ere oyokwanete, “Egesiomba nekiane, inche ning’akane,” naende, “Omonene nere oragambie abanto baye.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Okogwa ase amaboko a Nyasae ore moyo, eri nering’ana ri’okondokia." 
Hebrews10:32 Korende moinyore amatuko e ritang’ani, nyuma komwabarerigwe omobaso igo mwaremereretie okoamererania okonene kw’ogochandwa." 
Hebrews10:33 Engaki ende mokarorerigwa ase okoramwa na ogochandwa maiso marore, na engaki ende mokabwatana nabwo bakoreretwe ayio." 
Hebrews10:34 Naki mwabarorerete amabera baria barenge ase ebisibo, mogancha nomogoko kourwa chinibo chiaino, ekiagera mwamanyete ng’a inwe abanyene more nenibo eyere engiya kobua, erabeo kare na kare." 
Hebrews10:35 Ase ayio, timotuguta oboremu bwaino, ekiagera mbore neng’eria enene." 
Hebrews10:36 Naki igo ebagwenerete mobe noboremereria, erinde komwaikire gokora ogwancha kwa Nyasae monyore aya mwarieretwe eira." 
Hebrews10:37 “Naki nkere ekero egeke mono, ere oyore gocha nachiche, gose tagotebana gocha," 
Hebrews10:38 korende omonyene oboronge one nabe moyo ase okwegena, na, karasukwane, omoyo one tokogokigwa nere.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Korende intwe titori ase abwo bagosukwana na gosira, korende ase abwo bare nokwegena ase okoegera emioyo yaito." 
Hebrews11:1 Gaki, okwegena nakwo okoba nobomaene ase amang’ana ayio asemeirie, nonya nekeene ki’ayio atari kororekana." 
Hebrews11:2 Naki ase okwo abagaaka abakoro mbaberetwe kirori. 
Hebrews11:3 Ase okwegena twamanyire ng’a ense nigo yatongetwe ase chinguru chie ring’ana ria Nyasae, na igo ebinto bikororekana tibiakoretwe nebinto bire maiso marore." 
Hebrews11:4 Ase okwegena Abeli akaa Nyasae ekeng’wanso ekere ekiya kobua egia Kaini. Ase okwo akaberwa kirori ng’a ere nomonyene oboronge. Nyasae akamobera kirori ase ogwancha ebiegwa biaye. Abeli okure, korende ase okwegena ngokwana are nonya ngoika bono." 
Hebrews11:5 Ase okwegena Enoku akang’anyigwa, tacha korora amakweri. Tarorekanete, ekiagera Nyasae namong’anyetie. Naki ritang’ani atarang’anyigwa konya obereirwe kirori ng’a namogwenerete Nyasae." 
Hebrews11:6 Korende omonto atari nokwegena takonyara komogwenera Nyasae. Naki oyogocha asare nagwenerete gwancha ng’a nareo, naende nigo akobaa eng’eria baria bakomorigia." 
Hebrews11:7 Ase okwegena Nuhu, gaikire gokurerwa na Nyasae ase amang’ana atararorekana, ase okoba namasikani amaya asare akaroisia obwato, erinde atoorie abanto b’enyomba yaye. Ase ayio, akagambia ense ekina, na akaba omonyamwando bw’oboronge bokonyorekana ase okwegena." 
Hebrews11:8 Ase okwegena Ibrahimu akaigwera Nyasae ekero arangeretigwe kogenda goika aase aria achiete konyora abe omwando oye, akaimoka akagenda, tamanya aase agochia." 
Hebrews11:9 Ase okwegena akamenya ase ense eria engeni arieretwe eira, akamenya buna omomenyi ase chiema amo na Isaka na Yakobo, abarenge abanyamwando amo nere ase eira eria eria." 
Hebrews11:10 Naki igo aganyete omochie ore namaroso, oyo Nyasae arosete na koagacha." 
Hebrews11:11 Ase okwegena Sara omonyene akanyora chinguru koba morito, nonya konya oeteire emiaka yaye, ekiagera amoroche ere oyomorierete eira, ng’a nomwegenwa are." 
Hebrews11:12 Ase ayio, korwa ase omonto oria oyomo, nonya konya obeire buna oyokure, abanto bakaiborwa abange buna ching’enang’eni chia igoro, na buna omokenye ore ase engegu y’enyancha, otanyare kobareka." 
Hebrews11:13 Aba bonsi bagakwa bare nokwegena, bataranyora ayabarieretwe eira, korende bakayarora korwa are, na koyakwania, bakaorokia ng’a nigo bare abamenyi na abaeti ase ense." 
Hebrews11:14 Naki abagokwana amang’ana buna ayio nkoorokia bare maiso marore, ng’a nkorigia bare ense yabo abanyene." 
Hebrews11:15 Onye barabwo mbainyorete ense eria ase baruete, anga mbanyorete ribaga koirana aroro." 
Hebrews11:16 Korende bono mbaganetie ense ere engiya kobua, engencho yaye ense ya igoro. Ase ayio Nyasae takorora obosooku korokwa Nyasae obo, ekiagera obaroiseirie omochie." 
Hebrews11:17 Ase okwegena Ibrahimu, gachia goteemwa, akarua Isaka abe ekeng’wanso. Nere oyorieretwe chiira akarua omwana oye omomoima." 
Hebrews11:18 Ere natebetigwe, “Ase Isaka oroiboro rwao narwatorwe.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Akarengereria ng’a Nyasae nanyare komobokia korwa ase abakure. Ase ayio akamonyora agwo agwo, buna omogwekano." 
Hebrews11:20 Ase okwegena Isaka agasesenia Yakobo na Esau ase amang’ana agochi‐gocha. 
Hebrews11:21 Ase okwegena Yakobo, ekero arenge ang’e nogokwa, agasesenia kera oyomo bw’abana ba Yusufu, agasasima bwesiirerete enyimbo yaye." 
Hebrews11:22 Ase okwegena Yusufu, ekero abeire ang’e nomoerio bw’obogima bwaye, agakwana igoro y’okong’anyigwa kw’Abaisraeli, akabachikera amang’ana igoro y’amauga aye." 
Hebrews11:23 Ase okwegena Musa, ekero aiboretwe, akabiswa ase engaki y’emetienyi etato nabaibori baye, ekiagera baroche ng’a nomwana omuya, gose tibairogete ogochika kw’omoruoti." 
Hebrews11:24 Ase okwegena Musa, kabeire omonto omonene, akaanga tarokwa omwana bw’omoiseke o Farao," 
Hebrews11:25 agachora ng’a mbuya konyora emechando amo nabanto ba Nyasae kobua kwegokia ase ebibe ase ekero egeke. 
Hebrews11:26 Ere nigo abarete ogochaywa ase engencho ya Kristo ng’a nobonda kobua chinibo chia Misiri, ekiagera arigereretie eng’eria ere bosio." 
Hebrews11:27 Ase okwegena akarua Misiri, tairoka endamwamu y’omoruoti, ekiagera aremereretie buna oyororire ere oyotari kororekana." 
Hebrews11:28 Ase okwegena akaroisia Epasaka na kogindia amanyinga, erinde oyorache goita abana abatangi tabakuna, ne ching’iti chintangi boigo." 
Hebrews11:29 Ase okwegena Abaisraeli bagaeta egati y’Enyancha Embariri buna ase ense enyomo. Korende Abamisiri barabwo bagachia goteema gokora bo, bakamerwa nenyancha." 
Hebrews11:30 Ase okwegena chindwaki chia Yeriko chikagwa gachiaetananirwe ase engaki y’amatuko atano na abere. 
Hebrews11:31 Ase okwegena Rahabu, oria omotayayi, taitetwe amo nabwo bataigwerete, ekiagera aroisetie abanto baria chirooti nomorembe." 
Hebrews11:32 Naende inki ndakwane? Naki engaki tekong’isana gokwana igoro ya Gidioni, na Baraki, na Samson, na Yefita, na Daudi, na Samweli, na ababani." 
Hebrews11:33 Abwo ase okwegena bakabua amaruoti, bagakora oboronge, bakanyora ayabarieretwe chiira, bagasieka emenwa ye chindo." 
Hebrews11:34 Naende barabwo bakarimia chinguru chi’omorero, bagetooria korwa ase obwoge bw’omoro, bakabekwa chinguru nyuma y’oboreu bwabo, bakaba abakong’u ase esegi, bagaseria emeganda y’abarwani y’ababisa." 
Hebrews11:35 Abakungu bakanyora naende abakwete babo ase okobokigwa. Abande bagaitwa bobe goika bagakwa, tibancha gosiborwa, erinde banyore okobokigwa okore okuya kobua." 
Hebrews11:36 Abande bagachandeka ase ogochecherigwa na goakwa chinkini, naende bagasibwa nebinyuri na kobekwa chichela ime." 
Hebrews11:37 Bagaakwa amagena, bagateemwa, bakanachwa ne chinseke, bagaitwa nemeyio ya birende. Naende bagaetanana beboetie chingobo chie ching’ondi na echie chimbori, bakaba abaremerwa, bagachandwa na gokorwa bobe," 
Hebrews11:38 abanto ense etagwenere koba nabarabwo. Barabwo nigo barenge goetanana ase chirooro na ase ebitunwa, ase amabwago na amakuruma." 
Hebrews11:39 Abanto aba bonsi babereirwe kirori goetera ase okwegena kwabo, korende tibanyora ayabarieretwe eira," 
Hebrews11:40 ekiagera Nyasae natang’anete gotogachera intwe egento kere ekiya kobua, naki barabwo tibaikeranetigwe intwe totaiyo." 
Hebrews12:1 Ase ayio, ekiagera intwe tore nabarori abange buna igo, batoetanaine buna riire, totugute are kera egurube, na ebibe biria bitobwatete. Tominyoke noboremereria ase okoamererania koria kobekire bosio bwaito," 
Hebrews12:2 na korigereria Yeso, omochaki na omoikerania bw’okwegena gwaito. Ribaga ri’omogoko oyobegetwe bosio bwaye, akaremereria omosalaba na gochaya obosooku, ere nigo aikaransete ensemo ya borio y’ekerogo ki’obonene kia Nyasae." 
Hebrews12:3 Gaki, morengererie mono ere oyoremereretie oboengereria buna obwo bokorwa ase abanyene ebibe igoro yaye ere omonyene, timocha kwebutokania na gokwa emioyo yaino." 
Hebrews12:4 Timorarwana esegi goika mwaiteire amanyinga aino ase okoamererania nebibe," 
Hebrews12:5 naende mwebire ogosorora koria kogokwana nainwe buna abana, “Omwana one, tochaya ogoakwa kw’Omonene kw’ogokorongeyia, gose tokwa omoyo karakoe egesusuro." 
Hebrews12:6 Naki ere oyo Omonene anchete nigo akomorongeyia, na kong’wania bororo omwana oyo obeire oyoye.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Ekero mokorongeigwa moremererie Nyasae nigo akobakorera buna abana baye. Naki, mwana ki otari korongeigwa na ise?" 
Hebrews12:8 Korende onye mokoba motari nokorongeigwa oko bonsi babwataine nakorokwo, rirorio nigo more abana ebimeru gose tari abana ba boronge." 
Hebrews12:9 Amo nayio ntwarenge nabatata baito b’ense eye, baare gotorongeyia, na barabwo ntwabasigete. Inee! Tari buya mono kobua kwebeka inse ya Tata bw’emeika yaito, na koba moyo?" 
Hebrews12:10 Naki ekeene, abatata baito b’ense nigo batorongeetie ase amatuko amake buna baroche buya, korende ere nigo agotorongeyia ase ogotokonya, erinde tobe ababwatani b’obochenu bwaye." 
Hebrews12:11 Kera okorongeigwa ase engaki yaye gokororekana ng’a tikori egento ki’omogoko, korende neki’omoichano. Korende nyuma yaye abakonarire banyore okwama kw’omorembe na okw’oboronge." 
Hebrews12:12 Ase ayio, mobeke chinguru amaboko ayio ororobire, na amaru ayagataire." 
Hebrews12:13 Mokorere amagoro aino chinchera chindonge, erinde ekere ekerema tikeotoranwa, korende kobua mono kegwenigwe." 
Hebrews12:14 Kora omokia koba nomorembe nabanto bonsi, na rigia obochenu, ekiagera onde tari orarore Omonene, atari naborobwo." 
Hebrews12:15 Morigererie mono ng’a onde taremerwa obuya bwa Nyasae, “omori bw’obororo” tocha gokumbaria na kobachanda, na abanto abange batambokerigwe ogotacheneka ase oyio." 
Hebrews12:16 Morigererie ng’a onde taba omotomani, gose oyotamosigeti Nyasae, buna Esau, oyoonetie omwando oye bw’okoiborwa kw’obotangi ase endagera eyemo." 
Hebrews12:17 Naki mwamanyire buya ng’a ekero achiete korigia omwando bw’ogosesenigwa korwa nyuma, agakanigwa, naki tanyora ribaga ri’okoonchoka nonya oririgetie mono namariga." 
Hebrews12:18 Naki timoraika ase egetunwa keranyare gokunwa, kegwoka omorero, gose omosunte, ne riire rimwamu, na ekembobe," 
Hebrews12:19 na egeturi ki’egetureri, na eriogi ri’amang’ana. Abwo bayaigwete bagasorora tibatebigwa ing’ana rinde naende." 
Hebrews12:20 Naki tibanyarete koremereria ring’ana riria riachigetwe, “Nonya neng’iti eise gokuna egetunwa nabo eraakwe amagena.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Aya arorekanete igo arenge ay’okwoboyia, goika Musa agateba, “Nabwatirwe nomoondoko na okoiguswa.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Korende inwe mwaikire egetunwa gekorokwa Sayoni, na omochie o Nyasae ore moyo, Yerusalemu ya igoro, na abamalaika abange batari kobareka," 
Hebrews12:23 na omosangererekano bw’omoyega, na omosangererekano bw’abaiborwa be ritang’ani, abwo amarieta abo arikire igoro, na Nyasae oyore omogambi bw’abanto bonsi, na emeika y’abanto abanyene oboronge abaikeranigwe," 
Hebrews12:24 na Yeso oyore omobwatania bw’okobwatana okoyia, na amanyinga akonyororokerigwa ayagokwana buya kobua aria ay’Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Rigereria, timomwanga ere oyogokwana. Naki onye baria tibetooretie baria bamwangete ere oyobakurerete ase ense, kobua mono intwe titogwetooria onye tokomwanga ere oyogotokurera korwa igoro." 
Hebrews12:26 Na eriogi riaye ndiatengechetie ense ekero keria, korende bono orire eira, ogoteba, “Ara rimo naende nintengechie ense, gose tari ense yoka, korende na igoro boigo.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Korende ring’ana eri, “Ara rimo naende”, nigo rikoorokia, ng’a ebinto biria bigotengechigwa nigo birang’anyigwe ekiagera biatongetwe, erinde ebitanyare gotengechigwa bibeo." 
Hebrews12:28 Gaki, ekiagera twanyorire oboruoti obotanyare gotengechigwa, tiga toiranerie ng’a mbuya mono na komokorera Nyasae ase okomogokia amo namasikani na okoiroka." 
Hebrews12:29 Naki Nyasae oito nomorero okoria na gosiria. 
Hebrews13:1 Mogenderere nobwanchani inwe ase inwe. 
Hebrews13:2 Timweba koroisia abageni, naki ase enchera eye abande mbaroisetie abamalaika, batamanyete." 
Hebrews13:3 Inyora abwo basibire ase echela, buna nainwe mosibire amo nabarabwo, naende barabwo mbakoreretwe bobe, ekiagera naboigo nainwe more nomobere." 
Hebrews13:4 Okonyuomana gosikwe nabanto bonsi, na ebirarero bibe bitari nobosooku, naki abanyaka na abatomani Nyasae nabagambie ekina." 
Hebrews13:5 Timoba abanchi chibesa, moisaneke nebi more nabio, ekiagera ere omonyene otebire, “Tinkogotiga nonya ng’ake, gose tingokoremera.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Ase ayio, ntonyare goteba noboremu, “Omonene nere omokonyi one, tinkwoboa. Mwanyabanto, inki arankorere?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Inyora abwo baare kobatang’ana, ababatebetie ring’ana ria Nyasae. Naende morengererie mono omoerio bw’obogima bwabo, mobe abegi b’okwegena kwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 Yeso Kristo buna arenge igoro, na buna are rero, nabo arabe goika kare na kare." 
Hebrews13:9 Timoirwa bogeka namorokererio ao ao, ayare ay’ekegeni, ekiagera mbuya chinkoro chibekwe chinguru ase obuya, gose tari ase emeroberio y’okoria endagera ase eyio barabwo bagendererete neyio tibanyora gokonywa konde." 
Hebrews13:10 Ntore negesasimero aase baria bagokorera Eema batari ne ribaga koria ebinto bikoruegwa aroro. 
Hebrews13:11 Naki emebere ye ching’iti chiria amanyinga abo are korentwa ime Aase Aachenu nomokuani omonene ase engencho y’ebibe, nigo yare gosamberwa isiko y’omochie." 
Hebrews13:12 Ase ayio, Yeso nere agachanderwa isiko y’egeita, erinde achene abanto namanyinga aye ere omonyene." 
Hebrews13:13 Ase ayio, togende asare isiko y’omochie, tobwatane nere ase okoramwa kwaye," 
Hebrews13:14 ekiagera aiga titori nomochie oragenderere, korende nigo tokorigia oria orache gocha." 
Hebrews13:15 Gaki, goetera asare togenderere koa Nyasae ekeng’wanso gi’okomotogia, engencho yaye okwama kw’emenwa yaito eyekoorokia erieta riaye." 
Hebrews13:16 Timweba gokora amaya, na gosanga nabande, naki ebing’wanso binga buna ebi nabio bikomogwenera Nyasae." 
Hebrews13:17 Moigwere abwo bakobatang’ana, na mobasike, ekiagera barabwo nigo barendete emioyo yaino buna abanto barache korua omobaro, erinde banyare gokora ayio ase omogoko. Onye bagocha koyakora ase okweumia anga taba na gokonywa konde asemore." 
Hebrews13:18 Tosabere, naki ntore nobomaene ng’a chinkoro chiaito tichigotogambia, ntorigetie koba norogendo oruya ase amang’ana onsi." 
Hebrews13:19 Na inche nabasoroire mono kobua gokora ayio, erinde ng’iranigwe asemore bwango." 
Hebrews13:20 Bono Nyasae bw’omorembe oyomorentete naende korwa ase amakweri Omonene oito Yeso, oyore omorisia omonene bwe ching’ondi goetera ase amanyinga ’okobwatana gwa kare na kare," 
Hebrews13:21 ere abakore mobe abaikeranu ase kera ogokora okuya, monyare gokora obwanchani bwaye, naende akore ime yaino ayagwenerete ase obosio bwaye goetera ase Yeso Kristo. Asare ere obonene bwa kare na kare. Amina." 
Hebrews13:22 Abaminto, nababoririe, moremererie ring’ana eri ri’ogosorora, ekiagera nabarikeire ase amang’ana amake." 
Hebrews13:23 Manya ng’a oyominto Timotheo oikire gosiborwa. Amo nere ntoche kobarora karache bwango. 
Hebrews13:24 Nkwanerie abwo bonsi bakobatang’ana, na abachenu bonsi. Abwo baruete Italia babakwanirie." 
Hebrews13:25 Obuya bobe amo nainwe mwensi. Amina. 
James1:1 Inche Yakobo, omosomba o Nyasae na obw’Omonene Yeso Kristo, nabakwanirie inwe ab’ebisaku ikomi na bibere, abamwatananekire gochia chinse chire ao ao." 
James1:2 Abaminto, bara ng’a nomogoko bwoka komorasoe ase amateemwa are ao ao," 
James1:3 ekiagera momanyete ng’a ekero okwegena kwaino kogoteemwa nigo mokweorokereria oboremereria. 
James1:4 Tiga oboremereria obwo bobe nemeremo emeikeranu, erinde monyare koba abaikeranu, na abagima, motaremeiri na ing’ana rinde rionsi." 
James1:5 Korende onye monto onde oino oremeire obong’aini, tiga asabe Nyasae, ere nabomoe, ekiagera nigo akoa abanto bonsi ase obonge, gose tari gotogonyera onde." 
James1:6 Korende oyogosaba, tiga asabe ase okwegena, taba na tang’u‐tang’u, ekiagera oyore ne chitang’u‐tang’u nigo are buna emerindo y’enyancha ekona‐koirwa nomwaga gochia aaria na aaria." 
James1:7 Naki omonto oria takaga ng’a nanyore egento korwa ase Omonene; 
James1:8 ere nigo are nemioyo ebere, na gotiting’ara ase chinchera chiaye chionsi." 
James1:9 Korende oyomino otari nobonene agoke, ekiagera aimokererigwe igoro," 
James1:10 na oyore omonda, nere agoke kairanigwe inse, ekiagera nigo arasire buna egesicha ki’obonyansi." 
James1:11 Naki erioba korikooroka nomobaso omororo, nigo rigosamba na kwomia obonyansi. Egesicha ki’obonyansi kiaroroka, na obuya bw’ekieni kiaye bwasira. Naboigo nomonda nere arasire kagendererete kwerigeria." 
James1:12 Nasesenirie omonto oria oremereretie ogoteemwa, ekiagera ekero aikire gwancherwa nanyore obogima buna egutwa y’obobui, obogima obwo Nyasae abarierete eira abwo bamwanchete." 
James1:13 Omonto karateemwe, tateba, “Nateemirwe na Nyasae,” ekiagera Nyasae tagoteemwa namabe, gose tagoteema omonto." 
James1:14 Korende kera omonto nigo agoteemwa ekero akong’uswa na kong’ainwa nokogania kwaye omonyene. 
James1:15 Na okogania koria okobe gokwabogoirie oborito kwaibora ebibe, na ebibe biria kobiakinire, biarenta amakweri." 
James1:16 Abaminto abanchani, timong’aineka." 
James1:17 Kera ekerugwa ekiya, na kera ekeegwa geikeranete nigo gekorwa ase Ise bw’emebaso. Asare koonchoka tikoiyo, gose ekiriri kende gekooncha‐onchoka." 
James1:18 Ase ogwancha kwaye ere omonyene agatoibora ase ring’ana riaye ri’ekeene, erinde tobe buna ogotongorwa konde kw’ebitongwa biaye." 
James1:19 Abaminto abanchani, momanye ring’ana eri: Kera omonto abe omwango ase okoigwa, korende abe bwe ng’ora ase ogokwana, na bwe ng’ora ase okoba nendamwamu," 
James1:20 ekiagera endamwamu ya mwanyabanto teri gokora ayare boronge ase obosio bwa Nyasae. 
James1:21 Ase ayio, beka aare ogotacheneka gwonsi, na obonge bw’amabe, na ase obwororo mwanche ring’ana erio riasimekirwe ime yaino, eriranyare gotooria emioyo yaino." 
James1:22 Mobe abakori be ring’ana; timoba abakoigwa rioka, na kweng’aina inwe abanyene." 
James1:23 Naki omonto karabe omoigwa bwe ring’ana, gose tari omorikori, oyio nigo anga buna omonto oyokwerigereria obosio bwaye omonyene ase ekerore." 
James1:24 Igo akwerigereria, naende ogenda ase agochia, erio kegima bweba buna erora arenge." 
James1:25 Korende oyorigereretie amachiko amaikeranu ay’obosibore, na goikaransa aroro, na taba oyokoigwa na kweba, korende abe omokori okoyakora, oyio nabe oyosesenirie ase ogokora kwaye." 
James1:26 Omonto karekage ng’a nkomokorera are Nyasae, na ere tagambereti oromeme rwaye, korende nenkoro yaye akong’aina, igo okomokorera Nyasae kwaye nigo kore okwa bosa." 
James1:27 Okomokorera Nyasae okore ogochenu, gotari na komocha ase obosio bwa Nyasae Tata noko: Gochia korora chintakana na ababoraka ase obokong’u bwabo, na kwerenda ere omonyene, na igo taba na kemoa gi’ense." 
James2:1 Abaminto, komorabe mwegenete Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, Omonene bw’obonene, timoba mogwanchereria abanto." 
James2:2 Naki karasoe ase omosangererekano oino omonto obegete ebonyi y’etahabu ase ekiara kiaye, na bweboetie chianga chingiya, naende omonto onde asoe, oyore omotaka na bweboetie chianga chire ne riko," 
James2:3 na inwe mwasika oria bweboetie chianga chingiya, na komotebia, “Ikaransa aye aiga aase aagiya”, na gotebia oria omotaka, “Tenena aaria”, gose, “Ikaransa inse aa ase amagoro aane”," 
James2:4 Inee, timokoreti ogwatananeka ase egati yaino inwe abanyene, na mwabeire abagambi, more nebirengererio ebibe?" 
James2:5 Abaminto abanchani, tegerera! Inee! Nyasae tachorete abataka b’ense eye babe abanda ase okwegena, naende babe abanyamwando b’oboruoti obo abarierete eira, abwo bamwanchete?" 
James2:6 Korende inwe mwachayire oria omotaka. Inee! Baria abanda, tari barabwo babaregete inwe, na kobakurura gochia ase ebigambero?" 
James2:7 Tari barabwo abwo bakorama erieta erio rigiya mwarokirwe inwe? 
James2:8 Komoraikeranie ogochika gokorwa ase oboruoti buna korikire ase amariko, “Ancha omogisangio oo buna bweanchete”, namokore buya." 
James2:9 Korende onye more mogwanchereria abanto, mwakorire ebibe, na mwaenekigwe namachiko ng’a nabasaria more." 
James2:10 Naki monto onde bwensi obwatete amachiko onsi, korende asarie erimo rioka, obeire omomochi ase onsi." 
James2:11 Naki ere oyotebete, “Totomana”, nere boigo agateba, “Toita”. Gaki, onye totomaneti, korende gwaitire, igo kwabeire omosaria amachiko." 
James2:12 Kwana bo, na kora boigo, buna abanto barache kogambigwa ase amachiko ’obosibore." 
James2:13 Naki ekina tikeri namabera asere oyotari namabera. Amabera nigo agochenga igoro y’ekina. 
James2:14 Abaminto, ngokonywa ki omonto aranyore onye ogoteba ng’a nare nokwegena, na ere tari nogokora? Inee! Okwegena koria nkonyare komotooria?" 
James2:15 Onye oyomino, omosacha gose omokungu, ore bosa, na oremeire endagera ya kera rituko," 
James2:16 na omonto onde oino amotebie, “Genda nomorembe, bwote omorero, oigote”, korende tamoa ebiaganetie ase omobere oye, naki aramokonye?" 
James2:17 Naboigo nokwegena gwoka gotari nogokora, nigo gokwete." 
James2:18 Aande gose omonto natebe, “Aye nore nokwegena, na inche ninde nogokora.” Nimoiranerie, “Nyorokia okwegena kwao gotari nogokora, na inche nkworokie okwegena kwane ase ogokora kwane.”" 
James2:19 Aye mbwegenete ng’a Nyasae noyomo; gwakorire buya. Nonya nebirecha mbiegenete boigo na koiguswa. 
James2:20 Korende aye, omonto otaisaini gento, norigetie komanya ng’a okwegena gotari nogokora nokogomba?" 
James2:21 Inee! Sokoro yaito Ibrahimu taetwe oboronge ase ogokora, ekero aruete Isaka, omwana oye, igoro ase egesasimero?" 
James2:22 Kwarorire ng’a okwegena kwaye amo nogokora mbiakorete emeremo, na okwegena koria kogaikeranigwa ase ogokora." 
James2:23 Amariko agaikeranigwa, aria agoteba, “Ibrahimu nigo amwegenete Nyasae, na ase engencho eyio akabarwa koba omonyene oboronge.” Igo akarokwa omosani o Nyasae." 
James2:24 Mwarorire ng’a mwanyabanto nigo akoegwa oboronge ase ogokora, gose tari ase okwegena gwoka." 
James2:25 Naboigo na Rahabu, oria omotayayi, Inee, taetwe oboronge ase ogokora, ekero aroisetie baria batometwe, akabasokia isiko ase enchera ende eng’ao?" 
James2:26 Naki buna omobere otari nomoika nigo okwete, naboigo nokwegena gotari nogokora nigo gokwete." 
James3:1 Abaminto, tegwenereti abange asemore babe aborokia, ekiagera momanyete ng’a intwe aborokia inatogambigwe ekina egekong’u kobua." 
James3:2 Naki intwe twensi nigo tokomocha ase chinchera chinyinge. Onye omonto takomocha ase ogokwana, oyio nomonto omoikeranu, oranyare kogambera omobere oye bwonsi boigo." 
James3:3 Onye tokobekera chibarasi ebinto emenwa, ebi’ogochiraa, erinde chitoigwere, nigo tokoraa emebere yabo yonsi." 
James3:4 Morigererie chimeeri boigo, nonya chire chinene mono, na chikoirwa nomwaga omotindi, nigo chikoonchorwa nekeonchori egeke mono, aande onsi omogendia aganetie kogenda." 
James3:5 Naboigo na oromeme nekiimo egeke, na rororwo nigo rokweenenia ase amang’ana amanene. Rigereria buna ensase enke egosamba rinani rinene mono." 
James3:6 Oromeme narwo omorero, na ense y’obobe. Ase ebiimo biaito bionsi oromeme narwo rokobeka omobere bwonsi ebimoa, na gotongia omorero egesingo ki’obogima bwaito, na orwo oronyene nigo rwatongetwe nomorero o kare na kare." 
James3:7 Naki kera egesaku gie ching’iti, ne chinyoni, ne ching’iti chigwekurura, na ebitongwa ebire amache ime, nigo bitugire, na birobio nigo biatugire na mwanyabanto." 
James3:8 Korende oromeme, onde tari ase mwanyabanto oranyare korotuga. Rororwo nobobe, rotari kogamberwa, roichire nobosongo bokorenta amakweri." 
James3:9 Ase orwo twatogia Omonene Tata, na ase orwo twaragereria mwanyabanto abatongetwe ase omogwekano o Nyasae." 
James3:10 Omonwa oria oria orua ogosesenia na okoragereria. Abaminto, amang’ana aya tagwenereti koba bo." 
James3:11 Inee! Ensoko nenyare ase entuboka eyemo korenta amache amaya, na amache amaroro?" 
James3:12 Abaminto, Inee, omoko nonyare kwama amazeituni, gose omosabibu bwame amako? Naboigo nensoko y’amache are nomonyo tekonyara korenta amache atari nomonyo." 
James3:13 Ning’o asemore ore omong’aini na omomanyi? Ere aorokie ogokora kwaye ase orogendo rwaye oruya, ase obwororo bokorwa ase obong’aini." 
James3:14 Korende onye more ne ribero rire nobororo, na okweancha ase chinkoro chiaino ime, timwetogia na gokwana oborimo igoro y’ekeene." 
James3:15 Obong’aini obo tari boria bogocha korwa igoro, korende nobw’ense, na obwe chingencho chia mwanyabanto, na echi’ebirecha," 
James3:16 ekiagera agwo ase ribero rire, na okweancha, agwo moroberio toiyo, korende kera ogokora okobe." 
James3:17 Korende obong’aini bokorwa igoro ritang’ani nigo bore obochenu, naende obw’omorembe, na obwororo, na obokanyeku. Igo boichire namabera na okwama okuya, botari na gosiereria gose na bong’ainereria." 
James3:18 Okwama kw’oboronge nigo kogosimekwa ase omorembe na baria bagokora omorembe. 
James4:1 Esegi na okorwana ebire ase egati yaino, ng’ai bikorwa? Inee! Tibiri korwa agwo ase okogania kwaino okobe, ogokorwana nebiimo biaino?" 
James4:2 Nigo mokogania, korende timori na gento; moita na koba ne ribero, korende timokonyora gento. Nigo mogokora esegi na korwana, korende timori na gento, ekiagera timori gosaba." 
James4:3 Ngosaba more, ko timori koegwa, ekiagera nigo mogosaba bobe. Ayio mogosaba nigo moganetie gokorera ase okogania kwaino okobe." 
James4:4 Inwe abamotari abegenwa, timomanyeti ng’a obosani bw’ense nobobisa ase Nyasae? Gaki, oyorigetie koba omosani bw’ense bwekorire koba omobisa o Nyasae." 
James4:5 Gose nigo mokagete ng’a namang’ana a bosa, ekero amariko agoteba iga, “Omoika oyomenyete ime yaito nigo okogania ore ne risemi.”" 
James4:6 Korende obuya obo, ere atoeire, nobonge kobua. Naki amariko nigo agoteba, “Nyasae nigo akwanga abare abaenenu, korende abare abaitongo nigo akobaa obuya.”" 
James4:7 Gaki, mwebeke inse ase Nyasae; korende mwange Saitani, na ere nabatame." 
James4:8 Moike Nyasae ang’e, na ere nabaike ang’e inwe. Inwe abanyene ebibe, mochene amaboko aino; inwe abanyene emioyo ebere, mochene chinkoro chiaino." 
James4:9 Eichanie na kweng’ereria, na korera. Ogoseka kwaino koonchorwe kobe okweng’ereria, na omogoko oino obe omoichano." 
James4:10 Mwekeyie ase obosio bw’Omonene, na ere nabaimokererie igoro." 
James4:11 Abaminto, timong’achana. Oyokong’acha oyomwabo, gose komogambia nigo akong’acha amachiko na koyagambia, korende onye gokogambia amachiko, rirorio tori omokori amachiko, korende omogambia amachiko." 
James4:12 Omorua amachiko na omogambia noyomo bweka, nere oranyare gotooria na gosiria. Korende aye naye ng’o okogambia omogisangio oo?" 
James4:13 Igwa bono inwe abamogoteba, “Rero gose ankio inatogende omochie gete, na tobeere aroro omwaka omogima na kogora, na koonia, na konyora ebitoki.”" 
James4:14 Inwe timomanyeti ayarache abe ankio. Obogima bwaino ninki? Naki inwe neritaturi, rikororekana ase egeka egeke, naende riasira." 
James4:15 Ayamogwenerete goteba naya, “Omonene karanche, natobe moyo, naende tokore iga gose iga”." 
James4:16 Korende bono iga mogwetogia ase oboenenu bwaino. Ogwetogia gwonsi konga buna okwo nokobe. 
James4:17 Ase ayio, oyomanyete gokora amaya, ko tayakora, asare ere nebibe." 
James5:1 Igwa bono, abamore abanda, rera na goaka egeturi ase engencho y’emechando yaino eyekobachera." 
James5:2 Chinibo chiaino chiagundire, ne chianga chiaino chiarirwe nebigwankwa." 
James5:3 Chitahabu ne chifeta chiaino chiasoirwe noboboosu, na oboboosu obwo bwabeire kirori igoro yaino, na borobwo naborie emebere yaino buna omorero okoria. Mwegacheire emonga amatuko aya ay’omoerio." 
James5:4 Rigereria, mwabarinire abakoreri, abagesire emegondo yaino, eng’eria yabo. Bono eng’eria eria ekorera, na okorera kw’abagesi baria gwaikire ase amato ’Omonene bw’Emeganda." 
James5:5 Igo momenyete ase ense eye ase okwegokia, na timwetangeti ase okogania kwaino. Mwenoririe ase chinkoro chiaino goika rituko ri’okonyenya." 
James5:6 Mwagambirie omonyene oboronge na komoita, na ere tabaamerereti inwe." 
James5:7 Ase ayio, baminto, remereria goika Omonene achiche. Rigereria, omoremi nigo akoganya okwama kw’omogondo okore ne rigori. Igo akoremereria ase ayio, goika anyore embura ye ritang’ani na ey’okwamia endagera." 
James5:8 Naboigo, nainwe remereria, kong’ia chinkoro chiaino, ekiagera ogocha kw’Omonene kwabeire ang’e." 
James5:9 Abaminto, timwemurunganerania, timocha kogambigwa. Rigereria, Omogambi nigo ateneine gesieri." 
James5:10 Abaminto, bwatia ababani baria bakwanete ase erieta ri’Omonene, babe ekiorokererio gi’okobogoria obokong’u, na eki’oboremereria." 
James5:11 Rigereria, abwo baremereretie twababarire ng’a mbasesenirie. Mwaigwete amang’ana ’Ayubu buna aremereretie, na buna Omonene amokorerete ase omoerio. Naki Omonene nomonyene amabeebe amange na amabera." 
James5:12 Korende abaminto, kobua ase onsi timotiana, ase igoro, gose ase ense, gose koria muma ende yonsi, korende “ee” yaino ebe “ee”, na “yaya” yaino ebe “yaya”, timocha kobekwa inse y’okogambigwa." 
James5:13 Omonto onde oino karanyorekane nemechando, tiga asabe. Onde omo oino, onye ore nomoyo bw’ogosasoka, tiga atogie ase ogotera." 
James5:14 Onye omonto onde oino obeire omorwaire, tiga arangerie abagaaka b’ekanisa bamosabere na bamoake amaguta ase erieta ri’Omonene." 
James5:15 Na ogosaba koria gw’okwegena nagotoorie omorwaire oria, na Omonene namogwenie. Onye omonto oria okorire ebibe naaberwe." 
James5:16 Orokerania ebibe biaino inwe ase inwe, na gosaberana, monyore okogwenigwa. Ogosaba kw’omonyene oboronge nigo kore nengencho enene mono gokorasabwe nomokia." 
James5:17 Elija nigo arenge omonto bwe chingencho echimo naintwe, agasaba nomokia ng’a embura tetwa. Na embura tiyatwa igoro ase ense ase engaki y’emiaka etato na emetienyi etano nomo." 
James5:18 Agasaba naende, igoro ekarenta embura, na ense ekama okwama kwaye." 
James5:19 Abaminto, onye omonto onde oino oteanire korwa ase ekeene, na monto onde amoiranie," 
James5:20 tiga ere amanye ng’a oyokoirania omonyene ebibe korwa ase enchera y’ogosira, ere natoorie omoyo oye korwa ase amakweri na atube obonge bw’ebibe." 
1Peter1:1 Inche Petero, omotomwa o Yeso Kristo, nkobarikera nde inwe abachore, abamwatananekire gochia komenya buna abamenyi ase Ponto, na Galatia, na Kapadokia, na Asia, na Bitinia." 
1Peter1:2 Inwe nigo mwachoretwe koreng’ana buna Nyasae Tata amanyete korwa kare, na mogachenwa n’Omoika, monyare koigwera Yeso Kristo, na konyororokerigwa namanyinga aye. Obuya na omorembe bimenteke asemore." 
1Peter1:3 Nyasae, Ise Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, abakwe! Ase amabera aye amange atoiboire eria kabere, erinde tonyore ogosemeria kore moyo goetera ase okobokigwa kwa Yeso Kristo korwa ase abakure," 
1Peter1:4 naende tonyore omwando otagosareka, otari na komocha, otari gosiria obonene bwaye. Omwando oyo ogachire igoro ase engencho yaino," 
1Peter1:5 inwe abamorendire nokobua kwa Nyasae ase enchera y’okwegena, monyore ogotooreka kore ang’e koorokigwa ase ekero ki’omoerio." 
1Peter1:6 Ase engencho y’ayio monyare kogoka mono, nonya mbono ase ekero egeke inamochandeke ase amateemwa a kera engencho, onye egwenerete." 
1Peter1:7 Igo okwegena kwaino, gakoratenene ase ogoteemwa, kore kwe rigori rinene kobua etahabu egosira (nonya egoteemwa ase omorero) naende konyorekane kogwenerete ogotogigwa, na obonene, na ogosikwa ase okoorokigwa kwa Yeso Kristo." 
1Peter1:8 Ere oyo mwamwanchire, nonya timomorochi, mwamwegenire, nonya timoramorora, na igo moragoke ase omogoko otari gotebeka oichire nobonene," 
1Peter1:9 ekero moranyore oboikeranu bw’okwegena kwaino, engencho yaye ogotooreka kw’emioyo yaino." 
1Peter1:10 Igoro ase amang’ana ’ogotooreka okwo ababani, baria babanete obuya obo borache kobachera, bakariga‐rigia na kouna‐unia." 
1Peter1:11 Bakarigia nkero ki, naende nkero kenga buna kere ki, Omoika o Kristo, oyorenge ime yabo, oorogetie, ekero otang’anete koba kirori igoro y’ogochandwa gwa Kristo, na obonene obwo borache koba nyuma y’ayio." 
1Peter1:12 Barabwo nigo bamaanoreretwe ng’a babakorere inwe ase amang’ana ayio, gose tari barabwo abanyene. Ayio bono araretigwe asemore nabaria babaranderetie inwe enchili ase Omoika Omochenu, oyotometwe korwa igoro. Amang’ana ayio abamalaika bare namaiga kona‐koyasiomeria." 
1Peter1:13 Ase ayio, eboyie bokong’u ebinema bi’ebirengererio biaino, mobe aberiti, mobe nogosemeria ogoikeranu ase obuya boria morarenterwe ase okoorokigwa kwa Yeso Kristo." 
1Peter1:14 Buna abana abaigweri timwereng’ania nokogania kwaino okobe kwe ritang’ani, ekero mware motamanyete gento," 
1Peter1:15 korende buna ere, oyobarangeirie, are omochenu, naboigo nainwe mobe abachenu ase orogendo rwaino rwonsi," 
1Peter1:16 ekiagera nigo erikire, “Nebagwenerete mobe abachenu, ekiagera inche nomochenu.”" 
1Peter1:17 Onye mokomoroka Tata, ere oyoragambie kera omonto koreng’ana nogokora kwaye atari nogwanchereria, mogenderere nokoiroka ase ekero kiaino gi’okomenya aiga buna abaeti." 
1Peter1:18 Momanye ng’a nigo mwaboorigwe korwa ase orogendo rwaino rotagwenereti, orwo mwanyorete korwa ase chisokoro chiaino, tari ase ebinto bigosareka, buna chifeta gose chitahabu," 
1Peter1:19 korende ase amanyinga e rigori rinene, buna ay’emanwa y’eng’ondi etari na komocha, gose na kemoa, engencho yaye amanyinga a Kristo." 
1Peter1:20 Ere igo amanyekanete korwa kare, ritang’ani ense etarabekwa oboroso, korende oorokigwe ase amatuko aya ay’omoerio ase engencho yaino." 
1Peter1:21 Goetera asare ere mwamwegenire Nyasae, oyomobogetie korwa ase abakure na akamoa obonene, erinde okwegena kwaino na ogosemeria kwaino kobe ase Nyasae."
