1Peter1:22 Komwaikire gwechena emioyo yaino ase okoigwera ekeene, goikera obwanchani bw’abamino botari nobong’ainereria, gaki bono mogenderere nobwanchani inwe ase inwe bokorwa ase enkoro y’ekeene," 
1Peter1:23 ekiagera mwaiboirwe eria kabere, tari ase embusuro egosareka, korende ase eyetari gosareka, goetera ase ring’ana ria Nyasae rinyene obogima, erikobao goika kare na kare." 
1Peter1:24 Naki igo erikire, “Mwanyabanto bonsi nigo banga buna obonyansi, na obonene bwabo nigo bonga buna ebisicha bire mogondo. Obonyansi nigo bokwoma, na ebisicha boigo," 
1Peter1:25 korende ring’ana ri’Omonene nigo rirabeo goika kare na kare.” Ne ring’ana eri nario enchili eye mwaranderetigwe. 
1Peter2:1 Gaki, beka are obobe bwonsi, na obong’ainereria bwonsi, na oborianania, na emoko, na oboitania bwonsi." 
1Peter2:2 Buna abana ebing’werere baiborwa rero iga, moganie amabeere ’ekeene ay’omoika, erinde monyare gokina ase aro, na goikera ogotooreka," 
1Peter2:3 onye mwateemire Omonene ng’a nomuya. 
1Peter2:4 Mochiere ere, oyore rigena rire moyo, riangetwe na mwanyabanto, korende ase obosio bwa Nyasae nerichore, rire rie rigori rinene." 
1Peter2:5 Inwe abamore buna amagena are moyo moagachwe, mobe enyomba y’Omoika mobe abakuani abachenu, morue ebing’wanso bi’omoika ebirancherwe ase Nyasae goetera ase Yeso Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Ekiagera erikire ase amariko, “Rigereria, nabekire ase Sayoni rigena richore, rigena rinene ri’ekoona, naende nigo rire rie rigori rinene, na onde bwensi oyoramwegene takorora obosooku.”" 
1Peter2:7 Naki ogosika oko nokwaino, inwe abamwegenire. Korende ase abwo bategeneti nigo erikire, “Rigena erio abaagachi bangete riabeire rigena rinene ri’ekoona,”" 
1Peter2:8 naende, “Rigena erio nigo riragoche abanto, naende nigo rire egetare gekobaiyeria inse.” Nigo bakwegocha ase ring’ana, ekiagera tibari koriigwera. Naki naro ayio barageretwe." 
1Peter2:9 Korende inwe nababiare abachore, abakuani b’Omoruoti, egesaku egechenu, abanto ba Nyasae omonyene, monyare koraria ogokora kwaye kw’obonene, oyobarangeretie korwa ase omosunte, gochia ase omobaso oye bw’ogokumia." 
1Peter2:10 Inwe agwo kare timwarenge abanto ba Nyasae, korende bono mwabeire abanto baye; ritang’ani timwanyorete amabera, korende bono mwanyorire amabera." 
1Peter2:11 Abanchani, nabasoroire inwe, ekiagera more abaeti ase ense engeni eatanane korwa ase okogania okobe kw’omobere okwo gokorwana nomoyo." 
1Peter2:12 Mobe norogendo oruya ase egati y’abanto b’Ebisaku, erinde nonya bakobang’acha ng’a nabakori amabe more, banyare korora ogokora kwaino okuya na gotogia Nyasae rituko riria agocha kobachera." 
1Peter2:13 Ase engencho y’Omonene mwebeke inse ya kera ekegochikwa na mwanyabanto, onye nomoruoti oyore omonene," 
1Peter2:14 gose abagavuna, abatomirwe nere, erinde bae abakori amabe egesusuro, na gotogia abakori amaya," 
1Peter2:15 ekiagera oko nakwo ogwancha kwa Nyasae, ng’a ase ogokora kwaino okuya mokirie abanto abariri ase ogotamanya kwabo." 
1Peter2:16 Mobe abanto abasibore, korende timokorera obosibore bwaino ase okobiserera obobe, korende mobe norogendo rogwenerete abasomba ba Nyasae." 
1Peter2:17 Mosike abanto bonsi. Mwanche abamino. Moiroke Nyasae. Mosike omoruoti. 
1Peter2:18 Inwe abasomba, moigwere abanene baino ase okoiroka gwonsi, tari abwo boka abare abaya gose abororo, korende na abwo bare abatindi boigo." 
1Peter2:19 Naki aya namaya mono omonto kararemererie ogoichana ase okoinyora Nyasae, na kobogoria ogochandwa gotari kwa boronge." 
1Peter2:20 Naki ngotogigwa ki more nakwo komoraremererie ase ogoakwa chinkundi ekero mogokora ebibe? Korende komoraremererie ogochandwa ekero mogokora amaya, oko nakwo ogwancherwa ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
1Peter2:21 Ase ayio naro mwarangereretigwe, ekiagera Kristo nere nigo achandetwe ase engencho yaino, obatigeire ekiorokererio, erinde mobwatie chimbaratero chiaye." 
1Peter2:22 Ere takorete ebibe, gose obong’ainereria tibwaruete ase omonwa oye." 
1Peter2:23 Ere ekero arenge koramwa tairaneretie okoramwa okwo, ekero arenge gochandwa tatogonyete, korende akebeka asare ere oyokogamba ase oboronge." 
1Peter2:24 Ere omonyene akabogoria ebibe biaito ase omobere oye igoro ase omote, erinde intwe tokwe korwa ase amang’ana ’ebibe, tobe moyo ase amang’ana ’oboronge. Ase amaote aye inwe mwagwenigwe." 
1Peter2:25 Naki nigo mware buna ching’ondi chiasirire, korende bono mwairanire ase Omorisia na Omorendi bw’emioyo yaino." 
1Peter3:1 Naboigo, inwe abakungu, moigwere abasacha baino, erinde onye abande bare aroro, abategeneti ring’ana, bang’uswe ase orogendo rw’abakungu babo, batatebiri ring’ana," 
1Peter3:2 kobakorora orogendo rwaino oruya rore nokoiroka. 
1Peter3:3 Ogwechabera kwaino tikoba ogwa isiko ase okomina chitukia, na kobeka ebigera bie chitahabu, gose chianga chinterere," 
1Peter3:4 korende kobe ogw’enkoro y’omonto o ime otari kororekana, ogwechabera okwo gotari gosareka, ase omoika bw’obwororo na obokanyeku. Oko nakwo kore kwe rigori rinene ase obosio bwa Nyasae." 
1Peter3:5 Naki oko nakwo kware ogwechabera kw’abakungu abachenu ba kare, abamosemeretie Nyasae, abwo baigwerete abasacha babo," 
1Peter3:6 buna Sara aigwerete Ibrahimu, akamoroka omonene. Na inwe bono mwabeire abana baye komorakore amaya, gose timokwoboigwa ase kogoswa konde gwonsi." 
1Peter3:7 Naboigo nainwe abasacha, momenye nabakungu baino ase chisemi. Moe omokungu ogosika buna oyo otari ne chinguru, ekiagera nigo more abanyamwando amo ase okonyora obuya obokorenta obogima. Erio ogosaba kwaino tigotangwa." 
1Peter3:8 Ring’ana ri’omoerio neri: Mobe nomoyo oyomo, mobogoreranie, mwanchane buna abamino, mororerane amabeebe, mobe nomoyo bw’obokanyeku." 
1Peter3:9 Timoakanana amabe ase amabe, gose okorama ase okorama, korende ribaga ri’ayio mobe abamogosesenania, ekiagera ayio naro mwarangererigwe, ng’a monyore omwando bw’ogosesenigwa." 
1Peter3:10 Naki nigo erikire “Oyorigetie gwancha obogima na korora amatuko amaya, tiga atange oromeme rwaye tirokwana amabe, na ebikoba biaye tibikwana obong’ainereria." 
1Peter3:11 Tiga atige amabe, akore amaya, arigie omorembe na koyotunyana mono." 
1Peter3:12 Naki amaiso ’Omonene nigo arigereretie abanyene oboronge, na amato aye nigo akoigwa ogosaba kwabo. Korende obosio bw’Omonene nigo bore igoro ase abwo bagokora amabe.”" 
1Peter3:13 Ning’o orabakorere amabe, komorabe nomokia ase ayare amaya?" 
1Peter3:14 Korende onye mogochandwa ase engencho y’oboronge, more negesio. Timoiroka okoirokia kwabo, gose timoichana." 
1Peter3:15 Tiga Omonene Kristo acheneke ase chinkoro chiaino ime. Botambe mobe ang’e koiraneria kera omonto oyokobaboria amang’ana ’ogosemeria okore ime yaino, korende kora ayio ase obwororo na ase okoiroka." 
1Peter3:16 Na inwe renda chinkoro chiaino tichibagambia, erinde ekero mogokwanwa bobe, abwo bakobarama ase orogendo rwaino oruya ase Kristo, basookigwe." 
1Peter3:17 Naki mbuya gochandwa ase ogokora amaya kobua gochandwa ase ogokora amabe, onye gokoba ogwancha kwa Nyasae." 
1Peter3:18 Ekiagera Kristo nere agakwa ara rimo ase engencho y’ebibe. Ere oyorenge omonyene oboronge agachandwa ase engencho y’abatari abaronge, erinde atorente ase Nyasae. Omobere oye ogaitwa, korende omoika oye ogakorwa koba moyo." 
1Peter3:19 Ase omoika oyo agachiera emeika eria yarenge ase obosibwa, akayeranderia." 
1Peter3:20 Emeika eyio ney’abwo bataigwerete agwo kare, ekero Nyasae aganyete ase oboremereria ase amatuko aria Nuhu are koroisia obwato. Ime ase abwo abanto abake, engencho yaye abanto batano na batato, batooregete goetera ase amache." 
1Peter3:21 Omogwekano bw’amang’ana aya nebatiso, eyekobatooria inwe bono, tari ase okobeka aare riko ri’omobere, korende ase okoiraneria Nyasae enkoro etari kobagambia, goetera ase okobokigwa kwa Yeso Kristo," 
1Peter3:22 oyosoete igoro, na bono nao are ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae. Abamalaika, na okobua, ne chinguru nigo bibekire inse yaye." 
1Peter4:1 Gaki, ekiagera Kristo achandetwe ase omobere, nainwe boigo eboyie ebirwanero bi’ebirengererio ebio ebio, ekiagera ere oyochandetwe ase omobere bweatananire korwa ase ebibe." 
1Peter4:2 Korwa bono ase amatuko aya atigarete more moyo, timogenderera koreng’ana nokogania okobe kwa mwanyabanto, korende koreng’ana nogwancha kwa Nyasae." 
1Peter4:3 Naki engaki yaino eye yaetire yaisanire ase ogokora aya abanto b’Ebisaku banchete gokora. Igo mwagendererete ase obonyaka, na okogania okobe, na okonywa, na emeyega y’okoria bobe na gotinda, na mware gosasima emegwekano, ogosasima gotarenge okoronge." 
1Peter4:4 Ase ayio, barabwo nigo bakorora ng’a nay’ogokumia, ekiagera inwe motari koayerera amo nabarabwo gochia ase obonyaka botari nekerengo, na nigo bakobarama." 
1Peter4:5 Korende barabwo nigo barache korua omobaro asare ere oyore ang’e kogambia abare moyo na abakure. 
1Peter4:6 Nakio kiagerete abakure bakaranderigwa enchili, erinde bagambigwe ase omobere koreng’ana buna mwanyabanto bakogambigwa, na babe moyo ase omoika, koreng’ana buna Nyasae are moyo." 
1Peter4:7 Bono omoerio bw’amang’ana onsi oikire ang’e. Ase ayio, mobe nobong’aini na kwerita ase ogosaba." 
1Peter4:8 Kobua ase onsi mobe nomokia ase ogwanchana, ekiagera obwanchani nigo bogotuba obonge bw’ebibe." 
1Peter4:9 Mobe abamokoroisania inwe ase inwe motari kwemurungania. 
1Peter4:10 Mokorerane inwe ase inwe, kera oyomo nekeegwa eke anyorete, buna abarendi abaya b’obuya bwa Nyasae, obore ne chingencho chinyinge." 
1Peter4:11 Omonto karakwane, tiga akwane amang’ana a Nyasae. Omonto karabe omokoreri, tiga akorere ne chinguru echio Nyasae amoeire, erinde Nyasae atogigwe ase amang’ana onsi goetera ase Yeso Kristo. Asare ere obonene na okobua kare na kare. Amina." 
1Peter4:12 Abanchani, timokumia ase obokong’u obore buna omorero, obwo bwabaikeire ase okobateema, buna namang’ana amageni abanyorire." 
1Peter4:13 Korende ekiagera mwabwatanire nemechando ya Kristo, goka, erinde ase okomaanorwa kw’obonene bwaye monyare kogoka boigo, na gochenga." 
1Peter4:14 Komorachaywe ase engencho y’erieta ria Kristo, imosesenirie ekiagera Omoika bw’obonene noyo o Nyasae nigo oikaransete igoro yaino." 
1Peter4:15 Korende onde omo oino taba omoiti, gose omoibi, gose omokori amabe, gose oyokwerosia ase amang’ana ’abanto bande, erinde abaise gochandwa." 
1Peter4:16 Korende onye omonto ogochandwa ekiagera are Omokristo tarora obosooku, korende atogie Nyasae ase erieta eri." 
1Peter4:17 Naki engaki yaikire ekina gechakere ase enyomba ya Nyasae na gakerachake asetore, omoerio obo abwo bataigwereti enchili ya Nyasae, naki orabe?" 
1Peter4:18 Na, buna erikire, “Onye ekoba aakong’u omonyene oboronge gotooreka, oria otamoirogeti Nyasae na omonyene ebibe, naki rende kerabe asare?”" 
1Peter4:19 Ase ayio, abwo bagochandwa koreng’ana nogwancha kwa Nyasae, tiga bakore amaya na babeke emioyo yabo asare ere oyore Omotongi omwegenwa." 
1Peter5:1 Nasoroire abagaaka abare ase egati yaino, inche buna omogaaka omogisangio obo, na kirori bw’ogochandwa gwa Kristo, na omobwatani bw’obonene boria borache koorokigwa:" 
1Peter5:2 Risia riicho ria Nyasae eriabekirwe asemore, tari ase okobetererigwa korende ase ogwancha buna Nyasae anchete, tari ase okonyora kw’oborianania, korende ase omoyo bw’okwerwa." 
1Peter5:3 Timoba abagwekora abanene igoro ase abwo mwaeirwe, korende mobe ekiorokererio ekiya ase riicho riria." 
1Peter5:4 Na Omorisia omonene karaoroke namonyore egutwa y’obonene etari gosareka. 
1Peter5:5 Naboigo nainwe abamore abake, mwebeke inse ase abagaaka. Na inwe mwensi eboyie oboitongo buna orokini, monyare gokorerana, ekiagera nigo erikire, “Nyasae nigo akwanga abare abaenenu, korende abare abaitongo nigo akobaa obuya.”" 
1Peter5:6 Ase ayio, ekeyie inse y’okoboko kwa Nyasae okore nokobua, erinde ere abaimokererie igoro ase ekero kiaye." 
1Peter5:7 Motweke ogwechanda kwaino gwonsi, ekiagera ere nigo agwechanda mono ase engencho yaino." 
1Peter5:8 Mobe aberiti na korenda! Naki omosoeri oino Saitani nigo agoetanana na koruma buna endo ekoruma, ekorigia omonto erie." 
1Peter5:9 Mwange ere, na motenene bokong’u ase okwegena, momanye ng’a ogochandwa okwo okwo gwaikeranigwe ase abamino abare ase ense engima." 
1Peter5:10 Na Nyasae bw’obuya bwonsi, oyo obarangeirie mosoe ase obonene bwaye bwa kare na kare ase Kristo, komwaikire gochandwa ase ekero egeke, ere omonyene nabaroisie, na abakong’ie, ababeke chinguru na kobabeka ase oboroso obuya." 
1Peter5:11 Okobua nokwaye goika kare na kare. Amina 
1Peter5:12 Ase okoboko gwa Silivano, oyominto omwegenwa buna ndoche, nabarikeire ase amang’ana amake, kobasorora na koorokia ng’a obo nabwo obuya bw’ekeene bwa Nyasae. Tenena bokong’u ase obwo." 
1Peter5:13 Ekanisa ya Babeli eyachorirwe amo nainwe yabakwanirie. Nonya Mariko, omwana one, obakwanirie." 
1Peter5:14 Kwanania ase okonyunyuntana ase obwanchani. Omorembe obe amo nainwe mwensi, abamore ase Kristo Yeso." 
2Peter1:1 Inche Simion Petero, omosomba na omotomwa o Yeso Kristo, nkobarikera nde inwe abamwanyorire okwegena okomo naintwe, okore kwe rigori rinene, goetera ase oboronge bwa Nyasae na Omotooria oito Yeso Kristo." 
2Peter1:2 Obuya na omorembe bimenteke asemore ase okomomanya Nyasae na Yeso, Omonene oito." 
2Peter1:3 Okobua kw’obonyasae bwaye gwatoeire ebinto bionsi ebire nobogima na ebie chingencho chi’obonyasae ase okomomanya ere oyotorangeretie ase obonene bwaye obonyene, na okobua kwaye." 
2Peter1:4 Ase ebinto ebio otoeire chiira chinene mono, echie rigori rinene, erinde ase echio monyare koba ababwatani be chingencho chia Nyasae, na gotama ogosaria gw’okogania okobe kore ase ense eye." 
2Peter1:5 Naki ase engencho eyio eyio kora omokia mono, erinde ase okwegena kwaino momente obuya, na ase obuya chisemi," 
2Peter1:6 na ase chisemi obweriti, na ase obweriti oboremereria, na ase oboremereria chingencho chi’obonyasae," 
2Peter1:7 na ase chingencho chi’obonyasae obwanchani bw’obomino, na ase obwanchani bw’obomino mwanche bonsi." 
2Peter1:8 Naki amang’ana aya karabe ime yaino na komenteka, nabakore timoba aboro gose abanto motari nokwama, ase okomomanya Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Naki ere oyotari namang’ana ayio nomouko, takonyara korora amang’ana are bosio, na bwebire ogosibigwa kw’ebibe biaye bia kare." 
2Peter1:10 Ase ayio, abaminto, kora omokia kobua gokora okorangerigwa kwaino na ogochorwa kwaino kobe goteneine bokong’u, naki komorakore ayio, timokogwa nonya ng’ake." 
2Peter1:11 Naki nigo moraegwe ribaga rinene mono ri’ogosoa ase oboruoti bwa kare na kare bw’Omonene na Omotooria oito Yeso Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Ase ayio, tinkomocha kobainyoria amang’ana ayio botambe, nonya moyamanyete na mwabekirwe chinguru ase ekeene ekio mwanyorire." 
2Peter1:13 Inche narorire ng’a mboronge kobatura ase okobainyoria ayio ekero imenyete ase obomenyo obo bw’omobere. 
2Peter1:14 Nimanyete ng’a amatuko ng’ang’e are ndarue ase obomenyo obo. Aya naro Omonene oito Yeso Kristo anyorogetie. 
2Peter1:15 Na inche ninkore omokia ng’a botambe nyuma y’ogokwa kwane monyare koinyora amang’ana aya. 
2Peter1:16 Naki titokobwatia emegano yarengereretigwe ne chisemi chi’obong’ainereria, ekero twabamanyetie okobua kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo na ogocha kwaye, korende intwe abanyene nigo twarenge abarori b’obonene bwaye." 
2Peter1:17 Naki ere nigo anyorete ogosikwa na obonene korwa ase Nyasae Tata, na eriogi riachete asare korwa ase obonene bw’Obonene, rigoteba, “Oyo nere Omwana one omwanchwa, ngokirie nere.”" 
2Peter1:18 Na eriogi eri nario twaigwete rikorwa igoro, ekero twarenge amo nere ase egetunwa egechenu." 
2Peter1:19 Intwe ntore ne ring’ana riria ri’obobani riteneine bokong’u kobua, na inwe inamokore buya komorategerere na koribwata buna etaya ekomoreka aase omosunte ore, goika ekero bogokia, na eng’enang’eni ya mambia eoroke ase chinkoro chiaino ime." 
2Peter1:20 Ritang’ani momanye ring’ana eri, ng’a obobani bonde tibori ime ase amariko bwaorogetigwe koreng’ana buna omonto anchete omonyene," 
2Peter1:21 ekiagera obobani tibwarentetwe engaki ende yonsi ase ogwancha kwa mwanyabanto, korende abanto abachenu ba Nyasae nigo baare gokwana batang’anire n’Omoika Omochenu." 
2Peter2:1 Korende ababani b’oborimo mbaorogete ase egati y’abanto, buna aborokia b’oborimo barache kooroka ase egati yaino. Abwo barache gosoyia amorokererio ’ogosareka bobisi, na bagokana Omonene oyo obagorete, bakwerentera ogosareka gotari gotebana." 
2Peter2:2 Abange nabatunyane ogokora kwabo kw’obonyaka, na ase engencho y’abwo enchera y’ekeene neramwe." 
2Peter2:3 Ase obwegimeria na amang’ana ’obong’ainereria nabenyorere abanyene ebitoki korwa asemore. Korende ekina kiabo, egiachikire korwa kare, tikegotebana, gose ogosira kwabo tigokorara." 
2Peter2:4 Naki Nyasae tabarorerete amabera abamalaika baria bakorete ebibe, korende akabaruta ase eoromomo y’omosunte aase barendire goika ekina geche." 
2Peter2:5 Tabarorerete amabera abanto b’ense eria ya kare, korende akarenda Nuhu, oyorenge omoraria bw’oboronge, amo nabanto bande batano na babere, ekere arentete etoigo igoro ase ense y’abanto abatamoirogete Nyasae." 
2Peter2:6 Ase ogosamba emechie eria yare korokwa Sodomu na Gomora ekaba ribu, akayegambia esarigwe, akayekora ekaba ekiorokererio ki’ogokurera abanto abatarengereretie komoiroka Nyasae." 
2Peter2:7 Korende agatooria Loti, omonyene oboronge, oyorenge goichanigwa ase orogendo rw’obonyaka rwa baria abasaria amachiko." 
2Peter2:8 Omonto oyo omonyene oboronge, oyomenyete ase egati yabo, nigo arenge gwechanda ase omoyo oye omoronge rituko ase rituko ase aya onsi arenge korora na koigwa ase ogokora kwabo kw’ogosaria amachiko." 
2Peter2:9 Omonene nanyare kobatooria abwo bamoirogete korwa ase ogoteemwa, na kogacha abatari noboronge inse y’egesusuro goika rituko ri’ekina," 
2Peter2:10 na kobua mono baria bakobwatia okogania okobe kw’omobere na gochaya okobua. Barabwo nigo bare abeanchi, bare noboremu, na tibari koiguswa ase okorama abwo b’obonene." 
2Peter2:11 Abamalaika, nonya bare abanene kobua ase chinguru na okobua, tibakorenta ekina gi’okorama barabwo ase obosio bw’Omonene." 
2Peter2:12 Korende abanto abwo nigo banga buna ching’iti chiatongetwe chitari nobong’aini, chiaiboretwe ase okobwatwa na gosirigwa. Barabwo nigo bakorama ase amang’ana batamanyeti. Ase ayio inabasirigwe ase ogosirigwa kwabo abanyene." 
2Peter2:13 Bakonyorwa nobobe buna eng’eria y’ogokora okobe. Barabwo nigo bagokaga ng’a ogotinda na okwegokia ekero kia mobaso nobwansu. Babeire ebimoa bi’obosooku na amamocho, bakwegokia ase obong’ainereria bwabo kobagokora emeyega amo nainwe." 
2Peter2:14 Amaiso abo nigo aichire nobotomani, na tibagotiga gokora ebibe. Nigo bakogenka abare nemioyo etari ne chinguru, na bare ne chinkoro chianarigwe ase obwegimeria. Barabwo nigo bare abanto baragereretigwe." 
2Peter2:15 Basirire ekiagera batigire enchera erambogete na kobwatia enchera ya Baalamu, mosinto o Beori, oyobwanchete eng’eria y’ogokora okobe." 
2Peter2:16 Ere nigo atogonyeretwe ase ogosaria kwaye omonyene, ekero etigere etari gokwana egakwana ase eriogi ria mwanyabanto, egatanga obobarimo bw’omobani oria." 
2Peter2:17 Abanto aba nechinsoko chitari namache na amare akoirwa nomwaga, bagacheirwe obomwamu bw’omosunte." 
2Peter2:18 Nigo bagokwana amang’ana ’oboenenu atari nengencho, na ase okogania okobe kw’omobere na obonyaka bakogenka abwo bachakire gotama baria bagendererete gochia gosira." 
2Peter2:19 Bakobariera eira y’obosibore, korende barabwo abanyene nigo bare abasomba b’ogosareka. Naki omonto kabuirwe nomonto onde nigo akoba omosomba bw’omonto oria." 
2Peter2:20 Naki baria baikire gotama ogotacheneka gw’ense ase okomomanya Omonene na Omotooria oito Yeso Kristo, korende kobakobwatwa naende na kobugwa nero, okoba kwabo kw’omoerio nkobe okobe kobua koria kwe ritang’ani." 
2Peter2:21 Naki anga nigo yabete buya onye tibamanyete enchera y’oboronge, kobua koyemanya naende koirana nyuma korwa ase ogochika ogochenu okwo baetwe." 
2Peter2:22 Barabwo omoreng’anio oria bw’ekeene obaikeire, oria ogoteba, “Esese yairaneire amaroki aye enyene,” na “Embeche eyasibigwe ekwegara‐garia ase etintira ime.”" 
2Peter3:1 Abanchani, rirube eri neria kabere nabarikeire inwe. Ase onsi abere nabokirie ebirengererio biaino ebiya ase okobainyoria," 
2Peter3:2 monyare koinyora amang’ana aria akwanetwe kare nababani abachenu, na ogochika oko Omonene na Omotooria abarenterete goetera ase abatomwa baino." 
2Peter3:3 Ritang’ani momanye ring’ana eri, ng’a ase amatuko ’omoerio abanto abanyacheche b’ogosekereria inabache, baria bagotunyana okogania kwabo abanyene," 
2Peter3:4 bagoteba, “Ng’ai bore oboikeranu bw’eira eria y’ogocha kwaye? Naki korwa agwo chisokoro chiaito chiararete ebinto bionsi nabo bigendererete engencho eyio eyio, buna biarenge korwa omochakano bw’ogotongwa.”" 
2Peter3:5 Naki nigo bamiametie amaiso abo tibarora ng’a igoro nao yarenge korwa kare, na ense egatongwa korwa ase amache, na goetera ase amache, ase chinguru chie ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
2Peter3:6 Ase ayio, ense eria y’ekero keria egasira ase etoigo ime." 
2Peter3:7 Korende igoro ya bono amo na ense eye biagacheirwe omorero ase ring’ana erio erio, birendwe goika rituko ri’ogosirigwa kw’abanto abatamoirogeti Nyasae." 
2Peter3:8 Korende abanchani, timweba ring’ana eri, ng’a ase Omonene rituko erimo nigo rire buna emiaka elifu, na emiaka elifu buna rituko erimo." 
2Peter3:9 Omonene tagotebana goikerania, eira yaye, buna abande bakagete ng’a otebanire, korende nigo aremereretie ase engencho yaino, tancheti monto onde bwensi asire, korende bonsi baikere okoonchoka." 
2Peter3:10 Korende rituko ri’Omonene nigo rirache buna omoibi agocha. Ase rituko erio igoro neruo negeturi ekenene, na ebitongwa bia igoro inabisire nomorero ogotetenya, na ense na ebinto ebire aroro inabiyie." 
2Peter3:11 Naboigo, ekiagera ebinto ebi bionsi nabisire, nebagwenerete inwe mobe abanto b’orogendo orochenu na abe chingencho chi’obonyasae." 
2Peter3:12 Nebagwenerete gotengera na koayereria rituko ria Nyasae riche bwango. Ase rituko riria igoro nesirigwe na koyia, na ebitongwa bia igoro inabinyititoke nomorero omonene." 
2Peter3:13 Korende buna atorierete eira ntotengerete igoro enyia na ense enyia, ase ebio oboronge mboreo ime yabo." 
2Peter3:14 Ase ayio abanchani, ekiagera motengerete ebio, kora omokia, erio moche kororekana asare more nomorembe, motari na kemoa gose na komocha." 
2Peter3:15 Na bara okoremereria kw’Omonene oito ng’a nogotooreka. Naboigo noyominto omwanchwa, Paulo, abarikerete koreng’ana nobong’aini aetwe." 
2Peter3:16 Igoro y’amang’ana ayio arikire ase amarube aye onsi. Imeo nare amang’ana ande ayare amakong’u koyamanya, ayio abanto batorokereretigwe buya na batateneini bokong’u bakoonchorana, buna bakoonchorana amariko ande, na igo bakwerentera ogosira." 
2Peter3:17 Gaki, abanchani, komwatang’anire komanya aya, erende timobaisa gotantanigwa nogosira kw’abwo bagosaria amachiko, na igo mobaise kogwa korwa ase ogwetenenera kwaino." 
2Peter3:18 Korende mokine ase obuya na ase okomomanya Omonene na Omotooria oito Yeso Kristo. Obonene nobwaye bono na goika kare na kare. Amina. 
1John1:1 Eri riarengeo korwa omochakano, eri twaigwete, eri twaroche namaiso aito, eri twarigereretie, nonya namaboko aito akaribwata, eri nario Ring’ana ri’obogima togokwana." 
1John1:1 Eri riarengeo korwa omochakano, eri twaigwete, eri twaroche namaiso aito, eri twarigereretie, nonya namaboko aito akaribwata, eri nario Ring’ana ri’obogima togokwana." 
1John1:2 Obogima obwo bokaorokigwa, na intwe tokaborora na kobobera kirori; na intwe igo tokabarareria inwe obogima obwo bwa kare na kare, obwo bwarenge ase Tata na koorokigwa asetore." 
1John1:2 Obogima obwo bokaorokigwa, na intwe tokaborora na kobobera kirori; na intwe igo tokabarareria inwe obogima obwo bwa kare na kare, obwo bwarenge ase Tata na koorokigwa asetore." 
1John1:3 Eri twarorire na koigwa, eri naboigo tokobarareria inwe, erinde nainwe monyare kobwatana naintwe. Okobwatana gwaito nigo kore amo na Tata na Omwana oye Yeso Kristo." 
1John1:3 Eri twarorire na koigwa, eri naboigo tokobarareria inwe, erinde nainwe monyare kobwatana naintwe. Okobwatana gwaito nigo kore amo na Tata na Omwana oye Yeso Kristo." 
1John1:4 Nkobarikera tore aya, erinde omogoko oito oikeranigwe." 
1John1:4 Nkobarikera tore aya, erinde omogoko oito oikeranigwe." 
1John1:5 Aya naro amang’ana twaigwete korwa asare, na tokobarareria inwe, ng’a Nyasae nomobaso, gose mosunte onde bwonsi tori ime asare." 
1John1:5 Aya naro amang’ana twaigwete korwa asare, na tokobarareria inwe, ng’a Nyasae nomobaso, gose mosunte onde bwonsi tori ime asare." 
1John1:6 Onye togoteba ng’a twabwatanire nere, naende togendererete ase omosunte, igo twatebire oborimo, gose ayare ay’ekeene titori koyakora." 
1John1:6 Onye togoteba ng’a twabwatanire nere, naende togendererete ase omosunte, igo twatebire oborimo, gose ayare ay’ekeene titori koyakora." 
1John1:7 Korende onye tokogenda ase omobaso, buna ere are ase omobaso, rirorio twabwatanire intwe ase intwe, na amanyinga a Yeso, Omwana oye, nigo agotosibia ebibe biaito bionsi." 
1John1:7 Korende onye tokogenda ase omobaso, buna ere are ase omobaso, rirorio twabwatanire intwe ase intwe, na amanyinga a Yeso, Omwana oye, nigo agotosibia ebibe biaito bionsi."
