Jude1:1 Inche Yuda, omosomba o Yeso Kristo, oyomwabo Yakobo, nkobarikera nde inwe abamwarangerigwe, abamwanchire na Nyasae Tata, na morendire na Yeso Kristo." 
Jude1:2 Amabera, na omorembe, na obwanchani, bimenteke asemore." 
Jude1:3 Abanchani, ekero narenge gokora omokia mono kobarikera inwe amang’ana ’ogotooreka gwaito, okwo tosangete nainwe, nkarora ng’a negwenerete mbarikere na kobasorora morwanerere okwegena okwo abachenu baetwe ara rimo." 
Jude1:4 Naki mbare abanto besoirie bobisi, abwo barikeretwe kare okogambigwa oko, abanto batari ne chingencho chi’obonyasae. Barabwo nigo bakoonchorana obuya bwa Nyasae oito ase okobiserera ogokora kwabo kw’obonyaka, naende bagokana Omonene oito ore bweka, oyore Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Nonya momanyete amang’ana aya onsi ninganetie kobainyoria buna Omonene atooretie abanto korwa ase ense ya Misiri, na nyuma y’ayio agasiria abwo batamwegenete." 
Jude1:6 Na abamalaika baria batarendete okobua kwabo abanyene, korende bagatiga obomenyo bwabo, barendire nere ase ebisibo bia kare na kare inse y’omosunte omonene goika ekina geche koba ase rituko riria rinene." 
Jude1:7 Naboigo nabanto ba Sodomu na Gomora, na ab’emechie yaetanaine, bakorete obotomani bore engencho eyemo nobw’abwo, bakagenderera gotunyana okogania kw’omobere gotari kwa boronge. Bono nigo babekire koba ekiorokererio ki’ogokurerwa ase okoegwa egesusuro ki’omorero o kare na kare." 
Jude1:8 Naboigo nabwo abanyandoto bakobeka emebere yabo riko bagochaya okobua, na korama abwo b’obonene." 
Jude1:9 Korende Mikaeli, omomalaika omonene, ekero riomanete na Saitani na koamererania nere igoro y’omobere o Musa, tarenge nomoyo bw’okomosoera ase amang’ana amabe, korende akamotebia, “Omonene nagotogonyere.”" 
Jude1:10 Korende abanto aba nigo bakorama ase amang’ana onsi batamanyeti, na ase amang’ana bamanyete botambe koreng’ana buna ching’iti chitari nobong’aini chimanyete; ase aro besaria abanyene." 
Jude1:11 Obobe nobwabo, ekiagera bagendererete ase enchera ya Kaini, na gwetuguta ase ogosaria kwa Baalamu ase engencho y’okonyora eng’eria, na barabwo basirire ase ogotaigwera gwa Kora." 
Jude1:12 Abanto aba nebitare bikogocha ase emeyega yaino y’obwanchani, kobagokora emeyega amo nainwe batari nokoiroka, bakwerisia barabwo abanyene. Abanto aba namare atari nembura akoirwa nembeo, na emete yaarorokire amato etari namatunda, yakure ara kabere, na gosimorwa kegima." 
Jude1:13 Naende barabwo nemerindo y’enyancha etagotangeka, ekoorokia obosooku bwaye enyene buna riuro, ne ching’enang’eni chigoetanana na gosira, na bagacheire obomwamu bw’omosunte goika kare na kare." 
Jude1:14 Na Enoku, omonto o gatano na kabere korwa ase Adamu, nakwanete amang’ana ’obobani igoro y’abwo, ogoteba, “Rigereria, Omonene nache nabachenu baye chilifu ne chilifu," 
Jude1:15 erinde agambie abanto bonsi ekina na aenekie abwo bonsi batare ne chingencho chi’obonyasae ase engencho y’emeremo yabo yonsi etare ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, eye baare gokora ase ogotaba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, na ase engencho y’amang’ana amakong’u abwo abanyene ebibe, abatare ne chingencho chi’obonyasae, baare gokwana igoro yaye.”" 
Jude1:16 Abanto aba nigo bare abemurungania na abereri, kobagotunyana okogania kwabo okobe, na emenwa yabo ekwana amang’ana ’oboenenu amanene mono, bagotogia abanto ase engencho y’okwenyorera." 
Jude1:17 Korende inwe abanchani, moinyore amang’ana aria akwanetwe nabatomwa b’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo." 
Jude1:18 Naki igo babatebetie, “Ase engaki y’omoerio nababeo abanto abasekereria, abagotunyana okogania kwabo okobe kw’ogotaba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae.”" 
Jude1:19 Abanto abwo nabwo bakorenta ogwatananeka, bare abanto b’ense eye yoka, korende Omoika tibabwati." 
Jude1:20 Korende inwe, abanchani, mweagache ase okwegena kwaino kore ogochenu mono, na gosaba ase Omoika Omochenu." 
Jude1:21 Mwerende ase obwanchani bwa Nyasae, mobe moganyete amabera ’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo goika monyore obogima bwa kare na kare." 
Jude1:22 Mobarorere amabera abwo bagotiting’ara. 
Jude1:23 Korende motoorie abande ase okobataboria korwa ase omorero. Abande mobarorere amabera mobe nokoiroka, mogeche nonya neanga eria ebekire riko ri’okogania okobe kw’omobere." 
Jude1:24 Bono asare ere oyoranyare kobarenda inwe timotererigwa, na kobatenenia ase obonene bwaye, motari na komocha, ase omogoko omonene," 
Jude1:25 ere oyore Nyasae bweka, Omotooria oito goetera ase Yeso Kristo, Omonene oito, asare ere ogotogigwa, na obonene, na obonguru, na okobua, korwa kare na kare, na bono, na goika kare na kare. Amina." 
Revelation1:1 Oko nokomaanoka kwa Yeso Kristo oko Nyasae amoete, erinde orokie abasomba baye amang’ana agwenerete gocha gokoreka bwango. Ase ogotoma omomalaika oye akorokia omosomba oye Yohana," 
Revelation1:2 oyorenge kirori ase ring’ana ria Nyasae na ase oborori bwa Yeso Kristo, ase ogoteba amang’ana onsi ayaroche." 
Revelation1:3 Nasesenirie ere oyogosoma, na abwo bakoigwa amang’ana ’obobani obo, na kobwata ayarikireo, ekiagera engaki ng’ang’e ere." 
Revelation1:4 Inche Yohana nkobarikera nde inwe abanto be chikanisa isano na ibere chi’Asia: Obuya bobe asemore na omorembe bikorwa asare ere oyoreo, na oyorengeo, na oyorache kobao, na korwa ase emeika etano na ebere ere bosio bw’ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene," 
Revelation1:5 na korwa ase Yeso Kristo, oyore kirori omwegenwa, omoiborwa bwe ritang’ani oyobogete korwa ase abakure, omogambi bw’abaruoti b’ense. Asare ere oyotwanchete na agatobooria korwa ase ebibe biaito namanyinga aye ase ogotokwera," 
Revelation1:6 oyotokorete koba ab’oboruoti na abakuani ase Nyasae Ise oye asare ere obonene na okobua goika kare na kare. Amina. 
Revelation1:7 Rigereria, ngocha are namare, na kera eriso narimorore, nonya nabwo bamoitete, na abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bi’ense nabeng’ererie ase engencho yaye. Ee, nabo. Amina." 
Revelation1:8 “Inche n’Alifa na Omega,” Omonene Nyasae otebire, oyoreo, na oyorengeo, na oyorache kobao, oyore Omobui." 
Revelation1:9 Inche Yohana, momura omino, na omobwatani amo nainwe ase emechando, na ase oboruoti, na ase okoremereria amo na Yeso, nigo narenge ase egesinka gekorokwa Patimo, ekiagera nigo narenge koraria ring’ana ria Nyasae na komobera Yeso kirori." 
Revelation1:10 Ase rituko ri’Omonene nigo nabogoretigwe n’Omoika, nkaigwa korwa magega aane eriogi rinene, buna eriogi ri’egetureri," 
Revelation1:11 rigoteba, “Aya orarore oyarike ase ebuku, oyatome ase chikanisa echi isano na ibere echire Efeso, na Sumurina, na Perigamo, na Tiatira, na Saridi, na Filadelfia, na Laodikia.”" 
Revelation1:12 Nkeonchora ndore eriogi riria rigokwana nainche. Ngachia kweonchora nkarora ebibekerero bie chitaya bitano na bibere bie chitahabu," 
Revelation1:13 na gati‐gati y’ebibekerero biria nkarora oyomo onga buna omwana o mwanyabanto, obekeire eanga entambe eigete inse ase ebisanyi bi’amagoro, na bweboeretie orokini rw’etahabu gekuba kiaye." 
Revelation1:14 Omotwe oye na etukia yaye nigo biarenge ebirabu se buna amarionya amarabu, ebirabu se buna amagena ’embura; na amaiso aye nigo arenge buna ekebemberi ki’omorero." 
Revelation1:15 Na amagoro aye nigo arenge buna etaai esenirie koyasibigwe ase eriko ri’omorero, na eriogi riaye buna eriogi ri’amache amange akoeera." 
Revelation1:16 Ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio nigo abwate ching’enang’eni isano na ibere, na ase omonwa oye okaruao omoyio o birende ore nobwoge chinsemo ibere, na obosio bwaye nigo bware kobara buna erioba rikobara ne chinguru chiaye." 
Revelation1:17 Ngachia komorora nkagwa ase amagoro aye, nkaba buna oyokure. Erio akabeka okoboko kwaye gw’okorio igoro asende, agantebia, “Toiroka, inche noyo bwe ritang’ani, na oyo bw’omoerio," 
Revelation1:18 na oyore moyo. Inche konya nakure, na rigereria, nigo inde moyo goika kare na kare, ninde nebigorero bi’amakweri na ebi’aase abakure." 
Revelation1:19 Bono rika amang’ana aya kwarorire, ayareo, na ayarache koba nyuma y’ayio." 
Revelation1:20 Obo nabwo obobisi bwe ching’enang’eni chiria isano na ibere kwarora ase okoboko kwane gw’okorio, na ebibekerero biria bie chitaya bie chitahabu bitano na bibere: Ching’enang’eni chiria isano na ibere nabamalaika be chikanisa isano na ibere, na ebibekerero biria bitano na bibere nechikanisa isano na ibere.”" 
Revelation2:1 “Ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa y’Efeso rika: Amang’ana aya naro agokwana, ere oyobwate ching’enang’eni chiria isano na ibere ase okoboko kwaye gw’okorio, ere oyogotaara gati‐gati ase ebibekerero biria bie chitaya bitano na bibere bie chitahabu." 
Revelation2:2 “Namanyire ogokora kwao, na ogwechanda kwao, na okoremereria kwao. Namanyire ng’a tokonyara koremereria abanto ababe, na ogateema abwo bakweroka abatomwa, ko tibari bo, okabarora ng’a nabanyaborimo." 
Revelation2:3 Naende okaremereria na kwebogoreria amange ase engencho y’erieta riane, na toroseti." 
Revelation2:4 Korende ninde ne ring’ana eri igoro asore: Gwatigire obwanchani bwao bwe ritang’ani. 
Revelation2:5 Gaki, inyora nkorwa ase ki ogwete. Onchoka, okore ogokora kwao kwe ritang’ani! Otakoreti bo, ninchiche asore, ndusie ekebekerero kiao gie chitaya korwa aase aye, otaonchogeti." 
Revelation2:6 Korende ndire ring’ana erimo rire rigiya asore, nario eri: Nogechete ogokora kw’Abanikolaiti, okwo nainche ngechete." 
Revelation2:7 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa. Ere oyorabue nimoe ribaga arie amatunda ’omote bw’obogima, oyio ore ase Paradiso ya Nyasae." 
Revelation2:8 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Sumurina rika: Amang’ana aya naro agokwana, ere oyore bwe ritang’ani na oyo bw’omoerio, oyo konya okure, naende akaba moyo." 
Revelation2:9 “Namanyire emechando yao, na obotaka bwao (korende nomonda ore). Namanyire buna ogokwanwa bobe nabwo bagoteba ng’a n’Abayahudi bare, ko tibari bo, korende barabwo nesinagogi ya Saitani." 
Revelation2:10 Toiroka amang’ana ayio arache kogochanda. Rigereria, Saitani narute abande baino ase echela monyare goteemwa, na inwe namochandwe ase engaki y’amatuko ikomi. Obe omwegenwa goika ogokwa na inche ninkoe egutwa y’obogima." 
Revelation2:11 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa. Ere oyorabue takonyora obororo bw’amakweri a kabere nonya ng’ake." 
Revelation2:12 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Perigamo rika: Amang’ana aya naro agokwana, ere oyore nomoyio o birende ore nobwoge chinsemo ibere." 
Revelation2:13 “Namanyire aase omenyete, nagwo aase ekerogo ki’obonene gia Saitani kere. Aye nobwatete mono erieta riane, na tokaneti okwegena ore nakwo asende, nonya nase amatuko ’Antipa kirori one, omwegenwa one, oyio oiteretwe ase egati yaino agwo aase Saitani amenyete." 
Revelation2:14 Korende ninde namang’ana make igoro asore: Nore nabanto agwo babwatete okworokereria kwa Baalamu, ere oyio bworokereretie Balaki abeke ekegocha ase Abaisraeli, ng’a barie ebinto biare korugwa ebing’wanso ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa, na gokora obotomani." 
Revelation2:15 Naboigo naye nore nabanto babwatete okworokereria kw’Abanikolaiti. 
Revelation2:16 Onchoka rende! Otaonchogeti, ninchiche asore bwango, nkore esegi igoro asebare nomoyio o birende bw’omonwa one." 
Revelation2:17 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa. Ere oyorabue nimoe ensemo ya mana ebisire, naende nimoe rigena rirabu, na ase rigena erio ndirikireo erieta riyia, eritamanywe na monto onde otatiga ere oyo orariegwe." 
Revelation2:18 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Tiatira rika: Amang’ana aya naro Omwana o Nyasae agokwana, ere oyore namaiso agwoka buna ekebemberi ki’omorero, na amagoro aye nigo anga buna etaai esenirie mono." 
Revelation2:19 “Namanyire ogokora kwao, na obwanchani bwao, na obwegenwa bwao, na obokoreri bwao, na okoremereria kwao. Naende namanyire ng’a ogokora kwao kw’omoerio kwabuire koria kwe ritang’ani." 
Revelation2:20 Korende ninde ne ring’ana eri igoro asore: Tibwangeti omokungu oria Yesebeli ere oyokweroka omobani. Ere nigo akworokereria na kong’aina abasomba baane bakore obotomani, na koria ebinto bikoruegwa ase emegwekano y’ogosasimwa." 
Revelation2:21 Inche namoeire ribaga anyare koonchoka, korende tancheti koonchoka na gotiga obotomani bwaye." 
Revelation2:22 Rigereria, nimorute borere arware, na abwo batomanire amo nere banyore emechando emenene, bataonchogeti korwa ase ogokora kwaye." 
Revelation2:23 Inche ning’ite abana baye bakwe. Na abanto be chikanisa chionsi mbamanye ng’a inche nigo nkoriga‐rigia ebirengererio bie chinkoro, na inche nimoe kera oyomo oino koreng’ana nogokora kwaye." 
Revelation2:24 Korende inwe abande abamore Tiatira, inwe mwensi motari nokworokereria okwo, inwe abamotamanyeti eri abande bakoroka obobisi bwa Saitani, nabatebirie ng’a tinkobatweka egurube ende." 
Revelation2:25 Korende eki more nakio kebwate goika nchiche. 
Revelation2:26 Ere oyorabue na gokora ogokora kwane goika omoerio, oyio nimoe okobua igoro y’abanto b’ebisaku," 
Revelation2:27 ere nabagambere nenyimbo y’okobua y’ekioma, na kobaata buna chinyongo." 
Revelation2:28 Nabo buna inche nanyorete korwa ase Tata one. Naende nimoe eng’enang’eni ya mambia. 
Revelation2:29 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa." 
Revelation3:1 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Saridi rika: Amang’ana aya naro agokwana, ere oyobwate emeika eria etano na ebere ya Nyasae, ne ching’enang’eni chiria isano na ibere. “Namanyire ogokora kwao. Nore nerieta ng’a moyo ore, korende nigo okwete." 
Revelation3:2 Obe omorendi, oyabeke chinguru ayatigarete, ayare ang’e gokwa. Naki tindochi ng’a ogokora kwao ngoikeranete ase obosio bwa Nyasae one." 
Revelation3:3 Gaki, inyora buna kwayanyorete, naende buna kwayaigwete; bwata ayio na koonchoka. Onye tokorenda ninchiche asore buna omoibi agocha, na aye tokomanya nonya ng’ake ensa ngocha asore." 
Revelation3:4 Korende nore namarieta amake agwo Saridi, abanto batagindeti chianga chiabo riko, na barabwo nabataare amo nainche bare ne chianga chindabu, ekiagera bagweneire aya." 
Revelation3:5 Ere oyorabue nabekerwe chianga chindabu, na inche tingotinyia erieta riaye korwa ase ebuku y’obogima nonya ng’ake, naende ninyatore erieta riaye ase obosio bwa Tata one, na ase obosio bw’abamalaika baye." 
Revelation3:6 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa." 
Revelation3:7 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Filadelfia rika: Amang’ana aya naro ere oyore omochenu agokwana, ere oyore bw’ekeene, oyore nekeigorero gia Daudi, oyokoigora, naende onde tari oranyare gosieka, nere ogosieka, gose onde tari oranyare koigora." 
Revelation3:8 “Namanyire ogokora kwao. Rora, nakoeire egesieri keigoire ase obosio bwao, gose onde tari oranyare kogesieka. Nigo ore ne chinguru chinke, na aye norendete ring’ana riane, gose tokaneti erieta riane." 
Revelation3:9 Rora, nakoeire abande b’esinagogi ya Saitani, abwo bagoteba ng’a n’Abayahudi bare, ko tibari bo, korende nabanyaborimo. Rora, nimbarente bache batung’ame ase amagoro ao, na bamanye ng’a ningwanchete." 
Revelation3:10 Ekiagera obwatete ring’ana riane ri’oboremereria, inche ninkorende korwa ase engaki y’ogoteemwa eyere ang’e gochera ense yonsi goteema abwo bamenyete ase ense." 
Revelation3:11 Ninchiche bwango. Bwata mono eki ore nakio, erinde monto onde tacha aire egutwa yao." 
Revelation3:12 Ere oyorabue nimobeke abe esiiro ase Hekalu ya Nyasae one, ere tagosoka korwao nonya ng’ake, na inche nindike asare erieta ria Nyasae one, na erieta ri’omochie o Nyasae one, Yerusalemu omoyia, oyogoika korwa igoro, korwa ase Nyasae one, na erieta riane riyia." 
Revelation3:13 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa." 
Revelation3:14 “Na ase omomalaika bw’ekanisa ya Laodikia rika: Amang’ana aya naro oyore Amina agokwana, oyore kirori omwegenwa na oyo bw’ekeene, naende omochakano bw’ebitongwa bia Nyasae." 
Revelation3:15 “Namanyire ogokora kwao, ng’a tori omokendu, gose tori morero. Anga mbuya onye nkwaba omokendu gose morero." 
Revelation3:16 Nabo, ekiagera ore igatwa, otari morero gose omokendu, ningotwe buna amate korwa ase omonwa one." 
Revelation3:17 Naki nigo ogoteba: Inche nomonda inde! Netenenkirie! Tindemeiri kende. Na aye tomanyeti ng’a nigo ore omonto bw’emechando, omonto ogwenerete kororerwa amabeebe, omotaka, na omouko, na ore getirianda." 
Revelation3:18 Ase ayio, ningosemie, ogore korwa asende etahabu yasibigwe ase omorero onyare koba omonda, ne chianga chindabu onyare kweboyia, erinde obosooku bwao bw’okoba getirianda tibobaisa kororekana. Ogore eriogo ri’amaiso okweaka amaiso ao, onyare korora." 
Revelation3:19 Inche nigo nkobaa egesusuro bonsi abanyanchete, na kobagambera; gaki kabe nomokia na koonchoka." 
Revelation3:20 Rigereria, ninteneine gesieri gotura; omonto karaigwe eriogi riane na koigora egesieri, ninsoe asare, nindagere amo nere, na ere amo nainche." 
Revelation3:21 Ere oyorabue, nimoe ribaga aikaranse amo nainche ase ekerogo kiane ki’obonene, buna nainche nabuete, ngaikaransa amo na Tata one ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene." 
Revelation3:22 Ere oyore namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe ring’ana eri Omoika ogotebia chikanisa.”" 
Revelation4:1 Erio nyuma y’ayio nkarigereria, nkarora egesieri keigoire igoro. Na eriogi eri naigwete ritang’ani rigakwana nainche buna eriogi ri’egetureri, rikobora, “Tiira gocha aa, inche nkworokie amang’ana agwenerete gokoreka nyuma y’ayio.”" 
Revelation4:2 Erio kegima, kambogoirie n’Omoika, nkarora ekerogo ki’obonene kebekire igoro, na oyomo oikaransete ase ekerogo keria." 
Revelation4:3 Ere oyoikaranseteo nigo agwekaine rigena rie rigori ria yasipi na ria saridio, na ekerogo keria ki’obonene nigo giaetananire nomokubinyongo bw’embura, okororekana buna rigena ria sumaridi." 
Revelation4:4 Ekerogo keria ki’obonene nigo giaetananire nebirogo emerongo ebere na bine bi’obonene, na ase ebirogo biria mbarengeo abagaaka emerongo ebere na bane baikaransete, babekeire chianga chindabu. Ase emetwe yabo mbarenge ne chigutwa chie chitahabu." 
Revelation4:5 Na korwa ase ekerogo keria ki’obonene bikaruao okomesa na okogukura, na ogoaka gw’enkoba. Bosio bw’ekerogo keria ki’obonene chitaya isano na ibere chiare gwoka, na chirochio nemeika etano na ebere ya Nyasae." 
Revelation4:6 Na bosio bw’ekerogo keria ki’obonene nigo arenge aase buna enyancha egwekaine ekerore gekomeka‐meka. Agwo gati‐gati goetanana ekerogo keria ki’obonene nchiarengeo ching’iti inye chire moyo, chiichire amaiso bosio na nyuma." 
Revelation4:7 Eng’iti ye ritang’ani ere moyo nigo yagwekaine endo, na eya kabere nigo yagwekaine emori, na eya gatato nigo yabwate obosio buna obw’omonto, na eya kane nigo yagwekaine ensoti ekoiruruka." 
Revelation4:8 Ne ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo, kera eyemo niyo yarenge ne chimbaba isano nemo, naende chiichire amaiso ase chinsemo chionsi, ime na isiko. Na chirochio tichiri gotimoka mobaso gose botuko goteba, “Omochenu, Omochenu, Omochenu, Omonene Nyasae Omobui, oyorengeo, na oyoreo, na oyorache kobao!”" 
Revelation4:9 Na engaki ende yonsi ching’iti chiria chire moyo chikomotogia ere oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, na komoa ogosika, na komoakera ng’a mbuya mono, ere oyore moyo goika kare na kare," 
Revelation4:10 abagaaka baria emerongo ebere na bane bagotung’ama ase obosio bwaye oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, na komosasima ere oyore moyo goika kare na kare. Barabwo nigo bakoruta chigutwa chiabo bosio bw’ekerogo keria ki’obonene, bagoteba," 
Revelation4:11 “Aye Omonene Nyasae oito, kwagweneire konyora obonene, na ogosikwa, na okobua, ekiagera aye naye gwatongete ebinto bionsi; na ekiagera ase ogwancha kwao nigo biabete aroro, na bigatongwa.”" 
Revelation5:1 Erio nkarora ase okoboko gw’okorio kw’oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene ebuku erikire ime na isiko, yabekirwe ebimanyererio bitano na bibere." 
Revelation5:2 Naende nkarora omomalaika bwe chinguru okoraria neriogi rinene, ogoteba, “Ning’o ogwenerete koigora ebuku, na gosansora ebimanyererio biaye?”" 
Revelation5:3 Na onde tarenge igoro, gose ase ense, gose inse y’ense oyogwenerete koigora ebuku, gose koyerigereria." 
Revelation5:4 Na inche nkarera mono, ekiagera onde tarorekanete ogwenerete koigora ebuku eria, na koyerigereria." 
Revelation5:5 Na oyomo bw’abagaaka baria agantebia, “Torera, rora Endo bw’egesaku kia Yuda, Ritina ria Daudi, obuire, nere oranyare koigora ebuku eria na gosansora ebimanyererio biaye bitano na bibere.”" 
Revelation5:6 Erio nkarora Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, oteneine gati y’ekerogo ki’obonene ne ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo, na gati‐gati y’abagaaka; nere ororekanete buna oyonyenyetwe. Nigo arenge ne chingunchara isano na ibere na amaiso atano na abere, ayare emeika etano na ebere ya Nyasae, yatomirwe ase ense yonsi." 
Revelation5:7 Emanwa y’Eng’ondi agacha, akabogoria ebuku eria korwa ase okoboko gw’okorio kw’oyoikaransete ase ekerogo keria ki’obonene." 
Revelation5:8 Goika agachia kobogoria ebuku eria, ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo chigatung’ama amo nabagaaka baria emerongo ebere na bane ase obosio bw’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi. Kera oyomo obo narenge nobokano na ebitaabo bie chitahabu biichire ubani nero nogosaba kw’abachenu." 
Revelation5:9 Barabwo nigo baare gotera ogotera okoyia, bagoteba, “Kwagweneire aye kobogoria ebuku na gosansora ebimanyererio biaye, ekiagera aye nkwanyenyetwe, na ase amanyinga ao okamogorera Nyasae abanto ba kera eamate, na omonwa, na abanto, na egesaku," 
Revelation5:10 okabakora bakaba ab’oboruoti na abakuani ase Nyasae oito, na barabwo nigo baragambe ase ense.”" 
Revelation5:11 Erio nkarigereria, nkaigwa egeturi ki’abamalaika abange abarenge baetanaine ekerogo keria ki’obonene ne ching’iti chiria chire moyo, na abagaaka baria; na omobaro obo nigo orenge chilifu ikomi ara chilifu ikomi, ne chilifu ara chilifu." 
Revelation5:12 Barabwo bagateba ase eriogi rinene, “Emanwa y’Eng’ondi oyonyenyetwe igo ogweneire konyora okobua, na obonda, na obong’aini, ne chinguru, na ogosikwa, na obonene, na ogotogigwa.”" 
Revelation5:13 Naende nkaigwa kera egetongwa ekere igoro, na ekere ase ense, na inse y’ense, na igoro y’enyancha na imeo, kegoteba, “Asare ere oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, na ase Emanwa y’Eng’ondi ogotogigwa, na ogosikwa, na obonene, na okobua goika kare na kare!”" 
Revelation5:14 Ne ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo chikabora, “Amina!” Na abagaaka baria bagatung’ama, bagasasima." 
Revelation6:1 Erio nkarora Emanwa y’Eng’ondi ogosansora ekemanyererio ekemo kia bitano na bibere, nkaigwa eyemo ye ching’iti chiria chire moyo egokwana neriogi buna eri’enkoba, egoteba, “Inchuo!”" 
Revelation6:2 Nkarigereria, nkarora ebarasi endabu, na ere oyoyeriinete narenge nobota; akaegwa egutwa, agasoka buna oyokobua, naende buna oyorabue." 
Revelation6:3 Ekero Emanwa y’Eng’ondi achia gosansora ekemanyererio gia kabere, nkaigwa eng’iti ya kabere ere moyo ekobora, “Inchuo!”" 
Revelation6:4 Ebarasi ende ekaoroka, yarenge embariri burure, na ere oyoyeriinete naetwe ribaga korusia omorembe korwa ase ense, erinde abanto baitane barabwo ase barabwo, akaegwa omoyio o birende omonene." 
Revelation6:5 Ekero achia gosansora ekemanyererio kia gatato, nkaigwa eng’iti ya gatato ere moyo ekobora, “Inchuo!” Nkarigereria, nkarora ebarasi emwamu, na ere oyoyeriinete narenge nekerengo gi’okorenga ase okoboko kwaye." 
Revelation6:6 Nkaigwa buna neriogi rikorwa gati‐gati ye ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo, rikobora, “Engano ekemunu ekemo ase edinari eyemo, na esairi ebimunu bitato ase edinari eyemo; amaguta na edivai tobisaria.”" 
Revelation6:7 Ekero achia gosansora ekemanyererio gia kane, nkaigwa eriogi ri’eng’iti ya kane ere moyo ekobora, “Inchuo!”" 
Revelation6:8 Nkarigereria, nkarora ebarasi nyaitosi, na oyoyeriinete erieta riaye n’Amakweri, na aase abakure amotunyaine; na barabwo bakaegwa okobua igoro y’ensemo ya kane y’ense, baite nomoyio o birende, na enchara, na amarwaire agoita, ne ching’iti chi’orosana chi’ense." 
Revelation6:9 Ekero achia gosansora ekemanyererio kia gatano, nkarora inse y’egesasimero emeika y’abwo baitetwe ekiagera barenge koraria ring’ana ria Nyasae, na koba abegenwa ase oborori bwabo." 
Revelation6:10 Barabwo bakarera neriogi rinene, bagateba, “Aye Omogambi omonene, omochenu na omonyene ekeene, goika ririri oratebane kogambia abwo bamenyete ase ense, na gotorusereria egesiomba ki’amanyinga aito?”" 
Revelation6:11 Kera oyomo obo akaegwa eanga entambe endabu, bagatebigwa batimoke engaki ende enke goika omobaro bw’abasomba abamo, na abamwabo, oikeranigwe, abwo barache goitwa boigo buna barabwo abanyene baitetwe." 
Revelation6:12 Nkarora ekero achia gosansora ekemanyererio kia gatano na rimo omotengecho omonene okaba ase ense, erioba rikaba rimwamu buna egetambaa ki’egunia ekemwamu, omotienyi bwonsi okaba buna amanyinga." 
Revelation6:13 Ching’enang’eni chia igoro chikagwa gochia ense buna amako amarere asusanire akogwa, ekero omwaga okonyegeria omoko." 
Revelation6:14 Igoro ekarusigwa buna ebuku ye risankwa ekoringwa, na kera egetunwa na egesinka gekang’anyigwa korwa aase aye." 
Revelation6:15 Erio abaruoti b’ense, na abanene, na abatang’ani b’esegi, na abanda, na abanto bare ne chinguru, na kera omosomba, na oyotari omosomba, bakebisa ase amabwago na ase emetaro y’ebigoro," 
Revelation6:16 bagotebia ebigoro na ebitare, “Togwere, otobise korwa ase obosio bwaye ere oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, gose titorora endamwamu y’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi," 
Revelation6:17 ekiagera rituko rinene ri’endamwamu yabo riaikire. Ning’o oranyare gotenena?” 
Revelation7:1 Nyuma ase aya nkarora abamalaika bane bateneine ase chinsemo inye chi’ense, bagotanga chimbeo inye chi’ense, erinde embeo tegusa igoro ase ense, nonya nigoro ase enyancha gose ase omote onde bwonsi." 
Revelation7:2 Naende nkarora omomalaika onde ogotiira korwa aase erioba rigosoka korwa ore nekemanyererio kia Nyasae ore moyo; akabaakera egeturi ase eriogi rinene abamalaika baria bane baetwe ribaga gosaria ense na enyancha," 
Revelation7:3 ogoteba, “Timosaria ense, gose enyancha, nonya nemete, goika twabekire abasomba ba Nyasae ekemanyererio ase amasio abo igoro.”" 
Revelation7:4 Erio nkaigwa omobaro obo abwo babekirwe ekemanyererio. Nigo barenge abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ene na inye (144,000) korwa ase kera egesaku kia basinto ba Israeli." 
Revelation7:5 Ab’egesaku kia Yuda nigo barenge chilifu ikomi na ibere ababekirwe ekemanyererio, ab’egesaku kia Reuben chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku kia Gadi chilifu ikomi na ibere," 
Revelation7:6 ab’egesaku gi’Aseri chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku kia Nafutali chilifu ikomi na ibere. Ab’egesaku kia Manase chilifu ikomi na ibere," 
Revelation7:7 ab’egesaku gia Simeoni chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku kia Lawi chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku gia Isakaru chilifu ikomi na ibere," 
Revelation7:8 ab’egesaku gia Sabuloni chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku kia Yusufu chilifu ikomi na ibere, ab’egesaku kia Benjamin chilifu ikomi na ibere." 
Revelation7:9 Nyuma ase aya nkarigereria, nkarora omosangererekano omonene mono, oyo onde atarenge konyara kobara, korwa ase kera egesaku, na eamate, na abanto, na omonwa, bateneine bosio bw’ekerogo ki’obonene na ase obosio bw’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, babekeirwe chianga chindabu bare namato ’emekendo maboko abo," 
Revelation7:10 bakorera neriogi rinene, bakobora, “Ogotooreka nkorwa ase Nyasae oito, oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, na korwa ase Emanwa y’Eng’ondi!”" 
Revelation7:11 Na abamalaika bonsi bateneine baetanaine ase ekerogo keria ki’obonene, na abagaaka baria, ne ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo; bagatung’ama bosio bw’ekerogo ki’obonene, bagasasima Nyasae," 
Revelation7:12 bakobora, “Amina! Ogotogigwa na obonene, na obong’aini, na ogoaka ng’a mbuya mono, na ogosikwa, na okobua, ne chinguru, nebia Nyasae oito goika kare na kare. Amina.”" 
Revelation7:13 Erio oyomo bw’abagaaka baria akaonchoka, akamboria, “Abanto aba babekeirwe chianga chindabu barabwo mbarabi, naende ng’ai barure?”" 
Revelation7:14 Nkamotebia, “Omonene one, aye nomanyete aya.” Ere agantebia, “Aba nabwo barure ase emechando emenene, basibirie chianga chiabo, bachikorire chindabu ase amanyinga ’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi." 
Revelation7:15 “Ayio naro agerete bare bosio bw’ekerogo ki’obonene kia Nyasae, na barabwo nigo bakomokorera omobaso na obotuko ase Hekalu yaye; ere oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene igo aramenye amo nabarabwo na kobarenda." 
Revelation7:16 Barabwo tibakoigwa enchara naende, nonya nerang’o; erioba tirikobasamba, nonya nomobaso omororo," 
Revelation7:17 ekiagera Emanwa y’Eng’ondi oyore gati‐gati y’ekerogo ki’obonene nabarisie, ere nabaraae gochia ase chinsoko chi’amache are moyo, na Nyasae natinyie amariga onsi korwa ase amaiso abo.”" 
Revelation8:1 Ekero Emanwa y’Eng’ondi achia gosansora ekemanyererio kia gatano na kabere, obotoereru bokaba igoro ase engaki koreng’ana nekeng’ese gi’ensa." 
Revelation8:2 Agwo nkarora abamalaika batano na babere abateneine ase obosio bwa Nyasae, bakaegwa ebitureri bitano na bibere." 
Revelation8:3 Na omomalaika onde agatenena bosio bw’egesasimero ore negetaabo gi’etahabu; ere akaegwa ubani enyinge, anyare koyebeka amo nogosaba kw’abachenu bonsi igoro ase egesasimero gi’etahabu kere bosio bw’ekerogo ki’obonene." 
Revelation8:4 Na erioki ria ubani rigachongororoka gochia igoro amo nogosaba kw’abachenu korwa ase okoboko kw’omomalaika oria ase obosio bwa Nyasae. 
Revelation8:5 Erio omomalaika akabogoria egetaabo, akageichoria omorero korwa ase egesasimero akayoruta igoro ase ense, na agwo bikaba ogoaka gw’enkoba, na okogukura, na okomesa, na omotengecho bw’ense." 
Revelation8:6 Abamalaika baria batano na babere abarenge nebitureri bitano na bibere bakebeka ang’e kobibugia. 
Revelation8:7 Omomalaika bwe ritang’ani akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio embura y’amagena amo nomorero, bisang’anaine namanyinga, bigatwa ase ense. Ensemo ya gatato y’ense egasambwa egasira, na ensemo ya gatato y’emete boigo, na obonyansi bwonsi obobese bogasambwa, bogasira." 
Revelation8:8 Omomalaika o kabere akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio egento keng’ana ekegoro ekenene kegwoka omorero gekarutwa ase enyancha. 
Revelation8:9 Ensemo ya gatato y’enyancha ekaba amanyinga, na ensemo ya gatato y’ebitongwa bire moyo ime ase enyancha bigakwa, na ensemo ya gatato ye chimeeri chigasarigwa." 
Revelation8:10 Omomalaika o gatato akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio eng’enang’eni enene ekagwa korwa igoro, yare gwoka buna ekieri; ekagwa igoro ase ensemo ya gatato ye chindooche, na igoro ye chinsoko chi’amache." 
Revelation8:11 Erieta ri’eng’enang’eni eria nigo yare korokwa Ekemeri Ekeroro; na ensemo ya gatato y’amache ekaba endoro, na abanto abange bagakwa ase amache ayio, ekiagera abete amaroro." 
Revelation8:12 Omomalaika o kane akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio ensemo ya gatato y’erioba egaakwa, na ensemo ya gatato y’omotienyi, na ensemo ya gatato ye ching’enang’eni boigo. Igo ensemo yabo ya gatato ekabekwa omosunte, erinde ensemo ya gatato y’omobaso tobara, nonya nobotuko boigo." 
Revelation8:13 Erio nkarora ensoti ekoiruruka igoro gati, nkayeigwa egokwana neriogi rinene, egoteba, “Obobe, Obobe, Obobe nobwabo abamenyete ase ense ase engaki y’egeturi ki’ebitureri ebi bitigarete, ebi abamalaika batato bare ang’e kobugia!”" 
Revelation9:1 Omomalaika o gatano akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio nkarora eng’enang’eni konya yagure korwa igoro gocha ase ense. Eng’enang’eni eria ekaegwa ekeigorero gi’ekeronga ki’eora y’abakure. 
Revelation9:2 Na igo ekaigora ekeronga ki’eora eria, na erioki rigasoka korwa ase ekeronga keria buna erioki ri’eriko rinene, na erioba na omoika bikabekwa omosunte nerioki riria riarwete ase ekeronga keria." 
Revelation9:3 Ne chingige chigasoka korwa ase erioki riria, chikagenda ase ense, chikaegwa okobua buna ebiuge bi’ense bire nakwo." 
Revelation9:4 Chirochio chigatebigwa tichisaria obonyansi bw’ense, gose kemeri kende, gose mote onde bwonsi, otatiga chisarie abanto baria batari nekemanyererio kia Nyasae ase amasio abo igoro." 
Revelation9:5 Tichiaegwa ribaga ri’okobaita bakwe, korende eri’okobachanda ase engaki y’emetienyi etano. Okoroma kwabo nigo kwarenge buna okoroma gw’ekeuge gekoroma omonto." 
Revelation9:6 Na ase amatuko aria mwanyabanto nabarigie amakweri, na barabwo tibakoyanyora nonya ng’ake. Barabwo nababe namaiga ase amakweri, korende amakweri inabatame." 
Revelation9:7 Ase ebieni biabo chingige chiria nigo chiagwekaine chibarasi chibekire ang’e ase esegi. Ase emetwe yabo nigo chiarenge nebinto bikororekana buna chigutwa chie chitahabu, na amasio abo nigo agwekaine amasio a mwanyabanto." 
Revelation9:8 Chitukia chiabo nigo chiarenge buna chitukia chi’abakungu, na amaino abo buna amaino e chindo." 
Revelation9:9 Ebikuba biabo nigo biaboirie chingobo chi’ebioma, na egeturi gie chimbaba chiabo nigo kiarenge buna egeturi gie chigari chinyinge chie chibarasi chikominyoka gochia ase esegi." 
Revelation9:10 Naende nigo chiarenge nebimincha bire nemeburera buna ebi’ebiuge, na okobua kwabo kw’ogochanda mwanyabanto ase emetienyi etano nigo kwarenge ase ebimincha biabo." 
Revelation9:11 Nchiarenge nomoruoti obo, omomalaika bw’eora y’abakure, erieta riaye ase Ekeibirania n’Abadoni, na ase Ekegiriki Apolioni." 
Revelation9:12 Obobe bwe ritang’ani bwaetire; rora, amabe ande abere nache nyuma y’ayio." 
Revelation9:13 Omomalaika o gatano na rimo akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio nkaigwa eriogi rie chingunchara chiria inye chi’egesasimero gi’etahabu kere ase obosio bwa Nyasae," 
Revelation9:14 rigotebia omomalaika o gatano na rimo, oyorenge negetureri, “Sibora abamalaika baria bane, abwo basibire ase orooche roria oronene rokorokwa Eufarati.”" 
Revelation9:15 Na abamalaika baria bane bagasiborwa, abwo babegetwe ang’e ase ensa eyio eyio, ne rituko, na omotienyi, na omwaka, erinde baite ensemo ya gatato ya mwanyabanto." 
Revelation9:16 Na omobaro bw’emeganda y’abariinete chibarasi nigo orenge chimilion amagana abere. Nkaigwa ng’a omobaro obo nigo orenge buna iga. 
Revelation9:17 Ase okorora kwane naroche chibarasi amo nabwo bachiriinete koba buna iga: Abariini nigo baare ne chingobo chi’ebioma ase ebikuba biabo chire nekieni ki’omorero, na ekemunsi, na ekemonuri. Chibarasi nigo chiarenge nemetwe enga buna eye chindo, na korwa ase emenwa yabo bikarua omorero, na erioki, na ekebiriti." 
Revelation9:18 Ase amaakwa, ayio atato, omorero, na erioki, na ekebiriti, ebi biaruete korwa ase emenwa yabo, ensemo ya gatato ya mwanyabanto bagaitwa." 
Revelation9:19 Na okobua gwe chibarasi chiria nigo kware ase emenwa yabo, na ase ebimincha biabo. Ebimincha biabo nigo biagwekaine ching’iti chire nemetwe, na ase ebio nigo chiare koroma." 
Revelation9:20 Na mwanyabanto abatigarete bataitetwe ase amaakwa ayio tibaonchogete korwa ase emeremo eria bakorete namaboko abo, na tibatiga gosasima ebirecha na emegwekano yakorire korwa ase chitahabu, ne chifeta, ne chitaai, na amagena, na emete, eyio etanyare korora, gose koigwa, gose kogenda." 
Revelation9:21 Na barabwo tibaonchogete korwa ase ogoita kwabo, gose oborogi bwabo, gose obotomani bwabo, gose okoiba kwabo." 
Revelation10:1 Erio nkarora omomalaika onde bwe chinguru ogoika korwa igoro oboirie riire. Nigo arenge nomokubinyongo bw’embura oetanaine omotwe oye, na obosio bwaye nigo bwarenge buna erioba, na amagoro aye buna chisiiro chi’omorero." 
Revelation10:2 Narenge nebuku enke yaigoire ase okoboko kwaye. Akabeka okogoro kwaye gw’okorio igoro ase enyancha na ogw’okobee igoro ase ense enyomo," 
Revelation10:3 na akarera neriogi rinene ringa buna eri’endo ekoruma. Ekero achia korera chinkoba isano na ibere chigakwana neriogi riabo. 
Revelation10:4 Ekero chinkoba echio isano na ibere chiare goaka eriogi nkaba ang’e korika. Erio nkaigwa eriogi rikorwa igoro rigoteba, “Mumeka amang’ana ayio atebwa ne chinkoba chiria isano na ibere, oyabeke ekemanyerio, toyarika.”" 
Revelation10:5 Na omomalaika oria naroche oteneine ase enyancha na ase ense enyomo akaimokereria okoboko kwaye gw’okorio igoro," 
Revelation10:6 agatiana asere oyore moyo goika kare na kare, oyotongete igoro na ebinto bireo, na ense na ebinto bireo, na enyancha na ebinto bireo, agateba, “Engaki ende tekoba nyuma ase aya," 
Revelation10:7 korende ekero omomalaika o gatano na kabere arabugie egetureri kiaye, obobisi bwa Nyasae naboikeranigwe, buna arareretie abasomba baye ababani.”" 
Revelation10:8 Erio eriogi riria naigwete korwa igoro riare gokwana nainche naende, rigateba, “Genda, obogorie ebuku eria eigoire ere ase okoboko kw’omomalaika oria oteneine ase enyancha na ase ense enyomo.”" 
Revelation10:9 Nkagenda ase omomalaika oria nkamotebia, “Ing’a ebuku eyio enke.” Agantebia, “Yebogorie, oyerie; ero nekobekere obororo ase enda yao, korende ase omonwa oo nebe enyansu buna obooke.”" 
Revelation10:10 Nkabogoria ebuku eria enke korwa ase okoboko kw’omomalaika oria, nkayeria. Ase omonwa one ekaba enyansu buna obooke, korende ase enda yane ekambekera obororo." 
Revelation10:11 Erio agantebia, “Nekogwenerete obane naende igoro ase abanto, na ebisaku, na emenwa, na abaruoti abange.”" 
Revelation11:1 Inche nkaegwa emoti y’okorenga enga buna enyimbo, ngatebigwa, “Imoka, orenge Hekalu ya Nyasae amo negesasimero na obare abwo bagosasimera aroro." 
Revelation11:2 Na egoora eria ere isiko ye Hekalu oyetige, toyerenga, ekiagera abanto b’ebisaku bayeeirwe, na barabwo nabatache omochie omochenu ase engaki y’emetienyi emerongo ene na ebere." 
Revelation11:3 Inche ning’ee birori baane babere okobua gw’okobana, na barabwo inababane ase engaki y’amatuko elifu eyemo na amagana abere, na emerongo etano nomo, babekeire chianga chie chigunia.”" 
Revelation11:4 Abwo nabwo emete eria ebere y’emezeituni na ebibekerero biria bie chitaya bibere biteneine ase obosio bw’Omonene bw’ense. 
Revelation11:5 Na omonto kararigie kobachanda, omorero norue ase emenwa yabo, orie ababisa babo. Omonto kararigie kobachanda, nemogwenerete aitwe." 
Revelation11:6 Barabwo nigo bare nokobua gosieka igoro, erinde embura tetwa amatuko ’obobani bwabo, naende mbare nokobua gw’okoonchora amache abe amanyinga, na goaka ense ase kera ogoakwa, koreng’ana buna baganetie." 
Revelation11:7 Ekero bakoorire korua oborori bwabo eng’iti eria ekorwa ase eora y’abakure nekore esegi na barabwo. Ero nebabue, ebaite bakwe," 
Revelation11:8 na ebitondo ebio nabibeere ase enchera y’omochie oria omonene aase Omonene obo abambetwe. Ase okobayena omochie oyio erieta riaye nigo okorokwa Sodomu na Misiri. 
Revelation11:9 Na abanto ba kera egesaku, na eamate, na omonwa, na abe chinse chionsi, nabarigererie ebitondo ebio ase engaki y’amatuko atato na ekeng’ese, na tibakobitiga bitindekwe." 
Revelation11:10 Na abwo bamenyete ase ense nabachenge igoro asebare na kogoka, na barabwo nabatomerane ebiegwa, ekiagera ababani baria babere bachandete abwo bamenyete ase ense." 
Revelation11:11 Korende nyuma y’amatuko atato na ekeng’ese omoika bw’obogima korwa ase Nyasae okabasoa, bagatenena namagoro abo, na obwoba bogasoa abanto baria babaroche." 
Revelation11:12 Ababani baria babere bakaigwa eriogi rinene korwa igoro rikobatebia, “Tiira gocha aa!” Bagatiira gochia igoro ase amare ime, na ababisa babo babarigereretie." 
Revelation11:13 Na ase ensa eria ekaba omotengecho omonene bw’ense, na ensemo ya ikomi y’omochie ekagwa. Abanto chilifu isano na ibere bagaitwa ase omotengecho oria, na abwo batigarete bagasogwa nomoondoko, bagatogia obonene bwa Nyasae ore igoro." 
Revelation11:14 Obobe bwa kabere bwaetire, rora, obobe bwa gatato ngocha bore bwango." 
Revelation11:15 Omomalaika o gatano na kabere akabugia egetureri kiaye. Erio amariogi amanene akaigugwa igoro, agoteba, “Oboruoti bw’ense bwabeire oboruoti bw’Omonene oito, na obwa Kristo oye, ere nagambe goika kare na kare.”" 
Revelation11:16 Na abagaaka baria emerongo ebere na bane, abaikaransete ase obosio bwa Nyasae ase ebirogo biabo bi’obonene, bagatung’ama, bagasasima Nyasae," 
Revelation11:17 bagoteba, “Aye Omonene Nyasae Omobui, oyoreo na oyokwarengeo, twagoakeire ng’a mbuya mono, ekiagera kwabogoirie okobua kwao okonene, na gwachakire kogamba." 
Revelation11:18 Abanto b’ebisaku bakabea, korende bono endamwamu yao yachire, na engaki y’okogambia abakure, na engaki y’okoa abasomba bao ababani, na abachenu, na abwo bairogete erieta riao, abake na abanene, eng’eria yabo, na gosiria abwo bagosaria ense.”" 
Revelation11:19 Erio Hekalu ya Nyasae ere igoro ekaigorwa, na Esanduku y’okobwatana kwaye ekarorekana ase Hekalu yaye ime. Aroro bikaba okomesa, na okogukura, ne chinkoba, na omotengecho bw’ense, na embura y’amagena enyinge mono egatwa." 
Revelation12:1 Na egekone ekenene gekarorekana igoro: Omokungu oboirie erioba, na omotienyi nigo orenge inse y’amagoro aye. Ase omotwe oye nigo arenge negutwa ye ching’enang’eni ikomi na ibere." 
Revelation12:2 Ere nigo arenge morito, akarera nobororo bw’okobina, ekiagera achandegete ase okoibora." 
Revelation12:3 Egekone kende gekarorekana igoro: Enchoka enene embariri eyarenge nemetwe etano na ebere ne chingunchara ikomi, na igoro ase emetwe yaye nigo yarenge ne chigutwa isano na ibere." 
Revelation12:4 Ekemincha kiaye kegakurura ensemo ya gatato ye ching’enang’eni chia igoro na gochiyeria ase ense. Na enchoka eria egatenena ase obosio bw’omokungu oria orenge ang’e koibora, erinde ekero aiboire erie omwana oye." 
Revelation12:5 Omokungu oria akaibora omwana omoisia, oyio nere oragambere abanto b’ebisaku bionsi nenyimbo y’ekioma. Korende omwana oye agataborigwa gochia igoro ase Nyasae na ase ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene." 
Revelation12:6 Omokungu oria agatama gochia ase erooro agwo aase aroiseretigwe na Nyasae, erinde arendwe aroro ase engaki y’amatuko elifu eyemo, na amagana abere, na emerongo etano nomo (1,260)." 
Revelation12:7 Erio esegi yabete igoro. Mikaeli na abamalaika baye bakarwania enchoka. Na enchoka eria na abamalaika baye bakarwanera amo," 
Revelation12:8 korende tibabua, nonya naase abo tanyorekana igoro naende." 
Revelation12:9 Na enchoka eria enene egatugutwa gocha inse. Eria neng’iti ya kare ekorokwa Omogenki na Saitani, omong’ainereria bw’ense yonsi. Ere agatugutwa gocha ase ense, na abamalaika baye bagatugutwa amo nere." 
Revelation12:10 Nkaigwa eriogi rinene igoro rigoteba, “Bono ogotooreka kwa Nyasae oito gwachire amo ne chinguru na oboruoti bwaye, na okobua gwa Kristo oye, ekiagera omosoeri bw’abaminto orutirwe inse, ere oyorenge kobasoera ase obosio bwa Nyasae oito omobaso na obotuko." 
Revelation12:11 Na barabwo bakamobua ase chinguru chi’amanyinga ’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, na ase amang’ana ’oborori bwabo; tibancha obogima bwabo nonya ngoika ogokwa." 
Revelation12:12 Ase ayio, aye igoro, chenga, na inwe abamomenyete imeo. Korende obobe nobwaino, ense na enyancha, ekiagera omosoeri oria oikire asemore ore nendamwamu enyinge, ekiagera amanyete ng’a engaki yaye nenke!”" 
Revelation12:13 Na enchoka eria, ekero yachia korora ng’a yatugutirwe ase ense, egatunyana omokungu oria oiborete omwana omoisia." 
Revelation12:14 Korende omokungu oria akaegwa chimbaba ibere buna echi’ensoti enene, anyare koiruruka korwa ase eng’iti eria gochia ase erooro aase agochia korendwa ase engaki y’emiaka etato na ekeng’ese." 
Revelation12:15 Eng’iti eria egasiara amache korwa ase omonwa oye, anga buna orooche, korwa nyuma y’omokungu oria, emoire norooche roria." 
Revelation12:16 Korende ense egakonya omokungu oria, egaasamia omonwa, ekamera orooche roria enchoka yasiarete korwa ase omonwa oye." 
Revelation12:17 Ase igo, enchoka eria ekaba nendamwamu ase omokungu oria, ekagenda gokora esegi ase oroiboro rwaye oro rwatigarete, ase abwo babwatete amachiko a Nyasae, na bare noborori bwa Yeso." 
Revelation12:18 Na enchoka eria egatenena igoro ase omokenye bw’enyancha. 
Revelation13:1 Erio nkarora eng’iti egosoka korwa ase enyancha. Ero nigo yarenge ne chingunchara ikomi na emetwe etano na ebere. Igoro ase chingunchara chiaye nchiarengeo chigutwa ikomi, na ase emetwe yaye ndiarengeo erieta ri’okorama." 
Revelation13:2 Na eng’iti eria naroche nigo yagwekaine engo. Amagoro aye nigo arenge buna ay’edubu, na omonwa oye buna oyo bw’endo. Enchoka ekaa eng’iti eria chinguru chiaye, na ekerogo kiaye ki’obonene, na okobua okonene." 
Revelation13:3 Omotwe oyomo bw’emetwe y’eng’iti eria okarorekana buna nore norogoma rw’amakweri, korende orogoma rwaye rw’amakweri rokagwenigwa, na ense yonsi egakumia ase eng’iti eria na koyetunyana." 
Revelation13:4 Abanto bagasasima enchoka eria, ekiagera yaete eng’iti eria okobua. Naende bagasasima eng’iti eria bagoteba, “Ning’o oreng’aine neng’iti eye? Ning’o oranyare koyerwania?”" 
Revelation13:5 Eng’iti eria ekaegwa ribaga ri’ogokwana amang’ana amanene na ay’okorama, naende ekaegwa okobua gw’okogamba ase engaki y’emetienyi emerongo ene na ebere." 
Revelation13:6 Na igo egachaka korama Nyasae, ekarama na erieta riaye, na obomenyo bwaye, na abwo bamenyete igoro," 
Revelation13:7 naende ekaegwa ribaga korwania abachenu na kobabua. Ekaegwa okobua igoro ya kera eamate, na abanto, na omonwa, na egesaku." 
Revelation13:8 Abanto bonsi abamenyete ase ense mbayesasime, otatiga abwo amarieta abo arikire ase ebuku y’obogima y’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, oyoitetwe korwa omochakano, ekero oboroso bw’ense bwabegetwe." 
Revelation13:9 Omonto kare namato akoigwera, tiga aigwe:" 
Revelation13:10 Omonto gachoreirwe ogwoswa, goika oswe. Omonto gachoreirwe ogoitwa nomoyio o birende, goika aitwe nomoyio o birende. Aiga nao abachenu barabe nokoremereria na obwegenwa." 
Revelation13:11 Erio nkarora eng’iti ende egotiira korwa inse. Ero nigo yarenge ne chingunchara ibere chinga buna echi’emanwa y’eng’ondi, egakwana buna enchoka." 
Revelation13:12 Nigo ekwenaria okobua gwonsi kw’eng’iti eria ye ritang’ani ase obosio bwaye, na kogera ense na bonsi abamenyete aroro basasime eng’iti eria ye ritang’ani, ero eyio orogoma rwaye rw’amakweri rwagwenetigwe." 
Revelation13:13 Nero yakorire ebikone ebinene, goika yagerire omorero oike korwa igoro gocha ase ense ase amasio a mwanyabanto." 
Revelation13:14 Na ase ebikone biria yaetwe ribaga kobikora ase obosio bw’eng’iti eria ye ritang’ani ekong’aina abwo bamenyete ase ense, egotebia abamenyete ase ense bakore omogwekano bw’eng’iti eria yaagetwe orogoma nomoyio o birende, nero ekaba moyo." 
Revelation13:15 Ekaegwa ribaga kobekera omogwekano bw’eng’iti eria omoika, goika omogwekano oria okwane, na ogere abanto bonsi abatasasimete omogwekano oria bw’eng’iti baitwe." 
Revelation13:16 Naboigo ekagera abanto bonsi, abake na abanene, abanda na abataka, abatari abasomba na abasomba, babekwe ekemanyererio ase amaboko abo a borio gose amasio abo igoro," 
Revelation13:17 erinde monto onde bwensi tagora gose koonia otatiga ere oyore nekemanyererio keria, engencho yaye erieta ri’eng’iti eria gose chinamba chi’erieta riaye." 
Revelation13:18 Aiga nao obong’aini boganeirie. Ere oyore ne chisemi tiga abare chinamba chi’eng’iti eyio, naki echi nechinamba chia mwanyabanto, ne chinamba chiaye namagana atano na rimo na emerongo etano nomo na isano nemo (666)." 
Revelation14:1 Erio nkarigereria, nkarora Emanwa y’Eng’ondi oteneine ase egetunwa gia Sayoni, na amo nere abanto chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ene na inye (144,000) abaare nerieta riaye amo neria Ise riarikire ase amasio abo igoro." 
Revelation14:2 Nkaigwa eriogi rikorwa igoro buna eriogi ri’amache amange akoeera, na buna eriogi ri’enkoba enene. Eriogi riria naigwete riarenge buna eriogi ri’abaare kobugia amakano abo." 
Revelation14:3 Barabwo nigo baare gotera ogotera okoyia bosio bw’ekerogo ki’obonene, na ase obosio bwe ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo, na ase obosio bw’abagaaka baria. Omonto onde tare ore konyara kwegera ogotera koria otatiga baria chilifu rigana erimo na emerongo ene na inye (144,000) ababooretigwe korwa ase ense." 
Revelation14:4 Aba nabwo batesoetie ase ogotacheneka nabakungu, ekiagera barabwo nabekungi, naende bagotunyana Emanwa y’Eng’ondi kera aase ase akogenda. Aba nababooretigwe korwa ase mwanyabanto buna ogotongorwa ase Nyasae na ase Emanwa y’Eng’ondi," 
Revelation14:5 na ase emenwa yabo borimo bonde tibwanyorekanete, ekiagera barabwo tibari na komocha." 
Revelation14:6 Erio nkarora omomalaika onde okoiruruka igoro gati. Oyo nigo arenge nenchili ya kare na kare okorareria abwo bamenyete ase ense, ase kera egesaku, na eamate, na omonwa, na abanto." 
Revelation14:7 Ere agateba neriogi rinene, “Moiroke Nyasae na komotogia, ekiagera ensa yaye y’okogambia yaikire, mosasime ere oyotongete igoro na ense, na enyancha, ne chinsoko chi’amache.”" 
Revelation14:8 Omomalaika onde, oyo o kabere, akamotunyana, ogoteba, “Babeli ogure! Babeli, omochie oria omonene, ogure, oyo onyoisirie abanto b’ebisaku bionsi edivai y’endamwamu y’obotomani bwaye!”" 
Revelation14:9 Na omomalaika onde, oyo o gatato, akabatunyana, ogoteba neriogi rinene, “Omonto karasasime eng’iti eria na omogwekano oye, na kobekwa ekemanyererio ase obosio bwaye igoro, gose ase okoboko kwaye," 
Revelation14:10 ere nanywe edivai y’endamwamu ya Nyasae yaroisigwe, etasang’aniri kende, ase egekombe ki’endamwamu yaye. Naende nachandwe nomorero na ekebiriti ase amasio ’abamalaika abachenu, na ase obosio bw’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi." 
Revelation14:11 Na erioki ri’okoyia kw’abwo bagochandeka nigo rirachongororoke gochia igoro goika kare na kare. Na ogotimoka tikori omobaso gose obotuko ase abwo basasimete eng’iti eria na omogwekano oye, na kera oyonyorire ekemanyererio ki’erieta riaye.”" 
Revelation14:12 Aiga nao abachenu barabe nokoremereria, abwo babwatete amachiko a Nyasae na koba abegenwa ase Yeso." 
Revelation14:13 Erio nkaigwa eriogi rikorwa igoro rigoteba, “Rika aya: Mbasesenirie abagokwa korwa bono, bamwegenete Omonene. Ee, nabo, Omoika ogoteba, tiga batimoke korwa ase emeremo yabo, ekiagera okwama kw’ogokora kwabo nigo gokobatunyana.”" 
Revelation14:14 Erio nkarigereria, nkarora riire rirabu, na igoro ase riire riria naikaranseteo oyomo ogwekaine omwana o mwanyabanto, orenge negutwa y’etahabu ase omotwe oye, na omoyio okogesa ase okoboko kwaye." 
Revelation14:15 Na omomalaika onde agasoka korwa ase Hekalu akarera neriogi rinene, agatebia oyoikaransete igoro ase riire riria, “Soyia omoyio oo mogondo, ogese, ekiagera engaki y’okogesa yaikire, ne rigesa riomire mono.”" 
Revelation14:16 Na ere oyoikaransete igoro ase riire riria agasoyia omoyio oye ase ense, na ense ekageswa." 
Revelation14:17 Na omomalaika onde agasoka korwa ase Hekalu ya igoro, nere boigo narenge nomoyio okogesa." 
Revelation14:18 Erio korwa ase egesasimero omomalaika onde agasoka, oyore nokobua igoro ase omorero, agakwana neriogi rinene, agatebia oyio orenge nomoyio okogesa, “Butora nomoyio oo okogesera, na gosangereria ebisago bi’amasabibu ’emesabibu y’ense, ekiagera amasabibu aye atobire.”" 
Revelation14:19 Omomalaika oria akabutora, agasangereria amasabibu ’emesabibu y’ense, na akayaruta ase ekemitero ekenene ki’endamwamu ya Nyasae." 
Revelation14:20 Na ekemitero keria kegatiringwa isiko y’omochie, na amanyinga agaiteka korwa ase ekemitero, na amanyinga aria akagenda ase oboare bwe chimaeli amagana abere, agaichora goika ebiokio bie chibarasi." 
Revelation15:1 Erio nkarora egekone kende igoro, ekenene na eki’ogokumia. Abamalaika batano na babere baare namaakwa atano na abere, ayio nay’omoerio, ekiagera ase ayio endamwamu ya Nyasae yaikeranigwe." 
Revelation15:2 Naende nkarora aase arenge buna enyancha y’ekerore, esang’anaine nomorero. Naboigo nkarora abwo babuire eng’iti na omogwekano oye, na enamba y’erieta riaye. Barabwo nigo bateneine ensemo y’enyancha y’ekerore, mbabwate amakano aya baetwe na Nyasae." 
Revelation15:3 Na barabwo nigo baare gotera ogotera kwa Musa, omosomba o Nyasae, na ogotera kw’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, bagoteba, “Ogokora kwao nokonene na okw’ogokumia, aye Omonene Nyasae Omobui! Chinchera chiao nechi’oboronge na echi’ekeene, aye omoruoti bw’abanto b’ebisaku." 
Revelation15:4 Aye Omonene, ning’o otakoiroke? Ning’o otatogie erieta riao? Naki naye bweka ore omochenu. Abanto b’ebisaku bionsi nabachiche gosasima ase obosio bwao, ekiagera emeroberio yao y’oboronge yaikire koorokigwa.”" 
Revelation15:5 Nyuma ase aya nkarora Hekalu ya igoro, eyere Eema y’Oborori, ekoigorwa," 
Revelation15:6 na abamalaika baria batano na babere, abaare namaakwa atano na abere, bagasoka korwa ase Hekalu. Barabwo nigo babekeire chianga chi’egatani endabu, ekomeka‐meka, na ase ebikuba biabo nigo beboeretie chinkini chie chitahabu." 
Revelation15:7 Na eyemo ye ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo ekaa abamalaika baria batano na babere ebitaabo bitano na bibere bie chitahabu biichire endamwamu ya Nyasae ore moyo goika kare na kare. 
Revelation15:8 Na Hekalu egaichorwa nerioki rikorwa ase obonene bwa Nyasae, na korwa ase okobua kwaye; monto onde tarenge ore konyara gosoa ase Hekalu goika amaakwa aria atano na abere ay’abamalaika baria batano na babere aikeranigwe." 
Revelation16:1 Erio nkaigwa eriogi rinene rikorwa ase Hekalu, rigotebia abamalaika baria batano na babere, “Genda moitere ebitaabo biria bitano na bibere bi’endamwamu ya Nyasae igoro ase ense.”" 
Revelation16:2 Omomalaika bwe ritang’ani akagenda agaitera egetaabo kiaye igoro ase ense, na amagumba amabe akaria abanto abwo barenge nekemanyererio ki’eng’iti, na baare gosasima omogwekano oye." 
Revelation16:3 Omomalaika o kabere agaitera egetaabo kiaye ase enyancha ime, na enyancha ekaonchoka ekaba amanyinga buna ay’omonto okure, na ebitongwa bionsi bire moyo ase enyancha ime bigakwa." 
Revelation16:4 Omomalaika o gatato agaitera egetaabo kiaye ase chindooche ime, na ase chinsoko chi’amache, na chirochio chikaonchoka chikaba amanyinga." 
Revelation16:5 Erio nkaigwa omomalaika, oyore nokobua igoro y’amache, ogoteba, “Aye nomonyene oboronge ase okogamba kwao, aye Omochenu, oyoreo na oyokwarengeo." 
Revelation16:6 Ekiagera barabwo baiterete amanyinga ’abachenu na ay’ababani, aye kwabaeire amanyinga banywe. Barabwo banyorire ayabagweneire!”" 
Revelation16:7 Naende nkaigwa eriogi korwa ase egesasimero rigoteba, “Ee, aye Omonene Nyasae, Omobui, okogamba kwao nogw’ekeene na okwa boronge!”" 
Revelation16:8 Omomalaika o kane agaitera egetaabo kiaye igoro ase erioba, akaegwa ribaga gosamba abanto nomorero." 
Revelation16:9 Abanto kobagosambwa nomorero oria omotindi bakaragereria erieta ria Nyasae, oyore nokobua igoro y’amaakwa ayio, gose tibaonchoka na gotogia obonene bwaye." 
Revelation16:10 Omomalaika o gatano agaitera egetaabo kiaye igoro ase ekerogo ki’obonene ki’eng’iti eria, na oboruoti bwaye bokabekwa omosunte. Abanto bagatakuna chimeme chiabo ase engencho y’obororo," 
Revelation16:11 bakaragereria Nyasae ore igoro ase engencho y’obororo bwabo na amagumba abo, gose tibaonchoka korwa ase ogokora kwabo." 
Revelation16:12 Omomalaika o gatano na rimo agaitera egetaabo kiaye igoro ase orooche roria oronene rokorokwa Eufarati, na amache aye agakama. Erio enchera ekaroiserigwa abaruoti bakorwa moocha bagoetera." 
Revelation16:13 Nkarora emeika y’eubi etato enga buna ebioto ekorua ase omonwa bw’enchoka, na ase omonwa bw’eng’iti, na ase omonwa bw’omobani oria bw’oborimo." 
Revelation16:14 Naki eyio nemeika y’ebirecha egokora ebikone, na gosoka gochia ase abaruoti b’ense yonsi kobasangereria ase esegi ase rituko rinene ria Nyasae Omobui." 
Revelation16:15 (“Rigereria, ngocha nde buna omoibi agocha. Nasesenirie oyogesete na korenda chianga chiaye, tagenda getirianda, na abaise korora obosooku ase amasio ’abanto.”)" 
Revelation16:16 Na emeika eria egasangereria abaruoti amo gochia aase akorokwa ase Ekeibirania Arimagedon. 
Revelation16:17 Omomalaika o gatano na kabere agaitera egetaabo kiaye igoro ase embeo bosa, na eriogi rinene rikarua ase Hekalu korwa ase ekerogo keria ki’obonene, rigoteba, “Aikire gokoreka!”" 
Revelation16:18 Igo bikaba okomesa, na okogukura, ne chinkoba, na omotengecho omonene bw’ense. Na korwa ekero mwanyabanto bachagete koba ase ense motengecho onde tona koba omonene buna oyio." 
Revelation16:19 Omochie oria omonene ogaatananekana ase chinsemo isato, na emechie y’abanto b’ebisaku ekagwa. Nyasae akainyora Babeli, omochie oria omonene, ayoe onywe ase egekombe ki’edivai y’endamwamu yaye entindi." 
Revelation16:20 Kera egesinka kegatama, na ebitunwa binde tibiarorekana aande." 
Revelation16:21 Amagena ’embura amanene, ayare noborito koreng’ana chikiro emerongo etano, akagwera mwanyabanto korwa igoro, na mwanyabanto bakaragereria Nyasae ase engencho y’ogoakwa okwo kw’amagena ’embura ekiagera ogoakwa okwo nokonene mono kwarenge." 
Revelation17:1 Oyomo bw’abamalaika baria batano na babere, abarenge nebitaabo bitano na bibere, agacha, agakwana nainche, agantebia, “Inchuo aiga, nkworokie okogambigwa kw’omotayayi oria omonene oikaransete igoro ase amache amange." 
Revelation17:2 Ere oyio abaruoti b’ense batomanire nere, na abanto abamenyete ase ense batindire ase edivai y’obotomani bwaye.”" 
Revelation17:3 Inabogoretigwe n’Omoika, na omomalaika oria akang’ira goika ase erooro. Aroro nkarora omokungu oikaransete igoro ase eng’iti embariri mono, eichire amarieta ay’okorama arikire asere, eyare nemetwe etano na ebere, ne chingunchara ikomi." 
Revelation17:4 Na omokungu oria nigo arenge oboirie eanga emonyinga na embariri mono, na ochabeire chitahabu, na amagena e rigori rinene, ne chiruru. Ere nigo arenge negekombe gi’etahabu koboko kwaye, geichire okogechia na eubi y’obotomani bwaye." 
Revelation17:5 Ase obosio bwaye igoro nigo arenge nerieta ri’obobisi riarikire iga: “Babeli, omochie oria omonene, ng’ina abatayayi na oyo bw’okogechia gw’ense.”" 
Revelation17:6 Nkarora omokungu oria, otindire ase amanyinga ’abachenu, na ase amanyinga a birori ba Yeso. Na inche ngachia komorora ngakumia ogokumia okonene." 
Revelation17:7 Na omomalaika oria agantebia, “Naki ogokumia? Ningotebie obobisi bw’omokungu oyio, na obw’eng’iti eyio emobogoretie ere nemetwe etano na ebere, ne chingunchara ikomi." 
Revelation17:8 Eng’iti eria kwaroche yarengeo, korende bono teiyo, ng’ang’e ere gotiira korwa ase eora y’abakure na kogenda gosirigwa. Na abwo bamenyete ase ense, abwo amarieta abo atarikiri ase ebuku y’obogima korwa omochakano, ekero oboroso bw’ense bwabegetwe, nabakumie ase eng’iti eria, ekiagera yarengeo, na bono teiyo, naende neche kobao." 
Revelation17:9 Agwo nao korabe okomanya okore nobong’aini. Emetwe eria etano na ebere nebitunwa bitano na bibere, aase omokungu oria aikaransete." 
Revelation17:10 Emetwe eyio boigo nabaruoti batano na babere. Batano b’abwo baikire kogwa, na oyomo nao are, na oyonde taracha. Nere karache nigo arabeo ekero egeke gioka." 
Revelation17:11 Na eng’iti eria yarengeo, korende bono teiyo, ero neya gatano na gatato ere, Ero neyemo ya chiria isano na ibere, na nkogenda ere ase ogosirigwa kwaye." 
Revelation17:12 Ne chingunchara chiria ikomi kwaroche, echio nabaruoti ikomi abataranyora oboruoti, korende mbaegwe okobua koba abaruoti ase ensa eyemo amo neng’iti eria." 
Revelation17:13 Abwo nigo bare nokorengereria okomo ase okoa eng’iti eria chinguru chiabo na okobua kwabo. 
Revelation17:14 Abwo nabakore esegi barwanie Emanwa y’Eng’ondi, na Emanwa y’Eng’ondi nababue, ekiagera ere n’Omonene bw’abanene, na Omoruoti bw’abaruoti; na abwo barangerigwe, na abachore, na abegenwa nababue amo nere.”" 
Revelation17:15 Erio agantebia, “Amache aria kwaroche, aase omotayayi oria aikaransete, ayio nabanto, na emeganda y’abanto, na ebisaku, na emenwa." 
Revelation17:16 Ne chingunchara chiria ikomi kwaroche, echio amo neng’iti nachigeche omotayayi oria; nachimokore abe bosa na getirianda, nachimorie chinyama chiaye, naende nachimosambe kegima nomorero." 
Revelation17:17 Naki Nyasae obekire ase chinkoro chiabo okogania kw’ogokora ogwancha kwaye ase okoba nokorengereria okomo, na koa eng’iti eria oboruoti bwabo, goika amang’ana a Nyasae aikeranigwe." 
Revelation17:18 Na omokungu oria kwaroche nomochie oria omonene oyore noboruoti igoro y’abaruoti b’ense.” 
Revelation18:1 Nyuma ase aya nkarora omomalaika onde ogoika korwa igoro. Oyo nigo arenge nokobua okonene, na ense ekamorekwa nobonene bwaye bokomeka‐meka." 
Revelation18:2 Akarera neriogi rie chinguru, ogoteba, “Babeli ogure! Babeli, omochie oria omonene, ogure! Obeire obomenyo bw’ebirecha, na obogacho bwa kera omoika bw’eubi, na obwa kera enyoni etachenegeti na ey’okogechia." 
Revelation18:3 Naki abanto b’ebisaku bionsi banyure edivai y’endamwamu y’obotomani bwaye, na abaruoti b’ense batomanire nere, na abaonchoreria b’ense betenenkirie ase obonda bwaye obonge.”" 
Revelation18:4 Erio nkaigwa eriogi rinde korwa igoro, rigoteba, “Inwe abanto baane, karue asare, erinde timobwatana nere ase ebibe biaye, na konyora amaakwa amo nere." 
Revelation18:5 Naki ebibe biaye biaikire igoro, na Nyasae oinyoire obobe bwaye." 
Revelation18:6 Mokorere buna ere abakorerete inwe, moakane ara kabere koreng’ana nogokora kwaye. Ase ekenyugwa ekio ere abasang’ananeirie, mosang’anerie na ere ara kabere." 
Revelation18:7 Na buna ere etogirie na kwegokia atari gwetanga ase okorigia kwaye, moe obororo na ogoichana koreng’ana boigo. Nigo agoteba ase enkoro yaye ime: Inche ning’ikaransete eting’ana, tindi omoboraka, gose tinkoba nomoichano nonya ng’ake!" 
Revelation18:8 Ase engencho eyio, ase rituko erimo rioka amaakwa aye nache, naboigo namakweri, na omoichano, na enchara. Ere nasambwe kegima nomorero, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae, oyokomogambia, nare ne chinguru.”" 
Revelation18:9 Abaruoti b’ense, abwo babwatanire nere ase obotomani na okogania okobe nabamoreere na komweumeria ekero bararore erioki ri’okoyia kwaye." 
Revelation18:10 Barabwo nigo baratenenere aare, ekiagera bare nokoiroka ase ogoakwa kwaye, na goteba, “Obobe, obobe nobwao, omochie oria omonene, Babeli, omochie ore ne chinguru, naki ase ensa eyemo yoka okogambigwa kwao gwachire!”" 
Revelation18:11 Na abaonchoreria b’ense bakorera na komweumeria, ekiagera onde tari oragore ebinto biabo naende:" 
Revelation18:12 Ebinto bie chitahabu, na ebie chifeta na ebi’amagena e rigori rinene, na ebie chiruru; chianga chi’egatani, na echimonyinga, na echi’ariri, na echire chimbariri mono; kera omote bw’ogotioka okuya, na kera egento keroisirie korwa ase amaino ’enchogu, na kera egento ki’omote bwe rigori rinene, na egi’etaai, na egi’ekioma, na eki’amagena akomeka‐meka;" 
Revelation18:13 omodalasini, na ekarafuu, na manemane, na amaguta akweakwa, na ubani na edivai, na amaguta, na obosie obonuke, na engano, ne chiombe, ne ching’ondi, ne chibarasi, ne chigari, na emebere ya mwanyabanto na emioyo yabo." 
Revelation18:14 “Okwama koria omoyo oo oganetie kwagosireirie, na ebinto bionsi ebiterere. Na ebinto bikomeka‐meka biagosireirie, gose tokonyara kobinyora naende nonya ng’ake!”" 
Revelation18:15 Na abaonchoreria b’ebinto ebio, abwo betenenkirie ase engencho yaye ere, nigo baratenenere are, ekiagera bare nokoiroka ase ogoakwa kwaye, bakorera na kweumia," 
Revelation18:16 bagoteba, “Obobe, obobe nobwaye, omochie oria omonene, oyoboirie egatani engiya, na eanga emonyinga, na eyere embariri mono, ochabeire chitahabu, na amagena e rigori rinene, ne chiruru." 
Revelation18:17 Naki ase ensa eyemo yoka obotenenku obonge buna iga bwabeire bosa.” Na abateneneri bonsi be chimeeri, na bonsi ababogorigwa ne chimeeri, na abagendia be chimeeri, na abwo bonsi bagokora emeremo ase enyancha bagatenena are," 
Revelation18:18 bakorera mono ekero bachia korora erioki ri’okoyia kwaye, bagateba, “Omochie ki ogwekaine omochie oyio omonene?”" 
Revelation18:19 Bagasiara ebuse igoro ase emetwe yabo, bakorera, na gokuura, na kweumia, bagoteba, “Obobe, obobe nobwaye, omochie oria omonene! Ase chinibo chiaye bonsi ababwate chimeeri ase enyancha betenenkirie. Ase ensa eyemo yoka obeire bosa." 
Revelation18:20 Goka igoro yaye, inwe aba igoro, inwe abachenu, na abatomwa, na ababani, naki Nyasae namogambetie ere, ekiagera ere abagambetie inwe!”" 
Revelation18:21 Erio omomalaika oyomo bwe chinguru akaimokia rigena rire buna orogena oronene rogosia, akariruta ase enyancha ime, akabora, “Buna iga, ase chinguru na ekerundo, Babeli, omochie oria omonene, norutwe inse, gose tokonyara kororekana nonya ng’ake." 
Revelation18:22 Amariogi ’abakobugia amakano na ebiroria, na ebitureri, takoigugwa ime asore naende nonya ng’ake; nonya nomoroisia o gento kende gionsi takororekana ime asore naende nonya ng’ake; nonya neriogi ri’orogena rogosia tirikoigugwa ime asore naende nonya ng’ake;" 
Revelation18:23 nonya noborabu bw’etaya tibokomoreka ime asore naende nonya ng’ake; nonya neriogi ri’omonyuomi na eri ’omoriakari takoigugwa ime asore naende nonya ng’ake. Abaonchoreria bao nigo barenge abanene b’ense, na abanto b’ebisaku bionsi bang’ainetwe ase oborogi bwao." 
Revelation18:24 Ime y’omochie oria akanyorekanao amanyinga ’ababani, na ay’abachenu, na aya baria bonsi abaitetwe ase ense.”" 
Revelation19:1 Nyuma ase aya nkaigwa egento buna neriogi rinene ri’omoganda omonene igoro, rigoteba, “Haleluya! Ogotooreka, na obonene, na okobua, nebia Nyasae oito." 
Revelation19:2 Okogamba kwaye nogw’ekeene, na okw’oboronge, naki omogambirie oria omotayayi omonene, oyosaririe ense ase obotomani bwaye. Nyasae orusirie egesiomba ki’amanyinga ’abasomba baye korwa ase amaboko ’omotayayi oria”" 
Revelation19:3 Eria kabere bagateba, “Haleluya! Erioki ri’okoyia kwaye nigo rirachongororoke gochia igoro goika kare na kare.”" 
Revelation19:4 Na abagaaka baria emerongo ebere na bane amo ne ching’iti chiria inye chire moyo bagatung’ama, bagasasima Nyasae oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene, bagoteba, “Amina. Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Eriogi rikarua ase ekerogo ki’obonene rigateba, “Motogie Nyasae oito, inwe abasomba baye bonsi, inwe abamomoirogete, abake na abanene!”" 
Revelation19:6 Erio nkaigwa buna neriogi ri’omoganda omonene, na buna eri’amache amange, na buna eri’enkoba ye chinguru rigoteba, “Haleluya! Omonene Nyasae oito Omobui nkogamba are." 
Revelation19:7 Togoke na gochenga, tomotogie ase obonene bwaye, ekiagera rituko ri’enyangi y’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi riaikire, na omoriakari oye bwebekire ang’e." 
Revelation19:8 Ere oeirwe eanga y’egatani engiya endabu, ekomeka‐meka, akobeka.” Egatani eyio nogokora kw’oboronge kw’abachenu." 
Revelation19:9 Omomalaika oria agantebia, “Rika aya: Mbasesenirie abarangerigwe ase omoyega bw’enyangi y’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi.” Naende agantebia, “Amang’ana aya namang’ana ay’ekeene a Nyasae.”" 
Revelation19:10 Erio ngatung’ama ase amagoro aye nkamosasima. Na ere agantebia, “Tokora igo! Inche nomosomba omogisangio oo na oyo bw’abamino abare noborori bwa Yeso. Osasime Nyasae! Naki oborori bwa Yeso nabwo omoika bw’obobani.”" 
Revelation19:11 Erio nkarora igoro amaanokire. Agwo nkarora ebarasi endabu, na ere oyoyeriinete okorokwa Omwegenwa na Omonyakeene; ere nigo are kogamba na gokora esegi ase oboronge." 
Revelation19:12 Amaiso aye nigo arenge buna ekebemberi ki’omorero, na igoro ase omotwe oye nchiarengeo chigutwa chinyinge. Narenge nerieta riarikire asare ritamanyiri na onde, otatiga ere omonyene." 
Revelation19:13 Ere obekeire eganchwa etobekire ase amanyinga, na erieta riaye are korokwa Ring’ana ria Nyasae." 
Revelation19:14 Na emeganda y’esegi ere igoro ekamotunyana, na abwo bariinete chibarasi chindabu, babekeire chianga chi’egatani engiya endabu." 
Revelation19:15 Korwa ase omonwa oye okaruao omoyio o birende ore omwoge, na ase oyio naake abanto b’ebisaku. Ere nabagambere nenyimbo y’ekioma, naende natiringe ekemitero ki’edivai y’endamwamu entindi ya Nyasae Omobui." 
Revelation19:16 Naende nare nerieta ase eganchwa yaye na ase eriagati riaye ririkire iga: Omoruoti bw’abaruoti na Omonene bw’abanene. 
Revelation19:17 Erio nkarora omomalaika oteneine ase erioba ime, okorera ase eriogi rinene, ogotebia chinyoni chiare koiruruka ase igoro gati, “Inchuo mosangererekane ase omoyega omonene o Nyasae." 
Revelation19:18 Monyare koria chinyama chi’abaruoti, na echi’abatang’ani b’esegi, na echi’abanto bare ne chinguru, ne chinyama chie chibarasi, na echi’abariini babo, ne chinyama chi’abanto bonsi, abatari abasomba, abake na abanene.”" 
Revelation19:19 Erio nkarora eng’iti eria, na abaruoti b’ense amo nemeganda yabo y’esegi basangererekanete amo bamorwanie ere oyoriinete ebarasi eria na omoganda oye." 
Revelation19:20 Eng’iti eria ekabwatwa amo nomobani oria bw’oborimo, ere oyokorete ebikone ase obosio bwaye. Ase ebikone ebio nigo are kong’aina abanto baria baetwe ekemanyererio ki’engiti eria na gosasima omogwekano oye. Abwo babere bakarutwa bare moyo ase enyancha y’omorero egwoka ekebiriti." 
Revelation19:21 Na baria batigarete bagaitwa nomoyio o birende bw’oyoikaransete igoro ase ebarasi eria, omoyio o birende, oria okorua ase omonwa oye. Ne chinyoni chionsi chikaigota ase chinyama chiabo." 
Revelation20:1 Erio nkarora omomalaika ogoika korwa igoro ore nekeigorero ki’eora y’abakure na ekenyuri ekenene ase okoboko kwaye. 
Revelation20:2 Ere akabwata enchoka, eng’iti eria ya kare, ero n’Omogenki na Saitani, akamosiba ase engaki y’emiaka elifu eyemo," 
Revelation20:3 akamotuguta ase eora y’abakure, akayesieka, na akabeka ekemanyererio igoro asere, erinde tagenka abanto b’ebisaku naende, goika emiaka eria elifu eyemo eere. Nyuma ase aya nemogwenerete asiborwe ase ekero egeke." 
Revelation20:4 Erio nkarora ebirogo bi’obonene, na igoro ase ebio mbaikaranseteo abwo baeirwe okobua gw’okogamba. Naende nkarora emioyo y’abwo banachetwe emetwe ekiagera barenge birori ba Yeso, na baare koraria ring’ana ria Nyasae, na batasasimete eng’iti, nonya nomogwekano oye, gose tibanyorete ekemanyererio kiaye ase amasio abo igoro, gose ase amaboko abo. Barabwo bakaba moyo na bakagamba amo na Kristo ase engaki y’emiaka elifu eyemo." 
Revelation20:5 Abakure abwo batigarete tibaba moyo goika emiaka eria elifu eyemo, ekaera. Okwo nakwo okobokigwa kwe ritang’ani." 
Revelation20:6 Nasesenirie oyore omochenu, oyore nensemo y’okobokigwa kwe ritang’ani. Igoro ase abwo amakweri a kabere tari nokobua korende nababe abakuani ba Nyasae na aba Kristo, na barabwo nabagambe amo nere emiaka elifu eyemo." 
Revelation20:7 Na emiaka eria elifu eyemo keraere, Saitani nasiborwe korwa ase egesibo kiaye." 
Revelation20:8 Erio nasoke kogenka abanto b’ebisaku bare ase chinsemo inye chi’ense, Gogi na Magogi, kobasangereria ase esegi. Omobaro obo nigo ore buna omokenye o nyancha." 
Revelation20:9 Abwo bagatiira igoro ase obogare bw’ense, bakanaaria obomenyo bw’abachenu, na omochie oria bwanchire, korende omorero ogaika korwa igoro, okabaria." 
Revelation20:10 Oria Omogenki, oyobagengete, akarutwa ase enyancha y’omorero na ekebiriti aase eng’iti eria yarenge amo nomobani oria bw’oborimo. Abwo nabachandwe omobaso na obotuko goika kare na kare." 
Revelation20:11 Erio nkarora ekerogo ki’obonene, ekenene, ekerabu, amo noyogeikaranserete. Korwa ase obosio bwaye ense na igoro bigatama, na aase abo tarorekana ase bakobeera." 
Revelation20:12 Naende nkarora abakure, abanene na abake, bateneneine ase ekerogo ki’obonene, ne chibuku chikaigorwa. Na ebuku ende ekaigorwa, eyio nero ebuku y’obogima. Abakure bakagambigwa ase amang’ana arikire ime ase chibuku echio koreng’ana buna ogokora kwabo kwarenge." 
Revelation20:13 Enyancha ekarusia abakure abarenge ime yaye. Amakweri na aase abakure bikarusia abakure abarenge ime aroro. Barabwo bakagambigwa koreng’ana buna ogokora kwabo kwarenge. 
Revelation20:14 Amakweri agatugutwa amo na aase abakure ase enyancha y’omorero. Enyancha eye y’omorero nero amakweri a kabere. 
Revelation20:15 Na onye omonto tarorekaneti orikire ase ebuku y’obogima akarutwa ase enyancha y’omorero. 
Revelation21:1 Erio nkarora igoro aayia na ense enyia, naki igoro ye ritang’ani na ense ye ritang’ani biaetire, nonya nenyancha teri naende." 
Revelation21:2 Nkarora omochie oria omochenu, Yerusalemu omoyia, ogoika korwa igoro korwa ase Nyasae, obekirwe ang’e buna omoriakari ochabeirwe gochia ase omosacha oye." 
Revelation21:3 Nkaigwa eriogi rinene rikorwa ase ekerogo keria ki’obonene rigoteba, “Rora obomenyo bwa Nyasae nigo bore amo na mwanyabanto. Ere namenye amo nabarabwo, na barabwo nababe abanto baye, na Nyasae omonyene nabe amo nabarabwo." 
Revelation21:4 Ere natinyie kera ririga korwa ase amaiso abo; amakweri takobao nonya ng’ake, nonya nokweumia, gose okorera, gose obororo tibikobao, ekiagera amang’ana e ritang’ani aikire goeta.”" 
Revelation21:5 Na ere oyoikaransete ase ekerogo ki’obonene agateba, “Rora, nakorire onsi koba amayia.” Agantebia, “Rika aya, ekiagera amang’ana aya nay’obwegeni na ay’ekeene.”" 
Revelation21:6 Naende agantebia, “Aikire gokoreka. Inche n’Alifa na Omega, Omochakano na Omoerio. Oyore nerang’o nimoe bosa anywe korwa ase ensoko y’amache ’obogima." 
Revelation21:7 Ere oyorabue nanyore omwando oyo, na inche nimbe Nyasae oye, na ere nabe omwana one." 
Revelation21:8 Korende aboba, na abatari abegenwa, na abagechi, na abaiti, na abatomani, na abarogi, na abasasimi emegwekano na abanyaborimo bonsi; ensemo yabo nebe ase enyancha egwoka omorero na ekebiriti. Aya naro amakweri a kabere.”" 
Revelation21:9 Oyomo bw’abamalaika baria batano na babere, abarenge nebitaabo bitano na bibere biichire amaakwa aria atano na abere ay’omoerio, agacha, agakwana nainche na goteba, “Inchuo aiga, na inche ninkworokie omoriakari, omokungu bw’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi.”" 
Revelation21:10 Nigo nabogoretigwe n’Omoika, na omomalaika oria akang’ira gochia ase ekerogo ekenene, akanyorokia omochie oria omochenu, Yerusalemu, ogoika korwa igoro korwa ase Nyasae." 
Revelation21:11 Oyio nigo orenge nobonene bwa Nyasae; okomekameka kwaye nigo kwarenge buna rigena rie rigori rinene ria yasipi, rirabu buna ekerore gekomeka‐meka." 
Revelation21:12 Omochie oyio nigo orenge norwaki oronene, orotambe, ore nebiita ikomi na bibere. Ase ebiita biria mbarengeo abamalaika ikomi na babere, na amarieta ’ebisaku ikomi na bibere bi’Abaisraeli arikire aroro." 
Revelation21:13 Ensemo ya moocha mbiarengeo ebiita bitato, na ensemo ya sugusu ebiita bitato, na ensemo ya irianyi ebiita bitato, na ensemo ya bosongo ebiita bitato." 
Revelation21:14 Na orwaki rw’omochie oria nigo rwarenge namaroso ikomi na abere, na igoro yabo amarieta ikomi na abere ay’abatomwa ikomi na babere b’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi." 
Revelation21:15 Omomalaika oria okwanete nainche nigo arenge nemoti y’okorenga y’etahabu, anyare korenga omochie na ebiita biaye, na orwaki rwaye." 
Revelation21:16 Na omochie oria nigo ore ne chinsanganio inye, obotambe na obogare bwaye nigo biareng’aine. Akarenga omochie nemoti eria. Nigo orenge chimaeli elifu eyemo, na amagana atano; obotambe na obogare bwaye, na gochia igoro kwaye nigo biareng’aine." 
Revelation21:17 Naende akarenga orwaki rwaye. Orwo nigo rwarenge ase ekerengo ki’amaboko rigana erimo na emerongo ene, na ane, ase ekerengo kia mwanyabanto, na eki’abamalaika boigo." 
Revelation21:18 Na orwaki rwaye nigo rwaagachire namagena a yasipi, na omochie omonyene nigo orenge bw’etahabu engiya, endabu buna ekerore ekerabu." 
Revelation21:19 Amaroso ’orwaki rw’omochie nigo achabeire namagena e rigori rinene a kera egesaku. Oboroso bwe ritang’ani nigo bwarenge yasipi, na obwa kabere safiro, na obwa gatato kalkedoni, na obwa kane sumaridi," 
Revelation21:20 na obwa gatano saridoniki, na obwa gatano na rimo sardio, na obwa gatano na kabere kurusolito, na obwa gatano na gatato berulo, na obwa kianda topasio, na obwa ikomi kurusoparaso, na obwa ikomi na rimo hiakinto, na obwa ikomi na kabere ametisito." 
Revelation21:21 Ebiita biria ikomi na bibere nechiruru ikomi na ibere, kera egeita neruru eyemo. Na enchera y’omochie netahabu engiya ere buna ekerore getagotanga omobaso." 
Revelation21:22 Na inche tinarora Hekalu imeo, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae Omobui na Emanwa y’Eng’ondi nabwo bare Hekalu yaye." 
Revelation21:23 Na omochie oria toganeiri erioba gose omotienyi biyobarere, ekiagera obonene bwa Nyasae bwabaririe omobaso, na etaya yaye n’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi." 
Revelation21:24 Abanto b’ebisaku nabataare ase omobaso oye, na abaruoti b’ense nabarente obonene bwabo imeo." 
Revelation21:25 Ebiita bi’omochie oria tibigosiekwa ase omobaso nonya ng’ake, na obotuko tibokoba aroro." 
Revelation21:26 Na obonene bw’abanto b’ebisaku na ogosika kwabo nigo birarentwe imeo. 
Revelation21:27 Na imeo tikegosoa nonya ng’ake kende gionsi kere egetachenegeti, gose oyogokora okogechia, gose oyogoteba oborimo, otatiga baria barikire ase ebuku y’obogima y’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi." 
Revelation22:1 Erio omomalaika oria akanyorokia orooche rw’amache ’obogima rokomeka‐meka buna ekerore gekomeka‐meka, rokorua ase ekerogo ki’obonene kia Nyasae na eki’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi," 
Revelation22:2 nigo rogoeta gati‐gati y’enchera enene y’omochie. Chinsemo chionsi ibere chi’orooche roria noreo omote bw’obogima, okwama amatunda aye ara ikomi na kabere; nigo okorua amatunda kera omotienyi, na amato ’omote oyio nigo akogwenia abanto b’ebisaku." 
Revelation22:3 Okoragererigwa konde gwonsi tigokobao nonya ng’ake. Ekerogo ki’obonene kia Nyasae neki’Emanwa y’Eng’ondi nakebe imeo, na abasomba baye nabamokorere." 
Revelation22:4 Na barabwo nabamorore obosio bwaye, na erieta riaye naribe ase amasio abo igoro." 
Revelation22:5 Obotuko tibokobao nonya ng’ake, tibaganeiri oborabu bw’etaya gose omobaso bw’erioba, ekiagera Omonene Nyasae nababarerie omobaso, na barabwo nabagambe goika kare na kare." 
Revelation22:6 Erio agantebia, “Aya namang’ana ’obwegeni na ay’ekeene, na Omonene Nyasae, oyogotang’ana ababani n’Omoika oye, agatoma omomalaika oye, erinde aorokerie abasomba baye ayagwenerete gokoreka bwango." 
Revelation22:7 Rigereria, ninchiche bwango.” Nasesenirie ere oyorendete amang’ana ’obobani, ayarikire ase ebuku eye." 
Revelation22:8 Ninche Yohana naigwete amang’ana aya na nkayarora. Ngachia koyaigwa na koyarora nkagwa inse nsasime bosio bw’amagoro ’omomalaika oria onyorogetie aya. 
Revelation22:9 Agantebia, “Tokora igo! Inche nomosomba omogisangio oo, na oyo bw’abamino ababani, na obw’abwo barendete amang’ana ’ebuku eyio. Osasime Nyasae.”" 
Revelation22:10 Naende agantebia, “Tobisa amang’ana ’obobani bw’ebuku eye gose koyabeka ekemanyererio, ekiagera engaki ng’ang’e ere" 
Revelation22:11 Oyogokora ayatari boronge, tiga agenderere gokora ayatari boronge, na oyotachenegeti, tiga agenderere koba oyotachenegeti, na oyore omoronge, tiga agenderere gokora oboronge, na oyore omochenu agenderere gochenwa.”" 
Revelation22:12 “Rigereria, ninchiche bwango, ndetane eng’eria yane amo nainche, ning’ee kera omonto buna ogokora kwaye kore." 
Revelation22:13 Inche n’Alifa na Omega, Oyo bwe Ritang’ani na Oyo bw’Omoerio, Omochakano na Omoerio.”" 
Revelation22:14 Mbasesenirie abagochena chianga chiabo! Abwo mbaegwe ribaga barie amatunda ’omote bw’obogima na gosoa omochie goetera ase ebiita biaye. 
Revelation22:15 Korende agwo isiko nchireo chisese, naende mbareo abarogi, na abatomani, na abaiti, na abasasimi emegwekano na kera omonto oyobwanchete oborimo na kobokora." 
Revelation22:16 “Inche Yeso natomire omomalaika one kobarentera inwe oborori obo ase chikanisa. Inche ninche Ritina ria Daudi, na Oroiboro rwaye, na Eng’enang’eni ya Mambia, eria ekobara mono.”" 
Revelation22:17 Omoika na omoriakari nigo bagoteba, “Inchuo!” Na ere oyokoyaigwa, tiga atebe, “Inchuo!” Na ere oyore nerang’o, tiga ache, na oyobwanchete, tiga abogorie amache ’obogima bosa." 
Revelation22:18 Inche igo ngokurera kera omonto oyokoigwa amang’ana ’obobani bw’ebuku eye: Omonto onde bwensi karayamente, Nyasae namomentere amaakwa ayarikire ase ebuku eye;" 
Revelation22:19 na monto onde bwensi kararusie ensemo y’amang’ana ’obobani bw’ebuku eye, Nyasae narusie ensemo yaye ase omote oria bw’obogima, na ase omochie oria omochenu, ayarikire ase ebuku eye." 
Revelation22:20 Ere oyokorenta oborori obo, nigo agoteba, “Ee, ninchiche bwango!” Amina. Inchuo Omonene Yeso!"
